Name: Berneck S.A. Painéis e Serrados
Description:
A BERNECK é uma empresa brasileira com mais de 70 anos de história. Especializada em painéis MDP, MDF e HDF, além de Pinus e Teca serrados, possui plantas industriais com altíssima capacidade de produção e tecnologia de ponta. 
Todos os seus produtos são provenientes de florestas plantadas e são destinados à indústria de móveis, construção civil, automotiva, eletrônica, e embalagens, entre outras, no Brasil e no exterior.
Desde a sua fundação, em 1952, a empresa vem contribuindo para o desenvolvimento social e econômico por meio do desenvolvimento de capital humano e produtos inovadores e sustentáveis.

Name: EGGER Group
Description:
The family company, founded in 1961, employs approximately 12,000 people. At 22 plants across the world, they produce an extensive product range of wood-based materials (chip-boards, OSB and MDF boards) as well as timber. 

The company generated a turnover of EUR 4.13 billion in the 2024/2025 business year and has worldwide customers in the furniture industry, wood and flooring retailers, as well as DIY markets. 

EGGER products are found in countless areas of private and public life, including kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, offices, hotels and shops. EGGER is a full-range supplier for the furniture industry, interior design, wood construction, and wood-based flooring (laminate, cork, and design flooring) industries. Apart from our building products made of actual wood, all our shown and mentioned decors are reproductions, and as such, they offer durable, resilient, and high-quality, on-trend solutions for homes, public areas, and commercial spaces.

Netiquette:
LinkedIn is a great platform for lively discussions – that’s why we at EGGER look forward to your ideas, comments and ‘likes’! But just as with every other open communication platform out there, there are some rules we would ask you to keep in mind:
- Our working hours are Mo - Thu 9 AM - 5 PM, Fri 9 AM -12 PM CET – so please do not expect immediate replies during other times.
- Behind every user and admin account is a human being – so please respect everyone just as you wish to be respected.
- Our page is not the right place for insults, spam, advertising, discussions about religion or politics, activism, gender, propaganda or illegal content. This also applies to external sites you might link to.
- Internal information about EGGER should, of course, stay ‘internal’.
Please be aware that we might have to delete posts that violate any of the points above.
Enjoy your visit on our EGGER page!
imprint: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Data Protection Declaration: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: Guararapes - USA
Description: For over 41 years in the market, Guararapes manufactures MDF panels and it is one of the largest plywood panel exporter in Latin America. Currently operating with three factories in Caçador/SC (MDF), Palmas/PR (Plywood) and Santa Cecília/SC (Plywood).

Name: BrasPine
Description:
A BrasPine transforma o pinus, uma madeira renovável e de alta qualidade, em soluções inovadoras para acabamentos de construção e decoração, tanto para ambientes internos quanto externos.
Fabricamos mais de 4 mil itens, incluindo molduras (rodapé, sanca, roda teto, rodameio, cantoneiras), painéis, vigas, guarnições e componentes para portas, janelas e escadas, que conferem elegância, sofisticação e funcionalidade aos espaços.

Além disso, nosso portfólio inclui pellets de pinus, uma fonte de energia limpa e eficiente, que substitui combustíveis fósseis e atende tanto ao aquecimento residencial quanto a processos industriais de alta combustão, além do mercado pet.

Com um compromisso sólido com a sustentabilidade, cultivamos nossas próprias florestas de pinus, garantindo um ciclo produtivo responsável e alinhado à preservação ambiental.

Nossos produtos são fabricados com excelência nas cidades de Jaguariaíva e Telêmaco Borba, no Paraná. Com foco em expansão e presença global, estamos construindo uma nova unidade no Uruguai e contamos com escritórios em Porto Alegre e Curitiba.

Buscamos continuamente inovação e qualidade, valorizando as pessoas, os parceiros e as comunidades em que atuamos.

Somos a BrasPine: Mouldings, Pellets, Forest. O futuro em cada um de nós.

Name: Placas do Brasil S/A
Description:
A Placas do Brasil é especialista na fabricação e comercialização de painéis de MDF. Localizada no município de Pinheiros, Norte do Espírito Santo, somos uma empresa consolidada no mercado nacional e com atuação no exterior.
Nossa inspiração vem da natureza em suas nuances mais fiéis, formas e texturas para criar produtos idênticos ao natural porque essa é a nossa identidade.
Design, elegância e sofisticação, aliados a esta estética fidedigna à natureza e de altíssima qualidade dão formas aos diversos projetos e concretizam sonhos.
A brasilidade com toda sua potencialidade cultural permeia entre a história da empresa e estão presentes em nossos painéis de MDF. Provenientes de florestas de eucalipto 100% renováveis, produzidos em equipamentos de última geração e por meio de mecanismos sustentáveis.
Conheça mais sobre a Placas do Brasil visitando também o nosso site e nossas redes sociais.

Name: Kalesnikoff
Description:
Kalesnikoff designs and produces mass timber as well as modular and prefabricated mass timber, while continuing to mill specialized lumber products. This gives our team full control of quality and precision from the forest to design solutions to project completion. We have extensive experience working with architects, developers and general contractors to help create affordable and market multi-storey housing, commercial buildings, infrastructure including schools, firehalls, community centres, as well as workforce housing and other critical projects.


As a fourth generation, 85+ year old family-owned company, we have a strong track record of success, based on collaborative relationships with our customers and our community; all thanks to our team of 375 exceptional people.


We have proudly partnered with customers on hundreds of successful buildings in Western Canada and the Western U.S. Our various facilities are located in beautiful British Columbia, Canada, and all of our products are locally sourced and manufactured near Castlegar in the West Kootenays.

Learn more at www.kalesnikoff.com or:


· For mass timber and modular mass timber information and sales, please email mtsales@kalesnikoff.com

· For lumber information and sales, please email sales@kalesnikoff.com

· Career opportunities are listed under Careers on our website www.kalesnikoff.com

· General inquiries, please call 250-399-4211

Name: ROUGIER
Description:
Fondé en 1923, ROUGIER est un leader du bois africain responsable en Afrique Centrale, présent au Gabon et en République du Congo. Nous opérons dans la gestion de forêts naturelles 100% responsables et certifiées par des labels internationaux indépendants, dans la transformation industrielle et dans le commerce international.

Au Gabon et en République du Congo, nous gérons environ 1,5 million d’hectares de forêts certifiées par des organismes internationaux indépendants de renom (FSC au Gabon et LegalSource au Congo). Notre approche responsable guide toutes nos activités, de l'exploitation forestière assurée par nos filiales à la transformation industrielle locale et à la commercialisation internationale par Rougier Afrique International (RAI). 

Au Gabon, Rougier Gabon gère de manière responsable près de 900 000 ha de forêt, produisant grumes, sciages et produits transformés, alimentant l'industrie locale, notamment dans la zone d’investissement spéciale (ZIS) de Nkok, qui concentre 80 % des installations de transformation du bois du pays.

En République du Congo, Rougier Congo (Mokabi SA) gère de manière responsable 586 000 ha de forêt, produisant annuellement environ 100 000 m³ de grumes et 40 000 m3 de sciages dans la partie nord du pays, à la frontière avec la République centrafricaine.

Enfin, Rougier Afrique International commercialise l’ensemble des produits de marque Rougier (grumes, sciages, contreplaqués, lamellés-collés et blocs solides aboutés), faisant ainsi la promotion du bois gabonais et congolais sur les marchés mondiaux.
 
Retrouvez les sociétés du Groupe: 
•         au Gabon - ROG : https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/11139185
•         au Congo - MOKABI : https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/22303528

Name: Decospan
Description: Here at Decospan, we develop and manufacture wood veneer based products. We do this in a creative and innovative way with respect for nature and the environment. Decospan creates beauty by processing natural wood veneer. Our company develops products based on this precious wood in a creative and sustainable manner. With our treasure chest of more than 160 wood species, our state-of-the-art machines, our sustainable business model and our flexible employees, we are able to develop new products that meet the needs of all stakeholders. Welcome to the wonderful world of Decospan.

Name: CarmoWood
Description: With 45 years of experience, Carmo Wood stands out as a national and European reference in the development of treated wood solutions for agriculture, protection, construction, engineering, tourism, leisure, and telecommunications.

Name: Unilin Panels
Description: Unilin Panels delivers innovative wood-based panels and accessories for construction and interior design projects. From versatile particleboard and MDF to high-quality HPL and melamine panels, we offer the materials to bring your ideas to life with precision and style.

Name: Pfeifer Group
Description:
Die österreichische Pfeifer Holding GmbH wurde 1948 gegründet und wird heute in dritter Generation familiengeführt. Sie beschäftigt 2.600 Mitarbeiter:innen an 13 Standorten in Österreich, Deutschland, Tschechien und Finnland. Der Firmensitz befindet sich in Imst (Tirol/Österreich). 

In den Sägewerken der Gruppe werden jährlich rund 5,4 Mio. Festmeter Holz eingeschnitten und entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette zu Schnittholz und Hobelware, Betonschalungsplatten, Schalungsträgern, Brettsperrholz (CLT), Brettschichtholz, verleimten Massivholzplatten sowie Palettenklötzen, Briketts, Einstreu, Pellets und Biostrom verarbeitet. 

Privacy Policy:
https://www.pfeifergroup.com/de/servicenavigation/datenschutzerklaerung/

Name: Sudati
Description:
Criamos a marca que você vai deixar no mundo.

A Sudati é fabricante de MDF desde dezembro de 2008, quando entrou em operação sua unidade industrial de Otacílio Costa - SC. Produziu o primeiro painel de MDF do estado, e atualmente concentra sua comercialização no mercado nacional.

Em janeiro de 1998, a Sudati iniciou suas atividades produzindo painéis compensados, e atualmente posiciona-se como uma das empresas mais importantes do setor de base florestal do Brasil, com subsidiárias nos estados do Paraná e de Santa Catarina. Ela destina sua produção de compensado para a exportação, e é pioneira no Brasil na transformação de toras para compensado de pinus elliottiis.

Para garantir um produto de acordo para as regras internacionais, a Sudati mantém modernos parques industriais, com controle de qualidade avançado, testes laboratoriais em todas as unidades, investimento constante em tecnologia e qualificação, além de manter um compromisso com práticas sustentáveis.

A Sudati possui um estoque florestal regulador considerável, além de diversas parcerias que possibilitam a cooperação tecnológica e fornecimento de mudas para pequenos produtores para que possam melhor utilizar suas terras e garantir matérias primas no futuro.

Name: Sierra Pacific Industries
Description:
GROW WITH US
Sierra Pacific Industries is a fourth-generation, family-owned forest products company. Started in 1949 with one small sawmill – today we employ over 6500 crew members and are one of the largest U.S. lumber producers. We are committed to responsible land management to protect the environment while providing quality wood products and renewable power to consumers. 

SPI owns and sustainably manages over 2.4 million acres of timberland in California, Oregon and Washington. We are growing forests for our future, planting over 10 million new trees every year. Our forests are carefully managed by a team of foresters, wildlife biologists, botanists & other professionals. 

Our advanced manufacturing processes allow us to utilize nearly 100% of every piece of wood we bring to our mills.  We produce lumber, millwork, and landscaping material. Any byproduct material is converted into electricity in our eight biomass-fueled power plants.

Our Sierra Pacific Windows division crafts windows and doors at our 5 manufacturing plants from wood grown and harvested in our own forests. From planted seed to delivered window and door, we have a truly vertically integrated process. Today, Sierra Pacific products are installed in 30 countries around the globe, with more than 600 dealers and distributors across the country. 


WHY JOIN OUR TEAM?
In addition to paid vacation and 10 paid holidays, we provide an excellent benefit package including a full Health Benefits Plan (including medical, dental, and vision) with low-cost premiums, a 401(k) with Company Match, additional Retirement Contributions, and company-paid Life Insurance. Every year since 1979, the Sierra Pacific Foundation has provided an average of $500,000 in scholarships to help the children of our crew members with education expenses.

See a full list of our current job openings at: www.spi-ind.com/careers

Name: Modvion
Description: We build wind turbine towers. In wood. Modvion accelerates the transition to renewable energy and materials by building wind turbine towers made from laminated wood – nature’s own carbon fibre. Wooden designs enable radical reductions in emissions by replacing emission-heavy material such as steel and concrete. Thanks to a patented modular system, Modvion has been able to develop wind towers that can reach the heights the wind power industry is striving for whilst remaining cost-efficient. The modules can be easily stacked on trucks and transported on roads, without the need for road closures and lengthy permit procedures. Modvion's tower technology is the next generation of tall, carbon-neutral towers for the wind power industry - renewable energy built with renewable materials. The operation is part-financed by the Swedish Energy Agency, the Västra Götaland region and the EU program Horizon 2020 EIC Accelerator.

Name: EGGER UK
Description:
The family company, founded in 1961, employs more than 11,000 people. At 22 plants across the world, it produces an extensive product range of wood-based materials (chipboards, OSB and MDF boards) as well as timber. 

EGGER (UK) Limited has two plants: EGGER Hexham in Northumberland and EGGER Barony in Ayrshire. There are over 800 EGGER employees in the UK, this includes EGGER Forestry and EGGER Timberpak Ltd.

The EGGER Group generated a turnover of EUR 4.13 billion in the 2023/2024 business year and has worldwide customers in the furniture industry, wood and flooring retailers, as well as DIY markets. 

EGGER products are found in countless areas of private and public life, including kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, offices, hotels and shops. EGGER is a full-range supplier for the furniture industry, interior design, wood construction, and wood-based flooring (laminate, cork, and design flooring) industries. Apart from our building products made of actual wood, all our shown and mentioned decors are reproductions, and as such, they offer durable, resilient, and high-quality, on-trend solutions for homes, public areas, and commercial spaces.

Name: EGGER France
Description:
EGGER est une entreprise familiale autrichienne, fondée en 1961, et qui emploie plus de 11 000 personnes à travers ses différents sites dans le monde. Une large gamme de produits à base de bois (panneaux de particules, panneaux OSB et MDF) est produite au sein de ses 22 usines. 

Acteur majeur européen dans l’industrie des panneaux dérivés du bois, EGGER est un fournisseur complet pour l’industrie du meuble, l’aménagement intérieur, la construction bois et les revêtements de sol. 

Nos produits sont présents dans de nombreux domaines de la vie privée tels que les cuisines, les salles de bain ainsi que dans les espaces publics tels que les hôtels ou les locaux commerciaux. 

Exceptés nos produits de construction à base de bois véritable, tous les décors mentionnés sont des reproductions qui offrent des solutions tendances durables et résistantes de qualité supérieure. 

Envie de nous rejoindre ? Retrouvez nos offres d'emplois sur : http://www.egger.com/jobs

Mentions légales: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Déclaration de protection des données: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: Pfleiderer Group
Description:
The Pfleiderer Group is a leading wood-based panel manufacturer in Europe with annual sales of approx. 700 million euros and around 2,000 employees. The company has its headquarter in Neumarkt in der Oberpfalz (Germany). Pfleiderer has five production locations in Germany and one in Poland, and sales branches in England, the Netherlands, Switzerland, Romania and France. Pfleiderer offers a complete range of products and services with a focus on furniture making, the timber trade, interior fitout and timber construction and pools the Duropal and Thermopal product ranges under the Pfleiderer umbrella brand and is a partner of industry, commerce, installers, designers and architects. 

Imprint: https://www.pfleiderer.com/global-en/imprint
Privacy Policy: https://www.pfleiderer.com/global-en/privacy-policy

Name: FORDAQ
Description:
Fordaq is a global business information and trading platform for the wood sector - used to buy and sell wood, discover and track companies, people and market trends.

Think of it as LinkedIn + Alibaba + Catalog of companies - built exclusively for the wood business.

Thousands of professionals use Fordaq daily to connect, trade and analyse opportunities across:
   * Sawmills & Wood Processing
   * Logs, Lumber, Panels & Building Materials
   * Importers, Exporters & Traders
   * Furniture & Joinery Manufacturers
   * Forestry, Biomass & Energy Products
   * Machinery, Tools & Service Providers

Each company profile includes:
   * Description, trust rate, founding year, location, certificates and activities
   * Key people and verified contacts
   * Marketplace listings for buying and selling
   * Website, logo and relevant links

Fordaq makes the global wood industry transparent, connected and data-driven.

Name: Groupe Gascogne
Description: Créé par des sylviculteurs landais en 1925, le groupe Gascogne est présent dans l’ensemble de la filière Bois-Papier-Emballage, avec 4 activités complémentaires et intégrées.

Name: Mercer Mass Timber
Description:
At Mercer Mass Timber (MMT), we design and manufacture mass timber systems built for constructability. From early design through installation, our DfMA (Design for Manufacturing and Assembly) approach streamlines how low-carbon buildings come together – faster, greener, and smarter. 

With three state-of-the-art factories and the strength of Mercer International, MMT is helping build the next generation of sustainable structures across North America.

Name: Accsys
Description:
Accsys Technologies PLC (LSE AIM: AXS, Euronext Amsterdam: AXS) is a fast growing business with a purpose: changing wood to change the world.

We enhance the natural properties of wood to make high performance building products that are extremely durable and stable and address the increasing demand for sustainable solutions for the built environment.

The primary focus of the business is the production and licensing of Accoya solid wood and Tricoya wood elements.  Find out more about these products on their brand pages here on LinkedIn, or their websites: www.accoya.com and www.tricoya.com

Manufactured through the group’s proprietary acetylation process, these sustainable products exhibit superior dimensional stability and durability compared with other natural and treated timber and wood elements (wood chips, fibres and particles).

Accsys Technologies PLC  is quoted on the London Stock Exchange AIM market and Euronext Amsterdam Stock Exchange. Prices and trading histories of each can be found under the ticker AXS.

Name: EGGER Türkiye
Description:
1961 yılında kurulan grup şirketi, dünya çapında yaklaşık 12.000 çalışanı ve 22 üretim tesisi ile ahşap bazlı malzemelerin önde gelen uluslararası üreticisidir. EGGER, mobilya ve iç mekân tasarımı, ahşap yapı ve ahşap bazlı döşeme alanlarında tam kapsamlı bir tedarikçidir, bu da onu mobilya endüstrisi, perakende ve yapı malzeme mağazaları için güvenilir bir ortak haline getirir. 2024/2025 mali yılında EGGER Grup 4,13 milyar Euro ciro elde etmiştir.

Sürdürülebilir iş uygulamaları EGGER için temel odak noktasıdır. Şirket, iklim koruma konusundaki sorumluluğunu ciddiye almakta ve 2050 yılına kadar Net Zero hedefine ulaşmak için kararlılıkla çalışmaktadır.

EGGER, Gebze’de bulunan üretim tesisinde PVC, ABS, PMMA ve alüminyum kenar bantlarının tümünü tek çatı altında üreten, dünyanın en büyük kenar bandı üreticisidir. 1000’e yakın çalışanın istihdam ettiği 60.000 m2’lik alana kurulu Gebze tesisinde, modern donanımlara sahip farklı üretim hatırlarında yıllık ortalama 1.5 milyar metre kenar bandı üretmekte; gerek ürün çeşitliliği gerekse hizmetleri ile çözüm odaklı faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

Künye: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Veri Gizlilik Beyanı: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: EGGER D-A-CH
Description:
Das seit 1961 bestehende Familienunternehmen ist ein international führender Holzwerkstoffhersteller mit rund 12.000 Mitarbeitenden und 22 Produktionsstandorten weltweit. 

In Deutschland beschäftigt EGGER rund 3.600 Mitarbeitende an den Standorten Brilon, Bünde, Gifhorn, Bevern, Marienmünster, Wismar und Markt Bibart. An den österreichischen Standorten St. Johann in Tirol, Wörgl und Unterradlberg arbeiten rund 1.800 Mitarbeitende.

EGGER ist Komplettanbieter für den Möbel- und Innenausbau, für den konstruktiven Holzbau sowie für holzwerkstoffbasierende Fußböden und damit ein verlässlicher Partner der Möbelindustrie, des Holz- und Bodenbelagshandels sowie der Baumärkte. Zu finden sind EGGER Produkte in unzähligen Bereichen des privaten und öffentlichen Lebens: in Küche, Bad, Büro sowie Wohn- und Schlafräumen. Im Geschäftsjahr 2024/2025  erwirtschaftete die EGGER Gruppe einen Umsatz von 4,13 Mrd. Euro. 

Der Aspekt des nachhaltigen Wirtschaftens steht bei EGGER im Mittelpunkt. Das Familienunternehmen nimmt seine Verantwortung für den Klimaschutz ernst und bekennt sich zum ambitionierten Net Zero Ziel bis 2050. 66 % des eingesetzten Holzes in den EGGER Holzwerkstoffen stammen bereits heute aus Recycling oder Sägenebenprodukten. Am Ende ihrer langen Lebensdauer sind EGGER Produkte wiederum zum Großteil recyclingfähig und können von Neuem in den Kreislauf eingebracht werden. So arbeitet EGGER laufend an seiner Zielsetzung, „Mehr aus der wertvollen Ressource Holz“ zu machen und damit nachhaltiges Leben und Arbeiten zu ermöglichen.

Mehr über uns als Arbeitgeber finden Sie auf to.egger.link/karriere

Impressum & Datenschutzerklärung: www.egger.com

Name: Cleaf
Description:
Cleaf is an Italian company producing innovative surfaces and solutions for the furniture and interior design industries.
Faced panels, laminates and edges exclusively manufactured at production sites in Brianza are installed worldwide by architects and companies building inspirational spaces for living and working.

Name: Koskisen Oyj
Description:
Koskisen is an international wood processing specialist known for its agility and ability to listen to the customer. We utilise our valuable wood raw material as thoroughly as possible, up to the last particle of sawdust. We manufacture high-quality and sustainable circular bioeconomy products that store carbon for decades.

Koskisen on yli satavuotias kansainvälinen puunjalostuksen erikoisosaaja, joka tunnetaan ketteryydestään ja kyvystään kuunnella asiakasta. Hyödynnämme arvokkaan puuraaka-aineen tarkasti, viimeistä purua myöten. Valmistamme korkealaatuisia ja kestäviä biokiertotalouden tuotteita, joihin hiili sitoutuu vuosikymmeniksi

Name: Interpro Wood Industries L.L.C.
Description:
We are a reliable authority in the realm of premium sustainable lumber and wood products. Our team of professionals are dedicated to providing unwavering excellence in both our products and services, ensuring a consistent and exceptional experience for all our valued clients.

At Interpro, we are committed to sustainability and environmental responsibility. We source our wood from responsibly managed forests and work hard to minimize waste and reduce our impact on the environment. Our dedication to sustainability has earned us a reputation as a trusted and reliable partner for eco-conscious businesses and individuals. 

With a wide range of lumber products available, including the precise production of crates, frames, pallets, and cable drums, we have the expertise and experience to help you find the right products for your needs. Our team of experienced professionals are always here to help, and we are committed to delivering exceptional service and value to our clients.

Name: EGGER LATAM
Description:
La empresa familiar, fundada en 1961, es líder mundial en la fabricación de materiales a base de madera y cuenta con aproximadamente 11.200 empleados y 22 plantas de producción en todo el mundo. EGGER es un proveedor de integral para muebles y diseño de interiores, para la construcción en madera y para pisos a base de madera, lo que lo convierte en un socio confiable para la industria del mueble, los distribuidores de madera y pisos y las tiendas de hobistas. En el ejercicio económico 2023/2024, el Grupo EGGER generó una facturación de  4130 millones EUR.

Ser un negocio sostenible siempre está en el centro de las actividades de EGGER: el 65 % de la madera utilizada  proviene del reciclaje o de subproductos. Al final de su larga vida, los productos EGGER son, a su vez, en gran parte reciclables y pueden reintroducirse en el ciclo. Con esta y muchas otras medidas, la empresa familiar trabaja constantemente hacia su objetivo de "crear más a partir del valioso recurso de la madera" y, por lo tanto, permitir una vida y un trabajo sostenibles.

Notas legales: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Declaración de protección de datos: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: MADECENTRO
Description:
Con pasión, creamos y desarrollamos muebles y ambientes innovadores.
 
Ahora somos más de 230 puntos de venta en Colombia!

Name: Alpi  S.p.A.
Description: ALPI is a pioneering manufacturer and leading producer of decorative surfaces made of reconstituted wood. The company was the first to industrialise this process. The perfect balance between manual skills and high technology makes the company unique: on the one hand, ALPI is pure innovation, ahead of the demands of the market; on the other craftsmanship.

Name: Freres Wood
Description:
This family owned and operated business started with one man and a dream back in 1922. And it’s kept going to this day by always looking at things in a new way.

From the expansion of plywood after World War II to today’s revolutionary Mass Ply, even how we grow and harvest our wood, we’ve never been one to sit still with the status quo. You’ll always find us pushing forward for what we’re confident will be the next 100 years.

 Scientists. Naturalists. Loggers. We’re proof they can all happily co-exist. We were born and raised among the trees. So we do everything we can to protect them. Following the Oregon Forest Practices Act we use scientifically- supported methods to sustainably harvest and replant the Douglas Fir trees on our 17,000 acres of timberland. And we respect our natural resources using every part of the wood from lumber, to veneer, to fuel. The result is a certification by the American Tree Farm System (ATFS).

Our companies include Freres Lumber Co., Inc, Freres Timber, and Evergreen BioPower LLC. Freres Lumber has two manufacturing locations in the Santiam Canyon.

Freres Timber owns and operates over 17,000 acres of timberland, primarily located in the Santiam Canyon. Harvesting is performed on a sustained yield basis, and is managed to provide high quality timber for current and future generations.

Name: Accoya
Description:
Accoya wood is produced using Accsys’ proprietary patented process, which effectively converts sustainably grown softwoods and non-durable hardwoods into what is best described as a "high technology wood". Distinguished by its durability, dimensional stability and, perhaps most importantly of all, its reliability (in terms of consistency of both supply and quality), 

Accoya wood is particularly suited to exterior applications where performance and appearance are valued. The Accoya wood production process does not compromise the wood's strength or machinability. The combination of dimensional stability, durability and retained strength means that Accoya wood offers a wealth of new opportunities to architects, designers and specifiers.

Name: RoyOMartin
Description: Martco L.L.C., known by its trade name RoyOMartin, is one of a group of vertically integrated companies owned by the Martin family focused on land, timber, and mineral resources, with special emphasis on sustainable forests and forest-product manufacturing businesses. The RoyOMartin name honors the business pioneer and Martin family patriarch, Roy O. Martin Sr., who began with a small sawmill in Alexandria, Louisiana, in 1923, and soon thereafter bought a few acres of timberland.

Name: EGGER North America
Description:
As the global leader in the manufacturing of wood-based materials, our innovative decors and textured surfaces are trusted by architects, designers and fabricators worldwide. With a comprehensive product portfolio, EGGER’s perfect decor match system includes a range of Thermally Fused Laminate (TFL) panels, laminate and edge banding. This decor match solution makes life easier for our customers by enabling them to work with us as a single supplier. 

Founded in 1961 in Tyrol, Austria, EGGER is a global, family-owned company that manufactures wood-based solutions for the furniture, interior design and flooring industries. Our extensive and value-added products, including thermally fused laminate (TFL), laminates, raw particleboard, edge banding, MDF Moulding and laminate flooring, are ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, offices, closets, hotel and retail spaces.

We are bringing our innovative, high-quality products and services to North America with the construction of our first North American manufacturing facility located in Lexington, North Carolina. This $700 million, 15-year investment will bring approximately 770 direct jobs to the area. The Lexington plant, EGGER's 20th plant worldwide, will see an initial annual production capacity of 400,000 m3 expected to increase to 750,000 m3 at full build-out.

LinkedIn is a great platform for lively discussions, and we at EGGER look forward to your ideas and comments. As with every open communication platform, there are some guidelines we ask you to keep in mind:

Insults, spam, advertising, discussions about religion or politics, activism, religion, propaganda or illegal content are not appropriate on this platform. This also applies to external site links. Please be aware that we may delete comments or posts that include this type of information. 

Our working hours are Monday-Friday 9 am-5 pm EST. We will reply as soon as possible.

Note: Some images may show reproductions of decors.

Name: KLH Massivholz
Description:
KLH Massivholz is the pioneer and leading global expert and with more than 25 years of experience in the production of large-format cross-laminated timber elements. Distributed via a worldwide network consisting of two subsidiaries in UK (KLH UK Ltd. since 2005) and the USA (KLH US Holding Corp. since 2014), as well as representation offices in over 20 countries. KLH has 2 manufacturing sites in Austria, combining our years of experience and learning with state-of-the-art technology.
 
As a family owned company, we see ourselves not just as a manufacturer, but rather as a project partner, providing together with the local sales partners a wide range of technical services for beautiful, sustainable, innovative and efficient building solutions. Our in-house structural engineering department and our project coordinators are happy to advise and support you in technical matters, and we also have numerous online tools available via our KLHdesigner.
 
KLH has received a number of international awards and delivered CLT panels for more than 40.000 reference buildings worldwide. With each cubic meter of KLH - CLT, the company makes a significant contribution to reducing the carbon footprint of the construction process.

Name: Listone Giordano
Description:
Listone Giordano: innovazione radicata nella tradizione | Innovation rooted in tradition 

La storia di Listone Giordano nasce nelle foreste di Borgogna, in Francia. Nel 1983 Guglielmo Giordano brevettò il primo pavimento in legno rivoluzionario, unendo bellezza naturale e tecnologia innovativa. Il cuore di ogni parquet è lo speciale supporto in multistrato di betulla, stabile e indeformabile a vita.

Oggi il brand continua a innovare con produzione sostenibile e gestione forestale responsabile, ispirata alla tradizione francese. Ogni collezione unisce artigianalità, ricerca tecnologica e design italiano, ed è protagonista in prestigiosi progetti residenziali e architettonici internazionali.

Listone Giordano is the keeper of craftsmanship and innovation. Since 1983, it has blended nature’s gift with human ingenuity to create unique wood flooring. Its birch multi-layer core ensures stability and timeless beauty. Today, the brand combines sustainable production, Italian design, and global excellence, featured in top residential and architectural projects worldwide.

Name: PFLEIDERER France | Duropal - Thermopal
Description:
Le groupe Pfleiderer est l’un des principaux acteurs dans la production de panneaux dérivés du bois.
2500 employés, 6 sites de production, env. 700 millions d'euros de chiffre d'affaires sur l'exercice 2024.
Nous proposons une gamme complète de produits et de services, destinés aux secteurs de l'ameublement et du mobilier, de l'aménagement intérieur - extérieur et de la construction. Pfleiderer regroupe les gammes de produits Duropal et Thermopal sous la marque Pfleiderer. Nous sommes partenaires des acteurs industriels, de la distribution, de l'artisanat, des designers et des architectes.

Panneaux de particules et de fibres (MDF - HDF) bruts et revêtus, panneaux mélaminés (PPSM) et laqués, stratifiés haute pression (HPL), panneaux compacts, éléments replaqués, plans de travail, panneaux de construction et d’emballages MFP (type OSB) # BalanceBoard, ClassicBoard, PremiumBoard, DecoBoard, PrimeBoard, LivingBoard, StyleBoard, Duropal, Thermopal.

Mentions légales: https://www.pfleiderer.com/fr-fr/mentions-legales
Protection des données: https://www.pfleiderer.com/fr-fr/protection-des-donnees

Name: Groupe ISB
Description:
Over the past fifty years, ISB Group has maintained its position as the French industrial leader on the home and construction markets. This innovative company is driven by a ‘Made in France’ culture, gradually becoming a benchmark in timber trading and processing in France, gradually
upgrading its reputation from manufacturer to timber logistics specialist.

The ISB Group has 470 employees in France and generates € 230 million in sales in France and abroad. The ISB Group has 5 production sites and 6 logistics platforms.

Five strong brands, referring to their market, have shaped their reputation over the years.

Silverwood, designer of timber solutions for the home and construction sectors, is the French leader of planned goods (cladding, decking, panelling).

With over 300,000 m3 delivered each year, Sinbpla is the French leader in panel/plywood and softwood trading for frames and joinery work. Sinbpla also offers structural and roofing products.

Carib, a timber product specialist for DIY superstores and stores, produces and offers a wide array of planned goods for home interiors and the exterior applications.

Wood 710 is the specialist timber cladding renovation brand. As timber cladding requires delicate and expert maintenance, Wood 710 offers three different services: cleaning, renovation and replacement.

Building company James specialises in glued laminated timber and helps clients through the key stages of their project, from the design to the laying phase. James first earned its reputation in the equestrian sector, but later
branched out to the industrial, public, agricultural and commercial markets.

Name: Cema Bois de l'Atlas
Description: Engagé principalement au Maroc, la société Cema Bois de l’Atlas crée en 1946, est une entreprise industrielle spécialisée dans la transformation de bois et de ses dérivés. Leader de son marché national, et premier fabriquant de panneaux à base de bois en Afrique, sa diversité de produits et son expertise qualité lui permettent de couvrir divers marchés au Maroc et à l’export. La forte culture d’entreprise de Cema Bois de l’Atlas, sa politique de diversification de produits, de modernisation et de développement des outils et procédés de production, lui alloue une place incontournable sur le marché Marocain et sur les marchés Européens. A travers ses multiples investissements récents, CEMA BOIS DE L’ATLAS se place en position de force sur le marché, avec des délais de production raccourcis mettant ses clients au cœur de ses préoccupations. Cette culture client et cette politique industriel, permettent de satisfaire l’ensemble des besoins émanant du marché, en mettant à disposition de nos artisans menuisiers et industriels du bois, des produits élaborés, de fabrication marocaine respectant les plus exigeantes des normes au niveau international.

Name: M. Kaindl GmbH
Description:
We love wood! Kaindl is not only a leading manufacturer of finished wood-based panels, as well as laminate and real wood floorings, but also stands for the continuous development of ideas, new technologies and innovations. What began in 1897 in Lungötz, Austria as a small sawmill, has developed into a present day global player and innovation leader in the interior design and flooring sector. Whether floorings, worktops, decor or veneered boards – our product world is versatile and rich in variety. 

𝗕𝗼𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘀, 𝗙𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗿𝘀, 𝗖𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗲𝗿𝘀 – 𝗞𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗱𝗹 𝗮𝘀 𝗮𝗻 𝗲𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗼𝘆𝗲𝗿.  
It is not only their technical skills that distinguish our some 800 employees. It is their passion for wood as a material and for our innovative product range. The experience of our long-standing employees, paired with the ambitious ideas of our young coworkers – all this bonds us at Kaindl and makes the company so successful. 

In order to remain a world market leader, we are permanently on a passionate journey which is linked to committed work. This is why we ask ourselves daily: How and what can we do better?  

𝗗𝗼 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝘄𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗷𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝘂𝘀 𝗼𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗷𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗻𝗲𝘆? 
As an efficient, forward-looking and sustainably managed company, we offer modern workplaces, interesting career opportunities, diverse training and CPD programmes as well as fair remuneration.

Become part of our dynamic team!

Name: Arbec Forest Products
Description: Arbec Forest Products is proud to offer more than just a job. We create an unparalleled work environment where safety, continuous improvement, sustainable development and growth are our top priorities. Our working conditions are among the best in the industry, and we continually invest in our people, our facilities and our communities to build strong, lasting relationships. Joining Arbec means choosing an exceptional living environment. Our facilities in Shawinigan and Amos, Quebec, and Miramichi, New Brunswick, offer you and your family the unique opportunity to live in dynamic communities with an incomparable quality of life and privileged access to the most magnificent natural landscapes. At Arbec, you're not just joining a company, you're joining a real family where personal and professional fulfillment is a priority. We invite you to consult this page regularly to discover the exceptional opportunities we offer. Don't hesitate to send us your unsolicited application to the corresponding e-mail address. Choose excellence and join the Arbec family!

Name: M. Kaindl GmbH
Description:
We love wood! Kaindl is not only a leading manufacturer of finished wood-based panels, as well as laminate and real wood floorings, but also stands for the continuous development of ideas, new technologies and innovations. What began in 1897 in Lungötz, Austria as a small sawmill, has developed into a present day global player and innovation leader in the interior design and flooring sector. Name: ATULAM
Description:
Située à Jarnages (23) dans le Limousin, l’entreprise Atulam est spécialisée, depuis plus de cinquante ans, dans la fabrication de menuiseries en bois sur mesure.
Matériau noble et robuste, le bois nous permet de réaliser des menuiseries esthétiques et de qualité. Positionnés sur le marché du haut de gamme, nous apportons un soin particulier tant au mode de fabrication qu’à la finition de nos réalisations.
Portes, fenêtres, coulissants, nous vendons des menuiseries extérieures à des clients professionnels installés dans toute la France.

Name: SWISS KRONO France
Description:
Issu d’une entreprise familiale de plus de 50 ans d’expérience,
le groupe SWISS KRONO est aujourd’hui devenu un leader
européen dans le domaine des matériaux à base de bois et
emploie plus de 4500 salariés sur ses 10 sites de production
implantés dans 8 pays (Suisse, France, Allemagne, Hongrie,
Pologne, Ukraine, Russie et USA).

C’est en 1988 que le groupe s’installe dans l’hexagone au
travers de sa filiale SWISS KRONO SAS, basée à Sully-sur-
Loire, dans le Loiret. La société emploie aujourd’hui plus de
400 personnes pour produire et commercialiser des produits
à base de bois destinés à la construction, l’agencement ou
l’ameublement : panneaux et dalles de particules, OSB et
MDF, panneaux décoratifs mélaminés, stratifiés, bandes de
chants, tablettes et plans de travail…

Concernée par la nature et l’environnement, SWISS KRONO
favorise l’utilisation de bois certifiés PEFC et contribue
à la gestion durable des forêts au travers de ses propres
exploitations forestières. Implantée au coeur d’un massif
forestier et située au plus près des grands centres de
consommation, SWISS KRONO diminue les distances à
parcourir pour s’approvisionner et livrer ses produits,
réduisant ainsi de manière importante son empreinte carbone.
Le groupe a réalisé de très lourds investissements ces
dernières années pour réduire la dépendance de ses usines
aux énergies fossiles en utilisant les poussières et résidus
de matière première en tant que combustible. De plus,
l’utilisation de bois pour la fabrication de panneaux permet de
fixer durablement le CO2 de l’atmosphère dans des produits de
construction ou d’ameublement qui pourront eux-mêmes être
revalorisés en fin de vie.

Entretenir les ressources naturelles, protéger l’environnement,
innover, transmettre sa passion du bois et la rendre accessible
à tous, tels sont les engagements de SWISS KRONO.

Name: FLORIAN S.p.A.
Description:
Leader mondiale nel mercato del legno di latifoglia, punto di riferimento per la produzione, commercio e distribuzione di di legno massiccio, pannelli, compensati, multistrato e pavimenti in legno per interno ed esterno.

Dal 1950 il perfetto connubio tra specializzazione e strategia nella gestione delle risorse naturali rende FLORIAN SPA l’interlocutore ideale per chiunque cerchi un professionista del legno con standard di lavoro molto elevati, un’organizzazione armonica ed efficiente; un serio impegno verso la salvaguardia ambientale garantita dalla certificazione FSC.

Name: Ducerf Group
Description:
In 1885, Jean Ducerf installed his first sawmill in Burgundy in the heart of the best forests in Europe. The place was ideal for developing his activities and having permanent access to oak and other hardwoods.

From generation to generation, the family group expanded. He grew the business, invested in new sites in France, put innovative processes in place, exported to many countries and evolved at the same time as the market. Therein was his strength: adapt and innovate while respecting the material and those who worked with him.

At Ducerf, wood is holistically, together with all its applications. The group integrated the processes of 1st transformation and 2nd transformation of hardwoods, always with oak as the main species.

Concerned for the environment, the family enterprise has adopted an eco-responsible approach in their daily activities. Waste is recycled, the wood commes from sustainably managed forests, the teams travel to site by bicycle.

Today, it's the fourth generation of Ducerf, represented by Jacques Ducerf, that's in charge of the Group, with the fifth generation already in action at Jacques' side!

A family history that makes the Ducerf Group one of the leaders in the timber industry.

A group whose motivations were never in doubt: Quality, Innovation, Passion.

Name: Grupo Indusparquet
Description:
Excelência em pisos de madeira.
Mais de 50 anos de experiência.
Design em harmonia com o meio ambiente.

Name: Minelli Group
Description:
From custom components to innovative solutions. Since 1937.

Mastering woodcraft, streamlining systems, innovating materials.

Since 1937, we've specialized in premium custom-made wood components, but our expertise goes beyond that: we offer comprehensive design and production support with a variety of materials and are at the forefront of researching and developing innovative wood-based solutions.

Name: Chartes 21 - Les professionnels du bois s'engagent
Description:
Les chartes de qualité 21 :
Les chartes de qualité 21 regroupent des entreprises de charpente et de menuiserie qui ont décidé d’associer le bois, matériau naturel et renouvelable, aux objectifs de développement durable contenus dans l’AGENDA 21. Pour cela, les entreprises signataires s’engagent sur le terrain de la qualité technique (durabilité et performance), de l’engagement environnemental et du respect d’exigences sociétales.

Name: Woodstoxx
Description:
Woodstoxx develops, sells, and installs high-end wood flooring and cladding for both interior and exterior applications, serving both the project market and the residential market. 

A commitment to quality, combined with strong craftsmanship and innovation, is at the core of our business. Driven by our passion and experience, we strive to guide each customer in making the best choice. 

Founders Robbert Desmet and Gregory Minne established the company in 2007. Today, Woodstoxx comprises a team of almost 100 dynamic individuals, including 12 installation teams. Additionally, around 100 subcontractors work for us on a daily basis.

Woodstoxx has offices in Ghent, Menin and Antwerp. In January 2025, we will also be opening an office in Brussels.

Name: LEVIEUX MENUISIERS
Description:
Contribuer au rayonnement de Paris depuis 1898. 
Des produits uniques, réalisés avec passion :
 - Menuiseries techniques et performantes dans le respect des traditions et de l’histoire des bâtiments classés. 
- Le châssis cintré en plan bombé, 
- le châssis cintré, 
- l’oeil de boeuf 
- les fenêtres à gueule de loup 
- les fenêtres à recouvrement 
- les fenêtres résistantes au feu 

Depuis 5 générations, la menuiserie LEVIEUX se distingue par sa capacité à répondre aux projets architecturaux les plus complexes La société LEVIEUX ne se contente pas de rénover les bâtiments dans la plus pure tradition de leur histoire. Elle adapte l’ensemble de ses menuiseries aux normes actuelles, tant dans la sécurité que dans le respect de l’environnement.

Name: L'Art du Bois
Description:
La menuiserie est notre métier voire même notre "Art" 

Nous le développons au travers de chaque collaborateur qui, de part sa propre personnalité et de ses compétences professionnelles, fait de l'Art du Bois une entreprise au service des particuliers et des professionnels.

Nos prestations peuvent être traditionnelles ou contemporaines : 

 Menuiseries extérieures : bois, PVC, Aluminium      
 Bardage, terrasse et autres aménagements extérieurs
 Agencement de bureaux et magasins
 Agencement intérieur (cuisines, placards, dressings, escalier, mobilier divers, parquet, boiseries.....)          
 Isolation

 Un projet ? Contactez nous !

 03 25 80 09 70
 lartdubois10@wanadoo.fr

Name: Balti Spoon
Description:
Balti Spoon is a wood industry company producing natural wood veneers of beautiful colours and patterns. Many homes, offices, schools, and concert halls feature decorative pieces of furniture, floors, or walls covered with our veneer.

Balti Spoon is the market leader in the production of decorative veneers in Estonia, our production volumes and quality, however, place us among the best in the world. We boast good knowledge, continuously developing technology, and decades of experience.

Our partners are furniture companies, panel- and door manufactures, flooring producers, distributors and representatives of various fields. Our production is delivered to customers in more than 40 countries worldwide. We offer the highest quality and flexible solution in cooperation with Möhring Group in Poland and North American veneer factories.

Balti Spoon employs roughly 300 people, including many veneer production experts with extensive experience. Our team is international, we value a secure working environment and honest working relationships.

We are a responsible company, saving the environment as much as possible – chemicals are not used in production, we recycle all of our production waste and use all secondary products in the production process.

Name: Red Rock Mountain Cooperage
Description: Red Rock Mountain Cooperage was formed in 2022 in the mountains of Fujian Province to craft artisanal oak wood barrels for the growing wine and whisky sectors.

Name: AKD Kent Mobilyaları A.Ş.
Description: Ahşap bank, kamelya/kameriye, çöp kovası imalatı.

Name: Rouchotas Timber & Parquet
Description:
Wooden floors - Deck - Wall cladding - Special home constructions, professional or shipbuilding use: These are the areas where for more than 80 years ROUCHOTAS company's excellent and long-lasting wood quality makes it the most reputable in the market.
The company's expertise is certified by the sophisticated infrastructure, making its vertically integrated production process an exemplary model for the whole of Southeastern Europe. The central production and storage unit has a total area of 27.500m², while 3 subsidiary companies and 2 exhibition spaces cater for our customers needs throughout Greece.
Advanced mechanical equipment, highly specialized workforce and strategic collaborations with the biggest international wood companies allow ROUCHOTAS company to provide complete solutions to even the most specialized applications, from the stage of planning, of wood-cutting and its byproducts, up to their placement and maintenance. Among the basic services the company provides:
► Drying wood with the most modern means
► Deck preconstruction and other applications
► Wood processing in any dimension
► Advanced wood construction of all types
► Cutting wood from log to any desired dimension
► Project Costing
► Supply of materials on safe fee (lump sum price)
The company consistently offers comprehensive technical support to professionals and private individuals. Our specialized permanent workforce is next to the customer providing technical assistance and advice regarding the correct use and maintenance of all applications and this enhances the quality and duration of our wood products.
In the wood sector where construction quality and aesthetic results are tantamount, ROUCHOTAS company is a natural choice even for for the specialized application!

Name: Karl Zehnder AG
Description:
Bereits in der fünften Generation dreht sich bei uns alles um Holz. 
Holz ist für uns Begeisterung und Lebensqualität. Zudem inspiriert Holz: immer mehr, grösser und höher wird mit Holz gebaut. Wir sind stolz, dass unsere Sägewerk-Produkte Teil des nachhaltigen Bauens sind.

In unserem Sägewerk in Einsiedeln verarbeiten wir nur Rundholz aus einheimischen Wäldern. Vorwiegend sägen wir Fichte, Tanne und Föhre und produzieren daraus beste Produkte. 
Dank unserer grossen Lagerhaltung an Standardprodukten können wir unseren Kunden eine schnelle Lieferung garantieren. Rund die Hälfte unserer Einschnittmenge verarbeiten wir selbst im angegliederten Palettenwerk. Aus Brettern und Kanthölzern stellen wir diverse Palettentypen in allen Abmessungen her. Auf Wunsch trocknen wir die Produkte in unseren effizienten Trockenkammern oder behandeln sie nach ISPM  15 - Standard.

Name: Vier Abinet | Maderas & Construcción
Description:
Vier Abinet S.A. nace de la experiencia adquirida por dos generaciones en la industria del aserrío y la transformación de la madera. Nos especializamos en la manufactura y en el desarrollo de productos de madera, abarcando desde la extracción de esta hasta la colocación del producto para el cliente. El compromiso con el cliente es nuestra prioridad. Actualmente nos encontramos en el proceso de certificar la Norma ISO 9000:2008 de manera de refrendar nuestro sistema de calidad, tal cual se exige en los distintos mercados donde comercializamos.

Somos representante exclusivo en la Argentina de la prestigiosa marca alemana de aceites naturales para madera, OSMO (www.osmoargentina.com)

Name: Duffield Timber
Description:
At Duffield Timber we offer a wide range of timber products for a variety of clients. We are a third generation family timber importer and machining specialist. 
We specialise in importing quality European, American and African hardwoods and clear grade softwood for a variety of end users including contract furniture, shopfitting, joinery, manufacture and construction projects.

Name: Prefab Twente
Description:
Wij produceren en monteren voor u en dus geheel naar uw wensen. Onze specialisatie is prefab houten bouwproducten, zoals dak elementen, dakkapellen, binnenspouwbladen, gevelelementen, vloeren. Voor de bouwbegeleiding en planning van de projecten zijn wij een toegevoegde waarde en daarmee kunnen wij u volledig ontzorgen.

Wij zorgen voor korte lijnen  en pragmatische oplossingen. Wij kunnen daardoor goed in de gaten houden of alles naar wens verloopt en indien nodig inspringen op veranderende omstandigheden. Ons projectbegeleiding is dan ook helemaal op u gericht. U, als opdrachtgever, weet daardoor ook precies wie u hebben moet om uw wensen of zorgen bij neer te leggen.

Wij gaan geen uitdaging uit de weg, of het nu om een enkel huis of een groot nieuwbouwproject, nieuwbouw of renovatie  gaat. Bij beide zetten wij onze kennis graag in. Ons projectbegeleiding laat zich ook zien in de diversiteit die wij zelf voor u kunnen aanbieden. Zo kunnen wij de producten produceren in een moderne fabriek van ruim 1000 m2, monteren wij met eigen montage ploegen op de bouw, leggen dakpannen. Onze kennis en uw wensen zorgen samen voor mooie oplossingen voor uw bouwwensen en hebben wij een bereik over geheel Nederland.

Bent u benieuwd geworden naar ons en onze werkzaamheden? Neem dan gerust vrijblijvend contact met ons op! Dit kan via ons telefoonnummer: 0546 – 656661.

Name: ARREDAMENTI SIMONAZZI SRL
Description:
Simonazzi Arredamenti nasce nel 1918 come falegnameria artigianale ad Albinea di Reggio Emilia. 
Oggi è un’azienda strutturata e internazionale, specializzata nella progettazione, produzione e installazione di arredamenti su misura per locali pubblici: bar, ristoranti, gelaterie, bakery, format food & beverage.
Siamo il partner di fiducia per imprenditori, architetti e catene internazionali che cercano qualità, precisione e affidabilità. Dallo studio preliminare alla posa in opera, ogni fase è curata dal nostro team interno: design, falegnameria, carpenteria, logistica e montaggio.
Abbiamo realizzato progetti in Europa, Medio Oriente, Stati Uniti e Africa, collaborando con brand affermati come Amorino, Giusto Spirito, Crudò, Pizzikotto, Sushiko e tanti altri.

Portiamo con noi un’identità artigiana e una cultura del progetto maturata in oltre 100 anni di storia. Ogni arredo che realizziamo è unico, funzionale, puntuale. Come promesso.

Name: OH Woodworks
Description: As a leader in the industry, Oh Woodworks has a wealth of knowledge and expertise that’s incomparable. We utilize this experience to provide both companies and individuals with quality and innovative products they can truly count on. OH Woodwork’s mission is to ensure that our customers are afforded the best value for their investment by providing them with the finest products in the market and the most outstanding services possible.

Name: H. Arnold Wood Turning, Inc.
Description:
Arnold Wood has been the premier, one-stop shop for custom wood products for 100+ years.

 We take pride in delivering top-quality craftsmanship tailored to your unique requirements. Whether you’re a business looking to elevate your projects with bulk quantity, bespoke wood parts, or a homeowner seeking to add a touch of elegance to your living space, we’ve got you covered.

 Balusters & Columns

Description:
Everything you see that’s wood, we craft. From raw timber to finished, install-ready product. Milling, drying, profiling, finishing, and quality control all happen in-house, under one roof.

Name: Venzowood
Description:
VENZOWOOD:  Quality backed by aesthetics
With a consistent penchant for quality, Venzowood offers veneers that adapt to the vision of the architect. Venzowood believes that a veneer is not just a commodity; the brand treats each veneer as a legacy of nature that calls for an acquired proficiency for curation. Sourced from local suppliers Worldwide, specially in Europe, North America and South America, the veneers go through numerous filtration processes to showcase a uniform grain and variation. The veneers are then classified as per different aesthetic values namely – grains, colour and texture to heighten the features of wood in a sturdy thickness ranging from 0.5mm to 2.4 mm so that the products are durable to use.

The Journey so far:
As a young and vivacious brand, Venzowood has created a niche for itself with its bespoke offering of premium-grade veneers in a short span of time. Emerging from an immense passion for design, Venzowood has quality and uniformity of grade at its core. The brand operates out of the philosophy that veneers be crafted to fit the design philosophy of space and not the other way around. Innovation and consciousness sit at the centre of this ethos. The in-house team vigilantly works towards capturing high-end international markets to selectively curate a collection, which showcases future trends. VenzoWood, with its fine range of veneers, has introduced a whole new dimension to the concept of cladding.

Vision and Mission:
Our vision is to take the brand Venzowood to every corner of the country and make a presence felt in every household looking to live in the lap of luxury. We have a wide range of veneers and wood products catering to every price range and requirement, and we aim to be the go-to wood and veneer brand for every homeowner, architect and designer in India. Our dedicated team incessantly works towards this by providing the best quality of services, information and technical support.

Name: MADEFLONA Industrial Madeireira Ltda.
Fallen Lumber Co.
Description: When trees fall due to development, old age, or disease they are all too often sent to a landfill or mulch pile. FLCo repurposes this sustainable resource by salvaging the logs from local tree companies, governments, and landowners and turning them into slabs and dimensional lumber. We cut, dry, and process the lumber at our sawmill and shop in Baltimore, Maryland for residential and commercial projects.

Name: La Brigade de Construction Collective (La BriCC)
Description:
La Brigade de Construction Collective propose de s'organiser pour récupérer et bricoler ensemble, et dire stop au gaspillage et au tout-jetable.
Envie d’apprendre à manier les outils de base? De réaliser un projet perso à base de récupération ? Les permanences du jeudi soir sont là pour ça.
Envie de participer à des chantiers plus gros avec d’autres associations ? Les chantiers collaboratifs sont là pour ça.
Envie tout simplement de partager ses trucs et astuces en bricolage et d’aider les autres? Viens!

L’atelier de la BriCC se trouve dans l’atelier bois de l’association « la Miete ». 
La Miete se trouve dans le bâtiment de la Péralière, au 150 rue du 4 août 1789 à Villeurbanne. 
La porte d’entrée de la Miete se trouve au fond de la coursive qui commence entre la pharmacie et le salon de coiffure de la Péralière. 
Si la porte d’entrée de la Miete est fermée aux heures des permanences, il faut sonner.

La Brigade de Construction Collective propose de s'organiser pour récupérer et bricoler ensemble, et dire stop au gaspillage et au tout-jetable.

Name: GLF BOIS
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?
Fondée en 1953, GLF Bois est une entreprise familiale implantée à Viuz-en-Sallaz, en Haute-Savoie. Spécialisé dans la fabrication de palettes et d’emballages bois, nous proposons des solutions standards ou sur-mesure, en petites ou grandes séries, pour une clientèle nationale et transfrontalière.

 Notre expertise industrielle :
•	3 lignes de production automatisées et robotisées de palettes neuves 
•	1 ligne automatisée de palettes recyclées
•	 Capacité de production : 7 000 palettes / jour grâce à un outil moderne et performant
•	 Logiciel de calcul de résistance pour optimiser l’utilisation du bois et garantir la meilleure éco-conception-prix.
•	 4 séchoirs pour le traitement NIMP15 et le séchage des palettes.
•	 Un stock permanent pour assurer des livraisons rapides et flexibles.

 Notre engagement environnemental :
•	 Une chaufferie biomasse alimentée par le bois en fin de vie → réduction des émissions de CO₂
•	 Approvisionnement en circuit court auprès de forêts gérées durablement
•	 Certification PEFC, gage de gestion responsable des ressources

 Qualité & fiabilité :
Certifiée ISO 9001 et Ecovadis, GLF Bois place la qualité, la sécurité, l’environnement et l’éthique au cœur de son activité. Chaque collaborateur occupe un poste dédié afin de garantir réactivité, professionnalisme et satisfaction client.

 Chez GLF Bois, 
Nous croyons en un emballage bois robuste, durable et respectueux de l’environnement, au service de nos clients et de leur performance. 
Car votre satisfaction est notre objectif premier..!  

 Pour plus d’informations :
www.glfbois.fr 
04 50 31 47 00 
glfbois@glfbois.fr

#GLFBOIS #Palettes #EmballageBois #IndustrieBois #ÉcoResponsable  #ProductionIndustrielle #Durabilité #Bois #Logistique #Qualité

Name: Robbins Manufacturing Company
Description:
Robbins Manufacturing sells heavy-duty treated wood piling, poles, fence post and lumber to the marine, agriculture and utility industries.

We concentrate our sales to companies that stock our products for resell. Our customers are currently located in the Southeast and Northeast US. We are looking forward to expanding our geographic reach to include exports outside the USA

Robbins is the largest producer of marine piling and fence post in the state of Florida.

Name: Fomra Works
Description:
Fomra delivers design led architectural millwork products that enable architects and designers to create sculpturally distinctive spaces across North America.

We specialize in parametric wall and ceiling systems, parametric seating and desks, 3D decorative panels & interior elements built with precision and material integrity.

Designed and built in British Columbia, our work supports commercial, institutional, hospitality, and design driven residential interiors, offering architects & designers flexible, buildable solutions for complex spatial ideas.

Our design families draw from natural systems and mathematical order, including Ripples and Waves with fluid motion, Sand and Dunes shaped by soft curvature and directional flow, Topography Lines formed through layered contours, Geometric Shapes defined by symmetry and tessellation, and Organic Energy expressed through dynamic, swirling form.

Grâce à notre expertise, nous vous garantissons des produits de qualité, un service fiable et une réactivité optimale.

Name: holzlöffel.ch GmbH
Description:
Unter dem jungen Schweizer Label holzlöffel.ch entstehen praktische Produkte aus hochwertigem Schweizer Holz – zu 100 % regional gewachsen und von Hand gefertigt. 

Jedes Unikat ist ein echtes Einzelstück, das mit grösster Sorgfalt und Liebe zum Detail in einer traditionellen Schreinermanufaktur in der Schweiz entstanden ist. 

Die stilvollen Holzprodukte machen nicht nur als Einzelstücke oder personalisierte Geschenke, sondern auch als nachhaltige Werbegeschenke einen guten und bleibenden Eindruck. 
Mit eigenem Firmenlogo sind die handgemachten Unikate als Alltagsgegenstand täglich im Einsatz und werden geschätzt.

Als fest in der Schweiz verwurzelte Gründerin verbinde ich unter holzlöffel.ch Qualität und Tradition, Innovation und Nachhaltigkeit zu nützlichen Produkten, die in jeden Alltag passen.

Herzlichst
Michèle Stutz

Name: SMARTWOOD CO.,LTD
Description:
Established in 2016, Smartwood has become a trusted name in wood manufacturing, known for our high production capacity, commitment to quality, and sustainable practices. Here’s what sets us apart:

	•	Own Factory: We proudly own our manufacturing facility, giving us full control over the entire production process, ensuring consistency and quality in every product.
	•	High Production Capacity: With the ability to meet large-scale demands, we efficiently serve international markets across Europe and North America.
	•	FSC-Certified Facility: Our factory meets the strict standards of FSC certification, guaranteeing that all of our wood products are sustainably sourced and responsibly produced.

We specialize in crafting a wide range of wood products, including finger joint boards, solid wood kitchen worktops, and both indoor and outdoor furniture components like garden decking tiles, wood tables, doors, and stairs.

Our products cater to diverse sectors, including:

	•	Indoor + Outdoor Flooring
	•	Outdoor Furniture
	•	Kitchen Countertops
	•	Construction Projects
	•	Cutting Boards 

By partnering with Smartwood, you’re not only investing in quality craftsmanship but also in sustainable practices that meet the needs of a growing global market.

Name: VISA-PROM D.O.O.
Description:
VISA-PROM DOO je preduzeće koje uspešno posluje na teritoriji Srbije više od dvadeset godina i to iz tri poslovna centra koje se nalaze u Kanjiži, Subotici i Horgošu. Zapošljava 260 radinka svih obrazovnih profila.

Nakon dugogodišnjeg bavljenja veletrgovinom i maloprodajom, uglavnom bojama i lakovima, 2011. godine smo našem preduzeću pripojili, renovirali i modernizovali fabriku ambalaže u Kanjiži u kojoj se proizvode drvene palete svih dimenzija po zahtevu kupaca, topolov furnir, šper ploča i presovana kocka i sa tim proizvodima smo probili put i do inostranih kupaca. 

Stručan kadar, kvalitetna oprema i stalna snabdevenost sirovinama omogućavaju konstantnu proizvodnju velikog kapaciteta. Zahvaljujući istrajnosti i kvalitetu našeg rada uspeli smo da steknemo veliki broj stalnih klijenata. 

Fabrika je podeljena na 4 proizvodna dela: proizvodnja paleta, proizvodnja furnira, proizvodnja šper ploče i proizvodnja presovane kocke za palete.
Info: www.visaprom.rs

EN:
VISA-PROM DOO is a company that has been operating successfully on the territory of Serbia for more than twenty years, from three business centers, located in Kanjiža, Subotica and Horgoš. It employs 260 workers, of all educational backgrounds.

After many years of wholesale and retail, mainly paints and varnishes, in 2011, we merged, renovated and modernized our company, a packaging factory in Kanjiža, which produces wooden pallets of all sizes at the request of customers, poplar veneer, plywood and pressed cube , and with these products we have made our way to foreign customers.

Professional staff, quality equipment, and a constant supply of raw materials, enable constant production of large capacity. Thanks to the perseverance and quality of our work, we have managed to gain a large number of regular customers.

The factory is divided into 4 production parts: production of pallets, production of veneer, production of plywood and production of pressed cubes for pallets.
Info: www.visaprom.rs

Name: Kempf Innenausbau AG
Description:
Kempf Innenausbau AG ist ein Familienunternehmen. Wir sind Hersteller von Schreinermöbel jeder Art, Küchen, Schränke und Türen im Innen sowie im Aussenbereich sowie unsere Hochwasserschutz-Türe und Fenster und vieles mehr. Wir verstehen jeden Auftrag als einmalige Herausforderung. Und jedes Möbel ist bei uns ein Unikat und wird bei uns in der eigenen Schreinerei Produziert und von unseren eigenen Monteuren montiert. Zudem bieten wir unsern Kunden auch komplett Lösungen an. Diese beinhalten eine Bestandesaufnahme mit Beratung Vorort. Erarbeiten von Planungsvorschläge, wenn nötig auch für Baubewilligungen. Erstellen von einer Devisierung mit Kostenvorschlag. Offerten Einholung von Drittunternehmungen, Bauführung, Kostenkontrolle bis und mit Schlussabrechnung.
