Name: SilvaStar
Description:
HIGH QUALITY
SilvaStar’s uncompromising dedication to quality ensures that our products are consistently defect-free and 100% usable.

EXCELLENT SERVICE
We understand our customers’ needs, and maintain flexibility in our manufacturing lines to accommodate custom work. Our personnel are responsive to special requests and are committed to helping customers receive the products they need.

ON-TIME DELIVERY
SilvaStar delivers on time. We recognize that our products contribute to time-sensitive construction projects, and understand that our customers depend on our products being on site when promised.

COMPETITIVE PRICES
SilvaStar’s success is based on providing value to our customers, exemplified by fair prices for quality products. We keep prices competitive by working in bulk, and by optimizing each stage of our manufacturing and logistics processes.

ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY PROCESSES
Our raw materials are taken from sustainable forests and our manufacturing processes minimize wood waste, water and energy use. Our defect-free products are certified to the Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification (PEFC), and our primed fascia and trim products use Olympic low-volatile-organic-compound (low VOC)latex primer.

INDUSTRY-LEADING WARRANTY
We provide a 15-year to lifetime warranty on all fascia and trim products that have been primed and top-coated with Olympic products in accordance with Olympic’s specifications and procedures. Our warranty applies equally to the base material, primer, and coating.

Name: Gallin Bois
Description:
Crée en 1928 par Emmanuel GALLIN, les établissements GALLIN se sont installés à LES ABRETS EN DAUPHINÉ en 1932. La scierie s’est développée au cours du siècle dernier et s’est spécialisée dans le sciage des charpentes, le bois sec de menuiserie puis la fabrication des parquets dans les années 60.

L’entreprise fut ensuite reprise et développée par les fils du fondateur et a su garder son équilibre grâce notamment à son large choix d’essences de bois durs et de résineux et à son savoir-faire qui lui a permis de collaborer avec de nombreux artisans et particuliers de la région.

Depuis 2012, l’entreprise est dirigée par Mikaël GALLIN, ingénieur de formation, qui, avec sa culture industrielle et à l’aide d’une équipe compétente fait perdurer cette société en continuant à proposer des produits spécifiques adaptés à la demande de chaque client.

Scierie, négoce bois et dérivés, bois de charpente, terrasses, parquets, plots de menuiserie, sciage à façon, pré-débits de menuiserie… 
Débits toutes essences locales.

Name: PT Wijaya Triutama Plywood Industri
Description: Wijaya didirikan pada tahun 1981 memproduksi kayu lapis. Selama bertahun-tahun kami terus berinovasi dan terus meningkatkan selama beberapa dekade untuk menghadirkan produk terbaik ke pasar. Kami percaya pada bisnis berkelanjutan yang menambah nilai bagi negara, karyawan, pembeli, dan pemasok kami.

Name: LeBeck
Description:
www.lebeck.be 
+32 11 346 307
LeBeck, met vestigingen in Ham en Bastogne, is leverancier van houten en kunststof pallets. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het sorteren, repareren en maken van pallets. Samen met de klant zoeken wij naar de juiste oplossing voor het verpakken, palletiseren, stockeren en transporteren van producten.

Name: Lemu Products
Description:
Especialistas en la fabricación de productos de ingeniería en madera tales como tableros finger joint y sólidos, clear y nudosos, componentes para el interior de puertas (Stiles & Rails), molduras sólidas clear, vigas finger joint multilaminados semi esctructurales y de alta resistencia a la humedad, pellet y pintado de maderas, siempre preocupados de estar en comunión con el uso responsable de los recursos.

Poseemos certificación de cadena de custodia FSC (FSC-C131255) desde el año 2016.

Name: WOWPuzzle
Description:
W życiu każdej firmy znajdują się takie okazje, w których można i warto zadbać o pracowników, klientów, partnerów czy gości, tym bardziej w nietypowy sposób.
Odpowiadając na tego typu potrzeby produkujemy puzzle dla firm, uczelni wyższych, urzędów miast czy marszałkowskich, klubów sportowych i wielu innych. 

Kluczowe trzy punkty związane z CSR-em, na których opieramy swoje działania to: 
- produkowane puzzle i inne gadżety wykonane są z odpadu po produkcji mebli 
- ich produkcja odbywa się w Ukrainie, dokładniej w Czerniowcach
- woreczki do puzzli, które znajdują się w drewnianych pudełkach szyją dla nas kobiety z Zakładu Karnego nr. 1 w Łodzi w ramach procesu resocjalizacji. 

Mocno zwracamy uwagę na aspekt środowiskowy i społeczny naszej pracy. 
A firmy, które z nami współpracują dokładają do tego również swoją cegiełkę.

Name: The Timber Buddy
Description: The Timber Buddy is a business that was established to alter how people purchase, produce, sell, and consume wood. The new era of timber and its products has arrived.

Name: Hét Houtdiner
Description: Het Houtdiner is een initiatief van 'jonge mensen' uit de Houtwereld. We organiseren jaarlijks een avond waarbij je op een gezellige en informele manier (jonge) enthousiastelingen binnen de houtbranche ontmoet. Natuurlijk onder het genot van een hapje n drankje. We doen dit altijd op een aantrekkelijke locatie met een link naar het mooie vak Hout.

Name: Terrasses du Lys
Description: Fabricant français de terrasses pour mobil-home et hébergements en bois.

Name: ECOTIM
Description: Ecotim, solutions bois préfabriquées

Name: LV Timber
Description:
LV TIMBER is based in Latvia – the country where 50% of territory is covered in forests. LV TIMBER focuses on aspen and black alder sawn timber processing. The total annual capacity amounts to 20 000 m3 of processed logs.

We perform the entire processing cycle including log sawing, timber rip sawing and crosscutting, timber drying and planing of various materials.
The main products are: high quality sawn timber of different sizes and planed profiled materials, finished materials for saunas – sauna material mouldings, wall panels and benches. From lower class timber we produce pallet boards.
We build our reputation on the quality of our products, the reliability of our supply and our individual approach to each customer.

Name: Fachschule Holztechnik und Gestaltung Hildesheim
Description: Die Fachschule ist eine Schule mit persönlichem Charakter, an der ausschließlich Fachschüler ausgebildet werden. Die Schule kann auf eine langjährige, lebhafte Tradition zurückblicken. Sie wird geführt in den Fachrichtungen Holztechnik, Holzgestaltung mit dem Schwerpunkt „Objektdesign“ und der Meisterausbildung. Die Integration der Fachrichtungen „Technik“ und „Gestaltung“ unter einem Dach, entspricht der Ausbildung nach der Intention der Werkkunstschulen.

Name: Wesselink Kozijnen
Description: Houten kozijnen hebben voor Wesselink Kozijnen geen geheimen. Wij schrikken niet van de omvang van uw project of de grootte van uw vraag. Van een enkel houten kozijn tot aan grote renovatietrajecten en van inmeten en produceren tot aan plaatsen en opknappen, Wesselink Kozijnen is uw partner. Met trots werkt Wesselink Kozijnen volgens de QRM-methode, waardoor de doorlooptijd in het werkproces verkort wordt zonder in te leveren op kwaliteit. Wij onderscheiden ons niet alleen door onze effectieve en efficiënte manier van werken, maar ook doordat we het hele proces beheersen. Van advies, inmeten, produceren en montage tot en met een uitstekende after-service. Duidelijke en directe communicatie in combinatie met 50 jaar aan ervaring.

Name: HJT-Holz
Description: We are a manufacturer of ThermoWood. Our products are divided into rough-sawn ThermoWood and profiled ThermoWood. We can also provide a thermotreatment service for customers that wish their goods to be thermally modified.

Name: Maderas Cultivadas de Costa Rica
Description: Maderas Cultivadas de Costa Rica is a company based out of Costa Rica.

Name: Seier GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Der Name Seier steht in der Welt der Paletten für einwandfreie Qualität. Wir haben über 100 Jahre Unternehmensgeschichte und gehören heute zu den größten Paletten-Herstellern Europas. 18.000 SEIER-Paletten produzieren wir täglich unter anderem auf der weltgrößten Palettenfertigungsanlage.

Name: CIOL AS
Description:
CIOL AS is a newly established company based on technology from Norwegian Institute of Bioeconomy Research. The company will deliver environmentally friendly solutions for the protection of wood. The solutions can replace today's pressure-impregnated materials based on heavy metals and have been given the brand name CIOL.

CIOL is a cost-effective and non-toxic wood modification system, which will be able to replace traditional and unsustainable alternatives. The modification of wood by pressure impregnation from non-fossil sources will significantly lower the climate footprint and improve the properties of the wood. Biocide Directives in the EU are working to be able to find sustainable and environmentally friendly replacements for today's heavy metal-based solutions for the protection of wood. CIOL AS can deliver solutions based on strong technology and knowledge from world-leading researchers in chemical wood modification. CIOL AS can establish a unique market position in that the production process can be integrated into existing facilities. The company has already met strong interest from the industry. The trademark covers all relevant classes, fields and territories. For the end user, the benefits of the products will be little or no need for maintenance and an aesthetically pleasing appearance. CIOL AS will deliver solutions to manufacturers of impregnated wood products through retrofitting and adaptation to existing plants, and in addition deliver adapted CIOL concentrate.

Name: Bamboo Boards México
Description: En Bamboo Boards México nos especializamos en transformar el bambú mexicano en productos de alta calidad y fuertes características sostenibles. Tenemos como objetivo el desarrollar e impulsar la cadena de valor de bambú en México, creando productos de bambú para la industria mueblera y de construcción.

Name: Maderas Santaella
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar con más de 60 años de historia y cuatro generaciones, un equipo de más de 70 profesionales, una apuesta continua por la tecnología e innovación, pero sobre todo, somos pasión por nuestro trabajo. Ven a disfrutar de la madera junto con nosotros.

En Maderas Santaella hemos apostado siempre por la calidad de materiales y por la tecnología de última generación para poder ofrecer las mejores soluciones al sector de la carpintería.

Innovación, calidad de materiales y pasión por nuestro trabajo son los tres pilares fundamentales que sustentan las cuatro generaciones que tiene esta empresa a sus espaldas. Hoy, nos encontramos en pleno reto tecnológico y medioambiental, un reto que estamos seguros que vamos a saber superar y que queremos que formes parte de él.

Name: OT Lauridsen
Description:
OT Lauridsen er håndværk, faglighed og nordisk design. Vi værdsætter de enkle, men holdbare konstruktioner, samt den unikke præsentation af flotte materialer. OT Lauridsen er producent til interiør, inventar og design branchen med mange års erfaring med specialløsninger. Vi ønsker at være en kræsen producent, med sans for kvalitet og design. Hos os får du professionel rådgivning og sparring. Jeres ideer og vores faglige kompetencer skaber det unikke.
 
Løsninger fra OT Lauridsen er specialdesignede i tæt samarbejde med kunden - sådan opnås det bedste resultat. En løsning fra OT Lauridsen inkluderer hele processen: konsulentrådgivning, design, tegning, produktion, montering og kvalitetskontrol. Løsninger kan opstilles på værkstedet og gennemtjekkes før montering.

Name: FILWOOD SAS
Description:
Après des années de recherche, Christophe Cassard, à la tête de la société filwood a mis au point une litière équine révolutionnaire et innovante composée de paille de bois non traité. 
Un produit qui cumule les avantages des traditionnels copeaux et de la paille, sans les inconvénients.

Name: Carpintaria Marques & Costa
Description:
A Carpintaria Marques & Costa é uma empresa familiar situada em Esposende, fundada em 1986, atuando no ramo da carpintaria há mais de três décadas.
Desde o início, a empresa dedicou-se à paixão pela madeira e habilidades artesanais, com a missão de criar cozinhas de qualidade, espaços comerciais com maestria e peças de mobiliário distintas com atendimento personalizado que vá de encontro às necessidades práticas e que reflita a individualidade de cada cliente.

Name: SCOP STRUKTA
Description:
L'entreprise GARCIN est une Société coopérative spécialisée dans les travaux de charpente qui propose ses services aux professionnels ainsi qu'aux particuliers.
Dotée des logiciels de dessin leaders CADWORK et SEMA et de deux centres de production sur les départements du 04 (Alpes-de-Haute-Provence) et 05 (Hautes-Alpes), l'entreprise est là pour donner vie à vos projets.
Une fois modélisé dans nos locaux grâce à nos dessinateurs en collaboration avec les bureaux d'étude du secteur, chaque pièce de bois sera ensuite usinée sur nos centres d'usinage numérique HUNDEGGER K2 et K2i, et chaque élément pouvant être préfabriqué sera assemblé en amont du chantier par nos équipes dans nos ateliers.
Pour tout projet de maisons ossature bois (MOB), charpente traditionnelle, agrandissements/surélévation, ou encore d'aménagement extérieur type auvent et pool house, que vous soyez un professionnel ou un particulier, nous sommes là pour vous.

Name: MADERAS SANTAELLA SL
Description: MADERAS SANTAELLA SL is a computer software company based out of CAMINO VIEJO DE COÍN, 18, FUENGIROLA, Málaga, Spain.

Name: LES S.r.l.
Description:
Le bon choix pour un approvisionnement légal et fiable en essences africaines

Comptant parmi les sociétés les plus importantes du groupe ALPI, LES srl est présente sur le territoire africain et opère en parfaite synergie avec sa maison mère italienne dans le domaine de la fourniture de grumes, de bois et de placages en provenance d’Afrique.

Le groupe ALPI possède en effet plusieurs sociétés qui contrôlent l’intégralité de la chaîne d’approvisionnement, depuis la fourniture en matières premières jusqu’aux premières phases de transformation des grumes et à la force commerciale représentée par LES.
Depuis sa création dans les années 80, LES a fait l’objet d’une croissance constante et ininterrompue grâce à une force de vente organisée et structurée lui ayant permis de distribuer du bois et ses dérivés dans tous les principaux marchés du monde.

Forte d’un service de vente qualifié et fiable pour chaque groupe de produits ainsi que de solutions sur mesure – adaptées aux exigences de chaque client et basées sur une riche gamme de produits haut de gamme – LES a aujourd’hui bâti une logistique et un back-office performants et compétents en vue d’atteindre les professionnels du secteur, notamment les fabricants de panneaux, de contreplaqués, de cadres, de meubles, de décoration d’intérieur, de revêtements de sol, de portes, de fenêtres mais aussi les constructeurs de navires.

L’excellence des produits LES se distingue aussi par la délivrance de tous les documents légaux requis pour le marché européen (Règlement sur le bois de l’UE) et pour le marché américain (Loi Lacey).

Name: Woodology
Description: Woodology brings art to life. As an organization, we are recognized as a premium brand in delivering superior quality prelaminated wooden boards. With our foray into the world of quality engineered wood and our knack for art, we serve our clients with the widest variety of superior quality prelaminated MDF or particle board and HDHMR board.

Name: Kloek Pallets Kampen
Description: Kloek Pallets Kampen B.V. is a family business with over 30 years of experience in pallet production and trading. Based in Kampen, we serve customers domestically and internationally with a wide and reliable range of pallet solutions. Thanks to our scale, market knowledge, and focus on quality, we hold a strong position within the European logistics chain. Our product range includes Euro pallets, block and wooden pallets, CP pallets, box pallets, export crates, and plastic pallets. We also offer custom pallets, collars, and solutions for specific industry and product requirements.

Name: Portes & Fenêtres Bois
Description:
Spécialisée dans la fabrication sur mesure de fenêtres, volets et portes. 

Exclusivement pour les professionnels, Portes & Fenêtres Bois a été créée pour répondre à la demande grandissante des professionnels qui recherchent un service et une qualité de fabrication pour leurs menuiseries en bois. 

Nos fabrications ont été pensées pour être simples à mettre en œuvre, mais aussi pour répondre aux cahiers des charges des services de sauvegarde des centres-villes ou des ABF.

Name: Carpintaria Manuel José Pereira
Description:
A Manuel José Pereira & Filhos Lda é uma empresa que atua na indústria ligada ao setor da madeira, desde 1988. 
Com maior foco na fabricação de Caixilharia em Madeira, o principal objetivo é obter um produto que responda às atuais exigências do mercado.

Name: CELI SRL
Description:
Fondata in Italia nel 1920 CELI SRL si contraddistingue da sempre per capacità e uso di tecnologie avanzate, caratteristiche peculiari che ci permettono di dare risposte e servizi adeguati alle diverse richieste di un mercato competitivo ed esigente.
Collaborando con grandi architetti e progettisti è importante porsi come interlocutori capaci, attenti e aggiornati alle necessità e alle evoluzioni degli ambienti di lavoro.
Materiali lignei rari e preziosi si accostano e si combinano con materiali più contemporanei e vengono “plasmati” dalle mani esperte e sapienti di maestri d’ascia ed ebanisti.
Quando di tratta di lavorare ad una realizzazione, oltre a basarsi su progetti originali, i maestri ebanisti compiono un accurato sopralluogo per verificare  luminosità e atmosfera degli ambienti, caratteristiche fondamentali nella definizione delle tonalità da dare agli elementi in fase di lucidatura/finitura.
La scelta dei materiali e i trattamenti ai quali vengono sottoposti garantiscono da sempre risultati di altissimo livello. La competenza costruttiva e la capacità di assistere il progettista in tutte le fasi della produzione e dell’ingegnerizzazione dei vari componenti, fanno di CELI il partner ideale per creazioni di alta qualità nell’arredo di interni. 
In passato azienda impegnata nello sviluppo di grandi e prestigiose opere situate ad esempio all'interno dell'Auditorium Parco della Musica di Roma,  la sede della Banca d’Italia, Confindustria, attualmente focalizzata nella produzione di arredi di lusso per il settore dello yachting.

Name: Sections UAE
Description:
A One Stope Solution For You
Experts in Joinery, Fitout, Furniture
Commercial I Residential I Hospitality

Name: Marlin Studio - CNC
Description:
We offer a wide range of services from single bespoke items for consumers through to larger orders for commercial clients. No project is to small. 
 
Our in house design facility are available to take your a detailed design or a simple sketch and produce a finished product. Our commitment and attention to detail is second to none.

Where possible we utilise locally sourced recycled or reclaimed materials to reduce the impact on the environment.

Name: Mosel Türen Vertriebsgesellschaft MbH
Description:
Mosel Türen ist der Spezialist, wenn es um Wohnrauminnentüren geht. Wir verbinden Design mit Qualität – und das seit über 60 Jahren. Mit zeitlosen Designs und immer neuen, modernen Detailvarianten bieten wir für jeden Geschmack die passende Lösung. Denn für uns bedeuten „gute Türen“, dass Design und Qualität viele Jahre überdauern. Dabei setzen wir mit unseren Designs immer wieder Maßstäbe: Als Branchenerster entwickelten wir mit unserem Polarweiß einen der hellsten Weißtöne für Türen, der perfekt auf die meistverkauften Wandfarben abgestimmt ist. 

Damit unsere Kunden ihre Wunschtür einfach und sicher erhalten, gehört zu jeder guten Tür ein verlässlicher und erfahrener Ansprechpartner. Daher gibt es unsere Türen nur im qualifizierten Fachhandel. Für unsere Partner fokussieren wir uns stets auf das Wesentliche und machen das Verkaufen damit fortwährend einfacher. Dafür setzen wir in der Zusammenarbeit auf ein verkaufsstarkes Sortiment, überzeugende Produktqualität und digitalisierte Verkaufsprozesse. Außerdem sind wir als nachhaltig handelndes Unternehmen in unserer Produktion klimaneutral und unterstützen zertifizierte Klimaschutzprojekte in Südamerika und Südostasien. 

Seit 1956 vergrößern wir uns in Trierweiler an der Mosel stetig. Auf 93.000 Quadratmetern arbeiten mittlerweile 580 Mitarbeiter in unserem Familienunternehmen. Doch für richtig gute Türen brauchen wir auch weiterhin richtig gute Mitarbeiter. Die stetige Investition in Aus- und Weiterbildung ist uns wichtig – denn in der Kompetenz unserer Mitarbeiter sehen wir unsere stärkste Zukunftsressource. Daher sind wir immer auf der Suche nach neuen Talenten für die Produktion, die Verwaltung, den Vertrieb oder die Logistik – egal ob Schüler, Student oder Berufserfahrener: Bei uns finden Sie Ihr berufliches Zuhause mit besten Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Informieren Sie sich auf unserem Karriere-Portal über unsere Stellen- und Ausbildungsangebote und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die Welt der Türen voranbringen.

Name: Windfall Architectural Products
Description: At Windfall, sustainability is more than a value-it’s our foundation. Born in Washington State after a 1996 ice storm, we began by transforming fallen timber into usable lumber. That spirit of resourcefulness still drives us today. For over 29 years, Windfall Architectural Products has delivered durable, design-forward solutions using salvaged, reclaimed, and responsibly sourced materials. Our wall panels, cladding, stair treads, tables, and countertops made in the Pacific Northwest, bring warmth and purpose to commercial interiors across North America. The Cambio Wall System takes this further. Designed to eliminate waste in wall and ceiling installations and renovations, Cambio is a patented magnetic panel system crafted for flexibility, reuse, and circularity. Inspired by the idea that beauty comes from thoughtful use of materials, Cambio offers a smarter, more sustainable way to build.

Name: Strandply OSB
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of India’s OSB manufacturing plant. 
Here at StrandplyOSB, we aim to revolutionise the entire wood-working industry with a product that is stronger, better and greener compared to any other product currently available in the market.

Name: Al Shandgha Wood Industries
Description:
A destination for bespoke joinery solutions. Combining experience and cutting edge technologies to transform your vision into reality. 
Established in 2007, we have become a trusted name in crafting high-quality wooden interiors with a contemporary flair. From Kitchen Cabinets & Wardrobes to Timber Doors, Windows and various joinery works.

Instagram: @alshandgha.ae
What’s app: +971 50 489 5101

Name: Gremi de la Fusta de Sabadell i Comarca
Description:
Som una associació per a la defensa dels interessos gremials dels professionals de la fusta de Sabadell i la seva comarca.

OBJECTIUS
- Representar totes les persones físiques i jurídiques afiliades. Fomentar les relacions empresarials de les persones físiques i jurídiques afiliades. 
- Programar accions adients per aconseguir millores empresarials i econòmiques per a les persones associades. - - Mantenir el contacte necessari i el tracte amb altres organitzacions empresarials afins per col·laborar i intercanviar experiències.

Name: Doortech for wood industries
Description:
Doortech Egypt is a fast growing door manufacturing company founded by Mr. Raouf Dayoub back in 2013. It started as an experiment in the standardized production of door frames in a market mainly dominated by carpentry workshops.

Overtime, by combining his deep experience in industrial machinery, with an eye for tasteful design, and his skills for identifying and sourcing the best material, Mr. Dayoub, with the help of a talented group of leaders, succeeded in establishing doortech as a dominant player and a sought-after partner in the design, production, distribution, and installation of high quality, innovative doors, with the finest accessories.

Name: UaWood LLC
Dongnam Realize
Description:
Dongnam Realize is an award winning company, and the creators of CXP Wood. CXP is a thermosoftening material made of non-toxic ingredients. In simple words: it is the first and only wood that can be injection molded, blow moulded or extruded using no plastics at all.

Our mission is to help eco-conscious companies lower their carbon footprint by offering a viable and affordable alternative to plastics. How viable is it? CXP does not require any special equipment or moulds, manufacturers are a simple feedstock-swap away from joining the sustainable revolution.

CXP is something we call "eco-recovery" because not only it is preventing the insertion of new plastic-made products into the market, but also mitigating the negative effects that crude oil extraction and plastic production bring: added CO2 in the atmosphere. Using wood as the core ingredient of CXP we are able to remove carbon dioxide from the atmosphere and, as long as the products are not burned, keep it away from the carbon cycle for good.

CXP Wood is eco-recovery. CXP goods are the beginning of a movement of consumption for the environment. Join us in the quest for a greener future.

Name: PLS Manufatti d'Arredo
Description: PLS Furniture Manufatti d'Arredo è una realtà produttiva che realizza arredi su misura in collaborazione con Architetti, Interior Designer e Aziende. PLS nasce nel 1981 come bottega artigiana a Piazzola sul Brenta (PD) e nel 1990 si specializza nel settore del Mobile Classico in stile Direttorio Francese con produzione di Complementi d’Arredo interamente in massello, aggiungendo poi la realizzazione di semilavorati per arredamenti destinati ai settori vino e food. Nel 2005 inizia la produzione di arredi su misura, maturando esperienza nei settori Contract e Lusso e affiancando i Clienti nelle loro richieste. Il continuo sviluppo delle competenze (anche tecnologiche) dello staff, la capacità di ascolto, interpretazione e realizzazione delle esigenze del Cliente contraddistingue PLS (oggi 10 collaboratori)

Name: American Architectural Products Group
Description: American Architectural Products Group is a linearly integrated wood products manufacturer providing Wood Solutions in the form of innovative wood sheet materials and fabricated Architectural Systems.

Name: Dekker Hout
Description:
Dekker Hout is dé groothandel en houtimporteur voor bouwprofessionals, industrie, handel, retail en DHZ. 
Binnendeuren, buitendeuren, deurbeslag, kozijnen, gevelbekleding, tuin(hout)producten. Merken Elephant, Austria Deuren en Forza Deurbeslag. Ruim 13.000 producten uit voorraad leverbaar. FSC-gecertificeerd hout. Vakmanschap sinds 1885.

Dekker Hout zet zich in voor een duurzame toekomst door verantwoord bosbeheer, zelfvoorzienende energieproductie, circulaire productontwikkeling en groene logistieke processen.

Geschiedenis
Dekker Hout is een Nederlands familiebedrijf en sinds 1885 actief in de houtindustrie. Wat begon als een lokale houthandel in de Zaanstreek, is uitgegroeid tot een houtspecialist met een breed assortiment hout- en bouwproducten. Met een hoofdkantoor in Den Haag en een productielocatie en distributiecentrum in Vianen.  

Duurzaamheid is ons bestaansrecht
Vanuit eigen FSC-gecertificeerde concessies in Bolivia beheren wij bossen met respect voor natuur en biodiversiteit: slechts drie bomen per hectare per 25 jaar. Ook al onze overige houtstromen zijn FSC- of PEFC-gecertificeerd. 
Onze productie draait volledig op eigen energie: warmte uit resthout, 40.000 zonnepanelen op 26 daken en 12 batterijcontainers die energie opslaan en terugleveren aan het net. Zo reduceren wij onze CO₂-footprint en versterken we een circulaire keten. 

Of je nu bouwt, produceert of verkoopt: met Dekker Hout kies je voor hout met een verhaal én een verantwoorde toekomst. Wil je meer weten over onze organisatie, service of specialismen? Ontdek het via dekkerhout.nl of deze linkedin pagina.

Name: 3A Schreinerei AG
Description:
Die 3A Schreinerei fertigt Kleines und Grosses. Modernes und Zeitloses. Ausgefallenes und Bodenständiges. Für Privathaushalte, Gewerbe, öffentliche Hand und Institutionen.

Ein Esstisch, an dem gelacht, diskutiert und fein gegessen wird. Eine Bank, die den Eingangsbereich zum Wohlfühlort macht. Ein Echtholzboden, der Wohnlichkeit und Wärme ausstrahlt. Oder gleich alles zusammen. Bei uns finden Sie die gesamte Palette an Schreinerarbeiten. Kleine Reparaturen erledigen wir mit genauso viel Sorgfalt wie den gesamten Innenausbau in Ihrem Eigenheim. In jedem Projekt steckt unsere Leidenschaft für das Handwerk und unseren Beruf.

Büro, Schulhaus, Klinik oder Altersheim – in angenehmer Atmosphäre arbeitet, lebt und lernt es sich besser. Wir fertigen Schränke in Schulzimmern, installieren Brandschutztüren in Spitälern, bauen ästhetische Badezimmer, die auch besonderen Bedürfnissen gerecht werden. Und noch viel mehr. Wir begleiten kleine und grosse Projekte, scheuen uns nicht vor Routinearbeiten und geraten auch nicht in Panik, wenn uns aussergewöhnliche Herausforderungen begegnen. Wir arbeiten gerne Hand in Hand mit Architekturbüros sowie mit Dienstleistern aus Sanitär und Elektro.

Die Liebe zum Handwerk. Die Freude an dem, was dabei entsteht. Die Verbundenheit mit der Region. Das Glücksgefühl, wenn Sie zufrieden sind mit unserer Arbeit. Das ist es, was uns antreibt und ausmacht. Seit bald zehn Jahren.

Name: FAS ORIGINAL
Description:
FAS was founded by Giovanni Elia at the end of the ‘50 and today it is managed by the second generation, Lorenzo and Chiara Elia, toward targets of excellence in line with the most demanding requirements of social responsibility and new trends. That is the way how Fas Serramenti favors us in improving the quality of our life and offers the opportunity of experiencing a natural way of feeling home and living in wellness. Advanced technologies and a strong commercial network jointed to a competent R&D department, make FAS a leader in the field of manufacturing Made in Italy wooden windows. Fas works in an inestimable environmental and landscape beauty in the heart of Langhe and Roero, in the Province of Cuneo, a hilly area of tourist, artistic and wine-and-food excellence, since 2014 Unesco World Heritage, in order to preserve this wonderful piece of Piedmont and Italy, the company has developed a series of operations aimed at minimizing the impact on the surrounding environment:
• Installation of solar panels in the factory
• Use of eco-friendly and non-toxic water-based paints
• Reduced use of adhesive substances
• Production of windows at low CO2 emissions

Name: Carter Custom Millwork
Description:
RELENTLESS FOR GREATNESS.

At Carter Custom Millwork, we are energized by the work we do and who we do it with. We thrive on the collaboration, support, and camaraderie that fill our company from the first “good morning” to the shared excitement when a project comes to life. We lead by example, demanding accountability from ourselves and others. At CCM we’re IN IT TO WIN IT, showing up for one another, our clients, and every project with dedication and care. We’re proud to share this journey, building not just exceptional work, but lasting relationships and a culture that makes coming to work feel meaningful. 

CCM offers hardwood moldings, commercial casework, trim, and pre-hung doors for builders and contractors. We operate out of a 125,000-square-foot manufacturing facility in Millersburg, Ohio, which was recently expanded by an additional 26,000 square feet. The facility is equipped with advanced machinery that allows us to produce large-scale commercial projects as well as detailed custom work. Our process includes sourcing hardwoods, machining, pre-finishing, assembly, and delivery. With years of experience dating back to 1932, CCM has built lasting relationships through reliable manufacturing and service.

Notre mission est de créer des espaces qui reflètent la personnalité et le style de nos clients, tout en alliant esthétique et fonctionnalité.

Avec Solmat, chaque projet est une collaboration où créativité et savoir-faire se rencontrent pour donner vie à des meubles uniques.

Pour en savoir plus sur nos réalisations ou discuter de vos besoins, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter directement.

Name: Nordanå Trä AB
Description:

Vi är specialiserade på sågade produkter i fur och gran i 3,0m längder, men även en mindre andel i 2,7 och 2,4m längder. Vi producerar från 32x100 till 50x150 i
centrumvirke och 19x75/100 samt 22x75/100 i sidobrädor. Råvaran består att så
kallad Sågkubb – Nordanåkubb – ett begrepp som väletablerat på virkesmarknaden i regionen.

På Nordanå Trä är kvalitet och leveranssäkerhet vår högsta prioritet. Vår styrka
ligger i nära samarbete med kunderna, där vi tillsammans utvecklar produkter som möter marknadens krav – från såg till slutprodukt.

Name: Masson
Description:
Créée en 1957, la Société MASSON Bois et Matériaux Fougerais est la continuité de deux générations d’exploitants forestier et scieurs du pays fougerais depuis 1870.

Masson Bois et matériaux, c'est :
 - Une expertise de plus de 60 ans dans l’achat et la commercialisation de bois et dérivés.
- Des stocks permanents : 10 000 M3 de bois et de bardages ; 700 M3 de LVL et de laméllé-collé  ; 25 000 M2 de panneaux et d’isolants.
- Plus de 20 000 M2 de bâtiments couverts.
- Traçabilité des produits : PEFC, marquage CE.
- Une équipe de professionnels formés pour chaque secteur d’activité.
- Un suivi commercial personnalisé par zone géographique.
- Un service logistique réactif disposant d’une flotte de 12 camions adaptés à chaque produit.
- Du matériel d’usinage, de découpe et de traitement performant.

Philosophie et valeurs
Depuis plus de 60 ans, notre société a su conserver ses valeurs tout au long de son évolution :

Confiance : nous plaçons le rapport humain au centre de notre démarche. Toujours à votre écoute, nous nous efforçons de définir précisément votre besoin afin d’y répondre par une solution adaptée et sur-mesure.
Innovation : Nous sommes formés aux nouvelles technologies industrielles, aux nouveaux modes de calculs, aux nouveaux matériaux, aux normes…
Réactivité : notre capacité à répondre ensemble aux défis des marchés de demain grâce à une équipe soudée et compétente.
Développement : Des investissements permanents dans de nouveaux bâtiments de stockage, dans du matériel d’usinage neuf et à la pointe de l’innovation, dans des camions et des moyens de levage performants.

Name: Hechenblaikner Sparer GmbH
Description:
Die Hechenblaikner Sparer GmbH steht für die meisterhafte Verbindung von traditioneller Tiroler Handwerkskunst und modernster Brandschutztechnik. Mit über 20 Jahren Erfahrung schaffen wir exklusive Holzdesigns, die Ästhetik und Sicherheit in perfekter Harmonie vereinen.

Unsere Leistungen im Überblick:

• Wohnzimmer: Individuell gestaltete Wohnräume, die zeitlose Eleganz mit Funktionalität verbinden.
• Küchen- und Beleuchtungsdesign: Küchen, die Erlebnisse schaffen, mit integrierten Beleuchtungskonzepten für eine unvergleichliche Atmosphäre.
• Badezimmer: Luxuriöse Designs für Ihren persönlichen Spa-Bereich, maßgeschneidert für Ihr Wohlbefinden.
• Schlafzimmer: Harmonische Rückzugsorte, die Wärme, Komfort und Eleganz vereinen.
• Architekturdesign: Projekte, die Ästhetik und Funktionalität durch die Verbindung von Tradition und Innovation beeindrucken.
• Fenster & Türen: Maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Energieeffizienz und modernes Design, die Stil und Sicherheit ausdrücken.
• Brandschutz: Kompromissloser Brandschutz mit hochsicheren Türen und Toren sowie umfassender Wartung und innovativer Technologie.
• Wartung, Prüfung und Instandhaltung: Regelmäßige Wartungen, gründliche Prüfungen und fachgerechte Instandhaltung von Brandschutz-, Sicherheits- oder Fluchtwegstüren aus Stahl, Holz oder Aluminium.

Unsere Mission ist es, Wohnträume zu verwirklichen und Sicherheit auf höchstem Niveau zu gestalten – meisterhaft, individuell, einzigartig. Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, die perfekt auf Ihre Bedürfnisse abgestimmt sind, und setzen dabei auf höchste Qualitätsstandards, Präzision und Langlebigkeit.

Entdecken Sie unsere aktuellen Projekte und lassen Sie sich von der unvergleichlichen Tiroler Handwerkskunst inspirieren. Ob private Wohnräume oder gewerbliche Objekte – wir realisieren Ihre Visionen mit Leidenschaft und Expertise.

Vertrauen Sie auf die Hechenblaikner Sparer GmbH, wenn es um die meisterhafte Vereinigung von Holzdesign und Sicherheit geht.

Name: Carpintería Ebanistería Rafael Rodríguez
Description:
Carpintería de Diseño y Alta Calidad en Madrid 

Nuestro compromiso con la excelencia en la ebanistería se ha mantenido firme durante más de 40 años. Desde nuestros modestos inicios en 1981 en un pequeño local de la C/ Isabela Saberana en Madrid, hemos crecido y evolucionado para convertirnos en un referente de la carpinteria de diseño. 

 Experiencia y evolución constante:

En el año 2000, dimos un gran salto al trasladarnos a una moderna nave en el Polígono Ventorro del Cano de Madrid. Este cambio nos ha permitido expandir nuestras capacidades y mantener nuestro compromiso de ofrecer servicios de la más alta calidad en el diseño y la fabricación de piezas de carpintería y ebanistería únicas.

 Artesanía de calidad por expertos:

Contamos con un equipo de 8 empleados altamente capacitados y experimentados. La mayoría de ellos son artesanos expertos, preparados para llevar a cabo cualquier tipo de proyecto con precisión y dedicación.

 Instalaciones de Vanguardia:

Nuestras instalaciones modernas y bien equipadas se extienden en dos plantas de 315 metros cuadrados cada una. En la planta inferior, albergamos maquinaria especializada. Además, disponemos de cinco bancos de trabajo donde se lleva a cabo la fabricación de nuestros proyectos. En la planta superior, encontrará nuestra sala de barnizado, oficinas, comedores y aseos, lo que nos permite gestionar de manera eficiente todos los aspectos de nuestro negocio.

 Enfoque en el Diseño y la Calidad:

Nos enorgullece colaborar estrechamente con decoradores, diseñadores, arquitectos y empresas de reformas y construcción que buscan calidad y diseño excepcionales en sus proyectos. En Carpintería y Ebanistería Rafael Rodríguez, transformamos la madera en obras maestras que realzan la belleza y la funcionalidad de cada espacio.

Contacta con nosotros hoy mismo y descubre cómo podemos llevar tu visión a la realidad con nuestra artesanía y experiencia. Hablemos sobre tu próximo proyecto!

Name: Flip Fingerboarding
Description:
You've landed where cool and fun comes together.

Flip Fingerboarding is the manufacturer of high quality wooden professional art fingerboards based in the United Arab Emirates. It is the very first company in the UAE to produce and sell wooden art fingerboards. Incepted in January 2023, Flip Fingerboarding had sold hundreds of fingerboards to date and hold prominent clients such as Kris Fade of Virgin Radio, Sonal Rupani of Off Script Dubai Eye, influencer Jeri of My Wild Tribe (@my.wildtribe), @broskays & Natasha of Beyond Beauty Natasha (@beyondbeautynatasha).

Founded by Connor Maxwell in 2023, Flip Fingerboarding had enjoyed successes in all of its events with the recent Middle East Film & Comics Convention Comic Con 2024 held at ADNEC Abu Dhabi & Pop Con 2024 held at Sky Dive Dubai. Flip Fingerboarding had participated in other events such as Keeping Your Kids Busy Show, ARTE & Spring Fairs.

In addition, our founder, Connor Maxwell is now part of the Junior Gladiator Kidpreneur events team where the program teaches young children about entrepreneurship and financial literacy.

Message from our (then) 10year old founder:

Hello. I am Connor. I love creating — anything from Legos to planes, mini surf boards and fingerboards. On my birthday, my mum gave me tools for my fingerboards and my dad let me have his carpenter table (and I took some of his other tools but don’t tell him). Santa then gave me my very own power tools last Christmas! I love them and uses them everyday to create something exciting! I then hand paint my own art into it!

Every fingerboard that we make are unique — and I almost don’t want to sell any of them — but I do love seeing other children enjoy our creation.

Follow our Instagram @Flip.Fingerboarding

You may also follow Connor's personal account @connorrobertmaxwell

Description:
1. Introduction
WTA est une entreprise innovante qui s’engage à transformer le secteur de la transformation et de l'exploitation forestière ET COMMERCIALE . Notre vision est de devenir un leader dans la gestion durable des ressources forestières en Afrique, tout en contribuant au développement économique et social des communautés locales.

2. Notre Mission
Notre mission est de :
- Promouvoir des pratiques durables dans l’exploitation forestière.
- Valoriser les ressources naturelles tout en préservant notre environnement.
- Offrir des solutions adaptées aux besoins des clients dans le secteur du bois et des produits forestiers.


3. Nos Valeurs
Nous croyons fermement en :
- Durabilité : L’engagement envers des pratiques qui préservent les forêts pour les générations futures.
- Innovation : La recherche constante de solutions efficaces et modernes dans la transformation du bois.
- Collaboration : Travailler main dans la main avec les acteurs locaux et internationaux pour réaliser notre vision.
- Intégrité : Conduire nos affaires avec transparence et éthique, dans le respect des normes et des réglementations.

#### 4. Nos Services
OBGA SARL propose une gamme de services, notamment :
- Exploitation Forestière Durable : Gestion et récolte de ressources forestières en respectant les normes environnementales.
- Transformation du Bois : Fabrication de produits en bois de haute qualité adaptés aux besoins des clients.
- Consultation en Installation de Scieries : Accompagnement des entreprises dans la mise en place et l'optimisation de scieries modernes.
- Formation et Sensibilisation : Programmes de formation pour les acteurs du secteur sur les meilleures pratiques et la gestion durable.

Name: YORKSHIRE PLYWOOD LIMITED
Description:
We are independent distributors (located in Hull, East Yorkshire) of wood-based panel products and manufacturers of high-performance solutions for various construction sectors.

Our business was established in 1986 with just two staff members in a small rented office and warehouse in Hull.

As our business grew, we purchased our first property on Oxford Street with office and warehousing facilities, set to make it our home for the next 30 years. The first of six Yorkshire Plywood vehicles was purchased shortly after. After the success of providing wood-based panel products to local and nationwide timber merchants, Yorkshire Plywood purchased its first bonding machine, and shortly after a second machine to provide high-performance external and internal panels for the construction industry. With our increasing experience, this was a natural progression into new sectors. Further growth continued expanding to a second company building on Lockwood Street; a 30,000-square-metre warehouse for the storage and distribution of our panel products.

Based now on Leads Road, our 5-acre site provides a purpose-built office, warehouse and manufacturing facilities with room for expansion in the near future. With over 50 members of staff and our own dedicated fleet of vehicles, we continue to evolve and go from strength to strength.

Our comprehensive range of products has been developed to give our expanding customer base the ability to source wood-based panel products from one supplier. We maintain a close watch on the worldwide market to ensure that our range of products is competitive with exceptional value and service.

To complement this we have invested in the latest machining technology, providing a rapid press and bond service. This ensures our customers get high-quality components from their specifications within strict tolerances.  In addition, we offer an in-house service of machining products to size with or without profiles to enhance value.

Name: Godoy Santos Indústria Ltda
Description:
Godoy Santos, NOSSA TRADIÇÃO É INOVAR!
A empresa GODOY SANTOS foi fundada em 1932 pelo Sr. Euclydes Dias dos Santos e desde então enfrentou diversos desafios relacionados à disponibilidade de mão de obra, infraestrutura e tecnologia. Apesar dessas adversidades, o Sr. Euclydes iniciou suas atividades e ao longo dos anos a empresa se desenvolveu e expandiu suas operações, acompanhando o progresso tecnológico e as mudanças no cenário da mão de obra e infraestrutura. Com uma história de quase um século, a GODOY SANTOS orgulha-se de seu trabalho árduo e dedicação. Na época desafiadora de sua fundação, a escassez de mão de obra, infraestrutura e tecnologia não impediu o Sr. Euclydes de iniciar seu empreendimento. Ele superou as dificuldades com determinação, estabelecendo as bases sólidas da GODOY SANTOS. Ao longo dos anos, a empresa evoluiu, adaptando-se às mudanças e investindo continuamente em novas tecnologias e melhorias no processo produtivo. Atualmente, a GODOY SANTOS é reconhecida como uma referência de mercado em seu segmento, resultado do comprometimento com a qualidade, busca constante pela excelência e visão empreendedora do Sr. Euclydes e de toda a equipe que o acompanhou. A empresa valoriza seus valores fundamentais, como trabalho árduo, ética, inovação e respeito aos colaboradores e clientes. A GODOY SANTOS continua a construir seu legado, enfrentando os desafios atuais com a mesma determinação e paixão que a impulsionaram desde o início. Especializada na produção de urnas de alta qualidade, a GODOY SANTOS oferece uma ampla variedade de opções, desde modelos simples até os mais sofisticados. Suas linhas de urnas incluem Convênio, Luxo, Super Luxo, Grã Luxo e a linha Anjo, voltada para caixões infantis. Além disso, foram lançadas as exclusivas Linhas Alto Brilho, Alto Relevo e Alto Brilho Bordado, que se destacam pelo requinte, sofisticação e acabamento refinado. As urnas da GODOY SANTOS são reconhecidas por sua qualidade superior e atenção aos detalhes.

Name: Daim

Elevate Your Living Spaces with DAIM: Crafting Bespoke Interiors for Discerning Tastes! 

At DAIM, we're not just about furniture; we're about crafting experiences. With a passion for precision and an eye for detail, we specialize in customized kitchen and wardrobe solutions, exquisite home and office furniture, and curated home decor.

 Tailored Excellence:

 Seamless Functionality:
We understand that every space is unique, and so are your needs. Our customized solutions are designed to maximize functionality without compromising on style. Whether it's optimizing kitchen layouts or creating storage solutions, we've got you covered.

 Workspace Transformation:
Transform your office into a productivity powerhouse with our thoughtfully designed office furniture. Ergonomics, aesthetics, and productivity are at the forefront of our designs, ensuring a workspace that inspires creativity and efficiency.

 Curated Elegance:
From statement pieces to subtle accents, our curated home decor offerings add the finishing touch to your spaces. Discover a range of exquisite accessories that elevate your interiors and reflect your personal style.

 Bringing Dreams to Life:
At DAIM, we believe in turning dreams into reality. Whether it's a cozy kitchen, a functional wardrobe, a productive workspace, or a beautifully curated living space, we're committed to delivering excellence that exceeds expectations.

Let's collaborate to transform your spaces into expressions of your unique personality and lifestyle. Reach out today to begin your journey with DAIM.

Sustentabilidade muito além do discurso

A 042 Pallets utiliza exclusivamente madeira de reflorestamento proveniente das áreas próprias do Grupo LW. Conduzimos o manejo florestal de forma responsável, com rastreabilidade total da matéria-prima e reaproveitamento de resíduos em todo o processo. 

—
Pallets PBR-I e PBR-II certificados ABRAS/IPT

Atendemos o setor industrial com pallets padrão PBR-I PBR-II ABRAS/IPT, ideais para operações de armazenagem, movimentação e transporte. Nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade e com a eficiência logística guia cada etapa do processo.

—
Soluções sob medida para sua  operação

Oferecemos ainda soluções customizadas conforme a necessidade de cada cliente, além de tratamento fitossanitário e quarentenário (AQF) HT, essencial para exportações e exigências sanitárias.

A partir de chutes de production et sciures de bois (connexes de bois brut) pour différents spécialistes du bois de chauffage

Le recyclage de bois : 
A partir d’objets de bois en fin de vie issus de l’industrie ou des collectivités à destination des chaufferies ou fabricants de panneaux agglomérés.

6000 m2 à la fabrication de buches compressées

Description:
The company manufactures and distributes high-gloss and super matt elements for the entire furniture and supplier industry, for architects, interior designers, designers, exhibition stand builders, shop system builders, the construction and facade industry as well as for handicraft interior finishing.

The technological basis is the internationally successful and sustainable KLEIBERIT HotCoating process, whichwas developed by KLEIBERIT SE & Co. KG.

Leonhard Ritzhaupt, CEO at KLEBCHEMIE, sees the HotCoating line in Barsinghausen as a reference for KLEIBERIT which, in cooperation with international experts and prospective buyers, helps promote the technology and raise the quality benchmarks over other coating and lacquering methods.

Our service is your profit!

We finish almost all materials, whether MDF and chipboard, composites, metals, plastics, etc. We also offer you specific, individually defined solutions such as exact and constant colour settings, flexible cuts, matching edgings and prefabricated elements.

In our showroom, we are pleased to present our large selection of decors and to show you the advantages of KLEIBERIT HotCoating surfaces in terms of processing, sustainability and quality.

Name: Janjua Wood Trading & Manufacturing (Pvt.) Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to Janjua Wood Trading & Manufacturing (Pvt.) Ltd. 

Since 1990, we have been your trusted partner in the world of wood furniture for homes and offices. Our commitment to excellence and passion for crafting quality wood products have made us a leading name in the industry.

 Who Are We? 

Janjua Wood Trading & Manufacturing (Pvt.) Ltd. is a renowned company based in Pakistan, specializing in the manufacturing and trading of wood furniture for both residential and commercial spaces. With decades of experience under our belt, we have gained invaluable expertise in creating exquisite pieces that blend style, functionality, and durability.

 Our Business Services 

1 Wood Furniture Manufacturing: Our skilled craftsmen meticulously design and produce wood furniture, catering to diverse tastes and needs. From classic to contemporary styles, we have an extensive range of furniture options that add elegance and sophistication to any space.

2 Raw Material Supply: Understanding the importance of top-quality materials in furniture manufacturing, we offer a reliable supply of premium raw materials to other furniture factories and businesses across Pakistan.

3 Semi-Finished & Finished Furniture: For those who enjoy the art of DIY, we provide semi-finished furniture pieces that allow you to add a personal touch. Additionally, we offer fully finished furniture items that are ready to enhance your home or office instantly.

4 Wood Doors: Elevate the entrance to your spaces with our exquisite wood doors. Crafted with precision and attention to detail, our doors offer security and elegance in equal measure.

 Join Us 

Experience the timeless beauty of wood with Janjua Wood Trading & Manufacturing (Pvt.) Ltd. Discover a world of exquisite furniture and reliable supplies for your homes, offices, and businesses. We invite you to explore our vast collection and become a part of our growing family of satisfied customers.

Name: Dekayu Indonesia
Description:
Sejak 2017, Dekayu hadir sebagai jenama lokal Indonesia yang membersamai para pengrajin kayu tumbuh dan berkembang bersama. Berangkat dari kerajinan tradisional, Dekayu mengubah persepsi terhadap produk kayu, menghadirkannya sebagai produk fungsional untuk keseharian: dari wooden tableware, kitchenware, bathroom accessories, hingga stationary yang bisa dikreasikan menjadi hampers, gift, hingga souvenir eksklusif. 

Hampers / hadiah sudah sering dilakukan, tapi kebutuhan akan yang personal, bangga lokal dan pelayanan gifting yang memudahkan belum banyak dijumpai. Inilah yang menjadi alasan kenapa Dekayu menjadi andalan, yakni dengan memberikan pengalaman gifting yang autentik, bermakna, dan penuh nilai lokal.

Dengan menjadi DNA kami, untuk selalu menciptakan "Meaningful Connection". Kami percaya bahwa setiap hampers merupakan simbol "Kasih Sejati". Hampers juga dipercara menjadi perantara ungkapan tulus berbagi dari hati, memperkuat relasi, menghangatkan silaturahmi, dan mengukir kesan mendalam di setiap momen penting. Semua ini dilakukan dengan #KasihHadiahKaryaNegeri

Osmo réalise des finitions pour le bois, des parquets, des bardages, des plans de travail, etc. Notre passion pour le bois, notre savoir-faire et le souci du moindre détail technique ont toujours été au cœur de nos produits. Name: Koziwood
Description:
KoziWood is a sophisticated brand with many years of production and design experience in the wooden toy industry. Our dynamic and innovative design team carries out refined and timeless productions with wooden material, the primary choice in children’s toys. Supporting the mental development of children and their creativity, KoziWood toys emerge with an environmentally friendly and sustainable production approach. KoziWood’s long-lasting and safe toys, produced with entirely natural materials, are candidates to be every child’s favorite toy.

KoziWood appeals to individual and corporate customers simultaneously. Moreover, it offers solution partnerships in the design and production process of multi-purpose wooden products.
Wooden toys have a physically calming impact on children. In addition, it is known that playgrounds built with natural materials strengthen children’s ability to focus. Hence, playing with wood also has positive neurological effects on children.

In the toy industry dominated by plastic materials, wood comes to the forefront as the best choice for children. Wooden toys which are aesthetically inspiring and durable appeal to multiple senses while providing unique exploration areas for every child. Since they do not contain stimuli such as artificial light, sound, and movement, wooden toys also offer children a multidirectional play experience where they can create a world from scratch.

Depuis 2014, elle fait partie intégrante du groupe japonais NANKAI PLYWOOD, acteur dynamique et innovant des solutions d’agencement intérieur.  

Implantée au coeur de la forêt des Landes de Gascogne à Labouheyre, NP ROLPIN développe des matériaux de construction en pin maritime issu à 100 % de la forêt landaise. 

Avec plus de 40 ans de savoir-faire, NP ROLPIN est à la pointe de l’innovation et de la technologie et propose des produits de qualité, exclusivement conçus et fabriqués en France, permettant d’embellir intérieurs et extérieurs. Respectueuse de l’environnement, la société est multilabellisée, certifiée et répond entièrement aux exigences des normes européennes.

Lors d’une enquête de satisfaction réalisée début 2017, nos clients donnaient une note moyenne de 4/5 à la qualité de notre service client.

Name: LOC Holz GmbH
Description: Wir haben ein völlig neues Produktionswerk auf höchstem technischen und ökologischen Niveau in Arbing (Perg/OÖ), im Wirtschaftspark Perg Machland errichtet. Name: M Fine Lumber Co.
Description: Founded in 1933, M. Fine Lumber Company has been recycling lumber in New York City for over 85 years. We are the leading supplier of recycled lumber in the tri-state area, servicing architects, designers, and the general public with locally salvaged lumber. We salvage lumber from local demolition projects and supply these recycled timbers to customers all over the world on a wholesale level. We are also open to the public and sell to walk-in customers. Our clientele normally consists of furniture makers, architects, designers, Bar/Restaurant owners, and do-it yourselfers who are welcome to come to our yard, pick out the material they want, and then schedule a delivery or pick-up. Recycled lumber is one of the most environmentally friendly building materials available. It is made from recycled wood waste, making it a sustainable choice for your construction project. Recycled lumber is also stronger and more durable than traditional lumber, making it an ideal choice for any type of building project.

Name: Scheucher Parkett
Description: Scheucher is a traditional family company that unites the craftsman's passion for perfection with innovative thinking and acts in harmony with nature. These aspects help to create elegant, multi-faceted parquet flooring that delights people throughout the world. Over the past decades Scheucher has evolved into one of the leading parquet manufacturers in Austria, running one of the most modern parquet factories in Europe. With the set-up of a new photovoltaic roof system (it is currently the largest photovoltaic roof system in Austria) we are able to avoid about 4 million kg of CO2 emissions each year and once more emphasise that sustainability is an essential part of our corporate principles, affects our actions and behavior and that we - as a company, bear responibility for our environment.

Name: Rubio Monocoat UK & Ireland
Description:
Rubio Monocoat has been the number one reference for top-quality protection and colouring of both interior and exterior timber for over ten years. With 80 different countries, and 30.000.000 m² of treated timber per year, Rubio Monocoat is becoming a well-known partner for professionals with high demands. In addition to the treatment of timber floors, decks, cladding, etc., Rubio Monocoat products are also perfectly suited for treating tables, chairs and other types of timber furniture; interior as well as exterior. 

Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus 2C is our premium product for interior use, which protects and colours timber in a single layer. The revolutionary technology of molecular binding makes the oil connect with the timber fibres, without forming a film or chance of overlapping. The oil is available in 40 standard colours and is 100% environmentally friendly.

This principal of a single layer application also applies for the Hybrid Wood Protector, our oil for exterior use which is available in 12 natural timber colours and 8 trendy pop colours. Next to the oils for interior and exterior timber, Rubio Monocoat also provides a full range of aftercare products to keep your timber in great shape for years to come, as well as solutions for specific stains. 
Rubio Monocoat is the first in the wood treatment sector to be awarded the Eurofins Indoor Air Comfort Gold label certification. This is a sign of Rubio Monocoat’s focus on quality and contribution to a healthy indoor environment. The label combines the most relevant emission specifications and requirements in Europe in one certification.

Unit 1, Purley Chase Industrial Estate, 
Pipers Lane
Nuneaton
CV10 0RG

www.rubiomonocoatonline.co.uk

Name: ANTIK-HOLZ
Description: Antik Holz - manufacturer and wholesale of old wood We have specialized in trading old wood for about 20 years. We are the largest company in Poland that sourcing old wood and gives it a second life. Our products are aimed mainly at those specialists in the industry who need the highest quality, unique and one-of-a-kind materials. Our products are made of wood only from Poland. We successively buy old boards and old wood, and we demolish old wooden structures. Then we give the acquired raw material a new meaning. Each of our products is a witness to a separate story that makes it completely unique in its form, structure and color. Careful selection of purchased wood and professional processing guarantee the highest quality - free from pests and untainted by chemicals. Antik Holz, a trustworthy and internationally proven partner, is constantly evolving.Production processes and mechanical facilities are constantly being modernized and subjected to constant control so that the obtained product is of the best quality and suited to the high standards expected by our clients.

Name: KRONOSPAN ROMANIA
Description:
Excellence in transforming wood
Kronospan manufactures and distributes wood-based panels. Globally we are one of the leading manufacturers of:
Particleboard (PB)
Medium density fibreboard (MDF)
Oriented strand board (OSB)
Laminate flooring
UF, MUF and MF resins for wood-based panels

Kronospan also produces speciality and decorative paper as well as other associated value added products, such as melamine-faced panels, worktops, wall panels, window sills, lacquered HDF, compact boards, high pressure laminates (HPL), plywood and others. Kronospan manufactures wood-based panels at 40 sites and is local in many countries.

Our vision: wood, perfected

Kronospan is a world leading manufacturer of wood-based panels using advanced technology, and as such we have pioneered many of our industry's key advances and will continue to lead product development and innovation into the future. Our products have a wide application across the flooring, furniture and refurbishment industries. 

We have invested in developing a vertically integrated supply chain that allows us to constantly improve upon and perfect every aspect of our products. This enables us to:

•satisfy our customers' needs at affordable prices
react quickly to market and technology changes
•be the most service-oriented and innovative provider of wood-based panels and associated products

All this requires dedication – but that’s life when you’re a perfectionist.

Name: Noor Wood Works
Description:
Premier Manufacturer of Wooden Pallets, Boxes, and Crates in Dammam, Khobar, Jubail

At Noor Wood Works, we proudly lead the way as a premier manufacturer of high-quality wooden pallets, boxes, and crates in saudi arabia. Our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction has established us as a trusted name in the industry.

We specialize in crafting robust wooden solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of businesses in various sectors. Each of our products—whether plywood pallets, wooden crates, or custom boxes—is meticulously crafted by skilled artisans who use only the finest materials. This dedication ensures maximum durability and functionality, making our products ideal for transportation and storage.

Understanding that each client has unique requirements, we offer customized solutions that cater to specific dimensions and specifications. Our team collaborates closely with clients to design and produce packaging products that perfectly align with their needs, ensuring the highest level of precision and quality in every order.

Sustainability is at the core of our operations. We recognize the importance of eco-friendly practices in today's business environment. Our wooden pallets and boxes are not only durable but also designed to be reusable and recyclable. 

At Noor Wood Works, we pride ourselves on our quality assurance and commitment to exceeding client expectations. Our wooden pallets are versatile, providing a stable base for easy handling with forklifts and pallet jacks, and are suitable for a wide range of applications.

Connect with us today for an instant quotation at +966 580 611 809, and let Noor Wood Works be your partner in providing reliable and customized wooden packaging solutions that meet your business needs.
