Name: Kashmir Carpentry L.L.C.
Description:
Kashmir Carpentry is a family-owned business located in Musaffah Industries in Abu Dhabi with a rich history in the carpentry industry. Founded by Mr. Muhammad Abdul Ghani (Late) and Mr. Muhammad Saddique in 1977, the company has been serving its community for over 45 years. Throughout this time, Kashmir Carpentry has built a reputation for providing high-quality doors and wardrobes to its customers.
Our team of skilled craftsmen’s is dedicated to delivering excellent customer service and ensuring that each project is completed to the highest standards. We take pride in our attention to detail and use only the finest materials in our work. Whether you are in need of a custom door or wardrobe for your home or business, Kashmir Carpentry has the expertise and experience to bring your vision to life.
In addition to our focus on quality and customer satisfaction, Kashmir Carpentry is also committed to efficiency and professionalism. We strive to complete projects on time and within budget and maintain a clean and organized work environment. We are also dedicated to staying up-to-date on the industries best practices and continuously learning and growing as professionals.
Thank you for considering Kashmir Carpentry for your carpentry needs. We look forward to the opportunity to work with you and bring your vision to life.

Name: Burty's Timber Ltd
Description:
Local, sustainable, hand-picked, milled and dried timber with a low carbon footprint and minimal environmental impact!

Burty's Timber is a family-run business in central Scotland, offering top-quality timber sourced from the heart of our local forests. 

We focus on providing unique, character-rich wood, much of which comes from older trees, including wind-fallen and naturally discarded timber, that might otherwise go to waste.

Specialising in saw milling, machining, round timber, and bespoke timber products, we cater to a variety of clients, from carpenters and cabinet makers to DIY enthusiasts and commercial businesses. 

Our commitment to sustainability and environmental stewardship is at the core of everything we do, ensuring that our timber products support both craftsmanship and ecological responsibility.

What sets us apart is the distinctive quality of our wood – shaped by the rugged conditions of Scottish forests. Each piece tells its own story through unique markings and patterns, offering an unmatched level of character for your project.

At Burty's Timber, we’re driven by the goal of reducing waste and ensuring that every piece of timber is respected and put to its best use, all while supporting our local environment and community. 

Let us help bring your projects to life with timber that’s as sustainable as it is beautiful.

Name: Vaara
Description: For over 90 years, Vaara has been crafting high-quality timber products in Tervola, in the heart of Finland. Our expertise spans four generations, combining traditional craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology. Every product is sourced from sustainably managed, certified Nordic forests and refined in our advanced facilities. Today, Vaara is a trusted partner for builders, resesellers and architects in 14 countries.

Name: europlac
Description:
europlac ist Europas führender Hersteller von individuellen, echtholzfurnierten Werkstoffen. Mit Leidenschaft, Handwerkskunst und Innovationsgeist schaffen wir Werkstoffe, die über die reine Funktionalität hinausgehen – sie bringen Ästhetik, Wärme und Emotion in den Raum.

Wood Vibes for Interior Design
Wir laden Architekten, Designer und Planer ein, die Vielfalt und Magie von Echtholz zu erleben. europlac bietet maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, die Räume transformieren: von Wänden, Decken und Böden bis hin zu Möbeln und Akustiklösungen – immer mit dem Ziel, einzigartige Lebenswelten zu schaffen.

Nachhaltigkeit als gelebte Verantwortung
Nachhaltigkeit ist für uns mehr als ein Versprechen – sie ist unsere Grundhaltung. Ressourcenschonende Technologien und ökologische Produktionsstandorte sind klare Bekenntnisse zu einer besseren Zukunft. Wir glauben daran, dass die Schönheit des Holzes nur dann Bestand hat, wenn wir es verantwortungsvoll nutzen.

Innovationskraft und höchste Qualität
Mit modernster Fertigung und einem hochqualifizierten Team setzen wir neue Standards im Holzdesign. Produkte wie unsere Akustiklösungen oder preisgekrönte Designinnovationen begeistern Kunden weltweit. Unser europlacHOUSE bietet Raum für kreativen Austausch und ist ein lebendiger Ort, an dem neue Trends geboren werden.

Unsere Mission: Lebensräume gestalten
Jeder Raum, den wir mit unseren Werkstoffen prägen, ist mehr als ein Ort – er ist ein Raum, der berührt. Mit unseren Produkten lassen sich in Ihren Projekten Geschichten erzählen, die einen bleibenden Eindruck hinterlassen.

Entdecken Sie mit uns, was mit Echtholz möglich ist.

Produkte
RUSTICA: Charakterstarke, rustikale Holzwerkstoffe
INOIS: Innovative Akustikplatten
FIREPLAC: Brandschutzplatten mit natürlicher Holzoptik
INDEWO: Individuelle Digitaldruck-Furniere

FSC / PEFC zertifiziert

Auszeichnungen
regelmäßige Red Dot Awards für exzellentes Design
Anerkennung als Trendsetter in der Innenarchit

Name: EGGER Portugal
Description:
A empresa familiar, fundada em 1961, emprega mais de 11.000 pessoas. Uma vasta gama de produtos à base de madeira (painéis de partículas, OSB e MDF) é produzida nas 22 fábricas através do mundo. 
A empresa alcançou um volume de negócios de 2,83 mil milhões de euros no ano financeiro de 2019/2020 e tem clientes no mundo inteiro na indústria do mobiliário, bem como no sector de bricolage, incluindo retalhistas de madeira e pavimentos.
Os produtos EGGER podem ser encontrados em muitas áreas da vida privada e pública, incluindo cozinhas, salas de banho, quartos de dormir, escritórios, hotéis e lojas. Líder europeu da indústria de painéis derivados de madeira e presente no mundo inteiro, a EGGER é um fornecedor completo para a indústria do mobiliário, design interiores, construção em madeira e pavimentos.

Com excepção dos nossos produtos de construção à base de madeira verdadeira, todos os decors mencionados são reproduções e, como tal, oferecem soluções de tendências duradouras e resistentes de alta qualidade para a casa, áreas públicas e espaços comerciais.  

Encontre as nossas ofertas de emprego em: http://www.egger.com/jobs
Location: Rion des Landes Cedex 01, Rion des Landes

Name: Holzwerke van Roje
Description:
Unser breites Produktsortiment - natürlich immer perfekt auf Sie „zugeschnitten“ und in astreiner Qualität!

1929 gründete Ignatz van Roje das Unternehmen als kleinen Grubenholzbetrieb in Neuwied am Rhein. Er legte damals den Grundstein für eines der führenden Nadelholz-Sägewerke in Europa und das größte in Rheinland-Pfalz. Standort unseres Holzwerks ist der Westerwald – mitten in Deutschland, mitten in Europa.

Heute ist van Roje ein modernes Familienunternehmen in dritter Generation und entwickelt sich stetig weiter. Mit modernsten Technologien und Fertigungsmethoden stellen wir uns aktuellen ökologischen und ökonomischen Herausforderungen einer automatisierten und digitalisierten Welt. Wir sind stolz auf unsere regionalen Wurzeln und verbinden Tradition mit Innovation.

Mit mehr als 200 Mitarbeitern stehen wir für den nachhaltigen Umgang mit dem Rohstoff Holz und stellen innovative, nachhaltige Produkte in den Bereichen Schnittholz, Hobelware, Premium-Holzpellets und Brettsperrholz für den modernen Holzbau her. Wir verwenden 100% der Rohstoffe in unserem Werk - getreu dem Motto „Keine Ökonomie ohne Ökologie“.

Name: Furnicraft Manufacturing Pvt Ltd
Description: Furnicraft Mfg. Pvt Ltd is a company based in Sri Lanka. Currently Undertaking Doors, Skirting, Flooring, Decking and Pantry Cupboards both in the Local and International Markets.

Name: Habo Träfo
Description:
Habo Träfo – Moderna koncept och gediget hantverk!

Habo Träfo projekterar, konstruerar och producerar kompletta, kundanpassade inredningar och produktexponeringssystem. Produktionen sker antingen efter ritningar, eller konstrueras från grunden. Från idé till färdig lösning – Habo Träfo är med hela vägen. Med lång erfarenhet i ryggen, effektiva inköpskanaler och en innovativ maskinpark står Habo Träfo starka i sin förmåga att sy ihop projekt och att producera på korta ledtider.

Name: Jærfjøla
Description:
Jærfjøla utvikler og produserer skjærefjøler av heltre, designet og laget på Jæren i Norge. Produktene våre er laget i FSC-sertifisert accoya-tre, helt uten lim og mikroplast. Resultatet er skjærefjøler som kombinerer tradisjonelt håndverk med moderne teknologi – de tåler oppvaskmaskin og steamer, er skånsomme mot kniver, har lang levetid og produseres med bærekraft i fokus.

Jærfjøla passer like godt på hjemmekjøkkenet som i profesjonelle miljøer. Vi leverer til restauranter, hoteller, interiør- og gavebutikker, samt til bedrifter som ønsker varige og bærekraftige gaver.

Vår visjon er å tilby et ærlig alternativ til plast, og å gjøre norsk design, lokal produksjon og ekte håndverk tilgjengelig for kjøkken over hele landet.

Name: SIBC
Description:
SIBC (Société Industrielle des Bois Conditionnés) est une scierie créée le 
1er décembre 1996 à Saint-Germain-en-Montagne (39) par le président actuel, Pascal JACQUIN.

Cette scierie a pour spécificité de travailler les bois feuillus et les bois résineux.
SIBC propose plus de 20 essences déclinées en une large gamme de produits destinés aux professionnels comme aux particuliers.

Sensible à la santé et à la vitalité des forêts, la société SIBC préserve avec soin l’étendue des ressources forestières et leur diversité biologique.

La société s’approvisionne à 80% dans la région Bourgogne Franche Comté.

Certifiée PEFC depuis 2005, elle assure une exploitation raisonnée de la forêt et une commercialisation de ses produits issus de sources contrôlées.

En savoir plus : www.sibc.fr

Name: AEG Legno
Description: AEG Legno è un’azienda specializzata nella distribuzione e lavorazione di pannelli in legno. Grazie all’efficiente lavoro svolto al suo interno, ai nostri clienti offriamo una vasta gamma di servizi tailor made per soddisfare le loro esigenze in termini di comunicazione e marketing, consulenze tecniche, ricerca e approvvigionamento di materiali, lavorazioni degli stessi garantendo sempre un piano logistico dettagliato.

Name: L'Atelier Autonome
Description:
À l’Atelier Autonome, nous accompagnons les entreprises, collectivités et structures éducatives dans la création de projets innovants en mobilisant un large panel de compétences : programmation, électronique, impression 3D, menuiserie, découpe laser et prototypage. 

Engagée dans l’Économie Sociale et Solidaire et titulaire de l’agrément ESUS, notre structure ancrée à Rouen développe des solutions responsables en privilégiant les circuits courts, les matériaux durables et une approche collaborative.

Notre activité s’organise autour de trois pôles complémentaires :

•	Animations et chantiers participatifs : interventions jeunesse, ateliers d’initiation technique et actions de team building pour fédérer les équipes autour du faire-ensemble.

•	Conception sur mesure : aménagements et signalétiques personnalisées, développement de solutions techniques, création de modules pédagogiques interactifs et fabrication d’objets uniques adaptés à vos besoins.

•	Espace de bricolage : sessions libres à destination des particuliers, mise à disposition d’outils pour les artisans et accompagnement individualisé pour concrétiser tous types de projets.

En alliant expertise technique, créativité et engagement territorial, nous donnons vie à des projets utiles, durables et conçus avec vous.

Name: RahuelBois
Description: Depuis 1921, RahuelBois, spécialiste du châtaignier et des bois locaux, conçoit et fabrique des produits de façade et sol pour l'intérieur et l'extérieur. Sa variété de gammes et sa maîtrise du processus lui permettent de vous offrir un produit de qualité.

Name: SAF WOOD
Description: SAF Wood is a prominent company in the Egyptian wood industry that offers a diverse range of exquisite wooden products including wood flooring, kitchens, dressing rooms, and other custom-made designs that cater to the varied preferences of our clients. Our team of skilled and professional craftsmen meticulously creates each wooden piece, ensuring a top-notch service that meets our clients' expectations.

Name: Arte Brotto Mobili
Description:
Since 1966, Arte Brotto expresses the excellence in the production of wooden furniture Made in Italy. The company develops original collections and realises complete and custom-made projects, also in collaboration with Foglie d’Oro, the luxury flooring brand of the Brotto family.

A strong reality, which has been able to make the history of the art furniture, the foundation for a constant aesthetic and design research, characterised by a particular focus on the eco-sustainability: an ethical and aesthetic choice that is realised using solid walnut and oak obtained from certified forests, in natural vegetable oil finishes, avoiding the use of products with formaldehyde or other petroleum derivatives.

The control over the supply chain, with forests and sawmills owned by the company, is the guarantee of the quality of the raw material, chosen and submitted to the first processing directly at the source, in the full respect of the environment.

The internal dynamic design team develops the creative intuitions of the founder, Sante Giorgio Brotto, turning into original collections, listening and supporting the customer’s needs, in dialogue with architects and interior designers.

The passion and ability of the master craftsmen with great experience enhance the characteristics of the most precious essences of walnut and oak: processing and finishes are strictly handmade, to make every single furniture a unique and unrepeatable piece.

From the initial preference for the classic style, heir of the Venetian art furniture tradition of which Sante Giorgio Brotto is a deep connoisseur; over the years, the company has built its aesthetic identity on stylistic choices of contemporary nature, with a particular attention to the eco-design. A synthesis that has as its guiding value the concept of comfort which is translated into solutions that are at the same time solid and refined, thanks to the wise use of solid wood, used to create elegant furniture intended to last over time.

Name: Freshwood
Description: FWFI - FRESHWOOD FORMS INDUSTRY was created to develop, manufacture and commercialize light wood-based packaging of high quality, customizable, practical and multifaceted in its application and use.

Name: Rubio Monocoat UK & Ireland
Description:
Rubio Monocoat has been the number one reference for top-quality protection and colouring of both interior and exterior timber for over ten years. With 80 different countries, and 30.000.000 m² of treated timber per year, Rubio Monocoat is becoming a well-known partner for professionals with high demands. In addition to the treatment of timber floors, decks, cladding, etc., Rubio Monocoat products are also perfectly suited for treating tables, chairs and other types of timber furniture; interior as well as exterior. 

Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus 2C is our premium product for interior use, which protects and colours timber in a single layer. The revolutionary technology of molecular binding makes the oil connect with the timber fibres, without forming a film or chance of overlapping. The oil is available in 40 standard colours and is 100% environmentally friendly.

This principal of a single layer application also applies for the Hybrid Wood Protector, our oil for exterior use which is available in 12 natural timber colours and 8 trendy pop colours. Next to the oils for interior and exterior timber, Rubio Monocoat also provides a full range of aftercare products to keep your timber in great shape for years to come, as well as solutions for specific stains. 
Rubio Monocoat is the first in the wood treatment sector to be awarded the Eurofins Indoor Air Comfort Gold label certification. This is a sign of Rubio Monocoat’s focus on quality and contribution to a healthy indoor environment. The label combines the most relevant emission specifications and requirements in Europe in one certification.

Unit 1, Purley Chase Industrial Estate, 
Pipers Lane
Nuneaton
CV10 0RG

www.rubiomonocoatonline.co.uk

Description:
TOPSOLID'WOOD

Name: MAVIN
Description:
ONE COMPANY.
ONE MISSION.

At our core, MAVIN is a group of people that are passionate about what we do and the resources we have been blessed to steward. Leading by example, setting a standard, then striving every day to exceed it. Building true relationships that positively impact our lives and the lives of others. That’s our passion. That’s our heart. And we are honored to share our journey with you.

MAVIN is a company with three divisions – all involved with woodworking.  Our foundation rests with our timber division, diligently working with landowners to selectively harvest trees throughout the region. Once harvested, the trees are processed by our proprietary mill operations to create lumber to be used by the MAVIN fine furniture division. In the past, the various divisions operated under independent names, but in the spring of 2022, the divisions consolidated under the name MAVIN to help position the company for future growth. With roots dating back to the mid 1970s, MAVIN has a long history with a proven track record for quality manufacturing and trusted customer relationships.

Name: LPH - Lider Produkcji i Handlu
Description: Oferujemy tarcice liściaste, iglaste oraz egzotyczne. Sklejki liściaste, iglaste oraz sklejkę z filmem. Podkłady kolejowe bukowe, dębowe i iglaste. Klejonkę mikrowczep i litą bukową

Description:

Exportamos nuestra línea Motek y nuestros nuevos tableros de melamina

Name: Indubois
Description:
INDUBOIS est une entreprise spécialisée dans la fabrication et la pose de portes, placards et cuisines sur mesure. Nous travaillons avec des matériaux de qualité pour concevoir et réaliser des produits haut de gamme pour les particuliers et les professionnels.

Nous sommes fiers de notre savoir-faire artisanal et de notre expertise technique. Nous nous engageons à satisfaire les besoins de nos clients en leur proposant des solutions personnalisées, en tenant compte de leurs exigences esthétiques, fonctionnelles et de leur budget.

Notre équipe est composée de professionnels qualifiés et expérimentés, qui possèdent une grande expertise dans le domaine de la fabrication de portes, de placards et de cuisines. Nous travaillons avec précision et minutie pour créer des produits de qualité supérieure qui répondent aux normes les plus strictes.

Nous sommes à l'écoute de nos clients et nous les accompagnons tout au long de leur projet, depuis la conception jusqu'à la réalisation. Nous sommes fiers de notre réputation de fiabilité et de notre engagement envers l'excellence, et nous sommes impatients de travailler avec vous pour répondre à vos besoins de portes, de placards et de cuisines sur mesure.

Name: Jefferson's Planks
Description: JEFFERSON'S PLANKS is a budding wood products company that provides a broad range of services including furniture products. With a consultative approach, we help clients build innovative ideas and bringing their dreams to reality with our expert staff. Our expertise in wood work and products related services allows us to thrive in this field.

 Revalorisation de palettes

Name: INCASE GmbH
Description:
Die INCASE GmbH ist mehr als nur ein Team von Tischlern – wir sind ein erfahrenes Handwerker-Kollektiv, das Deine Technik mit der gleichen Leidenschaft und Präzision behandelt, wie wir es mit jedem Detail tun. 

Mit über 30 Jahren Erfahrung im Tischlerhandwerk und jahrelanger Expertise in der Medienbranche stellen wir sicher, dass Deine Technik sicher verpackt am Veranstaltungsort ankommt. 

Wir kennen Deine Technik genau und wissen, wie wichtig es ist, dass alles reibungslos funktioniert – damit Du Dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrieren kannst: Dein Event!

Name: Esposit
Description:
Esposit, a brand of Studio Arredi Srl, was created to bring innovation and design to the international market for sustainable furniture. 
We specialize in the design and production of 100% Made in Italy wooden displays and furniture, offering modular and lightweight solutions that are easy to assemble without screws and tools thanks to the interlocking systems. 
We use only FSC-certified wood to provide custom display solutions, fully aligned with environmental responsibility and the specific needs of our clients.

Name: Mon Extension Bois - Devenez franchisé !
Description:
Et si on construisait autrement ?

Chez Mon Extension Bois.com, nous croyons qu’il est possible de repenser la manière d’agrandir son habitat en conciliant écologie, efficacité et esthétique.

 Notre spécialité : des extensions de maison en ossature bois, 100% sur mesure, conçues et fabriquées en France dans notre propre usine.

 En kit ou clé en main, nos solutions rendent l’agrandissement accessible, rapide à mettre en œuvre, et parfaitement adapté aux nouveaux enjeux environnementaux.

 Notre mission : construire un réseau national d’entrepreneurs indépendants qui partagent notre vision d’une construction plus responsable, plus humaine, plus durable.

Déjà lancée avec succès à Lille, Arras et La Rochelle, notre franchise est prête à s’étendre sur tout le territoire.

 Vous êtes entrepreneur dans l’habitat, professionnel du bâtiment ou en reconversion ?
Vous cherchez un modèle éprouvé, structuré et engagé ?

Rejoignez l’aventure Mon Extension Bois.

 Construisons autrement. Ensemble.

#franchise #constructiondurable #bois #écoconstruction #entrepreneuriat #ossaturebois #MonExtensionBois

Name: Vihaan Particle Boards
Description:
Vihaan Boards Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of particle boards (plain and prelam bagasse particle boards), in Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh. 

Founded in 2011, our company strives for excellence, by providing premium quality particle boards to its valued customers. The company is charging ahead to become a name to reckon with, in the highly competitive world of this industry.

Name: Maderama
Description:
Quiénes somos

Somos una empresa líder en la fabricación de mobiliario y acabados arquitectónicos en materiales diversos, comprometida con la innovación y la sostenibilidad desde nuestro inicio en el año 2002. Nos apasiona trabajar con materiales de diferentes tipos, como la madera, el metal, el vidrio, la piedra, el plástico y otros, y creemos que su uso en la producción de muebles y en la arquitectura es clave para un futuro más sostenible y diverso.

En nuestra empresa, trabajamos con un equipo de expertos en diseño, producción y sostenibilidad para desarrollar productos de alta calidad y con un diseño innovador, que sean amigables con el medio ambiente y que respondan a las necesidades y expectativas de nuestros clientes.

Nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad se refleja en todo nuestro proceso de producción, desde la selección de las materias primas hasta la entrega del producto final. Nos aseguramos de trabajar con materiales provenientes de fuentes sostenibles, y de utilizar procesos productivos eficientes y amigables con el medio ambiente.

En cuanto al futuro de la producción de muebles y la arquitectura en materiales, estamos convencidos de que la innovación y la tecnología serán clave para mejorar la eficiencia y sostenibilidad de nuestros procesos. Por ello, estamos siempre en constante investigación y desarrollo de nuevas técnicas y materiales que nos permitan seguir liderando la industria del mobiliario y los acabados arquitectónicos en materiales diversos.

En resumen, somos una empresa comprometida con la sostenibilidad y la innovación, que trabaja con materiales diversos como clave para un futuro más sostenible y diverso en la producción de muebles y la arquitectura.

Name: J & C O'Meara Woodworking Machinery
Description:
The Company is run with a 'direct approach' with all existing and potential customers being catered for on an individual basis.

We have always been to offer quality new and used machinery, complimented with a no-nonsense warranty, ensuring customer's total peace of mind.

We are also one of the very few independent machinery supply outlets who have actually 'chosen' the products with which we wish to be associated, therefore we are not bound to offer the 'rough with the smooth'.

What we do offer is a premium range of quality new machinery incorporating such marques as Kundig, specialist manufacturer of wide belt and edge sanding machinery, the Genisis range of sliding table panel saws, edge banders and classical joinery machines and a comprehensive range of CNC machines from the AES Group.

Search ukwoodworkingmachinery on all other social platforms for daily updates & videos.

Name: LEMANBOIS - Fabricant engagé
Description: Fabricant engagé, depuis près de 40 ans, de produits d'extérieur en bois durables et de qualité. Abris de jardin, Carports, Clôtures, Terrasses, Pergola, Projets sur mesure.

Name: Woodco
Description:
Dal 1983, a Woodco piace pensare che esista il parquet giusto per ogni progetto di design e per ogni singola persona. Ecco perché mette la propria conoscenza e la maestria artigiana al servizio dei propri clienti: per dare vita a pavimenti in legno di altissima qualità, accessibili e unici. 

La profonda conoscenza del legno, delle lavorazioni e dei fornitori consente all’azienda di aggiungere valore lungo l’intera filiera produttiva, garantendo ai propri clienti pavimenti d’eccellenza che permettono di godere di tutto il calore e la bellezza che solo il legno sa donare.

Name: DIN TIM DOO
Description:
Introducing Din Tim: Crafting Excellence in Wooden Packaging! 

At Din Tim, we take pride in our passion for wood and our commitment to delivering top-quality wooden packaging solutions. 

About Us: 
Din Tim was founded as a small family business in 1989 in Lopaš, near Trstenik. Since its inception, up to the present day, DIN TIM has had the vision to provide its customers with the best possible workmanship of all wooden products imaginable. From the first day, the mission has been a long-term cooperation with satisfied clients, and for this reason, we carefully selected our professional staff. Today, our team consists of 60 employees with a tendency to increase the number.

What sets us apart?
 Natural Elegance: Our wooden packaging not only safeguards your products but also adds a touch of rustic charm.
 Custom Solutions: Tailored to your unique needs, we offer customizable designs that align perfectly with your brand identity.
 Eco-Friendly: We care about the environment. Our sustainable practices ensure that our wooden packaging is as green as it gets.

Join hands with Din Tim and elevate your packaging game! 

Discover how our wooden packaging can make a difference for your products and brand. Connect with us today!

Name: Wood Loop
Description: Met Wood Loop kan elke houtverwerker, retailer, en plaatmateriaalproducent – van klein tot groot – MDF en spaanplaat gemakkelijk en betaalbaar recyclen. Wood Loop is een initiatief van Koninklijke CBM, de branchevereniging voor interieurbouw en meubelindustrie.

Name: Haşep Entegre Orman Ürünleri San. Tic. A.Ş.
Description: Düzce'de bulunan entegre tesisimizde Avrupa, Amerika, Afrika ve ülkemiz ormanlarında temin ettiğimiz ağaçlardan kereste, deck, lambri, masif panel, thermowood ve masif lamine ağaçlardan özel üretimler yapıyoruz

Name: SWISS KRONO Ukraine
Description:
At present, SWISS KRONO LLC includes three production branches located in Lviv Region – Kamianka-Buska town, in Ivano-Frankivsk Region – Broshniv-Osada township and in Kharkiv Region– Solonytsivka township.

SWISS KRONO LLC is the leading producer of MFC, worktops and the only producer of OSB/3 for the domestic market  in Ukraine.  Almost 800 employees contribute to the company success. As a result, the current facilities of the company production comprise over 700 thousand cubic meters per year, 100 thousand cubic meters of which are OSB/3 boards. There are 6 board laminating units with the capacity of 40 million sq.m. per year. Apart from that, the company produces 1.5 million sq.m. worktops per year and impregnated decorative paper.

Optimal location of the plants allows the company to react to the internal market needs immediately and to manufacture its products at the close proximity to the customer. Small distances from storage to the borders and availability of company’s own access gauges opens broad prospects for export of finished products to the neighboring and far-abroad countries.

Name: SSR VINA
Description:
Founded in 2009, SSR VINA is a global wood manufacturer and solution provider based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam - bringing 16+ years of wood manufacturing experience to international markets.

Powered by SSR Wood Factory and an integrated manufacturing system with ~3,000 production workers, we supply export-grade wood materials and finished products at scale, without compromising consistency.

We deliver end-to-end wood solutions, from responsibly sourced raw materials to precision-crafted products, supporting B2B customers worldwide with reliable lead times and quality control.

OEM / ODM: Bring us your drawings and specifications, or collaborate with our team to develop products for your market. We support custom sizing, finishing, branding, and packaging.

Key categories: finger-joint boards & panels, butcher block countertops, building materials, home décor furniture, kitchenware, and biomass.
Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Arôbois
Description:
We manufacture and sell a wide range of high-quality, high-performance oenological woods.
Our clients are primarily wine producers, wine cooperatives, brewers, etc. but we also have many clients in the alcohol, spirits and other alcoholic beverages sector and others in the agri-food sector and food-processing industry, thanks in particular to our expertise and our Quality requirements.

Name: BAWAN WOOD INDUSTRIES COMPANY LTD
Description: BAWAN WOOD INDUSTRIES COMPANY LTD is a wood product manufacturing company based out of Abaqiq Street, Street Number 122, Dammam, Saudi Arabia.

Name: Orange Wood Works
Description:
Orange wood works was established in 2003 with an ambitious strategy of expanding the regional interior space. We aim to be the leaders in the industry. Our success is based on five basic principles that form the foundation of our ethical code. Quality, Innovation, Trust, Care, and Service. They are qualities embedded in every journey we undertake, and this has set us apart from others in the industry.

We saw there was a gap to be filled. Having to deal with other carpentries who did not embody our qualities. in 2014, We expanded and opened Mood Wood Carpentry in Jebal Ali to ensure that we provide the high-quality carpentry works. In Early 2020, we transferred to a bigger location in Umm Ramool to house our showroom, office and factory being operated from a single location to improve efficiency and provide higher quality synergy.

Name: LATHO
Description: Diamo vita a superfici in legno con attenzione all'ecosostenibilità e alle tendenze del design . Questo è quello che facciamo nella nostra storica sede in provincia di Treviso. Siamo presenti dal 2008 ma nasciamo da Gizia srl che da oltre 50 anni crea con passione soluzioni in legno massiccio.

Name: J. van de Plas BV
Description:
J. van de Plas BV is een timmerbedrijf dat bestaat sinds 1754 !

Directeur Rolf van de Plas is de 8e generatie van de familie van de Plas in dit bijzondere bedrijf.
Met totaal 12 medewerkers levert J. van de Plas BV alle soorten en maten timmerwerk in de breedste zin van het woord. 
Van nieuwbouw tot historische ramen, deuren, kozijnen of lijstwerk...  bijna alles is mogelijk.

Name: BATICHÊNE
Description:
Batichêne, le CLT issu de la ressource bourguignonne conçu 100% en chêne de qualité secondaire pour de nouveaux usages constructifs.

 Acronyme de l’anglais Cross Laminated Timber trouvant son équivalent en français par bois lamellé croisé, ce panneau structurel de grandes dimensions est composé de lamelles en bois massif aboutées et se destine à la création de murs et de planchers porteurs.

Name: Nord Compensati
Description:
We design and manufacture:
- Lightweight solutions
- Soundproofing panels and appliances
- Fireproofing and fire retardant boards
- Custom-built panels
- Decking panels
- Riva Classic boats spare parts

We select and trade:
- Round logs, boules and squares
- Lumber & scantlings
- Veneer
- Mini-deckings
- Superdeckings & margin boards
- Marine plywood

Our services:
- Project assessment and solution advice
- Tailor-made product design
- Weight saving, Noise reduction and fireproofing advisory
- On board installation training and guidance
- CNC Machinery and ready-to-install kits
- Raw material scouting and testing
- Veneer, HPL and finishing coating
- Logistics

Our range 
We currently have the world’s ultimate product range of marine plywood and composite panels for the marine industry, featuring more than 20 diverse solutions. 

Research and development is in our DNA. We team up with our clients in order to accomplish the extraordinary challenges of shipbuilding by designing custom-made products and solutions. 

Quality leads us
We strive for excellence. Our products and solutions are 100% made in Italy and every single item we trade or manufacture undergoes a thorough quality assessment before entering and leaving our factory.

We build trusted relationships
Nord Compensati has always been able to adapt to the requirements of a market in constant change meeting the deadlines and the construction specifications of shipyards. Our customer portfolio includes the top names of sailing and motor boat building.

Name: Palmako
Description:
Palmako is part of Lemeks Group, Estonia’s biggest timber and forestry concern. 

Palmako is the leading manufacturer and exporter of log garden houses, laminated timber products, machine rounded vacuum pressure impregnated posts and wood pellets in Estonia 

We produce more than 60,000 wooden houses, up to 40,000 m3 of glulam products, over 24,000 m3 treated garden products and 50,000 tons of pellets per year, which we sell through an extensive reseller network mainly in Europe.

Name: Biogasikara Energy SARL
Description: Biogasikara Energy produces biomass briquettes and wood pellets from sawdust and agricultural waste, offering clean, efficient, and affordable alternatives to firewood and charcoal. Our fuels are optimized for household, small business, and institutional cooking, supporting a just energy transition in Madagascar. Since launching in 2020, we've distributed over 1,000 tons of briquettes and begun producing wood pellets in May 2025. Our solution improves health by reducing indoor smoke, lowers fuel costs for families, and helps preserve forests.

Name: Laminates and Things
Description:
We are a Preferred South Florida Distributor providing our customers with materials that adapt to the way you do business in the wood working Industry and provide measurable benefits. 
 
Businesses move fast. At Laminates and Things, our mission is to help yours move even faster.
 
Stay ahead of the curve by bringing our Industry expertise onto your Business and to assist with all facets you may be looking for. Laminates and Things has been servicing the wood working industry for over 33 years. 
 
We are headquartered in Hialeah, Florida, servicing Florida and the Caribbean. 
 
We are privately owned and operated. This allows us to give you the attention you cannot receive from other distributors. 
 
We specialize in high gloss and super matte MDF panels, melamine decorative panels, high pressure laminates, plywood, cabinet hardware, furniture hardware, led and more. We have in stock diverse products for the manufacturing of cabinetry including all wood products, abrasives, accessories, router bits, saw blades, adhesives, contact cement, lacquers, paints, silicon, stains, wood patches, mineral spirits, and lacquer thinners and others.

Name: KOLSAN
Description: Since 1973, KOLSAN has been committed to offering the best products in the industry to all its customers with its expert management team, architectural and R&D team, and nearly 150 production staff, in its 12,000 m2 factory and its 1000 m2 store, which opened in 2024 in line with its 50th anniversary targets.

Name: IsiBrix | Sistemi costruttivi modulari in legno per case e soppalchi
Description:
ISIBRIX è un’azienda specializzata nello sviluppo di un sistema costruttivo modulare brevettato in legno, progettato per rendere l’edilizia più semplice, veloce e accessibile. Il cuore del nostro approccio è il Brix System, una tecnologia che consente la realizzazione di strutture di qualità, dalle abitazioni complete ai soppalchi fino alle minicase, con un metodo di montaggio intuitivo, tempi ridotti e costi ottimizzati.

Il nostro obiettivo è rispondere alle esigenze di un’edilizia moderna e sostenibile, senza rinunciare a solidità, estetica e versatilità. La natura modulare del sistema ci permette di adattare ogni progetto alle reali necessità del cliente, offrendo soluzioni personalizzabili, leggere e resistenti, riducendo i tempi di cantiere e l’impiego di risorse.

Siamo nati con una visione chiara: semplificare il processo costruttivo e offrire un’alternativa concreta ai metodi tradizionali. Il nostro sistema è pensato per architetti, ingegneri, imprese edili e clienti privati che desiderano costruire in modo intelligente, sostenibile ed efficiente.

Le nostre tre linee di prodotto principali:
- Case in legno: soluzioni complete, su misura, efficienti e durevoli.
- Soppalchi autoportanti: ideali per chi vuole ampliare gli spazi senza licenza edilizie.
- Minicase prefabbricate: perfette per turismo e glamping.

Tutti i moduli sono realizzati in legno certificato, materiale rinnovabile e a basso impatto ambientale, e progettati per garantire alte prestazioni statiche, energetiche e funzionali. L’intero processo produttivo è orientato all’efficienza, al risparmio e al rispetto dell’ambiente.

Con il Brix System costruiamo in modo più rapido, preciso e sostenibile, portando innovazione concreta nei cantieri. Collaboriamo con professionisti per integrare il nostro sistema in progetti residenziali, commerciali o turistici, offrendo supporto tecnico e soluzioni su misura.

ISIBRIX non è solo un prodotto, ma un nuovo modo di costruire.

Name: Sinallagma - Les Ombrières Végétalisées
Description:
Creation of cool islands, through the vegetalisation of biomimetic complex wooden structures.

- Local authorities: adaptation to climate change, resilience of Urban Heat Islands (UHI)
- Companies: conviviality areas, greening of buildings
- Individuals: Original shading and tailor-made shelters. Integration of fine ironwork, artistic stained glass and bespoke linen curtains.

Name: polskapodloga.pl
Description:
Jesteśmy niewielką manufakturą drewnianych podłóg z zakładem produkcyjnym i salonem sprzedaży nieopodal Obornik Śląskich koło Wrocławia. 
Kontynuujemy tradycje stolarskie zakładu Eugeniusza Chałudy z Bierutowa, założonego w 1957 roku. 
We are a small manufacture of oak flooring located in southern-west of Poland. Out tradition reaches back to 1957 when Eugeniusz Chałuda started his own carpentery shop in Bierutów, near the city of Wroclaw. The tradition is continued by his eldest grandson - Pawel.

Name: Berry Wood & Stone
Description:
Berry Wood & Stone is a leading producer of high-quality building materials, specializing in quartz carpet and cross-laminated timber (CLT). Our company is dedicated to sustainable practices and using natural resources to create products that are both beautiful and functional.

Our quartz carpet is a unique flooring solution that combines the natural beauty of quartz with the durability of a resin-bound system. It is an ideal choice for both residential and commercial spaces, as it is slip-resistant, easy to clean, and can be customized to fit any design aesthetic.

In addition to our quartz carpet, we also specialize in CLT, which is a sustainable and innovative building material made from layers of timber that are bonded together. Our CLT is strong, lightweight, and can be used in a variety of applications, from flooring and walls to roofs and even entire buildings.

At Berry Wood & Stone, we are committed to using sustainable practices and minimizing our environmental impact. We believe that our products should enhance the natural beauty of any space, and our slogan, "For Nature," reflects our dedication to this philosophy.

Name: SWISS KRONO Deutschland

Fußböden und OSB von SWISS KRONO werden weltweit aufgrund ihrer exzellenten Qualität, der innovativen Eigenschaften und des modernen Designs nachgefragt. Unsere Erzeugnisse sind Teil der Wohn- und Arbeitswelt unserer Kundinnen und Kunden. Darauf sind wir sehr stolz und sehen es als ständigen Ansporn, immer besser zu werden!

Wenn Sie Freude am Wachsen, Verändern und Vorwärtsgehen haben, freuen wir uns auf Sie. Bringen Sie sich mit Ihren Ideen, Ihrem Elan und Ihrer Lösungskompetenz bei uns ein. Denn so können wir gemeinsam in Zukunft noch mehr bewegen!  https://jobs.swisskrono.de/

Our work is done in the true spirit of a partnership, while building long-term relationships in the industry. 

We fabricate all essential components for residential and commercial applications in our shop. All of our products are produced from the finest materials and each order is custom manufactured to our customers specifications.

We’re actively looking for new sales representatives from across the country. Follow our page to learn more about us and any open positions. 

Corona Millworks is a wholesale cabinet supplier and we do not sell to homeowners direct. If you are a homeowner and would like to purchase from us, then please have your cabinet contractor contact us on your behalf.

Name: BEYNEL PALOX
Description:

Plus de 3 millions de tonnes de pommes de terre sont stockés chaque année dans ces palox.

Depuis, BEYNEL PALOX a imaginé et conçu de nombreux supports bois, parfois uniques au monde, facilitant le stockage, le cerclage, l’entreposage et le transport de tout type de produits.

Ces savoirs-faire éprouvés positionnent BEYNEL PALOX comme le spécialiste de la fabrication de caisses bois et produits bois usinés sur-mesure.

Fort de l’appui du Groupe Sylvatek, BEYNEL PALOX est orientée vers l’innovation et s’impose comme un acteur de référence du marché de l’emballage bois, en concevant et développant des solutions à valeur ajoutée pour ses partenaires agricoles et industriels.

Name: Westwood Millworks
Description:
Westwood Millworks is a Georgia-based manufacturer pioneering thermally modified wood in the United States.

Since 2007, we’ve led the industry as the first domestic producer and remain the only group operating proprietary kiln technology designed and built in-house.

Using only heat and steam—no chemicals—we transform sustainably sourced North American hardwoods, with about 95% of our species coming from the U.S., into durable, dimensionally stable materials for decking, siding, and cladding.

Our ThermA Decking and ThermA Siding product lines are produced entirely at our Macon, Georgia facility, where we handle thermal modification, milling, and finishing under one roof. This ensures greater quality control, faster response times, and consistent performance for builders, architects, and distributors nationwide.

 Inspired by Nature. Perfected in Georgia.

Description:
At Woodbang we create premium parametric wooden furniture. For those who seek uniqueness and functionality in modern spaces.
The center of gravity in each piece is engineered for optimal balance, inspired by mid-engined supercars, ensuring both visual appeal and structural integrity.
We combine highest quality materials, modern technology and expert craftsmanship to ensure durability and luxury.

We offer full bespoke furniture tailored to the specific tastes and needs of the customer:
- Products can be made of any wood, e.g. walnut.
- Custom dimensions, different height, width, length.
- Standard finish - hard wax oil. Lacquering is optional. It includes standard colors as well as non-standard colors: white, graphite.
- Glass can be transparent or in a color, e.g. black.
- Nameplate, graphics and logos in wood or on the glass

We also design and make parametric acoustic panels for residential and business projects, as well as parametric receptions, walls and more.

For audiophiles we offer the ultimate hi-fi racks and headphone stands.
Our Hi-Fi racks feature patented anti-vibration feet designed to isolate and protect your audio components from unwanted resonance.
Whether you're showcasing a reference-grade turntable or your favorite set of headphones, our products are built to match the performance and aesthetics of your high-end audio gear.

Name: Vintage Wood & Forged Iron
Description:
Vintage Wood & Forged Iron started as a hobby back in 2011. Here and there, a barn would come down and the reclaimed materials would be stored on a family farm. After a while, there was quite a stockpile of barnwood and reclaimed materials being bought and sold on a regular basis. And so a business was born.

In 2017, a manufacturing facility was leased and a few mill employees were hired. A resaw and a kiln were added so the company could provide the proper processing of the wood when necessary. We started offering flooring, decorative beams, wall paneling, and molding. The business then began to grow as word got around.

In the summer of 2018, Vintage Wood and Forged Iron launched its first website and almost immediately attracted new customers from all over the Northeast. Shortly after, an office staff was added to work with the already experienced mill operators. We were then able to add the DIY homeowner to our clientele by offering items like wall and ceiling planking, floating shelves, mantels, and live edge slabs. And increased our efficiency with a molder/planer and wire brush machine.

Today, Vintage Wood and Forged Iron continues to grow. The hand-forged iron part of our business has taken off, and we’re proud to provide our customers with handmade, one-of-a-kind iron pieces like handrails, hinges, and latches, custom designed and made to suit your style.

The journey from hobby to business has been a good one, and we wouldn’t be here without you, our customers, so thank you! We look forward to a long future of continuing to serve you.

Name: Tschopp Holzindustrie AG
Description:
Die Tschopp Holzindustrie AG ist ein Familienunternehmen in dritter Generation und führend in der industriellen Holzverarbeitung. Aus einheimischem Rundholz fertigen wir hochwertige Schalungsplatten und sind damit Marktleader in der Schweizer Baubranche.

Unser neues Sägewerk gehört zu den modernsten der Schweiz. Die bei der Produktion entstehenden Resthölzer verarbeiten wir im eigenen Holzpelletwerk zu nachhaltigen Energieprodukten und im Holzkraftwerk zu Wärme und Ökostrom. So entsteht ein durchdachter Ressourcen-Kreislauf mit dem wertvollen Rohstoff Holz: Holzreste werden sinnvoll genutzt, Energieproduktion und Materialverarbeitung sind eng aufeinander abgestimmt – alles an einem Standort.

Name: PeraWood
Description:
Doğal ahşabın dayanıklılığını ve estetiğini modern teknolojiyle buluşturan Perawood Orman Ürünleri, Thermowood üretiminde uzmanlaşmış bir kuruluştur. Yüksek kaliteli Thermowood ürünleriyle müşterilerine dayanıklı, çevre dostu ve görsel açıdan çekici ahşap çözümleri sunmayı hedeflemektedir.

Perawood Orman Ürünleri olarak, Thermowood üretiminde en son teknoloji ve uzmanlığı bir araya getirerek, müşterilerimize benzersiz bir deneyim sunmayı amaçlıyoruz. Ürünlerimiz, sıcaklık ve buhar kullanılarak termal işleme tabi tutulmuş yüksek kaliteli orman ürünlerinden elde edilmektedir. Bu işlem sonucunda sağlam, çürümeye karşı dayanıklı, nem oranı düşük ve çekme dayanımı yüksek ahşap ürünleri ortaya çıkmaktadır.

Depuis, nous nous appuyons sur les ressources de notre région pour proposer des bûches et granulés efficaces et respectueux de l’environnement.

Whether you are remanufacturing raw feedstock into finished products, or building decking, fencing, or framing, Sutcliffe provides reliable supply and professional guidance to meet your needs.

Description:

Lunawood ThermoWood is an appealing choice for exterior and interior projects and brings Nordic luxury and a natural feel to the space. Lunawood is a sustainable, durable, and dimensionally stable wooden material for facades, interiors, and landscapes, all achieved without chemicals naturally through thermal modification.

WISA plywood is a sustainable and versatile material that can be used in a host of applications and end-uses from formwork-casting to structural construction and unique interior projects. WISA plywood offers options across panel sizes, surface grades, thicknesses, weights, and treatments to meet diverse project needs.

At NPP, we are dedicated to sourcing certified high-quality wood products, ensuring that each product contributes to a sustainable future. For sustainable paper and packaging solutions, visit NPP - Solutions from the Forest

Follow our page to discover more about the exceptional products we represent in Southern Africa, and the importance of sustainable forestry.

We honour every tree through our craft with a touch and feel that only a human can provide. Our approach is based in Community Collaboration where by learning from each other and working together we can achieve the goal of increasing the value of our Natural Resources and our Peoples. This will promote additional investment in thoughtful resource management, ensuring the health of our forests and natural spaces for Future Generations.

Name: Griggs Timber Company
Description:
At Griggs Timber we are proud of our reputation for excellence, efficiency, service  and value which we have maintained for over 140 years. Originally founded in Loughborough in 1875 by Joseph Griggs, we opened for business in Gloucester in 1917 and have operated out of the same site ever since.

Over the years, our strengths as timber merchants have seen us diversify from selling mainly softwood, to designing and manufacturing roof trusses, joists, and timber frame houses. We are still very much active as timber merchants – supplying a range of sheet materials, timber machined to specification in our own mill, as well as a range of timber products including Cedar, Larch Thermowood and hardwoods.

Our customers include:

- Building companies
- Roofing companies
- Joinery manufacturers
- Timber frame house builders
- Self builders
- General builders
- DIYers

As we’ve grown, we have invested. Our in-house team of skilled and experienced designers enable us to provide the right solutions for our clients’ projects.

We have a workplace that attracts and retains the best employees. The dedication, skill, and integrity of each of our employees, and their unique contributions mean that you can count on us for all your timber construction needs, from floor to roof, and the walls in between!

Edwood is a Polish company with a long-standing tradition in oak wood processing, dedicated to delivering top-quality products. Our mission is to create durable, beautiful, and eco-friendly solutions that meet the expectations of even the most demanding customers.

We specialize in manufacturing glued oak wood components, as well as a wide range of finished wooden products, including countertops, stair treads, acoustic panels, and furniture. Our products stand out for their exceptional durability and aesthetics, making them the perfect choice for the furniture, construction, and interior design industries.

Combining traditional craftsmanship with modern design, we ensure durability, innovation, and reliability in everything we produce. Sustainability is at the heart of our business—we responsibly source our materials and minimize our environmental impact. Our values are rooted in the symbolism of oak—strength, longevity, and elegance—along with trust-based relationships and a seamless blend of tradition and contemporary Polish craftsmanship.

With a team of 450 employees and exports to 28 countries, we bring years of expertise and dedication to every stage of production, ensuring that our products meet the highest standards.

The husband and wife team of Kobi and Ester Shamba bring a passion for woodworking and design to each project, delivering exceptional customer service and truly one-of-a-kind pieces. Whether it's a custom walk-in closet, kitchen cabinets, built-in cabinets, or a special woodworking project, Gratitwood creates pieces that reflect the personalities and lifestyles of their clients.

What sets Gratitwood apart is the gratitude they bring to every aspect of their business. From their interactions with clients to the care and attention they put into each piece, Gratitwood strives to show their gratitude in all that they do. It's this value that has earned them a reputation for providing high-quality customer service and delivering truly remarkable results.

If you're looking for a professional and experienced cabinet maker in the Atlanta area, Gratitwood is the right choice. With a focus on custom solutions and personalized attention, Gratitwood is dedicated to turning your vision into a reality. From initial design concepts to the final product, Gratitwood works closely with you to bring your dream space to life. Don't settle for ordinary, let Gratitwood bring your furniture to life with their passion for woodworking and design. Contact Gratitwood today to get started

Name: Mundus Viridis
Description:
At Mundus Viridis, also known as Green World, our passion, our mission, and our world revolve around the mastery of wood. We are a family-owned business anchored by quality, meticulous attention to detail, and an unwavering commitment to sustainability.

As a business partner, we offer more than just expertise - we provide a partnership grounded in our relentless pursuit of excellence, upholding quality over quantity. Being export-centric, 90% of our output finds its home worldwide, reflecting our global reach and impact.

Our proficiency spans various domains, including wood processing, production of solid laminated panels, sawn timber, pellets, briquettes, solid wood furniture, and bespoke furnishing solutions. Our craftsmanship in these areas is not just competent – we consider it world-class.

We are honoured to be recipients of the FSC certificate, EN plus A1 for pellets, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018, and the ZelEn certificate for sourcing 100% electricity from renewable energy sources. These accolades are a testament to our unwavering commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and occupational health and safety.

At the heart of our company is Milla & Milli, our distinguished furniture brand, which stands as a testament to our dedication to superior quality and design. We craft top-tier designer furniture using exquisite Croatian wood, showcasing our craftsmanship and expertise. Milla & Milli is a name synonymous with innovative design, superior craftsmanship, and exceptional quality, recognized by prestigious awards, including the esteemed Red Dot Award.

Name: ALAPAD MANUFACTURING COMPANY
Description:
Al Apad stands as one of the top wooden packaging companies in Saudi Arabia, known for its quality products, large-scale operations, and strong regional presence.

•	*Global Sourcing*: We import a wide range of wood and plywood products of different origins, sourced from over 20 countries, allowing us to maintain flexibility in material selection and ensure product consistency.

•	*Storage Capacity:* Our facility boasts a total storage area of 14,000 square meters, strategically designed to accommodate and manage a high volume of materials efficiently.

•	*High Volume Handling:* With the capability to receive over 500 containers every month, our import operations are among the most robust in the sector, allowing us to meet both standard and custom client demands on time.

•	*Proven Track Record of Client Satisfaction:* we have successfully served more than 400 satisfied customers within Saudi Arabia and other GCC countries. Our reputation for reliability and product quality positions us as a preferred partner in the region

•	*Production Power:* Our production facility is equipped with state-of-the-art machinery and has the capacity to produce over 5,000 wooden pallets per day, ensuring we meet large-scale demands with efficiency and precision

•	*Skilled Workforce:* Our team comprises over 150 dedicated employees who bring expertise, craftsmanship, and professionalism to every stage of the production process.

•	*Advanced Machinery and Technology*: We continually invest in modern machinery and automation systems to enhance productivity, maintain strict quality standards, and reduce operational downtime

•	*Efficient Logistics and Distribution:* With a fleet of over 30 trucks dispatched daily, we ensure timely deliveries across KSA and to neighboring GCC markets, helping our clients maintain smooth supply chains.

Description:
L’entreprise Bois Hamel a vu le jour en 2010, par la volonté de Nicolas Hamel de créer, au sein de la compagnie familiale Clermond Hamel Ltée, une division spécialisée dans la conception de structures en bois massif ainsi que dans la réalisation d’habitations pièces sur pièces.

Depuis le lancement de cette division, la vision de Nicolas n’a jamais cessé de croître, son objectif étant non seulement de pouvoir servir ses clients, entrepreneurs, architectes, designers et particuliers, mais également de pouvoir les aider à relever leurs défis du quotidien par rapport à l’usage du bois dans leurs projets. Il souhaitait leur apporter, technologiquement, la possibilité de faire fabriquer, en Beauce, ce qu’ils ne pouvaient trouver qu’à l’extérieur de la province, ou encore qu’ils ne pouvaient obtenir qu’avec des délais trop longs.

Bois Hamel agit comme partenaire de choix dans la réalisation de vos projets résidentiels, commerciaux et industriels qui mettent en valeur le matériel noble et intemporel qu’est le bois. Alliant qualité, précision, finition, technologie et service, Bois Hamel est la référence pour un projet des plus distinctifs!

Name: Albie Forestry Ltd
Description:
Albie Forestry Ltd, a Timber Harvesting, Haulage and Sawmill Company, was established in 2010 by husband and wife team Michael and Donna Newton. Our Harvesting and Haulage business works throughout the local area, South West Scotland and the North of England, but we have the flexibility to work further afield as and when required. 

The waney boards and battens produced in our sawmill form part of a niche market. There are only four other sawmills within the whole of the UK manufacturing these products and as such they are in high demand. Our target market for our fencing products predominantly covers a wide geographical area in England.

In 2023, Michael decided to explore a new approach for utilising wood chips produced by the sawmill. After significant investment and planning, we now produce our own RUF Firewood Briquettes, called HeatBriqs. Our firewood briquettes are Woodsure Certified as Ready to Burn. Additional information is available at https://heatbriqs.co.uk/

We are fully certified with the Forestry Stewardship Council (FSC). All timber purchased for and sold from the sawmill has this standard of certification. The FSC certification is considered the "gold standard" designation for wood harvested from forests that are responsibly managed, socially beneficial, environmentally conscious, and economically viable.

Our mission is to supply high quality timber products on a local and national scale. We will accomplish this by using selected FSC Certified Timber, maintaining our fleet, plant and machinery to the highest standards and by investing in our employees. Honesty and integrity are at the heart of our family run business and we are committed to providing the best service to our customers.

Da pomažemo vinarijama, destilerijama i ugostiteljima da unaprede svoje poslovanje i impresioniraju svoje klijente kroz kvalitet, inovaciju i personalizaciju.

We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and our commitment to delivering exceptional customer service, ensuring that every project is executed seamlessly from start to finish. 
At Palm Interior, we are passionate about creating unforgettable experiences that exceed our clients' expectations and leave a lasting impact

Name: Stammdesign
Description: Wir bei Stammdesign kreieren außergewöhnliche Baumstamm-Tische und Designerstücke aus Holz. Diese fertigen wir von Hand in Salzburg und nutzen dafür einzigartige Stämme aus den Wäldern und Gärten unserer Region. Damit versuchen wir, die Geschichten der Bäume weiterzuerzählen, denn „jeder Baum hat eine Seele, wir lassen sie weiterleben“.

Name: Losterwood Miami
Description:
We are a manufacturer and vendor of European designed cabinetry. We design, manufacture and sell kitchen, vanity, closet and door cabinets. 

We have three showrooms located around the Miami area to serve local clients across South Florida. Our projects for large multi-family developments have spanned in metropolitan hubs across Florida as well as Texas and neighboring states.

Visit us at www.losterindustries.com for more information on how we can serve your next project!

Name: MF Timber
Description:
MF Timber is a portuguese company dedicated to the production and sale of solid wood flooring and decking. 

Moved by a professional and committed team, with more than 20 years of experience in wood production, it has been able to keep up with market and sector trends, delivering quality, excellence and efficiency to customers, suppliers and the community.

What distinguishes us is the speed of response, versatility and close contact with the customer. At MF Timber, we only create customized solutions tailored to the customer, so the “tailor-made suit” is one of our great competitive advantages.

We deliver quality products!

Innovation and technology are also one of our priorities, which has allowed us to offer the best wood solutions, both for exterior and interior flooring and coverings, whether for homes, offices, commercial areas, public spaces, among others.

Our motto is "do it right the first time".

Name: McCord Boards
Description: Custom hardwood & resin items. #Functional Art.  Honored to help turn your vision into a reality. Each board is truly unique with its own story. % of profits go to “paying it forward” random acts of kindness. Make the World a better place.

Name: Jagram-Pro S.A.
Description:
Jagram-Pro S.A. to wiodący producent elementów gięto-klejonych od prawie 40 lat. Nasze produkty znajdują zastosowanie w projektach nie tylko w Europie, ale i na całym świecie. 

Jagram-Pro S.A. jest zawsze tam, gdzie wymagane są niekonwencjonalne rozwiązania, nietypowe kształty i nowatorskie projekty. Tak szeroką różnorodność osiągamy dzięki zastosowaniu pionierskiej, unikalnej technologii TCLWood618 (Thin Construction Lamella for wooden construction 6mm -18mm). 

To technologia, w jakiej produkujemy elementy gięto-klejone. Polega ona na zastosowaniu cienkich lameli o grubości od 6 do 18 mm, które stwarzają możliwość gięcia przy minimalnych promieniach (od R-15 cm).  

Technologia TCLwood618 to pewność, że element został wyprodukowany według najwyższych standardów, ze szczególnym naciskiem na jakość i bezpieczeństwo użytkowania, ale również nieskończone możliwości realizacji wyjątkowych projektów zlecanych przez naszych Klientów. 

Nasza oferta obejmuje:  
- Łuki konstrukcyjne i dźwigary łukowe  
- Unikalne kształty gięto-klejone (półkola, pierścienie, elipsy, fale i inne)  
- Łuki klejone do architektury ogrodowej  
- Lukarny dachowe (w tym wole oko)  
- Gotowe produkty z drewna klejonego  
- Pozostałe produkty (kantówka BSH, podesty i inne)  

Technologia TCLwood618 to gwarancja najwyższych standardów produkcji, z dbałością o jakość, bezpieczeństwo użytkowania i realizację nawet najbardziej śmiałych projektów naszych Klientów.

Zapraszamy do współpracy architektów, projektantów i firmy poszukujące innowacyjnych i wysokiej jakości rozwiązań z drewna klejonego.

Gotowe elementy z drewna gięto-klejonego kupisz w naszym sklepie na www.woodandarch.pl.

Name: Edentec
Description: Instalada em Sorocaba, cidade industrial localizada há 90 km de São Paulo, a EDENTEC iniciou suas atividades no ano de 1976, prestando serviços de montagens de carretéis de madeira novos e recuperação de carretéis usados para atender os principais fabricantes de cabos de energia, telecomunicação, aço e outros.

Name: Aidex
Description:
AiDEX is a prominent wood wholesaler based in Riga, Latvia. Specializing in the production and distribution of various wood products, including firewood, wood pellets, charcoals, and wood timber, AiDEX caters to a diverse range of customers in need of reliable and sustainable wood materials. 

AiDEX has earned a strong reputation for  commitment to quality and customer satisfaction. Their products are highly sought after not only in the Baltic region but also in Scandinavia, Central Europe, the UK, and the USA, as we successfully export to these markets. With a focus on environmental sustainability, AiDEX continues to serve as a reliable source for businesses and individuals seeking premium wood products.

Name: MADERA FIBER TECHNOLOGIES
Description:
Competence, experience and innovation in the production of composites with sustainable materials.

Madera Fiber Technologies is located in Porriño, Spain in close proximity to Vigo. The company is specialized in the production and supply of composite parts made from natural fibers such as wood, flax, kenaf, hemp …

Madera Fiber Technologies provides its innovative solutions to a wide range of customers from various industries and regions, especially the automotive and furniture industries.

Name: HK Timberbank
Description:
HK Timberbank is an ESG-focus ECOpreneur with the concept of “R3 – ReCYCLE, ReDESIGN, ReLINK”, pursuing green circular economy using HK local felled trees due to typhoons, aging or urban development. Weighed with design and artistry, HK Timberbank brings a second life to the wasted trees and relinks the people to the precious planet through the salvaged beauties. HK Timberbank has now salvaged over 700 tonnes of felled timber from its start of operation in Yuen Long since mid 2019.
香港木庫係一間以”R3 – 回收,設計,再連繫”為概念既ESG 環保創企, 致力回收本地因颱風, 老化或發展而需要移除或丟棄既香港本地樹木, 建立本地環保循環經濟。結合設計與藝術, 香港木庫將本來被棄置堆填區既樹木, 轉化成連結人與大自然既美麗木材。由2019年中至今, 香港木庫已回收接近700 噸棄置樹木。

Name: Kolo Design Oy
Description:
Kolo Designilta löydät suomalaiset puiset yrityslahjat, jotka pitävät brändisi näkyvillä lahjan saajan kotona tai toimistossa pitkään. Valmistamme innovatiivisia ja vastuullisia asiakaslahjoja, henkilöstölahjoja ja logotuotteita, jotka sopivat yrityksesi viestintään täydellisesti. Joululahjat henkilöstölle ovat erikoisosaamistamme.
Erikoisuutemme ovat puiset yrityslahjat, kauniit ja kestävät puupalkinnot sekä puiset pakkaukset, joita asiakkaasi voi uusiokäyttää. 
Puisilla pakkauksilla korostat yrityksesi vastuullisuutta. Teemme tuotteellesi räätälöityjä innovatiivisia ja ekologisia pakkausratkaisuja, jotka tutkitusti nostavat tuotteidesi arvoa. 
Pakkaussuunnittelumme yhdistää ainutlaatuisella tavalla innovatiivisuuden ja ekologisuuden. Kolo Design – täydelliset yrityslahjat, jotka jättävät pitkäkestoisen jäljen.

Name: Studio Tetti Stalletti
Description:
La famiglia Stalletti opera nel settore delle costruzioni in legno da cinque generazioni.
Siamo cresciuti giocando in segheria, con i nostri nonni che ci parlavano del legno, i nostri padri che ci portavano sui tetti, le nostre mamme che ci facevano fare i compiti in ufficio. Siamo maturati negli anni attraverso una continua innovazione tecnologica, prestando la massima attenzione all'evolversi delle esigenze dei clienti. 

L’ingegneria del legno è il nostro tratto inconfondibile.
Il nostro stile nasce dalla passione per la ricerca delle cose straordinarie, che danno identità e carattere a ogni singolo progetto. Portiamo avanti approfonditi studi ingegneristici di fattibilità per adattarci nel miglior modo possibile ai diversi scenari urbani e per realizzare tetti di edifici che riflettano i bisogni e i desideri di chi li vive.

Name: 2M Trade Ahşap Kapı Mobilya
Description:
Misyonumuz, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını ve daha önce benzer işlerde yaşadıkları olumsuz süreçleri anlayıp ortadan kaldırmak tarafımıza ilettikleri talepler
doğrultusunda kaliteli ve hızlı hizmet sağlamaktır.
• Vizyonumuz, geniş ve tecrübeli ekip yelpazemizi kullanarak müşterilerimizden tarafımıza devredilen iş kollarını kaliteden ödün vermeden beklenenden erken
teslim ederek işlerini hızlandırmak, yenilikçi çözümler ile müşteri memnuniyetini üst seviyelere taşıyarak uzun vadeli iş ilişkileri kurmaktır.
• Hizmetlerimiz
• 2M Dekor, müşterilerinin talepleri doğrultusunda özelleştirilmiş tasarımlar sunar
• İç Oda Kapıları; Lake Kapılar, Membran(Pvc)Kapılar, Laminat Kapılar, Melamin Kapılar ve Amerikan Panel Kapılar
• Mutfak Dolabı , Vestiyer ,Kollektör Dolabı , Giyinme Odası vs. inşaat mobilyaları da müşterilerimizin talepleri doğrultusunda lake ,high gloss ,akrilik ve
laminat olarak üretilebilmektedir.

Name: Remapri Indústria Madeireira LTDA
Description:
Since 2009, Remapri has been expanding its participation in the timber market, acting and ensuring quality throughout the production chain, from forest harvesting, transport, industrialization to the delivery of the finished product to the consumer.

Our purchasing base is mainly made up of customers from the textile industry, ensuring the supply of boilers through wood chips, customers from the engine industry for the manufacture of packaging, the furniture industry, pallets and other purposes for sawn wood, divided between the internal and external market, also ensuring the supply of logs for the timber industry in general.

We seek to remain in constant evolution, guaranteeing ethics, excellence in customer service and ensuring the organizational climate of employee satisfaction and development.
Location: São João do Itaperiú, Santa Catarina

Name: CureWood
Description:
CureWood is a manufacturer of innovative engineered wood products designed to replace traditional solid-sawn and site-built solutions.

We specialize in Seamless engineered posts and timbers, including structural fascia posts and hollow-core architectural columns that deliver the bold appearance of large solid timbers—without the instability, and inconsistency the market navigates today.

By combining advanced joint design, precision manufacturing, and carefully selected fibre, CureWood products offer superior dimensional stability, consistent quality, and a premium finished look straight from the factory.

Our solutions are trusted by builders, developers, and distributors across North America who are looking to reduce installation times, lower total project costs, and simplify inventories—without compromise.

Description: we do all kind of carpentery work

Name: Vilas Proyectos
Description: At Vilas Proyectos, we carry out high-quality woodworking projects. We are a team of professionals that offer a complete service of interior design and custom-made wood furniture manufacturing. We have been manufacturing and transforming wood for over 25 years. Our headquarters are located in Galicia, but we serve nationally and internationally.

Name: Atelier Alphega
Description:
Basé à Mulhouse, depuis 2015, Atelier Alphega est la continuité d’un savoir-faire et d’une passion transmis depuis 1930.

Nous créons, concevons et réalisons des pièces d’ébénisterie dans l’ameublement très haut de gamme tant pour des particuliers que pour de grands groupes dans les domaines de l’aérospatial et du nautisme. Nous travaillons également pour des designers, architectes et décorateurs à la recherche d’une expertise et d’un savoir-faire d’exception.

Depuis près d’un siècle, nous travaillons tant dans le respect de la tradition que dans l’innovation, en combinant de multiples mises en œuvre technologiques liées aux matériaux les plus différents.

Atelier Alphega est une entreprise de confiance, au service de ses clients et de ses collaborateurs, de la réflexion du produit au-delà de sa livraison.

Nous associons créativité et savoir-faire afin de concevoir des pièces uniques ou encore des séries limitées d’objets ou de meubles. Notre expérience nous permet de nous adapter à chaque demande, que ce soit pour une clientèle internationale, pour des décorateurs, des collectionneurs privés, des entreprises, etc.

Le bois, matière noble et élégante, permet de concevoir de nombreux projets. Notre bureau d’études nous permet de collaborer avec des architectes d’intérieur, des designers et des artistes, pour la conception et la création d’objets et de meubles en bois et d’aménagement très haut de gamme. Nous pouvons travailler plusieurs matières comme le bois massif, le bois précieux ou encore le cuir, les métaux et divers matériaux liés à l’ébénisterie contemporaine. Formes, motifs, couleurs… Nos ébénistes peuvent réaliser le projet de vos rêves.

De par son savoir-faire, Atelier Alphega est en mesure de procéder à l’aménagement intérieur d’avion et de jet privé pour de grands centres d’aménagement aéronautique.

Name: Timber World Limited
Description: At Timber World Limited, we are passionate about transforming spaces through exceptional craftsmanship and design. Based in Nairobi, Kenya, we specialize in bespoke joinery and interiors, offering a comprehensive range of services to meet your unique needs. From the warmth and character of hardwoods (e.g mahogany)to the sleek modernity of granite, we work with a variety of materials to create stunning and functional solutions.

Name: Marathoon Sp. z .o.o.

At Marathoon, we specialize in timber trading and the sale of sawmill products, encompassing a broad range of wood-based solutions. Our firm foothold in the timber market is a testament to our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

Our operations cover the entire spectrum of timber production and wood trading across Poland and Europe. This extensive reach allows us to cater to a diverse clientele, bringing the best of the timber world to your doorstep.
We pride ourselves on strengthening our market position through three core pillars: High-quality products, a rich assortment, and competitive pricing. These elements form the backbone of our business philosophy, ensuring we remain at the forefront of the industry.

Innovation and flexibility are at the heart of our sawmill operations. Our experienced and well-trained team is always ready to address any queries, providing personalized solutions that align with your specific requirements.

Name: BROPAL
Description:
Nous sommes une entreprise spécialisée dans la production de caisses de stockage de fruits et de légumes, palettes et des manches de bois pour l'outillage du jardin.

Dans le but d’éviter la manipulation physique du produit et de le protéger des dommages liés au transport, nous fabriquons des emballages en bois suivant les caractéristiques de votre produit et le mode de transport choisi.

Name: Furuhälls Snickeri AB
Description: With solid roots in the Scandinavian craftmanship, Furuhälls Snickeri AB refines pine logs from northern Sweden, all the way to sustainable high quality doors for cabin, cottage and garage.

Name: Marlène Création
Description:
L’ART DU BOIS PERSONNALISÉ 

Chez Marlène Création, chaque projet est une histoire, chaque objet une émotion.  Depuis 2015, je conçois et fabrique des créations uniques en bois personnalisées, alliant artisanat et design. Basée à Tulle, en Corrèze, mon atelier donne vie aux idées des professionnels et des particuliers, en apportant une touche d’authenticité et de sur-mesure à chaque réalisation. 

Que ce soit pour un logo, un trophée , une signalétique , une décoration  ou un objet du quotidien , je mets mon savoir-faire d’ébéniste et de graphiste au service de vos envies. Mon engagement ? Créer des pièces originales et de qualité, en privilégiant des matériaux nobles et un travail minutieux. 

Labellisée Origine Corrèze, je collabore avec des entreprises, artisans, collectivités et particuliers pour des projets qui font sens et marquent les esprits. 

 Envie d’un projet unique ? Parlons-en ! 

 contact.marlenecreation@gmail.com
 Tulle, Corrèze

Name: The Angel Decor India
Description: Angel Decors, feels proud to be the innovator of the highest standard products, using cutting-edge technologies to lead the industry forward. Angel Décors fuses modern trends with traditional know-how to create works of art.

Name: Labee Group Moerdijk
Description:
We produce and trade a wide range of eco-friendly products made from wood, wood shavings, and sawdust throughout Europe. The company is ideally located for transport by ship, rail, and truck. The operating companies of Labee Group Moerdijk supply products to retail chains—including supermarkets and DIY stores—as well as to (wholesale) trading companies.

Labee Group also operates a strategically located tank storage facility in Moerdijk, offering flexible solutions for the storage and transshipment of sustainable liquids. With direct access to road, rail, and water, we support efficient, international supply chains for our partners across Europe.

Name: Keitele Forest Oy
Description: Keitele Forest Oy is  a leading Finnish, privately owned sawmill & wood products manufacturing company headquartered in Keitele, Finland.
