نلتزم بالدقة في التنفيذ، وسرعة التسليم، مع الحفاظ على أعلى معايير الجودة.

Al Pharos Wood Factory is a specialized woodworking factory located in Asfan, Jeddah. We offer custom wood solutions with a focus on quality, precision, and timely delivery.

Our services include interior and exterior wooden works, doors, cabinets, cladding, and custom wood designs tailored for residential, commercial, and contracting projects.

We work closely with contractors and developers across the Kingdom, providing reliable craftsmanship and competitive pricing.

Based in Asfan, Jeddah - Saudi Arabia

Name: Noordenhout BV
Description: We are specialist in different types of wood. With our wide network of suppliers inside and outside Europe we strive tot a match of the question of our customers and our proposal. We are able tot do woodwork of our collaboration with de Woodcompany Wicherson Steenwijk. That makes that we can offer a complete product.

Name: ProFloors and Cabinets
Description: Construction, design consultation and installation services of flooring, cabinets and countertops in Naples, FL.

Name: SilvaSpan
Description: Canadian mass timber leader SilvaSpan uses a proprietary manufacturing process that produces precision-engineered nail laminated timber (NLT) panels with finger-jointed lumber, using up to 100% waste-diverted wood materials.

Name: Lookup
Description:
From a small viewpoint, over a tree platform to a true treehouse, we will build your own space in your own tree.

Adventurous or very 'adultlike' looking, only for the kids or also the parents? For an overview on your domain or for a drink with friends? For your morning coffee among the leaves or Robin Hood-like afternoons with the kids?

Tell us what you want and we will build it!

Name: Inflamed
Description:
We founded INFLAMED with one goal in mind: providing a high-quality, innovative, and reliable products and services for customers. Our passion for excellence has driven us from the beginning, and continues to drive us into the future.
Company was founded by friends who where passioned to create and give something back to the society and the world we are living. For us as an individuals trust and unselfish act is key characteristic, moreover we are bring these to the company. By the compound synergy INFLAMED knows that we can make a world a better place to live, therefore we are committed for every order received,  plant a tree and help to keep the air fresher, for generations to come.

Name: Älvdalsfönster AB
Description:
På Älvdalsfönster har vi specialiserat oss på tillverkning av
träfönster och fönsterdörrar i allmoge efter kundens krav och önskemål, sedan 1924. 

Alla våra fönster är hantverksmässigt tillverkade i Älvdalen, Dalarna, och givetvis använder vi svenskt virke av högsta kvalitet.  Edged oak lumber

Name: IdeasWood
Description:
Ideas for People is a leading B2B supplier and manufacturer of high-quality wooden buildings, log cabins, timber houses, and garden structures since 2010. We proudly connect a group of Lithuania-based woodworking and timber manufacturing companies with over 20 years of experience in precision wood production.

Our product range includes:

wholesale log cabins

bespoke wooden sheds

modular garden rooms

residential timber houses

prefabricated saunas

glamping pods

hot tubs

sustainable timber products

We specialize in the design, engineering, manufacturing, and global supply of trending and durable wooden structures for the B2B market. As a trusted timber building supplier, we work with retailers, distributors, developers, and hospitality businesses to deliver reliable, scalable, and high-quality solutions.

 Why partner with us?
Flexible manufacturing capabilities
Competitive B2B pricing
Consistent quality and sustainability
Custom design options for bespoke projects
Robust international logistics and export experience
Ideas for People is your one-stop partner for high-quality timber structures and wholesale wooden products. Whether you are looking for a reliable log cabin manufacturer, a bespoke sauna supplier, or a prefabricated glamping pod partner, we are here to support your business growth with trusted expertise and a proven track record.

Let’s build something great together.
 Contact us today to discuss your wholesale or custom timber structure needs.

Name: Scottywood Corporation
Description:
Scottywood is an innovative Canadian company that has been leading the way in thermal modification since 2013. Using a
Jartek specialty kiln and leveraging our unique expertise and ThermoWood technology, Scottywood is fostering innovation in thermal treatment and manufacturing in British Columbia. 

Our beautiful, high-quality Made in Canada Scottywood ThermoWood products are developed using clear vertical grain Western Hemlock from coastal BC, American White Ash, and Red Oak. All are sourced from sustainable North American forests and offered in standard and custom sizes and profiles that can be tailor-made for use in a wide range of design projects.


While others are importing ThermoWood from Europe, Scottywood is always focused on keeping a low carbon footprint, preserving our environment and making better use of our local raw materials. By using domestic wood species, in place of tropical hardwoods, Scottywood and our customers are supporting sustainable development. Renewable, and climate friendly, wood is a sustainable, green material that is truly our most natural resource.

Name: Formaca
Description: Entreprise d’économie sociale, Formaca se spécialise dans la transformation du bois et la sous-traitance industrielle depuis plus de 25 ans. Accréditée à titre d’entreprise adaptée, elle a pour mission de créer des emplois valorisants et un environnement de travail positif pour les personnes ayant des limitations physiques, mentales ou intellectuelles. Formaca met un point d’honneur à valoriser les forces et les capacités de chacun pour poursuivre sa croissance dans le respect de ses valeurs inclusives et collaboratives.

Name: WoodQart

WoodQart also manufacture Shuttering Ply and Veneers.

Name: Venwoods Industries Pvt Ltd
Description:
“We link you to Nature” 

Our Belief: Nature has an abundance to offer. It’s up to us how we convert its’ precious offerings into a justifiable product.

Our story found a beginning in 1988, when our Directors Rashmin Vaja & Nayan Vaja started the trading firm named "Nutan Plywood".

Name: Holzwerke Michael Menz GmbH & Co. KG

Wir bei TRAPA haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, die hervorragenden Eigenschaften des besten natürlichen Baustoffes der Welt, für den Menschen in seinem Wohnraum sinnlich erlebbar zu machen.

Name: Rouwhout
Description:
Herinnerings-items
Naar aanleiding van jouw rouwverhaal wordt een herinnerings-item van hout gemaakt waarin jij je dierbare herkent. Dit geeft troost en de gelegenheid om stil te staan bij je verdriet. Indien gewenst gebruiken we voorwerpen die van jouw dierbare zijn en al van waarde zijn voor je.

Rouwarbeid
Zelf aan de slag; dat kan tijdens Rouwarbeid. 
In 2 dagdelen maak je zelf, onder mijn begeleiding een herinnerings-item. Het eerste dagdeel vertel jij je verhaal van gemis en verdriet, dit zetten we om in een ontwerp dat je het tweede dagdeel zelf op hout gaat branden. 
Zelf aan de arbeid gaan is helpend in jouw rouwproces.

Uitvaartbenodigdheden. 
Op maat gemaakte standaards voor de rouwkaart en foto eventueel met jouw logo of quote erop gebrand.
Tranenvaasjes en kaarsenstandaards al dan niet gepersonaliseerd zijn te gebruiken tijdens de plechtigheid en kunnen aan de familie meegegeven worden als attentie. 
Jouw huisstijl kan worden doorgevoerd in alles.
Stoer en robuust of strak, het kan beide. 
Zo laat jij ook tijdens condoleances en uitvaarten zien dat jij oog hebt voor stijl en detail.


Neem vrijblijvend contact op voor een kennismakingsgesprek.
Tel.nr.: 06-39584833
Email: astrid@rouwhout.nl

At Janolex we understand the importance of delivering high-quality wooden houses that meet the unique needs and preferences of our clients. All our houses are meticulously crafted using kiln-dried pine and spruce, ensuring durability and strength.

Our production process involves several stages of wood processing and preparation, leading to a final inspection and packing. By completing all the necessary finishing touches in our factory, our houses require no extra processing, allowing for a seamless, hassle-free installation.

Our team is constantly developing new models and constructional ideas for houses of all sizes and purposes. We strive to meet newest trends in garden and houses design, while embracing sustainability, minimalism, and a healthy lifestyle.

That is why we offer a big range of standard models to meet customers’ needs at the best possible price.

- Polyester MDF: Smooth finish, ideal for intricate designs and detailing.

Description:
Our roots run deep. Born from our own experience as home builders, Abodian is the cabinet maker we always wanted to work with. Over our decades-long career in the industry, we struggled to find cabinet makers who offered quality materials, excellent customer service, and reasonable pricing, so we decided to do it ourselves.

As the new owners of Abodian, we’re determined to make the design and building process more efficient for architects, designers and builders because we’ve been through it ourselves. From concept to construction, we’re dedicated to providing creative solutions, durable storage, and making houses feel like home—all within your budget.

Name: Colonial Hardwood PVT LTD
Description:
We Colonial Lumbers LLP is a leading name in premium rubberwood solutions, delivering top-quality finger joint boards, solid wood panels, and customized wood products to dealers, distributors, manufacturers, and contractors across India.

From responsibly sourced raw materials to precision-engineered finished products, our process is built on three pillars:
 Quality – Stringent checks at every stage ensure strength, durability, and a flawless finish.
 Craftsmanship – Skilled teams combining expertise with cutting-edge technology.
 Sustainability – Rubberwood sourced from eco-friendly plantations, maximizing value while reducing waste.

Our state-of-the-art facility in Kannur, Kerala is equipped with advanced machinery and guided by a commitment to consistency, reliability, and timely delivery. Whether you’re building premium furniture, high-end interiors, or industrial projects, Colonial Lumbers provides the wood you can trust.

Our Promise: Flawless joints. Superior finish. Sustainable solutions.

 Based in Kannur, Kerala | Serving clients nationwide

Name: Falegnameria Di Lorenzo
Description:
È antica e solida la storia che c'è dietro la Falegnameria Di Lorenzo. Bisogna andare a ritroso di quasi quarant'anni, nel lontano 1977, quando il capostipite Michele, poco più che ventenne acquisì dai proprietari originari quella piccola falegnameria che aveva frequentato da ragazzino come apprendista. La sede era in via Carlo Papa a Modica. Acquisita la manualità e la tecnica, con un pizzico di azzardo e con un piglio decisamente imprenditoriale, Michele Di Lorenzo scommette su se stesso e avvia l'attività che poi ha avuto, giungendo ai nostri giorni, una conduzione familiare, con il coinvolgimento di Raffaele e Fabrizio, due dei suoi tre figli.

Oggi che la Falegnameria è un'azienda a tutti gli effetti, Michele continua a mantenere l'occhio vigile sull'attività che si svolge all'interno ed è il super visore di tutto, mantenendo sempre il rapporto con il legno, infatti raramente il fondatore si sottrae dal mettersi ai macchinari e respirare il profumo che il legno riesce a rilasciare nel corso delle operazioni di levigazione.

Raffaele e Fabrizio curano i rapporti con i clienti, loro stessi prendono le misure per far sviluppare i disegni, sino alla conferma dell'ordine e poi si sviluppa la commessa per passarla in falegnameria. A seguire c'è lo step della finitura, ossia la verniciatura di ciascun prodotto, che è l'ambito di specializzazione di Fabrizio, sino alla consegna del prodotto.

Name: Tonnellerie Maury & Fils
Description:
Le temps, Les Hommes, le feu, l’exigence.
Depuis 1893, la tonnellerie Maury a vu se succéder quatre générations, d’hommes et de femmes animés d’une même passion.
L’esprit d’équipe incarné par la réussite sportive familiale, le travail et la persévérance nous ont permis d’évoluer à travers les époques.
L’intégration réussie dans les ateliers de la tonnellerie Demptos à Saint-Caprais-de-Bordeaux nous fait bénéficier aujourd’hui de leur expertise technique dans la recherche et la qualité, le tout dans un grand confort de travail.
Ces changements nous permettent de vous offrir un meilleur accompagnement dans vos attentes, tout en continuant notre métier avec passion et exigence.

Name: EBONY Wood Crafts
Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn business page, where we celebrate the beauty and quality of Armenian craftsmanship. Our company specializes in creating stunning natural wood furniture and architectural designs that embody the loft-style aesthetic that has become synonymous with Armenian design.

Our team of skilled artisans creates each piece by hand, using only the highest-quality materials and paying meticulous attention to detail. We believe that our products should not only be beautiful, but also functional, durable, and timeless.

At our company, we take pride in the fact that our products are made with care and expertise. From intricately carved tables to rustic wooden chairs, each piece is crafted to embody the unique character of Armenian design. We also offer customization options, allowing our clients to create truly bespoke pieces that perfectly suit their needs and tastes.

Whether you are an interior designer looking for stunning pieces to complete a project, a homeowner seeking to add warmth and character to your space, or simply someone who appreciates finely crafted woodwork, our products are sure to impress. We are passionate about what we do, and we are committed to providing our clients with the highest level of quality and service.

Thank you for visiting our LinkedIn business page. We invite you to connect with us and learn more about how we can help bring the beauty and quality of Armenian craftsmanship into your home or business.

Name: ALPKA WORKS
Description:
ALPKA WORKS olarak ‘Ahşap ve daha fazlası…’ sloganıyla 2017 yılından bu yana promosyon, züccaciye, ev-dekorasyon, eğitim-kırtasiye ve cafe-restaurant-otel sektörlerinde ahşap ve ahşaba entegre olabilecek pleksiglas, metal, cam, porselen, deri gibi malzemeleri de kullanarak birçok firmanın çözüm ortaklığını yaptık ve yapmaya devam ediyoruz. 
Ayrıca makina parkurumuzda CNC kesim, lazer kesim ve UV baskı hizmetlerimiz de mevcuttur.
Bir çocukluk hayaliyle başlayan bu yolculukta ALPKA WORKS olarak müşterilerimize; ahşabın doğru yerde kullanıldığında harika bir malzeme olduğunu anlatarak, yenilikçi, ahlaklı ve saygılı hizmet vermenin yanı sıra çevreci ve kaliteli ürün temin etmeyi de hedeflemekteyiz.

Name: CF - Teak and Yacht Panels

Founded in 2008, today CF serves the #yachting industry through the production of panels specifically for #yacht construction and the import of top quality #teak.

At Hiram Habitat, we are a family business committed to providing sustainable, high-quality wood products for interior design. All of our wood is sourced from German and French forests and crafted using traditional techniques to bring out the natural beauty of the material. 

Our exclusive range includes solid and engineered floorboards, wall panels, terrace decking, and siding, all designed to bring the warmth and character of wood into your daily living spaces.

Name: Groupe HUBERLANT
Description:
Huberlant descend d’une lignée familiale s’inscrivant dans l’histoire champenoise du bois et de la forêt.

Situé à Cormicy dans la Marne depuis le commencement sur une terre enracinée d’histoire, c’est dans les années 1990 que l’entreprise prend un virage qui l’inscrira dans une trajectoire de développement continu tourné vers l’avenir, l’innovation, et le développement de la relation avec ses partenaires fournisseurs et clients.

Aujourd’hui, Huberlant développe une multitude de solutions adaptées aux attentes économiques, sociétales, et environnementale de la forêt au consommateur.

Forte de ses valeurs et en accord avec ce que les forêts peuvent localement fournir, Huberlant se positionne sur des marchés variés, tant au niveau local qu’à l’international.

Name: Springfield Hardwood
Description:
Springfield Hardwood is the largest hardwood sawmill in Mercer County, Pennsylvania. We are currently managing woodlands in PA, OH, and WV. With over 100+ years combined timbering experience Springfield Hardwood has the knowledge and skill to professionally care for your woodland, whether you're a private land owner, investment group or other organization. We specialize in a wide variety of hardwood lumber markets, both domestic and international, enabling us to dominate today's timber prices. Land owners will get the most money for their timber as Springfield Hardwood maximizes future yields for every land owner, leaving profitable hardwood resources for generations to come.  

By understanding the importance of a well managed forest, Springfield Hardwood can manage your property with little to no earth disturbance while increasing habitat for deer and other wildlife.

Springfield Hardwood Products is continuing to develop strong relationships with land owners every day to ensure a continual supply of hardwood products for the future. At Springfield Hardwood Products we manage every tract of woodland to your specifications, whether by specie thinning or diameter requirement. We are committed to achieving your needs and short- or long- term financial goals. Upon completion of every timber harvest, we perform a routine clean up according to requests of land owners and state guidelines also known as Best Management Practices.

OUR MISSION STATEMENT: At Springfield Hardwood Products, we strive for 100% Customer satisfaction with each customer we serve. - GUARANTEED!

Environmental Care

Springfield Hardwood Products and its employees are committed to being professional and environmentally friendly in all company practices.

Springfield Hardwood Products promotes and practices the principles of sustainable forest management, forest regeneration, and the long term maintenance of forests. We care about soil productivity, resource and biological diversity protection.

Name: BOIS BREVER S.A.
Description:
La scierie BOIS BREVER S.A. est votre interlocuteur en matière de bois de construction et de produits rabotés au nord du Luxembourg.

Depuis sa création en 1947, l’entreprise familiale s’est développée de manière constante et est aujourd’hui dirigée par la troisième génération.

Nous mettons la qualité de nos produits et la flexibilité de nos services au premier plan de notre activité. Cela commence dès la sélection rigoureuse des matières premières : la durabilité et le caractère régional sont des facteurs très importants pour nous. Nos employés réalisent vos commandes avec une expertise technique et en respectant des normes de qualité élevées.

Notre expérience et notre esprit d’innovation nous aident à répondre aux besoins de nos clients et à partager avec eux notre passion pour le bois.

Name: Copperbelt Forestry Company
Description:
Copperbelt Forestry Company (CFC) is a wholly Zambian owned company incorporated in 2000 as Private Limited Company. It has its production units at Kalibu Sawmills along Kitwe-Ndola dual carriage way and Kafubu treatment plant and Sawmills along Kalengwa Road, about 25KM from Kalulushi town. CFC also has sales outlets in Lusaka, Solwezi, Kitwe, Ndola and Kalulushi. 
The company has plantations assets and the necessary processing infrastructure to produce and supply timber and wood products for mining, construction and domestic uses, as well as a fleet of trucks to facilitate timely delivery of goods. Over the years, CFC has continued to formulate and institute quality control measures in compliance with regional and international standards. In 2016, the company successfully obtained accreditation from Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) for its treated wooden poles.
 


THE MISSION STATEMENT:

"To conservatively harvest and maximize the utilization of timber on replacement and sustained yield basis with a view to optimizing its potential value and promoting environmental conservation through prudent and inclusive management, innovations, and above all competitiveness for the benefit of the present and future generations."

Name: Legno Bastone Wide Plank Flooring
Description:
Legno Bastone was founded in the late 1800’s by the same family that runs the company to this very day. Over the years, we have optimized and expanded our production process, but we have never abandoned the age-old European traditions of craftsmanship when it comes to our floors. Every single floor is hand-crafted and custom designed; regardless of whether it is a well-appointed home, a castle or a modern minimalist urban apartment, irrespective of whether the address is in Europe or coast to coast in the USA.

We proudly admit that quality means everything to us. There are no greater projects than when we are paralleled by those who feel the same way. This is a reason why Legno Bastone works closely with International designers, architects and builders. Like us, they know that the unusually wide and long planks in a Legno Bastone Floor provide for a unique style in the spaces that they design. That is why they are referred to as “Custom Designed Furniture for Your Floor.” 

Legno Bastone gets raw wood from the best forests in Europe, which have been nurtured for generations for the benefit of society and the environment. The trees we select are generally over 150 years old and have been meticulously cared for throughout their existence. We make precise uncompromising demands regarding grains, knots and structure. We accept only the best logs which we use with the greatest respect possible. Any other approach would be an injustice-both to the trees and to all the forest workers who have taken care of them for centuries.

Name: Mart Madeiras
Description:
Fundada em 1978, em Diadema no ABC paulista, iniciou suas atividades num pequeno espaço. Transformaria-se numa empresa reconhecida pelo mercado, segundo seu fundador, pelo comprometimento com o cliente e respeito ao meio ambiente.

Atualmente a Mart Madeiras é uma das maiores empresas no seu segmento na comercialização de madeira legal e certificada, e produção de embalagens de madeira para o mercado Industrial e da Construção Civil.

Possui instalações modernas e equipadas em 07 mil metros quadrados, com aproximadamente 100 colaboradores.

A empresa possui importantes certificados, como: ISO 9001:2008 creditado pela DAS, UKAS Quality Management - membro do IAF (Member of Multilateral Recognition Arrangement), Certificação Florestal de Cadeia de Custódia FSC (Forest Stewardship Council – Conselho Mundial de Manejo Florestal), Certificado CadMadeira e Certificado de Reposição Florestal (Secretaria do Meio Ambiente do Estado de SP), e Abrinq, empresa amiga da criança pelo compromisso  com a defesa dos direitos das crianças e adolescentes do Brasil. Em sua trajetória tem mostrado um novo conceito de gerir com agilidade, eficiência e competência as necessidades de cada cliente, criando sólidas relações de parcerias.

At Interkayu Nusantara, we have been providing quality woodworking supplies for over 20 years. Our passion for woodworking has driven us to develop an extensive range of products to meet the needs of both hobbyists and professionals alike.

Name: EGGER Česká Republika
Description:
EGGER je rodinná společnost, založená v roce 1961, zaměstnávající více než 11 000 lidí.
V 22 závodech po celém světě vyrábíme rozsáhlý sortiment materiálů na bázi dřeva (dřevotřískové desky, desky OSB a MDF).

Společnost vytvořila v obchodním roce 2023/2024 obrat 4,13 miliardy EUR a má zákazníky po celém světě v nábytkářském průmyslu, maloobchodních prodejnách podlahových krytin, stejně jako na trzích DIY.

Produkty EGGER se nacházejí v nesčetných oblastech soukromého a veřejného života, včetně kuchyní, koupelen, ložnic, kanceláří, hotelů a obchodů.
EGGER je dodavatelem pro nábytkářský průmysl, interiérový design, dřevostavby a podlahy na bázi dřeva (laminátové, korkové a designové podlahy).
Kromě našich stavebních výrobků vyrobených ze skutečného dřeva jsou všechny naše vyobrazené a zmíněné dekory reprodukcí a jako takové nabízejí trvanlivé, odolné a vysoce kvalitní, trendové řešení pro domácnosti, veřejné a komerční prostory.
Tiráž: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Prohlášení o ochraně osobních údajů: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: MENUISERIE SEDEC
Description:
Spécialisé dans la fabrication sans pose de menuiseries extérieures, portes d’entrée en bois et bois-alu sur mesure, SEDEC fournit principalement les professionnels. SEDEC s'adapte à la demande du client et est capable de réaliser l’article de son choix tout en respectant les performances thermiques, phoniques et de sécurité. Son équipe motivée, composée de 45 salariés dont 31 dédiés à la fabrication, est en mesure de répondre rapidement à toutes les demandes du marché, qu'elles soient régionales ou nationales.
  
SEDEC a su conserver l’aspect de la fenêtre traditionnelle ceci même avec l’utilisation de machines à commandes numériques et logiciels de fabrication. Son savoir faire technique permet aussi la fabrication de menuiseries à l’ancienne sur simple demande.

Name: Mallo Bois SAS
Description:
Nous transformons des bois durs  issus de forêts certifiées en produits façonnés pour les processus industriels. Plots, planches, avivés, pré-débits, panneaux. Nous servons nos clients en Europe, Moyen-Orient et Asie.

We transform hardwood from certified forests into shaped products for industrial processes. Planks, boards, edgings, pre-cuts, panels. We serve customers in Europe, the Middle East and Asia.

Name: LEUCO GB LTD
Description:
Innovative, trend-setting and reliable - right from the beginning!
In 1954 the businessman Willi Ledermann and the engineer Josef Störzer founded the company Ledermann & Co. The LEUCO brand was born.

Today, 70 years later, LEUCO is one of the world´s largest suppliers of carbide and diamond-tipped machine tools for wood and plastic processing.

Wealth of ideas and technical know-how have been the heart of LEUCO since the beginning. The product range includes circular saw blades, hoggers, bore-type and shank-type cutters, drills, clamping systems and inserts.
Sharpening service, application consulting and service packages bundled under the term „Tool management“ complete the spectrum.

LEUCO sells via direct sales. Our customers are sawmills, building-, furniture- and paneling-industry as well as interior finishing.

Internationally, around 1,200 employees work for LEUCO.

Name: Pramukh Pallets

Pramukh Pallets is the rising industry of Wooden Pallets and Crates. We produce the most reliable and cost efficient wood packaging solutions for your business, you won’t need to look elsewhere.

Our goal is to develop long term partnerships. As your Pallets supplier, we guarantee Quality, Responsiveness, Expert Solutions, 90% on Time delivery, competitive Pricing and regular Communication throughout our partnership.

We are experts at designing and Manufacturing the right Pallet and Crate solutions for your Business. We work to understand your requirements and then use PDS software to design every detail. We save clients money everyday by examining their current pallet & crate specs and offering more cost effective solutions.

We can supply your business with New wood Pallets as well as used wooden pallets in Standard and Custom designs. New wooden pallets can be ISPM-15std Compliances for international shipping.

We design custom wooden crates that protect your goods and your budget. Wooden crates are heat treated so you can ship all over the world with no worries. 

Our team carefully inspects all the Products  before they leave our warehouse to ensure they meet our standards. You can rest easy knowing you will get exactly what you need, when you need it.

#SolidRootsInfiniteHorizons #DoorManufacturing #Unidoors #SanLeonardo

Name: Tanganyika Plywood LTD
Description:
Making Sustainable Plywood is our Missions

Tanganyika Plywood believes strongly in investing in her people. We operate a company that believes in family values where individuals matter, yet runs on professionalism to meet the growing demands of a global world.

Name: Groupe Rose

Avec la société Rose Charpente, N° 1 français du bâtiment d’élevage porcin puis avec la création de Protac en 1995, société spécialisée dans la seconde transformation du bois (usinage, traitement, finition). Toujours dans cet objectif de développement, le groupe renforce ses capacités en production et se crée ainsi une ouverture à l’international en faisant l’acquisition de la société Puidukoda en 2013, une raboterie Estonienne.

Passionné par le travail du bois depuis toujours et la construction en particulier, le Groupe ROSE est bâti sur des valeurs fortes reposant sur 3 piliers : QUALITÉ – INNOVATION – SATISFACTION CLIENT.

Name: Festival des Métiers du bois
Description:
Suite au succès du 1er festival des métiers du bois qui a eu lieu du 22 au 24 septembre 2022 à Morcenx-la-Nouvelle, l’association Les Landes, Terre de Talents, a décidé de renouveler l’expérience en 2024.
Cette seconde édition se déroulera du 19 au 21 septembre 2024 à Morcenx-la-Nouvelle et aura pour thème : la filière bois, au cœur de l’économie circulaire et du développement durable ; et pour slogan : le bois, cœur de vie.

Les objectifs de cet évènement sont les suivants :
-          Faire découvrir la diversité des opportunités de métiers et de carrières de la filière à différents publics, dont celui des jeunes collégiens et lycéens
-          Aider les acteurs de la filière forêt bois à attirer des personnes pour assurer la pérennité de leur activité et de la filière
-          Faire en sorte d’unir les professionnels de la filière et organiser un futur en commun
-          Croire en la jeunesse qui joue un rôle capital dans la réponse aux enjeux à venir de la filière en établissant des liens avec les écoles et l’Education Nationale
-          Créer un évènement festif, artistique et culturel

La 1ère édition du Festival comptait 74 exposants et 136 partenaires. Environ 5 000 visiteurs ont été comptabilisés sur cette première édition dont environ 2 800 collégiens et lycéens.

Name: Royal Joinery Abu Dhabi

Name: Accoya North America
Description:
Accoya wood is produced from sustainably sourced, fast growing wood and manufactured using Accsys’ proprietary patented modification process from surface to core.
Accoya wood has been thoroughly tested for dimensional stability, durability, paint retention and in-ground conditions to ensure optimal performance. Indeed, it is so reliable that for many years it has been – and continues to be – used by scientists as the benchmark against which other treatments and modifications are measured.

Name: Wood4Bauhaus
Description:
The European Commission’s New European Bauhaus is a creative, interdisciplinary movement to transform the built environment into a circular, inclusive model that can counteract the escalating climate crisis. The European wood-based sector has launched the Wood Sector Alliance for the New European Bauhaus (Wood4Bauhaus) as an open platform to reach out to all the involved stakeholders. 

Wood, an extremely versatile natural material being part of a multitude of products, is a circular material par excellence. Long-life products using wood can store carbon for decades or even centuries in buildings and living spaces, and can be reused, remanufactured and recycled to further prolong the storage time. 

The Alliance raises awareness for and puts a spotlight on the versatility of innovative wood products and building systems to facilitate dedicated co-creation partnerships with the construction sector, architects and the wider NEB community.

The W4B Alliance is supported through the Horizon 2020 projects WoodCircus, Basajaun and InnoRenew CoE funded by the European Commission.

I NOSTRI NUMERI
Attualmente EGGER impiega oltre 11.000 persone ed è presente in 11 Paesi con 21 stabilimenti. Nell'anno finanziario 2021/2022, EGGER ha generato un fatturato di 4,23 miliardi di euro: con 18 uffici di vendita e attraverso una rete internazionale di partner commerciali in 90 paesi, vendiamo i nostri prodotti in tutto il mondo.

I NOSTRI PRODOTTI
I prodotti EGGER sono di tendenza, di alta qualità e durevoli nel tempo, perfetti per la sfera privata e pubblica:
- cucine
- bagni
- camere da letto
- uffici 
- hotel e negozi
- arredo da interno
- costruzioni in legno

LA NOSTRA PRESENZA IN ITALIA    
EGGER pensa globalmente e agisce localmente, perché ritiene che la vicinanza ai clienti e alle materie prime sia di cruciale importanza. In Italia siamo presenti da molti anni con uffici dedicati e una rete vendita che soddisfano le esigenze e le richieste della clientela nazionale.
                                                         
LA NOSTRA ATTENZIONE PER L’AMBIENTE
L'azienda è guidata dalla passione per il legno, dagli elevati standard di qualità e dal desiderio di innovare, senza mai dimenticare l'ambiente. Per questo in EGGER, anche lo scarto del legno è importante, perché alla fine del ciclo di vita, non viene eliminato bensì utilizzato per creare altri pannelli o alimentare le centrali a biomassa.

Name: Panolite Inc. - Light weight panels & custom components
Description: PANOLITE Inc is a manufacturer of lightweight panels and custom-made components consisting of two surface panels and a honeycomb core. Used in a wide variety of architectural, commercial, institutional and residential applications, PANOLITE components offer surprising lightness and stability. PANOLITE offers design flexibility for your projects with a multitude of finishes that can be applied to surfaces to create the desired look with wood veneers, laminates, melamine, ready-to-paint surfaces and more. PANOLITE serves customers across North America from its manufacturing facility in Eastern Canada and through a growing distribution network. PANOLITE combines lightness and strength. Name: out for space feat. karuun
Description:
out for space is a team of interdisciplinary professionals who combine research and aesthetics to create a whole new way of developing and producing sustainable products. Inspired by the nature, traditional crafts and new technologies, out for space sets new standards in manufacturing sustainable materials and innovative products. Unique concepts emanate from the desire and vision to revolutionize products and materials from tropical rainforests of Asia, to Allgäu, the region out for space GmbH originates from. Our current project is karuun.

karuun – natural perfection: Using highly energy efficient technology, we transform rattan’s natural structure into a material which is both versatile and innovative. We call this new material karuun.

A cross-section of rattan looks like a bundle of tubes. When these tubes, in fact capillaries which give rattan the ability to transport water up to 200 metres, are injected with various fillers, rattan is transformed from a non-timber product with limited use to a versatile material at the forefront of natural alternatives to plastic. karuun defies classification and unlocks a wealth of innovative applications in areas such as the transportation sector, interior and furniture design, sports industry, interaction design, and consumer goods. out for space has already attracted several wellknown companies to work on custom material development projects.

The karuun product family: Processing karuun rods into blocks opens the door to a multitude of new applications which harness the material’s natural flexibility and light weight. The homogeneous structure of the fibre is unique, and depending on the direction it is cut, three different karuun products each with various possibilities are created. We sell semi-finished products made of karuun for suitability testing. If you’re interested in discovering the variety of karuun materials, you can get our samples box on our website.

Name: Columbia Kitchen Cabinets Ltd.
Description:
It all started in 1970 when Peter Loewen, who had immigrated with his family from South America, decided to start a cabinet shop with a strong commitment to workmanship and enduring quality.

Today Columbia Cabinets has grown and become a well respected cabinet manufacturer in both Canada and the United States. Columbia craftsmen, many with over 20 years of experience in cabinetmaking, work out of a modern, high tech 100,000 sq. ft. plant ideally located in Abbotsford, British Columbia.

Columbia's reputation is founded on a family culture where we lead with wholesome values. With over 200 employees and an average tenure of 15 years,  Columbia is thrilled to have created an environment where people can prosper in their careers.

Name: LINEX PANNEAUX
Description:
Linex est un pionnier de la fabrication durable de panneaux destinés à l’ameublement et à l’aménagement de l’habitat.

L’usine située en France dans le département de la Seine-Maritime (76) emploie plus de 220 salariés. Chaque année, 750 000 m3 de panneaux de particules sont produits grâce à des matériaux issus des filières françaises du bois, du lin et du recyclage, puis vendus à des clients partout dans le monde.

Spécialiste de la fabrication de panneaux depuis plusieurs décennies, Linex est attachée à la gestion durable des bois de la forêt française et à la culture du lin respectueuse de l’environnement. Les relations entretenues avec ses clients des filières ameublement et construction et ses fournisseurs des filières du bois, du lin, de support en maintenance ou de logistique assurent le prolongement des valeurs de durabilité qui ont guidé la création de l’entreprise. Au fil du temps, ces liens fidèles avec les acteurs locaux et les clients ont participé au développement de l’entreprise sur le territoire normand.

---------------------------------------------------------------

Linex is a pioneer in the sustainable manufacture of boards for furniture and home furnishings.

The plant, located in France’s Seine-Maritime département (76), employs over 220 people. Every year, 750,000 m3 of particleboard are produced using materials from the French wood, linen and recycling industries, and sold to customers worldwide.

A specialist in board manufacturing for several decades, Linex is committed to the sustainable management of French forests and the environmentally-friendly cultivation of flax. Our relationships with our customers in the furniture and construction markets and suppliers in the wood, linen, maintenance support and logistics sectors are an extension of the values of sustainability that guided the creation of the company. Over time, these loyal ties with local players and customers have contributed to the company’s development in the Normandy region.

Name: AWMAC (National) - Architectural Woodwork Manufacturers Association of Canada

The Architectural Woodwork Manufacturers Association of Canada (AWMAC) is the national voice of Canada’s architectural woodwork industry. For over 50 years, AWMAC has been setting the standard for the manufacturing and installation of architectural woodwork and fostering long-term growth for Canada's diverse wood manufacturing sector.

AWMAC’s membership includes over 400 companies, across 8 regional AWMAC Chapters, consisting of architectural woodwork manufacturers, installers, material and service suppliers, design professionals, and affiliated organizations.

Name: Unilam Wood Industries

At Unilam, we specialize in manufacturing high-quality decorative boards that effortlessly blend aesthetics with functionality, making them ideal for residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces.
Our state-of-the-art production facility utilizes cutting-edge technology and employs skilled artisans to ensure superior craftsmanship and precision in every board we create.
Our decorative melamine boards are meticulously crafted using premium materials, ensuring durability and long-lasting beauty. With an extensive range of colors, patterns, and textures, Unilam offers limitless design possibilities to suit every style and preference.
We pride ourselves on our commitment to sustainability, using eco-friendly materials and production processes that minimize environmental impact.

Whether you're seeking a contemporary, classic, or avant-garde look, Unilam's extensive product range is designed to cater to diverse design preferences and architectural styles.
We prioritize customer satisfaction, providing excellent service and tailored solutions to meet the unique requirements of each project.
Experience the fusion of innovation, quality, and style with Unilam's decorative boards, and transform your spaces into captivating works of art.

Description:
For over 45 years, De Sutter Naturally has been the quality reference in Europe for stylish wooden gates, (horse) fencing, shelters and wooden outbuildings. From our headquarters in Kampenhout, we deliver custom work with an eye for craftsmanship and durability.

As European market leader in the equestrian world, we go beyond fences and shelters. Our Residential Gates division focuses on exclusive wooden gates for homes. And with our sister company Vanhauwood, we realize wooden outbuildings - from gate to pool house - in the same style and quality.

We manage the entire production process ourselves. As a result, we not only guarantee top quality, but also safety, style and a personal approach. That is the strength of De Sutter Naturally: sustainable solutions with character, tailored to each site and each wish.

With a turnover of 110 million euro, 125 employees, strategic presence across multiple ports and clients in more than 28 countries our mission is to enhance the wood industry responsibly, bringing positive impacts to the environment, businesses, and society as a whole.

At BONO Group we know - every tree, planted or harvested, can be an investment! Due to its various environmental benefits and sustainability characteristics wood is considered one of the best renewable resources in the world. We collaborate extensively to break barriers and achieve responsible next step solutions in maximizing the value of this precious material.


FOREST SERVICES
Economically efficient management of forest areas while considering nature values
forest management

GLOBAL TIMBER SUPPLY
Supply of top-quality certified timber products

VALUE-ADDED WOODEN PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT

energy efficient and biophilic

Name: Coast To Coast Designs (P) Ltd
Description:
Coast to Coast Designs is a 25-year-old manufacturing and material solutions brand specialising in premium wood veneers, architectural surfaces, precision millwork, and tailored interior solutions.

Rooted in a deep understanding of wood, the brand began as a veneer-focused enterprise and has evolved into a fully integrated manufacturing and solutions partner. This material-first approach is reflected in its strong industry presence supported by a nationwide network of 550+ manufacturing partners, collaborations with over 100 leading architectural and interior design firms, and 5,000+ projects delivered across residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces.

Coast to Coast works closely with panel manufacturers, furniture makers, OEMs, architects, interior designers, builders, and contractors across India and select international markets. The brand also exports globally, serving overseas projects through long-standing manufacturing and design collaborations.

In 2007, Coast to Coast expanded into the manufacturing of veneered panels, addressing a wide spectrum of OEM and project-based requirements with a focus on precision, consistency, and scalability.

Today, the brand features one of India’s largest and one-of-a-kind experience centres, presenting an extensive curated veneer library alongside advanced panel products, bespoke cabinetry systems, engineered doors, and premium architectural surface solutions-enabling professionals to engage deeply with materials before specification.

Through its NEU DÉCOR vertical, Coast to Coast delivers eco-conscious finishes manufactured using advanced flat lamination technology from Barberan, Spain, combined with environmentally responsible PUR adhesive systems.

Recognised for its material intelligence, technical rigour, and commitment to quality, Coast to Coast continues to evolve with a clear mission: to be a one-stop solution for interior products and solutions, integrating design intent with precision manufacturing.

Name: EGGER România
Description:
EGGER Romania face parte din grupul EGGER, o companie de familie, care a evoluat de la fabrica de cherestea tiroleză din 1961, la un producător de top la nivel mondial de materiale pe bază de lemn. Grupul numără astăzi 22 de unități de producție în 11 țări, aici lucrând peste 11.000 de angajați. EGGER produce o gamă extinsă de produse din materiale pe bază de lemn (plăci aglomerate, plăci OSB și MDF), precum și lemn.
 
Compania de producție din Rădăuți, Suceava, a fost înființată în anul 2006. Aici, numărul angajaților a crescut de la un an la altul, iar în prezent peste 850 de oameni fac parte din echipă (70% dintre aceștia sunt din Rădăuți și din zonele limitrofe).
 
EGGER Romania este cel mai mare angajator din Rădăuți și al treilea din județul Suceava. De asemenea, compania noastră este unul dintre cei mai mari contribuabili din regiune la bugetul local și de stat.
 
Totodată, fabrica EGGER din Rădăuți reprezintă una dintre cele mai mari investiții greenfield (realizate de la zero) din România – peste 500 de milioane de euro au fost investiți până acum în țara noastră.
 
Managementul sustenabil se află în ADN-ul EGGER, iar acest lucru a fost valabil încă de la înființarea companiei. Așa s-a născut EGGER: din dorința de a folosi tot ceea ce rezultă din prelucrarea unui material atât de prețios pentru noi toți.
 
Produsele EGGER se regăsesc în nenumărate domenii ale vieții private și publice, inclusiv în bucătării, băi, dormitoare, birouri, hoteluri și magazine. EGGER este un furnizor de game complete pentru industria mobilei, designul interior, construcțiile din lemn și pardoselile pe bază de lemn (laminat, plută și pardoseli de design). 

În afară de produsele noastre de construcție realizate din lemn real, toate decorurile noastre prezentate și menționate sunt reproduceri.
 Informații Legale: https://to.egger.link/imprint
Protecția Datelor: https://to.egger.link/data-protection-declaration

Name: Lexington Manufacturing, LLC
Description:
Founded in 1981, Lexington Manufacturing is a premier OEM supplier and contract manufacturer specializing in close-tolerance components for the fenestration industry. With over 40 years of expertise, Lexington offers comprehensive solutions that address the diverse needs of the marketplace. Advanced capabilities include profile wrapping, robotic painting, CNC machining and moulding, panel processing and optimization, as well as component solutions for flush doors, stile and rail doors, entry doors, cabinet doors, fire-rated doors, window assemblies, and architectural ceilings.

Operating in Minneapolis and Brainerd, Minnesota, as well as recently opening a facility in Covington, Georgia, and Anderson, IN, Lexington Manufacturing is committed to helping partners optimize their production processes to minimize waste and maximize efficiency, ensuring top-quality products for their customers and end-users.

Name: Foglie D'Oro Parquet
Description:
Foglie D’Oro is the luxury flooring brand of Latifoglia, which together with its sister company Arte Brotto furniture has been exemplifying Italian wood craftsmanship for over 50 years. 
An international recognized excellence, Foglie d’Oro and Arte Brotto have been chosen for complete tailor made projects all around the world.
The high quality of Foglie d’Oro floors has its roots in the total control over the supply chain which goes from the selection of the finest raw materials, carried out at the source in certified forests owned and sustainably managed by the company, up to the delivery of the finished product.
The sophisticated and wide range of planks, chevrons, herringbones, and refined inlayed panels, are handcrafted with a continuous research and development of new design solutions and finishes.  The company also stands out for its incredible tailor-made service, thanks to its in house team of A&D is able to transform CAD drawing into exclusive realizations which also include stairs, doors and elegant boiseries.

The finest materials (American & European walnut and European oak) are processed by experienced artisans who interpret the creativity of the design team. The craftspeople’s sensitivity and knowledge of the structural and aesthetic characteristics of the wood allows them to enhance the unique characteristics of each individual board. Foglie d’Oro brings the breath and prestige of wood to any design context satisfying any taste and style, from contemporary to classic.

Name: Sarkar Plywood Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Company Profile
In modern times the making of technical woods like plywood have changed far beyond what would have been thought of a decade ago. New generation woods have revolutionized the use of wood as a building material in homes, industries, transportation, agriculture, architecture to name a few. Our website attempts to bring together a range of products and services whose quality and excellence have been proven in the toughest testing ground, in actual application.

Time and again the Sarkar Plywood range of products have performed flawlessly even in the most stressful conditions.

Vision
The Sarkar Group has grown with innovative thinking and a unique business approach.

Background
Sarkar Plywood Pvt. Ltd. was established in 1995 and is led by our Director Mr. Mustafa Sarkar and his son’s Mr. Adnan Mustafa Sarkar and Mr. Husain Mustafa Sarkar. The hallmark of the company is the quality standards maintained in whatever it manufactures. The group has diversified keeping in mind the growth in the domestic as well as the international markets. Our strategy is to produce the best quality and at the same time work towards support of environmental efforts like Forest Conservation and Pollution Control

Capabilities
We at Sarkar Plywood believe giving our clients not only quality products but even offering them best business relations and after sales service. The functions of our group are all directed towards the common goal. We produce a wide range of plywood’s which are unparalleled in strength and durability. Emphasis is being put in Research and Development. Sarkar Plywood has set the industry benchmark for quality, variety and service. The manufacturing process is natural and the products are the perfect choice of any architect or interior designer. Our plywood’s are the base for wonderful interiors in corporate offices, hotel lobbies, receptions, auditoriums, restaurants, furniture manufacturing, building construction and other civil works.

Berti's family, the company's founders, Mr. Giancarlo and his wife Rosanna and their sons Matteo, Andrea and Massimo have always been very careful to market's evolutions.

Name: BNEXT
Description:
BNEXT riunisce le competenze, la passione e la cultura industriale di tre realtà che negli anni hanno saputo conquistarsi uno spazio importante nello scenario internazionale della produzione di pannelli in legno: IBL SpA, I-Pan SpA e Derula Kft.

PRODOTTI
BNEXT si caratterizza per la gamma prodotti più ampia del settore e per l'elevata flessibilità produttiva in termini di spessori, dimensioni e personalizzazioni.

STABILIMENTI
Con una capacità produttiva di oltre 250.000 mc ripartita su 5 stabilimenti produttivi situati in Italia e Ungheria, BNEXT rappresenta uno dei maggiori player nello scenario internazionale.

PIANTAGIONI DI PROPRIETA'
Il controllo del costo della materia prima è un componente importante della strategia industriale BNEXT e per questo motivo il Gruppo possiede oltre 4.000 ettari di piantagioni di pioppo. Non dipendere dalle dinamiche del mercato per l’approvvigionamento di materie prime significa poter programmare nel tempo i piani di crescita e sviluppo con tranquillità e serenità. Ma non solo: significa anche maggiore stabilità dei prezzi, migliore qualità, tracciabilità dei materiali e, soprattutto, rispetto rigoroso dei cicli di crescita delle piantagioni, e cioè totale rinnovabilità della materia prima.

ECONOMIA CIRCOLARE
Negli stabilimenti BNEXT si rispettano i principi fondamentali dell’economia circolare che prevedono la rivalorizzazione e il riutilizzo di tutti i materiali di scarto, senza creazione di rifiuti.
Gli scarti di lavorazione, le ramaglie e le ceppaie diventano risorsa e rientrano nel ciclo di creazione del valore come:
- biocombustibili per la produzione di energia che alimenta gli impianti del gruppo
- sottoprodotti per l’industria cartiera, degli imballaggi e altre  (bancali, carta, pellet, ecc.)

Name: MARGOT SA
Description:
Entreprise de tournage sur bois.

Name: GROUPE FP BOIS
Description:
Notre entreprise, comme notre forêt, est un héritage précieux. Depuis plus de 70 ans, FP BOIS s’appuie sur un savoir-faire unique pour transformer le bois en matériaux d’exception, alliant tradition et modernité.

Chez FP BOIS et RABOPALE, nous mettons le meilleur dans nos produits : un équilibre tout à fait unique de performance, d’innovation et d’engagement écologique. Chaque pièce de bois que nous façonnons est le fruit d’une sélection rigoureuse et d’un processus maîtrisé, garantissant une qualité optimale pour nos clients.

Fiers de nos racines, nous puisons notre inspiration dans la richesse des forêts du massif landais. Conscients de notre responsabilité, nous nous engageons à préserver cette ressource précieuse en nous approvisionnant exclusivement en bois issus de forêts gérées durablement et certifiées PEFC. Cet engagement nous permet de garantir la pérennité de nos forêts et d’offrir des produits respectueux de l’environnement, tout en conservant les qualités intrinsèques du bois.

L’innovation est au cœur de notre démarche. Grâce à des traitements avancés et des technologies exclusives comme Pure Home, nos produits de cette gamme améliorent la qualité de l’air intérieur, éliminent certains polluants et contribuent ainsi au bien-être de chacun. Cette alliance entre innovation et naturalité nous permet de proposer des solutions qui répondent aux exigences contemporaines de confort et de santé.

Mais au-delà du bois, FP BOIS, c’est avant tout une histoire humaine. Une équipe engagée, des collaborateurs passionnés qui transmettent leur savoir-faire avec exigence et une volonté constante d’améliorer nos pratiques. Nous cultivons des relations de confiance avec nos clients et partenaires, en restant fidèles à nos valeurs d’authenticité, de proximité et de respect de l’environnement.

Name: Northland Forest Products
Description:
Northland Forest Products Limited is a family run sawmill located a few minutes north of Fort McMurray, Alberta. Over the past 40 years we have helped many organizations with their wood product needs. Albertans have trusted us with their forest and we have been responsible stewards; adopting practices that have minimal impact on the environment as we follow the life cycle of the forest.
We have also provided stable employment opportunities within the community; approximately 65 full time employees complete a variety of jobs to keep the facility running year round. In the winter our workforce increases by approximately another 150 seasonal contractors involved in logging and hauling operations. For a few months over the summer we also hire summer students, and contractors for tree planting and other silviculture work (silviculture is the practice of establishing and controlling the growth, composition, health, and quality of forests to meet diverse needs and values).
We value all of our hard working, dedicated employees and contractors that keep the mills running and the day to day operations flowing. There is a special dynamic here where friends and family members can work side by side and contribute to a common goal. We thank each and every individual that has helped Northland for their contributions of time, energy, focus and many other traits that are factors of success.

Name: Combiwood Group
Description:
Combiwood Group is a vertically integrated network of woodworking companies, uniting wood sourcing, sawmills, component factories and manufacturing units to deliver high-quality wood products - from raw materials to finished goods. Based in Estonia, we're committed to sustainable forestry and trusted by partners across Scandinavia, Europe and the US.

Since 2005, we’ve grown from a single factory in Helme, Estonia, to a network of 16 companies with over 1,000 employees. We focus on quality wood products such as sawn timber, wood components, mouldings, door and window frames, window sills, wall panels and edge-glued boards. 

We prioritize a no-nonsense approach, focusing on quality, innovation, and integrity in everything we do.

Name: Stöckl Parkett
Description:
Stöckl Parkett ist Hersteller von klassischem Parkett und innovativen Echtholzböden aus Niederösterreich.

Mit langjähriger Erfahrung und einem starken Fokus auf Qualität und einem breit gefächerten Sortiment bieten wir unseren Kunden maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für ihre Bodengestaltung. 
Unser Team aus Fachleuten kombiniert modernste Technologien mit traditionellem Handwerk, um hochwertige und nachhaltige Böden zu produzieren.

Name: PARQUETERIE JANOD 1930
Description:
Grâce à son expérience de plus de 90 ans dans la fabrication de parquets massifs et panneaux bois, la Parqueterie Janod vous propose des sols haut de gamme et sur-mesure en alliant authenticité et modernité ! 
En choisissant un Parquet Janod, vous optez pour un bois local, exploité de manière raisonnée, transformée intégralement en notre site historique de Doucier (Jura), par une équipe labelisée "Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant".

Name: AFCB-Alliance France Caisse Bois
Description:
Née d’une vision commune, l’Alliance France Caisse Bois est l’unique regroupement associatif de solutions d’emballage bois, unies par une seule 
mission : défendre et promouvoir l'excellence de la caisserie bois en France.  

Notre alliance, composée de neuf caisseries, repose sur la conviction profonde que les caisses en bois, au-delà de leur esthétique et de leur fonctionnalité, représentent un choix écologique et durable en termes de protection comme de conservation, pour notre industrie.

Abzac Caisserie , La Caisserie DU BAZADAIS, Caisserie BERGEY, Groupe Caisserie Bordelaise, Caisserie des Grands Vignobles, Caisserie LEGENDRE & LUREAU, Caisserie Marie-Louise, CECD, CAISSERIE Pierre Goujon.

Notre mission s’étend sur trois points fondamentaux :

 Défendre l'artisanat et le savoir-faire Français : Nous croyons fermement en la valeur de l'artisanat et du savoir-faire français dans la caisserie bois. En mettant en avant l'excellence de nos artisans et de nos entreprises, nous visons à préserver et à enrichir cet héritage culturel et technique, garantissant ainsi que la tradition de la caisserie bois continue de prospérer en France.
	
Promouvoir l'Écologie et la Durabilité : Convaincus de l'importance cruciale de la durabilité dans le secteur du bois, nous nous engageons à promouvoir les caisses en bois comme une solution écologique. Grâce à leurs caractéristiques biodégradables et leur capacité à être réutilisées et recyclées, les caisses en bois incarnent un choix respectueux de l'environnement, en phase avec les valeurs de préservation et de respect de notre planète.
	
Soutenir l'Innovation : Tout en valorisant les méthodes traditionnelles, nous sommes également tournés vers l'avenir, encourageant l'innovation dans la conception, la production et l'utilisation des caisses en bois. Nous œuvrons pour que notre secteur soit à la pointe de la technologie, tout en restant fidèle à nos principes écologiques et artisanaux.

Name: Felix NL
Description:
Felix Clercx Handelsonderneming – Hout voor Generaties 

Felix, opgericht in 1891 en sinds 1900 gevestigd in Helmond, is een toonaangevende groothandel in hardhout & WPC met meer dan 125 jaar ervaring. Onze werkwijze is gebaseerd op drie kernwaarden: Duurzaamheid, Kwaliteit en Betrouwbaarheid.

Felix vertegenwoordigd drie merken: Felixwood, Fiberdeck en Cobra, onderverdeeld in drie productcategorieën Decking, Fencing en Cladding.

Felixwood: In dit assortiment vindt u diverse hardhoutsoorten, zoals Bangkirai en Afrikulu, die voorzien zijn van een FSC-certificering welke wij zelf keuren en wereldwijd importeren. Ons aanbod omvat een uitgebreid scala aan hardhouten tuinproducten.

Fiberdeck: Fiberdeck terrassen, tuinschermen, gevelbekleding en gardenwalls staan bekend om duurzaamheid en stabiliteit. Met 15 jaar ervaring in WPC (houtcomposiet), is Fiberdeck zeer betrouwbaar, innoverend en duurzaam. De co-extrusie technologie maakt het mogelijk om een zeer duurzaam product te leveren, waarbij we meer dan 95% biologische grondstoffen kunnen gebruiken.

De investering in een Fiberdeck product is de zekerheid van langdurige tevredenheid over een zeer duurzaam product.

Cobrafastener: biedt een uitgebreid assortiment aan gereedschappen en bevestigingsmaterialen, evenals aluminium constructies en funderingsschroeven die de levensduur en duurzaamheid van houten en WPC-producten aanzienlijk verbeteren.

Ons professionele en groeiende team staat altijd voor u klaar om u te adviseren, te ondersteunen bij bestellingen en te zorgen voor de betrouwbare levering van uw tuinproducten.

Hout voor Generaties – Felix is al meer dan 125 jaar uw betrouwbare partner voor materialen voor een breed scala aan buitentoepassingen!

Name: Groupe Rozière
Description:
Fabricant français de portes et placards d'intérieur en bois de pays et bois exotique, le groupe Rozière est depuis plus de 50 ans, un acteur incontournable sur le marché de la porte d'intérieur haut de gamme. 
Précurseurs sur ce marché, nous sommes en perpétuelle recherche de design novateurs, pour créer aujourd'hui les tendances intérieures de demain. 

Rozière c'est :
Un engagement local, avec une usine située en France, en Aveyron (12). ROZIERE travaille des bois issus d'exploitations forestières françaises.

Un engagement environnemental, avec des démarches de production raisonnées et responsables. ROZIERE se mobilise pour réduire les émissions de CO2 et s'engage dans le respect de l'exploitation du bois issu de forêts renouvelables :
- un site de production basé en France pour une logistique de proximité,
- la valorisation des singularités des bois pour réduire les pertes de matières,
- le recyclage des copeaux pour l'autonomie en chauffage,
- l'utilisation de produits de finition à base d'eau, alternative aux produits à base de solvant.
ROZIERE est certifié par le Programme de reconnaissance des certifications forestières (PEFC - Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification), organisme international promouvant la gestion et le développement durable de la forêt.

Un engagement qualité, avec des portes et placards conçus en bois massif lamellé pour toujours plus de stabilité et de robustesse. ROZIERE maîtrise la totalité de la chaîne de production (séchage, débit, collage, usinage, montage, emballage, expédition). Un contrôle qualité optimum est intégré tout au long du processus : sélection des grumes, tri des bois, sublimation des finitions.

Name: EcoReFibre
Description:
EcoReFibre – Upscaling end-of-life recycling and circular use of recovered wood in the European wood panel industry.
 
The project is funded by Horizon Europe from May 2022- April 2027 with an EC grant of 12 million EUR for 20 partners in 7 countries and coordinated by the Swedish University of Agricultural Sciences (SLU). The project explores smart technologies to recycle post-consumer waste wood back into fibreboards and into novel building products. Five highly promising pilots, involving leading panel manufacturers, are launched to demonstrate how Circular Economy approaches linked with innovative and digital-supported technologies will ensure the supply of secondary raw materials. These include sorting and extraction of wood fines and fibres and their conversion to valuable products, i.e. fibreboard and insulation products, particleboard and biocomposites. EcoReFibre, ultimately, aims to increase available wood resources in Europe through recycling. The ambition is to substitute up to 25% of the virgin fibres currently used in the European fibreboard market. The project demonstrates how this upscaling of circular technologies can become possible.

Name: Alma by Giorio
Description:
UN'IMPRESA FAMILIARE
Giorio Srl è stata fondata nel 1969 da Pierino Giorio, partendo da una solida cultura del legno e da una grande passione per questo materiale. Nel corso dei decenni, passando alla generazione successiva, l’azienda è diventata una tra le realtà più importanti del settore. Alma ha visto crescere costantemente il proprio volume d’affari ed è oggi attiva sui principali mercati mondiali, a seguito di uno sviluppo graduale, che però ha mantenuto sempre al centro una qualità artigianale del lavoro.

L’ALMA DELLA NATURA
I parquet di Alma nascono da foreste che selezioniamo attentamente nel rispetto dei più rigorosi standard ambientali, garantendo che la quantità di legno tagliato non sia mai superiore a quella che ricresce.

DESIGN ITALIANO
Grazie a un design innovativo e una lunga esperienza nella lavorazione del legno, creiamo prodotti di qualità, di lunga durata ed eco-sostenibili. Ogni parquet viene progettato in base all’ambiente in cui verrà inserito, all’arredo e alle esigenze del cliente: tutti i prodotti possono essere completamente personalizzati, dalla tipologia di superficie al colore, dalle dimensioni alla forma. I nostri pavimenti in legno sono realizzati da mani artigiane che plasmano soluzioni su misura, uniche e originali.
Radici, rispetto, equilibrio. La natura è l’anima del nostro lavoro. Seguiamo la crescita della foresta, come una creatura preziosa da proteggere, e la rispettiamo mantenendo un equilibrio costante fra abbattimento e ripristino. La foresta è il nostro cuore pulsante, prenderci cura del suo ecosistema con consapevolezza e riguardo è per noi un atto imprescindibile.

Durch den Einsatz des Fixpods erzielt Ihr eine Prozess + Kostenoptimierung von über 50% gegenüber den bisherigen Rohrverbindungen.  
Zusätzliche reduziert Ihr die Gefahr von eingeklemmten Fingern und Händen bei den Elementübergängen. Die Nachhaltigkeit wird durch die Verschnittreduktion von Ø über 90% reduziert. Die verschiedenen Prozesse von der Ausführungsplanung bis zum Kabeleinzug werden in jedem Bereich optimiert und effizienter gestaltet.
Der Fixpod kann bei Elementübergängen, Wandauslässe, Deckenauslässe und Zuleitungen in den Aussenbereich eingesetzt werden.

Description:
Het hart van de vaklui en die-hard zagers van de Edese Zagerij gaat sneller kloppen van drie dingen: hout, hout en nog eens hout. En dat is niet zomaar! Hout is een eerlijk natuurproduct, dat ook nog eens heerlijk ruikt als je het verzaagt. Geen wonder dus dat onze professionals er graag mee werken. Zeker met het mooie Douglashout en eikenhout, dat wij in onze zagerij verwerken. Ons hechte team is dan ook apetrots op ons werk en levert keer op keer de mooiste producten af. Iedere boomstam wordt door onszelf geïmporteerd en in onze zagerij vol liefde vers gezaagd tot de perfecte plank of balk. Om als kroonjuweel te dienen in fraaie overkappingen, mooie vlonders, smaakvolle chalets, tuinmeubelen en noem maar op.

Onze experts weten écht álles van hout. Ze weten dus ook als geen ander wat niet en vooral wat wél werkt voor jou en gaan keer op keer voor de allerhoogste kwaliteit. 1000%! Met onze passie én expertise hebben we dan ook een tevreden klantenbestand opgebouwd. We kunnen onze klanten van A tot Z adviseren. Zoek jij een betrouwbare zagerij, met een grote voorraad of voor bestellingen op maat voor specifieke projecten? Dan is de Edese Zagerij jouw partner. En, we gaan een uitdaging graag aan. Dus kom maar op! Jij vraagt, wij lossen op.

Depuis des générations, la forêt fait partie de notre vie. Ainsi, nous nous faisons un devoir de maximiser l’utilisation de chaque arbre coupé. Notre engagement envers l’excellence se reflète dans le respect de l’environnement; c’est pourquoi nous sommes fiers d’être certifiés FSC (Forest Stewardship Council).

Nos installations manufacturières sont situées à Saint-Malo et à Frontenac, au Québec (Canada) près de la frontière avec les États-Unis. Cette position stratégique nous permet d’accéder facilement à la matière première provenant des vastes forêts feuillues de l’est du Canada et du nord-est des États-Unis.

Par ailleurs, cette situation privilégiée permet d’effectuer rapidement les livraisons à la clientèle canadienne et américaine et assure de plus un accès rapide au port de Montréal pour les livraisons aux clients outre-mer.

Chcemy inspirować ludzi i umożliwiać im życie w piękniejszy sposób, oferując niebanalne projekty i niecodzienne rozwiązania.
Wśród naszych propozycji znajdziesz mnóstwo produktów i rozwiązań, dzięki którym Twój dom, salon lub firma stanie się miejscem oryginalnym i wywołującym zachwyt. Odpowiadamy również na indywidualne potrzeby, projektując meble oraz elementy wystroju wnętrz według wskazań konkretnego projektu.

Naszą pasją jest natura oraz stwarzanie możliwości do spotkania jej we własnym domu. Przy każdym zamówieniu staramy się wspierać naszych klientów pomocą i profesjonalnym doradztwem w kwestii aranżacji wnętrz. Każdy produkt wychodzący spod naszych rąk jest traktowany w sposób szczególny, dbamy o wszystkie detale, wierząc, że to właśnie w nich tkwi piękno naszego talentu.

Wierzymy w to, że wszyscy powinni mieć dostęp do dobrych artykułów wyposażenia domu. Każdy produkt oferowany klientom jest przez nas projektowany tak, żeby wydłużyć jego okres eksploatacji i traktować go jako zasób na przyszłość.

Jesteśmy optymistami, nieustannie szukającymi nowych i lepszych rozwiązań oraz sposobów rozwoju. Kochamy to, co robimy, a robimy to dobrze, bo mamy ogromne doświadczenie oraz wiedzę, którą na przestrzeni lat udało nam się sukcesywnie poszerzać.

Description:
In the early 1940s brothers Ted and Ernie Manthei were strawberry farmers who wanted to save money by making their own fruit baskets. In their pursuit of this cost-cutting idea they purchased a “basket making machine” which mistakenly turned out to be a veneer lathe. So they began manufacturing and selling veneer instead of growing strawberries. By combining vision, diligence, and attention to craftsmanship Manthei Veneer has risen from humble beginnings to a national leader in precision hardwood face veneers.

Today, with over 100 employees, Manthei Wood Products is owned and operated by the third generation of the Manthei family, which provides experience along with creative thinking in forging new paths while continually improving on existing ones. We are proud to be one of the few remaining family-owned veneer mills in North America, and as a family, we understand the value of commitment and integrity. We believe that superior service is invaluable, therefore we work hard to provide the flexibility and product diversity that best serves our customers. That’s why for over 75 years we have offered our customers the highest quality veneer products available and remain committed to working with the changing needs of plywood, flooring, and furniture manufacturers around the world.

Name: Rubio Monocoat USA
Description:
Rubio Monocoat USA imports and distributes a unique hardwax oil that both protects and colors raw wood. It is 0 VOC, comes in 50+ colors, is applied in one coat and can easily be maintained and cleaned, making it an ideal finish for both residential and commercial applications.

 0% WATER AND VOC
Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus does not contain water: its components are mainly natural products. Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus is 0% volatile organic components (= VOC free).

 COLORS AND PROTECTS THROUGH MOLECULAR BONDING 
Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus adheres with the first microns of the wood by molecular bonding (with no film forming nor saturation). This is why the consumption is much lower than with a traditional wood finishing system.

 DURABLE PROTECTION
The molecular bonding creates a durable, long lasting protection. To obtain this molecular bonding it is very important to strictly respect this reaction time of a couple of minutes. The better the fibers are bonded, the stronger the protection will be.

 NO OVERLAPS
Once all free cellulose fibers are molecularly bonded, surplus product will no longer be accepted by the wood or the bonded Monocoat layer itself. This is why overlaps or starting marks are avoided.

 TIME SAVING: COLORING AND PROTECTING IN ONE COAT
It is pointless to apply a second layer on top of Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus because this extra layer will not be able to bond with the free wood fibers or with the primarily - bonded- Monocoat layer.

 EASY TO REPAIR
This technology allows local repair of damaged areas or scratches: only the free wood fibers will absorb the product. The product next to the scratched or damaged area will not adhere. After the reaction time all surplus product can be removed without overlaps.

 UNIQUE COLORS
The unique Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus pigmentation technology allows an intense and deep coloring in one single layer, without influencing the natural look and feel of the wood.

Name: Wood Factory
Description:
Jsme Filip a Jakub a pod značkou Wood Factory v malé dílně v Jizerských horách vyrábíme luxusní dřevěná pera, která jsou v každém ohledu jedinečná. 

Jsme kamarádi už od dětství a naše cesta k řemeslné práci a společnému podnikání však vedla oklikou přes moderní technologie a práci v korporátech. Filip působil jako IT systémový inženýr a Jakub jako technolog v automotive. 

Roky nás ale oba také zajímala práce se dřevem, a tak jsme postupně začali s prvními pokusy. Vyrobili jsme první stůl, poličku, dali jsme do pořádku chatu na horách. Přitom jsme si všímali různých typů dřeva, jeho kreseb nebo tvrdosti. 
 
Koupili jsme si dokonce vlastní soustruh a zkoušeli jsme na něm vyrábět všechno možné. Doslova nás to pohltilo, byla to skvělá zábava a odreagování. 

O něco později jsme narazili video z Ameriky s výrobou per. Nadchlo nás, jak krásné kousky se dají vyrobit a došlo nám, že tohle dává smysl – že do tohoto kousku luxusu můžeme dát kus sebe, vdechnout mu příběh a život.  
 
Započala dlouhá cesta zkoumání. Museli jsme domyslet spoustu detailů, postupů a připravit ruce i myšlení na něco, co jsme nikdy dřív nedělali. 

Chtěli jsme tu samou preciznost a kvalitu, kterou jsme vídali v procesech v našem do té doby technologickém světě. 

A podařilo se – za pery, která dnes vyrábíme, si stojíme do posledního detailu.

I když to původně nebyl náš záměr, nadšené reakce kamarádů a rodiny nás dovedly až ke spuštění e-shopu Wood Factory v roce 2020, kterému se od té doby naplno věnujeme. 

Jsme hrdí na to, že můžeme dát zákazníkům něco, co jim dělá radost a čeho si váží. 

Naše pera jsou výsledkem několika hodin práce, kdy sami zpracováváme pečlivě vybrané dřevo, volíme k němu vhodnou kombinaci mechaniky, soustružíme a vše kompletujeme. Výsledkem je perfektně vyladěné pero, které nemá dvojníka. Unikátnost lze podpořit také gravírováním na přání.

Pro vaše blízké, klienty či obchodní partnery vyrobíme nezaměnitelný dárek, které se stane součástí jejich každodenního života.

 Fabricamos soluciones para viviendas unifamiliares, edificios y proyectos de rehabilitación, combinando diseño, tecnología y rendimiento.

Nuestras carpinterías destacan por su excelente aislamiento térmico y acústico, lo que permite un mayor ahorro energético, mejora del bienestar interior y una significativa reducción del impacto ambiental.

Hechas con materiales 100% naturales y bajo procesos de fabricación de alta precisión, nuestras ventanas no requieren prácticamente mantenimiento y ofrecen una larga vida útil. Además, la madera contribuye al equilibrio higrotérmico del ambiente, favoreciendo un entorno más saludable.

Name: WineRacks.com
Description:
WineRacks.com began more than 16 years ago as The Wine Rack Company, a part-time venture by company president Michael Babcock. After helping his brother-in-law, who had just built a wine store, Michael began building custom wooden wine racks in addition to his day job in industrial construction. When big accounts from places like the Seagram Company began to pay off, he decided in 1995 that creating wine racks was better than construction. We started on the web that same year and have been selling our wooden racks all over the world.

We still operate The Wine Rack Company as our wholesale division for an ever expanding network of dealers and installers.

Most of the wooden racks that you see on our website are manufactured in our plant in the Hudson Valley of New York from environmentally responsible raw materials. All of our raw wood materials come from managed forests or plantations and we've recently added Lyptus, a quickly renewable, plantation grown hardwood that is gaining in popularity among the home builder and construction industry.

Our website has grown to encompass not only wine racking, but fine stemware and other wine related accessories and gift items. WineRacks.com, Inc services not just the home wine enthusiast, but retail wine and liquor establisments as well as restaurants worldwide.

In 2001, WineRacks.com founded the Hudson Valley Wine & Food Fest, now one of New York State's largest wine and food events that takes place annually in September.

Name: Rubio Monocoat South Africa

Rubio Monocoat Oil cannot be compared with any other oil on the market: it bonds in one single layer through a molecular reaction with the upper wood fibres of the substrate. It contains 0% of Volatile Organic Compounds, colours and protects the wood in one single layer and is available in an extensive range of colours. High technology in a green can? That's Rubio Monocoat!

Name: Houtverwerkingsindustrie Fransen B.V.
