Wij streven altijd naar een betrouwbare kwaliteit, verantwoorde omgang met onze materialen en optimale service. Wij leveren de houtsoorten: Vuren, Grenen, Lariks, Douglas, Robinia, Kastanje, Bangkirai, Cloëziana en Firmowood. Door deze variatie kunnen wij uw behoefte met de meest geschikte oplossing invullen. 

Om U snel en adequaat van dienst te kunnen zijn, zijn wij altijd voorraadhoudend in de meest gangbare afmetingen en producten. Deelleveringen behoren tot de mogelijkheden en zowel kleine als grote partijen kunnen bij u op de werf of direct op het werk worden geleverd. Is een product niet direct beschikbaar, dan kan er altijd nog worden gewerkt met een beschikbaar alternatief of kan het product besteld worden. Door onze eigen rondhout schil- en freesbedrijf en Robinia zagerij in Hongarije kunnen wij diverse bestellingen op maat maken. Specifieke wensen in maatvoering en ontwerp voeren wij graag voor u uit. Op het gebied van speeltoestellen kunnen wij u terzijde staan met inspecties en logboeken. Wij nemen desgewenst de complete terreininrichting voor onze rekening.

Houtverwerkingsindustrie Fransen heeft duurzaamheid hoog in het vaandel staan en handelt enkel volgens de PEFC en FSC richtlijnen. Hiermee wordt een verantwoorde kap van het hout gegarandeerd!

La scierie est spécialisée dans le sciage de résineux et transforme chaque année 60 000 m³ de bois rond breton.
L’usine de fabrication de palettes et caisses en bois produit annuellement 600 000 palettes distribuées dans le Grand Ouest de la France.
L’usine Celticoat valorise l’ensemble des sous-produits de la scierie (sciures et plaquettes) qu’elle transforme en 26.000 tonnes de granulés de bois (pellets de marque Celticoat et Koadenn).
L’atelier de valorisation des bois de pays qui transforme nos sciages en bois d’aménagement (terrasse, bardage, lambris et parquet). Cet atelier fabrique également des composteurs.
Le magasin d’usine, ouvert aux particuliers et aux professionnels, propose notamment notre gamme de produits.
Au sein d’Aprobois, nous sommes fiers de nos valeurs coopératives et de notre engagement en faveur de la qualité, du développement durable, et de l'économie locale.

Our goal is to market our products both domestically and internationally.

Within the group, there are several subsidiary companies:

3.	Aquamar Investments: This subsidiary owns a 75,000-hectare concession and specializes in the extraction and sale of logs in Pucallpa.

Our products ensures adherence to rigorous environmental and social standards.

Name: IDEAPACK Italia
Description:
La nostra storia nasce in Italia negli anni 50’ quando il fondatore Giuseppe Schievano iniziò la sua attività di sartoria creando abiti su misura.
Quella del Sarto è un’arte complessa, fatta di precisione e cura del dettaglio. Ci vuole creatività, versatilità e passione.
Caratteristiche tramandate alla seconda generazione che ha visto nascere nel 1986 quella che ora, grazie alla terza generazione, è diventata IDEAPACK ITALIA srl.
Una realtà con radici profonde, che ha fatto di queste caratteristiche il proprio tratto distintivo e che le hanno permesso di sviluppare collaborazioni dapprima con le più prestigiose aziende di produzione di vini e distillati e poi di ampliare il mercato alle eccellenze di molti altri settori, contribuendo all’evoluzione del design del packaging in legno.
Oggi IDEAPACK ITALIA, rappresenta un punto di riferimento per il packaging in legno qualificato e luxury e garantisce una grande capacità progettuale, grazie alle idee innovative che ogni anno fanno progredire il design e il made in Italy.
Da sempre l’azienda si è imposta una rigorosa politica ambientale e utilizza solo legni selezionati da filiere tracciate secondo gli standard FSC, garantendo così una grande qualità e un grande rispetto per il pianeta.
Il sempre più frequente uso di fibra di legno riciclata al 100%, contribuisce inoltre a limitare l’impatto sull’ambiente dovuto alla deforestazione e a sviluppare un profilo sempre più green.
Quest’ultimo contraddistinto da un grande progetto nato nel 2015, con la collaborazione di giovani designer del Politecnico di Milano, dedicato allo sviluppo di un ramo di azienda dedicato alla industrializzazione e alla produzione di una linea di cassette per vino denominata DOUBLE-USE.
Cassette che nascono per il trasporto di bottiglie di vino, ma che hanno una seconda vita come elementi di arredo.
Il costante inserimento di giovani collaboratori, contribuisce al processo di innovazione per trovarci sempre pronti alle sfide del futuro.

Logística Própria: Contamos com uma logística eficiente e confiável, garantindo a entrega de nossos produtos em todo o território nacional. Além disso, nossa equipe de instalação altamente capacitada é responsável por oferecer um serviço completo, assegurando que nossos displays e mobiliário sejam instalados com perfeição e dentro dos prazos estabelecidos.

Localização Estratégica: Estamos estrategicamente instalados em uma área privilegiada, às margens da Rodovia Anhanguera, na cidade de Osasco. Nossa ampla infraestrutura, com 5.000m² de espaço dedicado à produção, nos permite atender às demandas dos nossos clientes com agilidade e eficiência.

Estamos comprometidos em fornecer soluções de PDV que impulsionam o sucesso dos nossos clientes no mercado de varejo. Se você procura displays e mobiliário de alta qualidade, personalizados e entregues com excelência, a Rhino Wood é a sua parceira ideal.

Name: Impressive Floors
Description:
"To be the industry's foremost innovator and provider of sustainable, premium flooring solutions, setting the standard for excellence in design, quality, and customer experience while contributing to the creation of beautiful, enduring spaces."
Headquartered proudly in Ontario, Canada, has evolved into a prominent Canadian-based company. Having originated in Ontario, we've expanded steadily over the past two decades, reaching different provinces across Canada and the United States. Currently, we are actively working towards extending our footprint throughout North America.
Proudly manufactured in Canada, our hardwood production has roots dating back to the 1920s. Operating from our manufacturing plant in London, Ontario , we oversee the entire process, from receiving timber to crafting the flooring planks. Our manufacturing unit is renowned for producing top-quality flooring planks, boasting a customer base across North America. Quality is paramount at Impressive Floors.
Distinguishing ourselves further, we specialize in custom colors for all our hardwood flooring. In Ontario, Canada, our finishing production lines cater to the unique color preferences of our customers. Our skilled experts precisely match colors and produce flooring that aligns with customer expectations. 

With a substantial distribution center and warehouse, we have emerged as one of Canada's most versatile manufacturers and suppliers of solid hardwood, engineered, laminate, and vinyl flooring options. Our commitment to quality is evident in our products, consistently meeting the highest industry standards.

Our overarching goal is clear: to empower our network of dealers with innovative and trend-setting flooring solutions that are not only cutting-edge but also affordable. At Impressive Floors, we are dedicated to shaping the future of flooring with quality, innovation, and a commitment to meeting the diverse needs of our customers.

Name: BWT Timber Ltd.
Description:
BWT Timber Ltd. was established in 2007 when acted as a distributor in the local market. Through the years, company has developed and adjusted to the market; at the moment, it owns production facilities based in Riga and plans to expand even more during next years to offer bigger variety of products to customers.  
In 2023 the company's name was changed to BWT Timber to more accurately reflect the company's activities as we don`t want to be associated with name "Trading" that much.

Currently, construction materials, battens, CLS, C24 are just few of the items we provide. As a responsible producer, we choose FSC (FSC-C011216) or PEFC(PEFC/12-31-059) certified materials to support sustainable foresting. Raw materials of pine and spruce are being purchased from Baltics, Finland and Sweden to ensure the best quality as well as flexibility for our customers.

Our sustainable process converts low-value wood fibre into new hardwoods that look, feel and have the properties of 100-year-old trees.

Innovation at the core of what we do, guided by sustainable development principles.

We remain at the forefront of new technologies through our global partnerships with Flinders University, Bosch and Henkel.

3RT stands for the 3 “R”s of sustainability: Reduce – Reuse – Recycle.

It is not only perfect for heating, but also ideal for cooking, firing pizza ovens, and imparting rich flavours when used for smoking.

Alongside our top-tier Redgum selection, we provide a more budget-friendly choice – quality Bluegum firewood. Bluegum firewood provides an efficient burn at an affordable price point – ideal for various heating needs.

Experience the convenience of ordering your preferred firewood directly from us and having it promptly delivered to your doorstep.  Choose Lumbajak for premium quality firewood and exceptional service that transforms your comfort, warmth, and cooking experiences.

Name: Hike Company for Wood Industries
Description:
Hike Company for Wood Industries is a leading manufacturer specializing in high-quality wooden products for the packaging, construction, logistics, and industrial sectors. With a commitment to sustainability, innovation, and craftsmanship, we provide a diverse range of products that meet the growing demands of modern infrastructure and supply chain solutions.

Our core product offerings include:

Wooden Pallets and Wooden Boxes: Designed for durability and efficiency, our pallets are built to support the safe transportation and storage of goods across various industries. We offer custom sizes and specifications to meet the unique needs of our clients.

Fire Rated Wooden Doors: Crafted from the finest materials, our wooden doors are engineered for both aesthetics and security. We offer a wide range of designs, from traditional to contemporary, ensuring that every door enhances the beauty and functionality of any property.

Building Materials: As a trusted supplier of construction materials, we manufacture high-quality film faced shuttering plywood, commercial Plywood, LVL/OSHA planks, Hardwoods, chipboards, MDF and white wood products that are essential for building structures. Our plywood is known for its strength, versatility, and eco-friendly production, while our white wood is prized for its smooth finish and exceptional workability.

At Hike Company for Wood Industries, we pride ourselves on using advanced production techniques and sustainable practices to deliver reliable and cost-effective solutions. Our skilled team of experts is dedicated to providing exceptional customer service, and we work closely with our clients to ensure that every project is completed on time and to the highest standards.

Name: Luxewood India
Description:
At Luxewood India, we believe wood is more than a material — it is nature, craftsmanship and design coming together to create timeless spaces. We bring the warmth and character of natural wood into modern architecture through premium thermowood and engineered wood solutions built for longevity, performance and visual elegance.

Our range includes natural wood cladding, decking, battens, rafters and specialised surfaces for both interior and exterior use. Each panel undergoes advanced thermal modification to enhance strength, stability and weather resistance — ensuring lasting beauty even in demanding climates. From luxury residences to commercial environments, hospitality to public spaces, we enable designs that feel natural, refined and enduring.

Sustainability guides our process. We source responsibly, manufacture consciously and craft products that balance aesthetics with environmental care. The result — wood that looks authentic, performs exceptionally and supports greener building choices.

With a vision to elevate wooden architecture in India, we work closely with architects, designers and brands who value detail, durability and true material expression. Luxewood isn’t just wood — it’s an experience that transforms spaces and lives on.

Name: Robuust Maatwerk
Description:
Robuust Maatwerk is opgestart in 2014 door een passie voor barnwood. Het begon met een op maat gemaakte tafel, maar dat is intussen uitgegroeid tot gehele interieur inrichtingen en gevelbekleding. Door ons exclusieve maatwerk, wat uitgevoerd wordt door onze uitstekende vakmensen, kunnen we zo goed als alles op maat maken voor u. 

We maken bij Robuust Maatwerk vooral meubels, gevelbekleding en totale inrichtingen. We gebruiken hiervoor o.a. barnwood, wat afkomstig is van oude schuren uit Amerika en Canada. Daarnaast bieden we ook andere houtsoorten aan, zoals Azobe en Basralocus, en andere materialen, zoals staal. 

Onze vakmensen zorgen ervoor dat elk product van hoogwaardige kwaliteit is en een robuuste uitstraling krijgt. Zo kunt u lang genieten van ons maatwerk. 

Bent u meer een doe-het-zelver? Naast ons maatwerk, bieden we ook losse houten planken en balken aan van ons houtassortiment. Zo kunt u uw eigen project realiseren.

Name: Karl Segerström AB
Description:
Karl Segerström AB är beläget I Åvestbo, söder om Fagersta, där Västmanland möter Dalarna. Här i byn har familjen Segerström bedrivit sågverk sedan början av 1930-talet. I dag är det fjärde generationen Segerström som driver verksamheten, numera med Björn vid rodret. 
En del förändringar har skett genom åren, men vi ligger alltjämt kvar på den plats där allt en gång startade.. Vi ligger alltjämt kvar på samma plats där Arvid en gång startade.
Tillsammans med våra skickliga medarbetare på industrin tillverkar vi klimatsamarta konstruktionsprodukter, där endast lokal råvara används. 
Råvara som köps in av vår egen råvaruavdelning. 
Vi producerar årligen 65 000m³ sågade och hyvlade trävaror och våra produkter utgör stommen i många hem, i allt från Japan i öster till USA i väster. 
Vi är det småskaliga sågverket som förser världen med kvalitetsprodukter. 
Vi är granspecialisten som förädlar lokalt och säljer globalt.

Name: BART BEUGT
Description:
Wij zijn houtliefhebbers met een visie en willen een groene en gezonde leefomgeving beschikbaar maken voor iedereen, door natuurlijke vloeren de norm te maken. 

Hoe wij dat doen? Door te werken met natuurlijke materialen, lokale grondstoffen en lokaal te produceren maken wij toekomstbestendige vloeren. Door eerlijk en open te communiceren, bewustzijn te creëren, aandacht te hebben voor de natuur, te vernieuwen en daadkrachtig te zijn werken wij aan een gezonder leefklimaat.

Volg ons profiel om op de hoogte te blijven van alle ontwikkelingen rondom #circulaire en #milieubewuste vloeren.

Name: Bajda S.R.L
Description:
Somos especialistas en madera. Con más de 70 años de trayectoria en el mercado, nos dedicamos a la fabricación de pisos de madera, molduras, piezas parte para muebles, barriles, toneles, entre muchos otros productos.  

El estacionamiento y secado natural de la madera, es uno de nuestros elementos diferenciadores. En Bajada SRL, aprovechamos el inmejorable clima árido de Mendoza y lo complementamos con cámaras de secado propias, lo que nos permite obtener una óptima estabilidad dimensional de la materia prima, que junto a la dilatada experiencia y tecnología hacen que nuestros productos sean de alta calidad y confiabilidad.

Además, desde hace 40 años Bajda SRL demuestra su compromiso con el medio ambiente, ya que posee forestación propia en la zona de Las Catitas y en la zona desértica de Lavalle, provincia de Mendoza. Durante este tiempo hemos plantando y explotando forestalmente un área de 130 hectáreas bajo riego artificial cumpliendo dos ciclos en 20 años. 

En lo que respecta a nuestros intercambios comerciales, en la actualidad, también realizamos operaciones de importación de maderas y materias primas,  a la vez que exportamos parte de nuestra producción a los más exigentes mercados del mundo, como son España, Reino Unido, Brasil , Italia, Republica Checa, Suiza, EEUU., Eslovenia, Chile, entre muchos otros.

Name: CAISSERIE LEGENDRE & LUREAU
Description:
Fondée sur un héritage familial profondément enraciné dans le métier du bois, Caisserie Legendre & Lureau incarne l'essence même de l'artisanat et de l'excellence depuis ses humbles débuts au sein de la menuiserie Legendre & Lureau acquise par la famille Donné dans les années 1950. Depuis notre entreprise a prospéré grâce à un engagement indéfectible envers la qualité et l'innovation.

En 1988, une opportunité unique de créer des caisses bois pour Baron Philippe de Rothschild a propulsé notre famille vers le domaine spécialisé de la caisserie. Cette décision audacieuse a conduit à la création de l'entreprise initialement connue sous le nom de Caisserie Libournaise en 2000.

Notre héritage de menuisiers confère à Caisserie Legendre & Lureau un avantage distinct sur le marché de la caisse bois. Nous combinons un savoir-faire traditionnel avec une approche moderne, créant ainsi des produits qui allient qualité artisanale et fonctionnalité contemporaine.

En 2010, Myriam Marchive Donné a pris les rênes de la direction de la Caisserie Libournaise, inscrivant ainsi notre entreprise dans une nouvelle ère de croissance et d'innovation. Sous sa direction, nous avons consolidé notre réputation en tant qu'acteur incontournable du marché, tout en préservant les valeurs familiales et l'engagement envers l'excellence qui ont toujours été notre moteur.

Aujourd'hui, Caisserie Legendre & Lureau continue de repousser les limites de la créativité et de la qualité dans la fabrication de caisses bois sur mesure. Nous sommes fiers de notre héritage et impatients de poursuivre notre mission consistant à fournir à nos clients des solutions sur mesure de la plus haute qualité, façonnées avec passion et expertise.

Name: Woodsome
Description:
Bij Woodsome combineren we traditioneel vakmanschap met innovatieve technieken om unieke, hoogwaardige houtoplossingen te creëren. Van op maat gemaakte meubels tot verfijnde interieurprojecten – elk stuk wordt met passie en precisie vervaardigd.

Met een team van gedreven ambachtslieden en moderne productietechnologieën zetten we in op kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en esthetiek. We werken nauw samen met architecten, designers en particulieren om elk project tot in de perfectie uit te voeren.

 Op zoek naar maatwerk dat vakmanschap en innovatie ademt? Ontdek onze creaties en laat je inspireren!

Name: Rubio Monocoat België
Description:
Rubio Monocoat is een ecologisch bedrijf in Izegem, België, dat hoogwaardige houtbescherming en kleuring in één laag maakt. Onze producten zijn zeer ecologisch, duurzaam en innovatief. Bovendien zorgt ons uitgebreid kleurengamma voor eindeloze creatieve mogelijkheden. Rubio Monocoat wil investeren in de toekomst door innovatieve producten te maken, maar ook door CO2-neutraal te gaan.

Hoogwaardige technologie in een groen blikje? Dat is Rubio Monocoat!

-
Rubio Monocoat est une entreprise écologique basée à Izegem, en Belgique, qui fabrique des produits de protection et de coloration du bois de haute qualité en une seule couche. Nos produits sont hautement écologiques, durables et innovants. En outre, notre vaste gamme de couleurs offre des possibilités créatives infinies. Rubio Monocoat souhaite investir dans l'avenir en fabriquant des produits innovants, mais aussi en adoptant une attitude neutre en carbone.

Une technologie de haute qualité dans une boîte verte ? C'est Rubio Monocoat !

Name: Smith Creek, Inc.
Description:
At Smith Creek, we build strong and trusted relationships. We work closely with our customers to help ensure positive environmentally friendly outcomes that strengthen your business. Through our continuous improvement of current products, development of new ones, and the constant improvement of customer service satisfaction, we strive to be your most valued partner in the wood fiber industry.

From our sales representatives to our transportation department, we listen, respond, and continually strive to earn your confidence and cater to the needs of your business. The people behind the Smith Creek name have the drive, accountability, and competence you can depend on—a team that is dedicated to exceed your expectations for quality, service and support. To us, it’s not just about the products we offer, but also about the establishment of a lasting consultative relationship that benefits your business in an environmentally friendly, socially responsible fashion.

In the rapidly changing world of “Going Green”, ongoing learning and knowledge sharing are critical in providing green alternatives and ensuring the success of your business. Through our series of dedicated program offerings—the most comprehensive in the industry—we focus on the specific needs of each individual customer. Our industry-leading programs will teach you how to successfully incorporate socially responsible stewardship.

Name: La Caisserie des Vins
Description:
Basée à Claveysin (26), La Caisserie des Vins (anciennement EATB) conçoit et fabrique des emballages bois 100 % français destinés aux professionnels du vin, du champagne et des spiritueux, ainsi qu’aux acteurs de l’industrie, du bâtiment et de l’agencement.

De la caisse de présentation à la pièce technique sur mesure, chaque réalisation est pensée pour allier robustesse, précision et élégance.
Son savoir-faire :
• Fabrication de caisses bois : coffrets, caisses de transport et d’expédition, produits standards ou personnalisés, en petites et grandes séries.
• Création sur mesure : conception d’écrins adaptés aux plans verriers et aux besoins spécifiques des clients.
• Gamme de tasseaux bois : du brut de sciage au tasseau raboté et profilé, pour les métiers de l’agencement et du bâtiment.

Name: PNG Forest Products Limited
Description:
PNG Forest Products is an industry leader in Engineered Wood Products. Our extensive range of products and services for the domestic and export markets includes, treated pine timber and plywood; kit homes and pre-fabricated buildings; project construction and infrastructure development; and modular bridging and bridge decking systems.   

Employing over 1,500 Papua New Guineans, PNGFP is committed to building a better future through sustainable manufacturing practices.  All timber is sourced from the renewable pine plantations that are managed by the PNG Forestry Department. The boiler for the veneer driers and kilns is powered by recycled sawdust and wood chip waste from the mills. PNGFP also works in conjunction with the Department of Environment and Conservation to ensure that the best environmental practices are maintained.  In fact, PNG Forest Products is the only company in PNG that has achieved PEFC Chain of Custody accreditation on the basis of 100% controlled wood. PEFC, (Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification), is an international organisation that promotes sustainable forest management through independent third-party certification. PNGFP’s Chain of Custody certification demonstrates a commitment to sustainable forest management that is unique in this country.   

As a further commitment to sustainability, PNGFP’s manufacturing facilities in Bulolo are powered by PNGFP’s own Hydro Power stations. The combination of a renewable timber resource processed with sustainable hydro power makes PNGFP’s engineered wood products truly and uniquely 100% green.

As portas Vert são produzidas através do exclusivo sistema HDF – High Density Fiberboard, a mais avançada tecnologia em fabricação de portas no mundo, que assegura solidez e durabilidade superior à da madeira maciça, além de proporcionar estabilidade diante de umidade.

O cuidado com a preservação ambiental já se encontra associado à origem do nome Vert, que significa verde em francês e é a cor que identifica a natureza. Sua fabricação é com madeira reflorestada, a matéria-prima é reciclada e os materiais descartados são totalmente reutilizados.

Name: The Barrel Group
Description:
Elevating Spirit, Empowering Craft.

Barrel Brokers is a cherished family-owned venture rooted in the heart of regional Victoria. Born from a passion for exceptional craftsmanship, this business has become a beacon of excellence in the world of aging spirits, beer, and wine. With a steadfast commitment to quality, we scour the globe to source only the finest barrels, ensuring that each one tells a story of unparalleled artistry and dedication. With a legacy forged in tradition and a vision set on the horizon, we invite you to savour the fruits of our labour, and discover how our barrels transform ordinary beverages into extraordinary libations.
 
However, our commitment to supplying the finest barrels extends far beyond sourcing. With an extensive R & D process, we subject over 300 of our own in house barrels each year to a multitude of cooperage methods. This meticulous experimentation allows us to uncover the subtle alchemy that transforms a good barrel into an extraordinary one.
 
Before these barrels begin their seasoning process, they undergo a rigorous regimen of techniques, each designed to unlock the full potential of the wood. From toasting to charring, each step is executed with precision, guided by the expertise of our seasoned cooperage artisans. This process is a testament to our dedication to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the world of aging spirits, beer, and wine.
 
To further refine our craft, we partner with a diverse array of fortified wines and spirits, subjecting our barrels to an array of flavours and influences. This dynamic collaboration empowers us to discern the nuances, to uncover the secrets that lie within the heart of the wood.
 
Our Research and Development process is a testament to our unyielding pursuit of excellence. It is through this tireless dedication that we continue to redefine what's achievable in the world in the world of barrel aging, ensuring that every product that bears our name is a masterpiece.

Name: Henry Millet
Description:
Henry Millet, un siècle de savoir-faire

L’histoire de la scierie Henry Millet commence en 1919, au sortir de la Grande Guerre lorsqu’il fallait mobiliser toutes les énergies pour reconstruire la France. Henry Millet ouvre une scierie à Ouzouer-sur-Loire, dans le Loiret, à proximité immédiate de la forêt d’Orléans, le plus vaste massif forestier Français.

Le fondateur met en place l’organisation d’une filière toujours d’actualité : l’exploitation forestière pour sélectionner les meilleurs arbres sur pied, la scierie pour transformer les grumes en bois d’œuvre (planches, avivés, poutres, plots), la parqueterie pour la fabrication du parquet et des panneaux massifs et la commercialisation pour écouler la production.

Son fils Roger prendra la suite et développera ce savoir-faire basé sur la force de la tradition et de l’excellence. Depuis, le flambeau a été repris par le Groupe Barillet entreprise familiale qui poursuit l’œuvre engagée avec des moyens supplémentaires.

Name: Sylvaco
Description:
Sylvaco, un distributeur expert du bois et éco responsable.
Depuis plusieurs années, sa large gamme de sciages, contreplaqués et produits à base de bois élaborés, a donné à Sylvaco une position de premier plan dans les univers de la distribution et de l’industrie. Sylvaco est par ailleurs engagée dans une démarche éco-responsable, plus de la moitié de son offre bénéficiant aujourd’hui d'une certification forestière.
L’offre très large de Sylvaco, qui comprend notamment des contreplaqués toutes essences de bois, complète utilement celle du Groupe Malvaux pour offrir au marché une large gamme de solutions techniques et décoratives à base d’essences fines. 

Sylvaco apporte à sa clientèle son expertise technique et commerciale reconnue, son « savoir-acheter » éco-responsable, son stock permanent de plus de 30 000 m3, et une infrastructure logistique nationale qui compte quatre dépôts stratégiques à Loulay (Charente-Maritime), Caen (Calvados), Gennevilliers (Ile de France) et Sète (Hérault). 

Notre équipe commerciale est présente sur toute la France pour vous satisfaire dans les meilleurs délais et vous apporter les conseils nécessaires.

Description: Woodpecker runs the largest wood manufacturing facility in Central America and is engaged in the design and manufacturing of tropical wood products and solutions for the construction, retail and furniture industries. Our company operates a 16.000m2 manufacturing facility where we produce an extensive product range of wood-based products (lumber, profiles, panels, beams, columns and consumer products including table tops and RTA furniture components) made in FSC Certified TEAK. The company has active domestic and worldwide customers in the construction industry, furniture industry, wood and flooring retailers, and DIY markets. Woodpecker FSC Certified teak products shine outdoor and indoor including in patios, kitchens, bathrooms and also bedrooms, offices, hotels and shops. Woodpecker is developing skills to become the leading full-range FSC Certified teak products supplier for the furniture industry, interior design, wood construction, and wood flooring (solid and engineering) industries. Woodpecker has extensive experience creating high-end wood solutions for windows, doors and engineered components and we are open to hear your ideas to support your next project.

TechWood is brought to you by Chemical Technologies Holding, Corp.

Name: Avenir Bois - Entreprise Etudiante de l'ENSTIB
Description:
Avenir Bois est l’Entreprise Etudiante de l'ENSTIB (Ecole Nationale Supérieure des Technologies et Industries du Bois).

C'est une association implantée au sein d’une école d’ingénieur spécialisée dans le bois. Cette association fonctionne comme une entreprise, son bureau est entièrement dirigé par des étudiants.

Nous réalisons l’ensemble de vos projets d’ingénierie « bois »  dans les domaines de la construction, l’ameublement, la chimie et l’énergie. La halle technologique de notre établissement nous donnent la possibilité d’intervenir sur l’intégralité des aspects d’un projet de construction ou d’ameublement : de l’étude jusqu’à la réalisation en passant par le dimensionnement et la conception de plan. Pour les domaines de la chimie et de l’énergie nos équipements nous permettent d’étudier l’humidité d’une essence et sa perméabilité ou d’effectuer des calculs de PCI (Pouvoir Calorifique Inférieur) et de PCS (Pouvoir Calorifique Supérieur).

Nos étudiants, encadrés par de nombreux enseignants chercheurs (Lermab, CrittBois… ), sauront vous satisfaire ! Laissez leur simplement l’opportunité de vous le prouver.

Name: Gruppo GB Srl
Description:
Gruppo GB nasce dalla storica Falegnameria della famiglia Giubilato, un'azienda a conduzione familiare con forti radici regionali e una grande tradizione artigianale. 30 anni di esperienza si sono sviluppati in un’azienda solida dove tradizione, design made in Italy e tecnologia si ritrovano in ogni lavorazione.
La passione per le nuove sfide e l’ascolto dei bisogni dei nostri clienti ci hanno portato a sviluppare quattro settori apparentemente distanti, ma che hanno come filo conduttore l’evoluzione nella progettazione per fornire al cliente un prodotto sicuro e studiato nel minimo dettaglio. Grazie alla positiva risposta del mercato la Falegnameria si è trasformata da azienda a conduzione familiare a una realtà strutturata: il Gruppo GB, che oggi vanta 4 divisioni interne: 

GB TECHNOLOGY: eseguiamo lavorazioni conto terzi grazie ad un ampio reparto di macchine utensili a controllo numerico abbinato a strumenti informatici all’avanguardia che ci permettono di lavorare svariati materiali.

FACCIATA CREATIVA: Nel campo dell’architettura sviluppiamo di progetti di pareti ventilate. Grazie alla conoscenza dei materiali da impiegare ed alla possibilità di proporre diversi tipi di rivestimento esterno, siamo in grado passare facilmente dalla preventivazione all’ingegnerizzazione della facciata con l’elaborazione di disegni esecutivi e costruttivi e quindi alla messa in opera della parete stessa.

GB OUTDOOR: Progettiamo e realizziamo pergole bioclimatiche, tettoie, moderne casette da giardino di design e strutture polivalenti per godersi un autentico relax en plein air.

GB HORSE: La profonda passione per il mondo equestre e la ferrea volontà di trasformare una visione in realtà hanno creato questa divisione aziendale che progetta, realizza ed installa strutture per l’allenamento del cavallo. Dalle giostre, ai tondini fino al maneggio completo e alla clubhouse, in continua evoluzione sia dal punto di vista della sicurezza che della performance.

Name: Virat Plywood
Description:
Virat Plywood, a division of Ramneek International, is a renowned manufacturer and distributor of premium plywood products. With a proud history of more than three decades, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the industry. Our dedication to innovation, sustainability, and customer satisfaction sets us apart from our competitors.

Since its establishment in 1990, Virat Plywood Private Limited has been the largest plywood manufacturing unit in Punjab. Equipped with state-of-the-art machinery, we have been industry leaders for over 33 years. Our expansive plant, spanning 14 acres in Punjab, is one of India's largest standalone plywood units. Our team of 500 professionals is committed to enhancing productivity and ensuring top-notch plywood quality. We have a strong presence across 25 states and 300 cities.

We hold various certifications that demonstrate our unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability. These certifications include ISO 9001 for quality management systems, ISO 14001 for environmental management, and certifications for a range of plywood products, such as IS-710 (Marine plywood), IS-1659 (premium blackboard range), IS-303 (BWR plywood), IS-2202 (Flush Doors), and IS-4990 (film faced plywood, chequered plywood, metal enforced trucks flooring).

With a focus on excellence, sustainability, and customer satisfaction, Plywood Products is your trusted provider of high-quality plywood products. Whether you require plywood for construction, furniture, or other applications, we have the expertise and variety to meet your needs. Partner with us today and witness the difference that Plywood Products can make in your projects.

Algonquin Mouldings, your reference for superior wood solutions: our complete line of customizable products is designed to exceed your customers' expectations.

As a strategic partner, Algonquin Mouldings is committed to redefining the standards of the woodworking industry. We offer you personalized service, undeniable expertise, continuous innovation, and a deep commitment to ecology.

Choose Algonquin Mouldings to take your woodworking projects to the next level. 

Our expertise for your excellence.

Name: Logispan B.V.
Description:
Logispan group is a young and dynamic company, which in its brief history has become a professional enterprise with a wide range of products.

The right mindset
Our trading mentality, the quality of our products and a well-equipped in-house transport department forms the basis of our business in which about 20 people are employed.

Expertise is our nature
Our expert field staff advise the customer tailored, by paying constant attention to training and education the knowledge is required for the optimum use and application of our residual wood and soil products at a high level .

Name: Waller + Wood Woodworks
Description: Bespoke woodwork, furniture and joinery from Alex Waller and Tom Wood.

Name: Wood Industry Cluster Slovenia
Description:
The Wood Industry Cluster comprises a third of the employees in the Slovenian wood-processing industry and the most important research institutions in Slovenia.
We support Slovenian wood and furniture companies in development, internationalisation, training, etc.The common goal of all these activities is to strengthen the competitiveness of the cluster members.

Name: Panelenfabriek.nl
Description:
𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐤𝐨𝐦 𝐛𝐢𝐣 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐟𝐚𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐤.𝐧𝐥 – 𝐮𝐰 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫 𝐢𝐧 𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐠𝐰𝐚𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐢𝐠𝐞 𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐧!
Bij Panelenfabriek.nl zijn we trots op het produceren van massieve houten verlijmde panelen en tafelbladen in onze moderne fabriek in Heerenveen. Wij bedienen zowel hobbyisten als professionals met een uitgebreid assortiment, waaronder Eiken, Europees Essen, Gestoomd Beuken, Mahonie en meer. Omdat wij over een grote voorraad hout beschikken, kunnen wij meestal snel leveren.

𝑴𝒂𝒂𝒕𝒘𝒆𝒓𝒌 𝒗𝒐𝒐𝒓 𝒆𝒍𝒌 𝒑𝒓𝒐𝒋𝒆𝒄𝒕
Wij bieden maatwerkoplossingen, van tafelbladen tot meubelpanelen en traptreden, afgestemd op uw wensen. Ons deskundige team staat klaar om u te adviseren en te ondersteunen bij elk project, zodat uw visie werkelijkheid wordt.

𝑩𝒆𝒕𝒓𝒐𝒖𝒘𝒃𝒂𝒂𝒓𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒅, 𝒗𝒂𝒌𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒔𝒄𝒉𝒂𝒑 𝒆𝒏 𝒅𝒆𝒔𝒌𝒖𝒏𝒅𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒅
Wij streven naar de hoogste kwaliteit en klanttevredenheid. Betrouwbaarheid, vakmanschap en deskundigheid vormen de kernwaarden van onze bedrijfsvoering. We zetten ons in om u altijd te voorzien van de beste service en maatwerkoplossingen.

𝑾𝒂𝒂𝒓𝒐𝒎 𝒌𝒊𝒆𝒛𝒆𝒏 𝒗𝒐𝒐𝒓 𝒐𝒏𝒔?
Met een breed assortiment kwaliteitsproducten, scherpe prijzen en een klantgerichte aanpak, zijn wij uw ideale partner voor al uw houtbehoeften. Bezoek onze fabriek, die tevens als showroom dient en ontdek wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen.

Name: Schneider Innenausbau AG
Description:
Uns gibt’s schon lange, und das aus einem einfachen Grund: Wir setzen alles daran, die Vorstellungen unserer Kunden genau so zu realisieren, wie sie es wünschen.

Aus diesem Grund legen wir Wert auf partnerschaftliche Unternehmensführung, Selbstverantwortung des Teams, kreatives Mitdenken, hohe Qualitätsansprüche und den Einsatz versierter Spezialistinnen und Spezialisten. 

Im Innenausbau haben wir uns auf die Bereiche Küchenbau, Gastrobetriebe und Geschäftseinrichtungen spezialisiert.

Dank der firmeninternen Planung und Gestaltung, profitieren Privat-, wie auch Geschäftskunden von einer reibungslosen Abwicklung ihrer Projekte. Unsere Spezialistinnen und Spezialisten unterstützen Sie von der Planung und Projektierung, bis hin zur Baukoordination und Ausführung,

Gerne arbeitet die Schneider Innenausbau AG auch mit Fachleuten für Inneneinrichtung und Architektur oder mit Projektleitungen zusammen, was bei komplexen Projekten ein bewährtes Vorgehen ist.

Name: Falcon Trading Company SAS
Description:
Somos un equipo interdisciplinario que con procedimientos sostenibles con el medio ambiente hacemos corte, transporte, transformación y exportación de madera teca de cultivo reforestada.

Falcon Trading Company SAS, es una compañía colombiana exportadora de madera reforestada hacia países de Asia, Europa y Estados Unidos, que respeta los derechos humanos, el medio ambiente y la diversidad.

We are an interdisciplinary team that with environmentally sustainable procedures we cut, transport, transform and export reforested cultivated teak wood.

Falcon Trading Company SAS, is a Colombian company that exports reforested wood to countries in Asia, Europe and the United States, respecting human rights, the environment and diversity.

Name: SEVA emballages
Description:
SEVA SOCIETE D'EMBALLAGES est une entreprise connue dans le secteur de l'emballage des fruits et légumes.

Intégrée, l'entreprise dispose de sa propre exploitation forestière. Elle écorce et déroule des peupliers situés sur les bords de Loire.
Elle fabrique l'ensemble des produits SEVA Emballages, qui sont ensuite distribués sur un grand quart Ouest de la France.

Des emballages qui répondent parfaitement aux contraintes environnementales actuelles : 100% Biodégradable, 100% Écologique, 100% Recyclable, 100% Naturel.

La France a une longue tradition de produits agricoles de haute gamme et de valeur ajoutée. De plus, il s'agit sans doute d'un pays pionnier en ce qui concerne le respect pour l'environnement et la durabilité. Tous ces faits sont en concordance avec la philosophie sous-jacente des caisses SEVA Emballages.

Name: AMEXBOIS
Description:
Amexbois est une entreprise spécialisée dans la conception d’aménagements extérieurs sur-mesure en bois, exclusivement destinée aux professionnels. Alliant technologies de pointe et savoir-faire artisanal, Amexbois se distingue par la qualité, la facilité de pose, ainsi que par l’esthétisme et la durabilité de ses ouvrages.

L’entreprise accompagne ses clients à chaque étape, de l’arbre sur pied au produit fini, pour des créations sur-mesure, à la fois esthétiques, fonctionnelles et parfaitement adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet.

Engagée pour un développement durable, Amexbois est certifiée Bois de France, PEFC et Fabriqué en France, garantissant non seulement la qualité des produits, mais aussi le respect des normes environnementales et une origine responsable.

Name: Silvadec
Description:
Born in 2001, Silvadec was the first company to manufacture wood composite in Europe. Based on a North American technology mastered for 25 years, Silvadec has developed a unique formulation of composite wood (2/3 wood flour, 1/3 polyethylene). 
Silvadec products are 100% recyclable, the company is PEFC, ISO 14001, ISO 50001 certified. Silvadec has drawn up an EPD for decking and cladding in 2019. The company has an eco-responsible policy and meets strict environmental standards.

Name: BURBAN PALETTES RECYCLAGE
Description:
Chez Burban, nous sommes 650 collaborateurs répartis sur 30 sites en France, engagés dans la mission passionnante de donner une seconde vie aux palettes usagées. Chaque année, nous revalorisons pas moins de 15 millions de palettes, agissant ainsi à la préservation de nos ressources.

Depuis notre création il y a plus de 35 ans, notre groupe s’est engagé en faveur de valeurs qui nous tiennent à cœur : le recyclage, la préservation de notre environnement et le bien être de nos collaborateurs.

Name: Rubio Monocoat
Description:
Rubio Monocoat is an ecological company in Izegem, Belgium, that makes high-quality wood protection and colouring in one layer. Our products are highly ecological, sustainable and innovative. In addition, our extensive colour range ensures endless creative options. Rubio Monocoat wants to invest in the future, by making innovative products, but also by going carbon neutral. 

High technology in a green can? That's Rubio Monocoat!

Name: Hoover Treated Wood Products, Inc.
Description:
Hoover Treated Wood Products is the largest producer of fire retardant treated wood in the world.

In business since 1955, Hoover Treated Wood Products has grown from a single plant location to a specialty treater, with ten strategically located plants and a network of stocking distributors able to service customers nationwide.

Products include Pyro-Guard and Exterior Fire-X fire retardant lumber and plywood.

 Hoover is a  fast growing company with room for upward mobility.   Hoover offers a comprehensive benefits package that includes competitive wages, a 401(k) including company match, medical, dental, life and disability insurance, paid holidays and vacation, annual bonus and profit sharing.

Name: Hamberger Flooring Gmbh & Co. Kg
Description: HARO - Germany's market-leading parquet manufacturer. Parquet, Laminate Floor, Cork Floor, Linoleum Floor, CELENIO wood tiles and parkettmanufaktur.

Name: Biewer Lumber
Description:
Biewer is a fourth-generation, family-owned group of companies. We are proud to supply the highest quality lumber, superior service, and exceptional reliability. We have been delivering the best products and services to our customers since our beginning over 70 years ago.

Biewer’s family of companies include:

Biewer Lumber, LLC

Name: best wood SCHNEIDER
Description:
best wood SCHNEIDER is a manufacturer of wood fiber insulation boards (flexible and pressure-resistant), as well as of all statically loaded wood products (such as glulam, glulam ceilings, wooden box elements, DUO/TRIO beams and KVH solid structural timber) for the modern construction of timber houses and passive houses. Our production site is located in the south of Germany.
 
Follow us for company and product updates, news about timber & sustainable building.

Description:

Name: Pfleiderer Deutschland
Description:
Die Pfleiderer Gruppe ist ein führender Holzwerkstoffhersteller in Europa mit einem jährlichen Umsatz von ca. 700 Mio. Euro und rund 2.000 Mitarbeitern. Das Unternehmen hat seinen Hauptsitz in Neumarkt i.d.OPf. (Deutschland). Pfleiderer verfügt über fünf Produktionsstandorte in Deutschland und einen in Polen sowie Vertriebsniederlassungen in England, Niederlande, Schweiz, Rumänien und Frankreich. Pfleiderer bietet ein komplettes Angebot von Produkten und Serviceleistungen mit einem Fokus auf Möbelbau, Holzfachhandel, Innenausbau und konstruktivem Holzbau und bündelt unter der Dachmarke Pfleiderer die Produktsortimente von Duropal und Thermopal und ist Partner von Industrie, Handel, Handwerk, Planern und Architekten.

Impressum: https://www.pfleiderer.com/dach-de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://www.pfleiderer.com/dach-de/datenschutz

Name: SWISS KRONO Polska
Description:
SWISS KRONO sp. z o.o., dawniej KRONOPOL; jesteśmy renomowanym producentem płyt wiórowych, MDF i OSB, blatów kuchennych, paneli podłogowych i laminatów HPL. Jesteśmy polskim oddziałem SZWAJCARSKIEJ GRUPY KRONO, koncernu zatrudniającego 5000osób.
Jedna z największych firm w województwie lubuskim. Stabilny pracodawca dla 1000osób, które średnio wiążą się ze SWISS KRONO na 16lat!

European quality flooring brand, HPL & worktops manufacturer - become our distributor! 

Buscamos nuevos distribuidores para vender pisos laminados resistentes al agua en América Latina!

SWISS KRONO Pologne offre un éventail de sol stratifiés résistant à l’eau. Nous cherchons des distributeurs nouveaux. Si vous êtes intéressé, veuillez nous contacter pour recevoir l’exclusivité de distribution et une possibilité d’encadrer votre marché.

Name: Manadena
Description: In today's modern world, beauty, comfort, and functionality are the three key elements in designing spaces that reflect the grandeur and magnificence of contemporary times. Since 2019, Manadana, as a designer and manufacturer of luxury-grade cabinets and closets, has demonstrated its commitment to creating unparalleled and unique works. By leveraging the art and creativity of renowned designers, Manadana seamlessly integrates beauty and functionality into each of its products. Beyond meeting consumer needs, Manadana offers something beyond their expectations, symbolizing unparalleled quality, luxury, and excellence in the interior decoration industry. Our constant aim is to create unique and exceptional spaces for our clients. In a fully industrialized factory with advanced production lines and a team of experienced and creative specialists, Manadana has endeavored to bring the latest technology into this industry. The result of these efforts is the delivery of products that comfortably compete with renowned global brands such as Boffi, Valcucine, and Poggenpohle. Every project at Manadana is considered a masterpiece, designed and executed with the highest precision and elegance.

Name: The Millwork Studio - Shop Drawings
Description: The Millwork Studio is transforming millwork drafting for the next era of construction and design. We deliver shop drawings that merge advanced technology with real-world fabrication insight, creating clear, build-ready documentation that sets tomorrow’s standard—today.

Name: Junnikkala Oy
Description:
Junnikkala on osa Stora Ensoa. 

Junnikkalan sahat sijaitsevat Kalajoella, Oulussa ja Oulaisissa.

Name: Randa Portas Molduras e Compensados
Description: Pioneira em seu segmento e com mais de 30 anos de experiência, a Randa detém de uma das mais modernas fábricas de portas e compensados da América Latina.

Name: Zwarthout
Description:
Zwarthout | Shou Sugi Ban produces exclusive wood products by treating the wood with fire. Our charring masters char each wooden board in our own furnace, resulting in a unique, sustainable charred layer. The special Shou Sugi Ban burning technique we use is inspired by an age-old Japanese tradition. 

Over the past few years, we have completed hundreds of special projects with our exclusive black charred wood for sustainable façade cladding and interiors. Together with leading architects, contractors, project developers and enthusiastic individuals.

Name: Sifar Placcati
Description:
Sifar Placcati opera dal 1969 nel mondo del legno, in particolare nella produzione di tranciato e pannelli placcati. Gli oltre 50 anni di esperienza maturati, ci hanno consentito di sviluppare un notevole know how sull’essenze e approfondite conoscenze tecniche sui migliori metodi di lavorazione, rendendoci una azienda leader e un punto di riferimento nel settore.

Riusciamo a rispondere prontamente alle richieste dei nostri clienti, offrendo soluzioni mirate e all’avanguardia. Natura e tecnica, combinate ad esperienza e dedizione, ci hanno consentito di migliorare costantemente la nostra gamma, fornendo un prodotto e un servizio altamente personalizzato. Professionalità, qualità dei prodotti e vicinanza al cliente sono per noi un impegno costante.

Sifar Placcati is an Italian company which has been manufacturing veneered panels and cutting veneers since 1969. Thanks to the skills and the competence of the people working for the company and to important investments made by the ownership, Sifar has expanded the quality and the range of its products, introducing new composite panels for yachts and super-yachts.

Sifar has more than 40 years experience in veneer and veneered board production. Nature, technology and method together with experience and innovation has allowed Sifar to gradually grow and to become renown in the most demanding European markets.

Name: D&D Wood
Description:
D&D WOOD is a Riyadh-based wood service center specializing in high-precision cutting, CNC machining, and edge banding for melamine chipboards. We serve carpenters, furniture manufacturers, interior designers, and contractors across Saudi Arabia who demand accuracy, speed, and quality.

With over 20 years of industry experience behind our team, we operate advanced equipment including beam saw machines and 14-stage edge banding systems. We work primarily with top-tier boards from STARWOOD and Rheinspan to ensure consistency and performance.

At D&D WOOD, we’re committed to helping professionals deliver perfectly cut and finished wood panels — on time and to spec. Whether you need custom dimensions, sharp edges, or optimized production, we’re your reliable processing partner.

 Based in Badr District, Riyadh

Name: Groupe Malvaux
Description:
Leader européen de solutions durables en bois et dérivés de toutes natures pour la distribution et pour les aménagements intérieurs et extérieurs de leur conception à leur installation.

Acteur de référence dans l’aménagement intérieur de prestige dans les secteurs du nautisme, du ferroviaire et de l’hôtellerie de luxe. Notre groupe s'est constitué autour d'un engagement fort : donner au bois et à ses essences rares une place de choix en agencement.

Les entreprises qui le compose sont autant d'acteurs reconnus pour leurs savoir-faire et les compétences multiples développées dans de nombreux domaines d'expertise.

En collaboration avec des designers ou architectes d'intérieurs, les filiales du Groupe Malvaux, premier fabricant français de panneaux essences fines et de contreplaqués techniques, assurent en toute complémentarité, les études, la conception, la fabrication et l'installation de chaque projet qui leurs sont confiés.

Name: Kronospan UK
Description:
Kronospan is one of the world's leading manufacturers of wood-based panels and value-added products for the interior design, furniture, and construction industries. 

As the leader in technical development in our industry, we have pioneered many key advances and will continue to lead product development and innovation into the future. For over a century Kronospan has been meeting its customers’ needs with an unbeatable combination of great design, quality products, value for money, respect for the environment, and outstanding service. 

We are driven by a passion for our business and strive for excellence in everything we do.

Get more detailed product information on www.kronospan.com 
Corporate website: www.kronospan-worldwide.com 
Kronospan Foundation: www.kronospanfoundation.org

Name: France Poutres
Description: France Poutres, industriel et distributeur de solutions constructives bois, vous offre une large gamme de solutions et de produits techniques bois. En constante évolution, France Poutres présente tous les atouts pour répondre au mieux à vos projets de charpentes et constructions bois. Distributeur et fabricant d’une gamme complète de produits techniques bois, France Poutres s’est concentré depuis de nombreuses années sur un réel savoir-faire et a mis en place une offre de kits structurels de planchers, toitures et de bâtiments ossature bois complets.

Name: Protac
Description:
Fabricant français, spécialiste des produits bois pour l'habitat (large gamme de bardage), l'aménagement extérieur (terrasse,clôture) et intérieur (lambris) depuis plus de 20 ans. 

Filiale du Groupe ROSE, la création de PROTAC est issue d’une volonté constante de maîtrise de la qualité des bois utilisés au sein du Groupe.

Les bois sont issus de forêts gérées durablement, certifiées PEFC ou FSC. Ils sont en majorité résineux, importés en fonction de l’essence et de la qualité souhaitée.
Les bois de PROTAC proviennent principalement d’exploitation située au-dessus du 57e parallèle, ce sont des bois à pousse lente, les plus qualitatifs du marché, appelés Bois du Nord.

La qualité des bois de chez Protac ne résulte pas seulement de sa provenance mais également de la surveillance de son hygrométrie (pourcentage à ne pas dépasser) et de sa qualité de séchage (à l'abri) avant l'usinage, le traitement et l'application d'une finition (peinture ou saturateur). 
 
Dates importantes : 

2007, marquera un tournant dans la stratégie de PROTAC, par la mise en place d’une usine de finition peinture pour les produits bois

Pour assurer son développement continuel, PROTAC lance une deuxième chaîne de peinture (l’une des plus modernes d’Europe) et une plateforme logistique en 2012

PROTAC s’ouvre à l’international et se rapproche de la source de la matière première en faisant l’acquisition d’une raboterie en Estonie : Puidukoda » en fin 2013.

www.protacfrance.com
www.grouperose.com

Suivez-nous sur les réseaux sociaux !

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/protacfrance/
Pinterest : https://fr.pinterest.com/protac5284/
Facebook :https://www.facebook.com/Protac-France-1697781253885182/

Name: ARCWOOD
Description:
Operating as a family business since 2002, ARCWOOD has become one of the leading manufacturers of timber constructions in the Baltic States. We have been pioneers in producing CLT (cross-laminated timber) in Estonia and the Baltic States since 2014, bringing innovative and sustainable solutions to the market. 

What we provide: 

Design: Our engineering solutions include the design of both CLT and glulam structures. 

 Manufacturing: Focusing on special projects for CLT and glulam, we offer complete solutions from design to finished product, including complex CNC machining.
 
 Assembly: Our professional assembly of CLT and glulam structures ensures quality and accuracy. 

We export around 60% of our production, reaching customers in Europe, Scandinavia, and Asia. 
We are committed to flexibility and efficiency in the construction sector, providing innovative solutions for timber structures.

Name: Grupo Agrosepac
Description:
O Grupo Agrosepac iniciou as suas atividades florestais na década de 60. Fundadas pelos irmãos médicos Dr. Amilcar Dias e Dr. João Dias. Inicialmente a empresa surgiu como SEPAC - Papel e Celulose, que realizou uma cisão em 2001, ficando o grupo AGROSEPAC com toda a operação florestal.

Com a expansão das frentes de negócio, à partir da nova gestão dos herdeiros, a Agrsoeapc se transformou em Grupo Agrosepac. Hoje nós exportamos um rol cada vez maior de produtos para todos os continentes, levando a marca cada vez mais longe.

Hoje possuímos aproximadamente 6200 hectares de terras, sendo 3100 hectares de reflorestamentos de pinus

Contamos com uma equipe de 420+ colaboradores , uma estrutura completa de Viveiro Florestal, com produção de até 1,5 milhão de mudas de pinus  e 300 mil mudas de erva mate por ano, sendo uma parte comercializada e a maior parte utilizada nos plantios em suas áreas.

Name: E. VIGOLUNGO Plywood
Description:
A wood culture that combines industrial mentality with a willingness to constantly and deeply study all aspects of wood and its technologies, as well as with care for the environment through the use of environmentally friendly technologies and products.
Vigolungo Emilio (1915-2004): he is the one who is able to turn the family’s handicraft business into an industrial one. Emilio thinks of diversifying the activity so in a new plant he starts the production of plywood.
Towards the end of 1966, Emilio’s son, Vigolungo Pietro, joins the firm. Having acquired a good theoretical knowledge at the École Supérieure du Bois in Paris, he brings in new technology, therefore all his efforts concentrate on the new production of plywood and multi-layer panels. 
The latest Vigolungo generation, Pietro’s children, are joining the Company one after the other:
Emilio Vigolungo: Since 1997 in the Marketing Department, he is in charge with the domestic and foreign markets. At present he is the firm’s CEO.
Vera Vigolungo: After graduation she had important work experiences at big Companies both in Italy and abroad. Since April 2004, she has been responsible for the Administration and the Personnel Departments. At present she is the firm’s Financial Manager.
Stefano Vigolungo: at the end of his studies in Wood Technologies at Florence’s Faculty of Agriculture, he will join the Production Department after a work experience abroad at a firm in the same line of business. At present he is a member of the Company’s Board of Directors.
With its production plant and warehouse as well its domestic sales department, IN.CO Industria Compensati, has been in the wood sector for over 40 years.
In January 2006 IN.CO. merged with E.Vigolungo S.p.A. with the objective to further expand their exports and to increase their range of products.
Now be part of it!!

Name: Gadimat
Description:
Société d'importation et de négoce de bois et produits dérivés :

Bois Rouge, Bois Blanc, Pin, Bois Durs, Bois Tropicaux, Poutre H20, Panneaux (Contreplaqué Okoumé, CP Essences Fines, CP Bakélisé, MDF, MDF HG, Panneaux Particules, Isorel, Isodécor, ), Vernis, Bande de chants

Name: DROUIN SAS
Description:
Installés en Sarthe, à Mézières-sur-Ponthouin, nous exploitons et transformons le bois depuis plus de cent ans. 

Nous proposons à nos clients en France et en Europe du contreplaqué de haute qualité répondant à des secteurs variés tels que l'industrie du bâtiment, l'emballage industriel, le nautisme, la carrosserie industrielle, les véhicules de transport utilitaires, l'agencement et la fabrication de mobilier. 

Nous répondons aux attentes de nos clients sur les produits suivants : 
- contreplaqué (peuplier, okoumé, flexible, peuplifeu, chauffé, ...)
- usinage (éléments et meubles d'aménagement de véhicules, panneaux acoustiques usinés, éléments d'emballage, panneaux usinés pour l'agencement, ...)
- caisserie (caisses pliantes, export, garde-meubles, ...)

Nous nous appuyons sur la qualité de nos produits. Dès 1998, nous avons entrepris la démarche de certification ISO 9001 et depuis 2005, nous sommes adhérents à l'écocertification forestière PEFC. 

Nos produits sont certifiés Bois de France.

Soucieux de pérenniser notre approvisionnement en peuplier, nous sommes, depuis 2011, engagés dans le renouvellement de la ressource par l'intermédiaire de la charte "Merci le Peuplier".

Name: Danzer
Description:
𝗗𝗮𝗻𝘇𝗲𝗿 – 𝗛𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘄𝗼𝗼𝗱 𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲. 𝗦𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝟭𝟵𝟯𝟮.

Danzer is an international hardwood company: We are the world’s largest producer of decorative sliced wood and one of the top manufacturers of high-end lumber in North America – serving customers in more than 70 countries from 12 sales offices worldwide. 

Our clients – including wood retailers, component producers, branded manufacturers, architects and designers – rely on us to elevate their products and projects with the timeless appeal of beautiful hardwood. Our product range includes logs, sliced wood and lumber as well as value-added wood products for decorative applications such as high-quality furniture, automobiles and interior decoration.

With state-of-the-art production facilities in North America and Central Europe, we source wood exclusively from trusted suppliers in the world’s most valuable hardwood regions. This enables us to deliver superior quality while maintaining most responsible practices, including full compliance with the European Union Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) and all major certification standards.

Founded in 1932 and rooted in German tradition, Danzer is a family-run business now in its third generation. With more than 90 years of hardwood expertise, we combine heritage with forward-thinking innovation to build long-term partnerships with our customers, suppliers and network allies.

Elevate your brand with the natural elegance of hardwood.

Connect with us on LinkedIn or visit our website to learn more.

Description:

Depois de pesquisa junto ao mercado, optou pelo FSC – Forest Stewardship Council (Conselho de Manejo Florestal), por ser um certificado reconhecido mundialmente, o qual tem por objetivo estabelecer padrões internacionais que garantem o manejo responsável das florestas.

Name: Panguaneta Plywood
Description:
Panguaneta is an authentic Italian family company with a core business consisting in the production of Poplar Plywood with innovative performance features. 
Thanks to the determination of our founders Giuliano Azzi and Antonio Tenca, Panguaneta established its factory in 1960, in the city of Sabbioneta, today a UNESCO World Heritage site.
Family, environment, transparency and loyalty to its origins: Panguaneta strongly believes in business transparency and respect. 
Being part of Panguaneta means to share these values, essential for the success of our company.
With a focus on our human resources, we dedicate our approach to learning, allowing our people to unleash their ideas, drive innovation and develop the highly specialized skills they need to succeed.
Deeply rooted in the land of its birth, Panguaneta is the driving force of a concrete sustainability, which involves every corporate asset. 
Our agricultural techniques and plantation management follow the principles of environmental sustainability and biodiversity. 
Year after year, one certification after the other, the desire to compete in excellence, while respecting the territory and environment, we became responsible custodians of a coordinated supply chain.
Panguaneta is the faithful picture of products bearing “Made in Italy” label, skilfully involving every phase of the industrial life cycle with spinoffs in terms of valuable partnerships with producers, designers and architects throughout the world. 
Today Panguaneta flagship activity is the production of a plywood recognized as the undisputed leader for quality and trendsetter for its wide range, distributed worldwide through the best organized network thanks to exclusive partnerships with the leading actors of our industry sector.

Panguaneta Plywood: the most efficient, resistant, versatile, obtained through the selection of the best raw materials.

This is our story, a modern tale and a great book whose next chapters are about to be written ...

Name: ThermalWood Canada
Description:
ThermalWood Canada is a manufacturing plant which specializes in thermally modifying any species of wood, using a heat and steam system that requires zero chemical additives. 

Located in Bathurst, New Brunswick, ThermalWood Canada is a family-owned business who prides themselves on processing any species of wood, with a speciality in hardwoods. 

This heating process essentially cooks the wood, improving its resistance to decay, and creating a uniform dark colouration throughout the thickness of the lumber. This allows woods like maple, birch, ash, oak, and other hardwoods, which are normally used for indoor projects, to be modified for outdoor applications, like siding, paneling, and decking.  

ThermalWood Canada works with guitar manufacturers. The thermal modifying process creates humidity resistance bodies and necks, that produce stability. This allows musicians the ease of playing without re-tuning their guitar every 15 or 20 minutes. The unique tone replaces 20 to 35 years of natural air drying to give the guitars a vintage sound.  They also work with architects, designers, contractors, and end users to find a thermally modified option that best suits their needs.

President of ThermalWood Canada, Bob Lennon, also created “The Northern Heat Report” video series, as a way to sit and create important dialogue with some of the region’s best and brightest leaders. The term “Northern Heat” best describes their approach to business and life. You can watch it here: https://www.youtube.com/@thermalwoodcanada

They bring the heat to their own work, ensuring a vibrant and strong region ripe with opportunities. But they don’t forget other important leaders, the underestimated, who are also turning up the heat.

Name: A&A Recycling Services Limited
Description:
At A&A Recycling Services, we are proud to operate multiple waste wood recycling sites, enabling us to provide extensive coverage nationwide. We’re dedicated to providing businesses with flexible, sustainable solutions for waste wood recycling where we offer a seamless process to manage and recycle waste wood efficiently. 

We continually upgrade our fleet of vehicles and containers to strengthen our commitment to delivering seamless and reliable service. We prioritize investing in the latest equipment while maintaining our existing machinery to the highest standards.

As part of the A.W. Jenkinson family of companies, we benefit from a vast and robust transport network with access to over 800 vehicles across the UK. We offer a national-scale solution for the recovery and recycling of waste wood, providing a one-stop service tailored to your needs. 

Together with the A.W. Jenkinson group, we process over 1 million tonnes of waste wood annually, with an additional 1.2 million tonnes handled through associated businesses.

Whether it’s regular waste wood collections or large-scale processing, A&A Recycling Services delivers reliability, consistency, and exceptional service.

Name: COGRA 48
Description:
Pionnier européen dans la fabrication du granulés de bois, COGRA a su développer depuis plus de 30 ans un savoir faire qui lui permet de produire un combustible de grande qualité. Deux sites de production sont implantés à Séverac le Chateau (Aveyron) et Craponne sur Arzon (Haute Loire), non loin du siège social historiquement localisé à Mende (Lozère). 
Au fil de son développement, la société a su se diversifier en devenant importateur exclusif de la marque HARMAN, fabricant américain de poêle à granulés. Le choix du partenaire a été guidé par des valeurs communes qui rapprochent les deux organisations et leurs dirigeants : performance et engagement.
A ce jour, COGRA se positionne comme un acteur unique sur le marché en intervenant sur l'ensemble de la filière du granulés de bois. Cette posture a permis de développer encore et toujours le savoir faire de la maison pour accompagner les évolutions techniques majeures qui définissent aujourd'hui le marché (poêle étanche, DTA,...). 
Doté d'une nouvelle usine de production sur le ste de Craponne sur Arzon depuis 2021, COGRA se place parmi les leaders du marché avec une production annuelle qui avoisine les 200 000 tonnes.

Tout en gardant l'âme familiale de l'entreprise, la société BAUDRY a été reprise par trois de ses cadres, présents depuis longtemps au sein de l'entreprise, et occupants les postes stratégiques que sont le commercial, la production et la finance.

Notre objectif s'inscrit dans la continuité d'un projet partagé par des valeurs humaines et motivé par l'accroissement de la performance : une entreprise industrielle, moderne, créative, innovante et diversifiée dans ses marchés. J'assure la présidence de BAUDRY SAS en m'appuyant sur mes deux associés : Fabrice GUIET, Directeur Industriel et Catherine PITARD, Directeur Administratif et Financier. Name: INVERNIZZI S.p.A. - Italian poplar plywood
Description:
Invernizzi S.p.A. is a leading manufacturer of 100% Italian poplar plywood and poplar particleboard.

Panels manufactured from Invernizzi S.p.A. are certified as "100% Poplar Made in Italy", a brand that distinguishes the quality of the Italian poplar, the fact that all panels are manufactured in Italy and that wood is coming only from legal sources. 

The company produces mainly 100% poplar plywood panels, but production range includes also "twin panels", plywood with MDF decks and fire reaction (CE B-S2-d0 certified) poplar plywood.
 
In addition to plywood the company has also a particleboard mill used for turning all the wood waste originated from plywood production in an exclusive 100% poplar particleboard.

Based in Italy the company is exporting its products worldwide, from a PEFC or FSC certified wood base the company creates panels glued with low formaldehyde emission adhesives (also CARB phase-2 certified available on request).

From its large and modern ISO 9001 certified mill the company is producing about 100.000 m3 of wood panels per year.

We partner with architecture and design teams who expect more from their materials—more story, more sustainability, more substance.

Our reclaimed and responsibly sourced woods are crafted to meet the demands of modern projects, delivering the durability and dimensional stability commercial environments require.

From Modified Siding to Acoustic Slat Panels and Quick Ship solutions, our materials are chosen by teams who design with intention and build for long-term impact.

Explore the possibilities with us!

Name: Healsway
Description:
Healsway is the first global brand in antique wooden hand-carved furniture and handicrafts, proudly established across the UK, USA, EU, UAE, and India.
 
We are pioneers in offering a fully customisable, zero-extra-cost experience, providing free bespoke customisation with no additional charges for design, polish, upholstery, or delivery.  Every customer can watch their creation come to life in real time through photos and progress videos, ensuring complete transparency and trust.
 
What truly sets Healsway apart is our integration of FurnitureTech and IoT-based smart technology into finely handcrafted wooden products, merging traditional artistry with modern innovation to create smart, functional, and connected living experiences.
 
Our collections represent sustainable craftsmanship, intelligent design, and global aesthetics, crafted from responsibly sourced materials and perfected by master artisans.
 
Healsway stands for heritage, innovation, and transparency... blending old-world craftsmanship with new-age technology to deliver bespoke furniture that tells a story. From homes to hospitality and commercial spaces, we transform interiors through timeless design, digital craftsmanship, and meaningful detail.
 
Our Bespoke Promise –
 
Our bespoke furniture and interiors embody luxury, enduring elegance, and the pursuit of perfection, each piece individually tailor-made for every client or company.

Why Choose Healsway? 

Seamless Experience – Every detail is thoughtfully tailored to your style, space, and needs.
 
Personalised Service – We guide you from the first idea to the finished masterpiece.
 
Dedicated Customer Care – Our team ensures your journey is smooth and stress-free.
 
Transparent Updates – With live progress videos and photos, you can watch your bespoke creation come to life anywhere in the world.

Contact us: support@healsway.io

Name: Montréal Wood Convention
Description:
Considered as being one of the leading events for establishing lasting relations in the wood business, the Montréal Wood Convention makes it possible to renew ties with clients and generate business contacts that are vital for creating and maintaining alliances between buyers, lumber manufacturers, and service providers.

The Montréal Wood Convention 2023 is set to take place on April 18–20, 2023, at the Fairmont the Queen Elizabeth in Montréal. The MWC 2023 will offer you a trade show, industry-related presentations, and networking opportunities. With the return of our mobile app Swapcard, you can reach other participants to organize meetings, watch conferences live, ask questions, and check out the exhibitors’ profile.

Register to attend or sign up as an exhibitor. Whether you are a participant or an exhibitor, we are looking forward seeing you in Montréal next spring!
www.montrealwoodconvention.com

Name: SYLVA
Description:
SYLVA Sp. z o,o, jest jednym z największych w Polsce zakładów przetwórstwa drzewnego i należy do francuskiej Grupy Piveteau. Zakład w Polsce produkuje drewno konstrukcyjne, deski elewacyjne itarasowe, produkty ogrodowe a także wytwarza pellet certyfikowany znakiem DIN Plus.   
Do Grupy Piveteau należą trzy zakłady produkcyjne w dwóch krajach, które zatrudniają łącznie około 1400 pracowników, a na terenie Polski 340 osoby. Grupa Piveteau jest europejskim liderem ciśnieniowej impregnacji drewna, co daje gwarancję wysokiej klasy produktów oraz ich trwałość
Zakład produkcyjny zlokalizowany jest we Wielu, niedaleko Kościerzyny. 
Stawiamy na naturalność i bycie sobą, wspierając rozwój naszych pracowników. 
Grupa Piveteaubois całą swoją wiedzę i wieloletnie doświadczenie angażujemy w tworzenie nowych, oszczędnych technologii, które zapobiegają wyniszczaniu lasów. Stosując nowoczesne metody obróbki drewna jesteśmy w stanie projektować niepowtarzalne konstrukcje budowlane i ogrodowe.
SYLVA odpowiada na zapotrzebowania przemysłu poprzez specjalne rozwiązania, takie jak: zabezpieczenia antypoślizgowe, wszelkiego typu ogrodzenia, parkany. Produkujemy deski elewacyjne, klejone elementy konstrukcyjne oraz ekrany akustyczne.
SYLVA odpowiada także na potrzeby indywidualnych odbiorców, proponując różne modele tarasów, płotów, mebli ogrodowych  i  zabudowań wewnętrznych. Klientom proponujemy płoty lamelowe, płoty sztachetowe, pergole, rolbordery, donice, deski tarasowe, deski tarasowe z kompozytu, a także domki ogrodowe.
SYLVA zajmuje się także produkcją ekologicznego pelletu. Produkowanego wyłącznie z wiórów i trocin iglastych (sosna) powstających w naszym zakładzie po obróbce drewna. Granulat ten stanowi ekologiczną i ekonomiczną alternatywę dla tradycyjnych źródeł energii.

Name: Finsa Italia
Description:
FINSA è un’azienda specializzata nella produzione di pannelli in legno.
La storia di FINSA inizia nel 1931 con l’apertura di una segheria a Portanxil (Santiago de Compostela - Spagna) ma, già pochi anni dopo, diventa una vera e propria attività industriale: l’azienda FINANCIERA MADERERA S.A. capace di produrre fin dal 1965 la sua prima linea di pannelli truciolari.
A partire dalla fine degli anni ’80 l’azienda inizia un irrefrenabile processo di internazionalizzazione: l’apertura ai mercati esteri va di pari passo allo sviluppo di nuovi prodotti e soluzioni industriali: oggi l’azienda detiene importanti quote di mercato ed è tra i leader nel settore della trasformazione del legno in Europa. FINSA offre soluzioni che si adattano alle esigenze reali del mercato: attraverso la capillare rete di distribuzione raggiunge i professionisti del legno e gli industriali del mobile, fornendo loro attività di consulenza e supporto tecnico.
Negli ultimi anni FINSA ha sviluppato un nuovo canale dedicato ai progettisti gestito da un Technical Consultancy Team: architetti, interior designer, ingegneri e product designer formati da Finsa per affiancare i affiancare i progettisti, sia studi di architettura, sia uffici tecnici di società che realizzano progetti (uffici, alberghi, negozi, residenze), nello sviluppo e ingegnerizzazione dei loro ambienti di arredo e finiture di interni.
Da poco il Technical Consultancy Team è arrivato in Italia e gli esperti di FINSA sono in grado non solo di fornire una consulenza altamente qualificata per tutto ciò che concerne il legno e i suoi derivati, ma di mettere a disposizione del progetto analisi di mercato mirate al segmento contract: dai trend di design alle specifiche tecniche richieste per l’intervento con un’ampia gamma di certificazioni valide in tutto il mondo.

Name: Bergene Holm AS
Description:
Bergene Holm AS er en markedsledende totalleverandør av trelast til norsk byggevarehandel og industrikunder i inn- og utland. 

Siden 1946 har Bergene Holm AS vokst fra å være et lite sagbruk med 10 mann i Kvelde til å bli et av Norges største trelastkonsern. 

Vi er over 450 kolleger som daglig lar oss begeistre av hvordan store, solide tømmerstokker fra norske, miljøsertifiserte skoger kan videreforedles. Alt fra sterkt og holdbart konstruksjonsvirke til elegant, profilert listverk produseres og kjøres ut fra våre anlegg hver dag.

Våre virksomheter er lokalisert på Østlandet og Sørlandet og våre varer forhandles gjennom de største byggevarekjedene i Norge.

Ved å være modige, ta ansvar, bry oss og jobbe sammen virkeliggjør vi visjonen om å bli beste valg for alle som bygger med tre.

Name: Ireka Homes
Description: Handicrafts products by Ireka  for your unique home experience!

Name: Prowood Nederland
Description:
Prowood. Uit het beste hout gesneden.
There is no planet B. Daarom werken wij hard aan duurzame oplossingen voor jouw woning. Met onze houten gevelbekleding krijgt je woning een moderne, natuurlijke en stijlvolle uitstraling. Bovendien is bouwen met hout niet alleen duurzaam, maar ook voordelig én snel.

Zo werken we bij Prowood met veel liefde – én hout – aan een betere wereld

Name: BarretteWood
Description: BarretteWood est une entreprise manufacturière fièrement québécoise œuvrant dans le domaine de la 2e et de la 3e transformation du bois. Établie en 2 usines à Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu et à Roberval, elle est la plus grande usine de panneaux de clôture de bois au Canada et un chef de file dans la fabrication de produits de bois à valeur ajoutée.
