Name: Grupa Woodeco / Woodeco Group
Description:
Woodeco jest uznanym producentem płyt drewnopochodnych, a zakłady należące do spółki dostarczają swoje produkty nieprzerwanie od 1974 roku, będąc jednym z fundamentów rozwoju i sukcesów polskiego przemysłu meblarskiego. 

Siedziba firmy mieści się we Wrocławiu, a trzy zakłady produkcyjne – 2 w Grajewie i 1 w Wieruszowie – zatrudniają około 1100 pracowników. Woodeco jest dostawcą rozwiązań w oparciu o materiały drewnopochodne dla przemysłu meblarskiego, branży budowlanej i wykończenia wnętrz. 

Firma oferuje kompleksową obsługę firm meblowych, zakładów stolarskich, architektów i projektantów oraz firm branży budowlanej. Na polskim rynku produkty firmy są dostępne m.in. w sieci Woodeco Partner, w wybranych sieciach DIY czy w punktach dystrybucji materiałów budowlanych. W ofercie firmy znajduje się szeroka gama produktów zgodnych z najnowszymi trendami w zakresie projektowania, budowy, wykończenia i wyposażenia zarówno obiektów prywatnych, jak i obiektów użyteczności publicznej.

Działalność spółki jest współfinansowana przez Unię Europejską w ramach Funduszu InvestEU.
-----------
Woodeco is a recognized manufacturer of a wide range of wood-based panels. The facilities owned by the company have been supplying their products uninterruptedly since 1974, being one of the foundations of the development and success of the Polish furniture industry. The company is based in Wrocław and its three production facilities (two in Grajewo and one in Wieruszowo) have approx. 1,100 employees. Woodeco is a supplier of wood-based solutions for the furniture, construction, and interior design industries. The company offers comprehensive services to furniture companies, carpentry shops, architects, designers, and construction companies. On the Polish market, its products are distributed e.g. by the Woodeco Partner chain, selected DIY chains, and construction materials centers. 

This operation benefits from the support of the European Union under the InvestEU Fund.

Name: Hiil
Description: Hiil is a sustainable wood charring house

Name: Collins
Description: At Collins, we are committed to building a better world. As a family-owned company founded in 1855, this begins with our commitment to land and resource stewardship on our 370 thousand acres of Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) certified forest lands. With operations in California, Oregon, and Pennsylvania, we manufacture softwood and hardwood lumber, NAF particleboard, and engineered wood.

Name: Bergs Timber AB
Description:
Bergskoncernen består av en grupp självständiga dotterbolag med tydligt resultatansvar som utvecklar, producerar och marknadsför förädlat trä för olika tillämpningar.

Med mångårig erfarenhet av trä och med stor kompetens kring vidareförädling, bidrar Bergs till att bygga ett hållbart samhälle baserat på förnybar råvara från hållbart brukade skogar i Östersjöregionen.

Verksamheten bedrivs i Sverige, Lettland, Polen och Storbritannien och försäljning sker till ett 30-tal länder. De största marknaderna utgörs av Skandinavien, Baltikum, Storbritannien och Frankrike

Name: HEZE LINKEDIN WOODWORK CO.,LTD.
Description:
Heze Linkedin Woodwork Co., Ltd was established in the year of 2010. It is located in the middle of China which is famous for its wood industry and woods resources, with this superiority the company has become one of the biggest enterprise for all kinds of solid wood board and decorative panel processing and marketing in China.

Name: Killygowan Pallets Manufacturing Ltd
Description:
Killygowan Pallets, based in Cavan, has been supplying standard and bespoke wooden pallets, crates, and boxes to customers across Ireland since 2001.
With almost two decades in the industry, we know what it takes to provide high-quality, strong, durable pallets and crates, with bespoke and oversized options always available for our customers.

Our pallets are available in wood, OSB and ply materials, and all are ISPM 15 Certified, meaning that we are dedicated to quality, safety, and environmental protection.

Name: BOSS Lumber USA
Description:
Part of a family group dedicated to lumber since 1903, surviving 5 generations and with presence in 5 continents. 
We follow all the steps: the choice of wood, treatment and transformation. We constantly improve the drying, sorting and processing procedures of wood, in the search for an excellent service for our clients.

Name: La Cabanerie
Description:
La Cabanerie est une entreprise bretonne spécialisée dans la conception et la fabrication des Cabanétapes : une solution d'hébergement légère, compacte, déplaçable et tout en bois, conçue pour l'accueil à la nuitée du public randonneur.

Nous fabriquons des structures pratiques et ludiques en bois dans notre atelier situé à Acigné (35690) depuis 2012.

Name: Pyrénées Bois Energies Industrie
Description:
Usine de production de granulés de bois -ou pellets - selon un processus industriel moderne. 
Production Française et Locale à Marignac (31).

Distribution dans toute la France et en Europe; en sac ou en vrac.
Vente de sacs aux particuliers à la palette ou à la demi palette.

4 amis un peu fous ont décidé en 2022 de relancer la production de pellets qui avait cessé quelques mois plus tôt. La production industrielle est relancée depuis le premier trimestre 2023, production qui est maintenant proposée à la vente pour les particuliers, entreprises, comité d'entreprise, industriels et grossistes!

Contactez nous!

Name: Tonnellerie CADUS
Description:
Depuis 1996, au cœur du vignoble de Bourgogne, la Tonnellerie Cadus façonne les plus beaux fûts de chêne français. Présente dans plus de 22 pays à l’international, elle fait rayonner l’art de la tonnellerie française au service des plus grands vins.

Distributed worldwide in  more than 22 countries, the cooperage is a symbol of French master coopers expertise serving the greatest wines.

Name: Delfin Trgotrans
Description:
DELFIN TRGOTRANS allows you to experience nature in your own way and enjoy its beauty.

Delfin Trgotrans d.o.o. is a family business in Bosnia and Herzegovina that has operated successfully since 1996.

The company processes wood from the primary stage until the final product. It is focused on the production of high-quality oak floorings. 
Over 90% of our production is exported to European countries, such as Sweden, Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Italy, Slovenia, Croatia, and many others.

We nurture a close relationship with customers interwoven with mutual respect and trust. The fact that we have established partnerships lasting more than 15 years speaks favourably of that. Our goals are customer satisfaction and long-term co-operation.

Name: Art For Everyday Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Art For Everyday, the leader in original architectural woodcarving design and production. We bring your inspiration and ideas to life through the beauty of natural wood. With a collection of over 1,000 decorative corbels, capitals, moldings, corner posts, island posts, mantels, appliqués, rosettes, millwork accents, and custom woodcarvings, we transform your vision into timeless architectural masterpieces.

Manufacturing the highest quality woodcarvings from premium North American hardwoods, we have proudly achieved our Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) certification and our Sustainable Forestry Initiative (SFI) certification. This means that designers, architects and cabinet companies can now request our original designs for custom kitchens and other areas of the home using ethically sourced, green materials.

For more information about our products, talk to us today about how you can use custom woodcarvings and millwork accents to make spectacular design statements in the custom kitchen and other parts of the home.

Description: Established in 2005, TEKCOM Corporation specializes in providing plywood and associated products to partners and clients in Vietnam and export markets. With a strong commitment to deliver high quality products, the challenge of developing innovative solutions for construction and architectural creation never stops.

Name: LIRA
Description:
LIRA - Woodworking LLC is a reputable and rapidly expanding enterprise that specialises in producing high-quality dry planed, profiled lumber and glued furniture boards. With a successful track record dating back to 1999, LIRA has established itself as a prominent family-owned business in Vasilkiv, Kyiv region, Ukraine, and has earned a well-deserved reputation for providing outstanding services to trade companies and enterprises around the Globe.

At LIRA, we take pride in delivering an extensive range of smooth, profiled, planned timber, internal and external cladding panels, flooring boards, door and window mouldings, and various components required by the furniture and construction industries. We strive to maintain the highest standards of craftsmanship and quality in all aspects of our production process, from selecting the finest raw materials to utilising cutting-edge machinery and equipment to ensure optimal precision and accuracy.

Our commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction has propelled us to the forefront of the industry, enabling us to meet the ever-changing demands of the marketplace while providing our clients with exceptional value and unparalleled service. With our continued focus on excellence and continuous improvement, we are confident that LIRA will remain a leading player in the woodworking industry for many years.

At LIRA, we recognise the importance of cooperation in achieving our goals and objectives. We understand that working together and leveraging each other's expertise, knowledge, and resources is essential for achieving success and making meaningful progress in today's highly competitive business landscape.

Name: ADAM
Description:
ADAM est la première et la plus ancienne entreprise de fabrication française de packaging en bois (des caisses standard aux coffrets haut de gamme).
Depuis 1880, nous produisons en majorité pour le domaine des vins et spiritueux.
Notre usine est basée à Sainte Hélène, en Gironde, à une trentaine de kilomètres de Bordeaux.
Nous fabriquons plus de 950k produits par an et nous sommes certifiés PEFC depuis plus de 10 ans.
Découvrez nos valeurs et notre équipe directement sur notre site !

Name: Groupe Dhollande
Description:
Entreprise familiale, notre savoir-faire et notre réseau se sont bâtis sur une expérience de plus de 65 ans. Cette passion s’est transmise de génération en génération, et notre personnel nous est fidèle depuis de nombreuses années.

Que vous soyez un professionnel ou un particulier, qu’importe la quantité de produits que vous souhaitez commander, nous vous garantissons une prestation de qualité. Nos produits sont robustes, durables et stables dans le temps, en plus d’être 100% naturels.

Notre force réside dans notre professionnalisme et notre réactivité. 
Disposant d'une flotte de transport adapté et de chauffeurs attitrés, nous faisons en sorte de vous livrer dans les plus brefs délais, quel que soit votre localisation.

Disposant de notre propre flotte de transport, nous intervenons dans toute la France . Aussi, nous transportons vos produits à l’étranger.
Nous sommes certifiés par la norme ISPM-15, certification élaborée par une convention internationale pour la protection des végétaux, qui atteste d’un traitement thermique phytosanitaire selon les normes en vigueur.

Name: Compostboard
Description:
Compostboard: Fertile Materials, Regenerative Design

Imagine a material that breathes life into spaces—literally and figuratively. Compostboard transforms agricultural by-products into an innovative interior solution that doesn't just minimize harm, but actively regenerates our environment.

More Than a Material. A Regenerative Story.
Crafted from pepper plant, hemp, and flax fibers—nature's overlooked treasures—Compostboard turns agricultural waste into elegant, high-performance interior surfaces. Each panel captures:
•	6.89 kg CO₂ per square meter
•	Zero toxic emissions
•	Complete compostability
•	Local Dutch agricultural heritage

Design That Thinks Beyond Walls
Our material isn't just about aesthetics. It's a statement of possibility:
•	Regulates indoor humidity naturally
•	Provides a clean, breathable environment
•	Supports local farmers and circular economies
•	Creates beauty without environmental compromise

From Field to Finish, A Circular Journey
When your space evolves, so does Compostboard. Returned to the soil, it nourishes future landscapes—transforming interior design from a consumer practice to a regenerative act.

Certified. Innovative. Pioneering.
Trusted by forward-thinking architects who understand that true sustainability is both a science and an art.
Technical Highlights:
•	Locally produced (100km radius)
•	VOC-free
•	Fire-resistant
•	Available in natural tones: Beige, Brown, Black

Compostboard: Where Design Meets Regeneration
Interested in pioneering the future of interior materials? 
Contact us 
Info@compostboard.bio

Description: Custom woodcraft, home decor, furniture, unique art, cutting boards and trays made to order.

Name: Reserve Millwork
Description:
Reserve Millwork (RMI) is an architectural cabinetry and millwork company based in Bedford Heights, Ohio. 

Company Overview: Serving both the commercial and high-end residential markets, RMI is an architectural cabinetry company established in 1980. The company’s reputation and focus are on high-end commercial projects that include reception desks, board room tables, cabinetry, etc. The primary customers are large General Contractors; however, RMI maintains relationships with developers, owners, and architects as well. RMI delivers projects across the U.S. End-users of RMI’s work includes healthcare, corporate, legal, institutional, and governmental/civic customers.

Name: A. Brivio Compensati S.p.A.
Description:
We are the oldest plywood manufacturing company in Italy and one of the leaders today in the production of poplar plywood for the automotive, marine and furniture industries in Europe. 

Our 'quality is deeply rooted' in the family that over three generations has guided us, in the long-lasting relationships we have built with our clients and in our attention to sustainability issues. 

Founded in 1929, A. Brivio Compensati saw the great potential of poplar as a plantation tree and gained confidence in its many technical advantages in comparison to other species such as durability, ductility and lightweight.  

We consider ourselves tailors in the market for our ability to engineer plywood that responds to our clients’ most demanding needs and the special attention we place on producing a product of the highest quality. The 40+ years long relationships we have developed with clients from all over the world in various industries, especially the caravan, motorhome, DIY and boatbuilding industry are a result of these efforts. 80% of our production is currently exported. 

Caring for the environment has always distinguished our work as we adopted agricultural techniques that comply to the strictest environmental regulations such as PEFC and 100%Poplar Made in Italy, made investments to reduce our carbon footprint with solar energy and have incentivised poplar cultivation through a partnership programme of our making.  

Our company is currently ISO 9001 certified.

Name: TulsiVerse The Woodworks
Description:
Welcome to TulsiVerse The Woodworks

Where ancient traditions meet modern mastery, and the beauty of wood comes alive.

At TulsiVerse The Woodworks, we're not just woodcarvers - we're storytellers, crafting timeless tales of elegance, sophistication, and warmth. For generations, our family has honed the art of woodworking, perfecting the delicate balance between form and function. Today, we invite you to experience the culmination of our passion and expertise.

As a premier platform, we're dedicated to delivering exceptional woodworking products that not only exceed your expectations but also tell a story of love, care, and devotion. Every piece that leaves our workshop is a testament to the beauty of wood, carefully coaxed to reveal its hidden treasures. From the intricate patterns to the subtle textures, every detail is a reflection of our commitment to excellence.

Our Promise

At TulsiVerse The Woodworks, we promise to:

Deliver unparalleled quality, precision, and attention to detail in every product
Use only the finest, sustainably sourced materials to ensure a guilt-free indulgence
Infuse every piece with a sense of history, tradition, and family legacy
Provide exceptional customer service, because your satisfaction is our greatest reward
Explore Our World of Wood

From handcrafted furniture to bespoke decorative pieces, our collection is designed to transport you to a world of warmth, comfort, and beauty. Name: Richter Spielgeräte GmbH
Description:
Hilde Richter founded ‘Hilde Richter Spielgeräte’ in 1967. Around 10 years later, Richter Spielgeräte GmbH was founded in Frasdorf. From the very beginning, right up to the present day, the company has focussed on the sustainability of the resources used.

Today, the company employs around 130 people on a production area of almost 11,500 m² and a production area of 1,700 m².

With over 1,000 different products, Richter Spielgeräte GmbH contributes to the development of children. Self-determined play is encouraged through exciting and varied play equipment. There is a lot to explore and experience. The play equipment offers as much play value as possible and as much safety as necessary.

In order to maintain the natural character of the materials and thus create an appealing environment for play, care is taken to preserve the materials used in their original structure and form. A wide variety of surface textures also help to promote sensory perception.

Prototypes usually only find their way onto the production line after they have undergone and survived a tough test phase. The playability of new prototypes is tested on the public playground next to the company premises. This allows optimisation potential to be observed and implemented.

The product range includes play equipment for children, young people, adults and people with physical disabilities. As part of the sustainability philosophy of Richter Spielgeräte GmbH (short transport routes, careful use of resources, wood from certified forestry companies), which has been in place since the company was founded, CO2-reduced ‘green’ equipment is now part of the programme. It is important to us – everyone should find joy and relaxation in play.

Name: W.A.V.E. Wood Added Value Enabler
Description: More than a third of the Greater Region is covered by forest, which is a major source of timber and home to many of the key players involved in its processing. In the face of climate change, the face of the forest is changing and so is the resource available for processing. How will this resource change? What uses can be made of it? What measures should be put in place to link producers and processors? How can we maintain the development of economic activities in which the conservation of the GR resource is a priority? The various entities involved in the GR have a shared desire to support the development of a high-performance local wood industry based on maintaining and relocating the value chain within the region, while at the same time increasing the use of wood, which has an excellent ecological balance sheet and a significant carbon storage capacity, particularly in construction.

Name: Louis Renner GmbH
Description:
RENNER piano actions
-The artistry of the action is the connecting link between pianist and instrument-

Tradition makes the difference in Renner piano actions. The intricate hammer mechanisms are precisely hand-crafted at the Renner production facility. The action is the heart of the piano; it greatly affects intonation and how the instrument feels to play. That’s why you’ll find Renner actions in the best upright and grand pianos on the planet.

Renner is the world’s most-renowned manufacturer of piano actions and hammers. Wherever there’s a grand piano in a large concert hall or an upright in a discerning music lover’s living room, Renner is usually involved. Renner’s promise and objective is to provide precise, meticulous handiwork to create an unmistakable tone - one that sounds the same all over the world. Even when pianos with Renner actions are transported long distances or exposed to fluctuating temperatures, the sound never changes thanks to our impeccable craftsmanship.

Over the past century, nearly 3 million Renner piano actions have helped shape music across the globe. Renner has been, and continues to be, the only European manufacturer capable of competing on the tough, now-global piano market for over 130 years.

Above all, this is thanks to the skill of its workforce, the imagination of its developers, and a company philosophy that focuses on quality. What sets Renner apart is tradition – tradition that never becomes obsolete, even in the face of the digital transition. Renner emphasizes exceptional quality in each of the 8,800-plus parts that make up a piano action.

https://www.louis-renner.de/impressum/
https://www.louis-renner.de/datenschutzerklaerung/

Name: Santos & Santos, S.A
Description:

Atlantic wood é uma marca registada de madeira termo-modificada da Santos & Santos S.A.
No processo de produção da madeira termo-modificada, feito pela Santos & Santos S.A.,  não são utilizados quaisquer compostos químicos evitando efeitos nocivo no meio ambiente, nem se aplicam quaisquer substâncias durante o tratamento. A ausência total de compostos químicos preserva a beleza natural da madeira, permitindo a sua conjugação harmoniosa com inúmeras soluções decorativas e mantendo homogeneidade de cor em toda a sua estrutura.
Produtos:
•	Deck
•	Revestimentos
•	Pavimentos

Name: MibaWood
Description:
En MibaWood distribuimos y comercializamos suelos y revestimientos de madera tropical con un compromiso ambiental firme.
Nuestra gama de productos está organizada en colores, ofreciendo una amplia variedad de maderas tropicales, adaptándonos así, al ritmo que marca la naturaleza.
Al clasificar las maderas por color, diversificamos las especies, reducimos la presión sobre aquellas más populares preservando así la biodiversidad de las selvas.
Destacando la variedad de especies, impulsamos el uso sostenible de maderas tropicales menos conocidas pero de igual calidad.
Ampliamos el mercado para aliviar la presión sobre los bosques.
La diversidad promueve la adaptación de los ecosistemas forestales ante posibles cambios climáticos, fortaleciendo su resiliencia.
Son estas cuatro vertientes, que determinan nuestro esquema de acción, nos han hecho meritorios de la certificación FSC como comercializadores de alcance mundial de maderas tropicales, tratadas con prácticas medioambientales sostenibles desde el corte en el bosque hasta su comercialización.
Cada pieza de madera es única e irrepetible, formada pacientemente por la naturaleza. Las huellas de su origen y estaciones crean vetas distintivas, otorgando una personalidad y estética únicas a cada tipo de madera.
Su versatilidad permite adaptarlas a cualquier estilo, desde lo más tradicional hasta lo más vanguardista, manteniendo siempre un alto nivel de elegancia y calidad.

Name: Retim Europe
Description:
The main activity of Retim Europe OU is the sales of EPAL pallets, pallet boards, arrangement of delivery of pallet boards, wooden trays, lumber, wood pellets, as well as other timber products at the customer’s inquiry.

The Company has been operating in the timber materials market since 2016. The quality control is carried out at the stage of purchase, loading, and delivery of pallet boards and lumber from East Europe. 

The Company cooperates with production enterprises capable of performing an order of any level of complexity. Retim Europe OU is a trade company that has been supplying lumber to the European market. 

The head office is located in Tallinn (Estonia). The main area of the Company's activity remains the same since its establishment, that is the preparation and sales of lumber, pellet blanks, timber products and services to Estonia and the European countries.   

Since 2016, the Company has been actively operating in the market. The qualified and experienced managers provide services in searching new sales markets and reliable suppliers in different countries to supply top-quality products and select the best logistic solutions. The balance of top-quality products and fair prices is an important factor in selecting the options and ways of cooperation. For many years of its work, the Company has proved to be a reliable supplier that is continuously developing and offering high-quality services and products to its clients.

Retim Europe OU is ready to provide the following services:
sale of EPAL 1, EPAL 2, and EPAL 3 pallets, as well as other modifications; lumber, boards, timber, pallet timber, sawn timber; wood pellets (fuel pellets) of EN Plus A1 quality class; drying of lumber/boards; searching for transport means to deliver lumber and timber products; loading with due regard to the product; keep tracking on the timely delivery; searching for alternative manufacturers of high-quality pallet boards.

Description:
CMS is an organized, modern and trustworthy company which operates in wood industry sector in Greece. The last few years has shown dynamic activity also abroad.

The company is specialized in industrial wood production as well as high quality wood products trade. By using ultramodern mechanical equipment, CMS distinguishes for its knowhow and quality products that manufactures. With vertical support of the furniture, kitchen, wardrobe and interior door industry, the product range of CMS is totally complete and includes: 

• Kitchen worktops
• Coated panels with (Acrylic High Gloss , HPL, CPL και Finish Foil)
• Kitchen & wardrobe boxes
• Kitchen & wardrobe doors – post forming
• Wood coated profiles (casing, sill, frame, accessories of security door, transom etc)
• Furniture parts
• Furniture upon request
• Doors and mechanisms of sliding wardrobes

Having focused on customers' needs and requests, principal philosophy of CMS is their best possible service. The new ultramodern facilities in Sindos, Thessaloniki cover 12.000sm (roofed), having as a result the production of the company to be more complete. More precisely, it consists of 4 production lines:

* Lamination
* Post forming
* Wrapping profile
* Kitchen, wardrobe and furniture parts

The investments in building and mechanical equipment reach €20,000,000, fact that makes CMS one of the most modern and significant units of wood products manufacture in Greece.
The company operates under ISO quality control system regarding its production process and satisfies all security, hygiene and proper operation preconditions. At the same time, it is fully tuned with the European legislation for the raw materials supply as it make use of wood that derive from controlled logging and reforestation. The fact that CMS utilizes wood which are controlled and don’t contain hazardous substances such as pesticides or radiation while at the same time they have zero formaldehyde emissions, is quite important.

Name: Gabon Wood Industries
Description:
We are Gabon Wood Industries (GWI), an integrated forestry and wood processing company based in Gabon.

We operate across the full value chain — from sustainable forest management and harvesting to industrial processing and export. Our operations are built on long-term responsibility to the forest, compliance with national and international regulations, and consistent product quality for global markets.

At GWI, we believe forestry is not only about production, but also about balance — balancing economic performance, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility. We work closely with local communities, invest in skilled manpower, and continuously improve our operational standards to ensure traceability, safety, and efficiency.

Our products serve international customers who value reliability, transparency, and long-term partnership. Through disciplined operations and practical solutions, we aim to be a trusted supplier and a responsible actor in Gabon’s forestry sector.

Gabon Wood Industries — growing value responsibly from forest to market.

Description:

Dirigée depuis 2000 par Stéphane Risse, fils de Gilbert son fondateur, l’entreprise est spécialisée dans la menuiserie intérieure (portes, agencements sur mesure, armoires), les éléments bois anti-feu ainsi que dans la fabrication d’éléments anti-feu et de sécurité, tels que vitrages et portes EI30-EI60, portes pivotantes, coulissantes, de recoupement, portes RC2-RC3-RC4. Elle effectue aussi tous les travaux de menuiserie extérieure et de rénovation.
En 2021 Dimitri Brügger et Adrien Tinguely entrent dans la capital-actions de G. Risse SA en vue d'une reprise future de l'entreprise.

Il continuo aggiornamento delle attrezzature e delle tecnologie legate al legno, ma soprattutto la conduzione famigliare e il controllo diretto di tutte le fasi lavorative insieme alla massima flessibilità e velocità di reazione ai cambiamenti sono i nostri punti di forza.

Name: Iisalmen Sahat Oy - IPO Wood
Description:
Iisalmen Sahat Oy, better known for its marketing name, IPO Wood, is located in the central part of Finland, at the heart of responsible forestry. We have been a part of the Iisalmi town history for over 100 years. The journey we have taken together ties us firmly to the surrounding society, providing us with a natural role in building its sustainable future.

We provide responsibly produced high-quality sawn timber from Finnish forests, constantly developing our product selection to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

We use only 100 % Finnish spruce and pine harvested from the vicinity of our sawmill. Whether intended for building or any other purpose, this ensures the durability and reliability of our products.

We work for greener future together with local companies for example by utilizing by-products from our sawmill to generate pulp and carbon neutral heat for industrial purposes. Utilizing the entire tree as efficiently as possible is an essential element in our responsible operations.

The difference lies in smart choices, thorough commitment and action that can bring in results. This is what we are ready to promise, both to every link of the wood industry value chain and to our home district, the sustainable development of which is a matter of heart to us.

The privately owned Iisalmen Sahat has a sawmill in the Peltosalmi part of Iisalmi, a town located in Central Finland, in the middle of the highest quality forests. We produce ca. 200 000 cubic meters of sawn timber annually.  Ca. 60 % of our production consists or spruce and the remaining 40 % of pine. During 2023 we exported sawn timber to 20 countries.

Name: Papasay Value-Added Wood Products
Description:
Papasay Value-Added Wood Products (PVAWP) is a 100% Indigenous-owned sawmill located in Northwestern Ontario, operated by the Bingwi Neyaashi Anishinaabek (Sand Point First Nation).

We specialize in rough-cut Cedar and SPF softwood lumber, supplying high-quality products to contractors, developers, and communities across Ontario. Our offerings include custom-cut lumber in various sizes (up to 6"x6", 16' long), suitable for residential, commercial, and industrial applications.

Rooted in a vision of sustainable economic development, PVAWP is creating employment opportunities for BNA members while supporting long-term regional growth. We are currently expanding into finished and custom products through the installation of a planer and moulder system, set to be operational by early 2026.

We are proud contributors to major infrastructure projects, including the Waasigan Transmission Line and continue to work closely with builders and procurement teams committed to supporting Indigenous suppliers.

Since its establishment in South Africa 50 years ago, the Interwil Wood Products (IWP) structure has been specialised and streamlined to best satisfy market demands. Today the IWP group stands as an international company dedicated to procuring and marketing a diverse spectrum of the world's finest hardwoods and a wide selection of panel products. Name: RF Reflorestadora Ltda
Description:
Com um sentimento nobre em relação à proteção ambiental, indispensável a toda e qualquer comunidade, os fundadores do grupo WEG adquiriram, em 1972, a primeira propriedade rural da empresa, contando com florestas naturais e um pequeno projeto de reflorestamento, localizada no município de Corupá (SC).
Nos meados da década de 70 (1975), face a dificuldade em adquirir madeiras serradas de boa qualidade para embalagem de motores, foi instalada uma serraria e estufas para a fabricação das mesmas, no Parque Fabril II.
Em 1980, já com alguns novos projetos florestais, e aproveitando estímulos fiscais criados pelo governo, a WEG passou a investir na área de reflorestamento. A estratégia, contudo, não se tratava apenas de diversificação de investimentos, pois vislumbrava uma linha auxiliar do negócio principal: matéria-prima para fabricação de embalagens dos motores elétricos.
No decorrer das décadas de 80 e 90 foram adquiridas novas áreas, e novos projetos de reflorestamento foram implantados.
A madeira extraída dos projetos é utilizada no abastecimento das unidades de processamento de madeira / serrarias, estabelecidas nos municípios de Corupá (SC) e Araquari (SC). A madeira processada é utilizada na confecção de embalagens para motores e demais produtos do Grupo WEG.
A RF Reflorestadora (WEG) conta com um total de 12.000 ha de terras, distribuídos nos municípios de Corupá, Araquari, Itapoá, Garuva, Barra do Sul, São Francisco do Sul e Piçarras. Deste total, 6.220 ha são áreas de reflorestamento.

Name: English Woodlands Timber Ltd
Description:
We’re English Woodlands Timber, a hardwood timber merchant specialising in sourcing, conversion & bespoke supply of English & European timber for furniture making, joinery and building works.

At our woodyard in West Sussex our 2500 m2 stock sheds hold a huge range of homegrown species including Oak, Elm, Chestnut, Ash, Douglas Fir, Larch & Cedar in waney-edge & square-edge for customers to self-select assisted by friendly, knowledgeable staff whose mission is to make it as easy as possible for you to buy beautiful timber.

As hardwood suppliers, the sourcing of extraordinary timber for specialist woodworking is a particular feature of our mission.  Service is at the heart of everything we do. Our fully equiped 350 m2 workshop provides bespoke machining services for wide boards aswell as cut to size (CTS), planed all round (PAR) + profile and moulding production for furniture, joinery & timber cladding.  If you’re looking for wood suppliers in the South of England give a call and visit our woodyard to see the vast range of timber we have in stock.

We hold a chain of custody (CoC) for 3 certification schemes, PEFC, FSC & Grown in Britain. We actively promote and encourage the use of homegrown softwood and hardwood timbers from well managed woodlands.

We're proud supporters of Grown In Britain and homegrown timber supply chain.

As hardwood suppliers, we believe it all starts with the trees.

Name: CORRIM Renewable Research
Description:
CORRIMs mission is to conduct and manage Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) research on the environmental impacts of the production, use, and disposal of forest products. 

CORRIM was formed in 1996 by 15 research institutions to provide a scientific database of information for quantifying the environmental impacts of producing and using renewable wood materials. Today, CORRIM has emerged as the scientific authority relied upon by researchers, government, and others interested in the environmental impacts of various materials.  

CORRIM is a non-profit 501 c(3) organization that includes institutional (voting) members, non-voting members, and affiliated organizations.  Our structure includes active participation by a President, Vice President, Secretary/Treasurer, a Director of Operations, and a Director of Science and Sustainability. CORRIM maintains a Board of Directors representing 20 research institutions, www.corrim.org/affiliates/.   Together, CORRIM has published over 100 LCA reports, papers, and fact sheets representing 4 US wood producing regions and 15 different types of wood products.

Name: Rukooz Woodworking
Description:
Rukooz Woodworking is a leading Emirati manufacturing facility built on precision, innovation, and uncompromising quality. Operating from a state of the art 45,000 sq ft factory, we utilize advanced machinery, including CNC centers, high-precision finishing systems, and specialized structural woodworking equipment, to deliver exceptional results for large-scale residential and commercial projects.

Our operations are structured to handle high volumes with meticulous attention to detail, covering every stage of production from engineering and shop drawings to manufacturing, finishing, and installation. We produce doors, kitchen cabinets, wardrobes, and other structural woodworking components with accuracy, consistency, and efficiency, meeting the highest industry standards.

Quality and craftsmanship are at the core of everything we do. Each piece is crafted with careful material selection, precise joinery, and refined finishing techniques to ensure durability, functionality, and aesthetic excellence.

With our advanced manufacturing infrastructure and experienced team, Rukooz Woodworking is proud to meet the rigorous standards of developers, contractors, consultants, designers, and high-end clients alike.

Name: Ten Damme B.V.
Description:
Ten Damme is een gerenommeerd specialist in het recyclen en verwerken van  restproducten afkomstig uit de houtverwerkende industrie, namelijk houtvezel, zaagsel, resthout, houtchips en houtpellets. Hierdoor vormen wij een belangrijke spil in de circulaire economie en zijn wij een belangrijke schakel om samen met de houtverwerkende industrie kringlopen te sluiten.

Houtvezel en zaagsel wordt of als losgestort bodemstrooisel geleverd aan onze klanten of wordt naar ons bedrijf in Groenlo gebracht waar het in onze moderne balenpersinstallatie meerdere keren wordt gezeefd en vervolgens in balen houtvezel of balen zaagsel wordt geperst. 
Onze hoogwaardige en kwalitatieve stalbedekkingen worden al meer dan meer dan 40 jaar naar tevredenheid geleverd aan rundvee-, varkens, paarden en pluimveebedrijven door heel Nederland, België en Duitsland. Aan deze agrarische sector leveren wij ook verschillende soorten stro en fourage.
Ook leveren we resthout, houtchips en zaagsel als bron van hernieuwbare energie aan bijvoorbeeld energiecentrales maar ook voor de productie van pyrolyse-olie en houtpellets. 

Al onze producten worden door onze eigen ervaren chauffeurs en ons eigen wagenpark ingezameld en geleverd.

Ten Damme de duurzame leverancier van hoge kwaliteit houtvezel, zaagsel, stro en fourage en biomassa zoals houtchips en houtpellets.

Onze slogan is 'Producten van Ten Damme NATUURLIJK goed!

Name: GROUPE SYLVATEK
Description:
Nous empruntons au bois sa résilience pour imaginer les solutions de conditionnement, de stockage et de transport d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

Name: NEUBER CHILE
Description:
Our company has been successfully sourcing lumber from sustainable reforestation to our customers since 2002 covering all the range of products from sawn timbers to millwork and panel products. Nowadays, Neuber has presence in more than 15 markets around the globe.

Extensive experience in forest sector and international logistics reinforce our capacity to build sustainable  global trade connections, delivering value and quality worldwide.

We like to think our mission is to be the eyes of our customers in origin. Handling inquiries with a pool of professional suppliers who have among their objectives high standard of production and contract fulfillment.

Name: Woodmatters Mauritius
Description:
Woodmatters Mauritius: Redéfinir l'Artisanat du Bois

Fondée en 2014, Woodmatters Mauritius est une entreprise dédiée à l'excellence et à l'innovation dans le domaine de l'artisanat du bois. Notre mission est de créer des pièces uniques qui allient esthétique et fonctionnalité, tout en respectant les principes de durabilité et d'éco-responsabilité.

Nos Valeurs :
•	Artisanat d'Excellence : Chaque pièce est méticuleusement conçue et fabriquée par nos artisans qualifiés, qui mettent un point d'honneur à la qualité et à la précision.
•	Durabilité : Nous utilisons des bois locaux et exotiques provenant de sources durables, garantissant ainsi que nos produits respectent l'environnement et soutiennent les communautés locales.
•	Innovation : En fusionnant des techniques traditionnelles avec des concepts modernes, nous offrons des solutions innovantes et sur mesure pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients.

Nos Produits et Services :
•	Terrasses
•	Parquets
•	Bardage
•	Pergolas
•	Toit en chaume
•	Toit en bardeaux
•	Polycarbonate
•	Projets Spécialisés : Que ce soit pour des aménagements résidentiels ou commerciaux, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour concrétiser leur vision.

Pourquoi Choisir Woodmatters Mauritius ?
Chez Woodmatters Mauritius, nous croyons que chaque projet est une aventure unique. Nous nous engageons à offrir une expérience client exceptionnelle, depuis la conception initiale jusqu'à la livraison finale. Notre équipe passionnée et dévouée est toujours prête à relever de nouveaux défis et à dépasser vos attentes.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre voyage :
Suivez-nous sur LinkedIn pour découvrir nos dernières créations, des astuces de design, et pour rester informé de nos événements à venir. Ensemble, redéfinissons l'artisanat du bois et créons des espaces qui racontent une histoire.

Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui :
 Téléphone : +230 2459658 
 Email : md@woodmatters.mu 
 Site Web : https://woodmatters.mu/

Name: Les Petites Maisons de l'Isle
Description:
Entreprise spécialisée dans la fabrication de cabine de plage en bois : cabine vestiaire, kioske bar, local technique de piscine, bar à cocktail, bar à glaces, espace snacking, zone de stockage, armoire déco, guichet d'accueil, ect.. 

A la fois chics et originales, nos cabines sont duplicables, modulables et personnalisables à souhait selon les projets. 

Le plus : elles sont entièrement démontables ! 

Un savoir-faire traditionnel français, un choix de matériaux nobles et des finitions soignées, c'est la garantie d'un produit durable et résistant. 

Label : Origine France Garantie 

Vente & Location

Name: Rubio Monocoat Australia
Description:
Rubio Monocoat Australia delivers a range of products for all your wood needs. From Preparation, Pre-treatment, Protection, Maintenance and full range of accessories. 

With our unique one coat system and VOC free products there is truly something for every wood product, wood species and industry that works with wood. 

Rubio Monocoat is a brand of Muylle Facon BVBA. Muylle-Facon NV is a leading Belgian manufacturer of innovative surface treatment products. 

Rubio Monocoat Oil cannot be compared with any other oil on the market: it bonds in one single layer through a molecular reaction with the upper wood fibres of the substrate. It contains 0% of Volatile Organic Compounds, colours and protects the wood in one single layer and is available in an extensive range of colours. High technology in a green can? That's Rubio Monocoat!

Name: SILVANIUM WOOD
Description: Silvanium Wood produce mobilier de interior și exterior din lemn masiv și plăci decorative, furnir, MDF, HDF, uși și ferestre din lemn masiv, scări, obloane, podele, placări pereți, garduri, porți, servicii și soluții conexe pentru: industria ospitalității- HoReCa, dezvoltatori imobiliari, arhitecți, designeri de interior, clienți privați. Aceste lucrări se pot realiza cu muncă perseverentă, pasiunea creativă și sprijinul colegilor noștri loiali. Departamentul nostru de clienți privați oferă un serviciu perfect personalizat, creând în același timp interioare frumoase pentru persoane particulare. Scopul nostru este de a ajuta fiecare client să maximizeze întregul potențial al spațiilor lor, introducând piese personalizate adaptate cerințelor lor individuale. Noi tendințe și concepte de design vin și pleacă ... dar într-un singur lucru ne ținem de tradiția moștenită: în valorile noastre. Piesele noastre de mobilier și tâmplărie sunt speciale și valoroase, ca principiile și atitudinea cu care le construim. Acordăm atenție sporită și serviciilor "din spatele pozelor": seriozitate maximă în relația cu clienții nostri, respectarea termenelor, disponibilitate și sprijn in identificarea soluțiilor tehnice în vederea optimizării raportului calitate - preț.

Name: edelzweig
Description:
Für eine einzigartige Verabschiedung Ihrer Liebsten.
Ein Ast vom Baum aus Ihrem eigenen Garten oder Ihrer Lieblingsholzart, liebevoll eingearbeitet in unsere Urnen aus Zirbenholz.
Individuelle Gestaltung unserer Natururnen durch die große Auswahl an Motiven.
Fingerabdruck, Symbol oder Name - eine persönliche Gravur macht unsere Gedenkurnen und Erinnerungsstücke zu besonderen Andenken für Ihr Zuhause.

Name: International Tropical Timber Organization
Description: The International Tropical Timber Organization (ITTO) is an intergovernmental organization promoting the sustainable management and conservation of tropical forests and the expansion and diversification of international trade in tropical timber from sustainably managed and legally harvested forests

Name: PACIFIC ARCHITECTURAL WOOD PRODUCTS, LLC
Description:
PACIFIC ARCHITECTURAL WOOD PRODUCTS, LLC is a family-owned company providing architectural flush wood doors with an industry-leading lead time, exceptional quality, and complete orders, which provide value to our customers that exceeds the cost of the door. 

All our wood doors are made using a true 5-ply process. Unlike most manufacturers, we apply thin veneer faces to the core and crossband at the press. This allows us to inventory a wider variety and quantity of veneer species and sizes, enabling us to customize your door in ways others cannot, all the while manufacturing the door at industry-leading lead times. 

We are located at 777 NE 4th Ave. Canby, Oregon, United States.

Name: Zhejiang Hvea Wood Industry Co., LTD
Description:
Adhering to "A Brand focus on decor panels creation" is our brand tenet, we have always respected the spirit of cooperation stemming from common vision and passion, and cooperated with the excellent designers in the world to create forward-looking veneer products for the future.
In the future, we will continue to innovate, inject a variety of product designs and fine craftsmanship into the veneer industry, and become the vane leading the field of modern fashion home furnishing.

Name: Lumat Maderas
Description:
At LUMAT we are a leading manufacturer of high-quality timber products. With over 40 years of experience in the industry, we take pride in our expertise in timber processing and our commitment to sustainable forestry practices. Our expertise, knowledge and relationships with our suppliers have allowed us to source premium quality timber from responsibly managed forests. We are dedicated to protecting the environment and ensuring the sustainability of our timber resources for future generations. Our team of skilled machinists and technicians utilize advanced machinery and modern production techniques to transform raw timber into a wide range of timber products including timber, decking, decking tiles, hardwood flooring, fencing, and more. Our strict quality control measures ensure that every product leaving our factory meets the highest industry standards for durability, strength, and aesthetics.

We are committed to customer satisfaction and strive to provide exceptional service to all our clients, whether they are small local businesses or large-scale import projects. Our experienced sales team is always ready to assist with product selection, customization options, and timely order fulfillment.

At Lumat, we believe in fostering long-term relationships with our customers, suppliers, and employees. We prioritize safety in our operations and ensure a safe working environment for our employees. Our team is dedicated to continuous improvement, innovation, and staying at the forefront of the timber industry.

Name: wintergroup - Winter Paletten
Description:
Die Wintergroup ist ein Familienunternehmen mit beeindruckender Erfolgsgeschichte und steht Ihnen als Partner in verschiedenen Bereichen zur Seite. Nicht nurmehr am Palettenmarkt ist die Wintergroup stark vertreten, sondern auch ein Spezialist in der Erzeugung und im Vertrieb von Hackgut und Forstarbeiten. Des weiteren fungiert diese auch als Palettendepot und Servicecenter und in Zeiten des Trendthemas „Upcycling“ bietet man seit rund 10 Jahren ebenfalls die Produktion sowie Vermietung nachhaltiger Palettenmöbel an.

Holz prägt die Identität der Unternehmensgruppe Winter von Beginn an.

Nachhaltiges Handeln bedeutet für uns, effizienter und umweltschonender Umgang mit unseren Ressourcen – Wiederverwendung und –verwertung stehen an erster Stelle. Themen, mit denen sich die Wintergroup nicht nur intensiv beschäftigt, sondern eine Philosophie, die im Betrieb auch gelebt wird. Mit rund 170 Mitarbeitern zählt die Wintergroup zu einem großen Arbeitgeber in der Region.

Name: Lamprecht S.r.l.
Description:
Dal 1954 produciamo imballaggi in legno, pedane a perdere, segati in diverse dimensioni, truciolo e PELLET. I nostri prodotti sono tutti realizzati con materiale in legno segato, così da garantire un ottima qualità. 
Essendo i nostri prodotti non trattati contribuiamo attivamente alla protezione dell´ambiente, una parte scarti (segatura e cippato) derivanti della produzione,  vengono utilizzati per la produzione di corrente verde con due generatori BHKW, il restante viene trasformato in PELLET.

Name: Dagwood Joinery Ltd

As a new business we understand that we are only as good as the product we deliver, working closely with clients and ensuring we deliver on time, within budget whilst meeting or exceeding their expectations is what drives us to our goals. 

Every business started small and this is the beginning of our first chapter!

Name: Femo Poland
Description: "Jesteśmy świadomi, że każde wnętrze zaprojektowane jest w indywidualny sposób dla tego też stworzymy schody i balustrady spersonalizowane dokładnie pod Twoją klatkę schodową. Z kontaktuj się z nami, a wspólnie sprawdzimy jaki typ schodów najbardziej wpasuje się do Twojego domu, a dopełnieniem będzie balustrada, którą możemy wykonać z drewna, stali, szkła oraz z połączenia tych materiałów ze sobą. Wiemy również, że kwestia kolorystyczna schodów jest jednym z ważniejszych czynników, dla tego jeśli jesteś na etapie wyboru podłogi chętnie zaprezentujemy Ci pełną kolekcję podłóg drewnianych, natomiast jeśli podłogę już wybrałeś, wystarczy, że dostarczysz do nas próbkę, a my stworzymy identyczny kolor na schodach."

Name: ABS Palettes (Aquitaine Bois Services Palettes, ex-FAYE Palettes)
Description: Fabrication de solutions en palettes bois conçues pour répondre aux besoins des entreprise du secteur de la logistique, de la manutention, du transport, de la distribution, ou même du secteur industriel, nos produits sont adaptés à votre activité.

Name: Dino Wood
Description:
Dino: Where Play Meets Development
We're Dino, a family of Georgian artisans crafting eco-friendly wooden furniture and toys for curious minds. From sturdy climbing structures to imaginative playthings, we create tools that inspire children's growth at every stage.
 
Why Wood?
We believe childhood is a time for exploration, not plastic. That's why we use certified, safe raw materials to build products that are kind to the planet and gentle on little hands.
 
More Than Just Fun
Each Dino creation goes beyond entertainment. Our furniture encourages movement and coordination, while our toys spark curiosity, develop fine motor skills, and nurture creativity. We see play as a gateway to problem-solving, social skills, and emotional intelligence development.
 
Building a Nurturing Space
With Dino, parents can create a warm and safe environment where children learn through discovery and develop positive skills. Join us as we showcase our collection and explore partnership opportunities to bring the magic of Dino to more families.

Name: POST Gruppe
Description:
Wir sind ein Industrieunternehmen mit der Kernkompetenz in der Verarbeitung von Holz, Metall und Kunststoff. Wir verstehen uns als flexibler Dienstleister, der für fast jedes Anliegen eine Lösung und einen Mehrwert schafft.

Dies bedarf einer guten Kommunikation, das bedeutet für uns: Wir hören zu und fragen nach, um zu verstehen, welche Produkte wir Ihnen anbieten können. Unser Selbstverständnis liegt auf Zuverlässigkeit, Kreativität und Wertschätzung im Umgang mit unseren Kunden und das Miteinander im Team. Wir freuen uns auf eine partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe mit Ihnen!

Name: Timmerfabriek Meijer

Duurzaam Maatwerk

Timmerfabriek Meijer produceert hoogwaardige houten (gevel) elementen die precies bij uw wensen en woonhuis passen. Of het nu gaat om een kozijn, raam, deur of pui.

Meijer maakt van uw project haar project en doet dit met optimale service, kwaliteit en buitengewone inspanning.

Eigenschappen waar de ambachtelijke familie al sinds 1982 op “Hamert”.

Qualität und die Innovationskraft der vielen langjährigen Mitarbeiter.

Name: Holzdrew Woodwork
Description:
Somos artesãos apaixonados por arte em madeira. Essa paixão é fruto da tradição familiar da marcenaria.

Cada peça que criamos é um tributo a essa herança e representa o elo entre cuidado artesanal e memórias afetivas.

Esse sentimento é o que impulsiona o nosso ateliê de marcenaria a criar peças exclusivas que contam histórias em três diferentes linhas: 

- Collection (utensílios para toda a casa)
- Kids (brinquedos de madeira)
- Planejados (móveis sob medida para todos os estilos)

Visite nosso site e siga-nos para acompanhar as novidades e inspirações que nos movem!

Name: SCIERIE EHRSTEIN
Description:
La Scierie Ehrstein, entreprise familiale depuis 1783, exploite de manière durable des bois résineux et feuillus de grande qualité, provenant des forêts avoisinantes.

Spécialisé dans la charpente, la négoce du bois, et depuis peu le merrain, la scierie varie entre savoir-faire ancestral et les nouveautés du marché.

Tous nos bois exploités sont issus de forêts entretenues, gérées durablement et labellisées PEFC.

Objectif zéro déchet, nous valorisons 100% de nos bois dans notre processus de fabrication.

Name: Cut To Fit Doors

Utilizing state-of-the-art technology and machinery, each door is meticulously crafted to your specifications, ensuring the perfect fit for your cabinetry projects.

Everything we do is for your enjoyment of outdoor living from Cornhole Boards, Adirondack Chairs, Fire Pit and Patio Furniture, and more.

Name: Hyde Woodworking Company; LLC
Description: At Hyde Woodworking Company, LLC., we take great pride in our ability to deliver exceptional design and build services for heirloom, custom furniture that caters to all your unique needs. With a meticulous attention to detail, our experienced craftsmen create pieces that not only enhance the beauty of your home but also fit perfectly into any specific space you desire. نحن لا نصنّع خشبًا فقط…

Name: Fratelli Cornacchia
Description:
Sin dagli anni Sessanta ci distinguiamo per efficienza ed innovazione, attenzione al processo produttivo ed alla qualità del prodotto. Affidabilità e competenza sono da sempre i nostri valori.

Operiamo nel settore del legno e abbiamo sede a Matera, nell’area che comprende il distretto del mobile imbottito Matera-Montescaglioso ed il distretto legno arredo Puglia.

Siamo partner dei più importanti produttori di macchine per la lavorazione del legno e utilizziamo tecnologie all’avanguardia per produrre semilavorati in legno, in particolare ma non solo fusti destinati alla realizzazione di mobili imbottiti, sia assemblati che forniti in kit pronti per l’assemblaggio.

La nostra azienda si sviluppa su un’area di circa 50.000 mq, di cui 15.000 coperti. Tra i nostri clienti possiamo elencare alcuni dei più prestigiosi marchi del settore.

Name: Holzindustrie Hassel GmbH
Description: Seit mehr als 100 Jahren widmen wir uns voller Leidenschaft dem Thema Holz. Ein Naturstoff, der Vieles kann und den wir in unserem Sägewerk auf vielfältigste Weise nutzen: Vom Schnittholz über Individuallösungen bis hin zu Pellets. Wir sind der zuverlässige Partner für den Mittelstand, ein starkes Team, ein professioneller Industriebetrieb.

Name: FEEL WOOD Massivholzdielen
Description:
FEEL WOOD Massivholzdielen vereinen Tradition und Innovation 
Bei FEEL WOOD schätzen wir die natürliche Schönheit von Massivholzdielen. Mit über 30 Jahren Erfahrung und modernster Fertigung in Österreich, sind wir stolz darauf, unseren Kunden höchste Qualität zu bieten. Unsere Reise begann 1992 als Teil der Leitinger Holzindustrie und seitdem haben wir Höhen und Tiefen erlebt. Was uns jedoch immer verbunden hat, ist die Liebe zu unserem Produkt und das Fachwissen, das wir in dieser Zeit gesammelt haben. Seit 2012 sind wir eine 100 % Tochterfirma der SECA-Holzindustrie aus Oberösterreich, die uns den notwendigen Rückhalt in Beschaffung und Vertrieb bietet. Unsere Vision ist es, Ihnen und Ihrer Familie ein gesundes und nachhaltiges zuhause zu ermöglichen. Mit unseren hochwertigen Massivholzdielen aus Österreich möchten wir nicht nur Ihre Wohnräume verschönern, sondern auch einen Beitrag zum Schutz unserer Umwelt leisten. Wir glauben fest daran, dass wir alle Verantwortung für unsere Welt tragen und setzen deshalb auf nachhaltige Materialien und eine ökologisch verantwortungsvolle Produktion. #FEELtheWOOD #FEELWOOD #Nachhaltigkeit #Qualität

Name: Volkers Hout Hilversum
Description:
Vakmanschap met een eigentijdse aanpak. Sinds 1932.
Volkers Hout is een betrouwbare partner in standaard en maatwerk houtproducten voor professionals, bedrijven en particulieren met kleine en grote bouw-, verbouw- en renovatieprojecten.

Name: ACTIBOIS

At Decabock, we reinvent woodworking by combining aesthetics, functionality, and personalization. We are a company specializing in handcrafted wooden creations, made with care and passion.

Our flagship product? A one-of-a-kind coaster with a built-in bottle opener, fully customizable through high-precision wood engraving. Whether it’s a gift, decoration, or everyday item, every Decabock creation is the perfect blend of elegance and practicality.

Why choose Decabock?

Description:
Here at Rockwood Truss, we supply Trusses, EWP, Hangers and more. with our dedicated team we ensure that we deliver the best quality and workman ship you would expect from a truss company. We also have second to none storage for our lumber, %90 of our lumber is under cover and out of the elements.

Name: Woodsons
Description:
At Woodsons, we are passionate about producing high-quality Woodsons Cross Timber Panels (WCTP), an innovative engineered wood product that is revolutionizing the construction industry. Our panels are crafted from multiple layers of profiled cladding board timber, meticulously connected with nails, resulting in a robust and reliable building material.

Woodsons Cross Timber Panels are incredibly versatile, making them suitable for a wide range of applications, including flooring, walls, and roofing. 

One of the standout features of our panels is their adaptability. We offer panels in various thicknesses, sizes, and shapes, allowing for seamless customization to meet specific project requirements. Additionally, our advanced manufacturing process enables precise cutouts for windows and doors to be effortlessly incorporated into the panels at the factory, simplifying installation and enhancing design flexibility.

Beyond their use in construction, our panels serve as an excellent raw material for the production of furniture, fences, and other wooden products. This sustainability aspect makes panels an eco-friendly choice for those seeking environmentally conscious building solutions.

As a family business, Woodsons takes pride in our rich heritage, which dates back to the early 20th century. Our great-great-grandfather, Mattis Hohensee, was a renowned shipbuilder in Saaremaa, Estonia. We carry forward his legacy by upholding the values of craftsmanship, innovation, and attention to detail in everything we do.

At Woodsons, we firmly believe in designing for the future while building for today. Our tagline, "Designing for the future, building for today," encapsulates our commitment to creating sustainable structures that stand the test of time.

Join us on LinkedIn to stay updated with our latest projects, industry insights, and innovative solutions. Together, let's shape the future of construction.

Name: Guardia Roch
Description:
Guardia Roch, S.L.U. se creó el año 1999 resultado de una evolución y necesidad empresarial de la familia Guardia.
Tres generaciones han formado el triángulo de esta historia desde sus inicios en 1946 hasta la actualidad. (Guardia Aran, Guardia Veciana y posteriormente Guardia Roch).


El proyecto empresarial en sus inicios tenía un plan muy específico, aserrar y producir madera sostenible para la fabricación de palets.

El objetivo del emprendimiento era poder configurar una estructura de negocio sólida a largo plazo con dedicación y perseverancia.

La ilusión y esperanza de un nuevo comienzo consolidaron las primeras bases de la compañía.

La firma, a consecuencia de consolidarse de manera estable en el sector, tomó la decisión de introducir en su prototipo de comercio una opción favorable para el fomento del reciclaje, la recuperación de palets usados, proporcionando, de este modo, una alternativa a la fabricación de palets e ir asentando un nuevo arquetipo de negocio.


Finalmente y hasta día de hoy, Guardia Roch representa una entidad responsable de haber mostrado un crecimiento sostenible en un sector de valor, manifestando su compromiso con el medio ambiente.

Name: Segheria Alto Tenna srl
Description:
La Segheria Alto Tenna.  Nasce nel 1996 per iniziativa dei soci che rilevano il vecchio impianto della Segheria Innocenzi operante nel settore delle costruzioni navali e ferroviarie già alla fine degli anni ’50. Con la recente riscoperta del legno come elemento strutturale e decorativo, l’iniziale lavoro di segheria è stato affiancato dalle attività di falegnameria e di carpenteria. In seguito alla crescente domanda, l’impianto di base è stato ampliato per far fronte alla nuova offerta di servizi. La segheria attualmente dispone di uno stabilimento di 30.000 mq, di cui 3.500 coperti, sito lungo il fiume Tenna e vanta macchinari all’avanguardia nel settore. Impianto di segagione (specifico per legno massiccio), macchine a controllo numerico per la lavorazione delle travi e per carpenteria di prim’ordine, linea per rifilatura del tavolame, il tutto per garantire il massimo della qualità. I nostri legnami sono accuratamente selezionati e assicurano le migliori prestazioni sia nelle costruzioni ex novo che nel restauro.

Alto Tenna Strutture.  Nel 2014, vista la crescente richiesta da parte della nostra clientela, in Segheria Alto Tenna viene realizzata una nuova divisione, l’“Alto Tenna Strutture”, con lo scopo di fornire un qualificato supporto tecnico anche dal punto di vista progettuale. Viene creato uno studio di progettazione formato da tecnici qualificati con esperienza decennale nel settore legno (sia lamellare che massiccio), supportato dall’utilizzo di software specifici di ultima generazione. Il tassello mancante alla nostra azienda per poter fornire assistenza completa alla nostra clientela. Dal sopralluogo in cantiere, alla stesura di preventivi per fornitura e posa in opera del materiale. Dallo sviluppo di proposte progettuali personalizzate, fino alla progettazione completa della struttura che include la stesura degli elaborati grafici, tavole di montaggio, distinte di produzione e fornitura di tutta la documentazione necessaria a dare l’opera compiuta.

Name: EDELHOLZ Parkett Schweiz
Description:
EDELHOLZ ist ein innovativer Spezialist für die Herstellung von Eichenböden. Unsere Oberflächenbehandlungen betonen die unnachahmlichen, natürlichen Eigenschaften der ungarischen Eiche, so dass jede Diele ein besonderes, unvergleichliches Stück ist. Farbe bedeutet für uns das Holz selbst. Das einzigartige und unnachahmliche Design der Dielen und das Spiel atemberaubender Farben werden durch die Kombination von natürlichen Oberflächenbehandlungstechniken zum Leben erweckt. 

Unsere Hightech- und automatisierten Holzbearbeitungslösungen sorgen für die gleichmäßige und stets hohe Qualität unserer Holzdielen, was uns auf dem Markt von anderen Bodenherstellern unterscheidet. Das riesige Rund- und Schnittholzlager, das moderne Sägewerk, die großen, speziell auf Eichentrocknung spezialisierten Trockenkammern, das hochentwickelte Hobelwerk und die einzigartigen Anlagen für die Oberflächenbehandlung sichern unseren Erfolg für viele Jahre im Voraus. Unsere hochmodernen und einzigartigen Oberflächenbehandlungsmaschinen bieten die Möglichkeit zur kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung und Innovation. Unsere perfekte Trocknungs- und Klimatisierungsprozessen erlauben die höchste Qualität der EDELHOLZ-Produkten, die auch von unseren klimatisierten Lager- und Produktionshallen gewährleistet ist. 

In unserer Produktion trifft sich die moderne Technologie mit der jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung unserer Tischlermeister. Sie vermitteln die Tradition und die Werte der Vergangenheit. Bei EDELHOLZ vereinen sich das Fachwissen über Eichenbearbeitung von drei aufeinanderfolgenden Generationen und der ständige Innovationsbedarf, damit die 120 Jahren der Eiche von den eigenen Geschichten unserer Tischler in der Form vom Echtholzboden verlängert werden. Die menschlichen Augen und die unverzichtbare Arbeit der menschlichen Hand verleihen die schönsten Eigenschaften unserer Holzböden. Es sind diese unnachahmlichen und einzigartigen Handbewegungen und Meistermethoden, die jede Diele einzigartig machen.

Name: KiriCore Sustainable Materials
Description: KiriCore Sustainable Materials is a young company that develops and offers a sustainable core material for composite materials. Our KiriCore Sustainable Material is an alternative to hydrocarbon-based foams and balsa wood currently used in the production of wind turbine rotor blades. Hydrocarbon-based foams and balsa wood create a dependency on critical raw materials in the renewable energy sector. Our sustainable material KiriCore is based on Kiri wood, which grows in Europe. Kiri wood meets the requirements placed on core materials for composites and is also more economical. Our aim is therefore to strengthen the European supply chain for core materials and reduce dependence on non-European countries and non-sustainable materials.

Name: Renneberg Hardwoods, Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1980 by Wes Renneberg, Renneberg Hardwoods began as a sawmill and logging operation.  A local sawmill had shutdown and Wes saw a need in the community. The sawmill had a small team of 6 and operated in the same location as they operate in today.



In 1984, the first kiln was built and it was the start of Renneberg Hardwoods becoming the number one distributer of top quality kiln dried lumber in the midwest. By 1990, the team had perfected the process and grew into a team of 15 employees distributing their lumber mainly to cabinet shops and furniture makers. In 1994, Renneberg expanded once again by adding the Dimensions shop for the production of high quality mouldings.  



Renneberg Hardwoods prides itself on its intensely monitored kiln drying process, ensuring nothing but perfection in their end product. It has grown into a 75-person operation and maintains its roots by supporting sawmills both locally and throughout the country.

Name: Birka
Description:
BIRKA brings the best technology transfer to Latin America from various parts of the world: New Zealand, Germany, Austria, Holland, Sweden, USA, China, and Brazil. Each company represented is a world leader in its respective niche. 

In the mass timber industry glued we work with: 
Certified structural polyurethane adhesives for mass timber, worldwide the best assembly/presstime ratio. 
Machines to produce mass timber (CLT, glulam, finger joint) such as presses for curved and straight glulam beams, finger joining machines, CLT presses, large planers, various glue application machines, automation for a whole factory. 
Moisture membranes for mass timber building protection. 
Manual timber graders and inline graders for measuring the structural resistance of structural wood. 
Individually designed robotic arm systems on tracks for machining very large structural elements. 
Consulting on building new mass timber production lines. Voluntary audits and process improvement for mass timber lines. 
Delamination testing for mass timber customers and producers. 
Soon: sales of structurally graded wood for mass timber in Latam. 

For the panel industry we deal with: 
Non-contact laser technology for ultra precise and stable inline thickness measurement for MDF, MDP, OSB, plywood, gypsum and fibre-cement boards. The same technology is employed for sawmills green and dry areas. 
Ultra fast, high definition smart cameras for artificial vision, for surface defect detection and grading, as well as for dimensional measurements of all sorts (squareness, dimensions, thickness, crookedness), at up to 25.000 pictures/second.  
Soon: lignin-based resins for substitution of phenolic-formaldehyde resin , for plywood production, for a more sustainable, recyclable, healthier panel industry.

Name: La Legnami
Description:
Fondata nel 1947, La Legnami srl è un’azienda leader nella rivendita di prodotti in legno lavorati e semilavorati. Forte di una lunga esperienza, seleziona materie prime di alta qualità da mercati nazionali e internazionali, operando con particolare attenzione alla sostenibilità ambientale e all’efficienza energetica. In quest’ottica, nel 2010 ha installato un impianto fotovoltaico da 170 kWp, capace di coprire gran parte del fabbisogno energetico aziendale.

Nel tempo, La Legnami srl è diventata un punto di riferimento per imprese edili, falegnamerie, progettisti e professionisti del settore, ponendo il servizio al cliente al centro delle proprie strategie. Dal 2008 l’azienda utilizza centri di taglio a controllo numerico Hundegger, che hanno consentito la specializzazione nella produzione di kit pretagliati per pergolati, coperture, abitazioni ed edifici industriali.

Accanto alle strutture portanti, l’azienda fornisce materiali complementari per pareti e coperture, come isolanti, tavolati, tessuti tecnici e guaine. Dal 2007 opera anche nel settore delle pavimentazioni esterne in legno massello e composito (WPC), in risposta alle esigenze del comparto balneare.

Nel 2014 ha ampliato l’offerta introducendo case prefabbricate in tecnologia platform frame e in CLT/X-LAM. Dal 2017 ha adottato i principi della lean production, mentre nel 2018 ha investito in soluzioni Industria 4.0 e avviato l’iter per le certificazioni PEFC e FSC. Dal 2020, un avanzato sistema digitale consente il monitoraggio in tempo reale della produzione.

Negli ultimi anni, La Legnami srl rafforza il proprio impegno nella formazione e nella ricerca, collaborando con scuole, ordini professionali e università per promuovere l’innovazione nell’edilizia in legno.

Name: Mundloch GmbH
Description:

Mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung kennen wir den europäischen Palettenmarkt und die Herausforderungen der Logistik genau. Unser Produktsortiment umfasst Europaletten, Chemiepaletten, Einwegpaletten, Gitterboxen, Kisten, Holzaufsetzrahmen sowie Sonderpaletten nach Kundenwunsch – gefertigt mit höchster Präzision in unserem modernen Maschinenpark.

Unsere Kunden profitieren von:
 Maximaler Flexibilität – schnelle Anpassung unseres Maschinenparks für individuelle Kundenwünsche und kurzfristige Lieferungen
 Schneller Verfügbarkeit durch flexible Produktionskapazitäten
 Höchster Qualität dank modernster Fertigungstechnologien
 Nachhaltigen Lösungen – Produktion und Betriebsgebäude werden CO₂-neutral beheizt
 Individuellen Anpassungen – auf Wunsch mit zertifizierter SIREX- und IPPC - Hitzebehandlung

Dank unserem starken Netzwerk in Deutschland können wir attraktive Konditionen für Paletten, Schnittholz und Gitterboxen bieten. Unser erfahrenes Team unterstützt Sie von der Beratung bis zur schnellen Lieferung – zuverlässig und kompetent.

Name: Houtloadz
Description:
Welkom bij Houtloadz!

Wij zijn een kleinschalig bedrijf met een grote passie voor eikenhout. Vanuit onze eigen werkplaats in Dedemsvaart, Overijssel (tussen Zwolle en Hoogeveen), maken wij op ambachtelijke wijze unieke eikenhouten producten voor het interieur.

~ Van tafels tot wandplanken – volledig op maat ~
Wij ontwerpen eiken tafels, maar ook voor o.a. wandplanken, vensterbanken, traptreden en stoelen kun je bij ons terecht. Geen massaproductie, geen standaardoplossingen, maar uniek maatwerk voor producten die passen bij jouw stijl en ruimte.

~ Aandacht voor jou en je interieur ~
Wij geloven dat écht maatwerk verder gaat dan een exacte afmeting. Daarom luisteren we naar je ideeën, denken we actief met je mee en bieden we ruimte voor persoonlijke keuzes. Wil je zelf het hout selecteren of heb je een eigen ontwerp in gedachten? Dat kan! Samen zorgen we voor een eindresultaat dat helemaal klopt – in uitstraling, functie én gevoel.

Laat je inspireren op onze website of stap binnen in onze showroom en ontdek de vele mogelijkheden!

Name: Weinsberg Pellets
Description:
Feuer und Flamme für die Region. 

Unser Unternehmen produziert nachhaltige Holzpellets aus dem Waldviertel, um Ihnen den Komfort eines wohlig warmen Zuhauses zu bieten. Weinsberg Pellets bestehen aus frisch gepressten Spänen nachhaltig bewirtschafteter Fichtenwälder des größten geschlossenen Waldgebiets Österreichs, dem Weinsberg Forst. 

Dafür legen wir unsere Hand ins Feuer. 

Wir bieten die höchsten Qualitätsstandards und sind stolz auf unsere
unzähligen zufriedenen Kunden. Durch regelmäßige Qualitätskontrollen
und sorgsamen Umgang mit dem Produkt stellen wir sicher, dass Weinsberg Pellets in allen maßgeblichen Eigenschaften Bestwerte erzielen:
 Biologischer Premium-Brennstoff.
 Fichtenholz aus dem Waldviertel.
 Nachhaltig bewirtschaftet.

Name: Madison Custom Woodcrafts
Description:
At Madison Custom Woodcrafts we are driven to create handcrafted custom wood furnishings and products that will be cherished for generations. We pride ourselves in providing heirloom quality products that are designed and constructed to match our client’s needs and tastes.

Our passion for high quality custom wood products began in 1994 and we have honed our skills ever since. Skilled craftsmanship and attention to detail allow us to stand behind our products with a lifetime guarantee. Our products are bench made by an experienced wood craftsman who takes great pride and care in his work. If we put the Madison name on it, it is intended to last for many generations.

All of our 100% American-made products are custom designed pieces and can be customized by dimension, hardware choice, type of wood, and finish. Because a piece can only be as good as the material used, we carefully select the finest woods and use durable wood finishes which highlight the inherent beauty and grain of the wood.

Nossos produtos são focados na movimentação de armazenagem, estoque entre outros, de diversas industrias independentemente do seguimento, garantindo então uma experiência ampla de mercado atendendo desde de o seguimento automotivo ao alimentício.

As principais madeiras para a confecção dos nossos produtos são Eucalipto e Pinus, desta maneira trazemos qualidade e acabamento impecável para todos os modelos disponíveis em nosso catálogo.

Name: Les Copains des Bois
Description:
Les Copains des Bois 

La coop qui envoie du local... 

Les copains des bois rassemblent des forestiers, scieurs et artisans afin de re-créer des circuits courts du bois : de l’arbre au meuble ou à la charpente dans un rayon de 120 km ! 

Notre objectif : réaliser eu sein de notre structure toutes les étapes de la transformation du bois (abattage, sciage, séchage, profilage, mise en œuvre,…) tout en assurant sa traçabilité. Savoir d'où vient le bois et ce qu'il devient pour avoir une gestion durable de cette ressource locale.

Name: Gardia
Description:
Gardia est le spécialiste en ligne dédié à la vente d'abris de jardin, de rangements et mobiliers, de tonnelles extérieures et bien plus encore… 
Fort de son expérience réussie en Hollande, le groupe développe aujourd'hui sa présence en France. 

L'ensemble de nos produits : + de 800 références, proviennent directement de nos usines ou de notre entrepôt de 12 000 m² situé en Ile-de-France. Nous nous efforçons de proposer au marché français des produits de qualité supérieure, qui répondent aux exigences d’une sylviculture écologique et durable.

Nos collaborateurs ont des années d'expérience dans le domaine du jardin et des produits en bois.

Plus d’informations ? Consultez notre site : www.gardia.fr

Retrouvez-nous aussi sur nos autres réseaux sociaux :

Name: Steel and Timber Custom Designs
Description:
Steel and Timber is a woodworking and furniture company based in Ancaster Ontario. Our company started as a small one-man shop, quickly growing to a space of over 20,000 sq ft to support your custom woodworking needs! When our background in technical welding and our passion for woodworking met, Steel and Timber was born. Since then, we’ve created thousands of custom pieces for clients across North America and beyond.

Steel and Timber Custom Designs specializes in solid hardwood furniture, created individually for our clients. We pride ourselves in creating quality items that function flawlessly while also showcasing the natural beauty of Ontario Wood. All of the lumber for our projects are sourced locally and processed through our own lumberyard, giving us complete control of the materials.

We're also proud members of the West End Home Builders' Association.

Name: J&A Timber Solutions Ltd
Description: We are a dedicated and passionate team with years of expertise in the trade; our bespoke approach ensures all clients receive the precision and efficiency they expect, through exceptional craftsmanship at our exclusive joinery in Greater London. We have a modern, digitally controlled park of machines and advanced carpentry centers. This allows us to cut wood very precisely and make parts exactly the same every time.

We also have a design department, teams for wholesale and retail sales, a skilled production team, our own transport, and assembly teams. This way, we control every step of building a house.
