Name: Sc2p sciage
Description:
Spécialiste de la Première Transformation du Bois.

Entreprise familiale dirigée par Dominique et Rémi PETREQUIN, SC2P se consacre au matériel de sciage et d’affûtage pour la première transformation du bois. Notre expertise et notre engagement nous placent comme un acteur reconnu dans le secteur.

Chez SC2P, nous nous distinguons par notre expertise complète, allant de l’étude et la conception à la fabrication et l’installation de lignes de production. Nos services incluent :

- L'amélioration et le perfectionnement: Modernisez vos installations existantes grâce à nos solutions de mécanisation et d’automatisation.
- Des consommables de qualité: Découvrez notre gamme étendue de consommables de sciage et d’affûtage.

Nous sommes également l’un des représentants officiels en France de la marque italienne #COSTA , garantissant à nos clients l’accès à des bons produits.

> Une Approche Sur-Mesure <

Notre valeur ajoutée réside dans notre capacité à nous adapter à chaque demande. Nous offrons des solutions sur mesure, conçues pour répondre spécifiquement aux besoins de nos clients. Qu'il s'agisse de petits ajustements ou de grands projets, nous vous accompagnons pour garantir votre satisfaction.

Nos locaux, d’une superficie de 2 500 m², sont équipés pour répondre à vos besoins :
- Bureau d’étude : Pour des conceptions précises et innovantes.
- Atelier de mécanique: Pour une fabrication de haute qualité.
- Usinage : Pour des finitions impeccables.
- Zone de stockage: Pour une gestion optimale des matériaux et des consommables.

SC2P met son savoir-faire et son expertise technique au service des entreprises, tant au niveau national qu’international. Nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions efficaces et adaptées pour chaque projet.

Contactez nous pour discuter de vos besoins et découvrir comment SC2P peut vous accompagner dans vos projets.

Name: Verum Arbor
Description:
Welcome to Verum Arbor trademark — your trusted source for custom glued wood panels.

Since 1998, we've been crafting high-quality natural glued wood panels exclusively for our valued partner. In 2023, we took a significant step forward by introducing our brand, Verum Arbor, to the international market.

At Verum Arbor, we operate on a wholesale made-to-order model, which means we manufacture glued wood panels precisely to your specifications. You have the flexibility to choose from a diverse array of wood types, including pine, oak, beech, spruce, and ash, ensuring that our products align seamlessly with your unique project needs.

We source wood from certified providers, guaranteeing the finest quality. Each piece of natural wood is treated and assembled by our skilled masters, ensuring that our panels consistently meet the highest standards of quality, durability, and aesthetics. We stand by our commitment to delivering wood products that are not only visually stunning but also built to last.

Customer satisfaction is our top priority. We guarantee competitive and fair pricing and dedication to perfection in every single order we handle.

Follow our page to stay updated on our offerings!

Founded on the principles of excellence and innovation, we are committed to transforming spaces with superior craftsmanship and a client-centric approach. We pride ourselves on fostering strong client relationships, offering personalized service, and creating flexible work environments that support professional growth. At Decorama, we are driven by our mission to craft exceptional spaces that not only meet but exceed our clients’ expectations.

Name: Synergy Joinery
Description:
Established in 1999, Synergy Joinery is a local family-run business specialising in all types of joinery. Our bespoke, handcrafted timber windows are available in various styles and finishes. These include sash, sliding, casement, storm, and bay windows. 

We also handcraft bespoke timber doors and have a wide range for you to choose from. These include patio, French, sliding, bifold, garage and exterior doors. In addition, we can produce custom-made furniture and offer a wide variety of property restoration services. 

All our products are handcrafted by skilled tradesmen in our Hitchin workshop, and we supply and fit across London and the Home Counties. Wherever you’re based, we’d love to hear from you — give us a call, send us an email, or make an appointment to visit our workshop.

Name: Millwork Estimating Solutions
Description:
Established in Central Florida, Millwork Estimating Solutions is a company specialized in woodwork estimating and material take-offs.
We understand that every millwork project is unique, and that's why our estimates and material take-offs are fully customizable to suit your specific needs. From casework, countertops, and plastic laminate, to running trim, wall paneling, toilet partitions, custom receptions desks, complex bar designs and any woodwork you can imagine, we can provide a detailed millwork take-off and estimate break down in order to assist your team.

We service a wide-array of millwork shops across the United States whose works range from basic cabinetry to high-end millwork.

We add value & multiply your output, at a fraction of the cost !

Implantée dans les locaux de cette association, l’entreprise propose des produits (granulés bois) et des services (accueil de groupes et de mariage grâce à l’immense domaine à disposition) dans le bassin roannais, forézien et lyonnais. Par sa présence dans ce lieu historique, elle participe à l’entretien du patrimoine local et soutient financièrement le projet d’éducation de l’association Plantatio afin de garder le coût de scolarité accessible à tous.

Name: Pianeta Legno Floors USA, Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1947 and with over 25 years of experience in the U.S, Pianeta Legno is the leading provider of high-quality prefinished engineered hardwood flooring. We specialize in importing premium engineered floors, ensuring exceptional beauty, durability, and resistance. Our extensive 80 years of expertise guarantees success in every project.

In 2015, we expanded our business by introducing custom finishing of our wood flooring, investing in state-of-the-art machinery from Italy and the U.S. to offer custom finished products that are "Assembled in Europe, Finished in U.S.A."

Offering a wide selection of European-made engineered hardwoods, we provide floors finished with multiple coats of UV-cured polyurethane, water-based or Italian-made UV oil finishes. As the oldest and one of the largest importers of European engineered wood flooring in the U.S. since 1998, we offer nearly 300 different wood species and finishes to ensure a wide range of options for every project.

Name: Circlvloer | Circulaire vloeren
Description:
Er zijn al zoveel houten vloeren op de wereld, laat deze niet verloren gaan en geef ze een tweede leven! Maar hoe? Wij bieden mogelijkheden zodat gebruikte houten vloeren, niet op de afvalhoop belanden.

Heb jij een oude houten vloer? Mooi. Dan kunnen wij die voor jou vermaken tot een compleet nieuwe vloer. 

Heb je zelf geen houten vloer, maar wil je wél een circulaire vloer kopen? Óók dat kan! 

Zo zorgen we samen voor een beter leefklimaat. 

Een afvalvrije vloer, loopt gewoon lekkerder!

Established in 2019 and proudly rooted in Albania, Dru Tech has been redefining woodworking excellence with a perfect blend of tradition and innovation. We specialize in crafting bespoke woodwork pieces that are as functional as they are stunning. From intricately carved furniture to breathtaking staircases and art pieces, our creations are designed to elevate spaces and inspire.

At Dru Tech, we believe in the power of craftsmanship. Our talented artisans bring years of expertise, precision, and passion to every project, ensuring each piece is a masterpiece. Whether it’s a custom design or a timeless classic, every creation tells a unique story—one of quality, care, and artistic vision.

Name: Furniture Design Knossos Inc.
Description:
Our services include custom millwork, casework, architectural woodwork, and cabinets. As the company grows so has our skillset, which goes well beyond millwork manufacturing to include stone, metal, and glass to meet all project specifications. We also have in-house designers to provide ideas and solutions and answer any questions or concerns you may have with your project.

With over 40 years in the business, our experience and strong relationships with developers, architects, and construction companies have established Furniture Design Knossos as specialists in the hospitality industry. Our notable projects include lobbies, reception desks, wall and ceiling paneling, rooftop bars, and lounges. We do it all — with the utmost professionalism and outstanding craftsmanship. Name: KAIU
Description:
KAIU crafts premium wooden gyms designed to support children in developing their natural intelligence, along with enhancing their physical and mental well-being.

KAIU embraces Mindful Parenting as the essential "software" for fostering holistic human beings from childhood. In this journey, the role of education and play is crucial. Through play, children effectively acquire a wide range of skills. Sustainable and versatile wooden toys, like those provided by KAIU, serve as critical "hardware" in this endeavour. These eco-friendly toys not only facilitate open-ended play but also inspire children to explore their creativity, improve problem-solving skills, and bolster social competencies.

Name: WINTECH TIMBER
Description:
Wintech was born in 2020, when owner Steve and his father, who also run an established construction business, saw reports of a timber shortage across the UK, while they had a larger supply than their business needed

What began as a welcome solution for both domestic DIYers and tradespeople alike, at a difficult time for the country and our local community of Doncaster, has become a thriving business with a loyal customer base which continues to grow.

Run by Steve and Kerry, the Wintech team offers a personal customer experience, a local, competitively priced alternative to big name timber suppliers, and an extensive supply of timber for all manner of projects, whether that be small DIY jobs, or large-scale construction projects.

We supply Treated timber, Construction timber, Studwork timber, Fencing timber, and Outdoor timber, in a range of popular sizings and sawing types, as well as Sheet materials, Fixings and beyond. As construction professionals, we know a thing or two about timber, and our team are at hand to offer any advice you may need to select the right product for your application.

Our unique – some might say “remote” location – works in our favour, saving customers from the large number of neighbouring villages around us, from having to make unnecessary journeys into major town and city centres.

If you’re unfamiliar with the area, we can send you a map ahead of time, so you’re sure to find us, or for a small fee, we offer a delivery service, so you don’t need to leave your driveway.

Aujourd'hui, l'entreprise réussi à mettre en valeur plus de 50.000 tonnes de bois non utilisé dans l'industrie à travers trois offres majeures : 

*La production et la commercialisation de plaquettes forestières (humides & sèches) à destination des chaufferies et des installations énergétiques fonctionnant à partir de biomasse.

* La production et la vente de la marque Tcharbon : la seule production belge de charbon de bois pour barbecue. 

* La production et la vente de la marque Watt de Feu : bois de chauffage sec issu de nos Ardennes.

* La vente de la marque Tchin by Tcharbon : le véritable gin des Ardennes.

Name: Holzimprägnierwerk AG
Description:
Die Holzimprägnierwerk AG mit Sitz in Waldkirch ist seit über 75 Jahren Ihr Fachspezialist für langanhaltenden Holzschutz. Unsere Imprägnierungen überzeugen im Aussenbereich, wo hohe Anforderungen an die Schutzwirkung gestellt werden. Durch die Behandlung erhalten die Holzwerkstoffe eine erhöhte Dauerhaftigkeit und werden vor Schimmel, Pilzbefall und Insekten geschützt. Unser Angebot umfasst die Farbtöne grün, braun, grau und farblos. 
Seit 2021 bieten wir Ihnen exklusiv die Burnblock Brandschutzimprägnierung an. Dank diesen innovativen Verfahren kann Holz auch in Bereichen eingesetzt werden, in dem erhöhte Anforderungen an den Brandschutz gestellt werden. 
Zusätzlich zu unseren Diensleistungen bieten wir verschiedene imprägnierte Produkte für Haus und Garten an und führen ein vielseitiges Sortiment an Pfählen, Palisaden, Brettern und Kanthölzern mit grossen Lagerbeständen.

Unseren Kunden, Mitarbeitenden und der Umwelt gegenüber handeln wir stets ehrlich und zuverlässig und wir kommunizieren direkt. So schaffen wir die Voraussetzungen für eine langfristige und uneingeschränkte Zusammenarbeit.

Description: Henbert Interiors Finishing is a high-end millwork and upholstery firm located in Queens, New York. Name: Urban Lumber
Description:
Urban Lumber is a sawmill company based in Winnipeg, Manitoba dedicated to providing a sustainable alternative to traditional wood products.

Co-owners Mike McGarry and Carlee Farmer are environmental visionaries with an educational and professional background in forestry. In 2018 they identified a problem with the local hardwood industry. While 99% of Winnipeg's trees were being chipped in landfill, almost all of the hardwood being used was imported. This realization, after experiencing loss of many elm trees on their own Winnipeg street, prompted them to make change in their hometown.

100% of Urban Lumber's product is crafted from salvaged Winnipeg trees that are removed due to decline or development and would typically be destined for the landfill. Call it tree recycling if you will. Utilizing urban trees sequesters carbon and reduces the demand for traditionally harvested hardwood, which decreases the environmental impact associated with logging and transportation.

Name: Aureskosken Jalostetehdas Oy
Description:
Aureskosken Jalostetehdas kuuluu osana Tammisto-Yhtiöihin.

Tammisto-Yhtiön juuret ja arvot liittyvät suomalaiseen metsään ja puuhun. Aureskosken Jalostetehdas Oy käynnisti Aureskosken tehtaat syksyllä 2013.

Aureskosken jalostamolla on käytössä viisi höylälinjaa, sormijatkolinja, kaappalinja(katkaisu) sekä kaksi pintakäsittelylinjaa. Lisäksi käytössämme on rimoittamo sekä kuivauskapasiteettia. Tuotantoprosesesseissa tarvittava lämpöenergia tuotetaan omalla lämpövoimalalla.

Laitoksemme työllistää noin 80 puunjalostuksen ammattilaista, joilla on pitkänlinjan kokemus laadukkaiden tuotteiden tekemiseen.

Parkanossa ja Keuruulla on myös omat pellettitehtaat jotka tuottavat höyläämiemme tuotteiden purun ja lastut puhtaaksi kotimaiseksi bioenergiaksi. Aureskosken Jalostetehtaan kyllästämö sijaitsee Kolhossa, Mänttä-Vilppulassa.  Kaskisten ja Keuruun yksiköissä käytössämme on yhteensä viisi höylälinjaa ja maalauslinja.

Name: ReTree
Description:
Have you ever thought about what happens to a park tree after its removal? 
Up to now, almost all tree residuals in Vienna get chopped and composted - from a broom shrub to a one-hundred-year-old oak.
We at reTree believe that tree residuals are far too valuable for compost and strive to give them a second life as Urban Wood.

Why not craft a cutting board out of them, for example? This way, you get a unique wood product, coming from your own city, connecting you with your favorite tree. 
At the same time, a part of the revenues is used for planting a new one - reTree!
Stay tuned for updates on our startup!

Description:
We are premium-quality design sauna manufacturers, with our main production facility based in the EU – Latvia.

In almost three years of operation, we provide jobs for 15 people and mainly specialize in producing premium-quality design saunas, along with panel houses and hunting towers – all handcrafted by carpenters with a lifetime of experience in woodworking.

Our saunas are crafted with a care of design, durability and functionality, using the highest quality materials to ensure product longevity along with consistent aesthetic and structural integrity.
Since we mainly focus on exports, we have delivered our saunas to more than 20 countries across the EU and beyond. From the Norwegian fjords and Iceland's challenging landscapes, to commercial and domestic installations across Central Europe, including the mountainous regions of Austria, France, and Italy, where our saunas have been installed at altitudes of up to 2,650 meters, to the sunny southern regions of France, Spain, and even Portugal.

We fully design and hand-crafting each sauna cabin by ourselves, with individual preferences in every unit to meet each client's unique needs, incorporating modern solutions in both visual design and practical usage.

When we manufacture our products, we building them each one as if it were for ourselves. This guiding principle guarantees a visually appealing result, using high-quality, environmentally friendly materials.

When manufacturing our saunas, we make them as for ourselves! This motto of ours provides a visually enjoyable result, executed using high-quality and environmentally friendly materials.

Do you have your own idea for a dream sauna? We will be happy to help make it happen!

Contact us for more information.

Name: Bois Tourné
Description:
Laisser libre court à ma pensée pour créer en respectant le bois et ce qu'il m'inspire...
Les artisans tourneurs sur bois sont des artistes qui transforment des morceaux de bois en de magnifiques œuvres d’art uniques. Leur métier consiste à utiliser un tour à bois pour sculpter et façonner le bois, créant ainsi des pièces originales et personnalisées. Chaque création est le fruit d’un travail minutieux et d’une grande expertise, ce qui en fait des pièces uniques et authentiques.

Les artisans tourneurs sur bois sont capables de réaliser une grande variété d’objets, allant des bols et des vases aux stylos et aux bijoux. Leurs créations se distinguent par leur beauté naturelle et leur caractère intemporel. En choisissant de faire appel à un artisan tourneur sur bois, on opte pour des pièces uniques et artisanales, loin de la production de masse.

Ce métier traditionnel requiert patience, précision et créativité. Chaque pièce est le fruit d’un processus de création minutieux, où le tourneur sur bois laisse libre cours à son imagination pour donner vie à des objets uniques et personnalisés. En optant pour une création d’artisan tourneur sur bois, on fait le choix de posséder une pièce unique, chargée d’histoire et de savoir-faire.

En somme, les artisans tourneurs sur bois sont des créateurs passionnés qui transforment le bois en de véritables œuvres d’art. Leurs créations uniques et originales apportent une touche d’authenticité et de charme à tout intérieur.

Name: JP CARP - Carpintaria e Marcenaria Offshore e Naval
Description:
"Somos Excelência em Marcenaria Naval e Carpintaria Industrial"

A JP CARP é uma empresa especializada em serviços de marcenaria naval e carpintaria industrial, atendendo a setores como offshore, exportação e construção naval. Com 2 anos de atuação no mercado, nos destacamos pela combinação de qualidade, inovação e sustentabilidade, oferecendo soluções completas e personalizadas para cada cliente.

Nossos Serviços:

Fabricação de Caixas de Madeira para Exportação: Caixas robustas 100% em eucalipto, certificadas com fumigação para atender a todas as normas internacionais de exportação.
Produção de Pallets de Madeira: Pallets personalizados, feitos sob medida em madeira de eucalipto, garantindo alta resistência e durabilidade para cargas pesadas.

Fornecimento de Madeira de Lei Naval: Madeiras nobres, como Garapa, Paraju e Maçaranduba, ideais para construções e reparos em embarcações devido à sua alta resistência.

Carpintaria Industrial Sob Medida: Desenvolvimento de soluções de carpintaria sob medida para o setor industrial, utilizando tecnologia avançada no processamento de madeira.

Serviços de Marcenaria Naval e Fabricação de Móveis: Fabricação e instalação de móveis em MDF, madeira maciça e compensado naval; reparos em portas, beliches, armários e outros componentes.

Reparos e Manutenção em Embarcações: Serviços especializados em carpintaria e marcenaria para reparos, manutenção e instalação em ambientes marítimos.

Por que Escolher a JP CARP? Nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade é refletido no uso responsável de recursos naturais e na inovação de nossos processos produtivos. Utilizamos madeira de eucalipto e técnicas avançadas para garantir produtos que aliam qualidade, durabilidade e responsabilidade ambiental.

Nossa equipe de profissionais qualificados está preparada para transformar suas necessidades em soluções práticas e eficientes, sempre prezando pelo atendimento personalizado e pela excelência na entrega.

Daarnaast bieden we verfijnd meubilair en interieurstukken zoals tafels, inbouwkasten en bureaus. Elk project, groot of klein, krijgt bij ons een persoonlijke aanpak en aandacht voor detail. Ontdek hoe wij uw buitenruimte kunnen transformeren met maatwerk dat past bij uw stijl en behoeften.

Kernwoorden: maatwerk, hout, duurzaam, boomhutten, buitenkamers, poolhouses, outdoor living, meubilair op maat, schrijnwerk, uniek ontwerp, vakmanschap.

Voor meer informatie, bezoek http://woodz.design (Woodz Design) https://www.handmadeinbelgium.com/labelhouder/woodz-design (Handmade in Belgium).

Name: De Kloeff - Circulair Hout
Description:
De Kloeff werkt aan hout van de toekomst. Efficiënte demontage van afval-pallets tot 'ready-to-use'-hout. 

Ieder jaar verbranden of versnipperen we in Nederland miljoenen pallets. Tegelijkertijd importeren we nieuw hout van ver voor allerlei toepassingen. Dit kan én moet anders. De Kloeff richt zich op efficiënte demontage van afgedankte pallets: In 3 minuten maken wij van een pallet weer metaalvrij hout. Het secundaire hout leveren we aan circulaire partners of verwerken we zelf tot kant-en-klare duurzame houtproducten. 

In onze impact-first missie zijn financiële waarden net zo belangrijk als natuurlijke en menselijke waarden. Zo willen we tot 2031 maar liefst 1.000.000 bomen behouden in de Europese bossen en werken we aan 100+ arbeidsplaatsen voor mensen voor wie een baan niet vanzelfsprekend is.

Name: Caisserie du Bazadais
Description:
La Caisserie du Bazadais est une entreprise familiale et artisanale d'exception spécialisée dans la fabrication de caisses et de coffrets bois.
Né de l'amour du vin de Jean-François Despujols et fort de plusieurs décennies d'expérience sur le marché national et international, la Caisserie du Bazadais est à la pointe de la technologie, intégrant des processus innovants tout dans le respect des traditions séculaires du travail du bois.
En 2019 Marc Despujols reprend la tête de l'entreprise.
Passionnés et engagés dans l’excellence, nous croyons fermement que la qualité de notre travail est indissociable du respect que nous portons à l'Homme et à la Nature.

Des valeurs fondamentales que nous avons plaisir à partager avec les
nombreuses maisons de vin nous faisant confiance depuis plusieurs années.
C'est pourquoi nous avons développé une démarche RSE rigoureuse, qui place le bien-être de nos collaborateurs et la préservation de l'environnement au cœur de notre activité.
Chez nous, chaque pièce de bois est sélectionnée avec soin, en privilégiant les essences durables et les sources locales. Nous adoptons des pratiques éco-responsables pour minimiser notre empreinte carbone et veiller à ce que notre impact sur la planète soit le plus réduit possible.

Nous sommes également engagés à offrir à nos collaborateurs des conditions de travail qui réduisent la pénibilité, grâce à l'utilisation d'équipements modernes et ergonomiques.
Cela nous permet non seulement de garantir un environnement de travail sain et sécurisé, mais aussi de valoriser leur savoir-faire exceptionnel dans les meilleures conditions possibles.

Notre vision est d’allier tradition et innovation pour produire des caisses en bois et des coffrets luxueux, tout en prenant soin de ceux qui les fabriquent et des ressources naturelles qui nous sont chères.

Ensemble, créons un monde qui nous ressemble.
Pour chaque projet, nos équipes se tiennent à votre disposition pour concevoir un emballage unique.

Name: Ahşap İşleri
Description:
2018 yılında hobi olarak başladığımız zeytin ağacından ahşap tasarım ürünlerini zeytin ağacının bereketi ve cazibesiyle profesyonel olarak tasarlayıp ev ve iş yerlerinizde günlük yaşamınızı kolaylaştırıcı malzemeler üretiyoruz.
Mezopotamya’nın eşsiz zenginlikteki topraklarında yetişen zeytin ağaçlarımızın her bir budağından fışkıran kadim bilgelik gizemlerini evlerinize saat, sunumluk, kesme tahtası, vazo, çerçeve, kase ve kaşıklar olarak taşıyoruz.

Ürünlerimizi isteğinize göre Kayısı, dut, ceviz, badem ağaçlarının tazeliği ile süslüyoruz.
Ürünlerimizin hiç birinde kimyasal madde kullanmadan, tamamen el işçiliği ile iki üretim bir tasarım atölyesinde çalışmaları yapılarak saf zeytinyağı ile cilalandıktan sonra satışa sunuyoruz.

Amacımız ticarete geri dönüşüm anlayışını da katarak kerestesi olmayan, ömrü dolmuş bu ağaçları evlerinizde yaşatmaya devam etmek, nesilden nesile kıymeti bilinecek evladiyelik eşyalar ortaya koyarak Türk ve dünya pazarında ülkemizin bilinirliğini arttırmaktır.

Name: Cambois SA
Description:
At Cambois, our mission is to transform spaces by offering elegant and practical acoustic solutions that seamlessly integrate into any environment. We design acoustic panels that are not only high-performing but also aesthetically remarkable, with a range of finishes that includes wood, metal, and natural stone. Each product is crafted for easy, quick installation without compromising on quality or design. We firmly believe that a harmonious environment contributes to well-being and productivity, and we are committed to providing solutions that meet acoustic needs without sacrificing style.

Our vision is to become the benchmark in Switzerland and beyond for acoustic solutions that perfectly blend technology and aesthetics. We aim to raise the standards of acoustics by creating innovative, inspiring products that adapt to a wide variety of interior spaces, both professional and residential. At Cambois, we are driven by a passion for sustainable innovation and customer satisfaction, offering durable, eco-friendly products that are at the cutting edge of design trends. Name: BOIS D’AFRIQUE
Description:
Bois d’Afrique est une entreprise de menuiserie moderne spécialisée dans la création de meubles innovants et sur mesure. Notre mission est de combiner l’artisanat traditionnel avec des designs contemporains pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client. Voici ce qui fait de nous un choix exceptionnel :
1. Design Innovant et Moderne
Nous sommes fiers de proposer des meubles au design avant-gardiste. Que ce soit pour votre salon, votre chambre à coucher, ou votre cuisine, nos créations allient esthétique et fonctionnalité.
2. Meubles sur Mesure
Chez Bois d’Afrique, nous comprenons que chaque espace est unique. C’est pourquoi nous réalisons des meubles sur mesure, adaptés à vos goûts et à vos besoins. Vous rêvez d’une bibliothèque personnalisée ou d’un dressing sur mesure ? Nous sommes là pour concrétiser vos envies !
3. Matériaux de Qualité
Nous utilisons des essences de bois locales de haute qualité, telles que le teck, le badi, le cedrella, le framiré et le fraké. Tous nos bois sont soigneusement séchés et traités pour résister aux insectes, aux champignons et au feu. Votre meuble sera à la fois beau et durable.
4. Équipe Qualifiée
Notre équipe de menuisiers qualifiés met tout en œuvre pour vous offrir un service professionnel. De la prise de mesure à la livraison, nous sommes à votre écoute pour garantir votre satisfaction.
Contactez-nous
Vous avez un projet en tête ? Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour une consultation gratuite. Nous sommes situés à Abidjan, Côte d’Ivoire, et nous sommes impatients de réaliser vos projets de mobilier sur mesure.

Name: Mogno Woods
Description:
En Mogno Woods creemos que cada pieza de madera lleva consigo tiempo, historia y carácter.

Fabricamos y suministramos chapas naturales, tintadas y tratadas, tableros rechapados, molduras, perfiles técnicos, cantos y marquetería, además de paneles acústicos que combinan estética y funcionalidad.

Nuestra filosofía es clara: la madera no es solo materia prima, es alma convertida en diseño. Por eso trabajamos con procesos que respetan su esencia, cuidando cada veta y cada textura, para transformarlas en soluciones únicas que suman calidez, belleza y durabilidad a los proyectos de arquitectos, interioristas y carpinteros industriales.

Unimos tradición artesanal y modernidad técnica para desafiar lo convencional y responder con productos que elevan la experiencia de los espacios. Con un compromiso firme con la sostenibilidad y la innovación, convertimos los desafíos en oportunidades para crear proyectos excepcionales que trascienden el tiempo.

Name: NBM Timber Products Limited
Description:
NBM Timber Products Ltd has been supplying industrial based timber products since it commenced trading in 1889. Throughout its long history, the company has continually adopted new manufacturing techniques and adapted to new products to suit the ever changing market-place.

With over 141 years' experience, NBM Timber Products Ltd offers its customers a wealth of knowledge and expertise in all fields of industrial-based timber products. NBM continues to supply its products to all areas of the United Kingdom and many of the most prestigious companies in the country have approached NBM for advice on their timber packaging requirements.

Quality and customer service have always been at the forefront of NBM’s ethos. The company's overriding desire is to supply its customers with the best possible products for their required application at the best possible price.
The company is proud to be accredited to the ISO 9001 quality standard. Mindful of its corporate responsibility to the environment, NBM is now also an accredited member of the ISO 14001 Environmental Standard.

NBM has been a member of the Forestry Stewardship Council for several years. This means that customers can be assured that all timber used in NBM's manufacturing processes is sourced from ethically managed forests.

NBM has also been a member of the UK Wood Marking scheme for many years. This allows the company to offer its' customers timber products which can be exported around the globe under the ISPM 15 rules.

NBM has always been an active member and supporter of TIMCON which is the main trade association of the timber pallet and packaging industry.

Name: MP Lumber
Description:
At MP Lumber, we are committed to providing top-quality wood products to our

Led by CEO Petar Curic, who brings a wealth of experience from his tenure as the
former General Secretary of the Croatian Association of Wood Processing Industry,
MP Lumber has rapidly emerged as a key player in the market. Petar's
entrepreneurial vision led him to establish the company in 2018, initially catering to a
select group of clients with processed wood products. Through dedication and
superior service, MP Lumber quickly gained recognition and expanded its operations
to become one of the premier oak sellers in Europe.

While oak remains our flagship product, we also distribute various other types of
wood to meet the demands of our diverse clientele. With strategically located
storages, sawmills, and a team of skilled professionals spread throughout Europe,
we ensure efficient operations and timely delivery of our products.

At MP Lumber, we take pride in our commitment to quality, sustainability, and
customer satisfaction. Whether you're a builder, designer, or distributor, we are here
to provide you with the finest wood products tailored to your specific requirements.
Join us as we continue to grow and innovate in the wood industry, setting new
standards of excellence along the way.

epicPLY ist leicht, aber keinesfalls schwach! Unsere Platten sind dank der höheren Anzahl an Mittellagen super stabil und haben eine hervorragende Schraubenauszugsfestigkeit. Ausserdem sind sie feuchtigkeitsresistent (D3) verleimt, damit dein Projekt möglichst lange hält.

Wir bei epicPLY lieben unseren Planeten. Deshalb stellen wir unsere Platten unter umweltschonenden Bedingungen her. Der Herstellungsprozess ist CO2-neutral, und wir arbeiten eng mit lokalen Landwirten zusammen, um nachhaltige Waldwirtschaft zu fördern. Name: Tonnellerie du Val de Loire
Description:
Créée en 1932 par Monsieur Jacky Blanchard, la Tonnellerie du Val de Loire est une entreprise artisanale appartenant au groupe VRIET depuis 2006.
Implantée au cœur des plus belles forêts de France, notre société familiale a su acquérir le savoir-faire nécessaire pour fabriquer des fûts en chêne de qualité. 
Le choix du bois demande une connaissance parfaite des forêts, de leur climat et de la nature des sols. Cette sélection sur pied s’effectue essentiellement dans les forêts domaniales du centre de la France et selon des critères de qualités bien définis. Seuls les chênes de haute futaie
sont retenus pour la finesse de leurs grains garantissant ainsi les arômes
et les tanins nécessaires lors de la vinification. 
Une merranderie est présente au sein du Groupe VRIET, véritable atout stratégique, cette chaine d’une capacité de production de 1 500 m3 de merrains par an nous permet d’assurer le contrôle total de la qualité de la matière première mais également d’assurer une parfaite traçabilité de nos bois.
Grâce à un service achat dédié, notre merranderie nous permet de maîtriser et sécuriser intégralement nos approvisionnements. Chaque parcelle de bois, associée à un massif forestier, donne lieu à un lot de merrain qui générera par la suite une campagne de fûts.

Name: Bykle Vindu AS
Description:
Bykle Vindu AS har produsert kvalitetsvindu og -dører i Bykle i Setesdal sidan 1984.

I dag er me om lag 60 tilsette, med hovudkontor og fabrikk i Bykle. Me har også 2 seljarar som jobbar frå avdelingskontor på Kirkenær. I tillegg har me utstilling og kontor på Bryn i Oslo.

Me produserer primært vindu med kittfals, og leverer mykje til antikvariske og verneverdige bygg. Detaljar og høg kvalitet på finish er sentralt for oss - her er det ikkje noko som er "standard". Me produserer vindu og dører slik kunden ønskjer, med utgangspunkt i ønskt stilart, tidsepoke, funksjonalitet eller anna.

iSOKiTT-vinduet utvikla me saman med Grindland Trevare i 2007, og det er no denne type vindu me sel aller mest av. iSOKiTT byggjer på klassisk utsjånad som kobla vindu har, men vedlikehald og reinhald er mykje enklare enn på kobla vindu.

I tillegg til iSOKiTT produserer me tradisjonelle kobla vindu, isolervindu med glaslist og ulike typar spesialvindu. Me produserer også balkongdører og ytterdører.

Ved utvikling av vår vindu og dører har me lagt stor vekt på å ivareta omsynet til tradisjonell byggjeskikk og dei verdiar dette representerer. Design er behalde mest mogleg likt sitt originale, klassiske utspring, medan kvalitet og brukseigenskapar er tilpassa dagens krav til morderne vindu.

Me nyttar som standard malmfuru med tette årringar og høg andel kjerneved - og set vår stoltheit i fin avslutning med kvalitetsmåling og nøyaktige kittfalsar. Kunden kan velje mellom ei rekke tilval, som til dømes uttrekt bunnkarm og losholt, dekor post og losholt, ulike typar hjørnejern, ei rekke forskjellige hasper og hengsler - og mykje meir!

Name: Intrust-project
Description:
INTRuST addresses experts from furniture-related companies, forest operators, companies’ employees and managers to increase their skills and competences on sustainable certification in the industry 4.0.

INTRuST partnership brings together experts in technology, wood certification, forestry and energy consumption, forest certification and environmental marketing from  different VET institutions, research entities and industry representatives to reach the following objectives:
- Increase the knowledge, skills and attitudes on climate change and sustainable development in VET through the design of a new curricula on environment-related strategies and certifications that will adapt VET provisions according to the skills needs of the addressing sectors and will contribute to the validation of non-formal learning.
- Improve digital readiness of wood and furniture manufacturers through the development of specific training of industry 4.0 in the forest and wood value chain which could support a “twin  – green and digital – transition”.
- Develop and test a digital coaching tool that will allow industries to know what certifications schemes are the most suitable and then suggest the appropriate training content to study in each case, contributing to the promotion of flexible and permeable pathways.
- Deliver the training through e-learning platform (MOOC) in different EU languages, providing interactive learning terials and promoting the use of open and online learning, as well as multidisciplinary learning approaches
- Raise awareness about the importance of the different certification schemes that can support the enterprises to improve their performance and sales.

DIE MANUFAKTUR

Unsere Produkte entstehen in Radolfzell-Markelfingen am Bodensee. Zuerst in unseren Köpfen, dann in unserer Werkstatt als Muster. Und wenn wir die neue Idee für gut befinden produzieren wir ebenfalls in unserer Werkstatt oder in Z
usammenarbeit mit verschiedenen karitativen Einrichtungen
in unserer Region.

Wir stehen für erstklassige Verarbeitung der verschiedenen Hölzer, die wir am liebsten regional beziehen, und kombinieren traditionelles Handwerk mit moderner Lasertechnologie. So entsteht ein echtes Seesucht-Produkt. Immer so individuell wie das Holz aus dem es gemacht ist.

Regional, nachhaltig, langlebig

Name: SAS Chauvaud Bois
Description:
Fondée il y a plus de 100 ans (1921), les premières activités de sciage ont débutées avec l'installation d'une scie montée sur l'ancien moulin à eau du château de Verteuil-Sur-Charente (classé aujourd'hui aux Monuments Historiques) !
C'est en 1958 que les activités déménagent sur le lieu actuel de la scierie Chauvaud, transmise de gendre puis de père en fils pendant plus de 3 générations.
Les activités de sciage, de fabrication de parquet massif et lambris se développent et connaissent une forte croissance sur les marchés français, belges et espagnols.
C'est en 2005 que les premières productions de marquants (tuteurs carrés appointés) sont mises en place par la famille Chauvaud pour répondre au marché de la LGV (ligne Paris-Bordeaux).
L'entreprise Chauvaud Bois, certifiée PEFC et spécialisée dans le Chataignier, adopte en 2023 une nouvelle forme juridique en Société par Actions Simplifiées et poursuit le développement de sa gamme de marquants pour les marchés viticoles (Bordeaux, Cognac...) et pépinières tout en maintenant ses activités de production de parquet massif. Ses bois proviennent des forêts dans les 30 à 40 kms aux alentours assurant un faible impact carbone pour ses produits made in France !

Electric substation with a capacity of 250 kW.

The total area of the buildings is: 3,119.14 m2 (of which the area of the industrial hall is: 1,521.48 m2)

Name: ZADROŻNI - piękno z natury
Description:
Działamy od 1989 r. Jesteśmy przedsiębiorstwem z długą tradycją i wieloletnim doświadczeniem w: uszlachetnianiu płyt drewnopochodnych fornirami naturalnymi, egzotycznymi i modyfikowanymi, formatyzowaniu płyty na wymiar, produkcji obrzeży wzmacnianych fizeliną, obrzeży z klejem, obrzeży warstwowych od 1mm do 1,5mm, produkcji formatek spajanych na styk, oklejaniu krawędzi jak i lakierowaniu.

Każdy rodzaj okleiny dostępnej u nas, można zestawić na dowolnym rodzajem płyty, co daje możliwość wyboru spośród tysięcy kombinacji. Do każdej fornirowanej płyty można dobrać idealne obrzeże naturalne dostępne również w naszej ofercie.

Podstawowym wyróżnikiem, produkowanych przez nas płyt uszlachetnianych, jest ich wysoka jakość. Fornir nakładany jest za pomocą nowoczesnych maszyn, dzięki czemu zespojenie liści okleiny na płycie jest idealnie dopasowane i trwałe. Wpływa to zarówno na ergonomię jak i estetykę przedmiotów wykonanych z naszych płyt. Jesteśmy odpowiedzialni ekologicznie. Nasz park maszynowy pozwala wyprodukować pełnoformatowe płyty uszlachetnione fornirem. Tworząc i produkując wyroby z płyt fornirowanych nie musicie się Państwo ograniczać do standardowych wymiarów. Możemy zaproponować coś co wykracza poza standardy. Do produkcji płyt fornirowanych używamy klejów posiadających odpowiednie certyfikaty i dopuszczenia. Mamy pewność, że nasze wyroby nie są szkodliwe dla ludzi i środowiska. Zapraszamy do współpracy.

- modelli 3D, simulazione e prototipi

Name: Tartak Napiwoda sp. z o.o.
Description:
Tartak Napiwoda Sp. z o.o. to firma z bogatą tradycją i siedemdziesięcioletnią historią. Tartak w Napiwodzie powstał w roku 1948, a od 2002 r. jest firmą prywatną i zyskał status spółki. Jego siedziba znajduje się w Napiwodzie – malowniczej mazurskiej miejscowości, którą otaczają soczyście zielone Lasy Napiwodzko-Ramuckie.

Pracownicy naszej firmy stanowią lojalny zespół z długoletnim doświadczeniem. Wielu z nich pracuje w tartaku ponad 30 lat.
Dzięki ich wiedzy i kompetencjom jesteśmy w stanie spełnić oczekiwania nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów.

Odbiorcami naszych produktów są fabryki okien, drzwi, mebli, trumien i konstrukcji klejonych
Naszym atutem jest wysokiej jakości surowiec, który kupujemy z lasów racjonalnie zarządzanych przez Nadleśnictwa Regionalnej Dyrekcji Lasów Państwowych w Olsztynie.

Przestrzegamy restrykcyjnych norm dotyczących ochrony środowiska oraz kontroli produkcji, co potwierdzają posiadane przez nas certyfikaty FSC i PEFC.

Wiedząc, jak ważną rolę w przyrodzie odgrywa drewno, dbamy o jego efektywne wykorzystanie, dlatego kora jest sprzedawana do sklepów ogrodniczych, trocina – spalana na potrzeby suszenia tarcicy lub dystrybuowana producentom pelletu, a frakcjonowana zrębka papiernicza trafia do papierni.

Name: Seva Vivek - NGO
Description:
Seva Vivek NGO serves as a beacon of empowerment in Palghar district, Maharashtra, committed to uplifting tribal communities through education, employment, and sustainable practices. They offer free bamboo handicraft training to tribal women, fostering economic independence. Through social media and websites, Seva Vivek aims to expand employment opportunities, promoting a movement known as “Bamboo Sevak” nationwide. 

Their vision transcends mere economic empowerment; it’s a holistic approach to fortify India’s social and cultural fabric, focusing on vulnerable communities like tribals grappling with issues such as malnutrition and illiteracy. Operating from the Vivek Rural Development Center in Bhaliwali village near Virar, their approach encompasses training, employment generation, environmental conservation, and agro-tourism. Inspired by the ethos of Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh, Seva Vivek’s selfless dedication underscores their motto: “Seva hai yagnakund samidha sam hum jale.” Their initiatives and commitment to social welfare reflect a profound dedication to building a stronger, more inclusive India. 

Seva Vivek’s impact extends far beyond products; it’s a testament to social change driven by compassion and empowerment, shaping a more equitable and empowered society. Their diverse range of bamboo products includes Kandils, Bamboo Agarbatti Stand, Fruit Stand, Tea-Coaster, Bamboo Chair, Pen Stand, Bamboo Flower Stand, Bamboo Piggie Bank, and more. 

Their motto, "नारी सक्षम तो परिवार सक्षम, परिवार सक्षम तो समाज सक्षम, समाज सक्षम तो राष्ट्र सक्षम, राष्ट्र सक्षम तो विश्व सक्षम" encapsulates their commitment to rural development and global harmony. Seva Vivek exemplifies the principle of "Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam" – the world is one family.

Name: Brondello Erminio SAS
Description:
Un pezzo di legno non si possiede completamente.
Si custodisce e si tramanda. 
Questo è lo spirito e, ancora prima, l'identità che nutre la segheria - parola che non esaurisce la complessità del luogo - dove la famiglia Brondello e i suoi collaboratori plasmano l'unicità. 
Ma soprattutto danno nuova vita al legno: quello che abita le nostre case, i pavimenti e tutto ciò che vogliamo resista. Il tempo evolve la materia, così la brondelloerminio crede che sia giusto dire "We Give Time to Time". 
Legno senza futuro, e quindi da scartare, solo per coloro che non sanno sognare. 
Per Brondello, la messa a dimora di un progetto culturale, le cui radici sono quelle degli alberi che furono.

Name: Ipir - F.lli Zangheri & C.
Description:
La nostra Ditta si ricollega ad un’azienda fondata nel 1920, e dal 1960, continua a produrre esclusivamente impiallacciature ricomposte in essenze di legni naturali pregiati di tutte le tipologie. 
È proprio la lunga esperienza, unita a conoscenze tecnologiche all’avanguardia ed ai numerosi controlli di qualità , che ci consentono di poter vantare  prodotti che sono attualmente per qualità, prezzo, varietà di modelli e colori i migliori disponibili sul mercato del settore.
I nostri tranciati ricomposti costituiscono una vantaggiosa alternativa all’impiego dei tranciati naturali sia per quanto riguarda i prezzi, sia per quanto riguarda la loro lavorazione poiché assicurano la più assoluta affidabilità delle tonalità  cromatiche e vengono fornite in dimensioni appositamente studiate per permetterne una utilizzazione ottimale. E’ quindi un prodotto più facilmente applicabile su pannello perché non presenta scarto. Essendo fabbricate in vero legno naturale pregiato, le impiallacciature IPIR, richiederanno, nei successivi utilizzi, le medesime procedure di lavorazione delle impiallacciature naturali quali, incollaggio, levigatura, lucidatura.

Grazie alla lavorazione in impianti e tintorie tecnologicamente all’avanguardia, i nostri articoli sono dotati di colori resistentissimi e  garantiscono un’ ineguagliabile stabilità della loro qualità nel tempo.  Per questo i tranciati ricomposti IPIR vengono esportati in tutto il mondo, resi altamente competitivi dall’acquisizione delle essenze pregiate direttamente dall’Africa e presso i vari Paesi produttori delle materie prime, sempre rigorosamente nel rispetto dell’ecosistema forestale.

IPIR mette a disposizione oltre 500 diversi modelli delle radiche più rare e pregiate che vengono forniti in fogli di spessore variabile. Tutti i vari modelli vengono offerti in una vastissima gamma di venature, colori che rendono i nostri prodotti adatti per la realizzazione di molteplici progetti.

These wood pellets used in various applications, including:

Penn Pallet offers heat treating and borate treating services, pallet recycling, and generates wooden fiber for fuel and other useful products from wood waste. Let our history and experience work for you. We are always available when you need us.

Name: Joe Price Woodworking LLC
Description:
At Joe Price Woodworking LLC, we don't just build products; we craft future heirlooms.

Specializing in heirloom-quality wood furniture and accessories for both home and office, we are dedicated to the time-honored traditions of fine woodworking. Every piece is a testament to meticulous craftsmanship, exceptional design, and the enduring beauty of natural wood.

From a custom conference table that defines an executive office to a handcrafted coffee table that anchors your living room, our products are designed to be used, admired, and passed down through generations.

Invest in furniture that tells a story—your story. Choose Joe Price Woodworking LLC for pieces that combine lasting utility with timeless elegance.

Name: Gracewood GmbH
Description:
Wir sind der Hersteller des Basic Bricks for the circular Economy. Kurz: BABI.

Hieraus fertigen wir Echtholzoberflächen einer völlig neuen Dimension. Die optischen Eigenschaften & Möglichkeiten dieser Oberflächen sind einzigartig und technisch versetzen wir den Werkstoff Holz in die Lage, Dinge zu tun, die ansonsten außerhalb der holztechnischen Grenzen liegen.

Unseren Partnern bieten wir einen CO2 speichernden Grundstoff, Halbzeuge und fertige Produkte mit Alleinstellungsmerkmalen.
Wir agieren auch als White-Label und stellen fertige Produktionsprozesse sowie Anlagen und Maschinen für die automatische Produktion der neuartigen Produkte zur Verfügung. Dabei identifizieren wir gleichzeitig die Potenziale zur Ausschöpfung der vorhandenen Förderpotenziale zu den individuelle gewählten Umsetzungsmaßnahmen. Das funktioniert, weil unser Rohstoff BSFZ gesiegelt ist.

Wir freuen uns auf Sie als Partner in der Oberflächenanwendung vom Boden bis zur Decke sowie unendlich vielen Consumer Produkten wie Boxensystemen, Schalterelementen oder Schallschutzpaneelen u.v.m..

Ob Industriebetrieb, Handwerker oder Experte im Bereich der Oberflächentechnik, Planer, Architekturbüro oder Innenarchitekt, wir freuen uns auf Ihr Interesse.

Name: PT Biomass Indo Pacific
Description:
PT. Biomass Indo Pacific is a wood pellet manufacturer located in East Java with years of experience in the agricultural and biomass industries.

With a production capacity of thousands of tons per month and a complete production facility, we provide high-quality wood pellets that meet international standards. Supported by comprehensive machinery facilities, we ensure product quality and consistent supply.

Our vision is to become a leading wood pellet manufacturer in Asia, supporting the clean energy transition through quality products and excellent service.

Our mission is to produce high-quality wood pellets with a consistent supply to meet customer needs, while continuously innovating to provide environmentally friendly solutions.

Name: Lima Legnami srl
Description:
Il legno è un materiale molto particolare rispetto agli altri. Proviene da un elemento vivo, l'albero, che vi infonde una potenza e una forza uniche e irripetibili. Rispetto agli altri materiali, riesce a formare un legame particolare con chi lo lavora e con chi lo possiede successivamente. Dona sensazioni impagabili, come quella del calore, della sicurezza, della protezione. Sensazioni che non possono essere ricevute con il freddo metallo o il pesante cemento. Tutti questi valori, naturalmente, vengono liberati solamente se chi lo maneggia, lo tratta con rispetto e amore.

Noi di Lima Legnami a Giugliano in Campania, a Napoli e a Caserta, sappiamo come trattarlo. Una forte passione e un grande rispetto ci legano a questo materiale che, nonostante sia molto comune, non passa mai inosservato e non viene mai sottovalutato. La nostra lunga esperienza nel campo ci rende consapevoli di come, la giusta lavorazione renda un elemento in legno particolare, unico, un vanto per chi lo possiede che orgogliosamente può mostrarlo ai suoi ospiti a casa. Allo stesso tempo, riesce a trasmettere solidità, professionalità e sicurezza ai clienti di quelle società che hanno deciso di inserirlo nel proprio arredamento. La molteplicità d'uso, la creatività e la longevità di questo materiali, ci hanno fatto innamorare e appassionare. Con cura e pazienza ci relazioniamo alla creazione e alla lavorazione del legno, per fornire prodotti di altissima qualità, modulati e personalizzati sulle singole esigenze che ci vengono presentate.
Il nostro staff è preparato ed esperto, selezionato sia sulla base delle specifiche abilità e competenze che sulla passione e professionalità con cui lavora il legno. Per le nostre lavorazioni ci avvaliamo della sapienza della tradizione della lavorazione del legno, unita ai macchinari più moderne e precisi, per assicurarci di realizzare un prodotto di altissima qualità, esattamente quello che il cliente desidera e aspetta.

Name: Trois14_Agencement
Description: Agencement et conception de mobilier sur mesure à Paris et ses environs depuis 2007.

Name: Kiditop
Description:
Nous sommes une entreprise engagée ! Non seulement nous le disons mais nous le faisons.
Découvrez KIDITOP, le nouveau jeu évolutif en bois qui se distingue par ses pièces d'emboîtement astucieuses et ses possibilités infinies. 
Idéal pour stimuler la créativité et l'imagination des enfants.
KIDITOP offre une expérience ludique et éducative unique. 
Fabriqué en France avec des matériaux durables et naturels, ce jeu promet des heures de plaisir en famille tout en développant les compétences motrices et cognitives des petits.

Aujourd’hui, nous sommes fiers de pouvoir proposer le jeu KIDITOP entièrement fait localement, dont la production, le contrôle et le packaging ont été réalisés à 100% en Isère à moins de 100km de notre « base de jeu » Grenobloise.
Nous travaillons avec une scierie labélisée PEFC pour transformer le bois.

 La transformation, le contrôle qualité final et le conditionnement sont confiés à un atelier de personnes en situation de handicap ; parce que nous voulons que chacun trouve sa place dans la société.

Alors KIDITOP ?

Name: SharWood FH
Description:
We are Belorussian sawn timber manufacturer established in 2006 year. 

We specialize on construction timber. We work expecially with pine and spruce. Also we produce woodchips and supply wooddust for pellet productions.

We started in 2006 with only one sawmill. Now we operate two plants in Gomel region with monthly production of 2000 m3 of sawn timber.

The company employs over 100 employees. Every year, we invest in the development of production, working conditions and product quality.

Name: Tischlerei Höer
Description: In unserem Meisterbetrieb werden vorrangig Fenster und Türen in Holz gefertigt. Unser Leistungsspektrum umfasst dabei Außen- sowie Innentüren, jedoch auch Arbeiten in den Bereichen Möbel, Innenausbau, Treppen, Pfosten-Riegel-Konstruktionen, Wintergärten, Carports, Vordächer, Fachwerkgestelle, Jalousien, Klappläden, Beschattungen (Markiesen) und weitere Holzarbeiten aller Art. Bei einer Vielzahl von Altbausanierungen haben wir umfangreiche Erfahrungen im Denkmalsschutz in Verbindung mit Einbruchsicherung und Alarmüberwachung gesammelt.

Name: Globale RC
Description:
A Globale RC Urnas, Lda nasceu no ano de 1997 na cidade da Lixa e tem como âmbito a produção e comercialização de urnas e outros produtos para o setor funerário. 
Recorrendo a uma estratégia cuidada, objetivos bem definidos e uma equipa de profissionais qualificados, bem como a um conhecimento profundo do mercado nacional, a Globale RC encontra-se preparada para ir ao encontro das exigências dos seus clientes, disponibilizando um conjunto de produtos alargado. O lema da Globale RC passará, sempre, pela procura em exceder as expectativas com soluções inovadoras!

Name: Aziz Moussawer & son _ L'Atelier
Description:
Welcome to L'Atelier, Aziz Moussawer and son ,a family-owned wood factory dedicated to crafting exceptional woodwork and bringing your interior design visions to life. With generations of expertise, we specialize in creating bespoke furniture, cabinetry, and architectural elements that combine traditional craftsmanship with innovative design.

Our commitment to quality and attention to detail are at the heart of everything we do. From concept to completion, we work closely with our clients to ensure every piece reflects their unique style and needs. Whether you're looking for a complete interior makeover or a single statement piece, Aziz Moussawer and son is here to turn your ideas into reality.

Name: DuKo Drewniane trofea sportowe

Name: Seedling Designs
Description:
Seedling Designs is a design and production company driven by a strong environmentally friendly ethos, tackling the product design industry by offering sustainable, environmental friendly hand-made alternatives. 

Using a human-based approach, Seedling Designs adopts technology and local knowledge in each of its creative processes.

In a world suffocated by plastic and non biodegradable products, we look at nature as a source of inspiration for our designs and as a source of raw materials ready to be up-cycled and reshaped to fit unexpected new purposes.

Today there are more than twenty people involved in the process of the “Baobab Pod Journey”. Our workshop houses the work of many artisans, who assemble different pieces into our lampshades. The process starts with the unique perfection, or imperfection, of every ancient Baobab tree, which gives us the dry fruit pods ready to be shaped to continue the magical journey of nature.

Name: le liege bleu
Description:
un concept de bouée de signalisation nautique écoresponsable construite à partir de liège naturel.
Ensemble rendons visible notre engagement pour une plaisance respectueuse de l’environnement.

Name: grod glasert
Description:
Holzprodukte aus Oberbayernjedes Stück ein Unikat

Mit einem Holzlaser ist vieles möglich, von ausgefallenen Schriftarten bis lustigen Gadgets für den Alltag.

Was als kleines Herzensprojekt im Nebengewerbe begann – mit einem Etsy-Store und ersten privaten Aufträgen – wächst Schritt für Schritt weiter. 

Ich freue mich, nun auch hier auf LinkedIn einen Einblick in meine Arbeiten zu geben.

Warum LinkedIn?

Weil ich meine Projekte und meine Leidenschaft nicht nur zeigen, sondern auch mit einem breiteren Netzwerk teilen möchte – ohne den klassischen Weg über Homepage oder Instagram zu gehen. 

Beste Grüße aus Oberbayern

Patrick von grod glasert!

Name: Canadá Madeiras
Description: Desde 1960, vencendo desafios e demonstrando arrojo e solidez, a Canadá Madeiras é modelo do seu segmento em Patos de Minas e região. Sempre firmes no propósito de entregar qualidade em serviços e produtos, criando laços duradouros e uma relação de confiança com nossos clientes, fornecedores, parceiros e amigos.

Name: Camperboards
Description: Camperboards is a company based out of Karl-Jaspers-Straße, Leverkusen, Germany.

Name: Forest Products Limited
Description:
For over 90 years, Forest Products Limited has been providing high quality, sustainable timber to customers. Established in 1927, we are a family run business that takes great pride in creating top quality products that our customers have come to depend on. We source all of our timber from sustainable sources, predominantly FSC certified, and use only raw material felled from managed woodlands. We process our own timber, kiln dry and pressure treat it in two colours - green and brown - so that we can guarantee that our timber is properly treated. 

As well as a range of kiln-dried and pressure-treated timber, we also make hardwood gates to order. All of our gates are crafted using only the highest quality hardwood, and the skilled work of our experienced bench joiners. 

Here at Forest Products, we will work with you to ensure you get the best quality and value for your money. Whether you’re a trade customer or a retail customer, we will always strive to provide you with the very best service. So for all your timber needs, look no further than Forest Products Limited.

Name: Digital world of furniture (DWF)
Description: Digital word furniture is wood working organization that manufacture affordable and reliable modern wooden furniture embellished with recycled plastic waste and empower youth with carpentry knowledge and skills to become job creators. We also offer different services like; Roof making, ceiling construction, painting, bedroom decoration, dining room decoration, seating room decoration and other services that are related to wood working.

Name: Tranche de bois
Description:
Chez Tranche de bois, nous offrons une gamme de produits durables et uniques à partir de bois recyclé, destinés aux entreprises et aux professionnels. 

Spécialisés dans l’éco-conception et la revalorisation des retailles de bois, nous transformons des matériaux inutilisés en solutions de design haut de gamme. 

Nos produits incluent des cadeaux corporatifs personnalisés, des luminaires et des accessoires, reflétant les valeurs de durabilité, de savoir-faire et d'innovation de nos clients.

Nous sommes spécialisés dans l’éco-conception et la revalorisation des retailles de bois, transformant des matériaux inutilisés en solutions de design haut de gamme. 

Nous offrons des cadeaux corporatifs personnalisés, des luminaires et des accessoires, tout en reflétant les valeurs de nos clients : durabilité, savoir-faire et innovation.

Name: Profiltre.no
Description:
Design ditt eget treprodukt. Slipp kreativiteten løs!
Perfekte gaver til deg og dine.
Spesialist på treskilt og personlige gaver i tre.

Name: Agrafes Viti 4.0
Description:
Chez Agrafes Viti 4.0, nous sommes fiers de révolutionner le secteur viticole en proposant des solutions innovantes de palissage adaptées aux besoins des viticulteurs. Nos agrafes de palissage sont conçues avec une technologie innovante et des matériaux durables 100% français, assurant à la fois robustesse, simplicité d'utilisation et respect de l'environnement .

1.	Innovation et technologie : Nos agrafes sont conçues avec l'Industrie 4.0. Grâce à une conception ergonomique zéro déchets et à l’utilisation de matériaux avancés, nos agrafes sont à la fois légères, résistantes aux conditions climatiques et optimisées pour une pose facile et rapide.

2.	Durabilité et qualité : Fabriquées en Bourgogne, nos agrafes répondent aux normes les plus strictes. Elles sont conçues pour durer et offrir une solution fiable, tout en minimisant l'impact environnemental .

3.	Soutien aux viticulteurs : Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec des professionnels du secteur viticole pour comprendre leurs besoins et proposer des solutions qui répondent aux exigences actuelles des vignobles. Nous nous engageons à offrir un service client personnalisé et une écoute active pour accompagner chaque viticulteur dans la préservation de leurs vignobles.

4.	Adaptabilité : Notre agrafe AV4 s'adapte à tous les types de vignobles, quelle que soit la taille des exploitations. Que vous soyez un viticulteur indépendant ou une grande exploitation, nous avons une solution pour vous.

Notre mission : Faciliter le travail des viticulteurs tout en améliorant la productivité et la qualité des vignobles. En alliant innovation technologique et durabilité, nous nous engageons à offrir des produits qui non seulement optimisent les pratiques de palissage, mais qui apportent aussi une véritable plus-value aux viticulteurs.

En optant pour nos agrafes, vous faites le choix d’un produit respectueux de l’environnement, durable et efficace, qui contribue à une viticulture plus responsable .

Name: Kima Lades
Description: Al bijna 50 jaar levert Kima Lades maatwerk voor de meubelindustrie, jachtbouw, keukenbouw en interieurbouw.

Name: QC Floors - Quercus Classic
Description:
As the name suggests, the company QC Floors (Quercus Classic) is engaged in wood, particularly the production and laying of patinated solid wood floors, furniture and other wooden products according to customer requirements.

The name is a combination of words that define the company: “Quercus” – Latin for oak, and the international word “Classic”, the style in which we present ourselves. The last word of the name – “Floors” indicates that the company primarily specialises in wooden floors. 

QC Floors (Quercus Classic) was established in 2013; however, its founders, Václav Karkoš and Marek Pavel, have been working in the field for more than 25 years. It proves that Czech craftsmanship still belongs among the world elite. 

The whole company is entirely Czech, from the staff to the wood. Most of the projects find their owners abroad; on the European continent, they are assembled by experienced, specially trained joiners and floor fitters, and the materials are sent throughout the world.

Name: Deka Kozijnen
Description: Deka Kozijnen in Kampen staat voor hoogwaardige kwaliteit, maatwerk, vakmanschap en service voor bedrijven en particulieren. Kozijnen, deuren, ramen en trappen; alles wordt hier gemaakt en afgewerkt met de grootste precisie en volgens de hoogste standaarden. De producten van Deka Kozijnen zijn allesbehalve ‘standaard’. Zoekt u iets bijzonders, of het nou bijzondere maten, vormen of uitzonderlijke kwaliteit is, dan bent u van harte welkom bij Deka Kozijnen. Geen project is ons te klein of te groot!

Name: Mason Forest Products
Description: Mason Forest Products nationally provides a wide array of panels, lumber, cut-to-size plywood, heavy civil and industrial products, as well as consulting for users looking to maximize value in new markets or applications.  We are able to combine our experience and Southern re-manufacturing presence to create mutually beneficial and sustainable wood based solutions.

Name: L'Arboiserie
Description:
L’Arboiserie ; maîtresse dans le travail du bois.

Depuis plus de 20 ans, L’Arboiserie façonne ce matériau noble au cœur du Jura, à Mouchard, au sein de la Cité du Bois.

Nous accompagnons les revendeurs, les marques et entreprises dans la fabrication et la sous-traitance d’objets en bois durables : décoration, art de la table, univers du vin, fournitures, trophées et séries personnalisées.

Notre savoir-faire artisanal, allié à une exigence constante de qualité, nous permet de produire des pièces fiables, esthétiques et pensées pour un usage durable.

 Engagés aux côtés du Défi Voile, nous soutenons la lutte contre la sclérose en plaques à travers des projets porteurs de sens.

 Licencié officiel de la Route du Rhum 2026 ! 
Nous développons également des collections d'objet à destination de la Route du Rhum 2026.

 Suivre L’Arboiserie, c’est découvrir un partenaire bois engagé, local et fiable.

Name: JAMES E.SMITH (TIMBER) LIMITED
Description: James E. Smith (Timber) Ltd. is a leading importer of Softwoods & Frame Grade Birch sourced from major producers in Scandinavia, Germany & the Baltic States as well as sheet materials from Europe, South America & the Far East.

Name: Araya Ltda
Description:
Empresa líder en el reciclaje de la madera.
Somos pioneros en el rubro de reciclaje de pallets, desde el año 1988 trabajando en los procesos de reciclaje y la reutilización de la madera, que a través de nuestros procesos de reciclaje nos permiten aportar valor medioambiental y económico para sus empresas.

Name: Woodwards Group
Description:
Ben je werkzaam in de houtbranche, dan maken we graag kennis met je. Kom ons versterken, kom met ons samenwerken. Hout is veelzijdig. En dat zijn wij ook. We beheersen de gehele keten. Van de bosbouw tot de bouw van huizen, kantoren en bedrijfsgebouwen. Met alles wat erbij komt kijken.
Denk aan de selectie van duurzaam hout in Scandinavië. Denk aan de bewaking van de kwaliteit. Denk aan toepassing van wet en regelgeving. Denk aan certificering. En wat steeds belangrijker wordt: het toezicht op de herkomst van het hout. Ketentransparantie en traceer baarheid hebben we op orde tot in het kleinste detail.
Natuurlijk verwerken we hout tot bouw en verpakkingsmateriaal. Standaard of op maat. Altijd op de juiste plaats en het juiste moment. Altijd tegen concurrerende prijzen. Dankzij VMI (Vendor Managed Inventory) weten we wat klanten nodig hebben. En dankzij EDI (Electronic Data Interface), waarin we documenten delen, bieden we inzicht, controle en gemak. Altijd en overal. Sluit je aan en vergroot je slagkracht in de houtbranche.

Name: Compensa Ind. e Com. de Compensados Ltda.
Description: Atuando no mercado desde 1994, a Compensa é uma empresa que atua na fabricação de compensados de alta qualidade, com objetivo principal de produzir chapas de compensado para construção civil.

Name: H-LHout en firma Houtvast
Description: Als u een bijzondere herinnering wilt laten vastleggen in hout, bent u bij ons aan het juiste adres. Onze vaardigheden zijn veelzijdig en we kunnen verschillende voorwerpen creëren, zoals pennen, doosjes, schalen, birdies, wedstrijdbekers, sieraden en items met een gepersonaliseerde opdruk. We dagen onszelf voortdurend uit om unieke ontwerpen te maken die perfect passen bij uw behoeften en smaak.

Description:

Name: Lillerønning Snekkerifabrikk
Description: Lillerønning Snekkerifabrikk is a company based out of Storburusjøveien 1, Midtre Gauldal, Trøndelag, Norway.

Name: Climate Smart Wood Group
Description:
In the battle against climate change, forests can offer powerful solutions or deepen our problems.

With the rise of mass timber construction, building owners, developers, architects and engineers are faced with urgent questions:

• How do we know if forestry is exacerbating or mitigating climate change?

• How can we move toward more data-driven differentiation of forest product supply chains?

• How do we get climate-smart wood into our construction projects?
The Climate Smart Wood Group

The Climate Smart Wood Group came together to address these questions by helping the building sector in North America procure climate-smart wood products.

When combined with conservation and restoration of the world’s most ecologically valuable and carbon-dense forests, climate-smart wood sourcing can fulfill the potential of forests as a natural climate solution while reducing and reversing emissions impacts.

The Climate Smart Wood Group is built on the premise that interest in better wood can create market incentives to improve the way forests are managed, leading to climate benefits.

Name: La TiEsse
Description:
La TiEsse è stata la prima azienda in Italia ad avviare una produzione di pellet, per rispondere prontamente alla crescente domanda di un prodotto ecologico per il riscaldamento domestico. La TiEsse è oggi una realtà affermata nel mercato nazionale ed è conosciuta come partner serio ed affidabile, in grado di rispondere con sollecitudine alle esigenze di approvvigionamento garantendo pellet di elevata qualità, prodotto nel proprio stabilimento di Cimadolmo (Treviso).

Consapevole dell’importanza di fornire un prodotto di comprovata qualità, La TiEsse ha conseguito le certificazioni ENplus (Classe A1) ed UNI EN ISO 14001:2004, che attestano che sia il pellet realizzato sia il processo di produzione soddisfano tutti i requisiti previsti dalla normativa europea.

Name: Hutschn Projekt
Description:
Wir fertigen in unserem Meisterbetrieb erstklassige, ungewöhnlich belastbare und langlebige Schaukeln aus massiven Eichenbohlen mit aufwändig von Hand gespleissten Seilen. Jeder Arbeitsschritt ist Handarbeit. Was wir hier machen, kann so nicht in Massenproduktion umgesetzt werden. Aspekte wie Qualität, Langlebigkeit, Herkunft, die ökologische Bilanz und die Geschichte hinter unseren Produkten und der Marke HUTSCHN sollen zu einem transparenten und nachhaltigen Erlebnis werden, an dem man möglichst lange und immer wieder neu Freude haben kann. Aus dieser Überzeugung heraus fertigen wir in herausragender Qualität Schaukeln, die das Zeug haben, zu echten Lieblings- und neuen Erbstücken zu werden.

Unsere Schaukeln stehen für gesellschaftliche Transformation im Sinne einer wertschätzenden und insgesamt zukunftsfesteren Wirtschaft. Trotz hoher Nachfrage haben wir uns bewusst gegen eine kommerzielle Massenproduktion entschieden. Bei unserem Projekt suchen wir auch immer wieder nach Möglichkeiten, die Schaukeln beispielsweise an Schnittstellen in der Kultur- und Kreativwirtschaft einzusetzen, Grenzen zu überwinden und darüber die Welt mit anderen Augen zu sehen.

Name: SHOBHA KRAFT
Description:
Shobha Kraft is a new age manufacturer-cum-exporter of contemporary wooden handicrafts addressing the modern lifestyle and decor needs of the evolving consumer as well as creating innovative giftware for all occasions blending several materials with wood.

The brand it operates with is 'Shobha Kraft Global'. 

With strong in-house design and manufacturing capabilities, it is our endeavour to preserve and promote traditional art forms as well as provide a brighter tomorrow to our artisans who have been the flag-bearers of these treasures from centuries

"Handmade is exclusive, handmade is Luxury" - thats what we truly believe in.

Experience the world of excellence with Shobha Kraft Global!

Name: Escala Total Madeiras

Description: Empresa dedicada a la gestión de plantaciones forestales comerciales y a la transformación de la madera en estibas y demás productos para la industria.  Filial del grupo Valores Industriales S.A.

Description: zanderply manufactures and supplies best quality plywood, doors, Board, Block Boards, Hardwood Block, Board, etc in India

Name: Art / Deco
Description:
Art/Deco fabrique et commercialise des parquets en chêne de haute qualité.

Notre concept provient des anciens parquets que l'on pouvait trouver dans les châteaux et les grandes maisons d'Europe. 
Pour fabriquer et entretenir ces parquets anciens tout en préservant le style historique, nous avons allié la recherche et les technologies contemporaines afin de créer des parquets uniques et élégants.

Art/Deco réunit la maîtrise des parqueteurs professionnels, la sensibilité des designers contemporains et le travail local pour réaliser des parquets d’exception.
___


Art/Deco manufactures and markets its high quality wooden floors. 

The concept of our floors comes from the old parquet floors that could be found in the castles and grand houses of Europe. To manufacture and maintain these old floors while preserving these historical styles, it was necessary to combine research and contemporary technologies. 

Art/Deco unites the mastery of professional floorers with the sensitivity of contemporary designers.

Name: 3D Ply
Description:
3D Ply is an independent company as a part of the Stannah Group. Stannah is a long-standing British, family-owned manufacturing business with the fifth generation steering at the helm. The Stannah promise to every one of our customers is that we will be ‘always true to our word’.

Within our Group, 3D Ply and Global Upholstery Solutions work in close partnership to deliver a simple and effective solution for our customers. While we can deliver the specific capabilities of each company, we can also provide complete solutions to customers of either business without the need to treat both as independent suppliers, so that customers can enjoy the benefits of this one-stop shop approach from either business.
3D Ply Limited specialise in the manufacture of laminated three dimensional formed plywood, solid wood components and veneered panels.

Being part of the Stannah Group provides us with the security for our customers, suppliers and team members and enables us to target long term growth.

We are investing in our process and our people to increase our level of service to existing customers as well as helping new customers with their requirements from a UK based manufacturer.

Name: UNIK Lister A/S
Description:
UNIK Lister A/S – i standard- og specialmål

Vi kan levere Unikke lister på helt ned til 6 dage og til priser, der matcher markedet. For at beregne en pris skal vi blot bruge profilens bredde og højde. Derefter laver vi en tegning, som du får til godkendelse, så du kan være sikker på et perfekt resultat.

Vores salgsdirektør, Niels Vergmann, står altid klar med rådgivning og hjælp gennem hele processen.

Vi holder til centralt på Sjælland, hvor du kan hente dine lister direkte på værkstedet – eller vi sørger for levering lige til døren.

UNIK Lister udspringer af Mester Madsen A/S som siden 2002 , har hjulpet håndværkere og entreprenører med Unikke lister til deres projekter. Med UNIK Lister har vi skabt et selvstændigt brand, der målrettet hjælper endnu flere med at få de rigtige lister – hurtigt, enkelt og i høj kvalitet.

Name: Kariwood Plywood, Kontrplak, Lignosülfonat, CLT, Lamine Ahşap Orman Ürünleri
Description:
Kariwood olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini en önemli değerimiz olarak benimserken, ülke çapında büyüme ve gelişme hedeflerimizi sürekli kuvvetlendiriyoruz. Bu vizyonla, Türkiye'nin en tanınmış ve en çok tercih edilen ahşap ürünler markası olma yolunda kararlılıkla ilerliyoruz.

Kalite bizim için bir öncelik, bir seçenek değildir. Bu inançla, her bir ahşap ürünümüzde en yüksek kalite ve standartları tutturmayı tutkuyla hedefliyoruz. Polywood, Kontrplak, Lamine Kereste, CLT ve PELET gibi çeşitli ürünlerimizle, geniş ve çeşitli müşteri tabanımızın ihtiyaçlarını karşılamaktan büyük memnuniyet duyarız.

Kariwood'un misyonu, Türkiye çapında bir iz bırakmaktır. Ürünlerimiz, yurt içinde faaliyet gösteren seçkin müşterilerimiz için ihmal edilmez bir seçenektir. Bu vizyonla, ülke genelinde bilinen ve güvenilen bir marka olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Büyüme, gelişme ve müşteri memnuniyetine olan bağlılığımızla, Kariwood olarak, ahşap ürünler sektöründe ülke çapında tanınan ve tercih edilen bir marka olma hedefimize doğru emin adımlarla ilerliyoruz. Bu heyecan verici yolculuğa bizimle birlikte katıldığınız için teşekkür ederiz.

Name: Klik-Klik Wall Sytem
Description:
The company has developed an innovative product from cross-laminated timber panels (CLT). The KLIK-KLIK Wall System is a unique, scientifically tested, and patented CLT prefabricated modular wall system for the building of exposed massive wood wall, single-story, residential buildings. Its key element is the element lightweight and original panel connection without the use of screws. The wall system consists of 16 prefabricated elements, all of which have a screw-less connection.

The specially designed KLIK-KLIK application enables quick and easy sketching of the external and internal wall framework of a single-story building. The application also provides information on the dimensions and quantities of future materials needed for further wall construction. KLIK-KLIK Wall System  is a lightweight CLT panels, eliminating the need for heavy machinery for wall frame installation, and can be done by a two-person team. 

The product development received support from the European Union (EU) and the Investment and Development Agency of Latvia (LIAA) in collaboration with Riga Technical University.

The existing solution, a small-sized CLT panel with the patented KLIK-KLIK panel connection system, addresses the most crucial issues - transportation, on-site work, and related challenges, minimizing (or eliminating) the need for specific solutions and equipment. The KLIK-KLIK Wall System is based on a lightweight modular CLT panel system, which can be transported using standard logistics solutions and moved on-site using minimal (or entirely excluded) handheld equipment. The 600mm panel width limits the maximum element weight to 67 kg, while the connection system allows for the assembly of the entire panel without significant restrictions in low-rise construction.

This product will significantly expand the use of CLT material to a broad customer base, excluding the need for technologically intensive construction assembly and logistics solutions and challenges.
