Name: Triangulo Hardwood Floors
Description:
Triangulo Hardwood Flooring has been dedicated to the manufacturing of hardwood products since 1972.  This family-owned business in Brazil has been globally recognized for sustainability, innovative products and cutting edge technology.  As the hardwood flooring industry has evolved over the last several decades, Triangulo has adapted to the requirements for the domestic and foreign markets.

The Triangulo manufacturing facility and administrative offices are located in Curitiba-PR and has a total built area of approximately 27 thousand square meters.  The manufacturing facility uses high-tech environmentally-friendly equipment which produces less pollution and utilizes the resources in a sustainable manner to create high quality hardwood flooring.

The company also has their own forest in the Northern region of the country, which is where all their raw material comes from.  This sustainable forest, also known as the Manoa forest is approximately 160,000 acres and home to many different species.  With respect for the natural growing forest and also planted reserves, Triangulo has defined their business moto: “Man and Nature in Harmony” and serves the present market without compromising future demand.

As the demand for hardwood flooring continues to grow, Triangulo is committed to providing not only the beloved classic exotic looks but also new and exciting product lines that fit any style of home.

Name: Berdoll Sawmill
Description:
Berdoll Sawmill is a family-owned and operated sawmill just east of Austin, Texas. We take pride in producing the highest quality, kiln dried live edge slabs and furniture-grade lumber available. We exclusively harvest and mill native Texas hardwood logs from sustainable sources within about a 100 mile radius of the sawmill. 

We specialize in milling, drying and surfacing live edge slabs with the capacity to mill slabs up to 82 inches wide. Our slabs are carefully kiln dried to a moisture content of 6-8% in our computer-controlled kilns, then surfaced flat on our 100 inch wide jointer/planer and are ready for final sanding and finishing.

We stock 5,000-10,000 board feet of kiln dried 4/4 and 8/4 furniture-grade native Texas hardwood lumber in the following species: Texas Pecan, Mesquite, Walnut and limited quantities of other native Texas species. We take extra care in keeping boards from the same tree together, providing book-matched sets as well as natural edge lumber. Our lumber is sold rough sawn or surfaced flat on both faces. We also stock kiln dried, hardwood mantels in Texas Pecan, Mesquite and Walnut.

Our 100″ wide jointer/planer is available for custom surfacing, to accurately flatten slabs or table tops. A full suite of woodshop services are available including: jointing, planing, wide belt sanding, straight line ripping, resawing and other specialty millwork. Our two bandsaw sawmills are also available for custom milling.

Our extensive inventory is stored in a 4,500 SF humidity controlled showroom, with slabs displayed vertically for easy viewing and lumber is in accessible lumber racks. Please contact us if you have any questions and feel free to stop by during business hours. Whether you need 1 board or 1,000 board feet, we look forward to working with you.

Description:

Name: Hausfloor
Description:
La storia di Hausfloor inizia nel 1988 come falegnameria a conduzione familiare, specializzata nella produzione di parquet a Brescia. In oltre trent’anni di attività, tali radici storiche ci consentono di vantare un particolare elemento differenziante: la capacità produttiva interna in grado di rispondere alle più diverse esigenze della clientela, sia privata che professionale. 
Il core business è dunque da sempre produrre pavimenti in legno (parquet) pregiati, ma anche distribuire i più importanti brand sul mercato che possano garantire massima qualità, robustezza e design per rendere accoglienti gli ambienti dei nostri clienti. 
La massima personalizzazione è un fiore all’occhiello di Hausfloor. Essa si declina in due modi: siamo in grado di partire dalla tavola grezza lavorandola nel nostro laboratorio interno per realizzare il prodotto finito desiderato dal cliente; oppure, selezioniamo i prodotti esistenti più performanti per trovare la soluzione ottimale.
Lo showroom propone un vasto assortimento di materiali per pavimenti e rivestimenti, sia da interno che da esterno, anche in grande formato: non solo parquet, ma anche gres porcellanato e altre soluzioni per realizzare qualunque tipo di progetto. Siamo il partner ideale per progettisti di interni e di esterni, affiancandoli in ogni fase: dalla consulenza alla direzione lavori fino all’esecuzione.
Abbiamo una squadra interna di professionisti esperti e qualificati che si occupano della posa in opera di pavimenti in legno o in gres porcellanato, garantendo risultati impeccabili, ma soprattutto cortesia e disponibilità.
Ciò che i nostri clienti apprezzano maggiormente di Hausfloor è la capacità di interpretare le loro esigenze e i loro desideri, creando ambienti unici e personalizzati con pavimenti e rivestimenti in legno o in gres porcellanato. 

A questo punto, se ti abbiamo incuriosito un po’, non ti resta che passare a visitare il nostro showroom a Paratico. Serviamo le province di Brescia, Bergamo e Milano.

Name: Troll Vindufabrikk As
Description:
Vi er stolte av vår lange tradisjon med å produsere vakre vinduer av høyeste kvalitet. Våre vinduer er laget av kjerneved der trærne vokser langsomt og får en unik styrke og varighet. Dette sikrer at våre vinduer tåler tidens tann og det tøffeste klima.
Våre referanser er mange og vi har fornøyde kunder over hele østlandsområdet.
Enten du planlegger å bygge nytt, restaurere eller oppgradere, har vi det perfekte utvalget av vinduer som passer til hus, hytte eller bygårder. Våre funksjonelle vinduer med klassisk design og flotte profiler i karm og ramme, vil gi ditt bygg et estetisk løft.
Uansett om du trenger standardmål eller spesialmål, vi skreddersyr alle vinduer uten ekstra kostnad.
Hos oss finner du engasjerte og motiverte medarbeidere og vi ønsker
å høre fra deg om ditt prosjekt og dine ønsker. Ta kontakt med oss så finner vi en løsning som passer for deg og ditt behov.

Name: CONGO MBOK'ELENGUI
Description:
Congo Mbok’elengui est une structure qui a pour vocation principale la conception personnalisée des articles en bois.

Le bois obtenu provient  des déchets issus de grandes usines de confection des meubles que nous trouvons au Nord du pays précisément à Ouesso se trouvant à presque 830Km de la ville de Brazzaville.

Notre orientation stratégique s’appuie sur un recyclage permanent de différentes essences de bois des forêts de la République pour éviter les dépôts pouvant causer des ennuies à impact environnemental.

Congo Mbok'elengui is a company whose main vocation is the personalized design of wooden articles.

The wood obtained comes from the waste from large furniture factories that we find in the north of the country, precisely in Ouesso which is 830Km from the main city of Brazzaville.

Our strategic orientation is based on a permanent recycling of different species of wood of the forests of the Republic to avoid the deposits which can cause troubles with environmental impact.

Name: Stevens & Associates Millwork Ltd.
Description: Established in 1988, Stevens & Associates Millwork Ltd. specializes in high-quality architectural millwork and custom wood product manufacturing. Combining decades of expertise with precision craftsmanship, we deliver solutions seamlessly merging functionality and artistry, earning clients' trust in the architectural and construction industries.

Description: Przedsiębiorstwo Przemysłu Drzewnego „POLTAREX” Sp. z o.o., jest jednym z wiodących producentów wyrobów z drewna w Polsce. Przemawia za nami półwiecze tradycji – tak długo jesteśmy obecni na rynku polskim i rynkach zagranicznych. Przez te 50 lat daliśmy się poznać jako solidny, terminowy kontrahent. Świadczą o tym zawierane przez nas liczne, wieloletnie kontrakty, a przede wszystkim zadowolenie naszych klientów.

Name: Nicholson Carpentry & Joinery Ltd
Description:
We specialise in made-to-measure timber windows and doors.

Based in Warwickshire, we pride ourselves on delivering top-quality bespoke joinery. We have many decades of experience behind us, delivering bespoke joinery to customers throughout the West Midlands and Warwickshire, including Leamington Spa, Nuneaton, Birmingham, Rugby, Stratford-upon-Avon and Worcestershire. 

Our team is made up of expert craftsmen and master carpenters. We combine the long-standing techniques of our craft with the very latest technology and products.

We are members of the British Woodworking Federation and Fensa. We work to the highest eco standards and regulations, ensuring only the very best will do for our clients.

Our services cover many different aspects of woodwork including new builds, refurbishments, restoration, conservation and the supply and fitting of bespoke joinery. A wealth of expertise and years of experience have acquired us work with English Heritage, The National Trust, Channel Five’s ‘The Gadget Show’, George Clarke’s Old House, New Home on Channel Four, and The Crown Estates amongst others.

We work across a number of sectors including development, private, domestic and residential, offices, industrial, retail, health care and medical, education and commercial. We also work for local builders and architects supplying timber windows and doors and assisting on large projects.

We would love to talk to you about your upcoming project and would be more than happy to pass on recommendations from our recent clients.

Name: Eagle Woodworking
Description: Since 1980 we have partnered with cabinetmakers and woodworkers throughout the United States, who trust us to create and deliver the finest quality custom dovetail drawers. We have built our reputation one customer at a time.

Name: FALKEL
Description:
Falkel was built with the modest elegance of wooden items, inspired by nature. Natural and human elements combined to create wooden goods. Nature provided the energy for handcrafted wooden goods. In the United States—Delaware—we began with a passion to create handmade wood goods that are functional, helpful, and have attractive patterns and trends. We are always striving to create items that will captivate customers in terms of practicality and aesthetics, while keeping elegance and natural methods.
The journey, which began with a few goods, grew in response to the daily demands and requests. Wood goods decreased stress and brought individuals closer to themselves and to nature. We decided that everyone should have these things at home when the power of nature coupled with its design talent, so we went online. We mix our timeless elegance with wood in everything from personalized products to laptop stands, sign woods to kitchenware.
Because wood is the most natural, sturdy, long-lasting, and attractive material, it never goes out of style. Falkel recognizes its responsibilities to the environment as a brand. We take this issue seriously and strive to make our planet a greener place with each order.
Love Nature, Love Wood, love FALKEL!

Name: HOTMAX
Description:
Hotmax wood briquettes are a sustainable virtually smokeless fuel for your home in winter and for outdoor use in summer.
Our high density compacted heat logs are made from 100% natural, recycled wood dust. They’re denser, drier and burn cleaner than even the best kiln dried or seasoned hardwood logs.
They’re quick and easy to light and they give you high heat very fast with very low emissions and minimal ash residue. High performance, eco-friendly fuel logs, with a unique sustainable story…


Hotmax fuel logs create the warm heartbeat of your home in woodburners or multi-fuel stoves large and small. They give you a safe and spark free hand-and-heart-warming living flame outside in firepits, chimineas and braziers. And their completely natural, odourless heat makes them the ideal cooking fuel for your bbq or ceramic grill.
Crucially, as we all face up to the need to reduce our carbon footprint, Hotmax fuel logs also offer you an unbeatably sustainable British alternative to energy-greedy imported briquettes or kiln-dried hardwood logs – packaged in a recyclable, burnable or compostable paper sack.

Name: Laminsa
Description:
ES/

Laminsa es una empresa dedicada a la producción de terciados y multilaminados de alta calidad. Desde nuestros inicios en el 2002 con la compra de rollos y producción de láminas, hoy nos hemos expandido a nuestra planta central localizada en Ñumi, y otras sucursales en San Nepomuceno y Santa Rosa del Aguaray con la producción de terciados, placas y multilaminados. Contamos con las certificaciones internacionales de CARB, EPA TITLE VI, CAN/CSA, junto con la certificación FSC. 

EN/

Laminsa is a company dedicated to the production of high-quality plywood and multilaminates made of UF and FF resins. Since our beginnings in 2002 with the purchase of eucalyptus and other species of logs, we started with veneers production. Today we have expanded to our central plant located in Ñumi and other branches in San Nepomuceno and Santa Rosa del Aguaray with the production of plywood and multilaminates. We have the international certifications of CARB, EPA TITLE VI, CAN/CSA, along with the FSC certification.
Nowadays, we work with plywood made of eucalyptus, mix of red cedar and eucalyptus, and a mix paraiso and eucalyptus.

Name: Studio Bours
Description:
Studio Bours is an artisan furniture studio specializing in crafting audio furniture for the discerning music lover. We believe that music is an emotional experience, and that the right environment can enhance this experience. Therefore, we create furniture that is not only functional, but also adds aesthetic value to any listening room.
 
Our designs are unique and born out of a passion for both music and craftsmanship. We strive for a perfect balance between form and function, with every detail carefully considered. From the selection of sustainable woods to the handcrafted finish, each piece of Studio Bours furniture is an expression of our commitment to quality and perfection.
 
At Studio Bours, we believe in the power of customization. We work closely with our clients to create furniture that perfectly suits their personal desires and listening needs. Whether it's a record case, a headphone stand or a base plate for a record player, each piece is designed to enrich the listening experience and create a sense of harmony.
 
Explore the unique world of Studio Bours and let your music come to life in a piece of furniture as special as your favorite music.

Name: David Musty Putters
Description:
Successful companies are focused on their customers, and David Musty Putters is no exception. David Musty is tirelessly researching the secrets to great putting and perfecting his trade. David’s background in custom home building, circle staircase design, and fine furniture construction made him perfectly suited to design and build the perfect wooden putting tool.

One of the pillars of great service is anticipating what customers want before they ask. David Musty Putters strives to take this concept one step further by fulfilling a customer’s needs before they realize they need it. For example, through our fitting system, we are able to address faults in the set up and stroke that players are usually unaware of. Our putters are not just personalized in style, but in function as well. Nothing is more rewarding than watching one of our putters make an immediate impact to a player’s performance on the greens. Let us do this for you!

Name: Cabbia Wood Experience
Description: Da tre generazioni, grazie all’innovazione tecnologica e alla nostra conoscenza dei materiali, realizziamo pavimenti, complementi d’arredo e progetti di interior ed exterior design dove il legno di qualità è sempre il protagonista.

Name: NEF Pallets
Description:
En Nef Pallets llevamos más de 100 años acompañando a la industria con soluciones integrales en pallets de madera. Somos una empresa familiar de 3 generaciones que nació con una misión clara: ofrecer calidad, compromiso y respuesta inmediata a cada necesidad logística.

Fabricamos, reparamos y reciclamos pallets de madera de todas las medidas, con procesos certificados y tecnología propia. Contamos con CATEM propio habilitado para el tratamiento térmico de embalajes de exportación según la norma NIMF 15, lo que garantiza cumplimiento internacional y máxima trazabilidad.

Nuestro diferencial está en el servicio: atención personalizada, entregas ágiles, control de stock, retiro de usados y soluciones a medida. Nos eligen las principales empresas líderes de Argentina en sectores como logística, retail, alimentación, construcción y automotriz.

Somos referentes en la economía circular aplicando prácticas sustentables, reutilizando y dándole una segunda vida útil a los pallets. Trabajamos con foco en la eficiencia y la reducción de costos operativos para nuestros clientes.

 +100 años de experiencia
 3 generaciones en el rubro
 Planta propia y CATEM habilitado
 Sustentabilidad y trazabilidad
 Certificación NIMF 15
 Entregas en todo el país

Lideramos el mercado porque entendemos la logística desde adentro. En cada pallet que entregamos hay historia, innovación y compromiso.

Name: Saify Commercial Establishment
Description: Our forefathers ventured into the business of timber in 1931. We started out as a family business primarily from the local timber supply available. The business grew over the period of years and eventually the family business was divided into several companies. Saify Commercial Establishment was founded in 1981. In the initial years, this company too thrived on the local timber production of Pakistan. In 1998, we ventured into the business of importing timber. Since then the business has flourished manifolds. Today we are proud to state that we are one of the largest importers of softwood in Pakistan.

Name: Wood Workers
Description:
Wood Workers is a furniture brand originating in Egypt. Established in 2015, we have a passion and a mission to revolutionize the furniture industry.

Starting up as an importer and supplier of imported beach wood, we've recently stepped into the process of manufacturing. 

We specialize in creating custom made furniture that fits every home and business' needs. We offer a large variety of products from doors to bathroom cabinets, couches to wardrobes and bedrooms. We are especially experienced in creating your dream kitchens and dressing rooms. 

We are committed to provide our customers with the best experience starting from the consultation and design process, to the manufacturing with the highest quality of materials and latest available technologies and mechanisms all while providing a good value for money. Our team of interior and product designers collaborates closely with our clients to brainstorm ideas, develop concepts and furnish their space in the ideal way within the desired budget.

We have recently launched a new line in our collections: Bits & Pieces. Customers can purchase our ready-made furniture products and accessories. These products range from wooden lights to modern trash cans and tissue boxes to suit everyone’s taste. We aim to lead the market with these modern unique pieces.

Name: Wittwer AG
Description:
Wir sind die Firma Wittwer AG, ein führendes Unternehmen im Bereich Holz- und Elementbau, wo Tradition auf Innovation trifft. Seit 1942 verbinden wir handwerkliches Können mit modernster Technologie, um einzigartige und nachhaltige Bauprojekte zu realisieren.

Unser Team von erfahrenen Handwerkern und Architekten teilt die Leidenschaft für Holz in all seinen Facetten. Vom traditionellen Holzbau bis hin zum fortschrittlichen Elementbau setzen wir auf Qualität, Präzision und ästhetische Raffinesse. Jedes Projekt ist für uns eine Möglichkeit, die Grenzen des Möglichen zu erweitern und individuelle Wohnträume Wirklichkeit werden zu lassen.

Unsere Expertise erstreckt sich über eine Vielzahl von Anwendungen, von Wohnhäusern über Gewerbebauten bis hin zu öffentlichen Projekten. Wir sind stolz darauf, innovative Lösungen anzubieten, die nicht nur funktional, sondern auch umweltfreundlich sind. Nachhaltigkeit ist ein integraler Bestandteil unserer Unternehmensphilosophie.

Mit 81 Jahren Erfahrung haben wir uns einen Ruf für Zuverlässigkeit, Fachkompetenz und kreative Gestaltung erworben. Wir streben stets danach, die Erwartungen unserer Kunden zu übertreffen und Projekte zu schaffen, die nicht nur Bestand haben, sondern auch Geschichten erzählen.

Folge uns auf LinkedIn, um an unserer Reise teilzuhaben, innovative Projekte zu entdecken und einen Blick hinter die Kulissen unserer Holz- und Elementbauwelt zu werfen. Wir sind mehr als ein Unternehmen – wir sind eine Gemeinschaft von Menschen, die die Liebe zum Holz teilen und die Zukunft des Bauens gestalten.

#Holzbau #Elementbau #Nachhaltigkeit #Innovation #Handwerk

At McElroy Customs, we specialize in creatively helping world-class golf clubs express their unique story to members and guests through a variety of golf furnishings. Designer and master craftsman, Greg McElroy has created custom-designed pieces for golf courses all over the world. How can we bring your club’s story to life?

Our unique, handcrafted pieces reflect the rich history of your club, and remind your members why your club is a step above the rest. These pieces help pro shops grow sales and are custom works of art that elevate your premium product offerings.

Planning a special event? McElroy Custom will design and curate something specifically for your event, and help ensure your next tournament gifting experience will never be forgotten.

Let’s work together to create world-class gifts and golf furnishings: 
https://mcelroycustoms.com/

Name: MamGroup CO
Description: The MAM group is focused on the design and manufacture of quality wood and steel products. Our companies cater to the commercial and residential building sector, producing an extensive range of wood doors, steel doors, cabinetry and other specialized architectural products. With customization at the core of our approach, we work with clients from the design stage to the final stages of a project, to ensure all their needs are met and delivered to the highest standards.

Name: Herbert Lumber Company
Description:
Herbert Lumber is an employee-owned company which for more than 75 years has been producing high-quality, specialty wood products that exceed the demands and specifications of the most exacting craftsmen and manufacturers.

We hand-select and harvest the finest Douglas Fir from the rich timber country of America’s Pacific Northwest. In our Oregon mill, we combine state-of-the-art technology with hands-on attention to detail to create custom products that reflect a commitment to consistent quality.

You’ll see your windows and doors in an entirely new light with custom wood products from Herbert Lumber.

Name: Legnoform
Description:
Legnoform è un'azienda di riferimento nella produzione di abbozzi semilavorati per l'industria calzaturiera e ortopedica. Con una storica esperienza dal 1952, siamo leader in Italia e all'estero, fornendo materiali di alta qualità per calzature e ortesi.

Specializzati nella lavorazione di legni selezionati come carpino, faggio, tiglio e acero, garantiamo abbozzi con basso assorbimento di umidità, alta resistenza alla trazione e una straordinaria flessibilità, ideali per il settore calzaturiero e ortopedico.

Il nostro personale altamente qualificato e esperto è il cuore della nostra produzione. Ogni abbozzo è progettato seguendo gli standard più elevati per assicurare che ogni prodotto soddisfi le esigenze dei formifici e delle aziende calzaturiere in tutto il mondo.

In Legnoform, la qualità è una garanzia. Ogni abbozzo, prima di essere spedito, viene accuratamente controllato per offrire un prodotto finale che supera le aspettative dei nostri clienti, in Italia e all'estero. L'affidabilità, la precisione e l'innovazione sono i valori che ci distinguono, rendendoci il partner ideale per ogni fase della produzione di calzature e ortesi.

Name: Skandach Holzindustrie GmbH
Description:
Die Experten für den Ingenieursholzbau
Ob für ein Ein-, Mehrfamilienhaus oder Industriebauten: Wir planen Ihre Holzkonstruktionen bis ins kleinste Detail und fertigen sie präzise mit Hilfe neuester Technologie in unserer Fertigungsstätte in Unseburg bei Magdeburg. Im Anschluss an die Produktion im Werk liefern wir sie zur Endmontage direkt auf die Baustelle.

Als Teil der Nordic Wood Industrie-Gruppe, dem Marktführer für hochwertige, nachhaltige Holzbaulösungen in Dänemark, können wir auf eine jahrzehntelange Erfahrung zurückgreifen. Mit hohem technischem Know-how und handwerklicher Kompetenz fertigen wir nach Ihren individuellen Vorgaben. Neben dem klassischen Bauträgergeschäft gehören auch der Handel sowie Zimmereien und Dachdeckerfirmen zu unseren Kunden.

Mit Leidenschaft & Know-How
Von einem kleinen, zwölfköpfigen Fertigungsbetrieb sind wir zu einem Standort mit 50 Mitarbeitern herangewachsen. Gestartet im Jahre 1993 haben wir in drei Jahrzehnten mehr als zwanzigtausend Projekte realisiert.

Hinter unseren hochwertigen und nachhaltigen Holzlösungen steht ein motiviertes Team aus Ingenieuren, Holztechnikern, Statikern, Zimmerern, Dachdeckermeistern, Handwerkern und Produktionsmitarbeitern.

Name: Service Pallet, LLC
Description: At Service Pallet, we help businesses save time, cut costs, and stay compliant with reliable pallet solutions. From custom designs and heat-treated crates to recycling and industrial lumber—we’ve got your shipping needs covered.

Timberlink supplies high quality, pressure treated timber and landscaping products, as well as offering a range of services, including a bespoke joinery service, timber cutting service and timber treatment.

Timberlink's treatment centre is one of the largest inland treatment facilities in the UK. We not only pressure treat our own timber, but also offer a custom timber treatment service to our customers, which comprises of multi-national European companies, major UK national and local timber companies, and fencing, building and landscaping contractors.

Name: The CNC Wood Company

The CNC Wood Company is here to provide all your CNC routing services using our state of the art CNC router in our Hampshire workshop.

Whether it's 2D profiles or complex milled forms, one-offs or large production work that is required, we have the equipment and experience to bring your project to life. Working with both individual and business customers, we welcome the broad range of projects that come our way.

This idea further grew into a platform where the philosophy of upcycling wood scraps, merged with the unique capabilities of Western India, could be delivered to our customers. .We design and manufacture designer home decor accessories, upcycling various wood-based materials and delivering them at the highest quality. By merging technology with age-old craftsmanship, we are able to deliver uniquely designed products, using specially crafted materials, that are sustainable and eco-friendly.

Name: İzpa Palet Geri Dönüşüm A.Ş.
Description:
İZPA PALET, 2002 yılında kurulmuş olup, bugün İzmir Pınarbaşı'nda bulunan 1500 metrekare kapalı ve 2000 metrekare açık alanda, 40’a yakın uzman personeliyle ahşap ambalaj sektöründe hizmet vermektedir. Profesyonel kadrosu ve geniş lojistik ağıyla İzmir ve çevre illere çözüm sunan İZPA PALET, ulusal ve uluslararası lojistikte güvenilir bir iş ortağıdır.

• Geniş Üretim Kapasitesi: Ahşap paletlerin yanı sıra ahşap kasa ve kasa katı imalatında da faaliyet göstermekteyiz. İhtiyacınıza özel boyut ve türlerde üretilen palet, kasalar ve kasa katları, malzemelerinizi en verimli ve güvenli şekilde taşır.

• Avrupa Standartlarında Üretim: Üretim süreçlerimizde Avrupa standartlarını ve prosedürlerini esas alıyor; yüksek kaliteyi uluslararası hizmet deneyimiyle birleştiriyoruz.

• Lojistikte Verimlilik: Ürettiğimiz palet, kasalar ve kasa katları, forklift ve transpalet araçlarıyla uyumludur, bu da iş yükü ve transfer maliyetlerinizi önemli ölçüde düşürür.

• Ulusal ve Kıtalararası Çözümler: İZPA PALET olarak, İzmir ve çevre illerine yönelik çözümler sunuyor, uluslararası lojistik sektörüne hizmet veriyoruz. Ürünlerinizi en hızlı ve dayanıklı şekilde taşımak için lojistik altyapımızı sürekli olarak geliştiriyoruz.

• Satış Sonrası Destek: Sadece üretim değil, satış sonrası teknik destek ve danışmanlık hizmeti de sağlıyoruz. Müşterilerimizle uzun vadeli ilişkiler kurmayı hedefleyerek, her aşamada yanlarında olmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

2002’den bu yana kazandığımız tecrübe ve birikimi, siz değerli müşterilerimize en uygun çözümleri sunmak için kullanıyoruz. Ürünlerimizi ve hizmetlerimizi daha yakından incelemek ya da size özel çözümler için bizimle iletişime geçmek için web sayfamızı ziyaret edebilirsiniz.

Name: North Avenue
Description:
At North Avenue, we specialize in the manufacturing and supply of high-quality solid wood products, including doors, door frames, wooden flooring, wooden decking, and pergolas. Our portfolio includes bespoke wooden solutions for both large-scale commercial projects and individual homeowners, offering custom-made doors and door frames with end-to-end services—from precise measurements and manufacturing to seamless finishing and installation.

Name: Tar River Timber Works
Description:
At Tar River, we help architects, designers, builders and owners create remarkable spaces defined by the timeless beauty of expertly crafted timber accents and timber frames. Timbers bring a project to life. But, without the right materials and experience, an entire build could be compromised. 

We bridge a critical gap in the construction process with a proven methodology taught to us by master craftsmen before us. We source custom cut, premium timbers from sustainably managed forests, carefully sort and store them for further air drying, then utilize traditional tooling and joinery techniques combined with advanced CAD and CNC technology to craft each piece with precision. 

Delivered labeled with instructions and ready to install, our timber packages ensure success for all involved. Partner with Tar River to bring your vision to life, avoid costly mistakes and build enduring value.

Our facility produces 800 m³ of finished veneer monthly from select species including White Oak, Red Oak, Beech, Birch, Ash, American Walnut, Alder, and Linden.
We deliver precise specifications with veneer thicknesses from 0.5-1.5 mm, widths between 90-1400 mm, and lengths up to 3500 mm across multiple quality grades. Our products enhance furniture, cabinetry, plywood, parquet, and construction applications, with FSC certification available upon request. Through rigorous quality control and advanced manufacturing techniques, we transform timber into exceptional wood materials that highlight the distinctive character of each premium species.

Name: Ten Bulte
Description:
Ten Bulte is een modern bedrijf dat al drie generaties actief is in de bosbouw. Waar opa het paard mee nam het bos in werkt men tegenwoordig met moderne harvesters en uitrijders. Ten Bulte is gespecialiseerd in onderhoud, dunning en eindkap van loof- en naaldhoutbossen. Dit doet Ten Bulte met een ervaren, geschoold en deskundig team van 15-20 werknemers.

Naast de bosbouw is Ten Bulte ook gespecialiseerd in het verwerken van het rondhout dat uit de bossen komt. Met de Mebor zaagmachine zagen we rondhout tot op maat gezaagde planken en balken met lengtes tot 5,5 meter. Ook hebben we sinds kort een eigen hacker in gebruik waarin reststromen uit de zagerij worden verwerkt tot hoogwaardige houtchips, daarnaast verkopen we ook bio-chips. De Bio-chips bevatten ook naalden en bladeren. 
~~
Ten Bulte ist ein modernes Unternehmen, das bereits seit drei Generationen in der Forstwirtschaft tätig ist. Wo der Großvater mit dem Pferd in den Wald ging, arbeiten wir heute mit modernen Harvestern und Schleppern. Ten Bulte ist auf die Pflege, Durchforstung und den Endeinschlag von Laub- und Nadelwäldern spezialisiert. Dafür steht Ten Bulte ein erfahrenes, geschultes und fachkundiges Team von 15-20 Mitarbeitern zur Verfügung.

Neben der Forstwirtschaft hat sich Ten Bulte auch auf die Verarbeitung des Rundholzes aus den Wäldern spezialisiert. Mit der Mebor-Blockbandsäge schneiden wir Rundholz zu maßgefertigten Brettern und Balken mit einer Länge von bis zu 5,5 Metern. Seit kurzem verfügen wir auch über eine eigene Hacker, in der Restströme aus dem Sägewerk zu hochwertigen Hackschnitzeln verarbeitet werden. Bio-Chips enthalten auch Nadeln und Blätter.

Name: Københavns Listefabrik ApS
Description:
Københavns Listefabrik blev grundlagt i 1973 som en del af Nørrebro Tømmerhandel, ejet af Ingolf Sørensen.

Det hele udsprang af en egentlig urealistisk idé: At registrere og forhandle alle trælister, der fandtes i kongeriget – fra en af landets mindste tømmerhandeler. Men kundernes behov for speciallister førte hurtigt til, at tømmerhandlen begyndte sin egen produktion.

I 1985 blev Nørrebro Tømmerhandel optaget i Guinness Rekordbog med verdens største sortiment af trælister – hele 600 forskellige slags. Den store efterspørgsel fra hele landet førte til etableringen af engrosvirksomheden Københavns Listefabrik.

Efter Ingolf Sørensens død i 2000 overtog Allan Lundberg aktiviteterne og flyttede listefabrikken til Østerbro. I dag er Københavns Listefabrik en selvstændig virksomhed i Søborg, hvorfra vi leverer trælister og trægulve til hele landet – nu med over 1.200 forskellige listenumre, næsten en fordobling af rekorden fra 1985.

De fleste af vores almue-fodlister, -indfatninger og -væglister i fyr er i dag PEFC-certificerede og miljødeklareret med 3.-partsverificeret EPD.

Name: Lydney Pallets & Cases Ltd
Description:
We manufacture a wide range of wooden pallets to match our customers’ specific requirements. This includes new and bespoke pallets, customised to meet our customers’ exact specifications, to standard UK and European sized new wooden pallets.  We can supply any quantity of pallets and currently we have in stock 75 x 16, 100 x 16, 100 x 25, 100 x 22, 95 x 95, 100, 75, 75 x 75. 

Our selection of new wooden pallets includes UK standard 1200mm x 1000mm and euro-size 1200mm x 800mm.

Our timber packing cases, and storage crates are designed to maximise storage space and protect your goods during transit, guaranteeing that your products are delivered safely and on time.


We provide custom-built, lightweight timber framed packing cases in several different styles, which include:
•	Open top timber packing cases
•	Fully enclosed timber packing cases
•	Close boarded timber packing cases
•	Slatted timber pallet crates
•	Partially slatted timber crates
•	Close boarded timber pallet crates

To assist with safe handling, our wooden packing cases are manufactured on standard runners which enables easy forklift entry and loading to take place. Our timber crates come equipped with a selection of linings and supplied flat packed or partially built.

All packing cases manufactured by Lydney Pallets & Cases are ISPM15 heat treated, marked, and certified ready for export.

Why choose Lydney Pallets & Cases?

We can provide you with absolute peace of mind. Our company currently enjoys both ISO 9001 and ISO 14,001, ensuring that every product that leaves our plant meets the highest standards achievable today. We acquire FSC-certified timber, both from the UK and overseas, plus we always strive to get the best quality and price for our customers. Finally, all our products adhere to timber regulations and are obtained from trusted suppliers.

Name: Thomes North America
Description:
Since 1963, Thomes Ltd. North America has been the reliable constant in a volatile industrial wood market. We are the largest importer and specialist supplier of high-quality Baltic Birch Plywood in the region, built on 50 years of expertise and secured sourcing channels.

In today's chaotic supply chain environment, we don't just sell wood: we guarantee stability.

Why partner with Thomes Ltd. North America?

• Sourcing Stability: As the largest importer with direct and strategic partnerships, we guarantee a steady supply and high-volume capability, ensuring your production schedule remains uninterrupted.

• Industrial Strength Products: We specialize in high-performance materials like film-faced and phenolic plywood (incl. Anti-Slip/Hexa patterns), engineered specifically for Trailer Decking, Commercial Vehicle Flooring, and demanding construction applications.

• Unmatched Quality & Compliance: Our Baltic Birch Plywood delivers superior strength (twice that of Douglas Fir) and fine grain, adhering to crucial standards like TSCA Title 6 and CARB-2 requirements.

• Value-Added Services: We provide full-service industrial solutions, including machining, finishing, custom coating, and efficient logistics across North America.

Secure your production schedule. Partner with the leader in industrial wood stability.

Contact our specialist team today to discuss your high-volume requirements.

Name: McKay Timber
Description:
Since 1947, McKay Timber has been one of Tasmania’s most trusted and respected timber manufacturers and suppliers, proudly delivering high quality, sustainably sourced timber products across Tasmania, Australia, and beyond. As a 100% Tasmanian, family owned business, McKay Timber operates multiple sites across Glenorchy, Prospect and Dandenong in Victoria, employing more than 100 local families and contributing significantly to the state’s manufacturing and construction sectors. 
Specialising in premium Tasmanian oak, structural framing, and a diverse range of custom timber solutions, McKay Timber supports builders, architects, designers, and large commercial contractors with reliable supply, manufacturing expertise, and a strong commitment to sustainable forestry practices. Their long-standing legacy is built on quality, integrity, innovation, and community connection. 
With more than 75 years of industry experience, McKay Timber continues to lead the way in producing durable, high performance timber products that meet the needs of residential, commercial, and large scale construction projects. Known for exceptional craftsmanship and consistency, the business remains a preferred partner for timber solutions throughout Tasmania, Victoria and New South Wales.

Name: nicoffee
Description:
Was ist nicoffee?
Nicoffee bietet handgemachtes Zubehör für Kaffeeliebhaber und Kaffeeliebhaberinnen. Alle Produkte aus Holz sind Unikate und werden zu 100% von Hand und in der Schweiz hergestellt. Dank 3D-Druck sind einige der Produkte modular und können so perfekt auf dein Setup abgestimmt werden.

Wer ist nicoffee?
Ich denke, zu meinem Namen muss ich nicht mehr viel sagen. Auch dass ich Kaffee mag, sollte mittlerweile klar sein. Aber warum nicoffee? Seit meiner Kindheit liebe ich es, in der Werkstatt zu stehen, den Hammer zu schwingen und den Bohrer kreisen zu lassen. Diese Leidenschaft in Kombination mit der Welt des Kaffees führte zu der Idee, meine Kreationen mit anderen Kaffeeliebhabern und Kaffeeliebhaberinnen zu teilen.

WHO.WE ARE.
About Flameproof Companies

Name: Same Roots
Description:
Same Roots este un brand de familie și un needs-based business construit din dorința de a trăi și munci cu rost, în armonie cu natura.

Totul a pornit din pasiunea pentru lemn – în atelierul nostru recuperăm bucăți de lemn vechi, de esență tare, și le redăm viața prin obiecte de decor și mic mobilier autentic, cu suflet. Dar lemnul este doar începutul. 

Same Roots înseamnă și educație firească și proiecte care răspund la nevoile reale ale comunității. Credem în simplitate, sustenabilitate și autenticitate, iar fiecare produs sau inițiativă pe care o veți descoperi aici vine din această filozofie.

De ce needs-based business? Pentru că ceea ce facem răspunde unor nevoi reale: ale noastre, ale clienților noștri, ale comunității și ale naturii. Ne ghidăm după ce este necesar, util și cu sens – nu după consumul fără rost.

 Vă invităm să rămâneți alături de noi, să susțineți un business mic, local și să descoperiți, pas cu pas, povestea produselor și proiectelor Same Roots.

Description:
Die Holzmanufaktur Rottweil - Die KUNST zu BEWAHREN

Seit 3 Jahrzehnten restaurieren, verbessern und rekonstruieren wir historisch wertvolle Bauausstattungen. 

Da es bei vielen funktionsbeanspruchten Fenstern, Türen, Treppen oder Böden berechtigte Ansprüche an wärme-, schall- und sicherheitstechnische Verbesserungen gibt, müssen überzeugende Kompromisse für die handwerkliche Umsetzung gefunden werden.

Wird zu viel oder zu unsensibel verändert, verlieren die Bauteile ihre historische Lesbarkeit. Konservierung und Restaurierung bedeutet nicht Stillstand oder technischer Rückschritt.

SU DI NOI
La nostra storia

Ci consideriamo nel mercato nazionale, un punto di riferimento serio ed affidabile per la nostra clientela consolidata.



AB Wood srl è una realtà che opera nel settore del legno per imballaggio, logistica, riscaldamento e non solo, il proprio obbiettivo è quello di offrire ai propri clienti un prodotto di alta qualità che possa rispondere ai più innovativi standard richiesti dal mercato ed in linea con le richieste dettate sempre di più dai segmenti di mercato più esigente.


In questa prospettiva siamo costantemente impegnati nel reperimento e commercializzazione delle materie prime più adeguate alla nostra clientela, provenienti dai diversi paesi d’origine e nella ricerca di un'ampia gamma di essenze europee, come pino, abete bianco, pioppo, faccio, quercia.



Siamo una grande squadra, che lavora in sinergia ogni giorno, sviluppando un programma perfettamente integrato di ricerca, reperimento, collaudo e movimentazione della materia prima, per permettere ai nostri clienti proposte e soluzioni originali, efficaci, intelligenti e fortemente innovative, nel rispetto dell’ambiente e dell’ecosistema.


In ogni operazione, mettiamo passione e precisione, per cercare e adottare continuamente nuove tendenze e soluzioni che ci consentano di nobilitare una risorsa preziosa come il legno. In tal modo rimaniamo fedeli al nostro ideale: il legno è un materiale che non si oppone alla natura, ma ne è parte integrante.

Name: Esquadribrás Indústria de Esquadrias
Description:
No ano de 1991 nascia a Esquadribrás Indústria de Esquadrias Ltda, na localidade de Rio Rosina, município de Rio dos Cedros, no estado de Santa Catarina. Inicia suas atividades produzindo Portas e Janelas de madeiras como Imbuia e Canela do Norte para diferentes mercados do Sudeste Brasileiro.

A partir do ano de 1994 a empresa inicia sua produção e exportação de portas de Pinus para a Inglaterra e Irlanda. Seguindo sua trajetória de expansão, a empresa abre uma filial na cidade vizinha de Timbó – SC no ano de 1995 em um galpão alugado. Com um desenvolvimento e crescimento sustentado através de uma administração sólida, a Esquadribrás transfere suas linhas de produção para sua, agora, sede própria no centro do município de Rio dos Cedros no ano de 2000. Com crescimento vertiginoso, a Esquadribrás torna-se 100% exportadora no ano de 2002, enviando seus produtos para Europa e América do Norte.
Sempre alinhada com as mudanças dos diversos mercados e vislumbrando a crescente demanda por produtos de qualidade no mercado brasileiro, a indústria inicia no ano de 2009 a produção de portas para obras de alto padrão no Médio Vale, litoral catarinense e região, onde torna-se referência de qualidade neste mercado.

Administrando as dificuldades e oportunidades impostas pelos mercados, a Esquadribrás mantém atualmente linhas de produção voltadas para exportação e para o mercado brasileiro, consolidando-se como uma empresa com fundamentos sólidos que proporcionam garantia, qualidade e continuidade de suas atividades aos seus colaboradores, clientes e fornecedores.

Name: Grønagergård Savværk
Description:
Grønagergård Savværk leverer træ til mange forskellige aktører, som har projekter i alle størrelser. Vi leverer alt fra den lille bænk i specialmål til kilometervis af kvalitetstræ til store byggeprojekter og alt derimellem. 

Vi er certificerede ved både FSC og PEFC, fordi vi gerne vil passe godt på vores skove, og vi gør en dyd ud af ikke at spilde noget træ.

Afskær fra produktionen bliver enten solgt som brænde eller skåret til træflis, som sælges til varmeværker rundt om i landet. 

Vi gør os mest i lærk, gran, douglas og eg, men vi er også leveringsdygtige i fx robinie, og vi sætter en ære i at vejlede og rådgive vores kunder, så de får den optimale løsning. Derfor er du altid velkommen til at kigge forbi savværket eller ringe til os på 86 87 54 14 og få en snak om mulighederne i dit projekt.

Name: Comeback Woodshop
Description:
I Comeback Woodshop er vi specialiseret i at hjælpe unge mænd der er udfordret ift. kriminalitet og udsathed med at tage ansvar for egen udvikling. I værkstedet producerer vi forskellige produkter i genbrugstræ til en række forskellige samarbejdspartnere og i den ramme får de unge mænd mulighed for at opnå kompetencer og erfaring, som kan bruges i forhold til deres CV og fremtidige karriere. Vi tror på, at alle har noget at bidrage med, og vi ønsker at hjælpe vores deltagere med at finde deres vej ift. job og uddannelse.

Vi er stolte af vores arbejde og vores deltagere, og vi tror på, at vi kan skabe en positiv forskel i samfundet ved at hjælpe marginaliserede unge med at tage ansvar for deres egen udvikling og finde vejen tilbage til samfundet. 

At understøtte udsatte unge med at komme videre i livet er i sig selv meningsfuldt, men som virksomhed og samarbejdspartner er der en række yderligere fordele:

#CSR: En af de mest åbenlyse årsager til at inddrage en social indsats i byggeprocessen kan være at styrke virksomhedens CSR-profil.

#DGNBpoint: Ved inddragelse af en social indsats i byggeprocessen kan Comeback Woodshop bidrage til at opnå DGNB point og dermed styrke byggeriets bæredygtighed.

#Verdensmål: Ved at inddrage udsatte borgere udenfor arbejdsmarkedet i byggeprocessen kan bygherrerne bla. bidrage til at opfylde målet om og derved være med til at gøre en positiv forskel i samfundet.

#Social bæredygtighed: En social indsats i byggeprocessen kan bidrage til at nedbringe ledigheden blandt udsatte grupper og dermed skabe en positiv samfundsøkonomisk effekt.

#Social sammenhængskraft: Samtidig kan en social indsats i byggeprocessen også bidrage til at skabe et mere trygt og inkluderende samfund og forebygge social eksklusion.

Name: The Otter Mill
Description:
Welcome to The Otter Mill!  Owned and operated by Mike Phillips (aka Otter), this Veteran-owned small business is where the love of making sawdust became a personal resilience program all while creating fun custom woodwork for family and friends.

After over 30 years in uniform with communications and cyberspace roles, Mike retired as a Colonel from the US Air Force in 2022.  Having moved every 2-3 years, he was never able to fully establish a robust woodshop, but always took great pleasure in designing and constructing furniture and gifts for family and friends in the smaller shops. 

Over the past few years, with special thanks to his family, the small shop has grown into “sawdust therapy” making custom items and décor.  With the addition of new tools and some creative liberty, as well as finally settling down into a permanent location (14 moves later), The Otter Mill has expanded its offerings via social media and word of mouth. From custom holiday decorations to cutting and charcuterie boards to yard games to patriotic signs and flags, the Mill has been able to meet the needs of customers across the globe!

So while you’re here, take a look at some past projects. If you like what
you see, feel free to comment. And…if you don’t see it, ask!  The Otter Mill specializes in creating what your mind imagines, all while continuing to enjoy some “sawdust therapy”!

Name: GP Wood Ltd
Description:
GP Wood is one of Irelands most successful and long-established timber processing companies.  Based in County Cork, the group employs approximately 150 staff with a further 250 indirect employees. Timber manufacturing focused on the construction, fencing, garden leisure and packaging markets is the core business of the group. We operate two of Ireland’s largest and most technologically advanced sawmills.

We have also diversified into added value markets through our sister company Eirebloc who manufacturer pallet blocks from a mixture of virgin and recycled timber.

We at GP Wood, take our environmental responsibility seriously and are fully committed to sustainability in our technologically advanced production facilities. We are proud of our role in the cycle of renewal and actively participating in timber sustainability for future generations. 

Our environmental and social responsibilities are the guiding philosophy in our day-to-day operations. Of equal importance is our commitment to supplying our customers with world class products at competitive prices. At GP Wood, our relationship with our customers is based on shared values of professionalism and a commitment to quality service.

Name: Fiskarhedens Komponenter
Description:
I över 20 års tid har vi arbetat med trä, och kapat komponenter till möbelindustrin. Som en del av Fiskarhedens Trävaru och med skogen runt knuten har vi stor kunskap om trä – och ett lika stort engagemang.

EN HÅLLBAR RÅVARA
Vi arbetar med virke av senvuxen furu och gran, som har vuxit i skogarna i norra Dalarna, Härjedalen och Värmland. I ett lite kallare klimat växer träden långsammare, och skapar ett högkvalitativt och hållbart virke.

For over 20 years, we have worked with wood, cutting components for the furniture industry. As part of Fiskarhedens Trävaru and with the forest around the corner, we have great knowledge of wood – and an equally great commitment.

A SUSTAINABLE RAW MATERIAL
We work with timber of late-grown pine and spruce, which has grown in the forests of northern Dalarna, Härjedalen and Värmland. In a slightly colder climate, the trees grow more slowly, creating high-quality and durable timber.

Name: Refugio-ucll
Description:
Bij Refugio geloven we dat duurzaamheid begint bij aandacht. Aandacht voor materialen, voor vakmanschap en voor de natuurlijke omgeving waarin we leven. Daarom maken wij handgemaakte vogelhuisjes uit duurzame en verantwoorde materialen, ontworpen om vogels niet alleen onderdak te bieden, maar ook echte bescherming en rust.

Elk vogelhuisje wordt lokaal vervaardigd met oog voor detail en functionaliteit. We kiezen bewust voor duurzame houtsoorten en een doordacht ontwerp dat inspeelt op de noden van verschillende vogelsoorten. Zo dragen onze huisjes actief bij aan biodiversiteit, zonder in te boeten op esthetiek of kwaliteit.

Name: Scierie de Landi
Description:
Située à Landivisiau, la Scierie de Landi est une entreprise spécialisée dans la fabrication de produits hors standards.
Cette entreprise locale développe ses activités autour de quatre pôles :
- la fabrication de caisses et de palettes
- l'éco-construction (bois non-traité)
- le débit-sur-liste
- la valorisation des déchets
Le bois du pays utilisé est sélectionné par un exploitant forestier, dans un rayon de 100 kilomètres autour de la scierie.

La Scierie de Landi est membre de plusieurs associations locales :
- Approche Éco-habitat - Association pour la promotion de la construction et de l'habitat écologique
- Sitcob - Association pour l'utilisation de l'épicéa de Sitka dans la construction locale
- Abibois - Le réseau des professionnels du bois en Bretagne
- Scieurs du Finistère - Association pour la valorisation des bois locaux de construction

Name: ASC Barrels
Description:
ASC Barrels was created to start a new era of cask (NEOC) for the wine, beer, and spirit industry based on the great potential in used barrels. Used barrels were diamonds in the rough - unconsidered, misunderstood, mistreated and unrevealed by many producers. This is when the idea of a high-quality refurbished barrel made of premium used barrels and a high standard process was born. Thanks to its past life experience and education, our barrels provide their new users with an innovative and ecologically-responsible way to mature their products.

The fundamental principle of ASC Barrels’ philosophy is close collaboration and attentiveness to our client's wishes and needs. This allows us to tailor our barrels to their specific needs for their unique signature. Building on this virtuous feedback loop, we have developed an expertise which allows us to advise our clients on using and maintaining their barrels.

What you will experience and learn with ASC Barrels is unique, you will find it nowhere else.

Name: Grootenboer Keuken + Interieurbouw
Description:
Maatwerkoplossingen laten een interieur er niet alleen luxer uitzien doordat alles precies past, maar zorgen ook voor een uniforme uitstraling en optimale benutting van ruimte. Grootenboer Keuken & Interieurbouw realiseert stijlvolle maatwerk keukens, wandkasten en volledige interieurprojecten. Maximale personalisatie en vakmanschap staan bij ons centraal!

Al in zijn tienertijd was Corstian Grootenboer in de weer met hamer en spijkers. Vanuit de schuur van zijn ouders bouwde hij hutten van oude pallets en later daarna steigerhouten meubels voor vrienden en familie. Op zijn 17e maakte hij zijn eerste keuken. Na een opleiding aan het Hout- en Meubileringscollege in Rotterdam, waar hij de kneepjes van het vak leerde, lag het oprichten van zijn eigen bedrijf dan ook voor de hand. Zo begon hij in 2014 Grootenboer Keuken & Interieurbouw. Inmiddels is het team uitgebreid met een monteur, stagiair en tekenaar. Samen gaan we voor goud!

Vanuit de werkplaats in Middelharnis tekenen wij vakkundig en precies menig droomkeuken, perfect passende inbouwkast of bijzondere ontvangstbalie uit. Die assembleren we vervolgens snel en op locatie. Van eikenhout tot notenfineer en van meubelpanelen met decoratief plaatmateriaal tot natuursteen, welk materiaal een klant ook kiest, wij zorgen voor een perfecte afwerking. Of het nu gaat om klanten in de particuliere of zakelijke sector, maatwerk, aandacht en maximale personalisatie zijn kernwoorden die we naar elk project meenemen.

Name: M/s Maganlal Manilal sheth
Description:
150 Years of Legacy. 150 Years of Trust. 

At Maganlal Manilal Sheth, we don’t just make packaging – we create protection that lasts generations. Established in 1875, our journey of over a century and a half has been about one promise: safeguarding what matters most to businesses.

 From plywood packaging, pallets, and crates to custom wooden boxes, our solutions ensure your cargo stays safe – whether it’s heavy machinery, chemicals, pharma products, or export goods. Think of us as the silent partner that keeps your business moving.

 What sets us apart?
Certified Assurance: CE Certified, IS 710 compliant & backed with 25 years warranty.

Built to Last: Borer-proof, fungus-proof, boiling water-proof with 100% composed core technology.

Precision Finish: Crafted with 4-Press Technology for strength, smoothness & uniform thickness.

 Over the years, we’ve partnered with leading industries, ensuring that every shipment is not just delivered but delivered safe. With innovation, sustainability, and precision at our core, we continue to carry forward our 150-year-old promise of strength & safety.

 Why choose us?
Because when you choose Maganlal Manilal Sheth, you don’t just get packaging. You get:

Protection 
Reliability 
Peace of mind 

After all, for 150 years, we’ve proven that packaging isn’t just about wood and nails – it’s about trust that travels.

Name: Chapas Muñoz SL
Description:
Chapas Muñoz, S.L. es una empresa joven que nace en 2010, respaldada en los más de 30 años de experiencia de su fundador en el sector de la madera. Nuestra filosofía es ofrecer al cliente un trato personalizado, asesorándolo con el fin de conseguir el máximo de la madera solicitada y ofreciéndole un servicio rápido y eficaz. 

Siguiendo unos estándares de calidad del producto y seleccionando cada una de las especies y de los troncos. Ganándonos así un nombre en el sector de la madera. 

Contamos con una amplia gama de chapas de madera natural y exóticas, diseñadas para satisfacer toda una variedad de aplicaciones, en el sector mobiliario, puertas, carpintería general, instrumentos musicales, contract, construcción naval, etc. 

Además, nuestro almacén cuenta con la distribución oficial en España de la firma italiana TABU, en la cual se dispone de chapas tanto tintadas como precompuestas y parquet de madera natural tintada con diseño italiano.

Chapas Muñoz, S.L. cuenta con la certificación FSC desde 2015. Disponemos de una larga lista de especies de madera disponibles con la certificación y garantizada por un sistema de trazabilidad interno.

Andreas Hoffmann Kreative Raumgestaltung wurde vor über 50 Jahren von Schreinermeister Günter Hoffmann in Eisingen bei Pforzheim gegründet.
1999 erfolgte die Übernahme des Betriebes durch Andreas Hoffmann, Schreinermeister und staatl. geprüfter Möbel- und Innenraumgestalter.

Heute gehören der Entwurf und die Fertigung von Einzelmöbeln wie auch die individuelle und hochwertige Einrichtungsplanung einer Wohnung oder eines Objektes zu unseren Aufgaben.

Die in unserem Meisterbetrieb fachgerecht hergestellten Möbel, ergänzen wir durch raumplus Schiebetürsysteme und ergonomische Möbel für gesundes Sitzen und Schlafen. Außerdem zählen Küchen und ein kreativer Innenausbau zu unseren Leistungen. 

Zu unseren individuell geplanten Schlafzimmerlösungen passen die Relax Naturbettsysteme mit den natürlichen Materialien und einer hervorragenden Körperunterstützung perfekt.

"Bewegende" Sitzmöbel von MOIZI vervollständigen Ihren Wohn- und Arbeitsbereich.

Unser Familienunternehmen mit Tradition ist geprägt von gegenseitigem Vertrauen und langjähriger Erfahrung.

Flexibilität, Qualität und der persönliche Service machen uns zum idealen Partner für die kreative Raumgestaltung Ihres Wohnbereiches oder Objektes.

Haben Sie Freude an individuellem Wohnen? Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Anfragen.

Ihr Andreas Hoffmann

Our tools include all those required for basic woodworking (table saws, jointer and planers, lathes etc), large-scale machines including a 43" sander, CNC mortise and tenon mill, a ShopBot with 8" of vertical travel), and fun tools for learning such as our GlowForge laser engraver.

HatchSpace's courses cover basic tool training, beginning and intermediate woodworking skills, and advanced or "master" classes for producing exquisite wood-made goods. From rolling pins to Windsor chairs, cutting board to cabinets - we've got you covered.

Come experience the joy of making with wood at HatchSpace!

Det er stolte håndværkstraditioner, der er grundlaget for virksomheden, der i dag ejes og drives af brødrene Jesper Møller og Peter Møller. Begge har stor erfaring inden for branchen, og med deres snedkerfaglige baggrund har de visionære og holdbare idéer for fremtiden.

Name: Belat
Description:
Belat is een specialist in houten vloeren, PVC/SPC vloeren, gevestigd in Bree, Belgisch Limburg. Belat werd opgericht in 2009 en is sindsdien uitgegroeid tot een van de grootste vloer leveranciers in België. Als gevolg van de snel groeiende onderneming werd in 2018 een 2de vestiging geopend in Vilvoorde. Vanuit de zagerij in Letland worden de houtproducten vervoerd naar het magazijn in Bree en Vilvoorde. Dit garandeert de kwaliteit en presenteert de beste prijzen aan zowel particulieren als andere vloeren winkels.

De bomen die verwerkt worden tot parket of eiken balken worden verwerkt in de lokale zagerij in Letland. De vloer heeft de juiste uitstraling dankzij de bewerking van de getalenteerde arbeiders in de werkplaatsen in Oost-Europa. Volgens de keuze van de klant wordt de eindafwerking in Bree gedaan om de gewenste uitstraling te creëren.

Het feit dat de vloeren in Oost-Europa worden geproduceerd, is een van de belangrijkste redenen waarom Belat de beste prijzen in België kan aanbieden. Dit betekent dat het productieproces onder directe controle is, van de aankoop van de grondstoffen tot de uiteindelijke afwerking.

De Europese eik is bekend door haar duurzaamheid. Moderne machines en opgeleide mensen met jarenlange ervaring in houtbewerking zijn aanwezig in de productiefaciliteiten. Omdat er geen tussenpersonen (agenten, groothandels etc.) bij betrokken zijn, kunnen zo de beste kwaliteit houten vloeren gemaakt worden tegen een aanzienlijk lagere prijs dan bij concurrenten.De voornaamste producten zijn:

Elke klant is bij Belat van harte welkom!

Massieve parket en Lamelparket
Visgraat parket massief en Visgraat lamelparket
SPC / PVC vloeren
Eiken balken en planken
Bijproducten zoals plinten, parketlijm, ondervloeren.

Het doel van Belat is een tevreden klant! Daarom is er garantie op alle producten!

Name: Hermann Holz GmbH
Description:
Die Hermann Holz GmbH fertigt nachhaltige Tische aus Schweizer Massivholz – Möbelstücke mit Persönlichkeit, Ausdruck und einer eigenen Geschichte. Es bleibt jedes natürliche Detail sichtbar: Äste, Maserungen und Risse werden nicht versteckt, sondern bewusst hervorgehoben – durch Feuer, Kunstharz und hochwertige Öle. Die Natur gibt die Form vor, sie wird ergänzt mit dem Handwerk. So entstehen Tische, die nicht nur genutzt werden, sondern begeistern.

Eine besondere Rolle spielt die traditionelle japanische Technik des Köhlens (Yakisugi). Durch die Bearbeitung mit Feuer entstehen Oberflächen, die unverwechselbar sind: rau und doch edel, widerstandsfähig und voller Tiefe. Das Feuer bringt Strukturen zum Vorschein, die sonst verborgen geblieben wären. Ein geköhlter Tisch erzählt vom Baum, von dem er stammt – und vom intensiven Prozess, der ihn geformt hat. Gleichzeitig verbessert diese Technik die Beständigkeit des Holzes: Es wird resistenter gegen Feuchtigkeit, Schädlinge und UV-Strahlung.

Die Kundinnen und Kunden sind Teil dieses Entstehungsprozesses. Von der Auswahl des Holzes über die Gestaltung der Kanten und Oberflächen bis hin zur Wahl des passenden Gestells aus Stahl oder Naturstein entsteht Schritt für Schritt ein einzigartiges Meisterstück. Ein Tisch, der nicht nur in Ihr Zuhause oder Ihre Geschäftsräume passt, sondern ein Teil davon wird – individuell, hochwertig und mit emotionaler Verbundenheit.

Hermann Holz GmbH – Holz in seiner schönsten Form.

Name: Van der Geest Trappen
Description:
Trappenmakerij van der Geest is opgezet door Aad van der Geest in 1994. Aad van der Geest heeft het bedrijf tot een succes gemaakt, 15 jaar lang is hij eigenaar geweest van de trappenmakerij. In 2008 heeft Aad het bedrijf verkocht aan Dolf Koetsier.

Onder zijn leiding is er wel het een en ander veranderd, vooral in het voortraject. Het ontwerpen bijvoorbeeld gebeurde voorheen nog op de ouderwetse manier, aan de tekentafel. Nu doen we dat op de computer. De hele trap komt 1 op 1 uit de printer, vervolgens worden die delen op het hout geplakt en uitgezaagd. Dit scheelt een heleboel tijd. Alle delen van de trap worden in onze eigen werkplaats gemaakt op ambachtelijke traditionele wijze. Bij speciale wensen zijn er ook vakmensen in het bedrijf die speciale onderdelen met de hand kunnen maken.

Onze klantenkring bestaat voor 30% uit particulieren en voor 70% uit aannemers. Weer onder te verdelen in eenderde nieuwbouw en tweederde verbouw. We doen ook renovaties, zie ook de foto’s op de site. Vaak is het bij renoveren een goede optie om de trap helmaal opnieuw te bekleden, eigenlijk is dat de oude trap helemaal in te pakken met nieuw hout. Dit kan een goed alternatief zijn voor een nieuwe trap.
Kortom, er is heel veel mogelijk, we kunnen trappen maken naar ieder z’n wens.

Wij maken graag een offerte voor u voor een nieuwe trap danwel renovatie van bestaande trap. Wij adviseren in het model trap en de te kiezen houtsoorten. Wij ontwerpen de trap zelf bij ons op kantoor, maar niet voordat we eerst op locatie de maatvoering hebben gemeten. Na het ontwerp krijgt u de tekening en maatvoering van de trap toegestuurd zodat u een helder beeld krijgt van hoe de trap zal worden. Daarna zullen we in onze eigen werkplaats de trap vervaardigen en desgewenst 1 x voorbehandelen alvorens wij een afspraak met u maken om de trap te plaatsen. Wij proberen dit hele proces in een zo kort mogelijk tijdsbestek te laten verlopen zodat u snel van uw nieuwe trap kan genieten.

Today you will find that our hope is to make a social and environmental impact on the world as the current times we are in justifies that focus.  We aim to add charitable contributions as an aspect of each of our sales in hopes to spread philanthropic mindsets on all those so fortunate to be able to own one of our works. 

We want everyone to be able to join in the tradition of putting a PAR Puzzle together so please have a look at our L-Class editions which are limited offerings that you can purchase and trade (or re-sell) that have hand-drawn piece designs and are cut with cost efficiency in mind.

Name: BOYS FROM THE WOOD GmbH
Description:
"Der heisse Scheiss aus dem Erzgebirge"

Die BOYS FROM THE WOOD sind eine Serie handgefertigter erzgebirgischer Räuchermänner und grösstenteils Einzelstücke. In den letzten 7 Jahren entstanden im Learning-by-Doing-Modus knapp 400 verschiedene Boys und Girls. Vom Snowboarder oder Graffitisprayer über Louis de Funes bis hin zu Karl Lagerfeld oder Sido wächst die Familie der Boys ständig und wartet darauf, die Welt zu erobern. Uns ist es wichtig, die erzgebirgische Tradition zu wahren aber gleichzeitig auch mit der Zeit zu gehen.

Du willst Dein ganz eigenes und personalisiertes Raachermannl? Kein Problem! Schreib uns einfach eine MAIL mit Deinen Vorstellungen und im Idealfall mit ein, zwei Fotos der darzustellenden Person. Durchschnittlich kostet eine personalisierte Figur zwischen 380,- und 480,-€.
Jeder personalisierte Boy from the Wood ist übrigens nummeriert, signiert und kommt samt Echtheitszertifikat in einer schicken gravierten Holzbox zu Dir.

Victoriaville & Co. has become the third-largest manufacturer of wooden caskets in North America and one of the most important distributors of funeral and commemorative products. 

Whether families opt for burial or cremation as a means of final disposition, wood products manufactured at Victoriaville & Co. offer a “neutral disposition” option, meaning they are designed for both burial and cremation. Victoriaville & Co. offers its clients a wide range of products known as “The Essentials.” This collection features, among others, metal and fabric-covered caskets as well as urns made from different materials and designed to receive the ashes of the deceased person. 

Memorialization products, including jewelry and keepsakes replicating the design of an urn and containing a small amount of the cremated remains, are also available. Victoriaville & Co. also specializes in the manufacture of ethnic, eco-responsible and religious products. In addition, special-size caskets are also available, including child-size caskets.

Name: Dolux-M
Description:
At Dolux-m, we believe that true value lies in beginnings. Every piece of furniture tells a story about the material it’s made from, the people who shape it every day, and the passion embedded in every detail. “Origin matters” – it’s not just about the wood; it’s about so much more. It’s an idea that always walks hand in hand with tradition.

It is within tradition that we have rooted our mission, yet in an everyday world full of innovation and openness to new technologies, our uniqueness continues to grow. We strongly believe in the intrinsic value of tradition as the foundation for blending time-tested carpentry techniques with the latest technological advancements. Where once a saw and the skilled hand of a master were sufficient, today we leverage modern equipment to flexibly meet diverse orders. This approach allows us to combine the reliable consistency of serial production with the meticulous craftsmanship honed over generations. Every project, regardless of scale, is developed so that the wood can fully express its noble character.

Our mission is to create wooden furniture of the highest quality, built upon a 30-year tradition of Polish craftsmanship, while respecting natural resources in the spirit of the “zero waste” philosophy. We believe that full transparency throughout the production process—from material selection to the final product—builds trust and fosters truly collaborative partnerships with our Clients and Partners. Meticulous attention to every detail, a shared pursuit of the best solutions, and responsible resource management form the very foundation of our DNA.

Description:
For many years, Tennessee has been a beloved vacation spot for our family. However, a few years ago, we began considering it as a potential retirement (many years away) destination, giving birth to the idea of "Tennessee Dreams." In 2019, we took the first step towards realizing this dream by purchasing a rental cabin in Sevierville, TN, leading to the establishment of Tennessee Dreams, LLC to manage the endeavor.

In 2020, during the challenging times of the pandemic and subsequent lockdowns, I found solace and inspiration in woodworking, which had always been a retirement hobby aspiration. Starting with small projects, my passion for woodworking grew, and I realized the potential to incorporate it into our business ventures. Thus, I decided to establish this online store to showcase and offer my handcrafted products to a wider audience, combining my love for Tennessee and the art of woodworking.

We are specialists in selling unique, beautiful-looking wooden ornaments that have been turned on a lathe and get much pleasure in making wood-loving buyers happy. We have enjoyed making our products, selling them through various channels, and shipping them to different parts of the world. All of our products are individually handmade; therefore, each is one of a kind. We go out of our way to obtain the best quality wood to create the finest ornaments, to meet the demand our customers would wish for in a quality product. That is why we have faith in our ornaments – we would not sell something we would not wish to purchase, own and put on display ourselves.

Neil Chinnock – BSc (Open), MSc Env Mgmt (Open)
Chief Administrator & Wood Turner

Name: MainWood - Mainstreaming Wood Construction
Description: Timber engineering and construction concepts have immense potential to reduce carbon emissions. The use of biomaterials in the construction industry allows for increased carbon storage and reduced energy-related emissions, but scaling-up wood construction has cross-sectoral implications. Benefitting from expertise from four Swiss research institutions, the MainWood project will provide the scientific basis for the transition to construction bioeconomy in Switzerland and beyond. Working across the wood construction supply chain, the MainWood research team will address forest dynamics impacted by climate change, timber production systems, new wood-based construction materials, innovative design and construction, life cycle assessment, and retrofitting concepts. MainWood is also working with policy and societal actors to contribute to a transition to a circular bioeconomy that connects rural and urban landscapes.

Our products can be found in homes and public spaces, both as part of our own range and integrated into other brands’ solutions. What connects them all is the focus on quality, care, and reliability.

Our main product areas include:
• Furniture & Joinery: components for furniture, interiors and custom woodworking
• Craft Items: wooden parts for creative and hobby applications
• Gift & Decorative Products: turned or moulded pieces for designers and resellers

In recent years, we’ve entered a phase of transformation – where digitalisation and sustainable material choices meet decades of experience and craftsmanship.
Our ambition is to lay the foundation for long-term partnerships with short lead times, high delivery precision and personal service.

Whether you’re a product developer, buyer, designer or reseller, we want to make it easy to choose wood.
We listen, adapt and deliver – with pride in our craft and respect for both people and materials.

Depuis 2019, nous sélectionnons, préparons et transformons les meilleurs bois pour ceux qui aiment créer, bâtir, aménager, imaginer.

Des essences solides, sélectionnées avec soin
Des découpes sur-mesure, propres et précises
Des finitions nettes avec collage de bandes de chant

Mais notre vrai métier, c’est d’accompagner chaque artisan, chaque client, dans la réalisation de son idée, en lui fournissant un bois adapté, bien préparé, et livré avec sérieux.

 Installés à Casablanca, avec plusieurs agences réparties dans la ville, nous servons une clientèle variée :
→ menuisiers, agenceurs, créateurs de mobilier, professionnels du BTP, ou particuliers passionnés de bois.

Chez nous, pas de promesses en l’air :
Juste du bois, du vrai, bien travaillé, et un service à taille humaine.

Name: Thy Træelement ApS
Description:
Som familieejet og -drevet virksomhed, går vi op i vores tradition og vores værdier. Vi har hjemme i Thy – det er vores base og vores kvalitetskontrol. Men vores koncept lader os levere til det meste af landet og vores nabolande.

Hos Thy Træelement værner vi om vores håndværk, og vi tager kravene til det og vores kvalitetsansvar seriøst. Samtidig mener vi, at træ er en af mange gode veje frem i byggebranchen – af miljømæssige, håndværksmæssige og æstetiske årsager. Derfor har vi skabt en elementproduktion, der giver de bedste rammer for vores håndværk og de mest fordelagtige muligheder for vores kunder og samarbejdspartnere. Muligheder for at udnytte det fulde potentiale i vores ekspertise og i træ som byggemateriale.

Vi leverer elementer og moduler til skræddersyede løsninger, og der er kort sagt ikke ret mange opgaver vi ikke kan løse – for erhverv og private, totalløsninger eller som underleverandør. Vores erfaring og ekspertise betyder, at vi fleksibelt kan levere til de fleste behov fra elementbyggeri til specialopgaver. Og vores produktionsflow betyder at vi kan optimere på tid, kvalitet og økonomi i alle vores løsninger.

Name: Crosswood
Description:
Crosswood: Pioneering Hardwood Cross Laminated Timber (HCLT) Manufacturing in Virginia

Welcome to Crosswood, positioned to become a leading Cross Laminated Timber (CLT) manufacturer strategically situated in the heart of the Appalachian hardwood region. We pride ourselves on being at the forefront of the hardwood mass timber industry, poised to meet market demands across the Northeast region. Notably, Crosswood stands as the first CLT manufacturer in Virginia and the inaugural producer of hardwood CLT in North America.

At Crosswood, we offer an extensive range of CLT building products. In addition to these, we bring innovation to the market with our off-site built modular structures crafted from hardwood cross laminated timber. Distinguished by their uniqueness, functionality, and rapid deployability, our structures can be conveniently shipped via ground or air. This flexibility allows us to undertake projects virtually anywhere a supporting pad is available.

Whether catering to civilian, government, or military clients, Crosswood is equipped to build customized structures that meet specific requirements. Our commitment to forestry management and sustainability is unwavering, as we actively collaborate with partners in the hardwood industry and the Department of Forestry. This collaboration ensures the continued success and future sustainability of mass timber.

Crosswood is excited about the prospect of meeting customer demands and contributing to the expansion of the mass timber market through our state-of-the-art HCLT manufacturing facility. Join us in building better, building stronger, and building with Crosswood.

Name: Azzali Battiscopa srl
Description: Siamo una realtà storica che ha fatto della tradizione e dell’innovazione i suoi punti di forza. Da generazioni ci dedichiamo con passione alla produzione e vendita di battiscopa, combinando l’esperienza tramandata con le più moderne tecniche di lavorazione. Affidatevi a noi per trovare il legno perfetto per i vostri spazi, realizzato con cura e maestria artigianale.

Name: PT Lestari Mahaputra Buana
Description:
PT Lestari Mahaputra Buana is a wood product manufacturing company based in Padalarang City, Indonesia, which specializes in wooden slats and wooden-cased pencils production.

Our company continuously thrives since its establishment in 1996, with current production capacity over 6 million gross slats and 5 million gross pencils annually, and has supplied many countries in Asia, North & South America, and Europe.

With more than 2 decades of experiences, we are able to collect deep technical expertises and build strong mutual connections with suppliers and industry experts around the world, and hailed as one of the most trusted and value-oriented slat & pencil manufacturers in the world.

We are committed to delivering the highest level of customer satisfaction by ensuring that their acute needs are met. To achieve that, in 2014, we acquired lands in Cipatat, West Java, not far from the production site, to ensure sustainable supply of high-quality raw materials for our productions.

LMB has always prioritized leading the industry by setting best practices in sustainability. Since the beginning, we have invested heavily to maintain industry-leading certifications such as FSC (since 2007), PEFC (since 2008), and SVLK (legal harvest of Indonesia’s forests; certified since 2012). 

Through our sustainable practice and low-emission operations within the facilities, we are carbon-negative in our operations, not only complying, but going beyond what is stated within the Paris Climate Agreement.

Name: Sklejka Eko S.A.
Description:
SKLEJKA-EKO S.A. – łączymy tradycję z nowoczesnością, technologię z naturą.
To firma z ponad 100-letnią tradycją w przemyśle drzewnym. Naszą misją jest dostarczanie sklejki technicznej najwyższej jakości – zarówno na rynek krajowy, jak i zagraniczny.

Specjalizujemy się w produkcji i sprzedaży sklejki z drewna iglastego (sosna) oraz liściastego (brzoza, olcha, buk), oferując produkty pełnoformatowe oraz przetworzone. Nasze wyroby znajdują zastosowanie w przemyśle meblowym, samochodowym, kolejowym, budowlanym oraz w stolarce otworowej i wykończeniowej.

Wysoka jakość i powtarzalność produkcji sprawiają, że aż 50% naszych produktów trafia na rynki eksportowe – w tym do Skandynawii i Europy Zachodniej – spełniając oczekiwania najbardziej wymagających klientów.

W ramach działalności handlowej oferujemy również komponenty i materiały do produkcji mebli, okien, drzwi, pojazdów oraz systemów konstrukcyjnych. Obsługujemy zarówno firmy produkcyjne, jak i handlowe – w Polsce i za granicą.

Dodatkowym atutem firmy jest strategiczna lokalizacja zakładu w południowej Wielkopolsce, umożliwiająca sprawną i terminową realizację zamówień.
