Name: DH Interiors LLC
Description:
DH Interiors is a custom millwork and cabinet shop that has been in business for over 25 years. We have the experience, facilities, and talent to service the construction and renovation segments with quality, cost effective solutions, and on-time completion of projects. We serve the NJ, NY, CT, PA regions.

DH Interiors employs skilled designers, estimators, and shop/installation talent, with an average of more than 10 years experience per person. All estimating, purchasing, cutting, staining, finishing, and installation are done in-house.  We fabricate in wood, laminates, engineered and natural stone. Custom stain matching and specialized "one-of-a-kind" jobs are easily managed.

DH Interiors welcomes new business opportunities. Let us help you meet the cabinetry needs of your most discriminating customers with unsurpassed quality, fit, finish and installation. Description:
Les produits WoodSpars associent innovation et tradition du bois. Ils sont conçus pour une utilisation dans le secteur nautique, du bâtiment et l’aménagement de l’extérieur, avec des essences de bois locales ou exotiques. La certification FSC fait partie de son engagement qualité responsable.

WoodSpars dispose d'un tour à bois de dimensions uniques en Europe. Cette machine spéciale est capable de tourner, usiner et scier des poutres de 30m de long et 80cm de diamètre. Les poutres en bois massif ou BLC sont usinés dans les 4 axes. Un atelier conçu pour la fabrication optimale des bois ronds : machines spéciales,  fraiseuses et ponceuses. Tout l’équipement pour répondre rapidement aux commandes uniques ou en mini séries.

Un logiciel a été développé en propre pour le calcul des charges. Cette partie du bureau d’études peut dessiner, calculer les efforts et vérifier les dimensions des pièces en bois. Un cabinet d’architecture vient en renfort pour concevoir, étudier et certifier les projets de grand ampleur.

Name: Francia Pellet
Description:
Siamo una realtà innovativa, giovane, dinamica.
La nostra passione per il legno si è evoluta negli anni, grazie a un approccio innovativo in ogni fase della produzione e commercializzazione dei pellet, che ci ha resi leader del primo mercato mondiale per i pellet per i consumatori finali.

Siamo un’azienda con solide radici familiari, riconosciuta per la propria affidabilità, per l’impegno e il talento di tutti i dipendenti e per la sua straordinaria capacità di essere al servizio dei propri clienti.
I nostri clienti possono contare sui nostri pellet come scelta all’insegna della sostenibilità, poiché il legno è una fonte energetica rinnovabile, e all’insegna dell’economia circolare, grazie ai nostri partner, alcuni dei quali dotati di stabilimenti produttivi integrati con una segheria: una scelta che permette l’utilizzo di tutto il legno e garantisce ai clienti la tutela della continuità delle forniture nel tempo.

Name: Lamel Legno
Description:
LAMINATED WOOD SINCE 1990
With a history rooted in tradition and an eye towards innovation, Lamel Legno is positioned among the leading companies in the woodworking sector.
Lamel Legno’s strategy is based on technology and efficiency: cutting-edge and highly specialized production lines, equipped with computerized and automatic quality control systems, which allow the creation of reliable products of high quality standards.
Lamel Legno carefully selects each supplier and purchases exclusively superior quality raw materials: wood of various essences, coming from certified forests and not subject to illegal cutting in compliance with European regulations, processed with the most advanced cutting, drying and gluing technologies. Lamel Legno aims high. And it flies towards the 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. We have begun a path of environmental sustainability, which brings value to the planet and people, we embrace global initiatives that reflect our dedication to safeguarding the environment. 

LEGNO LAMELLARE DAL 1990
Lamel Legno, con una storia radicata nella tradizione e uno sguardo sempre rivolto all’innovazione, si posiziona tra le aziende leader nel settore della lavorazione del legno.
La strategia di Lamel Legno è basata su tecnologia ed efficienza: linee produttive all’avanguardia e altamente specializzate, dotate di sistemi di controllo della qualità informatizzati e automatici, che permettono la realizzazione di prodotti affidabili e di elevato standard qualitativo. LL seleziona con accuratezza ogni fornitore ed acquista esclusivamente materie prime di qualità superiore: legnami di varie essenze, provenienti da foreste certificate e non soggette a taglio illegale in conformità ai regolamenti europei, lavorati con le più avanzate tecnologie di taglio, essicazione ed incollaggio.
Lamel Legno punta alto. E vola verso gli Obiettivi per lo Sviluppo Sostenibile 2030. Abbiamo iniziato un percorso di sostenibilità ambientale, che porti valore al pianeta.

Name: WoodMall
Description: Wywodzimy się z różnych środowisk, są wśród nas leśnicy, programiści, informatycy, doradcy biznesowi i prawni, a także przedsiębiorcy. Przede wszystkim jednak jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów, których łączy jeden cel – aktywizacja polskiego rynku właścicieli i zarządzających lasami. Stworzyliśmy platformę służącą do wymiany poglądów ponad podziałami politycznymi, regionalnymi czy środowiskowymi, miejsce, w którym spotykać się może branża drzewna oraz indywidualni odbiorcy z właścicielami tego dobra narodowego, jakim są polskie lasy. Naszą ambicją jest zapewnienie bezpiecznego i przyjaznego użytkownikom miejsca sprzedaży surowca drzewnego - portalu aukcyjnego dla wszystkich. Sami, będąc właścicielami lasów, wiemy, jak wiele wysiłku trzeba włożyć w trwale zrównoważoną gospodarkę leśną, pamiętając o nadrzędnym celu – pozostawieniu tego naturalnego bogactwa kolejnym pokoleniom przynajmniej w takim samym, a docelowo lepszym stanie. Kluczową rolę w Woodmall odgrywa Polski Związek Zrzeszeń Leśnych, który łączy prawdziwych pasjonatów, ludzi działających pro bono i realizujących w sektorze drzewnym jedno z najtrudniejszych i jednocześnie bardzo niedocenianych zadań – konsolidację prywatnych właścicieli lasów, podniesienie ich świadomości ekologicznej, a także wiedzy na temat zrównoważonej gospodarki leśnej.

PRESENTACION

Calidad es buen gusto porque la estética no está reñida con la funcionalidad. En Servifuster lo sabemos… Y lo hacemos.

EXPERIENCIA
Servifuster cuenta con más de dos décadas de experiencia y una treintena de profesionales para realizar todo tipo de proyectos. De la mano de Conrado Gómez han sido mucho los trabajos realizados que avalan su trayectoria.

CERTIFICACIONES
Servifuster está acreditada con los estándares FSC y PEFC en responsabilidad forestal. Con esto aseguramos que nuestros materiales son adquiridos de bosques sostenibles y tratados con una trazabilidad segura.

Name: RobinWood
Description:
RobinWood a pour mission de récupérer les arbres-déchets (utilisés uniquement pour leur valeur énergétique), et les valoriser en bois d'œuvre pour la construction et les aménagements extérieurs.
Pourquoi faire ? 
Parce transformer ces arbres-déchets en planches permet de
¤ Stocker du CO2 sur un temps très long 
¤ Diminuer la pression de récolte sur les écosystèmes forestiers
¤ garantir un travail en circuit court, et non-délocalisable

Pour ce faire, RobinWood a développé la première filière de robinier 100% belge pour les aménagements extérieurs.
Mais aussi le panneau ReTreeve, le premier panneau massif lamellé-collé d'origine circulaire pour les aménagements intérieurs.

Travailler avec les produits de RobinWood, c'est donc la garantie d'un impact positif sur notre planète et les personnes qui y vivent !

Name: Grupo Profor
Description:
GRUPO PROFOR comenzó operaciones en 1978, enfocándose en el sector forestal. Con el paso del tiempo, consolidó su presencia en el mercado gracias a las alianzas estratégicas de cada industria.

Hoy somos una empresa especializada en soluciones de embalaje y derivados forestales, con una sólida trayectoria de más de 40 años. Contamos con plantas de producción ubicadas estratégicamente en el noreste del país.

Name: Ntavas SA
Description:
Η εταιρία Χ. Ντάβας Α.Β.Ε.Ε, από το 1948, δραστηριοποιείται στον κλάδο του εμπορίου προϊόντων ξύλου και την μερική επεξεργασία αυτών. Επιπρόσθετα δραστηριοποιείται και στο εμπόριο υλικών επιπλοποιίας, με πλήθος κωδικών, ώστε να ικανοποιηθεί και ο πιο απαιτητικός πελάτης.
Η εταιρία βρίσκεται στο 5χλμ. Λαρίσης – Καρδίτσης και στη Θέση Γκορυτσά στον Ασπρόπυργο Αττικής σε ιδιόκτητες εγκαταστάσεις. Στη σημερινή της μορφή η εταιρία ασχολείται με ό,τι αφορά το ξύλο και τα παράγωγά του, με έμφαση στις επιφάνειες και στην μερική επεξεργασία αυτών, ενώ απευθύνεται κατά βάση σε επαγγελματίες και βιοτεχνίες του κλάδου.

Name: Glenn Rieder
Description: Whether it’s traditional architectural woodworking or an elaborately themed environment, Glenn Rieder combines craftsmanship with process discipline to meet the most challenging expectations, deadlines, and budgets. Our comprehensive capabilities can be seamlessly combined or complement your project as needed.

Name: Altona Wood
Description:
Altona Wood es una industria que trabaja en conexión con la naturaleza. 

Nuestros procesos de fabricación cuentan con alta tecnología para el procesamiento de la madera, que impulsa actividades de logística para el traslado y transporte de productos de diferentes sectores de la industria, tanto en Paraguay como en el resto del mundo.

Producimos madera para pallets a partir de fuentes 100% renovables, de bosques plantados que fomentan la preservación de áreas nativas.

Nuestra industria tiene un impacto económico en nuestra región, generando muchos empleos directos y moviendo la economía a través de actividades indirectas.

Estamos orgullosos de ser una empresa paraguaya que trabaja a favor de las industrias con respeto y cuidado con el medio ambiente.

Name: POZZI ALBINO SRL
Description:
- Garanzia della qualità dei nostri legni. Nel nostro processo produttivo la materia prima utilizzata è rappresentata unicamente da legno proveniente da aree a riforestazione controllata, sotto la tutela di leggi e organizzazioni locali e internazionali.
- Dalla materia prima al prodotto finito. L'azienda vanta la rara caratteristica di avere un processo di lavorazione completo. Pozzi Albino srl tratta e lavora con cura il legno, dal tronco fino al complemento d'arredo, passando dalle strutture di case e edifici con Haus&Bio, dai tetti, fino agli interni con Antico di Lombardia.
- Recupero dell'antico e assaporarlo nei nostri prodotti, grazie ad una curata e continua ricerca.
- Custodire le tradizioni
- Ricerca e Sperimentazione costante attraverso una stretta collaborazione tra i nostri esperti e architetti - designer.
- Recupero degli scarti della lavorazione. i residui della lavorazione, opportunamente triturati vengono riutilizzati al fine del funzionamento di caldaie a biomasse della società stessa e, per la parte in esubero, ceduti a terzi per il medesimo scopo in un'ottica di efficacia ed efficienza aziendale e rispetto dell'ambiente.
- Rispetto e cura dell'ambiente I nostri impianti produttivi vengono controllati e monitorati annualmente ai fini del rispetto dei limiti delle emissioni in atmosfera a norma. L'azienda vanta certificazioni inerenti alla catena della custodia (CoC: Chian of Custody), che contraddistinguono quelle aziende che forniscono ai propri clienti una garanzia credibile che il legname utilizzato derivi effettivamente da una foresta ben gestita e non sia frutto di alcuna devastazione ambientale. Tutto ciò al fine di evidenziare e tutelare i valori sociali ed ambientali nella nostra catena del valore, partendo dal bosco certificato con criteri ecosostenibili, fino al consumatore finale, che può così apprezzare la scelta effettuata dal produttore e sentirsi protagonista nella tutela della corretta gestione dei boschi.

Name: Van der Plaat Meubel & Interieur
Description: Van der Plaat is een echt familiebedrijf waar door de generaties heen kennis en ervaring zijn opgebouwd en samengevoegd. De werkplaats in de schuur waar het ruim 80 jaar geleden begon is inmiddels getransformeerd tot een uitgebreide machinefabriek. In onze meubelfabriek beschikken wij over innovatieve machines, professionele gereedschappen en gedreven en vakkundig personeel. Van daaruit leveren wij al jaren kwalitatief hoogwaardige producten en zodoende is Van der Plaat uitgegroeid tot een begrip in de regio en ver daarbuiten. Dat maakt ons echter niet minder persoonlijk. Ons bedrijf ademt nog steeds een informele sfeer waar u welkom bent voor een kop koffie. We bespreken graag uw ideeën en/of ontwerpen met u of brainstormen over de realisatie van uw project.

Name: Groupe Gallien
Description:
Group Gallien is a French family business, founded by Jean GALLIEN in 1969, with several subsidiaries in various wood-related trades.

From forest harvesting to wood impregnation, Group Gallien has diversified into different wood activities: sawmills, wooden pallet manufacturing, construction timber, wooden poles for electrical and telecommunication use, agricultural wooden stakes, logs, lumber, wood-metal safety barriers, and outdoor equipments…

Group Gallien is also a shareholder in BCA (Bois Collé d’Auvergne). All production sites are located in France, near forested areas, mainly in the heart of the Massif Central.

Name: Great British Woodfuel
Description:
Great British Woodfuel is a family-run business based near Oswestry in Shropshire, dedicated to providing sustainable and eco-friendly heating solutions. We specialise in premium-quality wood briquettes crafted from 100% British-grown, fully traceable wood. 

Our mission is to deliver warmth you can trust while supporting sustainability and reducing environmental impact. Whether you’re heating your home or fueling your stove, our products combine convenience, efficiency, and eco-consciousness to meet your needs.

Join us in embracing a greener future with Great British Woodfuel, your trusted partner for sustainable heating solutions.

Timbeco – Hållbart byggande i trä.

 Starkt fokus på Skandinavien – lång erfarenhet av projekt i Sverige, Norge och Danmark.

 Brett erbjudande – elementhus, modulbyggnader och kundanpassade arkitekturlösningar.

 Hållbarhet i fokus – miljövänliga material, energieffektiva lösningar och cirkulärt tänkande.

 Helhetslösningar – från projektering och design till produktion, leverans och montage.

Vår mission är att göra moderna och hållbara trähus tillgängliga i hela Sverige, med fokus på pålitlig kvalitet, kostnadseffektivitet och innovativ design.

Name: JSC Fenestrum
Description:
We are Fenestrum. Our factory is based in Lithuania and we specialise in finest quality timber windows and doors manufacturing for both European and unique United Kingdom markets. We have already gained 30 years of experience in bespoke handmade wooden production for the private and public spaces and created valuable exacting craftsmanship traditions. We are big enough to handle challenging projects professionally and small enough to deeply care about every client. 

At first glance, the window is only a glazed rectangular shape and it seems that all manufacturers have the same shape. But the differences become clearer over the years. Then it is seen whether high-quality wood has been used, reliable fittings have been put together, or good painting materials have been used. Windows made by two manufacturers may look the same on the first day, but after five years, built next to it, it can vary greatly. When making windows, we use only the best materials on the market, but even the best materials are available to everyone. What is inaccessible to everyone and what distinguishes us is the attitude to the product we produce, the desire to make it so that its durability is difficult to surpass in the market, and the only human resonance about us would be a good recommendation.

Name: Crosswood
Description:
Crosswood: Pioneering Hardwood Cross Laminated Timber (HCLT) Manufacturing in Virginia

Welcome to Crosswood, positioned to become a leading Cross Laminated Timber (CLT) manufacturer strategically situated in the heart of the Appalachian hardwood region. We pride ourselves on being at the forefront of the hardwood mass timber industry, poised to meet market demands across the Northeast region. Notably, Crosswood stands as the first CLT manufacturer in Virginia and the inaugural producer of hardwood CLT in North America.

At Crosswood, we offer an extensive range of CLT building products. In addition to these, we bring innovation to the market with our off-site built modular structures crafted from hardwood cross laminated timber. Distinguished by their uniqueness, functionality, and rapid deployability, our structures can be conveniently shipped via ground or air. This flexibility allows us to undertake projects virtually anywhere a supporting pad is available.

Whether catering to civilian, government, or military clients, Crosswood is equipped to build customized structures that meet specific requirements. Our commitment to forestry management and sustainability is unwavering, as we actively collaborate with partners in the hardwood industry and the Department of Forestry. This collaboration ensures the continued success and future sustainability of mass timber.

Crosswood is excited about the prospect of meeting customer demands and contributing to the expansion of the mass timber market through our state-of-the-art HCLT manufacturing facility. Join us in building better, building stronger, and building with Crosswood.

Name: D.M.P.S BV
Description:
DMPS was created from the need to quickly deliver custom work in the
 warehouse world. We specialize in 38 mm chipboard, which can be used in
 many ways. For example, for floor and wall panels.
 As an international player, we distinguish ourselves through our personal
 and fast service, specialist knowledge, customization, flexibility and
 reliability.
 When you enter the production area of  DMPS, there is a lot of activity. With
 the help of our CNC-controlled machines, the plates are made to measure
 and processed according to the wishes of the customers.
 Sustainability and corporate social responsibility (CSR) are our top
 priorities. With our FSC and PEFC certifications, we contribute to the
 conservation of forests and responsible forest management worldwide. The
 wood we use comes from sustainable and certified sources.
Small built-up wood fibres, combined with glue, make the whole into a
 chipboard.  
Our chipboards are a flexible, durable and functional solution for various
 construction applications. They combine high performance with functionality
 and design. 
Chipboard, the most widely used wood product, is known for its versatility and
 wide range of applications. 
We supply an extensive range of high-quality floor panels that excel in
 strength, ease of use and durability. 
Thanks to the quick and easy installation you save considerably on time and
 labor costs. 
We guarantee the most efficient possible working method with the least
 possible waste.
 Floor panels are surprisingly strong. Our product has been used with great
 success in the warehouse world for 30 years. 
If you would like more information, please contact us verkoop@dmps.nl

Name: Rustyk Design
Description:
Our Business
Rustyk Design is a small, family-owned and operated custom carpentry/millwork, residential, and commercial design services business located in Calgary, Alberta Canada. We also produce handcrafted home décor, accessories and furniture with special attention to a Western rustic-aesthetic. You can visit our showroom located at 4014 4 STREET SE–overlooking downtown YYC! We pride ourselves on the quality of our craftsmanship, uniqueness, commitment to sustainability, and locally-produced products and projects. Our philosophy relies heavily on a solution to all design challenges alongside a deep respect and responsibility to the environment.

Our Process
If you appreciate the warmth of natural wood, the gnarly yet beautiful patterns in burl, or the textured charm of reclaimed lumber, then you will love what we have to offer! The wood we begin with is just as important to us as the artistry and detail of the final product. This is why we try to obtain from suppliers that conform to responsible wood sourcing protocols such as using; local when possible, highly-renewable species, reclaimed from previous products or builds, dying specimens, by-products, etc. For more information on our self-implemented sustainability commitment, please visit our website.

Our main services include high-quality panel sizing, edge banding (straight/round edging), CNC wood routing services, laser engraving, and veneer hot pressing. Over and above, our bundle of services includes interior design consultation, architectural drawings, schematics, shop drawings and blueprints.
With our newly installed technology, we are well equipped for meeting the needs of individuals/parties wishing to manufacture a series of a specific furniture range (using panels) such as kitchens, bedrooms, cabinets, TV support units...etc
At present, we are in the process of inaugurating a modern and straightforward furniture showroom where customers could either collect a duplicate of the displayed showroom items or plan a customized design that would fit their individual needs and different tastes. With the assistance of our interior designer, customers would be able to select their most efficient preferences in terms of quality, design and expenses. 
In addition to our interior design department that delivers numerous services, we have recently incorporated a new department that is in charge of furnishing large projects from A to Z.  This task includes installing a variety of wood units and items including doors, kitchens, bedrooms, and others. 
Through our relatively large teams of expert staff and recently developed transportation capabilities, we are keen to deliver our products inside and outside Lebanon at reasonable prices. After submitting an online or a phone request, customer orders would be finalized and delivered within three working days. Name: Kunz Martin Schreinerei
Description:
Im Jahr 1992 träumte ich, noch in der Lehre, von der eigenen Schreinerei.
Sieben Jahre später wagte ich den Schritt in die Selbstständigkeit und war bald voll ausgelastet. 

Unsere Werbung ist unsere Arbeit. Perfekte Arbeiten von der Beratung bis zur Umsetzung zu fairen Preisen.
Wir gehören zu den wenigen Schreinereien, die sich darauf spezialisiert haben sich nicht zu spezialisieren. Dies ermöglicht uns, beinahe jeden Kundenwunsch zu erfüllen. 
Bei Grossprojekten arbeiten wir bei Bedarf mit einem Netzwerk von Fachleuten zusammen. Unsere Kunden profitieren in diesem Fall von einem Ansprechpartner, der alles für sie organisiert und koordiniert. 

Für Fragen, Beratungsgespräche und Offerten stehen wir Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung. 

Wir erfüllen Kundenwünsche. Herzlich willkommen.

Name: OWI GmbH
Description:
Formteile, die bewegen - seit 1927. 

Die OWI GmbH ist ein mittelständisches Familienunternehmen mit Produktionsstandorten in Deutschland und Ungarn. Seit fast 100 Jahren entwickeln und fertigen wir maßgeschneiderte Formteile aus Holz und Kunststoff. 
Unsere Sitzschalen, Stadionsitze, Lautsprechergehäuse, Spritzgießteile und technische Komponenten kommen weltweit zum Einsatz und sind oft unsichtbare, aber entscheidende Bausteine für Komfort, Funktionalität und Design. 

Ein Großteil unserer Produkte entstehen exakt nach Kundenvorgabe. Gleichzeitig verfügen wir über einen umfangreichen Bestand an eigenen Werkzeugen für unterschiedliche Formteil-Lösungen, die ideal für Projektstarts und Serienfertigungen dienen. Auf Wunsch übernehmen wir auch Montage, Logistik und weitere Services. 

Mit innovativen Entwicklungen wie OWI-FireProtect (schwer entflammbare Holzformteile), dem neuartigen, ausgezeichneten Holzfaserwerkstoff OWI-FiberFlex oder der funktional integrierten OWI-Bodychair-Mechanik schaffen wir Lösungen für die Anforderungen von morgen. 

Bei OWI wird jedes Formteil zur individuellen Lösung.

Name: Gloya Indonesia
Description:

The gallery which was founded in June 2016 is a house of brands for product brands made by Kriya Nusantara such as Cawang Art Radio and Krisan Music Box and others product brands.

Using teak veneer or more familiar called Medium Density Fibre (MDF) which has more strength than other woods. That’s why the quality of the products sold at Gloya is in superior quality and guaranteed to last for years.

Most of the designs for the products at Gloya have traditional cultural themes, such as  Java, Sumatera, Sulawesi, Kalimantan and other Indonesian cultural ornaments.

By carrying out typical archipelago ornaments, Gloya by Kriya Nusantara combine it with a modern design.

Authenticity made of Indonesia

Name: Menuiserie Duperray
Description:
Des intérieurs conçus pour vous, et répondant à vos souhaits. Votre satisfaction reste notre priorité.

L’entreprise est constituée d’une équipe dynamique, nos 2 ébénistes de métier, un apprenti ébéniste qui nous rejoint en septembre, ainsi que notre responsable administrative et financière.

Nous réalisons vos Agencements sur mesure.
Vous nous confiez  votre projet ou votre rêve, nous nous déplaçons chez vous, et nous chargeons des prises de côtes. Nous travaillons ensemble à adapter le dessin aux contraintes techniques et financières. Une fois les matériaux et l’implantation définis, nous vous proposons un devis avec les plans correspondants. Nous fabriquons et installons votre nouvel intérieur. 

Le but : créer des meubles qui vous simplifient la vie et répondent à vos besoins tout en apportant une touche unique à votre intérieur.

N’hésitez pas à nous contacter afin de partager votre envie et nous rencontrer, nous vous établirons un devis dans les meilleurs délais.

Name: Ply Van Racking
Description:
At Ply Van Racking, we specialise in custom plywood racking, false floors, and ply lining, helping businesses maximise space and organisation in their work vehicles. Since launching in 2019, we've grown from a passion for carpentry into a trusted name for van storage solutions, serving clients across the UK—including fleet operators.

Based in the West Midlands, we design and fit bespoke racking systems that enhance productivity, improve accessibility, and create a more efficient workspace. We work closely with each client to develop tailored solutions that transform their van into a fully optimised business asset.

With over a decade of experience, our team is committed to quality craftsmanship and precision fitting, ensuring every van meets the highest standards. We take pride in delivering practical, durable solutions that not only work seamlessly but also give our clients confidence in their setup.

If you're looking to enhance your van's storage and functionality, get in touch!

Name: Pfleiderer Polska

Pfleiderer Group jest wiodącym producentem płyt drewnopochodnych w Europie z roczną sprzedażą na poziomie około 700 milionów euro i zatrudniającym około 2000 pracowników. Siedziba firmy znajduje się w Neumarkt in der Oberpfalz (Niemcy). Pfleiderer posiada pięć zakładów produkcyjnych w Niemczech i jeden w Polsce oraz oddziały handlowe w Anglii, Holandii, Szwajcarii, Rumunii i Francji. Pfleiderer oferuje pełną gamę produktów i usług, koncentrując się na produkcji mebli, handlu drewnem, wyposażeniu wnętrz i budownictwie drewnianym, a także łączy gamę produktów Duropal i Thermopal pod marką parasolową Pfleiderer i jest partnerem przemysłu, handlu, instalatorów, projektantów i architektów.

We believe in using technology to help drive our success in the market. Our goal is to lead the industry in a sustainable zero carbon footprint future.

Name: VanLab
Description:
VanLab USA provides flatback camper-van conversion kit sets, offering the ultimate camper-van experience to the mass market. Our flatpack kits are designed by world-class engineers utilizing the latest technology. We take inspiration from premium consumer products across a wide range of industry sectors. We use a scalable and automated manufacturing process to create affordable, practical, and beautiful solutions. Our flatpack kits are shipped nationwide using our unique ‘up-cyclable’ packing solutions manufactured from natural materials.

Focusing on the mass premium market with ‘Affordable Luxury’, scalability, and sustainability at our core, we provide a kit set option with the style of a boutique hotel. Our kit is assembled with only two tools and no prerequisite skills, manufactured from sustainably farmed materials, and delivered with innovative plastic-free and up-cyclable packaging.

Growth and scalability are at the heart of VanLab’s process, utilizing 3D scanning, computer-aided design, and automated manufacturing. Taking inspiration from the automotive production line, we design our kits following Poka-Yoke (meaning mistake-proof) principles; think square peg AND a square hole. Each panel is pre-labeled, pre-drilled, and pre-shaped to only fit in the correct location. 

Our expert in-house design team crafts precise engineering drawings of every detail, before exporting files for contract manufacturing. The automated CNC manufacturing process is fast, efficient, and highly repeatable; cutting perfect kitsets every time. Once programmed, a kit is produced on one machine in just 4 hours. With a nationwide network of CNC manufacturers, this methodology provides a pathway for rapid growth.

Name: SGB MOULURES
Description:
Depuis de nombreuses années, SGB est le partenaire privilégié des métiers susceptibles d’utiliser du bois. Tous ces acteurs du marché du bâtiment nous font confiance pour effectuer, le rabotage, le brossage, les traitements dont en particulier le thermo-chauffé, ainsi que leurs finitions à destination du marché de la rénovation et du neuf. Nos bardages, nos lames de terrasse, nos profilés bois sont autant de projets sur lesquels nous accompagnons nos différents interlocuteurs. Nous sommes implantés dans les Vosges mais aussi sur Paris, nous permettant ainsi une logistique performante.

Nos valeurs :

Notre savoir-faire est consacré à la mise en avant de produits issus de forêts gérées cela avec des bois de pays et durable, notre ADN. Au croisement de l'usinage, du traitement par haute température, SGB crée et distribue une gamme complète pour l'enveloppe du bâtiment permettant à chacun de réaliser des aménagements aussi bien pour l'extérieur que pour l'intérieur en bois durable. Nos traits de caractère lui donnent les capacités de réussir dans ces missions.

L'implication constante de toutes nos équipes pour un environnement éco-certifié, donne à notre entreprise la possibilité de vous proposer des produits issus de forêts éco-responsable et ainsi de répondre à vos attentes, de trouver les meilleures alternatives sur les traitements, les finitions, les essences et profils, pour que vous puissiez réaliser vos enveloppes de bâtiment et ambiance intérieure.

Description: Stratosync Digital is a cloud-based data synchronization and collaboration platform designed to seamlessly connect users, teams, and devices across different environments. Whether it's sharing large files, syncing documents in real-time, or ensuring secure backups, Stratosync empowers organizations with high-speed, reliable, and scalable data exchange solutions. With a focus on privacy, end-to-end encryption, and cross-platform compatibility, Stratosync is ideal for businesses looking to streamline workflows, enhance productivity, and maintain full control over their digital assets.

Name: Husky Plywood
Description:
Husky Plywood manufactures hardwood veneered panels for professional production.

We laminate veneer on MDF, particleboard, and calibrated plywood platforms, using white oak, maple, birch, walnut, cherry, red oak, and other hardwood species. Our panels are used by OEM manufacturers, cabinetmakers, distributors, and architectural projects.

Veneer is a natural material, and variation is part of its character. Through controlled veneer selection and clear communication, we help customers manage that variation and produce with confidence.

Founded in the 1940s, Husky Plywood contributed to the manufacturing of mosquito bombers during the war years. That legacy of precision continues to guide our work today.

Strong distribution presence across North America, with shipping available worldwide.

⸻

Husky Plywood fabrique des panneaux plaqués bois franc pour la production professionnelle.

Nous laminons le placage sur MDF, panneaux de particules et contreplaqué calibré, en chêne blanc, érable, bouleau, noyer, cerisier, chêne rouge et autres essences. Nos panneaux sont utilisés par des fabricants OEM, des ébénistes, des distributeurs et des projets architecturaux.

Le placage est un matériau naturel et la variation en fait partie. Grâce à une sélection de placage contrôlée et une communication claire, nous aidons nos clients à produire en toute confiance.

Fondée dans les années 1940, Husky Plywood a contribué à la fabrication de bombardiers anti-moustiques durant les années de guerre.

Forte présence en distribution en Amérique du Nord, avec expédition partout dans le monde.

Name: Fomco Wood
Description:
Fabrica noastră este specializată în proiectarea și producția de  mobilă personalizată, în producția de tâmplărie din lemn stratificat oferind o gamă largă de servicii pentru tâmplari.

La fabrica noastră, suntem mândri să oferim soluții personalizate pentru orice nevoi. Indiferent dacă doriți mobilă pentru locuința dumneavoastră sau pentru afacerea dumneavoastră, putem crea piese unicat, adaptate exact specificațiilor și preferințelor dumneavoastră.

Dorim să vă oferim mobilă de cea mai înaltă calitate, realizată manual de către meșteri pricepuți și cu o vastă experiență în industrie. Utilizăm lemn stratificat de cea mai bună calitate, asigurând astfel rezistență, durabilitate și o estetică deosebită.

Pe lângă producția de mobilă personalizată, oferim și o gamă largă de servicii pentru tâmplari. Lucrăm în strânsă colaborare cu profesioniști din domeniul tâmplăriei pentru a oferi materiale și feronerii de cea mai bună calitate. De asemenea, putem oferi consultanță tehnică și suport specializat pentru a vă ajuta să realizați proiectele dumneavoastră cu succes.

Name: Bazlamit For Frames
Description:
Founded in 1987, our wooden frame manufacturing company is dedicated to crafting exquisite Italian-style frames that exude luxury. Meticulously handcrafted, our frames are a symbol of timeless elegance and superior craftsmanship.

Using only the finest quality wood materials, each frame is carefully designed and manufactured to showcase exceptional aesthetics and durability. Our skilled artisans pay meticulous attention to detail, ensuring every curve, carving, and finish is executed with precision.

Our luxury frames boast intricate embellishments and ornate designs, drawing inspiration from the opulence and grace of Italian art and architecture. From intricately carved patterns to delicate motifs, our frames are a testament to the richness of Italian design heritage.

We offer a wide range of frame sizes and styles, catering to various preferences and decor themes. Whether you seek a grand, ornate frame for a statement piece or a sleek, understated frame for a modern setting, we have the perfect option for you.

In addition to their exquisite aesthetics, our frames are built to last. Our commitment to using high-quality materials and employing traditional woodworking techniques guarantees longevity, ensuring your cherished artwork or photographs will remain enshrined in a beautiful and sturdy frame for years to come.

Investing in our luxury frames means investing in a piece of art itself. Enhancing any space with its elegant presence, our frames not only preserve and protect your treasured memories but also elevate the overall ambiance and sophistication of your interior.

Embrace the essence of Italian luxury and craftsmanship with our wooden frames. Immerse yourself in the artful blend of tradition and innovation, knowing that each frame is a testament to our unwavering dedication to excellence.

Name: Josef Speckner GmbH
Description:
Aus einer Fassbinderei heraus entstanden, widmen wir uns bei der Josef Speckner GmbH nun schon seit über einem halben Jahrhundert der Produktion von Paletten und Kisten. Unsere stetigen Innovationen im Produktionsbereich, ein tief verankertes Qualitätsbewusstsein und unser Augenmerk auf individuelle Kundenbetreuung haben unser kontinuierliches Wachstum angetrieben. Unser 30-köpfiges Team bildet das Herzstück unseres Unternehmens. Das Engagement, der Einsatz und das Fachwissen unserer MitarbeiterInnen sind das Fundament unseres Erfolgs. Durch unser engagiertes Team und unsere qualitätsbewussten Produktionsprozesse haben wir langjährige Partnerschaften aufgebaut. Für uns stehen Nachhaltigkeit und die Zufriedenheit aller Beteiligten nicht nur im Kundenumfeld, sondern auch in gesellschaftlichen Belangen im Vordergrund. Daher sind wir stolz darauf, seit Jahren nach IS09001 zertifiziert zu sein. Im Rahmen dieses Standards unterziehen wir uns jährlich einer Nachhaltigkeitsbewertung. Dies gewährleistet, dass Kundenzufriedenheit und gesellschaftliche Verantwortung auch in Zukunft bei uns an erster Stelle stehen.

Um unseren Kunden die gewünschten Produkte und Dienstleistungen anbieten zu können, sind es vor allem die Menschen hinter den Kulissen, die den Unterschied machen. Unsere MitarbeiterInnen prägen nicht nur die aktuelle Entwicklung unseres Unternehmens, sondern haben auch maßgeblich zu unserem bisherigen Erfolg beigetragen.

We are Timotej and Andraž young craftsmen, and our love for local crafts and natural materials guides us in our work with wood. 
Our passion for crafts and woodworking is in our blood, as we are the 4th generation of entrepreneurs in our family. Our great-great-grandfather was already a renowned master carpenter, as evidenced by the certificate from Vienna. Our grandfather was also a successful craftsman and his entrepreneurial spirit was inherited by our mother, who runs a successful accountancy service. 
In 2021, we each got our product certified as a local group brand "Tastes of Rogla". With respect and care for nature, through the process of woodworking, different products are thus created:
-	unique pieces of solid wood furniture (beds, tables, chairs, etc.),
-	handicraft products (cutting boards, footstools), 
-	gift programme (stands, boxes, coasters).
Despite our young age, we are actively networking and partnering with designers, architects, caterers, farms, cutlery makers, and other local suppliers of Slovenian products.
We demonstrate ethical and sustainable practices not only by using materials from local forests but also by using wood in combination with other natural materials (e.g. wood + stone from Pohorje). It is also of very important that we use almost all materials in the processing or production process, even those that most people consider as waste. The sustainability aspect of production is one of the main aspects of our work.
And most importantly: all pieces of furniture are toxin-free, and treated with environmentally friendly coatings and oils so that the basic texture and color of each species of wood are preserved.
Burlak Brothers products boast a timeless, minimalist yet modern look, with a touch of tradition and respect for the preservation of nature.

HappyBeez has the unique concept that the wooden elements with nesting corridors are interchangeable and that distinguishes us from other suppliers. What few know, and even fewer tell you, is that after 3 to 4 years a bee-hotel is generally full and since the bees do not clean their rooms, new rooms have to be created otherwise they will no longer have a place to nest and our help was futile. 
HappyBeez therefore supplies interchangeable wooden elements so that you can replace a full element with an empty element. The full elements can then be discarded in the garden or a forest in the shade, where nature takes over.

All products are made without harmful substances and use wood from managed forests in the EU

Name: Heartwood And Steel LLC
Description:
I  am a woodworker in Tallahassee Florida specializing in projects composed  of or incorporating  urban lumber. Urban lumber is wood from tree in urban landscapes not planted, and generally not harvested for their value as lumber. 

I take trees from urban landscapes and turn them into beautiful and useful objects while keeping those trees out of the local waste stream.  This is especially important when you realize that half the dry weight of wood is  carbon captured from the air.

Wood furniture isn't just  beautiful. It helps  sequester one of the key greenhouse  gasses contributing to global warming. So, whether you are in the market to buy custom wood furniture or if you have a tree removed that  needs to be removed from your property,  consider Heartwood and Steel for your project.

Description:
Welcome to ORCA DOORS, your ultimate destination for a comprehensive range of high-quality doors and handrails designed to enhance the beauty, security, and functionality of your spaces. At ORCA DOORS, we specialize in manufacturing and selling a wide variety of doors, including internal and external PVC wood-WPC doors, wooden security doors, iron security doors, and emergency doors. Our dedication to innovation and commitment to excellence have made us a trusted name in the industry.

Our doors are a testament to our relentless pursuit of design perfection and quality craftsmanship. We take pride in offering:
Our collection boasts a stunning array of novel designs that combine the warmth of natural wood with the advantages of soundproof and heatproof materials.
Each door is meticulously crafted and coated with a thick layer of high-quality polycarbonate chloride compound, ensuring longevity and visual appeal.
Our doors are engineered to withstand the harshest weather conditions, offering resilience and durability.
The sound insulation ratio of our doors is exceptionally high, guaranteeing a peaceful and quiet living environment.
At ORCA DOORS, we combine innovation, aesthetics, and security to create a product line that reflects our dedication to delivering excellence to our customers. Whether you are seeking to enhance your home, office, or commercial property, we have the perfect door and handrail solutions for you. Your safety, satisfaction, and style are our top priorities. Welcome to a world of superior craftsmanship and timeless elegance at ORCA DOORS.

Led by professionals with deep-rooted passion and extensive experience, we manufacture high-performance timber products, including decking, scantlings, and glue-laminated beams, designed for demanding applications. Name: Kaspersma Uitvaartkistenfabriek B.V.
Description:
Kaspersma uitvaartkistenfabriek is een familiebedrijf dat opgericht is in 1840, en dat zich in de loop der tijd heeft ontwikkeld tot een hoogwaardige en betrouwbare leverancier van uitvaartkisten en bijbehorende dienstverlening. Wij zijn een volledig onafhankelijk productiebedrijf. Door continue bedrijfsprocessen te optimaliseren zijn wij in staat om een kwalitatief goed product te produceren. Hierbij maken wij gebruik van de laatste technieken met betrekking tot cnc (computer bestuurd) produceren, samen met ons vakmanschap leidt dit tot een gunstige prijs/kwaliteitsverhouding.

De combinatie van moderne productiefaciliteiten en het voorradig houden van al onze producten maakt ons bedrijf een ideale partner voor uw uitvaartonderneming.

Name: ET Nordic
Description:
ET Nordic is a company specializing in premium engineered wood solutions for architectural, interior, and exterior applications. With offices in Finland, Dubai, and Egypt, we serve clients worldwide who value Scandinavian design, sustainable materials, and exceptional craftsmanship.

Our product range includes veneered panels, decking, wall cladding, acoustic panels, and custom wood finishes — combining natural beauty with cutting-edge engineering and durability.

At ET Nordic, we bring together Nordic quality, sustainable sourcing, and modern design to transform residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces.

From concept to completion, our team supports architects, designers, and builders with innovative wood solutions that elevate every environment.

ET Nordic — Where Nordic forests meet luxury design.

KES's product portfolio is diverse, offering customers many choices from industrial MDF boards, melamine-coated MDF boards, laminate flooring to other supporting products. KES owns 6 industrial wood production factories with a total area of up to 1,200,000 m2 and a world-class machinery system with a total investment of up to $500 million.

Name: OC Architectural Woodwork
Description:
65+ Years of Craftsmanship & Design

For over six decades, our family business has been transforming houses into dream homes. We specialize in high-quality home remodeling and design—combining timeless craftsmanship with modern innovation.

From kitchen renovations to full-scale remodels, we bring expertise, integrity, and a personal touch to every project.

Your home is more than a space. It’s where life happens. Let’s make it extraordinary.

Name: Carvine Doors And Wood Working
Description:
Wood is a versatile and timeless material that has been used for centuries in the construction of doors, furniture, and interior design. Woodworking is the craft of shaping and joining wood into functional and beautiful objects, and it has been an important part of human culture since ancient times.

Doors made from wood are a popular choice in both residential and commercial settings because of their durability, natural beauty, and ability to be customized to suit any design aesthetic. Whether it's a sleek, modern door or a traditional, ornate one, wood offers a wide range of options for creating a unique and welcoming entrance to any space.

In furniture design, wood is often the material of choice for creating sturdy and stylish pieces that can withstand the test of time. From hand-carved wooden chairs to intricately designed bed frames, wood furniture can add warmth and character to any room.

Interior designers often incorporate wood into their designs to create a sense of warmth, texture, and natural beauty. Wood paneling, hardwood floors, and wooden beams can all add depth and character to a space and can be used to create a cozy, inviting atmosphere.

Overall, wood is an essential element in the world of design and construction, and its versatility and beauty make it a popular choice for creating functional and aesthetically pleasing objects and spaces.

Barakah Wood Crafts is where timeless craftsmanship meets modern design.

From custom furniture and décor to personalized gifts and artisanal pieces, our work reflects passion, precision, and a deep respect for the art of woodworking. At Barakah, we believe that every creation carries a story—and we take pride in turning your ideas into unique, lasting treasures.

Personalized wooden gifts & corporate items

A blend of tradition, creativity, and innovation

Name: IPS Valenciennes
Description:
Chez IPS – Industrial Packaging Services, nous fabriquons vos palettes, caisses et emballages bois sur mesure, pensés pour s’intégrer parfaitement à votre chaîne logistique.

Depuis plus de 15 ans, nous accompagnons les industriels comme vous dans leurs enjeux de transport et de stockage. Vous avez besoin d’une solution adaptée à vos produits, vos contraintes de manutention ou vos standards d’export ? Notre bureau d’études vous propose une réponse technique, durable et sur mesure. Qu’il s’agisse de palettes classiques, renforcées, à dosseret ou de caisses pour charges lourdes, nous concevons le bon produit pour votre activité.

Nous sommes basés à Valenciennes, au cœur des Hauts-de-France, et livrons partout sur les Haut-de-France. Notre production locale nous permet de vous garantir réactivité, qualité et traçabilité. Nous utilisons principalement du bois français, issu de filières régionales, pour concevoir des emballages robustes et conformes aux normes NIMP15 / ISPM15 pour l’exportation.

En choisissant IPS, vous faites le choix d’un partenaire de proximité, à taille humaine, qui met votre réalité industrielle au centre de ses priorités. Nous ne vous imposons des formats standards mais créons également pour vous des solutions de manutention sur mesure, avec un suivi personnalisé du début à la fin du projet.

 Besoin de palettes, caisses, cartons ou accessoires d’emballage ? Contactez notre équipe pour un devis rapide et un accompagnement technique sur vos projets logistiques.

Name: Confection Bois
Description:
Créations 100% main d'objets d'art en bois.

Toujours passionné du bois, Guillaume Coat crée Confection Bois en 2018. 
Le premier objet à naître, de son tour à bois, est un stylo, clin d’œil hommage à son grand-père décédé. Guillaume lui avait offert un stylo artisanal en bois quelques années plus tôt.
La gamme s’agrandit au fils du temps, avec les rasoirs, leurs supports et les blaireaux, les tire-bouchons, les accessoires de parfumerie. Car oui ! « Tout est possible en bois !»

Guillaume Coat utilise plus de 220 essences de bois issus de nos cinq continents. Pour s’approvisionner en bois et mécanismes, il met un point d’honneur à sélectionner des fournisseurs dont les entreprises sont situées en France. Les différentes essences sont issues de forêt gérées durablement. Il a aussi des partenariats avec des paysagistes locaux pour promouvoir les circuits courts.

A Embalavip foi criada para atender empresas que se preocupam com qualidade e sustentabilidade ambiental, buscando sempre custo/beneficio de excelência, atendendo nossos clientes nos quesitos ISO 9001 e ISO 14001, praticando eficácia, eficiência e melhoria continua.

Description:

Suas operações incluem a comercialização de toras in natura, cavacos, madeira serrada e lâminas, atendendo tanto ao mercado interno quanto ao externo.
Em 2023, a empresa concluiu com êxito o processo de certificação internacional FSC (Forest Stewardship Council), assegurando que suas florestas e produtos seguem práticas ambientalmente corretas, socialmente justas e economicamente viáveis.
A empresa conta com florestas próprias de Pinus Elliottii e Eucalipto, o que garante total autossuficiência em matéria-prima e reforça seu compromisso com a gestão florestal responsável.
Seu escritório administrativo está localizado na cidade de Garibaldi – RS.

With a strong focus on innovation, sustainability, and meticulous craftsmanship, we have become a trusted leader in the furniture industry, known for transforming outdoor spaces into functional, inviting areas.

Who We Are
As a leading outdoor furniture manufacturer, Thinh Phu Furniture is committed to delivering high-quality products that enhance any outdoor environment, whether for residential gardens, luxurious hotel terraces, or bustling commercial spaces.

Our Services

Utilizziamo essenze selezionate (rovere, frassino, noce, larice, pino) e finiture personalizzate (trasparente, laccato, lucido), con un controllo qualità rigoroso in ogni fase.

Per il mondo retail realizziamo arredi per boutique e spazi commerciali, con particolare attenzione a durabilità, modularità e identità del brand. Per il residenziale creiamo ambienti sartoriali pensati per durare: funzionalità, estetica e comfort quotidiano.

Name: EBK Aménagement
Description:
Notre société d'aménagement d'intérieur et de conception de cuisine est une entreprise spécialisée dans la création d'espaces de vie fonctionnels, confortables et esthétiques. Nous proposons des solutions personnalisées pour chaque client, en utilisant notre expertise en matière de design d'intérieur, de sélection de matériaux et d'installation professionnelle pour créer des espaces de vie uniques et adaptés à chaque style de vie.
Notre équipe de designers d'intérieur expérimentés travaille en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour comprendre leurs besoins et leurs goûts. Nous proposons des designs modernes, classiques ou rustiques pour les cuisines, les salles de bain, les chambres à coucher et les espaces de vie. Nous sommes également spécialisés dans la conception de cuisines sur mesure, en utilisant des matériaux de haute qualité pour créer des espaces de cuisine fonctionnels et esthétiques.
Notre processus de travail est transparent et collaboratif. Nous présentons des propositions de design en 3D pour aider les clients à visualiser leur espace et à prendre des décisions éclairées. Nous travaillons ensuite avec les clients pour sélectionner les matériaux, les couleurs et les finitions qui répondent à leurs besoins et à leur budget. Nous veillons à ce que chaque projet soit réalisé avec le plus grand soin et le plus grand professionnalisme, en respectant les délais et le budget convenus.

Name: Lareco Flooring
Description: Historia marki LARECO sięga lat pięćdziesątych XX wieku. Od trzech pokoleń nieustannie rozwijamy produkcję naszych drewnianych podłóg, zdobywamy doświadczenie oraz dążymy do najwyższej możliwej jakości. Jako firma rodzinna, dbamy o jakość wszystkich aspektów naszej działalności i nadal poszerzamy wiedzę i doświadczenie, by dostarczać najlepsze produkty. Wszystko czym zajmujemy się w LARECO, skupia się wokół drewna, dlatego doceniamy jego znaczenie i mamy do niego należyty szacunek. Po latach pracy w najczystszym ekologicznie regionie Polski – Podlasiu, jesteśmy w pełni świadomi jak cennym jest dobrem, dlatego dbamy o jego efektywne wykorzystanie. LARECO to marka dedykowana Klientom ceniącym nowoczesny design i najwyższą możliwą jakość. Filozofię marki odnajdujemy w otaczającej nas przyrodzie, która jednocześnie staje się natchnieniem dla współczesnego wzornictwa.

Name: LaserHout.nl
Description:
Welkom bij LaserHout.nl! 

Wij zijn een innovatief bedrijf gespecialiseerd in het laseren van foto's en logo's op hoogwaardig hout. Onze missie is om de schoonheid en warmte van natuurlijk hout te combineren met moderne technologie, waardoor we unieke en gedenkwaardige producten kunnen creëren voor zowel particuliere als zakelijke klanten.

Onze diensten omvatten:

 Houtgravures: Of het nu gaat om het vereeuwigen van dierbare herinneringen op een houten fotolijst of het creëren van prachtige wanddecoraties, onze houtgravures zijn een perfecte manier om emoties vast te leggen en te delen.

 Zakelijke oplossingen: Als het gaat om merkpromotie en relatiegeschenken, bieden we maatwerkgravures van bedrijfslogo's op houten panelen, visitekaarthouders en nog veel meer.

 Gepersonaliseerde cadeaus: Verras je geliefden met unieke en op maat gemaakte houten geschenken, zoals gegraveerde sleutelhangers, snijplanken en juwelendoosjes.

Waarom kiezen voor Laserhout?

 Uitzonderlijke kwaliteit: We gebruiken geavanceerde lasergravuretechnologie om haarscherpe en duurzame gravures te creëren, zodat elk detail wordt vastgelegd.

 Maatwerk: Jouw ideeën zijn belangrijk voor ons! We werken nauw samen met onze klanten om aan hun specifieke wensen te voldoen en op maat gemaakte creaties te leveren.


 Samenwerkingen: Naast individuele klanten werken we graag samen met fotografen, kunstenaars en bedrijven om hun visie op hout tot leven te brengen.

Volg ons voor inspiratie en voorbeelden van onze meest recente projecten. Heb je vragen of ben je geïnteresseerd in een samenwerking? Stuur ons gerust een bericht!

Ontdek de magie van lasergravure op hout - verfraai herinneringen en breng jouw merk tot leven. 

#Laserhout #Houtgravure #GepersonaliseerdeGeschenken #Innovatie #Relatiegeschenken #Decoratie #Houtbewerking #Duurzaamheid

Name: R.O.C Manufactory (Bedframe Cabinet Diningset)
Description:
A. COVER LETTER

R.O.C appreciates your interest in our company.
The trend of using natural products is more and more popular, especially for the furniture.
Therefore, we are step by step changed ourself to bring the soul to each detail of our products to honor the value of materials and people, as well as enhance the value of your life.
R.O.C considers that aesthetic value is the result of the blending of selected materials and quintessential hands and complementary manufacturing procedure to make the beauty become more splendid and delicating.
On every ways, we are always dedicated to bring the great feeling when using.

B. INSIGHTS ABOUT US

Our name R.O.C is abbreviation of "Repercussion of Oriole on Cedar".
That means we will bring you the experience of using the product like being immersed in the heart of fresh nature. You will feel every beauty of the material while stimulating all senses.

Our vision: R.O.C accompanies you all the ways to improve the value of life.
Our mission: R.O.C offers excellent products made from safe and quality raw materials under the perfect precise creation by the hands of our skillful craftsman. Along with that is the constant support from R.O.C to bring the products to the community with the acceptable prices.
Our core value: Fair - Manner - Think Different - Coordination Assistance - Simplicity - Quality - Serve Human.

C. OUR HISTORY

- 11/2016: We start our manufacturing with the main product from rubber wood.
- 03/2017: Establish Research and Development Department.
- 09/2017: We expand the acacia, mindy wood product line.
- 04/2018: We expand the acacia wood without loose knot product line.
- 11/2018: Operating the production line use imported wood: Pine, Oak wood.
- 01/2020: We expend the product line for special customer (Teak, Eucalyptus Wood).
- From 2021 - present: Coordinate with partners to expand the global furniture market.

Name: RAWood Packaging and Solutions
Description:
Recognizing the increasing demand for sustainable wooden packaging, and leveraging eight years of expertise in this field, RAWood Packaging and Solutions was established in 2023. This company was founded to offer customers a comprehensive solution for wooden packaging - from concept and design to production.

In addition to manufacturing standard-sized pallets, collapsible pallet collars, and pallet accessories (1200x800, 600x800, 2400x800), RAWOOD also produces custom packaging tailored to customer specifications, using a mix of wood, OSB, plywood, metal, and other materials.

To ensure the smooth international transport of wooden packaging (by road, sea, or air), the timber undergoes heat treatment (phytosanitary treatment) in accordance with ISPM-15 standards. Our commitment to sustainability and innovation ensures that our packaging solutions not only meet regulatory requirements but also contribute to a greener planet.

Name: SIA DOCKERS
Description:
"Dockers LLC: Your Premier Global Supplier of High-Quality Timber Solutions. For over 25 years, we've been the trusted source for superior timber products worldwide. Our diverse inventory encompasses an array of precision-cut plywood, specialized timber grades, and rounded stakes—essential for agricultural, landscaping, and construction purposes.

Our premium plywood options cater to various construction needs, offering durability and versatility for both residential and commercial projects. Dockers LLC ensures high-quality materials suitable for flooring, furniture, and structural applications.

In addition to plywood, our catalog features a comprehensive selection of timber materials, including seasoned lumber, specialized grades for unique construction demands, and rounded stakes crafted for stability and support in agricultural and landscaping endeavors.

Complementing our timber range are ENplus-certified pellets and RUF briquettes, providing efficient and sustainable heating solutions. We take pride in delivering products that meet stringent industry standards and facilitate seamless import-export operations globally from our base in Riga, Latvia.

Dockers LLC remains committed to offering exemplary timber solutions, emphasizing quality, reliability, and sustainability. Collaborate with us to access a premium line of timber products, meticulously designed to elevate your projects and promote sustainable practices.

Name: Hollister Cabinets
Description:
Silicon Valley cabinet makers for 40 years. Still here, still building.

We've been crafting European-style cabinets since 1985, serving everyone from San Jose tech executives to Pebble Beach estates. What started as a traditional cabinet shop has evolved into a modern, tech-driven manufacturing operation.

Our reality:
We invested heavily in CNC technology and automated systems because precision matters and our clients expect perfection. Every cabinet is engineered in CAD, cut with computer-controlled accuracy, and assembled using proven European construction methods.

Our market:
Silicon Valley homeowners who want quality without the drama. Monterey Peninsula clients who demand craftsmanship that matches their environment. Contractors who need reliable partners for high-end projects.

We're not trying to be the biggest cabinet company - we're focused on being the most innovative and reliable in Northern California. Our equipment is state-of-the-art, our processes are refined from four decades of experience, and our commitment to customer satisfaction drives every decision.

Innovation meets tradition:
Modern manufacturing capabilities with old-school accountability. We leverage technology to deliver better products faster, but we still answer our own phones and stand behind every installation.

40 years in business because we adapt, invest, and deliver. That's our track record.

Name: DOSHA woodcraft
Description:
DOSHA Woodcraft是一間香港升級再造木工坊，我們將回收的廢棄木材重新設計並製成不同的木製產品。我們的故事始於回收工廠大廈下的廢棄木材，經過篩選、拆板、刨淨及裁切後，DOSHA的設計師們將這些材料重製成不同的環保木產品，包括可持續家具家品、商業紀念品及各種升級再造手工班。

DOSHA Woodcraft is a Hong Kong wood upcycling company, which provides designing and wood product making. DOSHA began by collecting the pallets in the factory buildings and cleaning the woods. Then, we use recycled wood to make our products. Finally, DOSHA turns the disposal woods into sustainable furniture, home products, corporate gifts and DIY packages.

Name: FAMUSA
Description:
FAMUSA, una empresa con una rica historia, fue fundada el 3 de septiembre de 1991 en el departamento de Progreso, Guatemala. Sus accionistas fundadores incluyeron a DIMASA de Gerano, provincia de Roma, Italia y un destacado grupo de accionistas centroamericanos, principalmente guatemaltecos.
El origen de FAMUSA se remonta a 1990, cuando uno de los principales socios accionistas, durante un viaje de exploración, visitó la capital de Roma, donde tuvo un encuentro clave con el cofundador de la industria. Esta conexión resultó ser un punto de inflexión, marcando el inicio de una asociación estratégica que influiría en el futuro de la empresa.
Desde el principio se produjo un cambio significativo en la estructura del capital accionario, transformando la organización interna de la empresa. Esto permitió a la administración diseñar nuevas políticas y estrategias, formalizando el proceso legalmente en 1996. A partir de entonces, se estableció un centro de distribución en el municipio de San Agustín Acasaguastlán, en el departamento de Progreso, Guatemala, desde donde se trazaron rutas comerciales para atender a diversos destinos en el mundo, incluyendo Italia, Hungría y Lituania.

Name: Branches to Bowls
Description:
My name is Ken Rude, owner of Branches to Bowls Ltd living in Calgary, AB. I have been working with wood on and off since I made 7 birdhouses when about 9-10 years old. 2009, I started woodturning with an old lathe I found on Kijiji, to see if I enjoyed working on a lathe like I thought I remembered from High School shop class.

After a couple years of chasing the vibrating lathe around the shop, it was time to upgrade. After looking at the available options I decided on looking for a used Vicmarc lathe, finally after about 6 months I found the only used one, a VL300, in the world 10 minutes from home. It was in my shop within 24 hours. I spent many, many satisfied hours working on my Vicmarc VL300.  In 2016 Branches to Bowls began to carry Vicmarc lathes and accessories for Canada.  Now we are happy to represent them across North America. 

I believe quality tools make it easier to do excellent work with greater satisfaction.  That’s why when Carter and Son Toolworks Ltd approached me to represent them in Canada, we were excited to add them to our product line. 

Our customers were asking about carbide tips.  When seeking a solution for them we met Hunter Tool Systems not only do they provide a quality carbide tip that are designed as cutters we share similar values for our businesses. 

PlanetPlus / Rotur recognized our commitment to quality products and approached us to carry their line.  They have a broad selection of quality turning tools to make your experience with wood fun, with tools that will last.  We are proud to join their family.

GluBoost and wood like each other and adding a quality adhesive product option for our customers was a no brainer.

Name: TopLine srl
Description:
About Us:
TopLine is an Italian company, leader in design and production of chairs for contract, ship furnishings and hospitality since 1986. Located in Prepotto, Udine, Italy, in the heart of the country's historic chair-manufacturing district, we combine traditional Italian craftsmanship with cutting-edge innovation.

Production Facilities & Capabilities:
Our 6,600 square meter facility enables a complete production cycle, from raw material preparation to final packaging. We maintain a stock of over 25,000 raw items, ensuring rapid fulfillment of client-specific wood finishes and upholstery. Our commitment to sustainability is evident in our use of FSC-certified wood and environmentally friendly paints and adhesives.

Market Reach:
With 90% of our revenue derived from exports, we serve markets across Europe, the Middle East, Australia, and the Americas. Our extensive distribution network and strong partnerships with international dealers ensure we remain attuned to global market trends and customer needs.

Our Commitment:
At Top Line, we prioritize flexibility, customization, and client satisfaction. Our dedicated R&D department and collaboration with top designers allow us to innovate continuously, delivering high-quality, stylish products that meet the evolving demands of various industries, including hospitality, healthcare, and more.

Why Choose Top Line:
•	Over 36 years of industry experience.
•	Full production cycle with strict quality control.
•	Wide collection of 120+ models designed for the contract market.
•	Customization and rapid delivery capabilities.
•	International style with customizable finishes and constant design innovation.

Discover more about our products and services at www.topline-italia.com or contact us at topline@topline-italia.com.

Name: Norlund
Description:
Norlund A/S er Danmarks største savværk inden for opskæring af nåletræ til konstruktionstræ, som leveres til både det danske og europæiske marked. Savværket, der er placeret i Nørlund, forarbejder nåletræ fra hele landet og er førende inden for fremstilling af tømmer og konstruktionstræ til byggeindustrien.

Med topmoderne og nyligt opdaterede maskiner sikrer Norlund høj kvalitet, stor produktivitet og en betydelig kapacitet. Årligt bearbejdes over 180.000 m³ råtræ, hovedsageligt Rødgran, Sitka og Ædelgran fra danske skove.

Norlund var det første danske nåletræssavværk, der blev CE-certificeret efter EN 14081-1 for visuel styrkesortering og i 2017 også for maskinsortering. Vi er desuden FSC-, PEFC- og ISPM15-certificerede.

Alt fra produktionen udnyttes – fra konstruktionstræ til biprodukter som savsmuld og bark, der videresælges til bl.a. slagterier og kraftværker. Norlund arbejder aktivt med energiledelse og blev i 2022 certificeret i miljøledelse.

At producere konstruktionstræ af høj kvalitet under størst mulig hensynstagen til miljøet, er én af vore styrker, ligesom bæredygtighed er et af nøgleordene, både når det handler om miljøet og når det handler om virksomhedens evne til at tilpasse sig markedet.

 Naša ponuda:
Suva rezana drvena građa
Drveni elementi i poluproizvodi
Pločasti materijali (MDF/HDF i furnir) vrhunskog kvaliteta
Građevinski materijal za sve vaše potrebe

Goldenwood ima za cilj da pruži visokokvalitetne proizvode i usluge našim klijentima. 

 Naša vizija:
Želimo biti prepoznati kao pouzdan partner u industriji, šireći naš uticaj na tržištu drvnih proizvoda i materijala za izgradnju. Naša stručnost i posvećenost kvalitetu čine nas izborom od povjerenja za klijente u Crnoj Gori.

 Kontaktirajte nas:
Kontaktirajte nas kako bismo razgovarali na koji način možemo zadovoljiti vaše potrebe za drvnom građom, materijalima i uslugama.

Name: Indústria de Madiras Guarani Ltda
Description:
Indústria de Madeiras Guarani Ltda
Bem-vindo à Indústria de Madeiras Guarani Ltda, atua no setor de Compensado Plastificado e Madeirite. Com uma tradição de 50 anos no mercado, somos uma empresa familiar comprometida com a excelência e inovação.
Quem Somos: Fundada em, estamos orgulhosos de ser uma empresa de terceira geração, onde a tradição encontra a visão moderna. Ao longo das décadas, desenvolvemos uma reputação sólida como fornecedores confiáveis e parceiros de confiança em soluções em madeira.
O Que Fazemos: Nosso foco principal é a produção de Compensado Plastificado e Madeirite de alta qualidade, atendendo às necessidades diversificadas de nossos clientes. 
Compromisso com a Qualidade: Na Indústria de Madeiras Guarani, qualidade é a nossa prioridade, garantindo que cada peça atenda ou supere as expectativas de nossos clientes.
Tradição e Inovação: Ao longo de nossa jornada de 50 anos, mantemos a tradição familiar enquanto abraçamos a inovação. Estamos constantemente explorando novas tecnologias e práticas sustentáveis para garantir que nossa empresa continue evoluindo e que possamos atender às demandas futuras.
Missão: Nossa missão é fornecer produtos de alta qualidade, sustentáveis e inovadores, excedendo as expectativas de nossos clientes e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento sustentável do setor.
Junte-se a Nós: Seja parte da história da Indústria de Madeiras Guarani. Trabalhe conosco para criar um futuro sustentável e sólido, onde a qualidade e a tradição se encontram. Estamos ansiosos para colaborar e crescer juntos.
Siga-nos para ficar atualizado sobre nossas últimas notícias, produtos e conquistas!

Name: Sugi Ban Wood
Description:
We specialise in Craft Shou Sugi Ban wood, a unique wood treatment technique that originated in Japan and made in Lithuania. 

By using wood burning technology, we protect pine, spruce and larch wood from weather conditions, mould and pests, while enhancing their natural patterns and exceptional appearance.

Our Craft Sugi Ban wood is an ideal choice for facades, terraces, interiors, fences, railings, walkways and roofs.

We cater to individuals and property developers, delivering orders in various sizes.

Our wood is prepared, burnt and oiled in Vilnius, Lithuania. We deliver throughout Europe.

Name: Ulmia GmbH
Description:
Mit einem kleinen Sägewerk in Andelfingen am Rande der schwäbischen Alb begann 1888 die Geschichte der Firma Anton Kessel (ANKE). Das kleine Unternehmen belieferte Zimmereienund Schreinereien mit Bauholz und Schnittware aus heimischen Hölzern. Nach Kriegsende erweiterten die Kinder des Firmengründers die Produktpalette und belieferten die Kunden nun auch mit Hobelware für Fußböden, Wand- und Deckenverkleidung sowie mit Fenstern und Türen.

Anfang der 50ger Jahre wurden die ersten einfachen Arbeitstische aus Massivholz produziert. Nach und nach entwickelte sich daraus ein umfangreiches Werkbankprogramm für Industrie, Handwerk und Schulen. Einen besonderen Ruf erwarb sich das Unternehmen mit seinen Arbeitsplatten aus zahnverleimten Bucheriegeln.

Neuland betritt ANKE in den 70er Jahren mit dem Aufbau einer eigenen Stahlblechfertigung, um zusätzlich zu den Holzwerkbänken auch Werkbänke und Schubladenschränke in Stahlblech anbieten zu können. Im Jahr 2002 kam es zu einer erneuten Produktionserweiterung mit dem Erwerb der Namens- und Markenrechte von ULMIA. Damit baut das Unternehmen die Produktpalette weiter aus und fertigt nun auch ULMIA -Hobelbänke und ULMIA-Holzbearbeitungswerkzeuge im eigenen Haus.

All the teak products we sell are imported from CFSA’s plantations, which are 100% FSC certified for both Forest Management (Licence Code FSC-C010186) and Chain of Custody (Licence Code FSC-C021561).

Name: ICWST
Description:
ICWST – International Conference on Wood Science and Technology

The International Conference on Wood Science and Technology (ICWST) is a traditional biennial gathering that brings together experts, researchers, and enthusiasts from around the world to exchange knowledge and ideas in the field of wood science and technology.

Over the course of two dynamic conference days, distinguished speakers and renowned experts present on a broad range of topics, sparking discussion and collaboration across disciplines. While rooted in wood science, ICWST reaches beyond to explore interconnected fields such as materials, technologies, design, and innovation.

The conference also highlights the critical role of wood as a sustainable, renewable resource, emphasizing its importance in the bioeconomy and its potential as a green building material in addressing the challenges of climate change.

Name: Shelmore Timber
Description:
Welcome to Shelmore Timber, based near Norbury Junction on the Staffordshire-Shropshire border. We take great pride in offering a wide range of native and exotic hardwoods and softwoods, handpicked for their quality and sustainability.

Our commitment to sustainability is evident in our UK species timber, sourced from our own managed mature woodlands on the 1,500-acre Norbury Park and Ranton Estates, as well as forests and woodlands across the UK. With over half a million trees, including oak, beech, sycamore, larch, sweet chestnut, and more, we prioritise forest resilience and sustainable forest management.

What sets us apart is our ability to provide unparalleled provenance for the timber we supply. Thanks to extensive and detailed planting and harvesting records maintained by the Norbury Park Estates for centuries, we can be self-sufficient in our stock and guarantee the highest standard of quality.

We are passionate about every tree, every piece of timber, and every end-use of everything we sell. Our mission is to ensure that the wood we supply serves its purpose in the most sustainable way possible. With our expertise and dedication, you can trust us to provide the finest timber for your projects.

Name: MyWoodMarket.com
Description:
Are you wooden products creator or lover? 
Then MyWoodMarket is the place for you. 
On our web portal, you can find or sell any wooden product - new or used. The same applies to all types of woodworking machines.
The creators of MyWoodMakret are wood lovers who have grown tired of browsing various web portals and Facebook groups every day, looking for wooden products. It has happened to us countless times that we have noticed a product we liked during our research, but after a few minutes, we could not find it anymore. Sometimes, after a long search, we found it again, but the price and location of the seller were not published. Let us not even talk about sellers who did not respond to our inquiries.
MyWoodMarket is the solution of all the above-mentioned problems.
It is a subscription system, whose main guideline is accessibility to as many users as possible. As a result, the amount of the subscription is symbolic for natural persons and very favorable for businesses.
MyWoodMarket follows the guidelines of the European Green Deal and, as part of its sustainable approach, dedicates part of each subscription to nature conservation by planting trees.
Your opinion matters!
Several times a year, we will publish a short survey, as part of which you will be able to decide on the micro location of planted trees, and we will regularly inform you about the number of already planted trees.
Become part of MyWoodMarket and contribute to sustainable development, since only this way can we enable a bright future for the next generations.

Our range includes handcrafted bowls crafted from a variety of locally sourced woods like oak, walnut, cherry, plum, mulberry, acacia etc. These bowls are expertly combined with vibrant epoxy resin in an array of colors, resulting in truly unique works of art. 

In addition to our stunning bowls, we meticulously craft cutting boards, plates, spoons, and serving plates entirely from wood. Each piece bears the mark of unrivaled craftsmanship, and no two are alike. Every item is carefully handmade, ensuring that it stands as the only one of its kind on the planet.

We take pride in our commitment to quality and health. To provide our customers with the best, we finish all our creations with pure beeswax, eschewing artificial colors and toxic materials. This finishing touch not only enhances the natural beauty of the wood but also ensures that our products are safe for food use.

Beyond their functionality, our products exude aesthetic charm, elevating any space with a touch of luxury and satisfaction. Woodies creations are more than just objects; they are expressions of artistry, tradition, and the profound connection between craftsmanship and nature. Discover the essence of Bosnian heritage in every piece we create.

Name: Bourdaud Bois
Description:
Depuis 1936, Bourdaud Bois incarne l’alliance entre tradition familiale et excellence industrielle dans le secteur du bois. Basée à Nozay (Loire-Atlantique), notre scierie transforme chaque année près de 30 000 m³ de grumes — issus à 100 % de forêts françaises, majoritairement certifiées PEFC.  
 Notre savoir-faire : de la forêt à la pièce prête à l’emploi
•	1ʳᵉ transformation : sciage de feuillus (chêne, hêtre, peuplier…) et résineux (pin maritime, douglas, sapin…), pour produire des bois de charpente, ossature, emballage, coffrage, avivés ou palettes. 
•	2ᵉ transformation & finition : grâce à notre atelier d’aboutage et délignage automatisé, nous fabriquons des carrelets lamellés-collés (DKD, KKK ou aboutés plaqués), des panneaux, des bois rabotés ou usinés — des produits destinés aux menuisiers industriels, aux fabricants d’agencement, ou au secteur de la construction bois.  
 Une offre complète et un accompagnement sur mesure
Notre outil industriel performant (2 lignes de sciage, 6 cellules de séchage, lignes de presses, unité d’aboutage…) permet de répondre à des demandes variées, en grande série comme en sur-mesure.  
Nous proposons aussi des services associés : usinage (rabotage, chanfreinage, rainurage, coupe à longueur, perçage), stockage, séchage, et transport — assurant une traçabilité complète et une qualité maîtrisée du bois livré.  
 Une entreprise engagée et responsable
Chez Bourdaud Bois, nous valorisons l’ensemble de la matière : feuillus ou résineux, grumes issues de forêts locales — tout est transformé ou valorisé. Cette démarche responsable garantit une chaîne durable et respectueuse de l’environnement. 
 À vos côtés pour vos projets
Que vous soyez charpentier, menuisier, industriel, négociant ou acteur de l’aménagement, nous mettons notre expertise à votre service pour vous fournir des bois secs, rabotés, aboutés, usinés — prêts à l’emploi. Nous adaptons nos produits à vos besoins, dans le respect des normes (PEFC, traitement NIMP15....)
