From timeless live-edge tables to our Crystal Epoxy series, each creation reflects a balance between raw material and refined design. Guided by a belief that genuine craftsmanship still matters in a fast-changing industry, Woodslab seeks to restore meaning and connection to the way people experience wood.

Our mission is simple: Respect Your Time.
Each piece is hand-selected, finished with care, and made to endure. Every detail reflects our core values of authenticity, design, slow-making, and quality.
Woodslab continues to shape how people experience wood, not just as furniture but as an enduring expression of craft, connection, and quiet luxury.

Name: SWAT-Crew
Description:
Wir sind deine Ideenwerkstatt für Prototypenentwicklung und hochwertige Holzprodukte. 
Unser Herz schlägt für langlebige und nachhaltige Materialien und Prozesse. Wenn du eine hochwertige Prototypenentwicklung aus Holz für deine Ideen suchst, kontaktiere uns – egal wie ausgereift sie ist. 
Wir unterstützen dich bei der Realisierung deiner Idee.

Unsere Mission 
Wir entwickeln hochwertige Holzprodukte, die funktional sind und individuellen Bedürfnissen entsprechen. Wir glauben an die Vielseitigkeit von Holz und setzen alles daran, hohe Funktionalität in unsere Produkte zu integrieren. Nachhaltigkeit ist für uns von größter Bedeutung. Wir verwenden Holz aus nachhaltig bewirtschafteten Wäldern und setzen auf umweltfreundliche Herstellungsprozesse. Unsere Produkte sind so konzipiert, dass sie viele Jahre halten und zur Reduzierung des ökologischen Fußabdrucks beitragen.

Maßgeschneiderte Prototypen 
Unsere Stärke liegt in der Entwicklung von Prototypen. Wir können Produkte aus Holz für verschiedene Anwendungen entwerfen und herstellen. Mit unserem umfangreichen Netzwerk von Holzlieferanten und Fertigungsfirmen können die beauftragten Prototypen serienreif produziert werden.

Unsere Eigenmarke 
Unter unserem eigenen Label vermarkten wir auch unsere eigenen Kreationen. Jedes Produkt, steht für Qualität, Langlebigkeit und handwerkliches Können. Unsere Produktpalette reicht von eleganten Hochbeeten und komfortablen Gartenstühlen bis hin zu stilvollen Terrassen und Sichtschutzwänden.

Unsere Geschichte 
SWAT-Crew entstand aus einem spontanen Projekt. Wir haben schnell erkannt, dass wir uns perfekt ergänzen – unsere Leidenschaft für Holz, unsere handwerklichen Fähigkeiten und unsere Liebe zur Natur. Seitdem arbeiten wir gemeinsam an Kundenprojekten und setzen unsere kreativen Ideen um. Unsere Teamarbeit ist der Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg und treibt uns täglich an, noch bessere Produkte zu entwickeln. Kontaktiere uns: Lass uns gemeinsam deine Visionen aus Holz verwirklichen!

Beim Neubau oder Umbau von Küchen und Badezimmern übernehmen wir gerne die Gesamtplanung – von der Beratung über die Planung bis hin zur Ausführung und Installation. Aufgrund unserer regionalen Verankerung und Vernetzung können wir bei der Baustellenkoordination Fachleute aus allen Branchen aufbieten und zeitnah einsetzen.

Als kreative Macher setzen wir Holz in den Fokus oder gestalten Verbindungen mit anderen Materialien – kreativ, individuell und hochwertig.

Unser Team nimmt sich Ihrer Anliegen an und führt die anfallenden Arbeiten umfassend aus. Ihre Zufriedenheit ist zusammen mit einer zeitnahen Umsetzung unsere Zielsetzung.

 

Privatkunden sowie Innenarchitekten im Grossraum Zürich bis Zug vertrauen uns – tun Sie das auch.



Dank unserer tiefen regionalen Verankerung sind wir vor allem im Säuliamt, in Mettmenstetten, Bonstetten, Wettswil, Affoltern am Albis, Obfelden, Stallikon sowie in den Regionen Zug, Zürich und angrenzendes Aargau für Sie da.
Auf Wunsch stehen wir aber in der ganzen Schweiz für Sie zur Verfügung!

Name: fryd studio
Description:
מה אנו עושים:
בסטודיו שלנו, אנו מתמקדים בעיצוב מוצרים שמשלבים בין היצירתיות האין סופית שלנו עם הטכנולוגיה המתקדמת ביותר. כאוהבי עיצוב, אנו חולמים, מפקחים ויוצרים כדי להביא לחיים מוצרים שאין כמוהם.

למה אנו חושבים שזה חשוב:
אנו מאמינים באמונה עמוקה שהעיצוב אינו רק מראה - הוא חוויה. כשאנו יכולים ליצור מוצרים שמשלבים בין היופי של העיצוב לבין היכולת המדהימה של הטכנולוגיה, אנו יוצרים קסם. זהו הקסם שהופך מילים למוצרים 

מה אנו חשובים על הקהל שלנו:
בסטודיו שלנו, כל לקוח הוא חלק בלתי נפרד ממסע היצירה. אנו עובדים יחד כדי להבין את חלומותיהם ולהפוך אותם למציאות מרהיבה. הקשר שאנו בונים עם כל לקוח הוא חשוב ואוהב, ואנו מתחייבים לשמור על כל פרט ורגע בלתי נשכח של הדרך.

Name: Holzquadrat
Description:
Hallo, wir sind Dominik und Florian von Holzquadrat und gemeinsam mit unserem Team entwerfen und produzieren wir Schreinerküchen für Kochbegeisterte. Unsere Kunden kommen zu uns, weil sie Spaß und Leidenschaft am Kochen haben. Sie wollen eine exklusive Küche, die genau an ihre Bedürfnisse angepasst ist und in der sie sich mit ihren Familien wohl fühlen. Eine Küche, die Freunde in Staunen versetzt und in der man viele schöne Stunden verbringen kann. Wir planen und produzieren die Küchen in unserer eigenen Werkstatt und sorgen mit unseren Partnerbetrieben in allen Gewerken für ein Rundum-Sorglos-Paket, einen reibungslosen Ablauf im Um- oder Neubau.

Warum wir gerade Küchen machen? Weil wir leidenschaftliche Hobbyköche sind und es bei uns nur zwei Themen gibt: Entweder wir planen Küchen oder überlegen, was man am Wochenende wieder alles kochen könnte. Uns ist es wichtig, individuelle Lösungen zu finden und Räume optimal zu nutzen.

Wenn Sie jetzt auch schon von Ihrer neuen Küche und einem sorgenfreien Umbau träumen, melden Sie sich einfach zum kostenlosen Erstgespräch bei uns.

Name: EcoCoasters
Description:
Welkom bij EcoCoastes, waar duurzaamheid en vakmanschap samenkomen!

Wij zijn een jong, duurzaam bedrijf dat unieke borrelplanken maakt van gerecycled hout. Onze missie? Een positieve impact creëren door hergebruik van materialen en het terugdringen van verspilling. Voor elke plank die we verkopen, doneren we 50 cent aan Trees for All om bij te dragen aan een groenere wereld.

Onze producten, gemaakt van resthout in samenwerking met lokale zagerijen en sociale werkplaatsen, combineren kwaliteit met maatschappelijke impact. Met designs geïnspireerd door Groningen bieden we stijlvolle, aanpasbare planken die perfect zijn voor zowel bedrijven als relatiegeschenken.

Kies EcoCoastes – samen bouwen we aan een duurzame toekomst!

Name: hron.work
Description:
hron.work isn’t a company. It’s an experiment in curiosity, craft, and controlled chaos.
We don’t chase trends or business plans, we follow the spark. What starts as an idea often becomes sawdust, sketches, or something surprisingly beautiful.
We’re the square peg in the round hole, too restless for repetition, too curious to sit still. ADHD? Probably. But we’ve learned to turn that into our superpower: endless ideas, creative detours, and the joy of making something real.
Each piece we create is a small act of resistance against mass uniformity, unique, imperfect, honest. Sometimes it’s rough and wild, sometimes it’s detailed and precise, but it’s always made with heart.
hron.work is where curiosity meets craftsmanship. A space where the mind wanders, hands build, and nothing ever fits quite right...and that’s exactly how we like it.
If you like what we do, or you desperately need one of our crafts, say hello at hello@hron.work

Name: HiMade
Description:
We have realized that Earth’s resources are not infinite, but our needs are becoming so, and yet we continue to demand and purchase, regardless of the quality and origin of the product.

HiMade is a circular design hub that collaborates with various companies to reuse industrial production waste and give life to new objects, thus reducing the carbon footprint.

We may not be able to change the world, but observing what surrounds us does.

Through this project, we promote a zero waste culture, safeguarding the planet’s resources.

We provide our material and industrial technologies to give you the opportunity to use your creativity and bring your projects to life!

Do you have a collaboration to purpose?
Mail us at Info@himade.it or visit us at Via Gaetano Giardino n°5 20123, Milano (MI)!

Name: MADERAS GIRASA S.L.
Description: Fundada en 1987, nos avalan más de treinta años de experiencia en el sector prestando servicio de calidad a buen precio. Name: Falegnameria Metelli s.r.l.
Description: Nata come un piccolo laboratorio artigianale fondato nel 1979 da Giuseppe Metelli nel centro di Pontoglio, nel 1986 è stata ereditata dai nipoti Pietro Angelo e Luigi che seguendo le orme dello zio hanno col tempo ampliato la produzione di serramenti e mobili spostando la sede nella zona industriale dove è tutt’ora ubicata.

Name: Sawinery
Description:
Sawinery.net was created by a real-life woodworker and a woodworking enthusiast, Robert Johnson. His years in the woodworking and carpentry industry, plus his love for the craft inspired him to reach out to his fellow woodworkers through this website.

Sawinery is a provider of a wide scope of woodworking knowledge. We continue to produce quality content that will help all woodworking enthusiasts worldwide understand and love the wood industry.

We have buying guides to lay down the best options for every clueless buyer. We continuously publish detailed tool reviews so that the reader would know a tool inside and out before making any purchases. 

We have DIY projects to encourage both beginners and experts to try creating something new, perhaps a project they have not done before. We also keep stories of remarkable woodworkers to inspire those who feel like they are limited and could not start woodworking on their own.

Name: Bois Franc Rive-Sud
Description:
We are located very close to Quartier Dix/30! Come meet our dynamic team of experts who will be happy to assist you in realizing your residential renovation projects.

Visit our showroom to see our wide range of products such as floors, stairs, and solid wood countertops. Don't forget that we also sell raw wood and offcuts for your various woodworking projects.

In addition, we offer floor and stair installation services, sanding, staining, and varnishing of floors and stairs, woodworking handling, finishing, and delivery services.

Feel free to send us your quote request via our website now to start your project!

Name: Narva Woodwork
Description:
Narva Woodwork, based in Springfield, New Jersey, epitomizes the pinnacle of millwork and custom furnishing production. With a rich history spanning over a decade, the company prides itself on blending classic craftsmanship with the latest technology to transform public and private spaces across the tri-state area. Whether it's for homes, offices, or commercial venues, Narva Woodwork excels in creating custom-made, high-quality pieces that perfectly align with each client's vision.

Distinguished by its use of advanced, fully automated production lines, Narva ensures every piece—from kitchen cabinets to intricate custom woodwork—is crafted with expert precision. Our team of seasoned professionals, with deep roots in traditional woodworking and armed with modern technological expertise, collaborates closely with clients from the design phase through to installation, ensuring every project is executed flawlessly.

Narva's dedication to excellence and its commitment to using high-quality materials reflect its mission to deliver unmatched value and beauty, making it a leader in the woodworking industry. Our approach not only results in stunning spaces but also fosters lasting relationships with clients who trust Narva to bring their visions to life with professionalism and care.

Name: Booker Timber Ltd
Description:
Booker Timber Ltd is a specialist provider of CNC wood and sheet machining, offering precision cutting and shaping of MDF, Chipboard, Plywood and other sheet materials.

Serving both trade professionals and public, we take pride in delivering high-quality, accurate machining to your exact specifications - whether you're working on a one-off project or need large-scale production.

Our commitment to excellent customer service, combined with technical expertise and attention to detail, sets us apart. We aim to be not just a supplier , but a helpful partner in your project - from initial enquiry through to final delivery.

Whether you're a builder , designer, carpenter, or DIY enthusiast, we're here to help you get the job done right.

Based in Bromborough.

Contact us today to discuss your next project.

Name: Pinusemba Pallets
Description: A Pinusemba Embalagens de Madeira é especializada na produção de caixas de madeira, pallets, engradados e outros produtos. Com uma equipe qualificada e tecnologia de ponta, garantimos produtos de qualidade e durabilidade para atender às necessidades de nossos clientes.

With over a decade of experience, we provide exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service to our clients. 
Our commitment to quality is reflected in every piece we create, and we take pride in the fact that all our work is done onsite and in-house, ensuring that every product is 100% Ontario-made.

Name: AL-TAJ Company
Description:
تأسست الشركة في عام 2004 ، وبدأت عملها كمستورد و موزع لتجار الجملة في جميع انحاء العراق . شكلت الثقة مع العملاء و الرضى عن الخدمات و المنتجات المقدمة ، الأساس الذي بنيت عليه الشركة و ازدهرت .

واليوم بوجود مصانع الشركة في العراق وخارجه، تتمتع شركة التاج التجارية بسمعة طيبة بسبب مصداقيتها والتزامها بتقديم منتجات و خدمات ذات جودة عالية. كما تمكنت مبادرات الإدارة المبتكرة من تطوير المنتجات والمساهمة بشكل مباشر و غير مباشر في تطوير السوق.

تعد شركتنا بتلبية إحتياجات عملائها من خلال منتجاتها المتنوعة المصادر و المنشأ (كالسويد والمانيا واسبانيا وايطاليا  و تركيا و الصين  ) .

تواكب شركتنا دينامية الأسواق المتغيرة إن كان في قطاع البيع بالجملة أو في قطاع التجزئة ، و نركز حاليا على تنويع منتجاتنا و تطويرها و على التواجد في أسواق جديدة ، هادفين على الدوام لتحقيق أقصى درجات الرضى عند العملاء عبر سياستنا القائمة على الشفافية و المناقبية

Name: Nashville Tools for Schools
Description:
Our Focus.
Nashville Tools for School was founded for the purpose of partnering with Metro Schools and members of the community to provide the best possible learning environment for our youth and to demonstrate the community's support of our educational system.

About Us.
Nashville Tools for Schools is a local 501(c)3 non-profit working daily to “build for our children’s future.” We complete light construction jobs, from building furniture and outdoor classrooms to renovating locker rooms, storage areas, and press boxes. We have completed over 900 projects over the past 5 years in over 100 schools and educational facilities. We need your support. Volunteer your time to help us build for our next project. Many organizations come help us build. Many donate money to help us maintain our workshop, staff, and projects.

Our Facility.
Facility.
NASHVILLE TOOLS FOR SCHOOLS is privileged to use the old print shop on the TPS campus on Foster Ave. NTFS converted the space into a fully equipped woodworking shop with all manner of stationary and portable tools. From this facility, we can complete the design and assembly of most of our furniture pieces. This space is perfect for hosting volunteer groups of various sizes. Contact us if you wish to volunteer or visit our facility.

Wir freuen uns auf Ihr individuelles Projekt.

Name: Rubio Monocoat Brasil
Description:
Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus 2C
Protege e dá cor à madeira num só revestimento
Rubio Monocoat Oil Plus 2C é um óleo da última geração,livre de COV, que protege a sua madeira
e a cor com um só revestimento. É perfeitamente adequado para zonas muito transitadas,e
pode-se aplicar em qualquer superfície de madeira de interior (mobiliário, bancadas, mesas,
escadas, paredes, pavimentos, etc.) de praticamente todos os tipos e variedades (madeira
maciça, revestimentos, MDF, etc.). A combinação do óleo (A) e do acelerador (B) garante um
endurecimento rápido que proporciona uma ótima proteção.
Também pode ser usado para a renovação ou manutenção de superfícies oleadas com
Rubio Monocoat.
Características específicas
· Dá cor e protege numa única camada
· 40 cores padrão que podem ser misturadas. Infinitas possibilidades criativas!
· Enriquece o aspecto natural da madeira
· Ecológico: 0% de COV!
· Não contém água nem solventes
· Manutenção fácil
· Sem sobreposições ou marcas de aplicação
· Proteção duradoura
· Baixo consumo de energia: 30 - 50 m²/L
· Pode ser usado principalmente em todos os tipos e variedades de madeira (maciça, revestimentos, MDF, etc.)
· Aplicável em qualquer superfície de madeira de interior (móveis, bancadas, escadas, paredes, pavimentos, etc.)

Name: Northwest Cabinets
Description:
Northwest Cabinets is a custom millwork and casework manufacturer proudly serving the Midwest region since 1998.

With over 25 years of experience, we specialize in producing institutional-grade cabinetry solutions for K-12 schools, healthcare facilities, government buildings, and commercial interiors. Our team delivers precise, durable, and detail-focused millwork—built to perform under real-world conditions.

We provide a start-to-finish service:
From estimating and drafting to cutting, finishing, and installation, all work is completed in-house by skilled professionals with an average of over a decade of industry experience. We fabricate in hardwood, veneer, laminate, and solid surface, and can match custom finishes as needed.

At Northwest Cabinets, quality control and craftsmanship are integrated into every phase of production. Our streamlined process ensures on-time delivery, cost-efficiency, and consistency you can trust—no matter the project scale.

We welcome opportunities to collaborate with architects, contractors, and builders who seek precision-built millwork and cabinetry, backed by responsive service and industry expertise.

For direct inquiries or to request a quote, contact us at info@northwestcabinets.com

or visit our website at www.northwestcabinetsinc.com

Name: Living srl
Description: For years, the construction industry has been using polluting, low-quality, low-performance materials driven by the market because of their low cost. Similarly, products made from quality materials have often been installed in homes by unskilled and unqualified personnel, giving customers the wrong perception. From the demand for green and innovation comes Living, a start-up whose task is to bring the most reliable material in terms of quality and functionality back to the forefront ... wood! With our innovative projects and designs, we aim to start in the window and door construction sector, where we have years of experience, and innovate the entire industry. Living currently operates in north-western Italy and south-eastern France, and has partnerships with experienced companies in the sector.

We believe in building an Eco-friendly and Sustainable toys brand, where you as a parent can trust in the highest quality products for your little loved one.

Timmy Toys is a small, family owned business that strives to make eco-friendly, sustainable products for children of all ages. Our main focus is to make heirloom quality toys that ignite creativity and promote learning through hands-on, all natural play.

Name: Bewood
Description: Witamy w Bewood - polskiej marce oferującej szeroki asortyment drewnianych produktów. Nasza oferta obejmuje drewniane etui na telefony ale także case'y na telefon wykonane z drewna i żywicy, akcesoria biurowe, wyposażenie wnętrz, ładowarki indukcyjne, drewniane organizery na biurko, breloki wykonane z drewna i skóry naturalnej, wizytowniki oraz bransoletki. Wszystkie nasze eleganckie drewniane akcesoria są starannie wykonane z dbałością o środowisko. Wykorzystujemy materiały pochodzące z zrównoważonych źródeł i promujemy podejście eko-friendly. Produkty Bewood nie tylko cieszą oczy swoim pięknem, ale także wspierają ideę ekologii i zrównoważonego obiegu. To doskonałe pomysły na prezenty na każdą okazję, które docenisz nie tylko Ty, ale także Twoi bliscy.

Name: Creativa Taller
Description:
En Creativa Taller, nos especializamos en el diseño y fabricación de productos personalizados, principalmente en madera, con un enfoque en empresas y regalos corporativos. Con más de 10 años de experiencia en el rubro del diseño, combinamos creatividad, tecnología y sostenibilidad para dar vida a proyectos únicos que destacan por su calidad y atención al detalle.

Nuestro taller está equipado con máquinas de última tecnología, como corte y grabado láser, router CNC e impresoras 3D, además de herramientas de carpintería tradicional, lo que nos permite desarrollar desde piezas únicas hasta producciones en serie. Nos encontramos en la Casona Raulí, un espacio colaborativo donde cohabitamos con otros talleres de diseño, carpintería y mueblería, fomentando un ambiente de innovación y aprendizaje constante.

En Creativa Taller también creemos en el poder de compartir conocimiento. Por eso, ofrecemos cursos y talleres diseñados para acercar la tecnología y el diseño a personas de diversos perfiles, desde emprendedoras hasta profesionales del diseño que buscan expandir sus habilidades. Nuestro objetivo es fomentar el desarrollo de productos a pequeña y gran escala, contribuyendo al fortalecimiento del rubro del diseño en Chile.

La sostenibilidad es un pilar fundamental en nuestra filosofía. Trabajamos principalmente con madera debido a su carácter renovable, pero sabemos que nuestro mayor impacto positivo proviene de un "diseño bien diseñado": soluciones inteligentes, funcionales y duraderas que minimizan el desperdicio y maximizan su valor.

En Creativa Taller, combinamos pasión, conocimiento y tecnología para transformar ideas en realidades que generan impacto, tanto en quienes las reciben como en el entorno en el que se desarrollan.

Name: XPERIAMUS
Description:
We are a full-service playground manufacturer dedicated to igniting children’s imaginations. Our mission is to create enchanting playgrounds where both children and adults can have fun and cherish moments together. We strive to design warm, natural, and durable play spaces that leave lasting impressions.

With over 15 years of experience working with robinia wood, renowned for its suitability for outdoor use, we embrace the challenges of this beautiful material. The craftsmanship involved is demanding and requires significant manual effort, but the joy reflected in the smiles of happy children is our ultimate reward. At Xperiamus we specialize in producing themed playgrounds that are truly unique, resembling scenes from a fairy tale. Our creations are crafted from premium core acacia (robinia) wood, seasoned timber, and the highest quality stainless steel fixings and fasteners.

Throughout our production process, we meticulously adhere to the safety standards outlined in EN 1176 and EN 1177, ensuring a safe environment for children to play. All our products fully comply with the requirements of EN 1176 and EN 1177.

Name: SINA Spielzeug GmbH
Description: Seit 1991 produziert SINA im Erzgebirge hochwertiges Holzspielzeug, das sich durch kreative und zeitgemäße Interpretationen traditioneller Klassiker auszeichnet. Unser Ziel ist es, das Besondere zu schaffen und dabei die Geschichte des Spielzeugs neu zu schreiben. Wir legen großen Wert auf Design, Funktionalität und Sicherheit, um die kindliche Entwicklung zu unterstützen. Als regionaler Arbeitgeber arbeiten wir eng mit lokalen Partnern zusammen und fühlen uns unserer Heimat verpflichtet. Unsere Produkte sind überwiegend „Made in Germany“ und kombinieren klassisches Handwerk mit modernen Fertigungsprozessen. Inspiriert von Friedrich Fröbel, dem Begründer des Kindergartens, fließen seine pädagogischen Ansätze in unsere Spielzeugentwicklung ein. Wir motivieren Designer, Pädagogen und Autoren zur Zusammenarbeit, um innovative Spielideen zu realisieren. Unsere Spielzeuge zeichnen sich durch einfache Formen und leuchtende Farben aus, die die Neugier und Kreativität der Kinder anregen. SINA Spielzeug steht für gemeinsames Spielen und fördert ein erstes Gefühl für Ästhetik. Wir sind stolz darauf, die Tradition der erzgebirgischen Spielzeugkultur fortzuführen und mit unseren Produkten echte Geschichte zu schreiben.

Name: Maramureswood
Description:
Hello,

We have the most beautiful old wood from Romania, we have imagination, love and respect for old wood. All these give us the possibility to offer you quality and unique products that generate the feeling of wellbeing in your space. Our main activity is the reuse and sale of wood materials from old buildings for interior design purpose. Among our goods, you can find products made from spruce and oak which was reclaimed from barns, warehouses and old buildings. We can manufacture and restore any model of furniture with any kind of finish.

Most of our production is exported to European countries, and our customers are very satisfied with the high quality of the products and services offered. If we have sparked your interest, do not hesitate to visit our online store: www.maramureswood.com  or www.facebook.com/woodmaramures

Our furniture products are recognized for the following activities:

- Manufacturing solid wood furniture

- Replicating original, old and antique pieces

- Restoring rustic, old and antique furniture

- Wooden furniture for gardens, terraces and many more

- Manufacturing solid wood furniture according to the sketches and finishes desired by partners.

We choose sustainability!

Please contact us for any question or you can place an order via email: office@maramureswood.com

Kind regards,
Vasile Verdes
office@maramureswood.com

Name: Merzke Custom Woodworking
Description:
Merzke Custom Solutions was built on the foundation of craftsmanship, creativity, and problem-solving. What began as a custom woodworking business has evolved into something larger: a place where ideas and materials come together to create lasting, tailored solutions for our clients.

Our rebrand from Merzke Custom Woodworking to Merzke Custom Solutions reflects that growth. While woodworking remains a central part of our expertise, our work now spans across a wider range of custom services. We help clients bring projects to life with the same attention to detail, integrity, and dedication that have always defined our approach.

Every piece we design, build, or develop is guided by three principles: quality, function, and creativity. Whether it’s a handcrafted product, a business solution, or a custom-built concept, we aim to provide results that fit seamlessly into our clients’ needs and goals.

The heart of our work is still the same: we believe in creating with care. What has changed is the scope of what we can offer. The shift to Merzke Custom Solutions allows us to support more diverse projects, collaborate in new ways, and deliver a broader range of outcomes, while staying rooted in the craftsmanship and trust that earned us our start.

As we grow, we remain focused on building strong relationships and delivering value through every project. If you’ve known us for woodworking, we welcome you to see how our expanded services can support your next idea. If you’re new to Merzke, we invite you to connect and discover how we can bring your vision to life.

Name: ДП "Стрийлісопродукт"
Description:
ДП “Стрийлісопродукт” – це одне з провідних підприємств України, що займається виробництвом екологічно чистих високоякісних меблевих щитів.

Підприємство створене в 1998 році. Його засновником в Україні є Сидорик Михайло Степанович, який власним досвідом та зусиллями команди вивів підприємство на європейський рівень якості виробництва та обслуговування. На даний час на підприємстві працює 72 особи, що професійно зростають разом з компанією.

Важливими факто¬рами, що сприяють найвищій якості нашої продукції та обслуговування виступають: практика партнерських стосунків з іноземними замовниками, чотирьохступенева система контролю якості продукції та сучасне обладнання (австрійські пропарювальні та сушильні камери фірми “MÜHLBOCK”, багатопильний верстат CML(Італія); верстати групи “WEINIG” (Німеччина) - торцювальна лінія OPTICUT 200 (“Dimter”), чотирьохсторонній верстат Unimat Super 4 (“WEINIG”); прес для склеювання меблевого щита „TAYLOR” (США);обрізний верстат „Altendorf” (Німеччина); шліфувальний верстат „Bütfering”(Німеччина). Мінімальні терміни постачання та прийнятні ціни формують стійку тенденцію щодо побудови взаємовигідної співпраці і зростання кількості постійних клієнтів.

Впродовж діяльності, ми зарекомендували себе як надійний партнер з великим досвідом роботи по виготовленню якісної продукції як на Україні, так і за її межами.

Allt byggs i Sverige med hållbart trä från svenska skogar, och varje produkt är noggrant skapad för hand med omsorg och precision.

Vi kombinerar entreprenörskap med miljöengagemang. Varje produkt vi skapar är resultatet av gediget hantverk och en vilja att göra skillnad. Vi tror på att små handlingar leder till stora förändringar, och genom att erbjuda funktionella, hållbara och estetiskt tilltalande produkter vill vi inspirera fler att skapa trygga miljöer för djur i sina trädgårdar, på balkonger eller ute i naturen. Vårt mål är att förenkla för människor att ge tillbaka till naturen på ett konkret sätt.

Name: AGMAR POLAND
Description:
We are a leading supplier and specialist in the sale and repair of wooden packaging of one-way and Euro pallets. For years, our company has been delivering high-quality products and services to the logistics industry, providing flexibility, durability, and sustainable solutions for our clients.

In our manufacturing facility, we have state-of-the-art machinery and advanced technologies that enable us to repair and modify Euro and one-way pallets according to the highest quality standards. We utilize the best available materials to ensure our clients receive products that meet even the most demanding requirements. Our Euro pallets are not only robust but also comply with international standards, allowing for seamless utilization in global markets.

In addition to Euro pallets, we also offer a wide range of one-way pallets. Our one-way pallets are perfect for customers who prefer practical solutions that do not require return or recycling. They provide convenience and time-saving benefits while meeting high standards of quality and durability.

We are also committed to environmental protection. Therefore, we prioritize sustainable development and ecology. We strive to minimize our carbon footprint by using renewable resources and implementing recycling processes. Our one-way pallets are designed with waste minimization and reducing negative environmental impact in mind.

Proudly serving customers from various industries and regions, we collaborate with small and medium-sized enterprises as well as large corporations across Europe. We ensure timely delivery of our pallets while maintaining high quality and professionalism.

If you are seeking a reliable partner who can provide you with high-quality Euro pallets and one-way pallets, we encourage you to get in touch with us. Together, we can develop an optimal solution that meets your logistical requirements and contributes to the success of your business.

Nuestras soluciones se adaptan a los requerimientos de cada cliente y hacer realidad sus metas es nuestro principal objetivo. Utilizamos conceptos innovadores que hemos recogido de las principales tendencias de mobiliario contract y de hogar para fabricar muebles con diseños modernos y actuales.

Diseñamos, fabricamos, asesoramos.

Name: AMARDEEP SAW MILL
Description:
ABOUT AMARDEEP SAW MILL

At AMARDEEP SAW MILL, we specialize in manufacturing and supplying high-quality wooden packaging materials, including pine wood pallets, cable drums, crates, and boxes. Established in 1980, we have evolved from dealing in teak wood to focusing on pine wood packaging materials since 2006, catering to the diverse needs of industries across India. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction has earned us a reputation for excellence, with products meeting both national and international standards.

With over 18 years of experience in pine wood packaging, our dedicated team and state-of-the-art infrastructure ensure we deliver durable and reliable products. We prioritize innovation and quality control at every step, from sourcing the best raw materials to the final dispatch. Our efforts are directed towards meeting the growing demands of our customers, making us a leader in the industry.

OUR VISION

To be the premier provider of top-quality wooden packaging materials, recognized for excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, setting industry standards and expanding our global reach.

OUR MISSION

To deliver superior pine wood packaging solutions through:
- Continuous innovation and quality control.
- A professional, collaborative workforce.
- Exceptional customer service and tailored solutions.

OUR VALUES

Quality: Commitment to excellence in every product.

Integrity: Ethical business practices.

Innovation: Embracing new technologies.

Customer-Centricity: Prioritizing customer needs.

Sustainability: Responsible sourcing and minimal environmental impact.

Description:
Celebrating 100 years of craftsmanship, Stream Designs is a proud continuation of our family’s deep-rooted history in the wooden industry. For over a century and a half, our ancestors have crafted wood with skill and care.
On 20th January 2022, we launched Stream Designs, a brand built on that rich legacy, committed to creating exceptional designs while honouring our heritage.

At Stream Design, we transform wood into a magnificent piece of art. As a premier wood veneer manufacturer, we blend artisanal craftsmanship with high-end technology to deliver veneers that define luxury and durability. Our extensive collection ranges from European Dyed Veneers to timeless Natural Veneer, to Flute Panels, each precisely crafted to enhance any space.

W sklepach detalicznych firma obsługuje segment klientów indywidualnych oraz małe i średnie przedsiębiorstwa, w tym indywidualnych przedsiębiorców działających w branży budowlanej, stolarskiej oraz wszelkich innych branżach, w których surowcem jest drewno. Ponadto firma posiada dobrze rozwinięty oddział handlowy, którego menadżerowie indywidualnie obsługują i tworzą długoterminową współpracę z dużymi klientami biznesowymi – firmami budowlanymi i producentami domów o konstrukcji drewnianej na terenie całej Polski.

Name: Acme Skid Apache Products
Description:
Founded in the early 1950’s as a family business, the Acme Skid Division of Apache Products began manufacturing wooden skids for a paper mill. Today, it remains a family-owned business servicing customers from Baton Rouge, Louisiana to Freeport, Texas.

Today we employ over 90 people and in 2015 our 5th Pallet Assembly line was added.

We own 9 Trucks / 14 Trailers and annually replace 1-2 of them due to the heavy use they incur. On average we send out 67 loads of pallets per week with some of our largest customers purchasing at least 10-12 weekly loads each.

History Timeline:

– 1956 Apache Products DBA Acme Skid begins operations
– 1998 Brook Gilchriest becomes Sales and Marketing Manager
– 2006 LaNita and Brook purchase Acme Skid
– 2011 Purchase M&T Pallet
– 2014 Honey Island Sawmill Construction
– 2015 Acme Skid Expansion (Facility/Equipment)
– 2016 Acme Skid Celebrates 60th Anniversary

Name: D.W.F. Holzbau AG
Description:
Die D.W.F. Holzbau AG bietet ein breites Spektrum von Tätigkeiten rund um den Holzbau an. Weiter realisieren wir auch Gesamtlösungen von Holzbau, Bedachung, Gerüstbau bis zu den Spenglerarbeiten, alles aus einer Hand. Wir legen Wert auf eine persönliche Kundenberatung und haben aufgrund unserer überschaubaren Grösse flache Hierarchien und kurzen Entscheidungswege. Wir sind bestrebt nachhaltig zu bauen und bevorzugen Schweizer Holz.

Der Baustoff Holz wird seit Jahrhunderten verwendet und gilt heute wieder mehr denn je als Baustoff der Zukunft. Holz besitzt als nachwachsender Rohstoff nicht nur einen unbestreitbaren ökologischen Pluspunkt, sondern verfügt darüber hinaus auch über zahlreiche unübertroffene Wohneigenschaften und Einsatzmöglichkeiten.

Name: MAN PACKING INDUSTRIES PVT LTD
Description:
Man Packing Industries Pvt. Ltd. is the ancillary company of Shri Krishna Vijay Saw Mill (SKVSM Group) was established in 1953 by Mr. Karsan Patel & Mr. Narayan Patel. We are dedicated to manufacturing world-class industrial wooden packaging products as per ISPM-15 standards.
Our company is the first sawmill in Aurangabad. Experience of 70 years in the Saw Mill Industry, we are one of the leading companies with an aim to provide professional EPAL pallets and personalized services in packaging.

Our Biomass Pellet Manufacturing Company unit in Man Packing Industries Pvt Ltd. Is a leading provider of sustainable and renewable energy solutions. We specialize in the production and distribution of high-quality biomass pellets, which are a clean and efficient alternative to traditional fossil fuels. Our company is committed to reducing greenhouse gas emissions, promoting environmental sustainability, and contributing to the global transition towards a low-carbon future.

Our biomass pellets have the following characteristics:
1.	High energy density: Our pellets have a high calorific value, making them an efficient energy source.
2.	Low moisture content: The pellets are dried during the manufacturing process, resulting in low moisture content and improved combustion efficiency.
3.	Consistent quality: We maintain strict quality control measures to ensure consistent pellet size, shape, and energy content.
4.	Sustainable sourcing: We procure biomass feedstock from sustainable sources, ensuring responsible forest management practices and promoting the circular economy.


As a leading Biomass Pellet Manufacturing Company, we are dedicated to providing sustainable and renewable energy solutions to meet the growing demand for clean and efficient fuel sources. With our commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and customer satisfaction, we aim to contribute to a greener and more sustainable future.

Name: Albarracin Wood Creations
Description:
Our Roots

Founded in 2021 by Nick Albarracin, a Navy EOD (Bomb squad) service member with a decade of dedicated service. This company was started in a garage to make unique pieces to be proudly displayed in team rooms to commemorate those who serve our country. Our mission goes beyond crafting exceptional woodwork – we also are committed to support those who serve our nation. With a unique understanding of the challenges and commitments of military life, we stand ready to bring your woodworking dreams to life. 


Custom Creations for a Unique Journey

At Albarracin Wood Creations, we specialize in crafting bespoke pieces that tell your story. Whether it's a custom display case for your military achievements, a handcrafted flag case, or personalized furniture for your home, we understand the importance of creating pieces that honor your journey and complement your lifestyle.


A Journey Tailored to You

Let us bring your vision to life. Discover the perfect blend of tradition, innovation, and personalized design that sets our creations apart. Welcome to a world where each piece tells a story of craftsmanship, passion, and enduring beauty.


We are Committed to Those Who Serve Us

Proceeds from every project are donated to organizations that support special operators in our military, like the Navy Special Operations Foundation, the Navy SEAL Foundation, and the Honor Foundation.

Name: Sugrow
Description:
We want to create products based on renewable and biodegradable raw materials, such as hemp and straw. By using a special industrial processes, the use of environmentally harmful plastics can be avoided during production.

By using rapidly renewable and fully degradable raw materials, we enable a circular economy with our products. Our production runs with 100% green electricity and therefore generates almost no climate-damaging CO2.

Name: McKee Cabinetree Ltd.
Description:
McKee Cabinetree Ltd. (MCL) was established in 1982 by Rob McKee, a furniture designer who attended a small college in Vermont to learn and refine his furniture making skills. 

His natural artistic ability and woodworking skills proved to be a great combination, and upon seeing his hand-crafted designs, a family friend encouraged Rob to start a custom furniture business. He set up a small showroom in Port Carling and, as his designs and the demand for them continued to expand, so did the showroom, evolving into a full woodworking shop. No longer strictly furniture, McKee Cabinetree grew to offer complete woodworking services and custom cabinetry, helping clients realize the kitchens and bathrooms of their dreams. (And laundry rooms. And family rooms. The list goes on.) 

The business is now owned and operated by Rob's son, Ian McKee.  Ian has an engineering degree and brings a fresh new approach to MCL, same quality custom crafted products. 

Everything we create is designed in our Port Carling shop and hand-built locally. Experience the elegance of a finely crafted kitchen with McKee Cabinetree Ltd. Come visit us at 1030 Buttler Road in Port Carling or call us today @ 705.928.6384!

Name: Dansk Plank
Description:
Dansk Plank er specialiseret i massive trægulve i douglas og eg til både private boliger, erhverv og bevaringsværdige ejendomme i hele Danmark. Siden 2011 har vi kombineret nøje udvalgt råtræ med solidt håndværk for at skabe plankegulve, der holder i mange år og som passer til både arkitektur og individuelle ønsker.

Vi håndterer hele processen fra idé til færdigt gulv. Vi udvælger douglas-råtræet, producerer selv de massive planker og står for professionel montering på stedet. Ud over vores douglas-kollektioner tilbyder vi også egeplankegulve og egetræsparket i klassiske mønstre, så løsningen kan tilpasses både stil, behov og budget.

Med base i Esbjerg arbejder vi tæt sammen med private kunder, rådgivere, arkitekter og entreprenører. Fælles for alle opgaver er personlig rådgivning, gennemsigtig dialog og et højt fagligt niveau. Vores specialer omfatter blandt andet massive douglas plankegulve, egeplankegulve, egetræsparket, gulvløsninger til private og historiske bygninger samt komplette løsninger med rådgivning, produktion, levering og montering. Målet er altid det samme: smukke, naturlige trægulve, der er behagelige at gå på og tidløse at leve med.

Name: Nami Pixel
Description:
An Israeli artist who specializes in wood art. 
In his works, he combines his artistic skills with his intellect and creates a series of artworks in a unique and original PIXEL ART style.
He initially studied and worked as an electrical engineer, specializing in image processing, and was very interested in the history of digital images and how they are presented to viewers, which contributed to his development as an artist.
From an early age, his strong passion for art was evident. He grew up in a household that was deeply involved in art, creation, and self-expression, and together with his parents and older siblings, they created various works of art using different techniques and methods.
His father's life greatly influenced him and his artwork, both in terms of the passion for creation and the final outcome. After his father passed away, there was a significant void in his life, and along with that came the desire and inspiration to create and engage in art as they used to do together.
"Creation is a way of life" (Chaim, his late father's name) is the guiding sentence when he approaches his art. The artistic process gives proportion to life and an understanding that life encompasses strength from everything, and we must continue alongside the pain.

Name: Le Feber B.V. - Boards & Panels
Description:
Le Feber is a family business with a passion for sawing wooden boards and panels that dates back to 1961. For more than 50 years we have grown into a renowned sawmill with a broad knowledge and many possibilities. We started as a small business started by our grandfather and continued by our uncles, and since 2000 we are the third generation owner.

Our passion for our profession and the products we supply has always been present and remains central to our company. We only work with quality suppliers from Europe to ensure that we can deliver beautiful, high-quality products. In addition, we saw these products with the best possible yield to minimize waste.

In addition to our passion for our products, we also pay a lot of attention to our customers. Based in Axel, The Netherlands, we supply our products to companies from the Benelux, Northern France and Germany. We strive to be a reliable partner by ensuring fast and accurate delivery. Please note: we do not deliver to consumers.

Our employees are also very important to us. We would like to help them use their interests and possibilities to get the best out of themselves. We value their commitment and commitment to our company.

Finally, we also share a passion for the environment. Our company is FSC and PEFC certified, which means that we work according to strict sustainability standards. We have also are gradually switching to renewable energy.

If you have any questions after visiting our website, please contact us. As a sawmill, we specialize in cutting wood panels to size for companies and we are always ready to help you.

Gwarantujemy, że w naszej ofercie znajduje się wszystko to, co jest przydatne w magazynowaniu i wysyłce towarów - w przypadku, gdyby mieli Państwo specjalne życzenia, z pewnością zaprojektujemy i wykonamy dla Was odpowiedni wyrób.

Nasza firma nieustannie się rozwija i poszukuje nowych wyzwań. Choć jesteśmy znanym w branży dystrybutorem palet przemysłowych (zarówno tych nowych, jak i używanych), to nie poprzestajemy tylko na tej działalności. 

Zasłynęliśmy również jako producent skrzyń ładunkowych na specjalne wyroby.
Nie ma dla nas rzeczy niemożliwych, a z drewna potrafimy wykonać niemalże każdy rodzaj opakowania: składanego, w całości, z uchwytami, bez uchwytów, wyściełanego papierem wodoodpornym, aluminium lub plastikiem. 

Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z naszą bogatą ofertą usługową!

LOXKIN develops natural, low-impact materials designed to make workshops, homes, and manufacturing environments cleaner and safer.

We started with wood finishes using plant-based oils and waxes that remove harmful solvents and reduce emissions but our wider goal is to help the design and manufacturing industries transition towards circular, regenerative systems.

Our focus is on creating practical, scalable alternatives that improve human health, protect natural resources and strengthen local supply chains. By connecting material science with sustainable design thinking, we aim to show that better materials can also build better businesses.

Vores sortiment omfatter alt fra robuste spiseborde i massiv eg til elegante konferenceborde og specialdesignede møbler til både private hjem og erhverv. Fra vores base i Nørresundby servicerer vi kunder i hele Danmark med personlig rådgivning og professionel leveringsservice. Vi tror på at skabe værdi gennem høj kvalitet, ærligt håndværk og god service - værdier der gennemsyrer alt hvad vi laver.
Besøg os på nordiskplanke.dk og oplev vores omfattende udvalg af plankeborde, eller kontakt os for en personlig snak om dine ønsker til et unikt plankebord.

Name: Hoblić d.o.o.
Description:
Naše poslovanje je 31 godinu bilo organizirano kroz dva poslovna subjekta:
Hoblić stolarska radiona, vl. Želimir Kvočić i poduzeće Hoblić d.o.o.
Kroz stolarsku radionu odvijala se cjelokupna proizvodnja, a poduzeće je bilo
osnovano s ciljem obavljanja komercijalnih, financijskih i administrativnih
poslova. Kroz poduzeće su se vodila velika opremanja poslovnih prostora, javni
natječaji, trgovina uredskih stolaca i ostalo. 30.04.2025. spojili smo oba subjekta u jedan - Hoblić d.o.o. Operativno se cijelo poslovanje odvija na istoj lokaciji u Zagrebu – Prudi 14/1.

Glavni proizvodni program tvrtke Hoblić su proizvodnja uredskog namještaja, opremanje poslovnih prostora svih vrsta, a zadnjih godina i restauracija namještaja i građevinske stolarije. Sve to proizvodimo na cca 800 m² zatvorenog prostora. Opremljeni smo suvremenim stolarskim strojevima i vozilima za dostavu.

Naši djelatnici svojim obrazovanjem, znanjem i iskustvom stvaraju kvalitetan i kod naših poslovnih partnera prepoznatljiv namještaj. Jako puno ulažemo u pripremu proizvodnje tako da je ta kvaliteta prepoznata i kod naših suradnika arhitekata i naših kupaca.

Pratimo sve trendove koji se događaju u stolariji i opremanju, a pritom ne zaboravljamo da postoji i drvo – prirodno, toplo i oku ugodno.

Custom Corporate Gifting

Natural Wood Bowls, Trays & Serveware

Premium hardwoods (acacia, walnut, teak, mango)

Food-safe epoxy resins

Natural inclusions (stones, botanicals, metal accents)

Eco-friendly oils & finishes

Each product reflects sustainable craftsmanship—ethically sourced materials, handmade by skilled artisans, and made to last. Whether you're looking to stock shelves with unique SKUs, furnish an interior project with custom-made pieces, or source artisan décor at scale, Handgraphy offers flexible B2B partnerships and worldwide shipping.

Why Partner with Us?

Bespoke design options for bulk orders

Quality-focused production with attention to detail

Fast turnaround with scalable manufacturing

Competitive B2B pricing

Globally trusted logistics

Let’s turn your space—or your store—into a gallery of natural elegance.
Follow Handgraphy for product showcases, behind-the-scenes craftsmanship, and partnership opportunities.

 For wholesale inquiries or collaborations, reach out to us directly.

Nos 4 hectares d’aire de stockage, nous permettent de proposer une très large gamme d’emballages standards et spécifiques en occasion et neufs.

Nous collectons, trions et réintroduisons dans le flux logistiques les palettes de réemploi. 

Les palettes non réparables sont broyées afin de produire des plaquettes de bois énergie.

L’ensemble de notre activité s’inscrit dans une démarche d’économie circulaire.

Name: Daco Wood
Description:
Chi siamo
Dal 2018, Daco Wood trasforma il legno in pavimenti e soluzioni di design su misura. Un’azienda giovane, moderna e dinamica, che vuole distinguersi nel settore del parquet grazie a un approccio chiaro e innovativo.

Sostenibilità
La sostenibilità ambientale è al centro della nostra filosofia: rispettiamo il territorio e adottiamo processi eco-friendly, con l’obiettivo di garantire un futuro sostenibile. Ogni tavola di legno è valorizzata al massimo, nel rispetto dell’ambiente e delle normative vigenti.

Artigianalità e Made in Italy
Ogni progetto è realizzato su misura, con cura artigianale e attenzione ai dettagli. Selezioniamo materie prime di prima qualità e portiamo avanti l’eccellenza del Made in Italy, fondendo tradizione e design contemporaneo per pavimenti e arredi unici, adatti a ogni spazio e contesto.

La nostra filosofia
In Daco Wood artigianalità e natura si incontrano per creare ambienti eleganti, autentici e duraturi. Seguiamo le tendenze del design, senza mai perdere di vista la qualità, la personalizzazione e il rispetto per l’ambiente.

Name: Hoblić
Description:
Naše poslovanje organizirano je kroz dva poslovna subjekta: Hoblić stolarska radiona, vl. Želimir Kvočić i poduzeće Hoblić d.o.o.

Kroz stolarsku radionu odvija se cjelokupna proizvodnja, a poduzeće je osnovano s ciljem da obavlja komercijalne, financijske i administrativne poslove. Kroz poduzeće vodimo i velika opremanja poslovnih prostora, javne natječaje i trgovinu uredskih stolaca i ostalog. Operativno se radiona i poduzeće nalaze na istoj lokaciji u Zagrebu – Prudi 14.

Glavni proizvodni program tvrtke Hoblić su proizvodnja uredskog namještaja, opremanje poslovnih prostora svih vrsta, a zadnjih godina i restauracija namještaja i građevinske stolarije. Sve to proizvodimo na cca 800 m² zatvorenog prostora. Opremljeni smo suvremenim stolarskim strojevima i vozilima za dostavu.

Naši djelatnici svojim obrazovanjem, znanjem i iskustvom stvaraju kvalitetan i kod naših poslovnih partnera prepoznatljiv namještaj. Jako puno ulažemo u pripremu proizvodnje tako da je ta kvaliteta prepoznata i kod naših suradnika arhitekata i naših kupaca.

Pratimo sve trendove koji se događaju u stolariji i opremanju, a pritom ne zaboravljamo da postoji i drvo – prirodno, toplo i oku ugodno.

Our restaurant-quality barbeque, smoking, and cooking woods are available in several different forms: cut and split firewood, chunks, and chips. No matter what you’re making, we offer a wide variety of woods to help you provide the perfect, mouth-watering flavor you're after. Whether it’s the mild sweetness of maple-smoked turkey or the intense flavor of mesquite-grilled beef, you will taste the difference when you cook with Paul’s restaurant firewood. Choose from oak, maple, apple, hickory, cherry, pecan, mesquite, post oak.
Paul’s also provides firewood for pizza ovens in small, medium, and large size splits. Keep your crust crispy with our fine aged red oak, kiln dried to provide the perfect combination of heat and longevity. Need some help getting your fire started? We have 2 kindling options.

Our firewood is quarter-split and cut 15–16 inches in length. Our slow-burning barbeque chunks range from softball to baseball size, and our restaurant wood chips are perfect for giving those smaller cuts of meat their ideal smokiness. 

We offer a standard hardwood mix of oak, birch, and maple firewood, which is ideal for residential use in both fireplaces and bonfires. To ensure proper aging and optimal burning quality, our residential firewood has a 1½–2 year drying period and arrives perfectly seasoned and ready to burn.
With just a phone call, you can also arrange to pick up your firewood order at our facility, located in Little Falls, MN.
Specialty Firewood
Paul’s Fireplace Wood also offers specialty firewood: apple, cherry, hickory, pecan, post oak, and mesquite. These varieties are sold by the bag, which weigh 50–60 pounds depending on the wood type. A minimum of 8 bags is required for delivery orders, or you can order a smaller amount for pickup at our location in Little Falls, MN.

Rubber tree is a gift bestowed to Thailand by the mother earth, making the country a well-known producer of natural rubber. In southern Thailand, each rubber tree grows tall and strong in sufficient sunshine and rainfall for 25 years.

At the heart of our precision-guided creations lies the profound Japanese philosophy of Wabi-sabi, which embodies the acceptance of transience and imperfection in both life and art. Rooted in Amharic and Gurage languages, "Wabi" signifies "beautiful" and "attractive," while also denoting "reference" or "source" in Amharic and "to give" and "accept" in Gurage. This philosophy serves as the cornerstone of our product aesthetic, characterized by an appreciation for beauty that is "the perfect gift, uniquely minimal, delightfully personalized" in its essence. Wabi Sabi Creatives Trading PLC is committed to delivering meticulously crafted creations that transcend fleeting trends, reflecting our expertise in merging artistry with individuality, making us pioneers in this creative realm.

Фирмата е водещ производител на палети, транспортни скари, бокс палета, сандъци  и нестандартни опаковки от дърво.

Фирмата се развива в тази сфера от 1998 г. Разполагаме с модерна база, в която има три производствени цеха за разкрояване и сглобяване на дървените опаковки и палети. В продължение на години се наложихме, като лидер на пазара, с доказано качество и безупречно изпълнение на възложените от клиентита поръчки. Опитът , който сме натрупали, ще Ви помогне за реализирането на Вашите желания и производствени нужди от гледна точка на нестандартни дървени опаковки, палета или сандъци.

Фирмата е сертифицирана по ISO 9001:2015г.

Mission and Core Values:

Defensa del uso de la madera como materia prima sostenible, en el marco de una bioeconomía basada en esta, como solución para el desarrollo económico local. Así como su puesta en valor como pilar básico para la descarbonización de la economía, mediante el fomento de la economía circular y aprovechamiento en cascada de la madera.

CALIPAL se constituye como un foro de empresas de productos maderables, especialmente de elementos de cargas para el transporte, para la defensa del sector, y optimización de los procesos productivos mediante la innovación y el respeto medioambiental.

Ofrecemos un servicio integral que combina materiales de calidad, tecnología y asesoramiento profesional:
– Corte bonificado de melaminas con la compra de placas
– Pegado de canto (0,45 mm y 2 mm)
– Servicio de perforado
– Etiquetado inteligente para trazabilidad total
– Sistema de almacenamiento 4.0, que optimiza tiempos y precisión

Contamos con tres sucursales estratégicas en Mendoza: Guaymallén (casa matriz), San Rafael y San Juan.

Nuestro compromiso es acompañar a carpinteros, arquitectos y diseñadores en cada etapa del proceso, brindando soluciones técnicas, estéticas y funcionales para crear espacios únicos.

Name: Renart

Name: SCIERIE du SAUZE
Description:
Scierie du Sauzé - Le bois, notre matière d'excellence

Ici, en bourgogne, le bois n'est pas qu'une matière première.
C'est une passion. Un savoir-faire. Une exigence de chaque instant. 

A la Scierie du Sauzé, nous scions, trions et séchons le chêne français avec la même rigueur depuis plus de 60 ans. 
Mais pas question de faire "comme avant".
Nous avons gardé le geste, modernisé les process et conservé ce qui fait toute la différence :
Le sens du détail et du travail bien fait. 

Nos spécialités ? 
Les plots chêne, triés avec précision, séchés naturellement à l'air sous hangar et choisis un à un pour leur régularité. 
Les avivés / frises et avivés funéraire
Les traverses chêne paysagères et bois sous rail
Les merrains
Les socles renforcés
Le bois d'énergie

Des produits pour tous les professionnels du bois, menuisiers, ébénistes, paysagistes, charpentiers, négociants... 
Des essences variés : chêne, hêtre, châtaigner, frêne
Des bois qui répondent aux standards de qualité élevés qui recherchent du vrai, du stable et du durable.

Rien n'est laissé au hasard.
Chaque arbre est sélectionné avec soin dès la forêt, selon sa provenance et sa qualité.
Chaque produit est contrôlé par l'oeil attentif de nos opérateurs expérimentés, pour garantir un bois constant, fidèle et fiable.

 Ce que l'on promet ?
- Un bois qui valorise vos projets, vos créations.
- Une qualité sur laquelle vous pouvez compter.
- Et une équipe qui connaît vos métiers, vos contraintes et vos exigences.

Parce que la Scierie du Sauzé, c'est le bois de confiance depuis 1964.
Une scierie ancrée dans son territoire, certifiée et où l'on travaille avec respect de nos forêts, du matériau et avec fierté du métier.

Name: Prosharp Wood
Description:
Yüzlerce yıl yaşar ağaç… 
Sabırlıdır, sükunet sahibidir… 
Üzerinde yaşadığı, milyonlarca yaşa sahip topraktan, dağdan özüne alabileceklerin değerini de bilir, milyarlarca yaşa sahip dünyaya verdiği oksijenin değerini de. Belki de bu yüzden, her sene gövdesine katabildiği her bir harenin bile hakkını vererek,  dıştan dışa çok sert, içindeyse yumuşak olarak sürdürür hayatını…
Ama her canlının olduğu gibi, ağacın da ömrü vardır… Belki de, ağacı diğer canlılardan ayıran en büyük özellik, ömrü sona erdikten sonra yaşadığı hızlı  süreçtir. 

İşte bu hızlı süreçte, sert yapısına aldanıp, sert davranarak, yakarak, fosile, kömüre döndürmeniz de mümkündür, yumuşak özüne nazire yaparcasına yumuşak davranarak  yine yüzyıllarca hizmet edecek bir sanat eserine döndürmeniz de…
Prosharp olarak bizler, işte bu sufi felsefeyle yaklaşırız, her kalasa, her ufak tahta parçasına…  İşte bu yüzden, kalas halinde aldığımız kütükleri, dilimler, temizler, yapıştırır, kısaca, kendi panellerimizi, en kaliteli malzemelerle kendimiz hazırlarız. Bu paneller, yine en yüksek teknolojili makinelerde işlendiğinde, işimiz bitmemiştir… Belki de yeni başladık diye bakarız her ürünümüze… Ağacın içindeki yumuşak dokuyu hissedebilmenizi görev ediniriz.

İşte bu yüzden, en ufak köşesi bile atlanmadan yumuşatılır bütün ürünlerimiz… Kusursuz zımparalarız hepsini, o kadifemsi dokuyu yakalayana kadar… Nefes almaya devam etsin, rutubetle muhatap olmasın bir daha diye, ömrü boyunca alıştığı üzere, sağlıklı, gıdaya uygun, doğal yağlarla yağlarız, tek tek…

Prosharp olarak, belki sanatçı değiliz ama işlediğimiz ağaçların bu şekilde hizmetine devam etmesinden, gurur duyarız…

Name: SANTIA INT. WOODS TR. EST. LLC
Description:
At  SANTIA INT. WOODS TR. EST. LLC  , we pride ourselves on delivering top-quality wood pallets that cater to a diverse range of industry needs. With 25 years of experience in the field, we have become a trusted provider for companies seeking reliable and durable pallet solutions.

Our product offerings include:

1. Standard Wood Pallets: We offer a variety of standard-sized wood pallets that are suitable for various applications, such as shipping, storage, and warehousing. These pallets are built to industry standards and are crafted using high-quality materials to ensure strength and durability.

2. Custom Wood Pallets: We understand that different businesses have unique requirements. That's why we specialize in creating custom wood pallets tailored to your specific needs. Whether you need pallets of non-standard sizes, special load capacities, or specific configurations, our team is equipped to design and manufacture pallets that meet your exact specifications.

3. Heat-Treated Pallets: For international shipping or compliance with ISPM 15 regulations, we offer heat-treated pallets. Our heat-treated pallets undergo a controlled heating process to eliminate any potential pests or contaminants, making them suitable for global distribution and ensuring smooth customs clearance.

4. Pallet Repair and Recycling: We also provide pallet repair and recycling services to help you optimize your pallet inventory and reduce waste. Our skilled technicians can assess damaged pallets, perform necessary repairs, and ensure they are back in service efficiently. Moreover, we actively participate in sustainable practices by recycling and reusing pallet components whenever possible.

Name: Veneta Cassetti
Description:
Veneta Cassetti nasce nel 1993 con l’obiettivo di fornire un’ampia gamma di prodotti nel mercato della produzione di cassetti in truciolare rivestiti in polivinilcloruro (PVC) polipropilene (PP). 
Il nucleo fondatore iniziale trova nuova linfa vitale con l’ingresso in azienda del Signor Virgilio Coden, che grazie alla propria esperienza  nel settore del mobile, veicola la produzione del cassetto non solo con il senno della natura del prodotto, ma anche e soprattutto con la profonda conoscenza e consapevolezza del futuro dello stesso  realizzando così un’importante sintesi di qualità, costo e servizio.
 Il Signor Virgilio Coden ha saputo inoltre insegnare questa modalità lavorativa al proprio socio in affari e figlio, Signor Erminio Coden ed a tutti i propri collaboratori.
Proprio per questo Veneta Cassetti, nonostante la giovane età, dimostra un’importante maturità attraverso la creazione di un prodotto che soddisfi in toto le aspettative del cliente.
Lavoriamo con materiali che rispettano le normative europee e diamo la possibilità a tutti i clienti di contribuire alla salvaguardia delle foreste nel mondo scegliendo i nostri prodotti FSC  (License Code FSC-C109730). Forniamo altre certificazioni su richiesta specifica.

A wide range of products, quality and speed of service and individual approach to each customer are just some of the "little secrets" that make FURNIR, even after 90 years, synonymous with plywood, chipboard, mediapan and other wood-based and wood-based materials.
Oriented to the quality of service and individual approach, with more than three thousand items in the sales range, we successfully respond to the requirements of furniture manufacturers, carpenters, hobbyists and our citizens. Today, VENEER is the first address for: board materials (plywood, chipboard, edging strips, MDF boards, HDF boards, hardboard, insulation, OSB and QSB boards, plywood, panel boards, building formwork…), veneers, sawn timber, floor and wall coverings (classic parquet, panel parquet, eco floor, decking, stair elements), wood accessories, furniture parts, fittings (couplings, handles, legs, troughs, guides,…), adhesives, and the entire accompanying range of products that justify the slogan " VENEER - your house friend ".
Today, empowered by new investments, FURNIR in its newly renovated retail space offers customers a wide selection of quality materials at affordable prices. Our vision is to continuously invest in new technologies, constantly expand the product range to listen to customer needs, with affordable prices and quality service to maintain a place among the leading companies for the sale and processing of materials for furniture and home furnishing.

We are today a solution for our market that is increasingly focused on innovative and creative ideas and that challenges itself to carry out clients' projects and ideas, providing them with a quick, direct and personalized service, including technical visits for the design and project monitoring.

  - Design of finishes and accessories for interior and exterior.

Name: archeoscreens.com
Description: We make rocker and box screens for archaeology. Our screens are engineered for stability and durability, intended to withstand the rigors of archaeological fieldwork. We have spent the last five years perfecting the design of the screens, and they have withstood the wide array of tough conditions experienced by archaeologists. From boiling sun in the summer to frigid rain in the winter, and digging muddy clay and coarse sand with cobbles, our screens have stood up to these challenges and have been stashed overnight in the rain to do it again.

Most products are unique.

Name: Euroshpon Smyga
Description:
PJSC «EUROSHPON-SMYGA» is one of the leading manufacturers of sliced veneer and wood products in Ukraine. Combining modern technologies with nearly a century of experience, our company continues the traditions that began in the 19th century with the formation of the Smizke woodworking plant. Today, advanced equipment and professional craftsmanship allow us to produce veneer that meets strict international standards.

We manufacture sliced veneer, profile wrapping veneer, natural edge-banding tapes, and timber. Our high quality is ensured by skilled personnel and an efficient control system certified under ISO 9001:2009. We carefully select raw materials and work with oak, ash, pine, beech, alder, and maple. As a result, our products are recognized and trusted not only in Ukraine but also in many European countries, including Poland, Lithuania, Greece, Spain, Denmark, and Slovakia.

Alongside active production development, we remain committed to social responsibility. The company invests in local projects, supports cultural initiatives, and encourages sports and education. We care about employee well-being, provide comfortable working conditions, and contribute to community life by supporting a children’s brass band and helping develop local sports, including a children’s football club.

Focused on continuous improvement, we work flexibly and efficiently to meet the needs of each customer—whether a large furniture manufacturer or a small woodworking workshop. Our dedication to quality, innovation, and responsibility shapes everything we do.

We are always ready for cooperation and happy to work with you.

Description:
Façon Française est un atelier de fabrication bois situé à Wattrelos, près de Lille, dédié aux professionnels exigeants : architectes, designers, restaurateurs, artisans, marques ou entreprises.

Spécialisés dans l’usinage CNC, l’assemblage bois, et la fabrication sur mesure, nous réalisons des pièces en petite et moyenne série : clostras, marches d’escaliers, plateaux, éléments d’agencement, PLV, goodies bois…
Nous travaillons principalement le chêne massif français, mais aussi le contreplaqué, le MDF ou le multiplis selon les projets.

 Notre objectif : mettre notre savoir-faire artisanal au service des pros, avec fiabilité, réactivité et finitions haut de gamme.

 Notre histoire
Façon Française est née de l’expérience de KOPO CRÉATION, notre première marque de mobilier éco-conçu en chêne massif, fondée en 2017.
Après 8 ans à fabriquer du mobilier haut de gamme pour les particuliers, nous avons souhaité ouvrir notre savoir-faire aux projets professionnels.

 Notre engagement
Nous croyons à une production locale, durable et accessible.
Nous valorisons les matériaux français, les circuits courts et la transparence dans la fabrication.

 Livraison en France et en Europe.
 Atelier basé à Wattrelos (59)

Vous êtes designer, architecte ou porteur de projet ?

Name: Wrightway Preferred Pallet
Description:
We build new pallets, combination pallets, and recycled/reclaimed pallets. We purchase broken and odd-size pallets, repair them and put back into service, for every type of industry- Farm Produce, Grocery, Manufacturing, Warehousing and Transportation.

Today, new wood pallets are typically constructed of “downfall” lumber – lumber that is not used for furniture, flooring etc. After their initial use, wood pallets can efficiently be repaired with new lumber or boards salvaged from unrepairable pallets. This allows the pallet to be used safely and efficiently over and over again.

The wooden pallet is the unsung hero of the world, goods are transported on pallets and most of them are, or will be, recycled and used again and again. Our recycled line of business focuses on pickup of used pallets, repair of these pallets, and delivering the recycled pallets to customers all over the greater Twin Cities areas.

Our Custom Pallet line of business focuses on the exact specifications you need and meets those specifications with precision. Our team is dedicated to ensuring your Custom Pallets are delivered on time and are built to perfection time and time again.

Wooden Pallets are used in so many companies in the Twin Cities area it is hard to count. Let us show you how our customer service allows us to make a simple product into a game changing portion of your operations plan.

Name: Benchspace
Description:
Benchspace London: Empowering Makers, Designers & Startups

At Benchspace, we provide more than just space — we offer a professional-grade, shared joinery workshop in the heart of South East London, designed to help makers, furniture designers, startups, and creatives unlock their full potential. Our fully equipped workshop is tailored for those who need reliable access to high-quality machinery, flexible bench hire, and a thriving community to support their creative and business journeys.

Founded by George and Simon, who bring years of experience from Aldworth James & Bond and their own fabrication business, Object Atelier, Benchspace was born from a shared vision to create a workspace where precision meets collaboration. After spending years working in shared environments, they realised the need for a workshop that didn’t just provide tools but was a community-driven space, dedicated to helping creatives grow their craft and business.

Our space is equipped with commercial-grade machinery, including CNC routers, panel saws, mitre saws, drill presses, and more, all maintained to the highest standards. Whether you’re prototyping your first product, scaling production, or refining your craft, we provide the tools and resources needed to bring your ideas to life.

Name: Marangoza
Description:
Marangoza olarak, uzman ekibimiz ve geniş makine parkurumuz ile, firmanızın ürün ya da tanıtım faaliyetlerinde kullanılmak üzere ihtiyaç duyacağınız ahşap ürünlerinin üretimini yapmaktayız.

Ürün portföyümüzde hali hazırda anlaşmalı firmalarımıza yaptığımız ahşap kutu, farklı sektörlerde faaliyet gösteren üreticiler için ahşaptan şişe ve ürün standı ve çeşitli ahşap ürünler bulunmaktadır. Bunun yanında ihtiyaç duyacağınız tüm ağaç çeşitlerinden, firmanıza özel boyut ve şekillerde ahşap ürünler üretebilmekteyiz. Tasarım ekibimizle ihtiyaçlarınıza yönelik ürünler geliştirebilir, doğru ağaç ve modellerde ahşap ürünler üretebilmekteyiz.

Talebinize göre çam, ceviz, kayın, maun, sedir, ardıç, meşe ve ahşap ürünlerinde kullanıma uygun olan tüm ağaçları, ürünleriniz için işleyebilmekteyiz.

Name: Alder Specialist Joinery
Description:
With over 30 years of experience in designing and manufacturing timber windows and timber doors, Tony Berry has built a reputation for exceptional quality and attention to detail.

Tony’s journey started as a young apprentice, learning traditional joinery techniques that would lay the foundation for his career. From tinkering in his dad’s workshop to establishing Alder Specialist Joinery, Tony’s love for crafting bespoke timber windows and timber doors has never wavered. His commitment to precision and craftsmanship makes every project a testament to the art of joinery.

Supporting Tony is his wife, Maddie Berry, who brings a wealth of experience in retail management and customer service. As the company secretary, Maddie ensures that every customer receives impeccable service. Together, this husband-and-wife team is dedicated to delivering excellence in every aspect of their work, from the first consultation to the final installation.

We love nature - this a maxim of our entrepreneurial behaviour. It's our aim to reduce or completely avoid the damage of our environment and the waste of resources. Our quality is based on internationally valid norms, custom-designed requirements and an integrated safty work managment.

Name: Spitz-Holzsysteme GmbH
Description:
Mitten im Schwarzwald und verwurzelt in einer Tradition, die mit und von diesem Wald lebt, bearbeiten wir als Familienunternehmen seit rund 100 Jahren Holz.

Die Schneflerei, so heißt hier die Kunst der Holzbearbeitung, ist unsere zweite Natur und wir haben sie kontinuierlich und konsequent weiterentwickelt und heutigen Erfordernissen angepasst. Unsere Spezialität ist die Herstellung hochpräziser Qualitäts-Handläufe für Industrie und Handwerk. Und wahrscheinlich sind Sie schon einmal mit unseren Produkten in Berührung gekommen, denn von den vielen Metern hochwertiger Handläufe, die jährlich in Deutschland verbaut werden, stammt ein Großteil von uns.

Die Produktionsweisen und Größenordnungen haben sich verändert, unsere Liebe zum Holz und unser Qualitätsanspruch sind geblieben: Was wir produzieren, ist Hand-Werk im besten Sinne und wir setzen unseren ganzen Ehrgeiz und all unsere Erfahrung daran, um zum perfekten Gelingen Ihrer Projekte beizutragen.

Dispone di 26 forni di essiccazione (3 in Italia + 23 in Polonia) utilizzati sia per il trattamento fitosanitario HT ISPM-15 FAO (obbligatorio per gli imballaggi in legno destinati ai mercati extra UE) che per l’essiccazione del legno e dei prodotti finiti.

Name: Luli Wood industry Co., LTD
TARIVIVE
Description:
En TARIVIVE somos una empresa orgullosamente yucateca, dedicada a la fabricación de tarimas industriales y soluciones de embalaje de madera elaboradas con madera de pino proveniente de bosques autorizados, garantizando así calidad, responsabilidad y compromiso ambiental.

Nuestra producción cumple con la certificación NOM-144 y el sello HT (Heat Treatment), requisitos indispensables para exportaciones internacionales. Esto nos permite ser un socio estratégico para industrias que demandan procesos confiables y productos que aseguren la integridad de su mercancía.

Además de nuestra línea de tarimas estándar, desarrollamos proyectos especiales y tarimas personalizadas según las necesidades de cada cliente, ofreciendo soluciones flexibles y adaptadas a cada industria.

En TARIVIVE, unimos experiencia y compromiso humano para brindar calidad, seguridad y confianza, convirtiéndonos en el proveedor de embalaje en madera que tu negocio necesita para crecer y moverse con seguridad.

Description:

The wood species treated are oak, ash, birch, American walnut and beech. We also welcome service work from customer material.

Name: McLaughlin Woodworks
Description:
McLaughlin Woodworks is a small, family workshop of Baltimore furniture makers. We believe the mark of good craftsmanship is in the details. We take pride in the craftwork and strive to build custom furniture that will stand up to everyday use, stand the test of time, and meet the needs of your lifestyle. We build dining tables, bench seating, standing shelves, built-in shelves, floating shelves, mudroom storage, lockers, desks, cabinets, barn doors, & much more.

McLaughlin Woodworks is a new business that already has a long history of excellence to live up to. Multiple generations along multiple branches of the family tree have left their mark on the industry. They were carpenters on the Pennsylvania Railroad, contractors specializing in restoring victorian homes in the Baltimore area, furniture makers, luthiers, and lumber millers. They were professionals and hobbyists, but each honed their craft and passed on their love of carpentry.  Woodworking is in our blood, and McLaughlin Woodworks is carrying on the tradition.

Owner Patch McLaughlin started MW in 2020 to supplement his income as a sawyer at a small reclaimed lumber business in Maryland. He started out building custom bookshelves and mudroom cabinets for friends and family and quickly started designing and building his own furniture.

Description:
Maski is a Canadian family-owned business that manufactures hardwood components, primarily for cabinet manufacturers, furniture manufacturers and architectural millworks. We specialize in the acquisition and transformation of logs into finished and semi-finished hardwood products.

We are one of North America’s leading manufacturers of hardwood components, working with the major players in the cabinet and furniture industry. With more than a hundred qualified employees, we offer a solution tailored to your needs, with lead times that exceed industry standards.
