Name: StylishEngraving
Description:
I had a crazy idea to start a Laser Engraving Business from home.  I left my full time employment in November 2018. December 2018, my wife quit her full time employment. We were crazy busy our first year with Christmas Ornaments. In January 2019, we purchased our second laser. I did enough research to know I did not want to go with a small laser as most home hobbyist have. I wanted to go with a larger Laser to capture more business the smaller laser could not do. The large laser has a bed size of 55 inches wide by 35 inches tall, with an expansion door to do even larger pieces.

We have expanded several times through out these last few years. Getting in to larger pieces and different types of wood working. At the time of this writing, we now have 3 lasers, a larger CNC machine and other pieces of equipment to make us into Stylish Engraving.

We are continuing to expand and grow. We have also added in Vinyl to our business. Companies have contacted us to do wall murals in Vinyl. Some of the larger Vinyl work we have done is about 16 feet long on a cargo trailer, large company logos on a 9 foot wall and even text on a 10 foot wall.

Stylish Engraving is a work from home business. Since we are a smaller home based business, we are dedicated to our customers. When a project comes it, we work with the customer on their design, do several mockups and create the project to the specifications customer is asking for. We love being in the woodworking business.

From wood Christmas Ornaments to Cutting Boards. Wedding gifts to Home Decor. We work with several types of material. Wood, Acrylic, Glass, Leather, Plexiglas, Stone and so much more.

Introducing Teak Land - luxury made affordable. We are a 100% original teak door and window manufacturer with a legacy that stretches back 62 years. We understand that each architect is unique, with their own set of creative algorithms. That's why we're eager to learn more about your aesthetic matrix, so we can evolve our craft and design to better suit your needs.

Our mission is to create impeccable art from our craft. We believe that our dream sojourn has been started by our desire to be unique, and we have been silently working in the market for long years. But we believe the focus was impeccable. Now the time has come to spread our wings to wider horizons of craft, creativity and aesthetics.

We invite you to explore our products and services, and see for yourself why Teak Land is the premier choice for luxury made affordable. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and start building your dream home with Teak Land.

A wide range of offered wood, modern machinery and implemented norms pursuant to the certificates allow us to provide the highest quality products.

  Our company has a complete production line: starting from wood cutting, through drying, processing and, finally, the end product. A modern and efficient machinery park and strict quality control through all phases have secured our reputation and quality of our products.

  “One cannot create beautiful and durable products without the knowledge and respect for the natural perfection of wood. Through process optimization of the production we effectively use all elements, prevent waste and destruction of their perfect nature.”

Description:
Specialists in Larch cladding, located in the heart of rural Herefordshire, Goodman's Restoration is a family run business with over 40 years experience in the timber industry. 

We also cut native Hardwoods such as Oak and Ash, along with native and European Softwoods such as Larch, Cedar, and Western Hemlock.


From milling beams, lintels and posts, to hard and softwood flooring; and from feather boards, cover boarding, wayney edge and match boarding, to machined timber mouldings, stud-work, battens, and joinery sections, we cover it all. We also supply fencing, decking,and hedging stakes.

Name: Schrocks Custom Woodworking
Description:
Schrock's Custom Woodworking specializes in handcrafted "timber look" box beams that bring the timeless beauty of wood to any project without the drawbacks of heavy, solid timbers. As a third-generation woodworker, we have been perfecting our unique product for over 15 years, creating a lighter, more stable, and cost-effective solution for both residential and commercial spaces.

All of our beams are meticulously crafted in our Greenville, SC, shop to be indistinguishable from solid timbers, featuring authentic details like checking and end grain veneers. We offer a full range of custom solutions beyond standard beams, including arched trusses, mantels, floating shelves, and newel posts.

Serving clients throughout the Southeast, we provide a sophisticated and versatile alternative that is easy to install, resistant to shrinking and warping, and adds significant architectural value. Partner with us to achieve the warmth and character of exposed timber with the benefits of a modern, custom-designed solution.

Stosujemy nowoczesne metody zarządzania produkcją, takie jak Lean Manufacturing, co przekłada się na efektywność i redukcję kosztów. Nasze produkty są nie tylko estetycznie wykonane, ale także trwałe i funkcjonalne, co sprawia, że cieszą się uznaniem zarówno w Polsce, jak i na rynkach międzynarodowych.Jako lider w produkcji wyrobów z litego drewna stale poszukujemy nowych rozwiązań, aby sprostać oczekiwaniom najbardziej wymagających klientów. Name: ilpol Legnami
Description: IlPol Legnami ha continuato a crescere in modo esponenziale, diventando anno dopo anno un punto di riferimento nel settore e un'industria leader a livello nazionale nell'importazione, nell'essiccazione e nella lavorazione preliminare del legno proveniente da tutto il mondo. Nino e il suo efficiente team hanno ereditato l'attenzione al dettaglio e la passione per il legno del fondatore della ILPOL, che in oltre 60 anni di attività ha trasmesso ai suoi collaboratori la curiosità per la conoscenza dei segreti del legno, la consapevolezza di far parte di una realtà aziendale fiorente e l'orgoglio per il riconoscimento ottenuto a livello mondiale. La costante ricerca dell'innovazione e l'utilizzo di tecnologie all'avanguardia nella lavorazione e nella conservazione dei materiali fanno della ILPOL una realtà all'avanguardia. L'azienda completa l'offerta di prodotti di eccellente qualità con un servizio attento e altamente flessibile, in grado di soddisfare anche i clienti più esigenti. In armonia con l'ambiente, sin dagli anni '80 la ILPOL ha scelto di collocare la sua sede principale su una vasta area di circa 10 ettari, di cui almeno 10.000 metri quadrati coperti, nel comune di Alvito, un meraviglioso paese medievale nel cuore della Valle di Comino. Negli anni '90, per offrire un servizio migliore alla clientela del Nord Italia e ridurre al minimo i tempi di consegna, è stata aperta una nuova sede logisticamente all'avanguardia a San Pietro di Morubio, in provincia di Verona.

Description:

Recognized as the premier manufacturer and exporter of Acacia Wood products in the Philippines, our master artisans hand turn each bowl, plate and dish from a single piece of acacia wood, turning out products that are as known for their durability, sophisticated style, lustrous finish and intricate grains.

All of our woods are ecologically forested from private lands and are certified by the Department of Environment and Natural Resources. Acacia wood is fast growing and non-endangered.

The company is located in Laguna Technopark in the city of Biñan, an hour’s drive south of Manila. In 2010, South Seas Native Treasure became a registered member of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority (PEZA), which champions outstanding companies specializing in export manufacturing. Over 90% of our products are made for export and we ship product to customers in Europe, Asia and the United States.

As an export company, we understand the needs of our foreign customers. Each product is individually wrapped and hand inspected prior to shipping. We use high quality shipping boxes and have the ability to print and apply customer specific barcode labels and product tags.

At South Seas Native Treasures, we build long lasting partnerships by delivering the right products, complete and on time.

  Crafting Dreams in Wood

Our journey began with a passion for woodworking and an unwavering dedication to transforming spaces into reflections of individual style. With over 20 years of experience, our team of skilled artisans and designers bring a wealth of expertise to every project. From classic designs to cutting-edge contemporary styles, we blend traditional craftsmanship with modern functionality to create cabinetry that stands the test of time.

2. Customization Beyond Boundaries
At BradleyBuilt| Cabinets and Millwork Design, we understand that every home is unique. That's why we offer a seamless customization experience, ensuring that each cabinet is a perfect fit for your space, lifestyle, and preferences. From wood selection to finishes, every detail is tailored to your vision.

3. Quality That Speaks Volumes
We believe that true craftsmanship is reflected in the materials we use. Our commitment to quality is unwavering – we source only the finest hardwoods, ensuring durability, resilience, and a touch of natural elegance in every piece. Immerse yourself in the luxury of well-crafted cabinetry that stands out for its beauty and longevity.

  Transforming Spaces, One Cabinet at a Time

Name: Pura Madera
Description:
PuraMadera is a Peruvian wood export company born from the Amazon basin and backed by a parent company with over 50 years of experience and more than $250 million in global annual sales. As a strategic spin-off, PuraMadera was created to lead our group’s dedicated expansion into the U.S. market—delivering mill-direct pricing, industrial scale, and deeply rooted sustainability.

Our parent company is one of the top three plywood manufacturers in South and Central America, operating out of Ucayali with a production capacity exceeding 300,000 plywood sheets per month. That’s 3.6 million sheets annually, fully committed to supporting U.S. buyers. This volume positions us to immediately serve 1.5% of total U.S. plywood demand, with the ability to scale to 3–5% as growth continues.

We are not just a distributor—we are the manufacturer. PuraMadera shares the same millhouse, infrastructure, and vertically integrated operations as our parent company. This allows us to maintain full control over quality, consistency, and supply chain efficiency.
 
Amazon Port Advantage
Our group is also one of the few wood producers in the region with its own port on the Amazon River, giving us unmatched logistical reach and control. This allows for faster, more reliable exports directly to the U.S., with traceable and transparent operations from forest to delivery.

Sustainable by Design
Our practices meet or exceed the standards of FSC, PEFC, Peruvian forestry law, the U.S. Lacey Act, and the EU Timber Regulation. We work directly with local communities and indigenous leaders to source from legal, selectively harvested forests. Every sheet we ship reflects our values—purity, responsibility, and respect for the rainforest.

Name: Varuna Lestari
Description:
Balsa Lestari is a Belgium owned company with parts of production in Belgium and Indonesia.
We offer a full range of panels for the Yacht and camper industries. 

While developing the "Balsa Lestari Panel" we worked towards the control of the entire process. From seedling to the plantation and from endgrain to finished sandwich panels.

We are not a traditional company, our motto is simple, give more than you take, in short Business based conservation. We don't run our plantation in the conventional way either. For us, the Balsa tree starts its life as a nursing corp to rejuvenate the most degraded and abandoned lands on the islands of East Indonesia, where all the needed natural elements fall together to grow high-quality and low-density Balsa.

Once the Balsa revived the degraded landscapes, we harvest, replant with permanent forest, and move on to the next area which needs restoration. This way we build forests while doing business and help to fight against the massive deforestation worldwide.

Next to our Balsa panels, we offer acoustic Cork panels and a range of different types of plywood. 

All panels can be finished with HPL layers.

Name: BİLSAN AHŞAP SAN. VE TİC. A.Ş.
Description:
Bilsan Ahşap, temelinde tutku ve heyecanla başlayan, özenle tasarlanan ve üretilen, ağaç ve ahşap işlerine farklı bir vizyon katarak evinizde ve ofisinizde doğaya ait en doğal dokuyu hissetmenizi sağlayan, şık ve samimi ürünlere sahip bir ahşap tasarım ve üretim markasıdır.

Bilsan Ahşap, Kahramanmaraş’ta 2007 yılında kuruldu. 2007 yılında küçük ve mütevazi bir atölyede hobi olarak başladığımız işimizi geliştirerek sadece yurtiçi değil aynı zamanda bir çok Avrupa ve Orta Doğu ülkelerinde de adından söz ettirmeyi başarmıştır.

Doğadan, kaynağından elde ettiğimiz endüstriyel amaçlı yetiştirilen ağaçları kendi tesislerimizde işliyor ve yine kendi tasarım ofislerimizde tasarladığımız ürün, desen ve koleksiyonlarımızla siz değerli müşterilerimize en nadide ürünlerimizi ulaştırmak için çalışıyoruz. Doğaya ve insana olan saygımızın bir gereği olarak ürünlerimizde herhangi bir kimyasal madde kullanmıyoruz.

Sosyal sorumluluğumuz gereği ahşap kullanımının önemine değiniyor ve ahşap kullanımını her alanda teşvik ediyoruz. Çocuklarımıza ve geleceğimize daha yaşanabilir bir dünya bırakabilmek için çalışıyoruz.

Bilsan Ahşap olarak ana misyonumuz, insan hayatını önemseyen, yaşam standartları yüksek, güvenli ürünlerden oluşan ve çevreye saygılı yaşam alanlarımızın oluşmasına katkıda bulunan bir çözüm ortağı olmaktır.

Unsere Küchen entstehen aus präzise abgestimmten Materialkompositionen: robuste Fronten aus melaminharzbeschichteten oder lackierten Span- oder MDF-Platten (Mitteldichte Holzfaserplatte), Acrylbeschichtete MDF-Platten oder auch mit Echtholzfurnier aus widerstandsfähiger Eiche. After more than 10 years of experience in the print and graphic arts world, I decided to pursue a different avenue of creativity, woodworking. Name: Orbit Wood & Shavings
Description:
Welcome to Orbit Wood & S, where we take immense pride in being your trusted source for premium pine wood shavings tailored to meet the specific needs of commercial chicken farmers. We don't just provide bedding; we provide a foundation for healthier, more productive flocks and a more sustainable future for your farm.

Who We Are: 

Orbit Wood & Shavings isn't just a business; we're a team of dedicated experts who understand the intricate dynamics of commercial chicken farming. With years of experience in the industry, we've honed our skills to offer top-quality bedding materials and unwavering support.

Our Mission: 

Our mission is straightforward yet profound: to empower commercial chicken farmers with innovative bedding solutions that prioritize bird health, optimize operational efficiency, and champion environmental sustainability. We believe that success in poultry farming begins with the well-being of your birds and a commitment to preserving our planet.

What We Offer: 

 Premium Pine Wood Shavings: At the heart of our offerings lies our flagship product, the industry's gold standard in poultry bedding. Sourced from sustainably managed forests, our pine wood shavings undergo rigorous processing to surpass industry benchmarks. They excel in absorbency, ammonia control, and dust reduction, providing a pristine, comfortable habitat for your poultry.

 Enhanced Bird Health: We understand that healthy chickens are your lifeline. Our pine wood shavings create a clean, hygienic environment that minimizes disease risks, reduces stress, and maximizes overall bird health and productivity.

 Operational Excellence: Recognizing the precious nature of your resources, we've developed bedding solutions that boost your farm's efficiency. Reduced bedding changes, lower ammonia levels, and decreased maintenance costs free up your time and resources to focus on strategic growth.

We deliver all over South Africa and abroad, please feel free to contact us

1975 yılından itibaren ahşap sanayiinde edindiğimiz bilgi birikimi ve tecrübeyi, 1997 yılında Kibar Kereste İnşaat Tic. Ltd. Şti. adıyla kurumsal bir kimliğe dönüştürdük. Kuruluşumuzdan bu yana yalnızca kereste alanında değil; otomotiv, ticari araçlar, vagon ve treyler sanayi, mobilya üretimi ve savunma sanayi gibi birçok sektörde genişleyen hizmet yelpazemizle faaliyet göstermekteyiz.

Toplamda 3.000 m² kapalı ve 1.000 m² açık üretim alanına sahip modern tesislerimizde, alanında uzman teknik ekibimiz ve ileri teknolojiye sahip CNC makinelerimiz ile yüksek kaliteli, zamanında ve uygun maliyetli çözümler sunuyoruz. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyacına özel üretim kabiliyetimiz sayesinde, gerek yurt içinde gerekse yurt dışında birçok firmaya güvenilir bir çözüm ortağı olarak hizmet vermeye devam etmekteyiz.

2016 yılı itibariyle markalaşma sürecimizi güçlendirerek, özellikle otomotiv yan sanayi ve savunma sanayi alanındaki faaliyetlerimizi sürdürürken, 2022 yılında unvan değişikliği yaparak Kibar Ahşap ve Metal Teknolojileri San. Tic. Ltd. Şti. adı altında hizmet vermeye devam etmekteyiz. Bu adım, global pazarlarda daha güçlü bir şekilde var olmamızı sağlarken, aynı zamanda kalite ve güven odaklı üretim anlayışımızı uluslararası standartlara taşımamıza da imkân tanımıştır.

Je privilégie ainsi le bois de nos forêts européennes et de récupération. Je récupère bois, visserie et quincaillerie d’anciens meubles que je démonte afin de les réutiliser et ainsi pratiquer l’upcycling de ces matériaux destinés à la poubelle. J’utilise aussi les produits les plus respectueux de la nature possible et j’optimise au mieux les chutes de bois. Je m’engage aussi à réduire l’empreinte écologique de mon entreprise au fil des années.

Venez avec vos idées et je les réaliserai !

Name: Woodfiction
Description:
In this world where we live witnessing the unique perfection of nature every moment, we adopt a philosophy of integrating with nature with minimal touches as much as possible. We aim to apply this vision to our work and art with a wood atelier established in Istanbul since 2017. We present the fossil wood pieces, which have gained unique artistic textures by spending centuries in the oceans and lakes, to living spaces by storify them with the modern and minimal touch.

When we examine the products what we hunt closely, we understand that each piece has its own unique story. Parts with various textures and shapes also differ in our cleaning and processing methods and give several design ideas. Generally, a hard and pure view is obtained by going through stages such as washing, carving, burning and sanding. A process is followed by determining the design functions. The traditional wood burning technique called yakisugi is one of these processes we use.

Name: Fisher's Timber Treatment
Description:
H2 & H3 Timber Preservation Services.  
WHY USE TREATED TIMBER?
By treating timber, you are making it resistant to forces of nature such as rot and decay—as well as protecting it from termite or borer attack.  

H2 –to minimise the risk of an attack by insects and termites. 
•	inside above-ground applications.  
•	typical uses are framing, flooring and any other dry situations.

H3 –to make timber resistant to termites, fungal decay and rot.  
•	Outside, above-ground
•	Used in weatherboards, fascia, pergola posts, window joinery, framing and decking.

Our pressure impregnated treatment is a safe water-based treatment that goes above and beyond the Australian Standards. 

Our H2 and H3 treatments penetrate both sapwood and heartwood fibres, providing superior protection to your timber.

Sourcing the most advanced treatment technologies from around the world, to deliver Australian manufacturer’s competence in application, manufacturing and performance that extend beyond even Australian Standards requirements.

Name: Laturnia Creations
Description:
La Turnia nasce nel 1967 a San Giovanni al Natisone, fondata da Giuseppe Savio, artigiano del legno dotato di ingegno e passione. Grazie alla tradizione manifatturiera locale e a una profonda conoscenza della materia prima, oggi l’azienda è una realtà artigianale moderna. Le nuove generazioni rappresentate dai figli Gabriele e Denis, con una nuova visione imprenditoriale aperta ai mercati globali, hanno dato vita a Laturnia Creations applicando il know–how acquisito negli anni alla produzione di grucce in legno, accessori per il guardaroba, supporti e display per vetrine e retail.
La capacità di trasformare idee in prodotti su misura di alta qualità ha reso Laturnia Creations il partner ideale per esclusivi brand di moda, boutique e showroom internazionali. L’azienda ha fatto dell’artigianalità e dell'innovazione i suoi pilastri, mantenendo sempre al centro qualità e sostenibilità. Dal 2016, il suo impegno è riconosciuto dalla Certificazione FSC.
–
La Turnia was founded in 1967 in San Giovanni al Natisone by Giuseppe Savio, a master woodworker with resourcefulness and passion. Thanks to the local manufacturing tradition and a deep understanding of raw materials, the company has evolved into a modern artisanal enterprise. The new generations, represented by his sons Gabriele and Denis, have preserved their father’s legacy while enhancing it with an entrepreneurial vision open to global markets. This is how Laturnia Creations was born, applying the know-how acquired over the years to the production of wooden hangers, wardrobe accessories, supports, and displays for windows and retail. 
The ability to transform ideas into custom-made, high-quality products has made Laturnia Creations the ideal partner for exclusive fashion brands, boutiques and international showrooms. The company has built its foundation on craftsmanship and innovation, always maintaining a focus on quality and sustainability. Since 2016, its commitment has been recognized by the FSC certification.

Name: REMI RYCKEBOER
Description:
Remi Ryckeboer is een houtzagerij gelegen te Ronse dat enkel hout verwerkt afkomstig uit België. Deze keuze maken we bewust met oog op duurzaamheid. Door uitsluitend lokaal hout te zagen beperken we drastisch de kilometers aan vervoer dat wordt gedaan om bepaalde (tropische) houtsoorten hier te krijgen. 

Daarnaast zorgen we er altijd voor dat we een volledig overzicht hebben vanaf de bosexploitatie. Dit stelt ons in staat om controle te houden over elke stap van het proces, van de oogst tot de verwerking. Dankzij deze aanpak staan we garant voor duurzaam bosbeheer dat op zijn beurt dan weer bijdraagt aan onder andere de biodiversiteit, klimaatregulatie, koolstofopslag.... 

Ons voornaamste doel is dan ook om het marktaandeel van het Belgische hout in de markt te verhogen door te zoeken naar innovatieve technieken en samenwerkingen. We streven ernaar om het gebruik van lokaal hout verder te verduurzamen en zo nieuwe toepassingen en mogelijkheden te creëren.

Benieuwd naar de verschillende samenwerkingen en projecten die ons pad kruisen? Volg dan zeker onze socials op Linkedin, Facebook en Instagram!

Description:
New York City's oldest and only moulding and lumber mill, established in 1982, Adriatic Wood Products has been a trusted provider of quality wood products for over four decades.

Name: Gravois Planing Mill
Description:
Gravois Planing Mill is a full-service manufacturer of millwork, cabinetry and wood products for residential and commercial applications.  

Powell Hall.  The Sheldon Concert Hall and Galleries.  Missouri Athletic Club.  the Ritz-Carlton.  Gravois Planing Mill has touched them all - and countless other cherished cultural institutions and fine homes in St. Louis and beyond.  

Since 1901, Gravois Planing Mill's iconic facade has anchored the corner of Minnesota Ave and Juniata Street.  But the mill itself has been furnishing landmarks and residences throughout the region for even longer, beginning in 1893 - a full year before Saint Louis Union Station would welcome its first visitors from around the country.  

Through the years, the craftsmen of Gravois Planing Mill have earned their reputation as masters of fine historic woodwork with a project list that includes Washington University, the Saint Louis Art Museum, the Missouri Botanical Gardens, and the homes of influential civic leaders like the former President of the New York Stock Exchange, among others.

Today, Gravois Planing Mill retains the spirit and space it has occupied for decades, and continues to restore historic landmarks while crafting new ones.

Name: Pi Skill Tech
Description:
PiSkillTech at a Glance:

PiSkillTech is a Montessori inspired wooden toy design and manufacturing company known for its human-centered, interdisciplinary approach. As early leaders in the practice of design thinking, we create positive impact through design by applying our creative mindsets and skills, and by teaching others to do the same.

Is there such a thing as a perfect toy? If so, wooden toys may come the closest. Maria Montessori favored “real” toys made of natural materials like wood because they’re healthy, safe, and inspiring for children. They’re also beautiful and durable; some of the earliest toys ever discovered were made of wood.
A simple, beautifully-crafted wooden toy can capture a child’s interest without overwhelming them, and inspire their imagination without directing it.

Here are 8 reasons to choose piskilltech wooden toys:
1) They help children focus
2) More uses = fewer toys
3) They promote creative play—and teach cause and effect
4) They’re a quiet introduction to the real world
5) They inspire
6) They introduce children to math and physics
7) They last
8) They’re beautiful

Name: Balaji handicraft
Description:
Balaji handicraft toy-making is a traditional craft in the Varanasi district of Uttar Pradesh, India. Bright and colourful lacquered toys are made by clusters of skilled craftsmen. These toys were given the Geographical Indication tag in 2014, along with other lacquer ware produced in this region.

History :-

According to the craftsmen, their ancestors specialised in ivory carving that enjoyed good patronage during the reign of the Mughal emperors and the British. After ivory was banned by the Government of India, they shifted to woodcarving.

Process of manufacture:-

Wooden logs are sourced from nearby areas such as the jungles of Chitrakoot and Sonbhadra.Keria (Coraiya) wood from Bihar was used earlier and it is still the preferred type of wood for toy-making. But after the government banned the cutting of Keria trees in the 1980s, the craftsmen switched to using the wood from eucalyptus, which is now used predominantly.[3] Stacks of wooden logs can be seen stored outside the houses of the wood-carvers.[4]

Pieces of wood are cut out from the logs according to the size of the toy that is to be made. Each piece is heated slowly to remove all the moisture from the wood. This process is time-consuming.[2] The piece is sanded in order to smoothen its surface.

The wood is either hand-carved or shaped using lathe. Lathe is preferred for toys that are axially symmetric. In hand-carving, first the design of the toy is drawn on the wood. Then, the wood is sculpted with chisel and hammer according to the design. Once shaped, the surface of the toy is smoothened using a file and the toy is sent for painting.

Toys are given several coats of paint, and finished with a clear or coloured lacquer. Paint brushes made out of the hair from squirrel’s tail are used for painting fine lines.

Lacquering may also be done on a lathe. For slender and delicate items, hand-lathe is preferred. A lac stick is pressed against the toy which is fixed to the lathe.

1. Kullanım ve Güvenlik Kuralları
Pelsan Pelet tüm üyelerine açıktır. Site üzerinde verilen hizmetler aksi belirtilmedikçe, ücretsizdir.

Aşağıdaki yazılı durumlarda, site yönetimi üyenin site kullanımını engelleyebilir ve aşağıdaki girişimlere karışan kişi veya kişiler hakkında kanuni haklarını saklı tutar:

1.a. Yanlış, düzensiz, eksik ve yanıltıcı bilgiler, genel ahlak kurallarına uygun olmayan ifadeler içeren ve Türkiye Cumhuriyeti yasalarıyla ters düşen bilgilerin siteye kaydedilmesi

1.b. Site içeriğinin izinsiz olarak kısmen veya tümüyle kopyalanması

1.c. Kullanıcılara verilen ya da kendi belirledikleri kullanıcı adı, şifre gibi bilgilerin, kullanım haklarının, üçüncü kişi ya da kuruluşlarla paylaşılmasından (bu bilgilerin kullanıcı dışındaki kişiler tarafından kullanılmasından) kaynaklanacak her türlü zarardan doğrudan Kullanıcı sorumludur. Aynı şekilde Kullanıcı, Internet ortamında bir başkasına ait IP adresi, elektronik posta adresi, kullanıcı adı gibi kişisel bilgileri kullanamayacağı gibi diğer kullanıcıların özel bilgilerine de izinsiz olarak ulaşamaz veya bunları kullanamaz. Kullanıcı bu şekilde bir kullanımdan dolayı doğabilecek her türlü hukuki ve cezai yükümlülüğü kabul etmiş sayılmaktadır.

1.d. Sitenin güvenliğini tehdit edecek, sitenin ve kullanılan yazılımların çalışmasını engelleyecek yazılımların kullanılması, faaliyetlerin yapılması, yapılmaya çalışılması ve bilgilerin alınması, silinmesi, değiştirilmesi

Name: rodi BANKEN & OBJEKTE
Description:
rodi BANKEN & OBJEKTE ist eine inhabergeführte Schreinerei mit dem Schwerpunkt auf der Objektausstattung. Wir sind im Bereich des hochwertigen Innenausbaus tätigt und bauen nicht einfach nur Möbel, sondern Unikate, welche es so nur einmal gibt. Wir planen, fertigen und montieren Möbel für Ihr Projekt. Wir beginnen da, wo der Standard aufhört, und erschaffen Räume, von denen man anderen erzählen muss. Ganz nach unserem Motto, Design trifft Funktion machen wir Ihr Projekt zu unserem Projekt.

Ist etwas „Made by rodi“, bezieht sich das nicht alleine auf handwerkliches Können oder technische Umsetzung. „Made by rodi“ bedeutet auch, dass kreative Ideen, innovative Ansätze und ungewöhnliche Umsetzungen in die Arbeit einfließen. Ein wichtiger Bestandteil sind auch die Erfahrungen aller Team-Mitglieder, die bei jedem Auftrag zum Tragen kommen. Denn nur, was sich positiv vom Herkömmlichen abhebt und unsere Kunden ganz und gar zufriedenstellt, verdient unser Gütesiegel. Schließlich geht es nicht darum, etwas gut zu machen. Wir wollen Sie begeistern.

rodi ist sicher nicht das einzige Unternehmen, das nach dem Motto „Geht nicht, gibt´s nicht“ arbeitet. Aber mit 60 Jahren Erfahrung im Rücken und einem engagierten, gut ausgebildeten Team wissen wir, dass es möglich ist, für unsere Kunden einmalige, unverwechselbare Konzepte zu entwickeln; Lösungen zu finden, die Ihre Anforderungen berücksichtigen und gleichzeitig etwas ganz Besonderes sind. Dabei behalten wir Baufortschritt, Kosten und Termine stets im Blick. Denn Ihr Projekt soll ja nicht nur unverwechselbar und bezahlbar werden – sondern auch fertig.

Ob es um Arbeitsmethoden, Denkweisen, Maschinenausstattung oder unsere Büroräume geht: Modern geht es immer zu. Denn nur durch ständige Fortbildung unserer Mitarbeiter, frische Ideen, Technologie, die auf dem neuesten Stand ist und ein zufriedenes Team können wir uns ganz auf eine Aufgabe konzentrieren: Ihr Projekt. Bei jedem Auftrag inklusive ist die persönliche Beratung und Bet

Name: Antique Floors
Description:
About Us

Established in 1985, Antique Floors has built a legacy on the foundation of time-honored craftsmanship and an unwavering commitment to quality. As a family-owned business spanning two generations, we have dedicated ourselves to the art and craft of bespoke and reclaimed wood flooring. Our work is not just about providing a product—it's about imparting a piece of history into every space we touch.

Our Philosophy

At Antique Floors, we believe in the understated elegance of authentic, handcrafted wood floors. Our founder, Patrick S., laid the cornerstone of our philosophy: "Strong character, authentic origin, and uncompromised quality." These principles guide us as we create flooring that stands the test of time, both in durability and design.

Our Products

Our product range is a tribute to the trees that stand tall through the ages. From the intricate patterns of bespoke new flooring to the naturally weathered beauty of reclaimed wood, each product in our collection is a testament to the beauty of nature and the skill of our artisans. Production is based in EU. 


Our Promise

As we continue to grow and embrace the future, we hold fast to our roots. Every interaction with Antique Floors is built on a foundation of professionalism, with a calm and elegant demeanor that reflects our brand's character. For architects, interior designers, luxury builders, and all our B2B partners, we promise a product and service that exceeds expectations.

Connect with us to explore the possibilities of wood flooring crafted with history, designed for longevity, and personalized for your space.

#AntiqueFloors #BespokeWoodFlooring #ReclaimedWood #SustainableDesign #FamilyBusiness #Craftsmanship #Authenticity #Heritage

Name: EARTHY TIMBER Ltd
Description:
Sustainable, Luxury, Modern Wooden Furniture in the UK.

Using unique, developed in house wood processing and drying technology EARTHY TIMBER transforms fungal, cancerous, infected timber into sound and durable wood and further into modern luxury wooden tables, desks and countertops.

Our innovative process of wood drying revitalises formerly compromised timber, turning it into healthy, durable materials for stunning tables, desks, and countertops that define contemporary elegance and environmental responsibility.

With satisfied customers both nationally and internationally, when it comes to wood, we turn nature’s bounty into stunning wooden dining room tables, executive desks, breakfast bars, kitchen islands & conference tables of any size.

Our wooden furniture and countertops maximise the beauty of nature, but with an artistic, modern twist to deliver striking, artisan perfection. Our work is modern, exclusive and cutting edge. With its natural patterns and stunning features our wooden tables, desks and tops cater to elite, discriminating tastes.

We have in depth expertise in wood, resin and metal enhancement techniques to best reflect light; the natural, live or bark edges of wood plank can also be preserved to display to most subtle or earthy & dramatic effect.

Here at EARTHY TIMBER we have an eye for detail and an innate knowledge and technology of how to cure the unhealthy piece of wood into an object of astonishing beauty that will last for generations to come.

ETHICAL BUSINESS
Ethical behavior: Conduct business with integrity, honesty, and respect towards customers, employees, and stakeholders. Avoid any deceptive or fraudulent practices.
Compliance with laws: WINTAM CO., LTD complies with all relevant laws, regulations, and industry standards applicable to the business.
Confidentiality: Maintain the confidentiality of customer information, employee information, trade secrets, and other confidential information.
Conflict of interest: Disclose any potential or actual conflicts of interest, and avoid situations where personal interests may conflict with the interests of the business.
Fair competition: Compete fairly and ethically in the marketplace. Do not engage in anti-competitive behavior such as price-fixing, market allocation, or collusion.

Hello, I'm Tammy Tinder, the Owner and Artisan at Tinder Wood Works in Carlsbad, California. It's a pleasure to meet you!

At Tinder Wood Works, my partner, Mike Tinder, and I are dedicated to crafting exquisite, handcrafted solid wood furniture. We specialize in a variety of tables, including dining, benches, sofa, console, end, coffee, and outdoor tables. Our unique selling point? We're committed to offering these meticulously crafted pieces at affordable prices.

Our philosophy is simple yet profound: we believe furniture should transcend mere functionality. It should be a reflection of your unique style and serve as a timeless centerpiece that brings families together for generations to come. Located in San Diego County, we put our hearts into every detail of our handcrafted pieces, ensuring they are tailor-made to meet your specific needs.

Custom tables are our forte, and we relish bringing your vision to life. Whether you're in search of a dining table for grand family gatherings or a coffee table that harmonizes with your home's aesthetic, we collaborate closely with you to select the perfect style, size, and stain that seamlessly integrates with your surroundings. Your imagination fuels our creativity, and we're here to transform it into reality.

Sustainability matters deeply to us. We source our solid wood materials exclusively from the USA, prioritizing renewable and eco-friendly resources. Solid wood possesses a natural elegance that synthetic materials simply cannot replicate. When you invest in our furniture, you're not only acquiring quality but also contributing to a healthier environment.

If you have a vision for custom, handcrafted furniture that mirrors your distinct style and values, let's combine our talents and make that vision a reality. Discover the joy of owning furniture that is not only visually stunning but also built to withstand the test of time.

Our customers value the quality of service and products we offer -  simple, functional well made items using the best sustainable natural materials possible.

We work with a few select sawmills in the UK who carefully source all of the timber that goes into our products. Our timber is FSC approved and harvested sustainably from managed forests. Much of what we use is grown in the UK, some within a few miles of the workshop.

In 2022 from our little corner of sleepy Devon we've sent wooden keyrings to hotels & businesses in 13 countries - helping to make the world less plasticky, one keyring at a time.

-	Folyamatos raktárkészlet – azonnali kiszolgálás a több mint, 3500 m²-es biatorbágyi raktárunkból
-	Megbízható szállítás – határidőre, pontos mennyiségben és minőségben

Szolgáltatásaink
-	Országos kiszállítás – gyors és rugalmas logisztika
-	Személyre szabott szaktanácsadás szakértőinktől
-	Precíz lapszabászat az Ön igényeire szabva
-	Ingyenes termékminták és helyszíni bemutatók

Több mint 25 éve partnereink sikeréért!

Description:
With over 17 years of expertise in the Vietnamese wood market, EASTERN LUMBER CO., LTD is a prominent importer and distributor of raw wood materials. We source our wood from renowned suppliers across the globe, including America, Europe, Africa, Brazil, Chile, New Zealand, and Australia.
Founded in 2007, EASTERN LUMBER CO., LTD has firmly adhered to the principle of "TRUST". This commitment has established us as a dependable partner for numerous furniture exporting manufacturers and constructional projects nationwide.
We pride ourselves on being one of the pioneering companies in Vietnam to import and distribute FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) certified wood. This certification underscores our dedication to responsible and sustainable forest management.
FSC-certified wood enables our customers to effortlessly verify the origin, extraction processes, and legal production of finished products. It also ensures compliance with environmental protection standards and exporting regulations to demanding markets such as America, Europe, Japan, and Korea.
At EASTERN LUMBER CO., LTD, we strive not only to provide high-quality wood materials but also to foster lasting relationships based on mutual trust and shared success.

Name: Rose Custom Cabinets
Description:
Rose Custom Cabinets is a full-service custom cabinetry and architectural millwork company proudly serving residential and commercial clients across the country. Founded in 1984 and located in Northern Illinois, we’ve built a strong reputation for delivering high-quality, precision-crafted millwork that blends timeless craftsmanship with modern innovation.

What began as a small shop in Deerfield, Illinois, quickly gained traction thanks to the dedication to quality, detail, and customer service. As the demand for custom cabinetry and built-in solutions grew, so did the company—expanding its capabilities from laminate cabinetry to full custom wood, veneer, and architectural millwork projects. Today, Rose Custom Cabinets operates out of a 22,000-square-foot facility in Northern, Illinois, with a team of 25+ skilled craftsmen, designers, engineers, and installers.

From luxury residential projects—like custom kitchens, bathrooms, closets, and home offices—to complex commercial installations in restaurants, retail, medical offices, and clubs, we manage every phase of the project: design consultation, estimating, engineering, fabrication, finishing, and installation. Our team works closely with homeowners, builders, architects, and interior designers to deliver personalized solutions tailored to each client’s vision and space.

In 2025, leadership transitioned to Alex Kadushin, bringing renewed energy, business strategy, and a continued commitment to craftsmanship and customer care. Under his leadership, we’ve enhanced our use of technology, streamlined operations, and expanded our reach while preserving the hands-on, detail-driven work we’re known for.

At Rose Custom Cabinets, we don’t just build cabinets—we build long-term relationships, beautifully functional spaces, and a legacy of quality that speaks for itself.

Name: Pacific Timber Export Corporation
Description:
Pacific Timber Export Corporation, popularly known as PATECO, specializes in producing a wide array of wood-based products like doors,  jambs, mouldings, S4S,  and other wooden components.

For decades,  PATECO has been catering to the various project requirements of real estate developers, architects, contractors and builders in the Philippines.

We currently operate 5 company-owned retail outlets in the major home depots within Metro Manila and Pampanga. We also supply to numerous dealers and distributors in Luzon, Visayas and Mindanao.

With our vast experience, PATECO is indeed a reliable partner for your construction supply needs!

Name: Jordi Giribets Montal S.L.U.
Description:
Con más de 20 años de experiencia en madera tratada, somos especialistas en asesoría, suministro y ejecución de proyectos en madera para exteriores. Garantizamos soluciones duraderas, estéticas y sostenibles para la construcción al aire libre.

En Jordi Giribets Montal, contamos con aserradero, autoclave y almacén propio, lo que nos permite fabricar madera de alta calidad y larga duración, ideal para construcción y carpintería en exteriores.

Trabajamos con tratamiento autoclave clase 4, el más recomendado para maderas expuestas a agentes externos como suelo y agua dulce, así como para fines estructurales (postes telefónicos, jardinería, parques, entre otros).

Ofrecemos proyectos integrales que abarcan diseño, fabricación e instalación de estructuras de madera para exteriores, respaldados por una red de expertos en montaje.

Name: VN Easterly
Description:
VN Easterly Exporting Wood Products and Biomass Worldwide

Introduction:
VN Easterly is a reputable company based in Vietnam, specializing in the export of various wood products, including timber, wood by-products, and biomass materials. With a strong commitment to quality and sustainability, we cater to the global market by supplying a wide range of wood-based commodities, such as sawn timber, wood chips, compressed wood pellets, sawdust, wood fuel, and various types of timber boards.

Our Product Range:

Sawn Timber: We offer high-quality sawn timber in different dimensions and wood species. Our timber is carefully processed to meet international standards and cater to diverse construction and woodworking needs.

Wood Chips: Our wood chips are derived from sustainably sourced timber and are ideal for applications in the pulp and paper industry, as well as for biomass energy production. We ensure consistent quality and sizing to meet the specifications of our global customers.

Compressed Wood Pellets: As a leading supplier of compressed wood pellets, we provide a reliable source of clean and efficient biomass fuel. Our pellets are made from compressed sawdust and shavings, ensuring high energy density and low emissions.

Sawdust and Wood Fuel: We offer sawdust and wood fuel, which serve as valuable raw materials for various industries. They can be used for heating, power generation, or as inputs in the production of wood-based products.

Timber Boards: VN Easterly  also supplies a wide range of timber boards, including plywood, MDF (Medium-Density Fiberboard), and other specialized boards. These products meet stringent quality standards and cater to the needs of furniture manufacturers, construction companies, and interior designers.

Sustainability and Quality Assurance:
At VN Easterly, we prioritize sustainability and environmental responsibility. Our wood products are sourced from well-managed forests and adhere to international regu

Name: Casas TinyHouse España
Description:
En mi taller, utilizo únicamente maderas de alta calidad provenientes de fuentes sostenibles y responsables. Me aseguro de seleccionar cuidadosamente cada pieza de madera para garantizar su durabilidad y belleza duradera. Además, estoy constantemente aprendiendo y experimentando con nuevas técnicas y diseños para estar al tanto de las últimas tendencias y poder ofrecer a mis clientes piezas modernas y funcionales.

Como carpintero de madera, me encanta trabajar en estrecha colaboración con mis clientes. Escucho atentamente sus ideas, necesidades y preferencias, y luego las combino con mi experiencia y conocimiento para crear un diseño personalizado que se ajuste perfectamente a sus deseos. Me aseguro de mantener una comunicación clara y abierta durante todo el proceso, para que el resultado final supere sus expectativas.

En resumen, como carpintero de madera, mi pasión por la naturaleza, la artesanía tradicional y la creación de piezas únicas me impulsa a ofrecer trabajos de alta calidad que destaquen por su belleza y funcionalidad. Estoy comprometido con la satisfacción del cliente y siempre estoy dispuesto a asumir nuevos desafíos creativos.

Gracias por su atención y por darme la oportunidad de compartir mi pasión con ustedes. Estoy emocionado por las posibilidades que el futuro me depara como carpintero de madera y espero poder colaborar con ustedes en proyectos increíbles.

Name: FORMA S.L
Description:
Nuestros Valores - FORMA

F- Familia: Somos una empresa familiar donde cada proyecto se trata con el mismo cuidado y compromiso que un legado generacional.
O- Oficio: Nuestra experiencia y habilidad en el manejo de la madera son la base de cada trabajo, reflejando el orgullo y la dedicación que tenemos en nuestro arte.
R- Rapidez: Comprometidos con la eficacia, garantizamos procesos ágiles y respuestas rápidas, asegurando que cada entrega cumpla con nuestros altos estándares de calidad y tiempo.
M- Madera: Nuestra pasión por la madera se refleja en cada producto que entregamos, destacando la belleza natural y la durabilidad que solo la mejor madera puede ofrecer.
A- Actitud: Fomentamos una actitud positiva y proactiva, enfrentando desafíos con optimismo y buscando constantemente la excelencia en todo lo que hacemos.

Estos valores no solo representan lo que somos, sino que también guían cada decisión y cada interacción con nuestros clientes y colaboradores.

Name: Novells Sash Windows
Description:
At Novells, we don’t just install windows - we craft enduring architectural features that honour your building’s heritage while enhancing modern comfort.

We specialise in double-glazed, handcrafted timber sash windows for conservation homes, period properties, and high-spec renovations across the UK.

Whether you’re an architect, conservation officer, or homeowner, our mission is simple: deliver the elegance of the past with the performance of the future—without stress, delays, or compromise.

Why Choose Novells?

Designed to Pass Planning
Our windows are conservation-area approved in boroughs like Kensington & Chelsea, Richmond, Dulwich, and beyond. We liaise directly with planners and architects, prepare full technical drawings, and handle the red tape so you don’t have to.

Engineered to Last
Choose from Accoya (guaranteed 50 years above ground) or treated Scandinavian Redwood, precision-joined by expert craftspeople and factory-sprayed with microporous finishes. No flaking. No peeling. No repainting for years.

Flawless, Fast Installation
Our trusted in-house team is known for respectful, spotless, one-day installs – no mess, no stress, no snags. Backed by our Crafted-to-Last Promise and 10-Year Guarantee.

Every Detail Thought Through
From classic ironmongery and secure sash stops to heritage paint colours that match Farrow & Ball, Little Greene, or your custom RAL – we ensure nothing looks like an "add-on".

What We Offer:

 Handcrafted Timber Sash Windows
 Planning Application Support
 FENSA Certification + Insurance Guarantees
 Colour-Matched Finishes
 Spotless Installation with "No-Mess Promise"
 Concierge-Style Service for Architects & Homeowners

Who We Serve:

Architects in heritage and high-end residential
Homeowners in conservation areas
Interior designers and property developers
Clients who demand timeless design and flawless delivery

Trusted by:

Victoria & Albert Museum | Vivienne Westwood | London’s Finest Homes

Name: OKU PARQUET, S.L.
Description:
Parquet Oku S.L. es un especialista del mundo del parquet.

Somos el distribuidor oficial para España de los parquets ESCO, parquet europeo proveniente de los bosques de Ucrania y Polonia, de madera de roble 100% natural, al aceite. Estos parquets son de alta calidad y han sido pensados para satisfacer a una clientela de alto standing. Un público que conoce las altas prestaciones de este material noble en cuento a estética, aislamiento y calidad.

El parquet de roble natural viene utlizándose durante más de 5 siglos como pavimento de calidad. Le invitamos a redescubrir la magia de esta tradición de confianza con seis colecciones atemporales. Desde un aspecto rústico con nudos distintivos hasta un carácter más sutil y suave, cada aspecto inherente a esta madera única habla de un estilo diferente.

Pero sólo con la cuidadosa artesanía y la experiencia que le podemos ofrecer, estos suelos despliegan todo el potencial de su belleza. Le ayudaremos a descubrir qué estilos, colores y acabados se pueden adaptar mejor a los gustos de sus clientes para crear un suelo completamente único y personlizado.


Parquet Oku S.L., además, dispone de una amplia gama de parquets laminados y vinílicos, más funcionales para uso comercial o diario, con elevados niveles de paso y desgaste.

Nuestro equipo de instaladores formados y preparados para instalar cualquier parquet o tarima, pérgolas, etc. le ayudará en todo el proceso para hacerle sentir cómo y completamente respaldado.


Pídanos un presupuesto sin compromiso!
#parquet, #parquetmadera, #parquetmaderanatural, #parquetroblenatural, #parquetaltostanding, #flooring, #pavimentos, #pavimentosmadera, #woodflooring, #pergolas, #tarimas, #tarimaflotante

Name: Artis Vocontii
Description:
ARTIS VOCONTII — Artisanat d’art, matières nobles & créations singulières

Artis Vocontii réunit le bois, la pierre et le métal dans des pièces uniques, façonnées à la main, où chaque matière trouve son propre langage.

À la croisée de l’artisanat d’art, des techniques anciennes (comme le yakisugi) et d’une démarche écoresponsable ancrée dans l’upcycling, je crée des objets bruts, sensibles, parfois inattendus — conçus pour sublimer un lieu ou révéler la présence d’un autre objet. Coffrets, présentoirs, sculptures fonctionnelles ou meubles revisités : chaque création est pensée comme un dialogue entre geste et matière.

Tout est réalisé sur-mesure, dans mon atelier situé à Vaison-la-Romaine (Vaucluse), avec des matériaux nobles, sélectionnés pour leur singularité.

Je collabore avec des architectes, décorateurs, collectionneurs et particuliers en quête d’objets porteurs de sens.

 Pour toute demande personnalisée ou projet de collaboration artistique : contactez-moi directement.

—

ARTIS VOCONTII — Fine craft, noble materials & unique creations

Artis Vocontii brings together wood, stone and metal into handcrafted, one-of-a-kind pieces — where each material speaks its own language.

Rooted in fine craftsmanship, ancient techniques (such as yakisugi), and a committed upcycling approach, I design raw yet refined objects intended to enhance a space or elevate a meaningful item. From custom cases and display stands to functional sculptures and reimagined furniture, every creation emerges from the dialogue between gesture and material.

All pieces are custom-made in my workshop in Vaison-la-Romaine, southern France, using carefully selected noble materials.

I collaborate with interior designers, architects, collectors, and individuals who value meaning, authenticity, and thoughtful design.

 Feel free to get in touch for custom commissions or artistic collaborations.

Name: Fujian Wood
Description:
We are a 50,000 + sq ft  industrial complex located in one of the most traditional regions of woodworking in China: Fujian Province. 

Fujian wood industry has a long history, dating back to over 3000 years ago, during the Shang and Zhou dynasties, as shown by the amazing archeological discovery of the turtle wooden plate unearthed in 1978 in the Wuyi Mountain. 

We are the largest manufacturer of SUGI (Japanese Cedar) in Fujian Province, and export our products to United States, Canada, Europe, Korea, and even Japan.
 
That is right: we export JAPANESE CEDAR even to JAPAN! We believe this is the best way to show how good our quality is!

Name: Sheth Brothers
Description:
Sheth Brothers is a trusted plywood supplier and manufacturer in Ahmedabad, delivering premium-quality plywood and engineered wood solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects. Our product range includes durable, termite-resistant, and eco-friendly plywood designed to meet the highest standards of strength, performance, and sustainability.

With decades of expertise and a strong customer-first approach, we specialize in providing high-grade plywood sheets, block boards, flush doors, laminates, and woodworking materials to contractors, interior designers, builders, and retailers.
We are known for:

Consistent quality

Competitive pricing

On-time delivery

Wide range of plywood & panel products

Reliable long-term partnerships

Whether you’re building a home, furnishing an office, or sourcing materials for industrial use, Sheth Brothers is your dependable plywood partner in Ahmedabad.

Name: SorenWood سورن چوب 1st degree connection
Description:
شرکت سورن چوب به پشتوانه نزدیک به دو دهه فعالیت و پیشتازی در عرصه سازه ها و محصولات چوبی شامل پرگولا چوبی ، آلاچیق چوبی ، فنس چوبی ، کلبه چوبی ، نمای چوبی ، فلاور باکس و دیگر سازه های فضای باز مشغول به فعالیت می باشد . رزومه شرکت سورن چوب، در میان شرکت های همکار بی نظیر است و همین امر گویای پیشتازی سورن چوب در این صنعت می باشد. کلیه سازه ها با استفاده از چوب های فرآوری شده و رنگ های مخصوص فضای باز که موجب مقاومت و دوام دراز مدت سازه ها در برابر رطوبت و اشعه خورشید می شوند، ساخته می شوند. کلمات کلیدی: روف گاردن، ترمو وود، طراحی و اجرای سازه های فضای باز، آلاچیق چوبی ، پرگولا، آربور، فنس جوبی، نرده چوبی، میز و نیمکت، فلاورباکس، اجرای فود کورت و پروژه های رستورانی، و دکوراسیون داخلی

SorenWood has been established for more than a decade, as a leading Iranian company specializing in producing various kinds of outdoor wood products. The line of products includes but is not limited to pergolas, gazebos, cabinets, wooden bridges, wooden extensions for buildings, and beach cafeterias. Our experts do the best in innovative design and high-quality manufacture. Customer is the most important for us and we do all we can to make our customers satisfied.

Name: Telifa
Description:
Miért Telifa a cégünk neve? A Telifa egy speciális eljárás - hivatalos nevén telítés - korhadás és féregkárok ellen. Az eljárás során a fát kívül és belül egyaránt egy speciális, svédországból hozott receptúra alapján hosszútávú védelemmel látjuk el. Telíteni a vevő által hozott faanyagot is lehetséges, 15 éves garanciát vállalunk a telítésre.

A telítés mellett fűrészáru nagykereskedésként és fatelepként is működünk.

Termékeink:

Mikrobordás teraszburkolat:
Gyönyörű és tartós kültéri teraszépítő faelemek. Két fajta vastagságban elérhető.

Magaságyás:
Legújabb termékcsaládunk bármely tagja gyönyörűen mutat a kertben. Nyolc különböző méretben elérhető.

Fűrészárú:
A Telifa széles termékpalettát biztosít kezelt, jó minőségű borovifenyő és lucfenyő fűrészáruból, olyan felhasználóknak, akik kül- vagy beltéri építészeti faszerkezetek létesítésénél nem kívánnak lemondani a Telifa időtállóságának és gazdaságosságának előnyeiről.

Kötőelemek:
Kínálatunkban megtalálható minőségi faanyagoknál ajánljuk az általunk is forgalmazott minőségi kötőelemek - vagyis csavarok - használatát.

Telítés:
Speciális Telifa eljárás, amely biztosítja a hosszú távú ellenállóságot és védelmet, korhadás és féregkárok ellen. Az olcsó, "mártogatós" megoldásokkal szemben eljárásunk hosszútávú és garantált külső, illetve belső védelmet biztosít.

Tervezés:
Magas minőségű 2 és 3 dimenziós látványtervekkel segítünk vizualizálni az Ön elképzeléseit. Egyéni tervek készítése az áruk megrendelése esetén ingyenes.

Kivitelezés:
Nemcsak a tervezést, de akár a kivitelezést is biztosítjuk, hogy tervei a lehető legjobb minőségben valósuljanak meg.

Szállítás:
Megrendelt termékeit az ország bármely pontjára kiszállítjuk, gyorsan és pontosan.
A szállítás a Hatvanban található központunkból történik.

Name: THE WOOD STUDIO
Description: Welcome to The Wood Studio, India’s leading wood art sanctuary, where creativity meets craftsmanship. Each piece of termite and borer-proof teak wood is meticulously curated, transforming spaces with captivating designs for offices, homes, resorts, and beyond.

Name: Artisano
Description: En Artisano, nos especializamos en ofrecer servicios integrales de carpintería, grabado láser para rótulos, señalización, merchandising y ejecución de obras y montajes. Como expertos en el sector, entendemos la importancia de una gestión eficaz en cada proyecto para garantizar resultados excepcionales. Como Project Manager, nuestra función principal es coordinar todas las etapas del proyecto, desde la planificación inicial hasta la finalización, asegurando que se cumplan los plazos, presupuestos y estándares de calidad establecidos. Supervisamos de cerca cada aspecto del trabajo, desde la selección de materiales hasta la gestión de equipos y la resolución de cualquier conflicto que pueda surgir. Estamos comprometidos a ofrecer un servicio excepcional que supere las expectativas y brinde resultados de la más alta calidad.

Name: Floor Expert
Description:
Παραδοσιακά και Αυθεντικά ή Μοντέρνα και Πρωτοποριακά ;

Αν ανακαινίζετε, συντηρείτε ή τοποθετείτε για πρώτη φορά ξύλινο, βινυλικό ή laminate δάπεδο, βρίσκεστε στην σωστή ιστοσελίδα.
Είμαστε οι κατάλληλοι τεχνίτες για να σας προτείνουμε το καλύτερο δάπεδο σύμφωνα με τις επιθυμίες και τις ανάγκες σας. Βρισκόμαστε στο Παγκράτι, στην Αθήνα και δραστηριοποιούμαστε πάνω από 26 χρόνια στον χώρο των ξύλινων δαπέδων και των εναλλακτικών επιλογών για τα πατώματα.

Εκτός από την εμπειρία, διαθέτουμε και προσιτές τιμές. Προσφέρουμε τις επιλογές που χρειάζεστε για να επιλέξετε το ιδανικό δάπεδο για σας. Καρφωτό, κολλητό ή πλωτό δάπεδο, όποια και αν είναι η επιθυμία σας, για οποιοδήποτε χώρο, οικιακό ή επαγγελματικό, εσωτερικό ή εξωτερικό. Με το έμπειρο και εξειδικευμένο προσωπικό και τον σύγχρονο τεχνολογικό εξοπλισμό που διαθέτουμε, παρέχουμε ποιοτική και εγγυημένη εργασία, προσφέροντας πάντα το καλύτερο αποτέλεσμα.

Name: Four O Two
Description:
Since 1960, our family-owned wood factory has been dedicated to providing high-quality wood products to customers. What began as a small business venture, driven by a passion for woodworking and a strong desire to create something meaningful, has grown into one of the leading wood factories in the region. Over the years, we have earned a reputation for producing top-quality wood products that are durable, refined, and eco-friendly.

As the new generation carries forward this legacy, we remain steadfast in upholding the values instilled by our founder—honesty, hard work, and an unwavering commitment to quality. We continuously innovate and explore new ways to enhance our products and services while honoring our roots as a family business that cherishes personal relationships and customer satisfaction.

Whether it’s custom-made furniture, flooring, or other wood products, we are dedicated to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service. Our commitment to excellence ensures that we will continue shaping the wood industry for many years to come.

Name: Paulownia Brasil
Description:
A Paulownia Brasil desenvolve projetos florestais estruturados para proprietários de terras interessados em transformar áreas com pelo menos 10 hectares em ativos de longo prazo com baixa complexidade operacional.

Trabalhamos com a implantação técnica de Paulownia, unindo dois pilares estratégicos:

• Produção de Madeira de alta qualidade, com demanda consolidada no mercado estrangeiro
• Créditos de carbono, que podem gerar receita já nos primeiros anos de projeto

Nosso foco é atender proprietários de áreas rurais que procuram clareza técnica, previsibilidade e proteção patrimonial sem a necessidade de presença diária no campo.

O ponto de partida é sempre o mesmo:
Uma avaliação de viabilidade da área, combinando solo, clima, logística, madeira e carbono no mesmo plano.

Transformamos a sua área em um ativo organizado, com visão de cadeia produtiva e planejamento de longo prazo.

Para mais informações:
www.paulowniabrasil.com

Name: WoodEsthetic
Description:
Ontdek de kunst van houtbewerking met woodEsthetic 

Bij WoodEsthetic brengen we de natuurlijke schoonheid van hout tot leven in elk uniek stuk dat we maken.  Met passie en vakmanschap creëren we hoogwaardige, op maat gemaakte meubels en interieurelementen die je huis transformeren tot een warme en stijlvolle ruimte.

Van strak design tot rustieke charme, onze premium houtbewerking biedt de perfecte mix van esthetiek en functionaliteit. Elk project wordt met de hand vervaardigd, met oog voor detail en liefde voor het ambacht. 

Laat je inspireren door de tijdloze elegantie van hout. Of je nu op zoek bent naar een uniek meubelstuk of een complete make-over van je interieur, bij WoodEsthetic ben je aan het juiste adres. 

Volg ons voor een kijkje achter de schermen en om op de hoogte te blijven van onze nieuwste creaties. Samen maken we jouw woonruimte écht bijzonder!

Name: Grupo Lamas Lucus, S.L.

Description: Mathewson Standard is a high end cabinet and furniture making company, based out of Charleston South Carolina we specialize in custom cabinets, and flat pack furniture for online retail distribution.

Name: Pecat Plus
Description:
Pecat Plus was founded with the purpose of bringing better lighting solutions o all kinds of environments, based on the more than 20 years of experience of the designing team in the lighting industry. It is the creator of the brand intage+ which is a unique, nature inspired and handmade lighting made from wood. 

The lighting from Vintage+ is made in a way that is enriching every home or office with any kind of design with a warm and harmonious feeling all with the purpose of  inspiring others to create and maintain a sustainable lighting principle, which contributes to the betterment of our environment and takes great care to preserve our nature for future generations.

We put our focus to establishing our brand worldwide with distributors and encouraging them to follow in our footsteps and contribute to their local community and environment to leave a positive footprint all over the globe.

Name: Seni Ukir Bakawali
Description: Seni Ukir Bakawali, a beacon of excellence in fine wood carving, is a company rooted in the rich heritage of traditional Malay craftsmanship. Founded by Norhaiza Noordin, a celebrated master craftsman recognized as Warisan Kebangsaan Orang Hidup (2018) and Tokoh Kraf Negara (2022), the company embodies a legacy of over 40 years in the art of fine wood carving. Every piece produced by Seni Ukir Bakawali tells a story of cultural pride, intricate artistry, and timeless elegance.

Name: Fredy Bieri AG | Schreinerei Bieri
Description:
Die Schreinerei Fredy Bieri AG führt alle Arbeiten aus, die im Innenausbau vorkommen. Dazu gehört der Bau von Küchen- und Badezimmermöbeln, Massivholztischen, Stühlen, Schränken, Türen und Betten welche auch in unserem Ausstellungsraum in Schötz präsentiert sind. In der Filiale in Triengen wird eine kompetente Beratung über Parkett, Vinyl und Laminate bis zum Verlegen geboten.

Alle Möbelstücke werden von A bis Z in der eigenen Werkstatt in Schötz hergestellt.

Name: Troger Holz Ges.m.b.H
Description:
In mittlerweile sechster Generation blickt Troger Holz auf eine spannende Geschichte eines Tiroler Traditionsunternehmens zurück, in der seit jeher der Enthusiasmus, aus dem Werkstoff Holz hochwertige und intelligente Produkte zu schaffen, stets im Mittelpunkt steht. 

Als 100%iges Familienunternehmen sehen wir uns in der Verpflichtung, Werte wie Nachhaltigkeit, Beständigkeit, Sicherheit, Qualität und Treue mit besonderem Eifer zu fokussieren. Diese Parameter stellen wir neben innovativen Lösungen vor allem durch ca. 200 geschickte Hände und 100 schlaue Köpfe sicher, die als unser wichtigstes Kapital gelten.

Name: Schreinerhelden GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Wir sind da, wo du bist: online
Unsere Leidenschaft sind Schränke und Digitalisierung. 

Wir wollen unsere Kundinnen und Kunden dort abholen, wo sie uns suchen: im Internet. Durch unsere Online-Beratung können wir schnell und unkompliziert ins Projekt starten. 
Egal ob Einbauschrank, Stauraumschrank, Kleiderschrank oder Garderobe – alle Möbel nach Maß werden in unserer Schreinerei in Murrhardt von Hand gefertigt und daraufhin vor Ort montiert. 

Wir wachsen - wachse auch du über dich hinaus!
Egal ob du 1,50 oder 1,90 m bist – bei uns kannst du über dich hinauswachsen! Wir setzen auf unser Team und stärken einander den Rücken. Wir kehren die Sägespäne der letzten Jahrzehnte ab und gehen das Schreinerhandwerk frisch und digital an. 

Wir sind (k)eine normale Schreinerei – wir sind Schreinerhelden.

Name: Mountain River Life
Description:
Mountain-inspired apparel and woodwork, designed and built in Calgary, Alberta.

Founders Erik Paul and Graham Kelba grew up with the mountains in their backyard. Now, they build a brand and community to help people feel the magic of the mountains in their daily lives.

Adventure Always.

Name: Exotic Woods Indonesia
Description:
At Exotic Woods Indonesia is where luxury meets craftsmanship in every exquisite detail.  Indulge in the timeless beauty of our premium wooden products, meticulously handcrafted from rare exotic woods found only in Indonesia. Each piece is a masterpiece, tailored to elevate your interior design to unparalleled levels of sophistication.

At Exotic Woods Indonesia, quality isn't just a standard—it's our obsession. We spare no effort in sourcing the finest materials and employing master artisans to ensure perfection in every creation. From custom interior design pieces to bespoke furniture, our dedication to excellence shines through in every curve and grain.

Experience the epitome of elegance with our exclusive range of wooden treasures, crafted with passion and reverence for nature's bounty. Transform your space with the warmth and richness of our exquisite offerings, designed to enchant the most discerning connoisseurs.

Embrace luxury. Embrace sophistication. Embrace nature's finest treasures with Exotic Woods Indonesia.

Name: Atelier buffard
Description:
Atelier Buffard : Fabricant français de ballons en bois massif pour la promotion d'entreprises, de clubs sportifs et la décoration. Nos ballons personnalisables sont adaptés aux besoins publicitaires, décoratifs ou comme trophées uniques.


 Nos points forts :

    Sur mesure : Gravure et finitions personnalisées, pièces uniques ou 
     séries.
    Qualité : Usinage 3D précis, bois massif ou matériaux tendres.
    Réactivité : Retour sous 48h pour les demandes spécifiques.
    Made in France : Production locale en Maine-et-Loire.

 Fondé en 2019 par François Buffard, l'atelier allie artisanat et innovation, créant des ballons au design vintage inspirés des anciens modèles en cuir.

Name: Panmar Wood
Description: Jesteśmy częścią grupy Panmar założonej w 1990 roku, specjalizującą się w produkcji blatów kuchennych. Od ponad trzech dekad tworzymy produkty, które łączą tradycyjne rzemiosło z nowoczesną technologią.

Name: Pallet Movers
Description:
Pallet Movers is a family owned and operated wood pallet manufacturing company servicing Austin, Houston, San Antonio, Dallas, and many other surrounding cities in Texas. We understand how critical quality wood pallets are to the success and efficiency of your business.

We offer quality new and recycled pallets that are essential to the adequate protection and proper shipment of your goods. We have experience with helping both small and large businesses with their standard 48X40 wood pallets and their custom wood pallets built to the specifications they need. We also offer heat treated pallets, and pallets in various quantities including truckloads of pallets.

Pallet Recycling:
The recycling of wood pallets is critical in today’s environment in order to preserve precious resources for future generations. Pallet Movers offers recycled wood pallets that are an integral part of this effort to provide businesses the ability to source quality wood pallets both sustainably and responsibly.

Need your pallets shipped? Although we are located in the Austin, Texas area, we offer shipping to every major city in Texas as well as smaller surrounding cities.

Name: Beizhiqi Wooden Toys Co., Ltd.
Description:
Bezhiqi Wooden Products Co., LTD was established on August 15, 2017.
Our diverse product range includes animals, famous landmarks, vehicles, planes, furniture models, and more. The highlight of our offerings is the ability to personalize our products to suit your needs.
 
We offer customization options for logos, packaging, and even the puzzles themselves. For example, you can have your company's logo printed on the puzzles to use as promotional gifts or for resale. Furthermore, we have experience in developing new products that we do not currently have in our portfolio. If there is a specific item, such as a particular building, that you are interested in, we can work together to develop a new product.

Name: KNOCK WOODWORKS
Description:
Welcome to Knock Wood Works, where craftsmanship meets customization in the world of furniture and woodworks manufacturing.

At Knock Wood Works, we pride ourselves on transforming your visions into tangible, timeless pieces. With a passion for precision and a dedication to quality, we specialize in creating bespoke furniture and woodworks tailored to your unique needs and preferences.

Our skilled artisans combine traditional techniques with modern innovation to craft pieces that elevate spaces and inspire admiration. Whether it's custom-made furniture for residential or commercial spaces, architectural woodworks, or specialty items, we bring your ideas to life with meticulous attention to detail and unparalleled craftsmanship.

Collaboration is at the heart of what we do. We work closely with our clients, architects, and designers to understand their vision, preferences, and specifications, ensuring that every piece we create exceeds expectations.

Join us in celebrating the artistry of woodworking and the beauty of personalized craftsmanship. Connect with Knock Wood Works to explore how we can elevate your spaces with our bespoke furniture and woodworks solutions.

Name: EUROFUSTERS S.L.
Description:
Realizamos la fabricación en madera de todo tipo de obra nueva, rehabilitaciones y reformas, viviendas privadas e instituciones públicas.

Llevamos a cabo obras de grandes dimensiones para el sector público y privado:

-. Centros de enseñanza, guarderías.
-. Centros de asistencia primaria, hospitales generales y especializados en centros de salud mental, clínicas dentales …
-. Centros cívicos, residencias de tercera edad, casas de cultura …
-. Museos y exposiciones temporales. Pabellones de exposiciones.
-. Trabajos integrales para edificios corporativos, de oficinas y empresas.
-. Decoración integral de vestíbulos y escaleras para la atención al público.
-. Sedes y agencias de entidades bancarias y de seguros.
-. Tiendas y comercios en general.
-. Reformas dedicadas a la carpintería en edificios patrimoniales

Decoración, mobiliario a medida y reformas a particulares:

Nos encargamos del montaje, colocación y adecuación de las estructuras fabricadas, asegurando un acabado y servicio personalizado y profesional, priorizando la calidad ante todo.

-. Asesoramiento, proyecto y presupuesto sobre decoración y reformas.
-. Mobiliario a medida para comedores, dormitorios, vestidores, buhardillas, bodegas, etc.
-. Baños y cocinas integrales a medida con todos los procesos: coordinación con el resto de industriales, suministramos electrodomésticos y complementos.
-. Puertas, escaleras y barandillas de todo tipo, incluido vidrio y metal.
-. Equipamiento de iluminación adicional para el mobiliario. Focos integrados, leds, etc.

Name: Carrino Design
Description:
Da anni impegnata nella realizzazione di un prodotto di qualità l’azienda CARRINO DESIGN, nata agli inizi degli anni ‘70 dalla trasformazione di una piccola azienda artigiana, si é subito imposta all’attenzione degli operatori grazie alla professionalità dimostrata ed alla originalità delle sue creazioni. Incoraggiata dai successi ottenuti nel corso degli anni, l’azienda CARRINO DESIGN ha continuamente ampliato e diversificato la propria produzione giungendo alla creazione di veri e propri piccoli capolavori dove grande pregio estetico, sofisticate tecnologie di realizzazione, ineguagliabile precisione ed elevata qualità dei materiali, convivono con un plus artigianale che l’azienda ha saputo, con amore, mantenere e valorizzare. Belle, funzionali, solide, eleganti, durature, sicure, versatili, le porte interne della nuova produzione rinnovano la sfida in un settore che, purtroppo da diverso tempo, offre ben poco di veramente innovativo.

Realizzate su un progetto d’avanguardia particolarmente attento alle più attuali tendenze del settore, le porte della CARRINO DESIGN si propongono, oggi, come un vero e proprio sistema flessibile in grado di rispondere ad ogni esigenza estetica e funzionale in qualsiasi ambiente arredativo.

Il marchio CARRINO DESIGN rappresenta oggi nel mondo del MADE IN ITALY una garanzia costante. 

L’obiettivo futuro è quello di consolidare il nostro prodotto e di vederlo crescere nel tempo grazie alle diverse attività di marketing e comunicazione sia a livello nazionale che internazionale.

Carrino Design certifica le proprie attività con il Sistema di Gestione della qualità, secondo la norma ISO 9001:2000. E’ obiettivo dell' azienda progettare prodotti altamente qualificati in modo da soddisfare i bisogni e le attese iniziali e successive della clientela.

Name: Led it be Cuadros  Brillantes
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar nacida en 2019 dedicada a la fabricación de cuadros con luz led.

Contamos con una gran variedad de modelos y tamaños con la misión de que se ajusten a los gustos y necesidades de nuestros seguidores.

Ofrecemos productos únicos en el mercado y en el  rubro de la decoración de interiores. 

Nos diferenciamos alegramente  por tener un árduo camino proceso de producción, el cual consta en reunir materiales y una serie enorme de esfuerzos para lograr que nuestros seguidores sean completamente felices de tener un cuadro led en su hogar. 

Ademas de destacarse por tener su luz para disfrutar por las noches, tambien lo son muy bonitos durante el día con los cuadros en off.

Buscamos hacer de tu espacio un lugar único en donde se imprima tu estilo. 

¿Cómo realizamos nuestros cuadros? 

Están fabricados en madera MDF 5.5mm, cortados con máquina láser. Para una buena terminación, lijamos el mdf y lo pintamos con pintura acrílica en aerosol y aerógrafos. 
Las tiras de led que utilizamos son de alta luminosidad y bajo consumo. Soldamos de a tiras con empalmes manuales para lograr cada silueta en particular.
Todos nuestros cuadros contienen su fuente de alimentación 12v y el dimmer manual, que tiene las funciones de encendido/apagado, para ajustar la luz y jugar con las posiciones parpadeantes. 
Se enchufa a 220 en pared o zapatilla como cualquier artefacto eléctrico de uso hogareño.
Cada cuadro viene con su hueco soporte para colgar en la pared.

Name: E-LVO projekt
Description:
The goal of the project is to create a model that will cover the material flows of wood in its production and processing (primary and secondary), in the collection of residues and waste, reuse and use in the energy industry.
The model should evaluate these flows primarily from an economic and environmental point of view (primarily the balance of emissions greenhouse gases) from a point of view where it makes sense and possibly also from a social point of view. At that, let's explicitly highlights not only the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions due to the manufacture and use of wood products (and not products from other, more energy-consuming formations or formations of fossil origin) but also the amount of biogenic carbon that is bound in wood products.

Estamos há 6 anos superando as expectativas e entregando sempre projetos originais e únicos. Levamos autenticidade e eternizamos a marca de nossos clientes com excelência durante todo esse tempo. 

E agora, com toda a expertise que a empresa possui em em corte e gravação a laser, decidimos ampliar nossos horizontes e lançamos uma linha exclusiva: a Dedicato Casamento.

Você pode garantir que a celebração do seu grande dia seja eternizada em todos os detalhes! Desenvolvemos um catálogo que reúne sofisticação e delicadeza, em peças personalizadas exclusivamente para essa ocasião, de acordo com a identidade visual do seu casamento. 

Caixas amadeiradas, acrílico e gravações de qualidade completam essa novidade que preparamos com carinho e disponibilizamos aos clientes. Os itens foram escolhidos a dedo para compor e atender as expectativas desta data tão importante.

A Dedicato agora está além! Se você deseja garantir uma memória única e autêntica através da personalização, somos o lugar certo. Basta entrar em contato e solicitar o seu orçamento.
