Name: Impregnadora Oro Verde SpA
Description:
La empresa Impregnadora Oro Verde SpA, con sede en la ciudad de Chillán, se dedica a la venta de polines impregnados. Los polines impregnados son elementos utilizados en diversas industrias y construcciones, como la construcción de viviendas, puentes, cercas y otros proyectos que requieren materiales resistentes y duraderos.

Impregnadora Oro Verde SpA se especializa en el tratamiento de la madera mediante la aplicación de procesos de impregnación, que consisten en introducir sustancias protectoras y preservantes en la estructura de la madera para aumentar su vida útil y protegerla de agentes externos como la humedad, los insectos y los hongos.

La empresa se destaca por su experiencia en el sector y por ofrecer productos de alta calidad. Sus polines impregnados se fabrican utilizando maderas seleccionadas y se someten a rigurosos estándares de calidad y control para garantizar su resistencia y durabilidad.

Además, Impregnadora Oro Verde SpA se preocupa por el cuidado del medio ambiente y utiliza procesos de impregnación que cumplen con las normas y regulaciones ambientales vigentes. También busca promover prácticas sostenibles en la industria de la madera, asegurando la procedencia responsable de la materia prima utilizada en sus productos.

En resumen, Impregnadora Oro Verde SpA es una empresa dedicada a la venta de polines impregnados en la ciudad de Chillán. Su enfoque en la calidad, la durabilidad y la sostenibilidad les permite ofrecer soluciones confiables para proyectos de construcción y otras aplicaciones que requieren materiales de madera tratada y protegida.

Description:
Accoya, üstün dayanıklılığı ve yüksek performansıyla öne çıkan, modifiye edilmiş ve boyutsal olarak stabil bir ahşap türüdür. Asetilasyon işlemi sayesinde çürümeye, şişmeye ve çekmeye karşı maksimum direnç kazanır. Bu yenilikçi işlem, Accoya'yı geleneksel ahşap türlerine göre çok daha uzun ömürlü ve düşük bakım gerektiren bir malzeme haline getirir.

Accoya ahşabı, Hollanda'nın Arnhem şehrinde bulunan son teknoloji üretim tesisinde, sürdürülebilir kaynaklardan elde edilen hızlı büyüyen ve sertifikalı ahşap kullanılarak üretilmektedir.

Accoya, insan yapımı ve yoğun kaynak tüketen malzemelere kıyasla düşük karbon ayak izi ile çevresel etkileri en aza indirirken, yüksek performanslı bir kereste çözümü sunar. Çürümeye, şişmeye ve deformasyona karşı üstün direnci sayesinde uzun ömürlü ve düşük bakım gerektiren bir yapı malzemesi olarak öne çıkar. Accoya’nın sahip olduğu uluslararası sürdürülebilirlik sertifikaları, çevre dostu inşaat projeleri için ideal bir seçenek sunduğunu kanıtlamaktadır.

Yenilikçi üretim süreci ve üstün teknik özellikleriyle Accoya, geleceğin sürdürülebilir yapı malzemeleri arasında yeni fırsatlar sunarak inşaat sektörüne uzun vadeli katkılar sağlamaktadır.

Description:

Name: Carpintero Málaga
Description:
Somos carpinteros profesionales, comprometidos con la excelencia en cada uno de nuestros trabajos. Colaboramos con las principales marcas del sector de la madera, llevando a cabo todo tipo de proyectos con la máxima profesionalidad y siguiendo la tradición de los trabajos hechos a mano. Nos especializamos en cuidar cada detalle y en los acabados artesanales de cada pieza de madera.

Atendemos tanto a particulares como a empresas privadas, organismos públicos, centros sanitarios, educativos, institucionales y culturales, así como a comercios. También trabajamos con profesionales que buscan un carpintero serio y competente para sus proyectos, como decoradores, arquitectos e interioristas.

Nuestros servicios abarcan una amplia gama de áreas, incluyendo viviendas, oficinas, locales comerciales, naves industriales y comunidades de propietarios. Prestamos servicio en Málaga capital y en numerosas localidades, entre las que se encuentran Marbella, Mijas, Fuengirola, Vélez-Málaga, Estepona, Torremolinos, Benalmádena, Rincón de la Victoria, Antequera, Alhaurín de la Torre, Ronda, Cártama, Alhaurín el Grande, Coín y Nerja.

Creemos que todos los espacios deben lucir increíbles y que los accesorios y el mobiliario de madera son la mejor manera de decorar un entorno. La madera no solo se ve genial, sino que también es un material natural, duradero y que se adapta a la vida cotidiana, proporcionando una sensación cálida y acogedora. Nos enorgullece ser carpinteros en Málaga y ofrecer un servicio ejemplar, combinado con una excelente relación calidad-precio.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios diseñados para satisfacer tus necesidades de carpintería de madera de calidad en Málaga y sus alrededores. Nuestro equipo de carpinteros altamente calificados está listo para abordar proyectos de cualquier tamaño, proporcionando soluciones personalizadas y garantizando resultados excepcionales.

Name: Vascony Prod
Description:
Vascony Company was founded in 1994, having as its main activity the exploitation and processing of wood. With decades of experience in the industry, we have developed a deep understanding of wood selection, allowing us to choose the best quality raw materials right from the start. Our expertise, combined with high-performance methods of wood exploitation and transportation, ensures that we work only with premium-grade timber, carefully sourced to meet the highest standards.

We specialize in solid wood processing, focusing on oak, beech, and ash, from which we manufacture finger-joint and continuous lamella solid wood panels. Our production standards are constantly evolving through continuous investments in cutting-edge equipment and the optimization of our business processes. These advancements enable us to enhance the quality, precision, and refinement of our products while maintaining high levels of efficiency.

Name: Pathway Tables
Description:
Pathway Tables takes pride in offering the most unique and beautiful live edge furniture available. Coming from Ohio trees that we have acquired, and milled and dried on site in our kiln, each log is thoughtfully crafted with uniqueness in mind. We take joy in cutting into natural wood to uncover the true beauty inside, and we take much pride in harnessing that beauty and giving a family a table for generations of use.

What once started as a hobby in 2015, we felt called to turn into a business. After many years of perfecting the craft and stocking up our wood supply, our showroom opened in February of 2018. We value hard work and only want to produce quality products. We don’t believe in high pressure sales, but only wish to share the beauty of our tables with others.

Our name, Pathway Tables, is inspired by Proverbs 3:5-6:

“Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways submit to him and he will make your paths straight.”

That is the path we try to follow, and the message we breathe into all our tables.

Name: Falegnameria Artigiana Dotti F.lli
Description:
La nostra attività di produzione e vendita di serramenti si concentra sulla produzione di prodotti di alta qualità che garantiscono sicurezza, efficienza energetica e risparmio sui costi di riscaldamento e condizionamento. Siamo convinti che i serramenti siano un elemento fondamentale per la sicurezza e il comfort della tua casa e per questo motivo ci impegniamo a fornire soluzioni di alta qualità in legno, legno/alluminio e PVC.

La sicurezza è una priorità per noi e per questo motivo progettiamo i nostri serramenti con sistemi di chiusura avanzati e resistenti che garantiscono la massima protezione contro intrusioni indesiderate. Inoltre, i nostri serramenti sono realizzati con materiali di alta qualità che garantiscono la massima durata e resistenza alle intemperie, alle sollecitazioni meccaniche e agli agenti atmosferici.

Siamo anche consapevoli dell'importanza dell'efficienza energetica nella riduzione dei costi di riscaldamento e condizionamento e nel rispetto dell'ambiente. Per questo motivo, i nostri serramenti sono progettati per offrire un'alta efficienza energetica grazie all'utilizzo di vetri speciali, guarnizioni termiche e isolamenti a bassa conducibilità termica. In questo modo, i nostri serramenti contribuiscono a creare un ambiente domestico confortevole e al contempo riducono i costi energetici e l'impatto ambientale.

In sintesi, i nostri serramenti in legno, legno/alluminio e PVC rappresentano una scelta ideale per coloro che desiderano garantire la massima qualità, sicurezza ed efficienza energetica per la propria casa. Siamo a vostra disposizione per offrirvi prodotti personalizzati, servizio di posa in opera professionale e assistenza post-vendita.

Name: Carolina Handmade Crafts
Description:
My Charcuterie Boards, Serving Trays, Cutting Boards and other Items are Artistic Creations made with Care and years of woodworking knowledge. So far I have used Cherry Wood and Walnut Wood for my creations. I find these hardwoods to have rich natural coloring which works well with the mica powder Epoxy Resins colorants. Sure there are many other hardwoods available and I may use some but using local wood species helps keep the cost down.

I try to find wood with what some would call defects but I think have more character. When the epoxy resin fills the voids a truly unique product has been created. I believe the characteristics of the wood I choose convey a more rustic appearing serving tray.

Most of the boards I make have routed curved finger grabs on the ends for easy maneuvering off a surface. I installed handles on some as some may prefer them but I find that without the handles sticking up the boards are more unique and easier to store.

Name: McConnell Technologies, Inc.
Description:
McConnell Technologies is the leading
company in designing and supplying both dry fuel suspension burners and sloped
grate green sawdust burners for heating soft wood lumber kilns and rotary
dryers.  It spawned from McConnell Industries.
McConnell Industries was formed in 1970 by a group formerly with McConnell
Sales and Engineering. Group was led by Clifford McConnell, who was formerly a
part owner of McConnell Sales. The main focus of the new company was to design
and manufacture direct fired lumber dry kilns for the soft wood lumber industry
in the South East.
As the result of the OPEC oil embargo in 1973, McConnell Industries designed and
installed the first wood burner to fire direct into a lumber dry kiln, replacing
natural gas and oil that was the main fuel for direct fired kilns. By 1984 the
company needed a larger manufacturing facility and a 40,000 sq ft plant and
7,000 office to manufacture kilns and burners was built in Trussville, AL.
By the early 1990s, after several recessions including the “Desert Storm” in 1991,
the company decided to discontinue manufacturing dry kilns and to concentrate
on designing wood burners.
Downsizing the company meant the manufacturing facility was not required. By
1996 the company had sold the manufacturing facility and reorganized the
company as McConnell Technologies, Inc to reduce liabilities from prior jobs.

Unsere Fässer bieten unzählige Möglichkeiten: Sie eignen sich als Sauna, als gemütlicher Schlafplatz, als geselliger Ort zum Essen und Trinken oder sogar als einzigartiger Veranstaltungsraum. Dank unserer maßgeschneiderten Lösungen passen sich die Fässer perfekt Ihren Wünschen und Bedürfnissen an.
Unsere Produktvielfalt umfasst:
Sauna-Fässer: Erleben Sie Wellness pur mit unseren Saunafässern, die mit modernen Heizsystemen ausgestattet sind. Egal, ob im Sommer oder Winter, unsere Saunen bieten eine entspannende Auszeit direkt in Ihrem Garten.
Schlaf-Fässer: Ideal für Campingplätze oder Ihren Garten – schaffen Sie einen gemütlichen Schlafplatz mit unvergleichlichem Charme.
Cabrio-Fässer: Mit ihrem wandelbaren Design sind diese Fässer perfekt für Sommer und Winter. Das aufklappbare Dach sorgt für ein besonderes Freiluftgefühl, während das Hardtop bei schlechtem Wetter Schutz bietet.
Sanitär-Fässer: Ausgestattet mit WC und Dusche bieten unsere Sanitär-Fässer die ideale Lösung für Campingplätze oder den privaten Bereich.
Apartment-Fässer: Diese Fässer vereinen Komfort, Stil und Funktionalität. Mit einem einzigartigen Raumgefühl sind sie die perfekte Unterkunft für Gäste.
Unsere Holzfässer werden aus hochwertigen Materialien gefertigt und können mit einer Vielzahl von Extras ausgestattet werden, wie Heizung, Deckenventilator, Bänken oder Stehtischen. Zudem bieten sie Schutz vor Sonne, Wind, Regen und Schnee – für ganzjährigen Einsatz.
Warum Holzfässer von uns?
Wir legen großen Wert auf Qualität, Design und Nachhaltigkeit. Jedes Fass wird mit viel Liebe zum Detail von unserem erfahrenen Team gefertigt.

Description:
Welcome to Laxmi Sawmill & Timbers! 

We are a passionate team of artisans and craftsmen, deeply rooted in the tradition of woodworking, yet driven by modern design and sustainability. Our journey began with a simple love for wood, its texture, its warmth, and its endless potential. Today, we are proud to offer a wide range of wood products and bespoke furniture solutions.

At Laxmi Sawmill & Timbers, we believe that every piece of wood tells a story. From the forest to your home or office, we ensure that this story continues in the products we create. Our team works with a variety of woods, each carefully selected for its unique characteristics and beauty.

Our furniture manufacturing firm is dedicated to transforming these raw materials into pieces of art that are not only functional but also enhance the aesthetics of your space. We specialize in crafting custom furniture that reflects your style and meets your specific needs.

Sustainability is at the heart of what we do. We source our wood responsibly, ensuring that for every tree used, more are planted. This way, we contribute to the preservation of our forests and the wellbeing of our planet.

Join us on this journey of craftsmanship, design, and sustainability. Let's create beautiful spaces together with Laxmi Sawmill & Timbers.

Name: KIDDY WOOD كيدي وود
Description:
Welcome to Kiddywood - Where Learning Meets Play!

At Kiddywood, we specialize in designing and manufacturing high-quality, Montessori-inspired wooden educational tools and toys for children. Our products are carefully crafted to make learning fun, engaging, and meaningful for kids, while supporting their cognitive, motor, and creative development.

From puzzles and building blocks to sensory toys and educational games, every item is made with love, precision, and a deep understanding of child development principles. We believe that children learn best through hands-on exploration, and our products are designed to inspire curiosity, independence, and a lifelong love of learning.

Why Choose Kiddywood?

Montessori-Inspired Design: Our tools and toys align with Montessori principles, encouraging self-directed learning and skill-building.

Premium Quality: Made from durable, eco-friendly wood, our products are built to last and safe for little hands.

Educational Value: Each product is thoughtfully designed to support early childhood development, including fine motor skills, problem-solving, and creativity.

Dual Language Support: We offer tools in both Arabic and English, making learning accessible and inclusive for diverse audiences.

Islamic Educational Tools: Our collection also includes Islamic-themed tools, designed to introduce children to Islamic values, Arabic letters, and cultural heritage in an engaging way.

Aesthetic Appeal: Beautiful, timeless designs that complement any home or classroom environment.

Whether you’re a parent, educator, or retailer, Kiddywood is your partner in creating enriching learning experiences for children. Explore our collection and discover how we can make learning more enjoyable for your little ones.

Visit our website to learn more about our products and mission. Join us on this journey to inspire the next generation of curious minds!

Name: Lecic Maderas
Description:
Somos un fabricante líder de productos de madera de alta calidad. Con más de 40 años de experiencia en la industria, estamos orgullosos de nuestra experiencia en el procesamiento de madera y de nuestro compromiso con las prácticas forestales sostenibles. Nuestra experiencia, conocimiento y relaciones con nuestros proveedores nos permite obtener madera de primera calidad procedente de bosques gestionados de forma responsable. Estamos dedicados a proteger el medio ambiente y garantizar la sostenibilidad de nuestros recursos madereros para las generaciones futuras. Nuestro equipo de maquinistas y técnicos capacitados utiliza maquinaria avanzada y técnicas de producción modernas para transformar la madera en bruto en una amplia gama de productos de madera. Nuestras estrictas medidas de control de calidad garantizan que cada producto que sale de nuestra fábrica cumpla con los más altos estándares de la industria en cuanto a durabilidad, resistencia y estética.

Estamos comprometidos con la satisfacción del cliente y nos esforzamos por brindar un servicio excepcional a todos nuestros clientes, ya sean pequeñas empresas locales o proyectos de importación a gran escala. Nuestro experimentado equipo de ventas siempre está listo para ayudar con la selección de productos, las opciones de personalización y el cumplimiento oportuno de los pedidos.

En Lumat creemos en fomentar relaciones de largo plazo con nuestros clientes, proveedores y empleados. Priorizamos la seguridad en nuestras operaciones y garantizamos un ambiente de trabajo seguro para nuestros empleados. Nuestro equipo está dedicado a la mejora continua, la innovación y mantenerse a la vanguardia de la industria maderera.

Name: SATIS-FACTORY GmbH
Description:
Der Weg zu Neuen Horizonten durch Innovation

 
Willkommen bei SATIS-FACTORY GmbH - wo Innovation, Engagement und Teamgeist aufeinandertreffen, um außergewöhnliche Ergebnisse im Messe- und Ladenbau zu schaffen. Als Geschäftsführer habe ich nicht nur eine Schreinerei übernommen, sondern auch die Verpflichtung übernommen, Tradition mit modernen Ansätzen zu verschmelzen und unser Unternehmen auf neue Pfade zu führen.
 

Unsere Mission ist es, mehr als nur beeindruckende Räume zu gestalten - wir wollen Erlebnisse schaffen, die in Erinnerung bleiben. Unsere Projekte sind das Ergebnis einer gelungenen Symbiose aus traditioneller Handwerkskunst und innovativer Technologie. Jedes Detail wird sorgfältig durchdacht, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Kunden nicht nur zufrieden sind, sondern begeistert.

Doch unser Engagement beschränkt sich nicht nur auf Kunden - es erstreckt sich auch auf unsere Mitarbeiter. Ich bin fest davon überzeugt, dass zufriedene Mitarbeiter die treibende Kraft hinter unserem Erfolg sind. Wir setzen alles daran, eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der unsere Mitarbeiter ihr volles Potenzial entfalten können. Ihre Kreativität, Fachkenntnis und Begeisterung spiegeln sich in jedem Projekt wider, das wir umsetzen.

Unsere Werte sind unsere Wegweiser. Innovation, Qualität, Kundenzufriedenheit und Mitarbeiterwohlbefinden sind die Eckpfeiler, auf denen SATIS-FACTORY aufbaut. Wir sind stolz darauf, nicht nur beeindruckende Räume zu gestalten, sondern auch eine Gemeinschaft aufzubauen, in der jeder seinen Platz findet.

Wir laden Sie ein, uns besser kennenzulernen und unsere Leidenschaft für Kreativität und Handwerkskunst zu erleben. Gemeinsam mit unserem engagierten Team gestalten wir Räume, die Geschichten erzählen und Eindrücke hinterlassen. Kontaktieren Sie uns, um mehr über unser Team, unsere Werte und unsere Projekte zu erfahren.

Bei SATIS-FACTORY gestalten wir nicht nur Räume, sondern auch Zukunft.

Depuis 1996, Damien Garnier – sculpteur ornemantiste et Mahnaz Garnier – doreuse sur bois, forment ensemble l’atelier Garnier situé à Gourville – Rouillac, au cœur de la campagne charentaise. Ils restaurent et fabriquent des objets sculptés et dorés à l’or fin en respectant les méthodes d’autrefois.

Leur savoir-faire est un savant mélange de rigueur technique et d’émotion.

Biens privés ou patrimoine d’État, en France comme à l’étranger, de nombreux chefs d’œuvres et trésors passent entre leurs mains : miroirs, cadres, consoles, boiseries, luminaires, mobilier, baromètres, sièges, modèles sur mesure…

Name: Nature Hrast
Description:
Nature Hrast specijaliziran je za obnovu i obradu stare hrastove građe, pretvarajući stari slavonski hrast, odležanu hrastovinu i masivne hrastove grede u unikatni namještaj. Naša posvećenost kvaliteti ogleda se u pažljivoj restauraciji stoljetne hrastovine, pri čemu zadržavamo njezine prirodne ljepote – čvorove, pukotine i rupice od eksera koje pričaju priču vremena.

Koristimo recikliranu hrastovu građu dobivenu dekonstrukcijom starih slavonskih kuća i objekata. Svaka stara drvena građa, bilo da se radi o hrastovim gredama, rogovima ili plankama, prolazi kroz proces ručne obrade kako bismo osigurali da svaki komad zadrži patinu, prirodne godove i ožiljke vremena. Završnu obradu radimo s kvalitetnim uljima i lakovima za drvo, čime osiguravamo dugotrajnost i otpornost.

Umijeće koje se krije iza ovog malog tima nastalo je iz dugogodišnje obiteljske tradicije započete 1960. godine koja se kroz izazove današnjeg doba inspirirala autentičnim materijalima usporedno brinući o šumama i okolišu.

Novi život stare hrastove građe kroz dizajn kombinira elegantnu jednostavnost i izvanrednu čvrstoću. Želimo da naši proizvodi osim dizajnom, svojom kvalitetom pričaju gotovo zaboravljenu priču na novi način.

Our journey with woodworking began in 2011, but our focus shifted to children’s furniture in 2020, inspired by the arrival of our own little ones. Every product we create is thoughtfully designed with safety, durability, and aesthetics in mind, using only natural materials to ensure the best for your family.

Today, our handcrafted furniture brings joy to over 300 children across Estonia, reflecting our dedication to quality and timeless design. We’re proud to create sustainable and functional pieces that support the needs of growing families while adding warmth and character to any home.

Name: Wood Working - MP
Description:
Não somos simplesmente uma marca de tábuas de madeira.

Somos A marca de tábuas de madeira que escolhe e transforma uma matéria viva, nobre, com história e que nunca morrerá, porque vamos trazê-la de volta para si.

Aliámos a sustentabilidade e ecologia à beleza natural da madeira e o resultado está à vista.

Apesar de trabalharmos com várias espécies, é maioritariamente a madeira de sobro e de oliveira que compõem as nossas criações. Escolhidas pela sua beleza natural e pelo facto de serem espécies típicas da flora Portuguesa.

Privilegiando o respeito pela natureza e pelo que nos oferece, não adquirimos os nossos produtos através de abates indiscriminados e ilegais de arvores de que espécie for.

A nossa matéria prima é adquirida a partir de arvores que foram cortadas por necessidades múltiplas, mas sustentadas da parte dos proprietários dos terrenos ou da poda necessária e anual destas espécies. Desta forma transformamos arvores com história em objetos que irão perpetuar essas mesmas histórias.

Name: Amalegno - Strutture in legno
Description:
AMA LEGNO è un’azienda specializzata nella progettazione, realizzazione e posa di strutture e coperture in legno su misura.

Il percorso della nostra famiglia nasce nel 1996, quando il titolare inizia a lavorare il legno, costruendo competenze tecniche e artigianali che negli anni diventano una vera specializzazione. Nel 2019, forti di oltre 120 progetti realizzati e di un’esperienza maturata sul campo in contesti privati, pubblici e aziendali, diamo vita ad AMA LEGNO.

Siamo un’impresa artigiana strutturata che non realizza soluzioni prefabbricate: ogni struttura è progettata e costruita su misura, perché per noi il legno significa qualità, precisione e valore nel tempo.

Seguiamo internamente ogni fase del lavoro, dalla consulenza e prevendita, fino alla progettazione tecnica, al taglio e alla lavorazione del legno, ai trattamenti protettivi, fino al trasporto e alla posa in opera. In questo modo possiamo garantire un controllo totale sul risultato, utilizzando materiali di alto livello e assicurando una posa pulita, precisa e affidabile.

Operiamo principalmente in Emilia-Romagna, pur offrendo servizi in tutta Italia.

Il nostro cliente ideale è chi cerca bellezza, qualità costruttiva, precisione esecutiva e tranquillità durante i lavori.

Perché chi ama davvero il legno, AMA LEGNO.

Name: Walter Keitel Die Tischlermeister GmbH
Description:
Die Tischlerei Walter Keitel, gegründet 1988 in Lenne, hat sich von einer kleinen Werkstatt zu einem der größten Handwerksbetriebe im Landkreis Holzminden entwickelt und beschäftigt heute über 20 Mitarbeiter. 
Unser Leistungsspektrum umfasst:
Fenster: Wir bieten eine breite Auswahl an Fenstern deutscher Qualitätshersteller wie WERU und UNILUX. Ob Kunststoff-, Holz- oder Aluminiumfenster – wir finden die passende Lösung für Ihr Zuhause. 
Haustüren: Als Visitenkarte Ihres Hauses gestalten wir Haustüren individuell nach Ihren Wünschen. Dabei setzen wir auf hochwertige Materialien und Designs, die Stil, Sicherheit und Energieeffizienz vereinen. 
Innentüren: Unsere Zimmertüren überzeugen durch Vielfalt in Design und Funktionalität und fügen sich harmonisch in Ihr Wohnkonzept ein.
Möbel & Innenausbau: Von maßgefertigten Einbauschränken über Regalsysteme bis hin zu individuellen Möbelstücken realisieren wir Ihre Wohnträume mit höchster Präzision.
Sicherheitstechnik: Für mechanische Sicherheitseinrichtungen sind wir Ihr Ansprechpartner und sorgen für optimalen Einbruchschutz in Ihrem Zuhause.
Sonnenschutz: Mit Markisen, Raffstores und Jalousien bieten wir Sonnenschutz in seiner schönsten Form und schaffen angenehme Schattenplätze. 
Terrassenüberdachungen: Unsere Wintergärten und Lamellendächer erweitern Ihren Wohnraum nach draußen und ermöglichen wetterunabhängigen Genuss.
Außenbereich: Entdecken Sie unsere Gartenmöbel wie die Gartenbank "Bellevue" oder die Hängeliege "Balance" für entspannte Stunden im Freien. 
SaunaFass & Mietsauna: Erleben Sie Wellness pur mit unseren mobilen Saunafässern, die Sie mieten oder individuell für Ihren Garten anfertigen lassen können. 
Besuchen Sie unsere Ausstellung in Lenne und lassen Sie sich von unseren Produkten inspirieren. Bitte vereinbaren Sie vorab einen Termin, damit wir Sie umfassend beraten können. 
Wir freuen uns darauf, gemeinsam mit Ihnen Ihre Wohnideen zu verwirklichen!

Name: Coops & Cabins
Description:
Coops and Cabins started out as a series of dedicated sawmill operations located in Southwestern Ontario. We wholesale quality Cedar, Pine, Maple and Ash timber. Since we have an excellent source of high quality timber, we felt we needed to specialize in the building of high quality structures as well.

We started out making "Crappers" for the Northern Muskoka Cottage area. We later moved to a farm in Flamborough where we wanted to raise our own hens and have fresh eggs everyday. Thus became out first chicken coop - PeckinHen Palace. Since then, we have come up with a great production unit that is customizable and affordable and accessible to many chicken lovers. 

We are committed to offering only the highest quality built chicken coops. Our coops can be designed to compliment your backyard surroundings whether you are in the country or in the city.

Name: Kaywood
Description:
Kay is the first wooden watch brand in Banten. We are a business that embraces the concept of sustainability, where we strive to apply principles of innovation and collaboration in our activities with the goal of becoming a resilient and responsible enterprise. 

What we do is create craft products made from wood and wood waste. Our flagship products include wooden watches as fashion accessories and complementary accessories for desk clocks. Our distinctiveness lies in our ability to provide solutions to existing watch designs in the market by incorporating cultural values, local wisdom, and sustainable principles. We incorporate local textiles from Banten, specifically, and from a broader perspective, Indonesia, into our products. Some of these textiles include Baduy weaving, Tidore weaving, East Nusa Tenggara weaving, batik, and collaborations with fashion designers. Through our ethnic series, we are able to tell a story that the textiles we use as watch straps are made by weavers and batik artisans in Indonesia, such as those from the Baduy tribe, Tidore tribe, and Nusa Tenggara Timur tribe, featuring rich colors (both natural and synthetic dyes) and meaningful and philosophical motifs.

Name: Spezzoni Saune srl
Description:
La nostra azienda nasce con l’obiettivo di creare saune finlandesi artigianali di alta qualità, progettate per offrire il massimo benessere psico-fisico e regalare esperienze uniche di relax e piacere.

Siamo convinti che la sauna possa migliorare la qualità della vita, contribuendo alla salute e al benessere quotidiano. Per questo realizziamo saune artigianali eleganti, funzionali e sicure, progettate per garantire comfort, durabilità e un’esperienza sensoriale senza compromessi.

Ogni nostro prodotto è il risultato di una selezione accurata dei materiali, di una lavorazione meticolosa e di un design studiato nei minimi dettagli. Puntiamo a standard qualitativi elevati, mantenendo al contempo soluzioni accessibili per ogni esigenza. Offriamo un’ampia gamma di saune, dalle versioni standard di piccole dimensioni fino ai modelli su misura, personalizzati per soddisfare ogni necessità.

Tutte le nostre saune finlandesi vengono realizzate nei nostri laboratori artigianali di Bovolone, seguendo un processo produttivo che garantisce qualità, sicurezza e affidabilità. Accompagniamo i nostri clienti in ogni fase del progetto, dalla consulenza iniziale alla progettazione fino alla realizzazione finale, per offrire un prodotto esclusivo e su misura delle tue esigenze.

Name: MRF Carpintaria
Description:
Localizada no norte de Portugal em Moreira de Cónegos, Guimarães, a nossa empresa foi fundada por Bernardino Ferreira em 1964, em 1980, passou para a liderança dos seus filhos que adotaram a denominação “Manuel Fernando Ribeiro Ferreira & Irmãos, Lda.”. Em 1999, Manuel Ferreira confiou a gerência ao seu filho Bruno Ferreira, dando origem ao atual nome, “Manuel Ribeiro Ferreira & Filhos, Lda.”. Mais tarde em 2021, a administração foi reforçada com a entrada dos seus outros filhos, Vitor Ferreira e Patrícia Ferreira.
Somos uma empresa familiar, unida por valores de colaboração e partilha, com um forte propósito de crescimento. Juntos, visamos um desenvolvimento estratégico e dinâmico dos nossos negócios, investindo na inovação dos nossos produtos e serviços para que cada projeto se destaque pela sua singularidade.
A melhoria contínua é a nossa prioridade diária, refletindo o nosso compromisso com a satisfação dos clientes, alicerçada numa confiança sólida e profissionalismo elevado.
Contamos com profissionais qualificados para enfrentar e resolver desafios diários de forma ágil, eficaz e económica, graças á implementação de tecnologia de ponta.
Hoje, a MRF é uma empresa de grande dinamismo, determinada em explorar novos horizontes com a experiência acumulada e aquela que continuaremos a conquistar, mantendo-nos como referência de qualidade e confiança no sector.

Every project begins with an idea — a vision shaped through close collaboration with our clients. We translate intent into precise digital models using thoughtful design, visualization, and rendering, allowing each piece to evolve virtually before it is built.

Once refined, designs move seamlessly into making. Through careful material selection and meticulous hand construction, digital concepts are transformed into tangible works that balance modern design tools with traditional craftsmanship.

At Monovera, design and fabrication are inseparable — resulting in objects that are purposeful, enduring, and deeply considered.

Name: Gilberto Arellano Windows
Description:
Gilberto Arellano Windows LLC, founded around 2000 in San Francisco, California, specializes in manufacturing and installing custom wood windows for historic Victorian-style houses. Our mission is to preserve San Francisco's architectural heritage while enhancing both aesthetic appeal and functional efficiency.

With over two decades of experience, we combine traditional craftsmanship to create high-quality windows that comply with local historic building codes. Our services include custom wood window manufacturing, window sash installation, glass replacement, and sash rope replacement.

Name: Tischlerei Behrendt
Description:
Ein moderner Handwerksbetrieb kommt an der Digitalisierung nicht vorbei. Hier sehen wir einen entscheidenden Wettbewerbsvorteil und arbeiten mit modernsten Konstruktions- und Kalkulationsprogrammen sowie Herstellungstechnik. Um langfristig konkurrenzfähig zu bleiben, sind wir bereits auf 3D-CAD-Programme umgestiegen. Damit können Änderungen in jeder Planungsphase kurzfristig durchgeführt und visualisiert werden. Um allen Anforderungen gereicht zu werden, sind bei uns zwei Technische Zeichner mit Spezialisierung CNC-Technik beschäftigt.

Unsere Auftraggeber stammen hauptsächlich aus der Region, Potsdam und Berlin. Dazu gehören sowohl kleinere Privatkunden als auch Architektur- und Planungsbüros, Wohnungsbaugenossenschaften,

Ladengeschäfte wie Dussmann, das Berliner Kulturkaufhaus oder auch Projekte für das Deutsche Jugendherbergswerk. 

Die Tischlerei Behrendt kann eine breite Expertise vorweisen und bietet mittlerweile unterschiedliche Leistungsbausteine: Vom Denkmalschutz, Holzbau über Möbel- und Bautischlerei bis zum hochwertigen Innenausbau und der Montage von Schall- und Brandschutztüren. Ein fester Bestandteil unserer Produktion ist die Herstellung von historischer Haus- und Zimmertüren, sowie Kastendoppelfenstern. Hier liegt unser Augenmerk in vom Denkmalschutz begleiteten Objekten wie Mehrfamilienhäusern und Stadtvillen. Somit sind es meist mehrere Stückzahlen, die wir dann in Serie anfertigen. Die Hauptaufgabe der Monteure ist der fachgerechte Einbau von Fenstern und Türen aus Kunststoff, Holz und Aluminium sowie die Montage von Wohnungs- und Innentüren, die wir von der Industrie bzw. von Fachhändlern beziehen.

Wir investieren ständig in neue und moderne Technik. Einzigartig ist der umfangreiche Maschinenpark unserer Tischlerei. Dazu gehören sechs CNC-gesteuerte Maschinen. Mit der 2015 neu errichteten Halle konnten wir die Produktions- und Montageabläufe bestmöglich optimieren.

Name: Mikutowski Woodworking
Description:
Founded in 1986, Mikutowski Woodworking is the definition of “small but mighty”. We specialize in handmade, high quality wooden jewelry boxes and is located in North Eastern Wisconsin/Michigan’s Upper Peninsula.

Many are shocked to learn the fine woodworking shop employs only five people to take raw lumber through the hands-on production process. Another two employees bring the finished product through the invoicing, packing, and shipping stages as well as provide excellent customer service.

Despite the small workforce, Mikutowski Woodworking manages to produce about 20 different products and sells to art galleries, boutiques and novelty stores from coast to coast.

In pursuit of a superior product, handmade jigs, custom pieces and even equipment are all designed by the woodworkers. The woodworking techniques may be described as “old-school”, but it only adds to the character of the line. Each jewelry box is still expertly hand sanded to a smooth buttery finish. In addition, all products are finely detailed by hand. Furthermore, stain is never used in the manufacturing process. The wood’s natural grain is the star and it should shine through in the final product. Only a water based and eco friendly coat is applied to the pieces in order to give a beautiful luster and protection. Aside from the laser engraving machine, no computerized equipment is utilized. Each Mikutowski Woodworking piece is certainly deserving of its “handcrafted” designation!

Whether it’s a small desk item or a large jewelry chest, the passion is evident in the masterful workmanship and fine details of each piece. From the signature shape work to carefully chosen lumber, each piece is handled with the utmost care and dedication.

Name: M²O Creations
Description:
At the heart of our vision lies a deep appreciation for the beauty of nature and a commitment to sustainability. We envision a future where we harness the charm and character of nature's reclaimed wood to craft unforgettable, enduring icons for homes. Our mission is to transform what might have been discarded scrap wood into handcrafted masterpieces that resonate with the soul of both the wood and the home.

Our vision transcends mere furniture or decor; it's about creating icons. Every piece we craft will be a testament to nature's artistry and human craftsmanship, merging the past with the present to forge icons of the future. We envision dining tables that host generations of family gatherings, chairs that cradle stories and secrets, and shelves that display the passage of time.

By breathing new life into reclaimed wood, we aim to not only enrich homes but also promote sustainable living. Our commitment to using materials that have already been a part of the natural world aligns with our vision for a greener, more eco-conscious future.

In the ever-evolving landscape of interior design, we see a niche where the essence of nature is captured and celebrated in every grain, knot, and curve of wood. Our vision is to be at the forefront of this movement, turning forgotten wood into cherished, timeless icons in the home.

Description:
Nati a Pesaro nel 1983, nel cuore di uno dei distretti del mobile più rinomati al mondo, la nostra azienda coniuga l’eccellenza artigianale italiana con tecnologie produttive d’avanguardia.

Lavoriamo a stretto contatto con le materie prime, ascoltando le esigenze dei clienti e curando ogni dettaglio con precisione. Con il tempo abbiamo affinato la nostra passione in un’elevata competenza specializzata nella produzione di ante per cucine e bagni, un percorso che ci ha consentito di anticipare le tendenze del design e affermarci come partner di fiducia per i principali player del settore.

Oggi operiamo in una sede di nuova generazione studiata per ottimizzare i flussi produttivi, con processi altamente automatizzati e un parco macchine all’avanguardia. Continui investimenti in innovazione e sostenibilità ci consentono di garantire qualità costante, tempi certi e un ridotto impatto ambientale.

La stessa passione che ci spingeva quarant’anni fa anima ancora ogni nostro progetto: ante che uniscono estetica e funzionalità, create per durare nel tempo e dare valore a ogni idea di arredo.

Olivenholz  und viele anderen Holzarten wie Buche, Eiche, Walnuss und viele andere Holzarten sind unser Arbeitsmaterial, daß wir auch gerne mit Epoxidharz bearbeiten.

Name: GAMAUF doo
Description:
Gamauf d.o.o., which has been operating since 1992, produces and sells certified pellets for the European Union and Croatian markets.

After opening a separate plant for the production of wood pellets in 2008, located near the company headquarters, Gamauf has continued to invest in improving and modernizing its equipment and devices.

The plant has a nominal production capacity of 60 tons per day and is equipped with the most modern machinery to obtain a high-quality product. The machines for the production of pellets are produced by the German company Amandus Kahl. For the production of pellets we use only clean wood, purchased from Croatian forests and of known origin.

Gamauf d.o.o. The company also has the ENPlus A1 and ENPlus A2 pellet quality certificates, as well as the ISO 50001 energy management system certificate, which proves our environmental awareness.

Name: Teak Wood International
Description:
About Us
Teak Wood International is your one-stop shop for all timber and timber products. We blend tradition with innovation to deliver the finest timber solutions. Our skilled workers, advanced machinery, and techniques ensure minimal waste and a high-quality finish on all our products.

We source our teak timber from the State Timber Corporation (STC) of Sri Lanka, the authorized government body responsible for extracting timber from legal forest resources, mainly forest plantations. These plantations are managed sustainably according to the Forest Management Plan by the Sri Lankan Forest Department. All silvicultural practices and timber harvesting comply with national environmental regulations and contribute to the national Greenhouse Gas (GHG) inventory. The Forest Department replants the cleared lands after felling to ensure sustainability. Certified timber from STC is marked with the STC logo, registered as building material with the Intellectual Property Office of Sri Lanka.

Our mission is to create value for our customers through reliability and flexibility, with a focus on customer loyalty and high-end products

Name: LAS MARINAS S.A.
Description:
Las Marinas nació como nacen las grandes ideas: del amor por una pasión compartida.
Cuatro socios fundadores, unidos por el mundo de la náutica, entre ellos el reconocido diseñador de yates German Frers, vieron una oportunidad única: crear soluciones que conectaran a las personas con el agua, con la naturaleza y con una forma de vida.

Con el auge de los barrios cerrados con río y laguna, nuestros primeros pasos estuvieron enfocados en resolver un nuevo desafío para desarrolladores y propietarios: cómo integrar de forma segura, estética y funcional sus espacios con el entorno náutico. Así comenzamos a construir puentes —literal y metafóricamente— entre el diseño y el río.

Ese mismo espíritu pionero nos llevó a asociarnos con la empresa sueca SF MARINA SYSTEM, trayendo por primera vez a la Argentina un sistema de marinas flotantes de hormigón. Una innovación que redefinió el estándar local y que hasta hoy sigue siendo líder en el mercado.

Con el tiempo, y tras años de experiencia trabajando la madera en nuestras obras náuticas, dimos un paso más allá: nació Las Marinas Muebles, una línea que combina oficio artesanal con diseño contemporáneo. Cada pieza es una extensión de nuestra esencia: noble, simple, bien hecha.

Y como todo lo que empieza con pasión tiende a crecer, sumamos una nueva unidad pensada especialmente para desarrolladores: Las Marinas Flooring. Una curaduría de pisos y revestimientos europeos que llevan calidez, estilo y calidad a cada proyecto arquitectónico.

Hoy, más de 40 años después, seguimos haciendo lo que más nos gusta: transformar espacios y acompañar a nuestros clientes a construir proyectos con alma.

Description:
SLICE'N STYLE – L'innovation au service des repas nomades et écologiques 

SLICE'N STYLE est une start-up innovante spécialisée dans la fabrication et la vente de cuitochette, un ustensile pratique et multifonctionnel combinant cuillère, fourchette et couteau en un seul outil. 

Conçue en bois 100 % écologique, notre cuitochette allie praticité, durabilité et respect de l’environnement.

Notre cuitochette possède deux fonctionnalités principales :

1 Un regroupement malin : elle réunit couteau, fourchette et cuillère pour une utilisation tout-en-un.

2 Un manche à fixation coulissante : il se sépare en deux pour dévoiler un couteau intégré, offrant une solution ergonomique et efficace.

Chez SLICE'N STYLE, nous plaçons l’écologie au cœur de notre projet.
 
Nos cuitochette sont fabriquées à partir de bois durable, sans plastique, afin de proposer une alternative respectueuse de l’environnement.

 Basés à Toulouse, nous avons créé cette start-up fictive dans le cadre de notre BTS GPME. 

Ce projet nous permet de développer nos compétences en gestion d’entreprise tout en proposant une innovation responsable et pratique.

 Rejoignez nous dans cette aventure et découvrez la cuitochette, l’ustensile éco-responsable du futur !

Name: Swisra.se
Description:
Creating dream houses with durable and visually captivating wood panels. Our expertise lies in the traditional Japanese technique of Shou Sugi Ban (Yakisugi).

1. DURABLE BY NATURE

Our Shou Sugi Ban wood is highly resistant to mold, rot, decay, and termites, thanks to the meticulous charring process. Experience long-lasting beauty without the worry of extensive maintenance.

2. LONG-LASTING, LOW MAINTENANCE

With Swisra's Shou Sugi Ban paneling and siding, you can enjoy up to 50-80 years of worry-free use. Save time and money as our products require minimal maintenance.

3. ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY CHOICE

Swisra is committed to sustainability. Our Shou Sugi Ban wood is free from harmful chemicals and toxins, ensuring a safe and eco-friendly option for your projects.

4. UNIQUE APPEARANCE

The centuries-old appearance of Shou Sugi Ban brings a distinctive and timeless elegance to any space. Revel in the natural beauty of our wood panels that surpass traditional staining methods.

5. EXPERT TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE

Swisra is more than a supplier; we are your partners in design excellence. Our team provides personalized guidance in selecting the perfect wood and finish for your specific requirements.

6. HANDCRAFTED AUTHENTICITY

Each Swisra wood panel is meticulously handcrafted, preserving its natural touch and authentic charm. Experience the difference that true craftsmanship makes.

Join architects, designers, and builders who have discovered the unmatched durability and beauty of Swisra's Shou Sugi Ban wood panels. 

Visit our website or contact us today to explore the world of Shou Sugi Ban and transform your spaces into stunning works of art.

Name: Huangshan DECHO CO.,Ltd
Description:
Huangshan DECHO CO.LTD  is a professional manufacturer of new eco-friendly wood plastic composite products in Huangshan, China. We have over 15 year’s experience providing WPC. Over those years, we have grown into a large Enterprise and one of the biggest players in the WPC market with 49 extruding lines and 150 employees. Annually we produce 1000+ containers with annual sales turnover of over USD20,000,000. We always hold the norm of environmental protection and try our best to protect the environment. So what we provide is the products with high quality but low maintaining cost. 


In addition to the domestic market, we also serve a global customer network with tight production deadlines for all clients. We have a rich customer base, our customers are mainly from Europe, Oceania, and Southeast Asia. Our unique W P C profile is made from premium bio-fiber & Grade 'A' H D P E making it superior to natural timber with much less propensity to rot or crack. The beautiful aesthetics of our select timber grain appearance make our W P C superior to plastic profiles for outdoor application. 

We have a wide range of colors and styles to cover all customer tastes and demands. We have our own brand and offer OEM service too. We provide you with ultra-professional manufacturing of W P C decking, tiles, wall cladding, fencing and other materials.

Great service is our mission, high quality is our obligation, and we pride ourselves on a "customer first" service.
If you have any Questions, please feel free to contact us!

Name: Listone Giordano Miami
Description:
Welcome to Listone Giordano Miami, the second U.S. flagship location of Italy’s premier luxury wood flooring brand. A hotspot for Florida’s architecture and design (A&D) community, we bring elegance and innovation to both residential and commercial spaces.

Since 1984, Listone Giordano has combined timeless Italian craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology to create high-end wood flooring, wall panels, and ceiling solutions. Known for its exceptional quality, our flooring features multilayer birch support, micrometric joints, and Crystalcare antibacterial finishes, ensuring lasting durability and beauty.

At Listone Giordano, we are passionate about sustainability, responsibly sourcing our materials to make a positive impact on both the environment and society. Our floors are found in luxury homes, restaurants, lounges, and more across the globe, offering sophistication and style for those who value the finest in design.

Explore the world of Listone Giordano at our Miami flagship, where Italian excellence meets Miami’s vibrant design scene!

Name: Maderas Abad
Description:
¿Quién somos? 

Con más de tres décadas de experiencia, Maderas Abad es una empresa familiar arraigada en la tradición y el compromiso con la calidad en el sector maderero. Desde nuestros inicios en los años noventa, hemos mantenido viva la herencia de tres generaciones dedicadas a la madera, adaptándonos constantemente a los cambios del mercado para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

 ¿Qué hacemos?

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de productos relacionados con la madera, atendiendo tanto a particulares como a profesionales y empresas. Desde maderas de alta calidad hasta puertas, tableros, pérgolas, frisos y tarimas, nuestro compromiso es proporcionar soluciones a medida que se ajusten a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente.

 Nuestros Servicios

Nuestro equipo altamente capacitado no solo se encarga de la venta de productos, sino que también brinda asesoramiento experto en carpintería, garantizando resultados duraderos y satisfactorios en cada proyecto. Nos enorgullece ofrecer un servicio personalizado y orientado a superar las expectativas de nuestros clientes.

 Calidad y Compromiso

En Maderas Miguel Abad e Hijos, la calidad es nuestra prioridad. Trabajamos con los mejores materiales y técnicas para garantizar la excelencia en cada producto que ofrecemos. Además, mantenemos un firme compromiso con la sostenibilidad ambiental, gestionando nuestros recursos de manera responsable y respetuosa con el medio ambiente.

 Únete a nuestra comunidad

Estamos comprometidos con el éxito de nuestros clientes y nos enorgullece ser parte de la creación de espacios y proyectos excepcionales.

Contáctanos hoy mismo y descubre cómo Maderas Abad puede hacer realidad tus proyectos de carpintería con calidad, compromiso y experiencia!

Name: Decorganik
Description:
Decorganik propose des éléments de communication qualitatifs et respecteux de l'environnement.

 En tant que passionnés de surf et artisans créatifs, nous sommes profondément concernés par la santé de nos océans et de notre planète. On conçois nos stickers en bois en gardant à l'esprit la réduction maximale de notre empreinte écologique.

 Enfin une alternative : Nous sommes fiers de vous présenter nos autocollants en bois écologiques, une alternative durable aux stickers en plastique vinyle qui se dégradent en micro-plastiques néfastes pour l'environnement. Ils sont entièrement biodégradables, se décomposant naturellement en copeaux-compost au fil des décennies. Cela permet de réduire considérablement notre empreinte environnementale et de contribuer à la préservation des sols.

 Eco-friendly : La production de nos Stickers Bois est également respectueuse de l'environnement. Elle demande un faible coût énergétique et n'utilise aucun produit chimique ou toxique. Ainsi, vous pouvez être assuré que nos produits sont sûrs à utiliser et ne contribuent pas à la pollution de l'eau ou de l'air.

C'est local : Nous accordons une grande importance à la provenance de nos matériaux. Notre bois est sourcé auprès d'un fournisseur français basé en Alsace, garantissant une traçabilité et un soutien à l'économie locale. De plus, nos autocollants sont créés avec passion à Vannes, en Bretagne, ce qui en fait une production entièrement 100 % made in France.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre démarche éco-responsable en optant pour nos autocollants en bois durables et esthétiques. Merci de soutenir notre vision d'un avenir plus respectueux de la planète!

Name: ParkettHandwerk-Wildermann
Description:
Wir restaurieren, konservieren und fertigen Parketttafeln mit Substanz.
Unsere Leistungen umfassen die fachgerechte Restaurierung und Konservierung historischer Parkettböden, insbesondere von Tafelparkett und Intarsienböden. Mit minimalinvasiven Techniken erhalten wir wertvolle Originalsubstanz und sorgen dafür, dass alte Böden wieder nutzbar und dauerhaft stabil bleiben.

Darüber hinaus fertigen wir Parketttafeln nach historischem Vorbild oder individueller Planung neu an – präzise und handwerklich hochwertig. Bei der Verlegung massiver Parkettböden setzen wir auf nachhaltige Materialien, langlebige Konstruktionen und eine Beratung direkt im Objekt, angepasst an Raum, Licht und Nutzung.

Unsere Arbeit verbindet traditionelles Handwerk mit moderner Denkmalpflege – für hochwertige Böden mit Geschichte und Zukunft.

Name: TESLI — Ukrainian Manufacturer of Premium Sauna & Spa Products
Description:
TESLI is a Ukrainian brand with deep craftsmanship roots and a modern production approach. The company’s story began over 10 years ago in a small carpentry workshop in Okhtyrka, Sumy region — and has grown into one of Ukraine’s leading manufacturers of sauna, bathhouse, hammam, and spa equipment.

Our production is equipped with advanced CNC milling machines and professional tools from top global brands. We specialize in sauna finishing materials (timber, lining boards), doors, windows, accessories (buckets, ladles, tubs), and contrast shower systems. Every TESLI product is made from eco-friendly, certified wood — including thermowood — and premium stainless steel, ensuring durability, sustainability, and impeccable quality.

TESLI products are widely used in wellness centers, spas, and private sauna construction projects across Ukraine and abroad. Beyond functionality, our materials also bring warmth and natural aesthetics to interior design.

Why partners choose TESLI:

Over 20 years of experience and trusted reputation.

Strong presence in the Ukrainian market and growing exports to Canada and Europe (Czech Republic, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland).

Full-cycle in-house production and strict quality control at every stage.

Wide assortment of reliable, eco-conscious products.

Consistent warehouse stock and strong dealer support.

Professional team and modern equipment ensuring stability and growth.

Partnering with TESLI means joining a brand that blends Ukrainian craftsmanship with European quality standards. It’s not just a collaboration — it’s an opportunity to grow your business with a trusted manufacturing partner.

Name: LiveEdgeGallery
Description:
Live Edge Gallery specializes in crafting high-end, handmade furniture using traditional and modern techniques. Their furniture is characterized by its unique blend of natural wood and epoxy, which creates a stunning, modern look that is both stylish and durable.

Live Edge Gallery's furniture is made by carefully selecting the finest wood available, which is then hand-milled and shaped to bring out the natural beauty of the grain patterns. The epoxy is added using a technique called "live edge pouring," where it is poured directly onto the wood to fill any gaps or voids, creating a smooth surface.

The use of sustainable wood and attention to detail in selecting unique pieces makes each of Live Edge Gallery's furniture a unique work of art. In addition to epoxy and wood, they also incorporate other materials such as metal and glass.

Their furniture is highly customizable to suit the preferences of the clients. With a unique blend of modern and rustic elements, Live Edge Gallery's furniture is both timeless and on-trend. Overall, their commitment to craftsmanship, sustainability, and attention to detail makes their furniture a standout piece in any space. #coffeetable #rivertables #liveedgeslabs #servingtray #corporategifting

Name: Luxe Architectural
Description:
About Luxe Architectural


Transforming spaces without the mess, cost, or disruption of traditional millwork.
At Luxe Architectural, we believe architectural mouldings should feel custom—but never be complicated. We are the original creators of the patent-pending self-adhering (peel & stick) door and wall moulding kits, handcrafted in the USA from premium wood—never plastic or composites.

Our founder, Esther Giammarco, launched Luxe after realizing there wasn’t a product that combined quality craftsmanship with easy installation for both property owners and renters. The idea was simple: What if professional-grade mouldings could deliver custom results—without the frustration?

After months of testing, Esther introduced the first Luxe moulding kit in 2012. Today, we offer both permanent and removable moulding options—giving architects, designers, homeowners, and property managers a high-quality, time-saving way to enhance any space.

The Luxe Difference
• Kits arrive fully assembled and ready to install
• Simple, tool-free installation
• No power tools, dust, glue, or nails
• Removable kits are renter-friendly and reusable
• Permanent kits can be caulked for a seamless finish

Who We Serve
Homeowners, designers, contractors, property managers, and developers who want the look of custom millwork—without the cost, delay, or mess.

Our mission is simple: to provide beautiful, professional-quality mouldings that are easily accessible—without compromise.

Every Luxe frame is manufactured to professional-grade standards and available primed or in stain-grade premium poplar. Our products deliver the quality of traditional millwork at a fraction of the time, cost, and disruption.

Whether you’re upgrading a single door or transforming an entire property, Luxe Architectural makes premium-quality millwork almost effortless.

Made in the USA | Handcrafted Quality | Patent-Pending Design

You won't find mass production here - only unique, handmade, bespoke items available to order.

Locally handmade
All of the products are handcrafted in our workshop in the small, but beautiful town of Forfar. We pride ourselves in the love, attention and detail we put into every one of our products.

Details and finish
Each product can be finished with a wax of your choice. We use high quality wax - Polish Wax for furniture and  Hard Wax Oil for animal accessories which is pet safe.

Sustainable
We take pride in sourcing our wood locally and choosing suppliers who share our commitment to sustainability and quality.

Description:

The company is based in Ukraine and has expertise in the production and processing of wood products such as charcoal, wood chips, and sawdust.

As a supplier of wood products for barbecues, UkrWoodGroup ensures that the wood products are of high quality and are suitable for use in grilling and smoking. The company sources its wood from sustainable forests and uses modern production techniques to ensure that the wood is clean, dry, and free from impurities.

In addition to supplying wood products for BBQ, UkrWoodGroup also creates private labels for its customers. Private labeling is a process where a company creates and sells products under another company's brand name. This allows companies to sell high-quality products without having to invest in the production process.

Overall, UkrWoodGroup is a company that specializes in creating private labels and supplying wood products for BBQ. The company's expertise in the production and processing of wood products ensures that its customers receive high-quality products that are suitable for use in grilling and smoking.

Name: SAS MARTINOD
Description:
Menuiserie FLACHER, Menuiserie engagée.
Si nous jouissons aujourd’hui d’une réelle renommée en tant que fabricants de menuiserie bois complexe, intérieure et extérieure, c’est parce que nous avons investi dans ce que notre métier a de plus précieux : le sérieux technique et éthique. Réalisation de fenêtres, chaque projet est unique, chaque réalisation FLACHER est spécifique. Maintenir cette excellence demande un engagement fort. 
Menuisier engagé dans la qualité tout d’abord. Celle de ses produits, ses services, sa technicité. Depuis 1955, un savoir-faire, une réactivité, et une adaptabilité à tous les défis architecturaux, qui ne se démentent pas, pour un résultat sur-mesure et sans rature.
Menuisier engagé pour l’humain, aussi. Une proximité avec ses clients et une qualité dans la relation à l’autre devenues les racines de notre entreprise. Pour que notre excellence dans la menuiserie bois professionnelle serve de socle à une innovation digitale qui vous donnera la main pour changer les choses, avec nous. Pour que notre atelier devienne le vôtre, en confiance et en transparence.
Menuisier engagé pour demain, enfin. Car si le bois est un matériau d’avenir, notre façon de le travailler, le performer… et même l’aimer… a un impact environnemental fort. Des actes sont nécessaires. Les nôtres sont déjà clairs : plus d’emballages, un réseau local, une chaufferie aux copeaux…

Name: Marobag Romandie
Description:
Depuis 1996, Marobag Romandie SA est un acteur clé en Suisse dans la conception, la fabrication et l'installation de portes en bois sur mesure et d'agencements intérieurs. Basée à Morges, notre entreprise allie savoir-faire artisanal, innovation et qualité suisse  pour offrir des solutions adaptées aux professionnels de l’architecture, de la construction et de l’aménagement intérieur.

Nos produits couvrent une large gamme de portes : portes pleines, vitrées, coulissantes, affleurantes, pivotantes ainsi que des portes techniques offrant des performances spécifiques (pare-feu EI30, anti-effraction RC2-RC4, isolation thermique et acoustique, issues de secours). Nous proposons également des agencements sur mesure, notamment des armoires, habillages muraux, encadrements de fenêtres et autres menuiseries intérieures.

Pourquoi choisir Marobag ?
 Fabrication suisse avec des matériaux de haute qualité
 Personnalisation totale selon vos exigences esthétiques et techniques
 Installation professionnelle assurée par nos experts
 Collaboration avec divers secteurs : bureaux, hôtellerie, commerces, résidences, écoles, hôpitaux…
 Engagement durable dans le choix des matériaux et des processus de production

Parmi nos références prestigieuses figurent l’École Technique des Métiers de Fribourg, Bobst à Mex et le Palais de Justice de l’Hermitage à Lausanne.

 Notre siège : Riond-Bosson 13, 1110 Morges, Suisse
 Contact : info@marobagsa.com |  +41 21 636 02 22

Faites confiance à Marobag Romandie SA pour des portes et aménagements en bois d’exception.

Name: Arakuto
Description:
Arakuto is the first Maison in the world dedicated to the artisanal creation of sacred surfaces devoted to food preparation and gastronomy, called culinary altars.

Created in 2020 by Thierry Forbois, Arakuto is a response to the existential unease of our time, where more and more of us are overcome by a sense of emptiness, disconnection, and disenchantment. The impression that everything has lost its meaning, of no longer belonging to reality or feeling relevant to it, of lacking true connection to others, to beauty, to life, and to the mystery in all these things. An unease exacerbated by our alienation from an increasingly virtual and disembodied existence.

Arakuto invites us to rediscover moments of sacredness, authenticity, and resonance in our daily lives, by making the act of cooking a moment of elevation, of returning to oneself and to reality, of communion with the life that nourishes life.

Name: Arb-Rini Woodworking
Description:

Unsere Mission ist es, die persönlichen Visionen jedes Kunden massgeschneidert und mit kompromissloser kosovarischer Handwerkskunst zu realisieren, um damit globale Benchmarks für Langlebigkeit, Design-Funktion und Wertschöpfung zu setzen.

Unsere Vision ist es, die Wahrnehmung des Holzhandwerks in der gesamten Balkanregion und im internationalen Markt neu zu definieren. Wir agieren als gestalterische Kraft, die individuelle Kundenwünsche in Produkte von unvergleichlicher Qualität verwandelt.

Arb-Rini Woodworking wird zur Referenz, weil:
Marktführerschaft durch Individualität: Wir sind der massgeschneiderte Schreinermeister unserer Kunden. Wir übersetzen komplexe, persönliche Anforderungen in exklusive Holzlösungen, die nicht nur Raume füllen, sondern Lebensqualität schaffen.

Unübertroffene Exzellenz: Unsere Fertigung ist eine Fusion aus dem tiefen Verständnis kosovarischer Baukunst und globalen Standards höchster Präzision. Dies garantiert Produkte, die in Ästhetik, Funktionalität und Langlebigkeit neue Benchmarks setzen.

Werte und Vertrauen: Wir schaffen einen bleibenden Wert für unsere Kunden, indem wir Transparenz und Verlässlichkeit in jedem Projekt garantieren. Das Ergebnis ist eine Investition in die Zukunft, getragen von unserer Leitphilosophie: Stärke aus Holz. Präzision aus Leidenschaft.

A GTP Pisos, em parceria com o Grupo Tupinambá, une mais de 20 anos de expertise no setor de madeira com um compromisso inabalável com qualidade e sustentabilidade. Enquanto o Grupo Tupinambá realiza a extração e o beneficiamento da madeira, a GTP aplica camadas de verniz de alta tecnologia, garantindo pisos de madeira duráveis, resistentes e visualmente impecáveis.

Nosso portfólio inclui piso pronto de madeira, assoalho de madeira, decks, tacos e ripados de madeira, produtos que atendem às necessidades de pequenos lojistas e profissionais do setor que buscam soluções de alta qualidade para seus clientes.

 Sustentabilidade como Prioridade

Description:
Legacies of America Woodworking Co. honors the dedication and service of Veterans, Servicemembers, and First Responders through their America Made - Veteran Built products.

All of our products are crafted using REAL hardwoods, sourced here in America and every item made is built by U.S. Military Veterans. We take great pride in our products and knowing the importance of what each of our items will hold and represent. Our goal is to build a handcrafted item worthy of the recipient's service and continue to find ways to support and give back to the Veteran & First Responder Community."

Our products are truly made in America! The hardwoods we choose are harvested responsibly and only come from American sawyers located all across the country. The glass we use for our shadow boxes and flag display cases is made here in America. Everything from the felt, the backer board, even the lacquer finish we use, are all made by American companies with origin stories similar ours.



We believe in supporting the American economy and keeping our money here in the U.S. When you purchase one of our products, you can be proud to know that not only is your hard earned money staying here in the United States, but that you are also supporting American jobs!

We Are...

American Made - Veteran Built

Name: Oney Furniture

HİKAYEMİZ

2007 yılında babamızın kurduğu küçük bir atölyede başlayan hikayemiz 2019 yılında yaptığımız ortaklık anlaşması ile 2000 m²’lik bir alana taşınmış ve Oney Furniture markası altında aylık iki bin masa, sandalye ve sedir üretimine başlamıştır. 
Oney Furniture, tomruk biçme, fırınlama, ahşap imalat, boya, dikişhane, döşeme, AR-GE üniteleri ve modern teknolojiye uygun makine parkuruyla aldığı tomrukları sandalyeye dönüştürüp müşterilerine sunan bir kuruluştur. 

KALİTE ANLAYIŞIMIZ
Oney Furniture, kurulduğu günden bu yana tek hedefi müşterilerine daha iyi ve kaliteli hizmet verebilmektir. Oney, yenilikleri ve teknolojik gelişmeleri takip ederek iş ortaklarının beklentilerine cevap verecek nitelikte Avrupa standartlarına uygun ürünler sunmaktadır. 
İş ortaklarının en iyisini hakkettiğini düşünen Oney, hammadde seçiminden üretime, üretimde kullandığı teknolojiye ve satış sonrası müşteri hizmetine kadar her aşamada kalite standartlarında hizmet vermeyi kendine ilke edinmiştir. Tasarım aşamasında fonksiyonel ve estetik yeni ürünler sunmak, kullanıcıya tasarımdan üretime tüm süreçlerde kaliteli, sağlam, ergonomik ve daha verimli mekanlar yaratmak için çalışmaktadır.

VİZYONUMUZ
İş ortaklarımızın talep etmiş olduğu bünyemizde ki ürünlerimizi ve özel isteğe göre tasarlanan ürünleri Avrupa standartlarına uygun bir şekilde kendilerine sunmaktır.

MİSYONUMUZ
HoReCa sektöründe yapmış olduğumuz projelerle iş ortaklarımızın tavsiye ettiği ve vazgeçemediği kalite adresi olmaktır.

Name: miniblu
Description:
Im gemeinsamen Nordspanien-Urlaub 2018 kam die Idee. Mit Blick auf die rauschenden Wellen des Atlantiks. Und auf diejenigen, die noch die letzten Sonnenstunden des Tages auf ihren Surfbrettern ausnutzten. Diesen Moment möchten wir in eure Kinderzimmer bringen. Die Schönheit, Vielfalt aber auch die Verletzlichkeit der Ozeane und deren Bewohner.

Und so entstand miniblu. Ein junges Kinderlabel für echte Wasserraten, Tiefseetaucher und Sandburgen-Künstler. Wir, das sind Bruna (0), Lari, (29) und Emi (30) und wir sorgen für eine kleine Brise Meeresluft bei euch zu Hause. Und das auf ganz unterschiedliche Art und Weise.

INSPIRED BY THE OCEAN

Die erste Welle spült euch beispielsweise unsere Holzbausteine the sea,  the beach und the coast an. Doch wie auch in den Tiefen der Meere, so schlummern auch in uns noch zahlreiche weitere Ideen zum Spielen, Träumen...oder auch zum Anziehen.

SOZIALE VERANTWORTUNG

Bei all unseren Projekten geben wir uns größte Mühe, sämtliche Ressourcen bewusst und respektvoll zu behandeln und einzusetzen. Konkret zeigt sich das beispielsweise in der Auswahl unserer Lieferanten. So gelingt es uns die Baustein-Serie zu 100% in Deutschland herzustellen und Transportwege so kurz wie möglich zu halten. Außerdem verwenden wir ausschließlich zertifiziertes Holz aus nachhaltiger Waldwirtschaft und arbeiten mit einer integrativen Holzwerkstatt zusammen. Unsere Verpackung besteht vollständig aus Wellpappe, womit sie sich bedenkenlos im Altpapier entsorgen und später wieder vollständig dem Recyclingkreislauf zuführen lässt. Aus Respekt gegenüber Mensch und Natur.

It's toys wander carefreely somewhere between the earth, the sea and the sky and invite the child to invent the play. With a focus on beauty as an intergrative part of children's everyday experience, their design is minimalistic, yet playful.

Jose Navarro and Athina Doukaki is the creative duo behind The Wandering Workshop, 'toys made of dreams'. After tasting in bites happiness around Barcelona, the Cyclades and Crete, after having worked in dusty restoration workshops in Barcelona and on windy hills in archaeological excavations in the Cyclades, they designed their first wooden toy in a small workshop surrounded by the Aegean Sea. That Winter of their 26 years marked the beginning of The Wandering Workshop even if they yet didn't quite know...

The Wandering Workshop sells toys all over the world from Alaska to Japan, Paris, Sweden and Copenhagen, to California, New York, Dubai and Australia in a colourful map of selected stores that honors play as it is: children's ultimate way of engaging and making sense of the world.

Our industry expertise makes us a great partner for our clients because we know all of the players and what products they offer. We draw on our extensive industry knowledge to find the best product options for our clients, which often takes a job well done to a job done perfectly. 

By leveraging cutting edge technology, we are able to offer some of the industry’s quickest fabrication times and deliver first-rate finished products. We use technology to accurately measure spaces, evaluate design options and create the best possible finished product, saving you time and money. 

At Growth Ring Innovations, we are committed to simplifying the millworking process and ensuring we deliver your vision, on time and on budget. Name: Houthandel Nijweide
Description:
Op de grens van de buurtschappen Brinkheurne en Kotten in de gemeente Winterswijk is sinds 1866 Houthandel Nijweide gevestigd.

Hier wordt al meer dan 150 jaar hout gezaagd, vroeger geheel handmatig in een diepe zaagkuil. Hout werd op stam gekocht, waarna de bomen werden omgehakt en tot en met eind jaren zeventig met het paard uit het bos gesleept. Het hout werd verwerkt tot planken, balken, rondhout voor de mijnbouw, heipalen en halffabricaten voor de meubel- en palletindustrie.

Nu worden de stammen voornamelijk machinaal in het bos gezaagd en aan de weg gelegd door machines. Vrachtwagens rijden de stammen naar onze houtzagerij, waar ze op de bandzaag tot een diameter van 100 cm worden verzaagd tot planken en balken.

Al deze vernieuwingen hebben ervoor gezorgd dat we preciezer en sneller kunnen zagen. Maar gelukkig is het authentieke karakter van de zagerij wel bewaard gebleven. We streven naar een goed persoonlijk contact, waarbij er ruimte is voor verschillende wensen.

Kom bij ons langs en ruik/voel de producten!

Régénération des tissus cutanés

Name: KOERNER Saunabau GmbH
Description:
Willkommen beim ersten Saunabauer im deutschsprachigen Raum.

Gegründet 1949 von Frau H. Körner in Konstanz, sind wir nun in der dritten Generation Experten für die handwerkliche Herstellung Ihrer individuellen Sauna.

In den vergangenen fast sieben Jahrzehnten haben sich die Einstellung zur Sauna und besonders die Einstellung zu Gesundheit und Wellness grundlegend geändert. Saunabaden zählt heute mehr denn je zur persönlichen Gesundheitsvorsorge und ist in das tägliche Bewusstsein gerückt. Folglich haben sich auch Ansprüche an die eigene Sauna gewandelt. Sie wird im Bad oder Wohnbereich integriert und muss heute hohen ästhetischen Ansprüchen gerecht werden – ohne dabei an Funktionalität und Wirkung einzubüßen.

Den Herausforderungen dieses Wandels hat sich die KOERNER Saunamanufaktur seit Gründung stets gestellt. Einige Innovationen durften wir beeinflussen und auf den Weg bringen. Unsere Erfahrungen im Bau öffentlicher Anlagen, vom Sportstudio über große Saunalandschaften bis hin zu Kreuzfahrtschiffen, können wir heute bei der Gestaltung, Konzeption und Herstellung privater Saunen einbringen.

Wir freuen uns darauf, mit Ihnen Ihre individuelle Sauna zu entwickeln.

Name: L'Atelier de la Boiselière
Description:
L'Atelier de la Boiselière est un atelier d'artisanat d’art spécialisé dans la création d’objets en bois inspirés des univers médiévaux fantastiques. J’apporte une attention toute particulière à vous proposer des objets de qualités, esthétiques mais aussi utiles ! 

Vous êtes joueurs de jeux de rôle, de GN ou tout simplement un.e passionné.e.s par ces mondes remplis de dragons, de magie et de runes ? Jetez un coup d’œil à mes productions sur mon site ou mes réseaux sociaux !

N'hésitez pas à faire un tour sur la page instagram https://www.instagram.com/atelier_de_la_boiseliere/
la page facebook https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100088094027557
ou le site internet https://atelier-de-la-boiseliere.com/
